title: Propose and Attend: Training-free MLLM Grounding Confidence via Multi-Token Localized Attention
summary: Multimodal large language models can emit localized predictions, bounding boxes for objects and temporal windows for video and audio events, but they hallucinate these regions prolifically. The model's own token log-probabilities are nearly uninformative: they conflate grounding quality with input ambiguity, and coordinate tokens become near-deterministic once the model commits. We propose Multi-Token Localized Attention (MTLA): a training-free, post-hoc score that measures how strongly a prediction's tokens attend to the region they claim. Prior attention-based detectors, which sum attention over the entire input modality and read a single response token, are weaker special cases; we show that summing only within the claimed region and aggregating across all prediction tokens recovers a stronger grounding signal. The same recipe applies almost trivially to other modalities and tasks: object detection in images and temporal localization in video and audio. Across multiple MLLM families and three modalities, MTLA improves hallucination AUROC by +7 to +38 over the best prior training-free baseline. Used as a confidence score for re-ranking, it nearly doubles the zero-shot COCO detection AP of an open-source 8B generalist (from 20.4 to 37.0), narrowing the gap to supervised detectors without any task-specific training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的后验评分方法 MTLA，用于判断多模态大语言模型输出的定位结果是否可信，并显著提升框选、时序定位等任务中的幻觉识别与重排序效果。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型虽然能够输出目标框或时间窗口，但经常出现定位幻觉；现有基于 token 置信度或单一注意力的评估方法，难以区分“输入本身歧义”与“定位是否正确”，因此需要更可靠的定位置信度信号。
AI.method: 提出 Multi-Token Localized Attention（MTLA）：在后验阶段分析模型预测 token 对其声称区域的注意力强度，只在预测区域内部聚合注意力，并对全部预测 token 进行汇总。该方法不依赖额外训练，可直接推广到图像目标检测、视频与音频时序定位等任务。
AI.result: 在多个多模态大模型和三类模态上，MTLA 相比最佳无训练基线将幻觉识别 AUROC 提升了 7 到 38 个点；作为重排序置信度使用时，将开源 8B 通用模型在零样本 COCO 检测上的 AP 从 20.4 提升到 37.0。
AI.conclusion: MTLA 证明了“预测 token 对其声明区域的局部注意力”是比传统 token 概率更有效的定位可信度信号，可在不做任务特定训练的情况下显著降低幻觉并增强多模态定位性能。

title: Segmentation before Answering: Pixel Grounding for MLLM Visual Reasoning
summary: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have evolved from static perception to interleaved visual-language reasoning, often referred to as ``thinking with images''. A basic operation in this reasoning process is to zoom in on regions of interest (often represented with bounding boxes) to acquire finer visual details. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Seg}mentation before \textbf{Answer}ing (SegAnswer), which shifts the unit of zoom-in from the popular bounding box to pixel-level segmentation mask. By employing fine-grained masks to isolate the target area from cluttered environments, segmented visual input yields a more precise region of interest, effectively filtering out redundant background and interfering objects. Furthermore, the discrete patches of segmented visual input align more seamlessly with how MLLMs structure visual tokens via positional embeddings. In experiments, we evaluate SegAnswer across diverse benchmarks, including high-resolution perception, general perception, and hallucination. It achieves consistent improvements and also exhibits considerable performance on segmentation tasks, validating its capability for reliable pixel grounding.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出SegAnswer，用像素级分割掩码替代边界框作为多模态大语言模型“放大查看”目标区域的方式，以提升细粒度视觉推理与回答准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在进行图文交错推理时，常用边界框裁剪目标区域，但边界框会包含较多背景和干扰物，影响细节获取；作者希望通过更精确的像素级区域选择，提高目标定位与视觉理解质量。
AI.method: 提出“先分割、后回答”的SegAnswer框架：先用细粒度分割掩码提取感兴趣区域，再将分割后的视觉输入送入MLLM进行推理；这种方式既减少冗余背景，又与MLLM基于位置嵌入组织视觉token的方式更契合。
AI.result: 在高分辨率感知、通用感知和幻觉抑制等多个基准上，SegAnswer取得了持续且一致的性能提升；同时在分割任务上也表现出较强能力，说明其具备可靠的像素级视觉定位能力。
AI.conclusion: 像素级分割比边界框更适合作为MLLM的视觉聚焦单位，SegAnswer能更有效地过滤干扰信息并提升多类视觉推理任务表现。

title: Ground3D-LMM: Fine-Grained 3D Point Grounding and Spatial Reasoning with LMM
summary: Natural-language queries about 3D environments become actionable when responses are verifiable and metric. Verifiability requires explicit grounding to the referred 3D region, while metric answers report physical measurements in real-world units (e.g., size, thickness, clearance, and distance). Existing 3D large multimodal models (LMMs) approaches remain limited: conversational systems typically respond without explicit 3D grounding, while 3D grounding models are not designed for interactive, metric-aware dialogue. In this paper, we present Ground3D-LMM, a unified model that takes a point cloud and an optional RGB image as input and supports 3D spatial conversation with (i) point-grounded responses and (ii) metric numeric outputs at both object and part granularity, including multi-object queries. To evaluate this intersection of grounding and measurement, we define the 3D Grounded Measurement task, which requires predicting the referred 3D region and the corresponding metric quantities in real-world units. We introduce a large-scale dataset built on ScanNet and ScanNet++ datasets with dense object and part annotations and roughly 2.5M question-answer pairs spanning eight tasks, along with a manually verified test set. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets and tasks show that our proposed Ground3D-LMM model provides a strong baseline for grounded, metric-aware 3D conversational understanding. Our dataset and model are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的三维多模态模型Ground3D-LMM，用于支持带有三维定位依据的对话式理解，并输出真实世界单位的度量结果，同时构建了新的3D Grounded Measurement任务与大规模数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有三维大语言多模态模型存在两类不足：一类能对话但缺少明确的三维空间指向，另一类能做三维定位但不擅长交互式、可度量的问答。论文希望让自然语言关于三维场景的提问，既可验证、又可量化。
AI.method: 作者提出Ground3D-LMM，输入为点云和可选RGB图像，能够进行点级三维指向回复，并在物体级和部件级输出长度、厚度、间隙、距离等数值结果，支持多目标查询。为评估该能力，作者定义了3D Grounded Measurement任务，并基于ScanNet和ScanNet++构建了包含密集物体与部件标注、约250万问答对的多任务数据集，同时制作了人工核验测试集。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在多个数据集和任务上表现强劲，能够作为三维中具备定位能力和度量能力的对话理解基线。
AI.conclusion: 该工作统一了三维空间指向与真实尺度测量两类能力，推动了面向三维环境的可验证、可度量自然语言交互研究，并公开了数据集与模型以便后续研究。

title: A Multimodal Reasoning Typology for Grounding Chart-Image Coherence in Science Communication
summary: Charts and images appear together throughout scientific publications, yet most computational work does not characterize their coherence. We argue that a chart, its accompanying image, and the caption that links them form a multimodal unit, and that the inferential work required to read it varies systematically. To capture this variation, we develop a typology of reasoning gaps, R1 through R5, that characterizes how chart, image, and text jointly convey a scientific claim, and the interpretive work this demands of the reader. Some pairs restate the same data, while in other pairs, charts are used to quantify a structure the image localizes, project image content onto an external variable, audit an image-based claim, or jointly construct a frame that neither panel can establish alone. The typology is anchored in the grounding theory of communication and was derived bottom-up, with a neuroscience expert, from a corpus of 79 traumatic brain injury papers and 32 chart-image pairs. Crucially, the levels provide a systematic mechanism for identifying where grounding succeeds or breaks down, rather than leaving it to subjective inference. We show this in a study in which a domain expert and three non-experts judge vision-language model (VLM) descriptions of 25 pairs: the level predicts where their judgments align and where they diverge, isolating the points at which contextual knowledge, not the figure, carries coherence. This typology thus offers figure designers a systematic way to balance text against chart-image pairs, bridging the expert-to-non-expert divide in reading a scientific takeaway.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一套用于分析科学论文中“图表-图像-说明文字”组合的推理间隙分类法R1到R5，用以刻画读者在理解多模态科学结论时所需的不同解释工作，并通过真实论文语料与读者实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 科学论文中图表与图像常常共同出现，但现有计算研究很少系统刻画二者及其说明文字之间的连贯性与推理负担。作者希望建立一个可操作的框架，识别哪些地方依赖上下文知识、哪些地方由图本身支撑，从而缩小专家与非专家在阅读科学图示时的理解差距。
AI.method: 作者以“ grounding theory ”为理论基础，结合神经科学专家进行自下而上的归纳，基于79篇创伤性脑损伤论文中的32组图表-图像配对，提出R1至R5五级推理间隙类型，分别描述不同的图、像、文协同方式。随后又在25组配对上进行读者实验，由一名领域专家和三名非专家评估视觉语言模型生成的描述，以检验该分类法对判断一致性与分歧点的预测能力。
AI.result: 研究发现，不同推理间隙等级能够预测专家与非专家在VLM描述判断上的一致或分歧：某些等级下判断较一致，另一些等级则明显依赖背景知识而非图像本身。该分类法还能定位grounding成功或失效的具体环节，显示出其对多模态科学表达分析的区分能力。
AI.conclusion: R1到R5的推理间隙分类法为分析科学论文中的图表-图像-文本组合提供了系统框架，可用于指导图形设计、平衡文字与视觉元素的表达，并帮助理解专家与非专家在读取科学结论时的认知差异。

title: Green for Go, Red for No: Visual Grounding via Semantic Segmentation for VLA Navigation Policies
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models enable robot navigation from natural language and visual goals, but remain susceptible to perceptual distractions and ambiguous scene interpretations. This paper presents the first empirical evaluation of visual grounding for VLA navigation policies. We propose a real-time segmentation-based grounding method that highlights traversable areas in green and non-traversable areas in red using SegFormer. Two variants are evaluated: observation-only segmentation and joint observation-goal augmentation. Using OmniVLA on the Grand Tour dataset, we show that visual grounding reduces the mean waypoint error by 27-44% at the farthest waypoint, depending on the instruction length. The benefits are greater for long instructions than for short instructions, and grounding provides little improvement for image goals. Normalized error analysis indicates that grounding primarily acts as a trajectory length regularizer, reducing the predicted path length by 30% without improving per-unit-distance reasoning. Our results indicate that visual grounding offers a simple, computationally inexpensive method to improve VLA navigation without model retraining, although it cannot compensate for missing training signals in out-of-distribution instructions.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统评估了视觉接地对视觉-语言-动作导航策略的作用，提出一种基于SegFormer的实时分割接地方法，并证明它能在无需重新训练模型的情况下显著降低导航误差，尤其对长指令更有效。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言-动作模型虽然能根据自然语言和图像目标进行机器人导航，但容易受到视觉干扰和场景歧义影响，因此需要一种简单、低成本的方式来增强模型对可通行区域的理解与决策稳定性。
AI.method: 作者提出两种分割接地方案：一是仅基于当前观测的分割接地，二是结合观测与目标信息的联合增强。方法使用SegFormer实时标注可通行区域为绿色、不可通行区域为红色，并在OmniVLA与Grand Tour数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 实验显示，视觉接地在最远航点处可将平均航点误差降低27%到44%，具体取决于指令长度；对长指令的提升更明显，而对图像目标的收益较小。归一化误差分析表明，该方法主要通过缩短预测路径长度起作用，路径长度平均减少约30%，但并未显著改善单位距离上的推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 视觉接地是一种无需模型重训练、计算开销较低的有效增强手段，能够提升VLA导航性能；但它主要缓解轨迹层面的偏差，无法弥补分布外指令中缺失的训练信号，因此提升存在上限。

title: UI-MOPD: Multi-Platform On-Policy Distillation for Continual GUI Agent Learning
summary:
Recent advances in multimodal foundation models and agent systems have driven GUI agents from single-platform task execution toward cross-platform interaction. However, building multi-platform GUI agents remains challenging. On one hand, high-quality and executable cross-platform interaction trajectories are still scarce, and existing data often suffer from limited platform coverage. On the other hand, different platforms exhibit distinct interaction conventions, making joint or continual training prone to behavioral pattern mixing, platform-specific capability degradation, and catastrophic forgetting. To address these challenges, we construct Uni-GUI, a high-quality cross-platform GUI interaction dataset, and propose UI-MOPD, the first method that incorporates multi-teacher on-policy distillation into continual learning for GUI agents. UI-MOPD dynamically selects a platform-specific teacher according to the current environment and transfers platform-specific behavioral priors to a shared policy through platform-conditioned distillation, enabling adaptation to new platforms while preserving capabilities on existing ones. Experiments on OSWorld and MobileWorld show that UI-MOPD achieves task success rates of 38.2% and 12.0%, respectively, demonstrating its effectiveness in balancing cross-platform capability retention and new-platform adaptation.
  Project page: https://elispectre.github.io/UI-MOPD/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了跨平台GUI智能体训练中的数据与持续学习两类难题：跨平台高质量轨迹稀缺，以及联合/持续训练容易造成平台能力混淆与遗忘。为此，作者构建了跨平台数据集Uni-GUI，并提出UI-MOPD方法，将多教师在线蒸馏引入持续学习，以提升新平台适应与旧平台能力保留的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体多聚焦单平台，难以直接扩展到桌面与移动等不同平台。主要瓶颈在于：一是高质量、可执行的跨平台交互轨迹不足且覆盖有限；二是不同平台的交互规范差异较大，联合训练或持续训练容易导致行为模式混杂、平台特定能力下降和遗忘。因此需要更高质量的数据与更稳健的跨平台学习机制。
AI.method: 作者首先构建了高质量跨平台GUI交互数据集Uni-GUI。随后提出UI-MOPD，这是首个将多教师在线蒸馏融入GUI智能体持续学习的方法。其核心做法是：根据当前环境动态选择平台特定教师，再通过平台条件化蒸馏把该平台的行为先验迁移到共享策略中，从而在学习新平台时尽量保留已有平台能力，并减少平台间干扰。
AI.result: 在OSWorld和MobileWorld上的实验结果显示，UI-MOPD分别取得38.2%和12.0%的任务成功率。结果表明，该方法能够在跨平台能力保留与新平台适应之间取得较好的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，面向多平台GUI智能体，结合高质量跨平台数据集与平台感知的多教师持续学习机制是有效路径。UI-MOPD通过动态教师选择和在线蒸馏缓解了平台混淆与遗忘问题，为构建可迁移的跨平台GUI智能体提供了实用方案。

title: Auto-AEG: Scalable Data Construction for Open-Vocabulary Audio Event Grounding
summary: Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) reason fluently about sound yet struggle to localize precisely when events occur, while classical Sound Event Detection attains frame-level precision only over a closed label set. At the intersection of these paradigms lies the task of Open-Vocabulary Audio Event Grounding: predicting all time intervals of a target sound event described by an arbitrary natural language query. While this task is crucial for real-world audio understanding and LALM adaptation, it is bottlenecked by data scarcity. Few large-scale resources provide open-vocabulary onset/offset supervision, and manual temporal annotation is prohibitively expensive. To address this, we introduce Auto-AEG, a scalable pipeline that constructs such supervision by automatic data construction and model fine-tuning. It pairs programmatically synthesized clips, which carry exact ground-truth intervals for supervised cold-start, with multi-model pseudo-labels on real-world audio that supply the reward signal for reinforcement learning. Training with this pipeline yields promising performance gains on both the DESED SED benchmark and AEGBench, an independent difficulty-stratified benchmark we release. Our results show that automatically constructed data, coupled with interval-aware reward function design, is an effective data-side route to expanding the temporal localization capability of LALMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Auto-AEG，一种用于开放词汇音频事件定位的可扩展数据构建与微调流水线，通过程序合成音频提供精确时间区间标注，并结合真实音频上的多模型伪标签与强化学习奖励信号，缓解开放词汇时序标注数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 大语言音频模型虽然能理解声音语义，但在精确定位事件发生时间上能力不足；传统声音事件检测又受限于封闭类别集合。开放词汇音频事件定位需要任意自然语言查询对应的所有时间区间，但现有带开放词汇起止标注的数据很少，人工标注成本高，因此需要一种低成本、可扩展的数据侧解决方案。
AI.method: Auto-AEG采用两阶段数据构建与训练策略：首先使用程序化合成音频片段，获得精确的起止时间作为监督，用于冷启动训练；其次在真实世界音频上生成多模型伪标签，作为强化学习阶段的奖励信号。同时引入区间感知的奖励函数设计，并对模型进行进一步微调以提升时间定位能力。
AI.result: 该方法在DESED声音事件检测基准和作者发布的AEGBench上均取得了有前景的性能提升。结果表明，自动构建的数据结合区间感知奖励设计，能够有效增强大语言音频模型的时序定位能力。
AI.conclusion: Auto-AEG证明了通过自动化数据构建与奖励设计，可以作为扩展开放词汇音频事件时序定位能力的有效数据驱动路径，并为该领域的数据稀缺问题提供了可行方案。

title: Do GUI Agents Believe Their Eyes? Diagnosing State-Belief Reliance on Pixels versus Structure
summary: Multimodal GUI agents read an interface through two redundant channels: the rendered pixels of a screenshot and a serialized structure such as a DOM or accessibility tree. Before acting, an agent forms a belief about the current interface state, but existing benchmarks score task success, element grounding, or attack resistance and do not ask whether that belief is drawn from the pixels. We formalize visual state reliance, the attribution of a state belief to pixels, structure, or priors, and measure it with paired single-channel interventions over 310 real web, mobile, and desktop probes. Every probe is scored by deterministic forced choice, with no model-generated item and no model judge. Our central metric is the Perception-Fusion Gap, the fraction of probes a model perceives correctly yet resolves toward structure under conflict. Across five models from three vendors, textual state beliefs defer to structure while image-only accuracy stays near ceiling, and Perception-Fusion Gap is positive for every model; non-text identity, by contrast, stays largely pixel-bound. The substitution is specific to the serialized-text and indexed-action channel, and coordinate-action agents are largely immune. For textual conflicts, a white-box ablation traces the effect to a single copied structural value, and in two live environments the conflict drives wrong actions and real task failure. Visual state reliance therefore gives a measurable diagnostic of whether agent state beliefs are visually grounded, and the errors it exposes propagate to actions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“视觉状态依赖”这一诊断概念，用来衡量多模态GUI智能体的状态判断究竟来自像素还是来自结构化文本，并通过310个真实网页、移动端和桌面端探针进行评估。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要衡量任务成功率、元素定位或攻击鲁棒性，但无法回答智能体的状态信念是否真正来自界面视觉信息，因此需要一种能区分像素、结构和先验来源的测量方法。
AI.method: 作者将视觉状态依赖形式化为对状态信念来源的归因，并设计成对的单通道干预实验，在仅保留像素或仅保留结构信息的条件下进行强制二选一评分；指标为Perception-Fusion Gap，统计模型在视觉上判断正确但在冲突时更偏向结构的比例。
AI.result: 在来自三家厂商的五个模型上，文本状态信念普遍更依赖结构，而图像单通道准确率接近上限；所有模型的Perception-Fusion Gap都为正。该替代效应主要出现在序列化文本和索引式动作通道上，而坐标式动作智能体基本不受影响。对文本冲突的白盒分析表明，错误可追溯到单个被复制的结构值；在两个真实环境中，这类冲突导致了错误动作和实际任务失败。
AI.conclusion: 视觉状态依赖为评估GUI智能体是否真正以视觉方式形成状态信念提供了可操作的诊断工具，并且揭示出的感知-融合错误会直接传导到动作层面，影响真实任务执行。

title: Detecting Hallucinations in Retrieval-Augmented Generation through Grounding-Aware Sensitivity by Perturbation (GASP)
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) reduces but does not eliminate hallucination, and existing detectors return a single answer-level score that does not indicate which sentence is unsupported, or why. To close this gap, we introduce Grounding-Aware Sensitivity by Perturbation (GASP), a span-level detector that scores each answer sentence by how strongly its likelihood depends on the retrieved evidence, a quantity we term grounding sensitivity. GASP holds the answer fixed and re-scores it under the full context, under no context, and with each chunk removed, then measures the log-likelihood drops and Jensen-Shannon divergences (JSD). The likelihood of a grounded sentence collapses once its supporting passage is removed, whereas a hallucinated sentence is almost unaffected, a contrast we interpret by casting decoding as a random nonlinear iterated function system (RNIFS). We evaluate GASP on three benchmarks (RAGTruth, TofuEval, RAGBench) with three instruction-tuned scorers from two model families (Qwen2.5-0.5B, Qwen2.5-1.5B, and SmolLM2-1.7B) under a leakage-clean protocol. On RAGTruth it reaches a response-level area under the ROC curve (AUC) of about 0.73 and a span-level AUC of about 0.67, improving significantly over perplexity and by clear margins over length, whole-context natural language inference (NLI), and self-consistency baselines. The only baseline competitive at the span level is a well-configured chunk-level entailment verifier, which requires a separate model, whereas a training-free threshold on the grounding features matches the trained classifier without labeled data and serves as the default detector. Beyond RAGTruth, the signal transfers to TofuEval but not to short-answer question answering in RAGBench, showing GASP is best suited to outputs constructed from the retrieved context rather than answers recoverable from parametric knowledge.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向检索增强生成（RAG）的句子级幻觉检测方法GASP，通过比较答案在不同检索上下文下的对数似然与JSD变化，衡量每个句子的“grounding sensitivity”，从而判断哪些句子依赖检索证据。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG幻觉检测器通常只给出答案级单一分数，无法指出具体哪一句不受支持，也难以解释原因，因此需要更细粒度、可解释的检测方法。
AI.method: GASP固定答案不变，在完整上下文、无上下文以及逐个移除检索块的条件下重新打分，计算对数似然下降和Jensen-Shannon散度，用“支持证据移除后概率是否塌陷”来刻画句子的 grounding sensitivity。作者还将这种现象用随机非线性迭代函数系统（RNIFS）进行解释，并在RAGTruth、TofuEval、RAGBench上用多个指令微调打分器进行评测。
AI.result: 在RAGTruth上，GASP达到约0.73的答案级AUC和约0.67的句子级AUC，优于困惑度，并明显优于长度、整上下文NLI和自一致性基线。句子级上，配置良好的块级蕴含验证器具有竞争力，但需要额外模型；而对grounding特征设定训练免费阈值即可接近训练分类器效果。该信号可迁移到TofuEval，但在RAGBench的短答案问答中效果不佳。
AI.conclusion: GASP是一种无需训练、细粒度且可解释的RAG幻觉检测方法，尤其适合答案主要由检索上下文构成的场景；对于可直接由参数知识恢复的短答案任务，其适用性较弱。

title: From Region Arrival to Instance-Level Grounding in Vision-and-Language Navigation
summary: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) agents may satisfy conventional success criteria while still failing to establish reliable object-level grounding, because current evaluation protocols mainly reward stopping within a 3-meter radius and largely ignore the agent's final orientation and target visibility. We formalize this limitation as the Last-3-Meter Grounding Gap and introduce three instance-centric metrics to quantify proximity precision, target visibility, and final-view grounding. To mitigate this gap, we propose REALM (Region-to-Entity Alignment for Last-3-Meter Navigation), a plug-and-play, architecture-agnostic refinement module that decouples fine-grained target approaching from long-horizon navigation. REALM uses a visibility-aware stopping strategy to reduce premature termination and improve final viewpoint alignment. We further construct REVERIE-AIM, which provides object-instance-level goals and 180K short-horizon training samples for final-stage target approaching. Extensive evaluations across four diverse VLN backbones show that REALM consistently improves proximity precision and visual grounding success, demonstrating its broad applicability.

AI.tldr: 该工作指出现有视觉-语言导航评测过于宽松，提出“最后3米落地差距”并给出新指标，同时提出一个可插拔的精细对齐模块REALM来增强终点附近的目标接近与视角对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有VLN方法即使在传统成功率上表现良好，也可能并未真正建立对象级别的可靠定位，因为评测通常只看是否落在3米内，忽略最终朝向和目标是否可见。作者希望补上这部分评测与训练缺口。
AI.method: 1）形式化定义Last-3-Meter Grounding Gap；2）提出三个实例中心指标，用于衡量接近精度、目标可见性和最终视图对齐；3）提出REALM模块，将长程导航与最后阶段的精细接近解耦，并使用可见性感知的停止策略减少过早停止；4）构建REVERIE-AIM数据集，提供对象实例级目标与18万条短程训练样本，用于最后阶段目标接近训练。
AI.result: 在四种不同的VLN骨干模型上进行实验后，REALM都能稳定提升接近精度和视觉落地成功率，说明该方法具有较强的通用性和可移植性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，传统VLN评测无法充分反映对象级落地能力；通过更细粒度的指标、专门的最后阶段对齐模块以及短程训练数据，可以显著改善导航终点的目标可见性与定位可靠性。

title: Do Medical Vision Language Models Actually See? A Counterfactual Grounding Framework and Hard-Negative Contrastive Training for Visually-Reliant Medical VLMs
summary: Large vision language models (VLMs) report strong accuracy on medical question-answering, yet it remains unclear whether they reason from visual evidence or exploit textual shortcuts. We introduce a counterfactual evaluation framework that decouples visual and textual contributions by substituting input images with controlled surrogates blank, pixel-shuffled, image-absent, and CLIP-retrieved hard negatives and derive a suite of grounding metrics including the Visual Reliance Score (VRS) and Visual Hallucination Rate (VHR). We further introduce CORAL (COntrastive Retrieval-Augmented Learning), a 7B-parameter LoRA fine-tune of Qwen2.5-VL-7B trained with a Contrastive Grounding Objective (CGO) that penalises answer invariance under hard-negative image swaps. On a paired controlled evaluation across four closed-form medical VQA benchmarks (PathVQA, PMC-VQA, SLAKE, VQA-RAD; n=400 total), CORAL improves macro accuracy by +6.7 pp (P(Delta>0)=0.988) and reduces VHR by 8.0 pp (P<0.001) over the matched Qwen2.5-VL-7B base; neither MedVLThinker RL variant achieves a significant gain on either metric. Cross-domain diagnostics further reveal that image substitution costs only <=6.5 pp on medical benchmarks versus 48-61 pp on general-domain tasks, situating the grounding gap that CGO targets. We discuss evaluation limitations openly including train/eval benchmark overlap and underpowered secondary metrics and release our framework, training code, and model weights to support reproducible grounding audits of medical VLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套用于评估医学视觉语言模型是否真正依赖图像证据的反事实评测框架，并据此训练了CORAL模型。实验表明，CORAL在四个医学VQA基准上较基线模型同时提升了准确率并降低了视觉幻觉率，说明其视觉对齐与证据依赖有所增强。
AI.motivation: 作者还强调了评测局限性，包括训练与评测基准可能重叠、部分辅助指标样本量不足等，但整体贡献在于为医学VLM的证据一致性评估提供了可操作的标准化方法。
AI.method: 作者构建了反事实评测框架，用空白图、像素打乱图、无图输入以及CLIP检索的困难负样本替换原图，从而分离视觉与文本贡献，并定义了视觉依赖分数（VRS）和视觉幻觉率（VHR）等指标。进一步提出CORAL方法，即基于Qwen2.5-VL-7B的LoRA微调，使用对比式接地目标（CGO），惩罚模型在困难负样本图像替换下答案保持不变的情况。
AI.result: 在PathVQA、PMC-VQA、SLAKE和VQA-RAD四个医学VQA基准的对照评测中，CORAL相比基线模型宏平均准确率提升6.7个百分点，VHR下降8.0个百分点，且统计上显著；而MedVLThinker的RL变体在这两个指标上都没有显著提升。跨域诊断还发现，医学任务中图像替换带来的性能下降仅不超过6.5个百分点，而通用领域任务下降达到48%至61%，说明医学VLM存在较明显的接地缺口。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，医学VLM的高准确率不一定意味着强视觉推理，反事实评测能够更有效地揭示其对图像证据的真实依赖。CORAL通过对比式接地训练改善了这种依赖关系，并在保持开放可复现的前提下，为医学VLM的 grounding 审计提供了实用框架。

title: Token-Based Affordance Grounding with Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Affordance grounding aims to localize image regions that support a specific action, serving as a core capability for physical intelligence and embodied perception. Previous studies have primarily relied on weakly supervised learning with action labels from exocentric images. However, these methods often struggle with visually ambiguous exocentric images containing co-occurring actions; moreover, they fail to distinguish semantically similar actions because existing methods typically rely on brief action phrases that lack rich semantic details for action-specific localization. Although large vision-language models (LVLMs) encode rich action semantics and their action-conditioned textual outputs implicitly contain spatial cues, they do not directly provide action-specific spatial localization. To address these problems, we propose TokAG, a zero-shot affordance grounding framework that exploits the token-level semantic-spatial signals in LVLMs to localize action-relevant regions without external supervision. We observe that attention maps associated with different LVLM output tokens vary significantly, with many attending to irrelevant regions such as the background. Thus, we introduce a spatial-aware token-selection mechanism to systematically evaluate each output token and select the one whose attention maps exhibit dominant activation over the target object, instead of relying on arbitrary attention maps. By extracting these object-focused attention maps, we transform the LVLM's implicit semantic signals into zero-shot affordance heatmaps. Our zero-shot framework consistently outperforms prior weakly supervised approaches across multiple benchmarks, improving NSS by 10.7% on the unseen split of AGD20K and by 29.7% on HICO-IIF. The code and models will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TokAG，一种零样本具身/可供性定位框架，利用大视觉语言模型输出token级别的语义-空间信号来生成动作相关区域热图，无需外部监督。
AI.motivation: 现有基于弱监督的可供性定位方法依赖外观图像中的动作标签，面对多动作共现、视觉歧义和语义相近动作时容易失效；同时，简短动作短语语义不足，难以支持精细的动作特定定位。
AI.method: TokAG从LVLM的输出token中挖掘注意力图，并引入空间感知的token选择机制，逐一评估输出token，选择其注意力在目标物体上占主导的token，而不是随意使用某个注意力图；再将选中的对象聚焦注意力图转化为零样本可供性热图。
AI.result: 该方法在多个基准上优于先前的弱监督方法，在AGD20K未见划分上NSS提升10.7%，在HICO-IIF上NSS提升29.7%。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，LVLM中蕴含的token级语义与空间信息可被有效用于零样本可供性定位，TokAG通过精细的token选择机制实现了无需外部监督的高质量动作相关区域定位。

title: AnyGroundBench: A Specialized-Domain Benchmark for Video Grounding in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated immense promise in Spatio-Temporal Video Grounding (STVG). However, current evaluation protocols are largely confined to zero-shot assessments on general, daily-life benchmarks. This creates a critical disconnect from real-world applications in specialized fields, where models inevitably encounter rare visual concepts and complex spatio-temporal dynamics. Since exhaustive pre-training across infinite data distributions is infeasible, the ability to adapt to novel domains is essential. To bridge this gap, we introduce AnyGroundBench, a domain-adaptation benchmark designed to shift the STVG evaluation paradigm from static zero-shot testing to rigorous domain adaptation. Targeting five specialized domains (animal, industry, sports, surgery, and public security), AnyGroundBench pairs newly captured videos such as expert-annotated mouse behaviors with established datasets, unifying them through dense, high-fidelity spatio-temporal annotations. Crucially, the benchmark provides dedicated training subsets to systematically measure domain adaptability. We extensively evaluate 15 state-of-the-art VLMs, assessing their zero-shot generalization and In-Context Learning (ICL) capabilities under practical computational constraints. Ultimately, our findings reveal that current models fail in both zero-shot and ICL-based adaptation when confronted with specialized domains, exposing critical flaws in spatio-temporal reasoning that future research must address.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AnyGroundBench，用于将时空视频定位评估从通用零样本测试扩展到更贴近真实应用的领域适应评测，并在五个专业领域系统评估15个先进视觉语言模型，发现它们在零样本和上下文学习适应方面均表现不佳。
AI.motivation: 现有时空视频定位评测主要集中在日常场景的零样本设置，难以反映专业领域中的真实需求。由于无法对无限多分布进行穷尽预训练，模型对新领域的快速适应能力成为关键，因此需要一个专门的领域适应基准来弥补这一缺口。
AI.method: 作者构建了AnyGroundBench，覆盖动物、工业、体育、手术和公共安全五个专业领域；通过新增采集的视频与已有数据集结合，并统一采用高密度、高精度的时空标注；同时提供专门训练子集，以便系统评估领域适应能力。实验中对15个先进视觉语言模型进行评测，比较其零样本泛化和上下文学习能力，并考虑实际计算约束。
AI.result: 实验显示，当前模型在专业领域中的表现较弱，无论是零样本泛化还是基于上下文学习的适应都无法有效应对复杂时空动态与稀有视觉概念，暴露出其时空推理能力的明显不足。
AI.conclusion: AnyGroundBench填补了时空视频定位领域适应评测的空白，表明现有模型距离真实专业场景应用仍有较大差距，未来研究需要重点提升模型在新领域中的时空理解与适应能力。

title: SPLIT: Cross-Lingual Empathy and Cultural Grounding in English and Ukrainian LLM Responses
comment: 19 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables. Benchmark paper introducing SPLIT for evaluating empathy, linguistic naturalness, and cultural grounding in English and Ukrainian LLM responses
summary: Large Language Models are increasingly deployed in emotional-support contexts and crisis-related situations. Nevertheless, their cross-lingual abilities in these circumstances remain underexplored. Existing benchmarks emphasize multilingual performance but rarely examine crisis-related empathy and cultural grounding in low-to-mid-resource languages. We introduce SPLIT, a 500-prompt benchmark designed to evaluate LLM consistency in generating emotionally grounded responses across five categories: Stress, Panic, Loneliness, Internal Displacement, and Tension. We evaluate three technically diverse LLMs across three dimensions: Empathetic Accuracy, Linguistic Naturalness, and Contextual & Cultural Grounding. The framework aims to assess and compare the quality of LLM responses in both English and Ukrainian languages, as well as to explore the reliability of the LLM-as-a-jury paradigm. Our findings reveal that Gemini-2.5-Flash and LLaMA-3.3-70B-Instruct degrade when transitioning to Ukrainian, while DeepSeek-V3 remains comparatively stable within our benchmark. We additionally find that human and AI evaluators agree weakly on empathy and naturalness but diverge on cultural grounding. We further argue that producing Ukrainian text is not equivalent to producing Ukrainian emotional support. Our findings may assist in the future development of more culturally tailored benchmark designs, as well as encourage a stronger emphasis on human-centered evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SPLIT基准，用于评估大语言模型在情绪支持和危机相关场景中的跨语言一致性，重点考察英语与乌克兰语下的共情、自然性和文化语境契合度。
AI.motivation: 现有多语种基准多关注通用语言能力，较少检验低至中资源语言中的危机共情与文化贴合性，因此需要一个更贴近真实情绪支持场景的评测框架。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含500个提示的SPLIT基准，覆盖压力、恐慌、孤独、内部流离和紧张五类情境，并对三种技术路线不同的大语言模型在英语和乌克兰语上从三方面进行评估：共情准确性、语言自然性、上下文与文化契合度；同时考察LLM-as-a-jury评估方式的可靠性。
AI.result: 实验显示，Gemini-2.5-Flash和LLaMA-3.3-70B-Instruct在切换到乌克兰语时性能下降，而DeepSeek-V3相对稳定；人类评审与AI评审在共情和自然性上仅弱一致，在文化契合度上分歧更明显。
AI.conclusion: 生成乌克兰语文本并不等同于提供乌克兰语情绪支持，未来应更重视文化定制化基准设计与以人为中心的评估方法。

title: Hidden Forgetting in Continual Multimodal Learning: When Accuracy Survives but Grounding Fails
summary: Multimodal large language models must continually adapt to evolving tasks and domains, yet standard continual learning metrics mainly measure whether old answers remain correct, leaving the stability of multimodal grounding largely unexamined. We study this overlooked failure mode and ask whether a continually adapted MLLM can preserve not only what it answers, but also how it uses visual, textual, OCR, chart, and document evidence. We identify \emph{hidden evidence-use forgetting}, where answer accuracy is retained while the model silently shifts toward different or less grounded evidence channels, and propose \textsc{RCL}, a replay-free reliance-constrained continual learning framework. \textsc{RCL} freezes the previous checkpoint as a behavioral reference, estimates teacher and student evidence-reliance profiles through counterfactual channel interventions, and jointly optimizes task learning, prediction preservation, and reliance preservation without adding inference-time cost. Across CoIN, COAST, MCITlib, and an evidence-sensitive multimodal stream, \textsc{RCL} consistently improves final performance and reduces forgetting over replay-free, PEFT, routing, and memory-assisted baselines, while substantially lowering modality reliance drift, dominant evidence flips, and hidden forgetting rates. These results suggest that robust continual multimodal learning requires preserving the evidence path behind correct answers, not merely the answers themselves.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多模态大语言模型持续学习中的一个新问题：即便答案准确率保持不变，模型对视觉、文本、OCR、图表和文档等证据通道的依赖方式也可能悄然漂移，形成“隐藏的证据使用遗忘”。为此，作者提出了无需回放的	extsc{RCL}框架，通过约束证据依赖行为来同时保持任务性能与 grounding 稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习指标主要关注旧任务答案是否仍正确，但没有充分衡量多模态模型是否仍通过相同且合理的证据通道进行推理。作者希望解决一种被忽视的失效模式：答案表面不变，但模型的证据使用方式已发生偏移，从而削弱可解释性与多模态对齐稳定性。
AI.method: extsc{RCL}将上一检查点冻结为行为参考模型，并通过反事实的通道干预估计教师与学生的证据依赖画像；随后联合优化三部分：新任务学习、预测保持、依赖保持。该方法为回放式设计，不增加推理时开销。
AI.result: 在CoIN、COAST、MCITlib以及一个对证据敏感的多模态流式设置上，	extsc{RCL}相较于无回放、参数高效微调、路由方法和记忆辅助基线，取得了更好的最终性能与更低的遗忘；同时显著降低了模态依赖漂移、主导证据切换次数以及隐藏遗忘率。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，稳健的持续多模态学习不能只维护“答案是否正确”，还必须维护“答案是如何依赖证据得出的”。	extsc{RCL}证明了通过显式约束证据依赖行为，可以在持续适应新任务的同时保持多模态 grounding 的稳定性。

title: GeoSearcher: Anchor-Guided Progressive Reasoning for Remote Sensing Visual Grounding with Process Supervision
summary: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown strong cross-modal understanding and coordinate generation abilities in visual grounding. However, transferring these abilities to remote sensing visual grounding (RSVG) remains challenging. High-resolution remote sensing images usually cover large-scale scenes, where targets are often extremely small and surrounded by numerous visually similar distractors. Meanwhile, queries often contain multiple clues, such as reference objects, spatial relations, and target attributes. Existing MLLM-based methods usually formulate RSVG as one-step coordinate generation, which may lead to unstable predictions for small-object localization and complex queries. To address these challenges, we propose GeoSearcher, which reformulates RSVG as an anchor-guided progressive reasoning process and realizes it through two coupled stages: Anchor-Centric Reasoning Supervised Fine-Tuning (ACR-SFT) and Process-Faithful Group Relative Policy Optimization (PF-GRPO). In ACR-SFT, anchor-centric reasoning data are used to teach the model to represent key visual clues as anchors and progressively integrate location, relational, and attribute clues around them. In PF-GRPO, Process-Aware Reward (PAR) and Reasoning-Informative Sample Selector (RISS) further optimize this reasoning behavior by jointly evaluating key reasoning steps and target localization, while focusing training on samples that are more beneficial for improving progressive reasoning. Through this design, GeoSearcher transforms large-scale visual search into a more constrained local reasoning process. Extensive experiments on DIOR-RSVG, OPT-RSVG, and VRS-Bench show that GeoSearcher outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. The project will be released at https://github.com/wangdianyu954-xixi/GeoSearcher.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GeoSearcher，将遥感视觉指代表达任务从“一步坐标生成”重构为“锚点引导的渐进式推理”，通过两阶段训练提升小目标定位与复杂查询理解能力，并在多个数据集上取得优于现有方法的结果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多模态大语言模型的方法在遥感视觉指代表达中面临两类核心困难：一是高分辨率遥感图像中目标通常很小且易与相似干扰物混淆，二是文本查询往往同时包含参考对象、空间关系和属性等多重线索。传统的一步式坐标生成容易导致定位不稳定，难以充分利用这些复杂线索，因此需要更符合任务结构的推理与训练方式。
AI.method: 作者提出GeoSearcher，并将任务建模为锚点引导的渐进式推理过程。方法包含两个耦合阶段：第一阶段为锚点中心推理监督微调（ACR-SFT），利用锚点中心推理数据训练模型先识别关键视觉线索为锚点，再围绕锚点逐步整合位置、关系和属性信息；第二阶段为过程忠实的组相对策略优化（PF-GRPO），结合过程感知奖励（PAR）与推理信息量样本选择器（RISS），同时评估关键推理步骤与目标定位结果，并优先训练更有助于渐进推理的样本。
AI.result: 在DIOR-RSVG、OPT-RSVG和VRS-Bench上的实验表明，GeoSearcher优于现有最先进方法，说明该渐进式、锚点引导的推理框架能更有效地处理遥感场景中的小目标定位与复杂文本查询。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，将遥感视觉指代表达从直接回归坐标转向局部化、过程可控的推理建模，有助于提升多模态大模型在复杂遥感场景中的稳定性与精度；其核心贡献在于任务重构、锚点中心监督和过程忠实强化优化的联合设计。

title: RuleChef: Grounding LLM Task Knowledge in Human-Editable Rules
summary: We present RuleChef, a framework that uses large language models (LLMs) to generate executable rules for NLP tasks such as text classification, Named Entity Recognition (NER), or relation extraction. Rules are generated based on a task description and a set of labeled examples, then they are iteratively improved based both on additional examples and on human feedback overexisting rules. RuleChef can also be used to bootstrap rules using the observed input-output pairs from any existing model for a given task. LLMs are used only at learning time, synthesizing rules and iteratively patching them based on failures measured on a held-out split. The result of this process is a fast, deterministic, and inspectable rule system. Preliminary evaluation is performed on both classification and NER tasks. We release RuleChef as open-source software under an Apache 2.0

AI.tldr: RuleChef是一个利用大语言模型在训练阶段自动生成并迭代改进可执行规则的框架，适用于文本分类、命名实体识别和关系抽取等NLP任务，最终得到快速、确定性且可解释的规则系统。
AI.motivation: 该工作旨在降低为NLP任务手工编写规则的成本，同时获得比黑盒模型更易审计、可解释且推理更高效的系统。
AI.method: 方法上，先根据任务描述和少量标注样本由LLM生成初始规则；随后利用更多样本以及人工对现有规则的反馈进行迭代修补；也可以从已有模型的输入输出对中反向引导规则生成；LLM仅在学习阶段参与，规则质量通过留出验证集上的失败案例驱动改进。
AI.result: 初步实验覆盖了文本分类和NER任务，表明该框架能够生成可执行规则并持续改进，最终形成可快速运行、结果确定且便于检查的规则系统。
AI.conclusion: RuleChef展示了LLM不仅可以直接完成任务，也可以作为规则归纳与修正工具，用于构建可部署的符号化NLP系统；作者还将其以Apache 2.0开源发布，便于进一步研究与应用。

title: Beyond Document Grounding: Span-Level Hallucination Detection over Code, Tool Output, and Documents
summary: Hallucination detection for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is usually evaluated on natural-language document evidence. However, grounded generation systems increasingly rely on structured inputs: source code, developer-tool output, markdown documents, tables, and repository metadata. We introduce a unified benchmark for span-level hallucination detection over code, tool output, structured documents, and existing natural-language RAG datasets. The benchmark is built by starting from grounded correct answers, injecting localized hallucinations with exact character labels, and validating the code test split with evidence-based review. Our fine-tuned Qwen3.5-2B detector reaches 0.689 span-F1 on the unified test set and 0.60 on the code-agent source, where it substantially outperforms LettuceDetect-large (0.17) and the strongest zero-shot LLM judges we evaluated (at most 0.22). The same model remains competitive on established natural-language benchmarks, with 81.8 RAGTruth example-F1 and 0.724 English PsiloQA IoU.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个面向检索增强生成中多类型结构化证据的统一幻觉检测基准，并训练了一个细粒度跨度级检测器，在统一测试集和代码场景上取得了明显优于基线的结果。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉检测评测主要依赖自然语言文档证据，但实际的 grounded generation 系统越来越多使用代码、工具输出、Markdown、表格和仓库元数据等结构化输入，因此需要一个覆盖多种证据形态的统一评测框架。
AI.method: 作者构建了一个统一基准：从正确的 grounded 答案出发，注入局部幻觉并提供精确到字符级的标注，同时对代码测试集进行基于证据的人工复核。随后微调 Qwen3.5-2B 作为跨度级幻觉检测器，并在统一测试集及多个既有自然语言基准上进行评测。
AI.result: 微调后的 Qwen3.5-2B 在统一测试集上达到 0.689 的 span-F1，在代码代理源码来源上达到 0.60，显著优于 LettuceDetect-large（0.17）以及最强的零样本 LLM 评审器（最高 0.22）。在传统自然语言基准上也保持了较强表现，RAGTruth example-F1 为 81.8，英文 PsiloQA IoU 为 0.724。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，面向结构化与非结构化证据统一设计的幻觉检测基准是必要且可行的；细粒度监督训练的检测器能够在代码与工具输出等新场景中显著提升性能，同时不牺牲对传统自然语言 RAG 基准的适配能力。

title: DART: Difficulty-Adaptive Routing for Zero-Shot Video Temporal Grounding
comment: Accepted to the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2026
summary: Zero-shot video temporal grounding (VTG) localizes events in untrimmed videos from natural language queries without task-specific training. Existing methods rely on frame-query feature matching, which suffices for simple events but struggles with complex multi-stage queries that require understanding temporal ordering and causal structure -- a disparity we call the reasoning gap. We propose DART (Difficulty-Adaptive Routing for Temporal Grounding), which bridges this gap by coupling difficulty-aware routing with structured reasoning in large vision-language models. A query-conditioned Determinantal Point Process (DPP) serves a dual role: selecting diverse, query-relevant keyframes as temporal evidence, and providing spectral entropy as a difficulty indicator. Simple queries are routed to a Fast path for direct prediction, while complex queries follow a Slow path with Temporal Markup Prompting, which decomposes localization into global event analysis, per-frame temporal role annotation, and boundary extraction. On Charades-STA and ActivityNet Captions, DART achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot performance across both identically distributed and multiple out-of-distribution settings, improving mIoU by up to 3.5 points over the strongest baseline while using over 7 times fewer frames. The project homepage is available at https://dart-vtg.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种零样本视频时间定位方法DART，通过难度自适应路由把简单查询和复杂查询分开处理，从而缩小现有方法在复杂时序推理上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本视频时间定位方法主要依赖帧与查询的特征匹配，适合简单事件，但面对需要理解时间顺序和因果结构的复杂多阶段查询时表现较弱，因此需要一种能够区分查询难度并进行结构化推理的方法。
AI.method: DART结合了基于查询条件的行列式点过程（DPP）和大视觉语言模型中的结构化推理。DPP一方面选择多样且与查询相关的关键帧作为时序证据，另一方面利用谱熵估计查询难度；随后将查询路由到快速路径或慢速路径。快速路径直接预测，慢速路径使用时间标注提示，把定位拆解为全局事件分析、逐帧时间角色标注和边界提取。
AI.result: 在Charades-STA和ActivityNet Captions上，DART在同分布与多种分布外设置中都取得了零样本最优表现；相较最强基线，mIoU最高提升3.5个百分点，同时使用的帧数减少超过7倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过“难度识别+分流推理”的设计，有效缓解了零样本视频时间定位中的推理鸿沟，在提高精度的同时显著降低了计算开销。

title: A Task-State Representation for Long-Horizon Mobile GUI Agents
summary: While long-horizon mobile GUI agents typically rely on thought-action-observation loops, they struggle to separate persistent task states from transient screen observations. As execution histories grow, this entanglement imposes a severe context burden, causing agents to forget initial requirements, hallucinate progress, or repeatedly interact with stale interfaces. To address this, we introduce Task-State Representation (TSR), a training-free framework that explicitly decouples task state from sensory input. Acting as a lightweight external wrapper, TSR maintains three structured components: a global instruction summary, a dynamic progress tracker for subgoals, and a transition-aware action verifier. By continuously updating through pre- and post-action visual comparisons, TSR effectively guides the agent's reasoning without requiring architectural modifications. Experiments across four mobile GUI benchmarks validate TSR's effectiveness, yielding up to a 12 absolute point increase in success rate on complex cross-application and memory-intensive tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的任务状态表示框架TSR，用于将长期移动端GUI任务中的“任务状态”和“屏幕感知”解耦，以缓解上下文负担并提升多步任务执行稳定性。
AI.motivation: 长时程移动GUI智能体通常依赖思考-行动-观察循环，但随着执行历史增长，任务目标、进度与当前界面容易混在一起，导致遗忘初始需求、误判任务进展或重复操作过时界面，因此需要更稳定的状态管理机制。
AI.method: TSR作为轻量外部包装器工作，维护三个结构化组件：全局指令摘要、动态子目标进度跟踪器、以及感知动作转移验证器；它通过动作前后视觉对比持续更新状态，在不修改模型架构且无需额外训练的前提下，引导智能体推理。
AI.result: 在四个移动GUI基准上验证了TSR的有效性，在复杂跨应用任务和高记忆负载任务上，成功率最高提升了12个百分点。
AI.conclusion: TSR通过显式解耦任务状态与感知输入，能有效降低长上下文带来的负担，提升移动GUI智能体在复杂长程任务中的鲁棒性与完成率。

title: DigitalCoach: Communication and Grounding Gaps in Human and Agentic Computer Use Coaching
summary: Agents are increasingly capable of automating software tasks, but can they teach humans how to use software themselves? We introduce DigitalCoach, a multimodal dataset of 72 human expert-novice computer use coaching sessions consisting of 22,752 dialogue turns grounded in 28.1 hours of screen and input event recordings across five software applications. We use DigitalCoach to evaluate whether state-of-the-art models can teach humans how to use computers. Automated evaluation shows that models differ from humans in how they coach: models provide more direct instructions, but fewer explanations, error diagnoses, and knowledge-check questions. When we fix the coaching method, models produce utterances similar to human references yet poorly grounded in visual context. Interactive evaluation confirms that model coaches cause learners to passively follow instructions without deeper engagement and fall short in visual grounding. DigitalCoach lays a foundation for collaborative and proactive computer use coaching agents.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个用于“教人使用软件”的多模态数据集 DigitalCoach，并评估了当前先进模型作为电脑使用教练的能力。结果显示，模型能给出更直接的指令，但在解释、错误诊断、知识检查和视觉上下文理解方面明显不足。
AI.motivation: 作者关注一个新问题：现有智能体不仅要会自动完成软件任务，还要能反过来教人类如何使用软件。因此，他们希望建立基准数据并检验模型是否具备有效的计算机使用教学能力。
AI.method: 研究构建了 DigitalCoach 数据集，包含72段人类专家与新手的电脑使用辅导会话，共22,752轮对话，覆盖28.1小时的屏幕与输入事件记录，涉及5个软件应用。随后用该数据集评估多种先进模型的教辅表现，采用自动化评估与交互式评估相结合的方法，比对模型输出与人类参考的差异，以及学习者在实际交互中的表现。
AI.result: 自动化评估发现，模型与人类教练的行为模式不同：模型更倾向于直接给出操作指令，但较少提供解释、错误诊断和知识检查问题。即使固定教学方式后，模型生成的语言更接近人类参考，但在视觉上下文中的对齐仍然较差。交互式评估进一步表明，模型教练往往使学习者被动照做，缺乏更深层次参与，同时视觉 grounding 能力不足。
AI.conclusion: DigitalCoach 为研究“面向人类的软件教学型智能体”提供了基础数据和评测框架。该工作表明，当前模型尚不能很好地充当有效教练，未来需要在协作式教学、主动引导和视觉上下文理解方面进一步提升。

title: What Memory Do GUI Agents Really Need? From Passive Records to Active Task-Driving States
summary: Mobile GUI agents increasingly face long-horizon tasks that require reading, updating, and reusing task-relevant data across pages and applications. Existing methods treat memory largely as passive storage, where past observations are accumulated and retrieved when needed. Yet retrieving a value does not reveal its current role in the workflow. The agent must still infer from accumulated records whether the value should be used now, has already been used, or must wait for a later dependency. This implicit reconstruction becomes unreliable in long trajectories with repeated values, distractors, and outdated states, causing repeated or missed operations. To address this, we propose Active Task Driving Memory (ATMem), which shifts GUI-agent memory from passive storage to an actively maintained execution state. ATMem maintains task-relevant information as a continually updated execution state that links each value to its role and current status, enabling action selection based on the current workflow state. While supervised fine-tuning enables the agent to construct ATMem, it does not teach when ATMem is beneficial. We therefore introduce STR-GRPO, an online reinforcement learning method that encourages selective use of ATMem based on its contribution to task completion. STR-GRPO contrasts memory-on and memory-off rollouts to estimate when memory use improves execution, while memory-cost-aware reward discourages costly memory usage that does not improve execution. To evaluate whether agents can complete all in-scope work while avoiding out-of-scope actions, we build a challenging mobile benchmark. From a list of near identical entries, agents must act on every entry that satisfies the instruction and reject entries that violate its constraints. We further introduce App-Level Progress and Scope-Aware F1 to measure these two dimensions separately.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向移动GUI代理的新记忆框架ATMem，将记忆从“被动存储”升级为“主动维护的执行状态”，并配套在线强化学习方法STR-GRPO以学习何时使用记忆；同时构建新基准并提出两个评测指标，分别衡量任务完成进度与范围约束遵守情况。
AI.motivation: 现有方法把记忆主要当作历史记录检索库，但在长程、多页面、多应用任务中，仅检索到一个值并不能说明它此刻在流程中的作用。代理仍需从杂乱记录中判断该值是否应立即使用、是否已使用或是否需要等待依赖，容易在重复值、干扰项和过期状态下产生重复操作或漏操作。
AI.method: 提出ATMem：把任务相关信息维护为持续更新的执行状态，显式关联“值—角色—当前状态”，支持基于当前工作流状态进行动作选择；在训练上，先用监督微调让代理学会构建ATMem，再用STR-GRPO进行在线强化学习，结合记忆开关对比滚动评估记忆带来的收益，并引入记忆成本感知奖励，抑制无效且昂贵的记忆使用；此外构建新的移动端基准，并设计App-Level Progress与Scope-Aware F1两个指标分别评估任务完成度和范围准确性。
AI.result: 摘要表明该方法旨在提升长程GUI任务中的执行稳定性，减少重复或遗漏操作，并能更细粒度地区分“做了多少”和“是否只做该做的事”。
AI.conclusion: 核心结论是：对于长程移动GUI代理，记忆不应只是历史缓存，而应作为随任务推进而更新的执行状态；同时，记忆是否使用也应通过强化学习被选择性地优化，以兼顾任务完成与操作约束。

title: Beyond Binary Instrument QA: Probing Instrument Grounding in Music Audio-Language Models
comment: Workshop on Machine Learning for Audio, ICML 2026
summary: Recent music audio-language models achieve high accuracy on instrument question-answering benchmarks, but it remains unclear whether this reflects robust audio grounding or benchmark-specific shortcuts. In this paper, we introduce an OpenMIC-derived diagnostic benchmark sequence for instrument grounding in music audio-language models, extending binary instrument-presence QA to genre-prior-reduced examples, confusable instrument discrimination, longer audio context, and temporal localization. Across these settings, high binary QA accuracy often fails to predict model behavior: models can exhibit option-position bias, confusable-instrument errors, and temporal response bias. These results suggest that instrument grounding should be evaluated with multi-axis diagnostic benchmarks rather than a single aggregate accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于OpenMIC的诊断型基准序列，用于评估音乐音频-语言模型在乐器定位与理解上的真实能力，并发现仅看二元问答准确率并不能可靠反映模型是否真正完成了音频对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐音频-语言模型在乐器问答基准上表现很高，但研究者怀疑这可能来自数据偏差或任务捷径，而非稳健的音频理解，因此需要更细粒度的诊断评测来检验模型是否真正“听懂”了音频中的乐器信息。
AI.method: 作者基于OpenMIC构建了一组递进式诊断任务，包括：去除或减弱流派先验的样本、容易混淆的乐器区分、更长音频上下文下的判断，以及带时间信息的局部定位任务，用来系统检查模型在不同维度上的乐器 grounding 能力。
AI.result: 实验显示，高二元问答准确率并不一定对应更好的真实理解；模型常出现选项位置偏置、对易混淆乐器的误判，以及时间响应偏置等问题，说明其表现可能依赖任务表面模式而非稳健的音频证据。
AI.conclusion: 乐器 grounding 不能只用单一总体准确率评估，而应采用多维度的诊断型基准，从类别区分、上下文长度、位置偏差和时间定位等多个轴向综合衡量模型能力。

title: Synergistic Perception-Reasoning Governance: Grounding Medical MLLMs with Verifiable Anatomical Evidence
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) show strong promise for clinical VQA and radiology report generation, yet inference-time hallucinations still undermine trustworthy use: models can produce fluent conclusions that conflict with imaging evidence. Existing mitigation strategies typically rely on additional training, external retrieval/knowledge bases, or multi-stage post-hoc verification, which increases cost and pipeline complexity and often generalizes poorly across models and tasks.To address this, we propose a holistic, training-free evidence-injection framework that systematically mitigates hallucinations through dual-side evidence injection. By leveraging ROI priors acquired using MedSAM in our implementation, we recalibrate the visual perception trajectory via ROI-guided activation modulation while anchoring the textual reasoning trajectory by mapping anatomical coordinates into discrete semantic tokens as verifiable external memory. Then we introduce a task-aware dynamic router to select modality-specific interventions based on task semantics, balancing perceptual grounding and linguistic fluency. We conduct systematic evaluations on 2 tasks and 5 datasets using \texttt{LLaVA-1.5-7B}, \texttt{LLaVA-Med-1.5-7B}, \texttt{Qwen3-VL-8B/32B}, and \texttt{InternVL-3.5-8B/38B}. Controlled ablations and visualizations further validate the framework, which consistently outperforms baselines across medical benchmarks, improving close-ended accuracy by up to $\sim\mathbf{6}\%\uparrow$ and reducing open-ended hallucinations by $\sim\mathbf{35}\%\downarrow$. The code has been made available on GitHub: \href{https://github.com/Henry991115/SPRG}{\textcolor{blue}{https://github.com/Henry991115/SPRG}}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的双侧证据注入框架，用于缓解多模态大语言模型在临床问答和放射报告生成中的推理时幻觉，并在多个医学基准上取得稳定提升。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉缓解方法通常依赖额外训练、外部检索或多阶段后验验证，成本高、流程复杂且跨模型与跨任务泛化较弱，因此需要一种更轻量、可迁移的解决方案。
AI.method: 框架通过双侧证据注入实现幻觉抑制：一方面利用MedSAM获取ROI先验，通过ROI引导的激活调制重校准视觉感知轨迹；另一方面将解剖坐标映射为离散语义token，作为可验证的外部记忆来锚定文本推理轨迹；同时引入任务感知动态路由器，根据任务语义选择模态特定干预，以平衡感知对齐与语言流畅性。
AI.result: 在2个任务、5个数据集上，基于LLaVA-1.5-7B、LLaVA-Med-1.5-7B、Qwen3-VL-8B/32B和InternVL-3.5-8B/38B的实验显示，该方法在各项医学基准上均优于基线，闭集准确率最高提升约6%，开放式幻觉率最高降低约35%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了训练免费、证据注入式的双侧干预能够有效提升医学多模态模型的可信性，并具有较好的通用性与实用价值；代码已开源。

title: PruneGround: Plug-and-play Spatial Pruning for 3D Visual Grounding
summary: 3D Visual Grounding (3DVG) aims to localize target objects in 3D scenes given natural language descriptions. Existing approaches typically perform reasoning over the entire scene, leading to ambiguous predictions and high computational cost, especially in cluttered environments. We observe that many referential expressions rely on local spatial context and often correspond to restricted spatial regions rather than the full scene. Motivated by this insight, we propose PruneGround, an effective plug-and-play framework for 3DVG built upon three key components. First, we introduce Language-Guided Spatial Pruning (LGSP), which leverages a frozen Vision Language Model (VLM) to identify language-relevant regions, thereby reducing spatial computation and grounding candidates in the narrower search space. Second, we propose MultiView-Conditioned Description Reformulation (MCDR), which decomposes complex expressions into simplified target-anchor relations and augments missing spatial cues through multi-view reasoning. Finally, we propose LLM-Grounder, which repurposes a detection-pretrained spatial LLM into a language-conditioned grounding model by aligning point cloud and linguistic representations within the pruned region. Extensive experiments on the three most popular point cloud benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art results on all three ScanRefer settings and on 9 out of 10 Nr3D/Sr3D settings. Code and models are publicly available: https://github.com/leduckhai/PruneGround

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于三维视觉定位的即插即用框架PruneGround，通过先缩小搜索空间、再改写语言描述、最后进行语言条件定位，提升了定位精度并降低了计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有三维视觉定位方法通常对整个场景进行推理，在场景杂乱时容易产生歧义，同时计算成本较高。作者观察到，许多指代表达只依赖局部空间上下文，往往对应有限的空间区域，因此有必要先筛选与语言相关的区域再进行细粒度定位。
AI.method: 方法包含三个核心组件：1）语言引导的空间剪枝（LGSP），利用冻结的视觉语言模型识别与语言相关的区域，缩小候选范围；2）多视角条件描述改写（MCDR），将复杂表达分解为更简单的目标-锚点关系，并通过多视角推理补充缺失的空间信息；3）LLM-Grounder，将一个基于检测预训练的空间大语言模型重用于语言条件定位，在剪枝后的区域内对点云与语言表示进行对齐。
AI.result: 在三个主流点云基准上的大量实验表明，该方法在ScanRefer的全部三种设置上取得最优结果，并在Nr3D/Sr3D的10个设置中取得了9个最优结果。
AI.conclusion: PruneGround证明了先进行语言相关区域剪枝，再结合描述重构与区域内对齐推理，是提升三维视觉定位性能的有效策略，并且具备即插即用的实用性。

title: LabGuard: Grounding Natural-Language Laboratory Rules into Runtime Guards for Embodied Laboratory Agents
summary: Scientific embodied agents are increasingly capable of carrying out laboratory procedures, but executing these procedures safely in dynamic laboratory environments remains challenging. Current safety approaches often overlook the intermediate step of transforming laboratory natural language, including safety rules, manuals, protocols, and standard operating procedures, into machine-checkable runtime constraints. We introduce LabGuard (Laboratory Guard), a language-to-execution safety suite that grounds natural-language laboratory rules into executable specifications and deploys them as runtime guards. LabGuard includes three core components: LabGuard-IR, which defines a typed executable representation; LabGuard-Bench, which provides 812 supervised annotations expanded from 203 seed laboratory rules; and LabGuard-Grounder, which maps natural-language laboratory rules into LabGuard-IR. The resulting IR instances are handled by the LabGuard Pipeline, which compiles them into runtime monitors and applies them at the controller boundary. Experiments show that LabGuard generalizes to unseen laboratory-rule sources, achieves 79.4 task-scope F1, and reduces unsafe events from 39.5% to 23.8% after monitor compilation. In LabUtopia, its runtime monitors integrate with ACT, keeping interventions below 0.5% while preserving task success.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向实验室智能体的安全框架LabGuard，将自然语言实验室规则转化为可执行的运行时约束，并在控制器边界进行监控，从而提升动态实验环境中的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有实验室安全方法往往忽略了把自然语言安全规则、手册、流程和操作规范转换为机器可检查约束的关键步骤，导致智能体在真实动态环境中执行时难以稳定、安全地遵守规则。
AI.method: 作者提出LabGuard安全套件，包含三部分：LabGuard-IR（类型化可执行表示）、LabGuard-Bench（由203条种子规则扩展得到812条监督标注）和LabGuard-Grounder（将自然语言规则映射到IR）。这些IR实例再通过LabGuard Pipeline编译为运行时监视器，并在控制器边界执行。
AI.result: 实验表明，LabGuard能够泛化到未见过的实验室规则来源，任务范围F1达到79.4；经监视器编译后，unsafe事件比例从39.5%降至23.8%。在LabUtopia中接入ACT后，干预率低于0.5%，同时保持了任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: LabGuard证明了将自然语言实验室规则直接落地为运行时可执行约束是可行的，并且能在几乎不影响任务表现的前提下显著降低安全风险。

title: GROW$^2$: Grounding Which and Where for Robot Tool Use
summary: Can the robot use a plate to cut a cake if no knife is available? Tool use greatly expands robot capabilities, but to use tools creatively beyond their intended functions, the robot faces the challenge of $\textit{open-world affordance grounding}$: select an open-category object to act as a tool and localize its specific region of action. To this end, we introduce GROW$^2$ (GROunding Which and Where), which leverages object parts as a natural abstraction to split the grounding process hierarchically into semantic and geometric levels, thus bypassing the need for data-heavy, end-to-end training. Semantically, GROW$^2$ harnesses the commonsense reasoning of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to parse a natural-language task instruction, select a suitable object as the tool, and identify task-relevant parts on the tool and the target object. Geometrically, vision foundation models then ground the selected parts into precise 3D regions from a single RGB-D image. Experiments on established benchmarks show that GROW$^2$ outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on affordance prediction benchmarks. Further, it achieves zero-shot generalization over open-category objects and outperforms baselines in both simulated and real-world robot tool use experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GROW²，用“对象部件”作为中间表示，把开放世界中的工具选择与作用区域定位分成语义与几何两步，从而实现机器人对未知类别物体的零样本工具使用。
AI.motivation: 开放世界工具使用要求机器人不仅能从未见过的物体中选出合适工具，还要准确找出其可作用的局部区域。端到端方法通常依赖大量标注数据，难以泛化到开放类别物体。
AI.method: GROW²（GROunding Which and Where）采用分层框架：第一步用视觉语言模型解析自然语言任务指令，完成“选哪个工具”和“找哪些部件”的语义推理；第二步借助视觉基础模型，把这些部件从单张RGB-D图像中定位为精确的三维区域。整个过程以对象部件为自然抽象，避免了大规模端到端训练。
AI.result: 在标准基准上，GROW²优于现有最先进基线；在开放类别物体上表现出零样本泛化能力；在仿真和真实机器人工具使用实验中，也优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，将语义推理与几何定位解耦，并以对象部件作为桥梁，是解决开放世界affordance grounding和创意工具使用的有效路径。

title: Grounding LLM Reasoning under Incomplete Graph Evidence
comment: A theoretical perspective about Grounding LLM Reasoning
summary: Knowledge graphs can guide large language models (LLMs) reasoning, but the graph seen by a system is usually a retrieved, linked, temporally scoped, and incomplete evidence state rather than a complete account of truth. We develop a theoretical perspective on grounding observable LLM trajectories under such incomplete graph evidence.The evidence state induces entity anchors, typed relation residuals, path energies, and support regions, while the language model supplies a prior over candidate trajectories. We show that, under open-world incompleteness, no hard rule based only on the observed state can both reject every false unsupported trajectory and retain every true-but-unobserved one.We then characterize soft grounding as a KL-regularized deformation of the LLM prior: finite slack preserves support for unsupported but non-contradicted trajectories, whereas hard conditioning appears as an infinite-penalty limit.The framework also yields stability bounds under evidence perturbations and clarifies the constraint regimes appropriate for GraphRAG, KGQA, graph agents, constrained decoding, and faithful generation. The claims are evidence-relative: KG compatibility is treated as declared support, not factual truth.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个面向不完整知识图谱证据的理论框架，用来解释和约束大语言模型在图上推理时的“可观测轨迹”如何被证据状态引导；核心结论是，在开放世界不完备条件下，不存在仅基于当前观测状态的硬规则，既能排除所有无依据的错误轨迹，又能保留所有真实但尚未被观测到的轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱只能提供检索到的、局部的、时间范围受限且不完整的证据，而大语言模型需要在这种不完备证据上进行推理。作者希望建立一种理论视角，说明如何在“证据相对”的前提下，对模型轨迹进行合理地锚定与约束，并区分硬约束与软约束的适用边界。
AI.method: 作者从理论上定义了证据状态对模型轨迹的作用机制，包括实体锚点、类型化关系残差、路径能量和支持区域；同时将语言模型视为候选轨迹的先验分布。在开放世界不完备假设下，证明基于观测状态的硬规则存在不可兼得性。进一步将软 grounding 刻画为对 LLM 先验的 KL 正则化变形：有限松弛允许保留未被证伪但缺乏直接支持的轨迹，而硬条件可视为无限惩罚极限。
AI.result: 得到两个主要结果：第一，证明不存在一种仅依赖观测证据状态的硬判定规则，能够同时满足“排除所有无支持的错误轨迹”和“保留所有真实但未观测轨迹”；第二，给出了软 grounding 的形式化表达，并推导出在证据扰动下的稳定性界，说明证据变化对轨迹分布的影响可被定量控制。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为 GraphRAG、KGQA、图智能体、约束解码和忠实生成等任务提供了统一的理论解释：当证据不完整时，更合适的是采用证据相对的软约束，而不是依赖绝对真值式的硬约束；同时，KG 一致性应被理解为“声明式支持”而非事实真理。

title: One Forward Beats Two: InnerZoom for Accurate and Efficient GUI Grounding
summary: MLLM-based GUI grounding methods commonly formulate target localization as autoregressive coordinate generation, enabling models to leverage the strong instruction-following and semantic understanding capabilities of MLLMs. However, this formulation requires the model to retain region-level target evidence while decoding coordinate tokens with the spatial precision demanded by GUI clicking. Our diagnostic analysis reveals that target-region awareness emerges in intermediate decoder layers but is neither retained nor translated into the final coordinate prediction. Existing ZoomIn-style methods address this issue through an external crop-and-rerun pass, which improves localization but increases end-to-end latency and computational cost. To retain the accuracy benefits of two-pass zooming without this extra cost, we propose InnerZoom, a single-forward framework for cross-layer evidence bridging. InnerZoom transforms target-related cues from the original forward pass into a compact cross-layer evidence state, then preserves, refines, and reinjects this state throughout later decoding layers to guide coordinate prediction. Extensive experimental results suggest that InnerZoom-4B achieves state-of-the-art performance on all six GUI grounding benchmarks, obtaining 64.7 on OSWorld-G, 40.2 on UI-Vision, 73.1 on OSWorld-GR, and 87.6 on MMBench-GUI, surpassing the previous best results by 4.1, 3.2, 2.9, and 2.3 points, respectively. Under a controlled 4B setting, InnerZoom improves the same SFT+RL baseline by 5.3 points on average and outperforms two-pass ZoomIn by 1.3 points on average, while reducing end-to-end latency by up to 31.8% and TFLOPs by about 29%. Code and models will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InnerZoom，一种用于GUI grounding的单次前向框架，通过跨层证据桥接在解码后期保留并注入目标区域信息，以在不增加两次裁剪重跑成本的情况下提升坐标定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于MLLM的GUI定位方法通常把目标位置表示为自回归坐标生成，但在解码坐标token时，模型往往丢失区域级目标证据；两阶段ZoomIn类方法虽能提升精度，却引入额外延迟和计算开销。因此需要一种既保留两阶段方法优势、又避免额外推理成本的方案。
AI.method: InnerZoom将原始前向传播中与目标相关的线索压缩为紧凑的跨层证据状态，并在后续解码层中持续保留、细化并重新注入该状态，从而引导坐标预测。其核心是利用中间层已出现但尚未保留到输出层的目标区域感知信息，实现单次前向内的跨层证据传递。
AI.result: 实验表明，InnerZoom-4B在六个GUI grounding基准上均达到最优，OSWorld-G为64.7，UI-Vision为40.2，OSWorld-GR为73.1，MMBench-GUI为87.6，分别比之前最佳结果高4.1、3.2、2.9和2.3分。在统一4B设置下，相比同一SFT+RL基线平均提升5.3分，且比两阶段ZoomIn平均高1.3分，同时端到端延迟最高降低31.8%，TFLOPs约降低29%。
AI.conclusion: InnerZoom证明了“跨层证据桥接”可以在单次前向中实现接近甚至优于两阶段Zooming的方法效果，在保持更高定位精度的同时显著降低推理成本，适合对实时性和效率要求较高的GUI grounding任务。

title: GUICrafter: Weakly-Supervised GUI Agent Leveraging Massive Unannotated Screenshots
summary: Data, as the fundamental substrate of modern intelligence, has greatly driven the development of current foundation models. Naturally, researchers aim to extend this paradigm to the domain of GUI agents, hoping to build strong GUI agents through a similar paradigm. However, GUI agent data cannot be directly harvested from the internet, making it costly and difficult to collect at scale. As a result, current GUI agents suffer from poor cross-device generalization and limited visual grounding ability for fine-grained GUI elements. As an attempt to address data challenge in GUI agents, we propose GUICrafter, a weakly-supervised GUI agent leveraging massive unannotated screenshots to substantially reduce the reliance on expensive human annotations. GUICrafter explores a curriculum learning framework for training GUI agents through two progressive stages. First, the model learns visual grounding from large-scale unannotated screenshots and webpages, leveraging the rich contextual signals inherent in GUI interactions without human annotations. Then, in Stage 2, we leverage a small amount of high-quality data to calibrate the model via reinforcement learning. Experiments show that GUICrafter achieves competitive, or even superior, performance to advanced systems like UI-TARS while using only 0.1% of its data. Furthermore, under the same amount of annotated data, GUICrafter surpasses all previous methods such as GUI-R1. Code, data, and models are available at https://github.com/fansunqi/GUICrafter.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GUICrafter，一种弱监督GUI智能体训练框架，通过大量未标注截图与少量高质量标注数据的两阶段课程学习，显著降低对人工标注的依赖，同时提升跨设备泛化与细粒度视觉定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体依赖昂贵且难以大规模获取的人工标注数据，导致跨设备泛化能力不足，并且对细粒度GUI元素的视觉理解与定位能力较弱，因此需要一种更高效的数据驱动训练范式。
AI.method: 方法名为GUICrafter，采用两阶段课程学习：第一阶段利用大规模未标注截图和网页中的上下文信号进行弱监督视觉定位学习；第二阶段使用少量高质量标注数据，通过强化学习对模型进行校准与优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，GUICrafter仅使用UI-TARS约0.1%的数据量，就能达到相当甚至更优的性能；在相同标注数据规模下，GUICrafter也优于包括GUI-R1在内的以往方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，利用未标注GUI数据结合少量高质量标注进行分阶段训练，是提升GUI智能体能力并降低数据成本的有效路径，具有较强的实用价值。

title: Enhancing Part-Level Point Grounding for Any Open-Source MLLMs
summary: Visual grounding aims to associate free-form textual queries with specific regions in an image. While recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated promising capabilities in this domain, they primarily excel at object-level grounding and often struggle with part-level grounding-an essential requirement for fine-grained tasks such as robotic manipulation. In this work, we introduce a general approach that equips any open-source MLLMs with accurate 2D part-level point grounding, offering a more direct alternative to conventional grounding representations. Our method leverages the attention mechanisms inherently present in MLLMs. By synthesizing text-conditioned, grounding-aware queries within intermediate layers via the proposed Q-Synth Module, we capture target-relevant attention patterns and refine them with a lightweight Attention-to-Point Decoder, which converts these patterns into a point-centric heatmap for final prediction. Notably, all original MLLM parameters are frozen, ensuring full preservation of their pre-trained capabilities. Experiments show that our design consistently improves part-level grounding accuracy across datasets and can be seamlessly integrated into any open-source MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 该工作提出一种可插拔方法，将任意开源多模态大语言模型增强为具备准确的二维部件级点定位能力，并在冻结原模型参数的前提下，通过中间层注意力重构与轻量解码实现更精细的视觉指向。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在视觉定位上更擅长目标级对齐，但在部件级定位上表现不足，而后者对机器人操作等细粒度任务至关重要。因此，需要一种不破坏原模型能力、且能直接输出部件级点定位结果的通用方案。
AI.method: 作者利用MLLM内部的注意力机制，提出Q-Synth模块在中间层合成文本条件下、面向定位任务的查询，以捕获与目标相关的注意力模式；随后通过轻量级Attention-to-Point Decoder将这些注意力模式转换为以点为中心的热力图，最终得到部件级点预测。整个过程中冻结原始MLLM参数，仅训练新增模块，以保持预训练能力不受影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个数据集上的部件级定位准确率均有稳定提升，并且能够无缝集成到不同的开源MLLM中，显示出良好的通用性与可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了通过利用并重构MLLM内部注意力，可以在不改动主干参数的情况下实现高精度部件级点定位，为细粒度视觉 grounding 提供了一种更直接、通用且高效的实现路径。

title: Efficient Spatio-Temporal Grounding with Multimodal Large Models via Second-Level Tracking and RL Verification
summary: Spatio-temporal grounding in long videos requires precise temporal localization and robust object tracking conditioned on natural-language queries. While recent vision-language models (VLMs) show strong reasoning ability, directly applying frame-by-frame inference to long sequences is computationally expensive and unstable. We propose a practical pipeline that shifts from frame-level to second-level tracking and performs cross-second smoothing to preserve continuity while reducing sequence length. To improve reasoning supervision, we synthesize chain-of-thought style trajectories using advanced multimodal models for temporal localization and target selection, and replace generated spatio-temporal coordinates with ground-truth annotations to avoid noisy supervision. We further optimize the policy with reinforcement learning using a verifier based on $t\_\mathrm{IoU}+mv\_\mathrm{IoU}$. Experiments across multiple FPS settings show that our method achieves a strong trade-off between efficiency and localization quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向长视频时空定位的实用流水线：将逐帧跟踪改为逐秒跟踪，并通过跨秒平滑提升连续性，同时结合合成的链式推理轨迹、真值坐标替换和基于$t_{IoU}+mv_{IoU}$的强化学习优化，以在效率与定位精度之间取得良好平衡。
AI.motivation: 长视频中的时空定位需要同时完成时间片段定位和目标跟踪，但直接对每一帧进行推理计算成本高、稳定性差，因此需要一种更高效且更鲁棒的建模方式。
AI.method: 1）将帧级跟踪降为秒级跟踪，并进行跨秒平滑以保持轨迹连续性；2）利用先进多模态模型合成类似思维链的轨迹，用于时间定位和目标选择的监督；3）用真实标注替换生成的时空坐标，降低噪声监督；4）基于$t_{IoU}+mv_{IoU}$构造验证器，通过强化学习优化策略。
AI.result: 在多个FPS设置下的实验表明，该方法在计算效率和定位质量之间实现了较强的权衡，兼顾了长视频处理的可扩展性与精度。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，将高成本的帧级推理改为更粗粒度的秒级建模，并结合平滑、清洗监督与强化学习，可有效提升长视频时空定位任务中的效率与稳定性。

title: ExACT: Exemplar-Driven Calibrated Refinement for Training-Free Visual Grounding in Remote Sensing Images
summary: Remote sensing visual grounding (RSVG) aims to locate specific objects in high-resolution RS imagery using free-form natural language descriptions. While recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) show great potential for such open-vocabulary RSVG, their training-free adaptation is hindered by the modality gap between abstract linguistic semantics and fine-grained visual cues. In cluttered RS scenes, this gap inevitably causes severe localization drift. To bridge this gap, we propose Exemplar-driven Calibrated Refinement (ExACT), a novel training-free framework driven by a one-shot visual prompting mechanism to explicitly provide discriminative structural guidance for precise pixel-level localization. Specifically, we propose a Vision Exemplar-based Calibrator (VEC) that extracts fine-grained visual correspondences from the given exemplar to rectify the rough cross-modal priors from frozen MLLMs, effectively suppressing background artifacts and accurately outlining target boundaries. Subsequently, a Structure-Aware Refiner (SAR) employs an iterative merge-and-select clustering strategy to consolidate the calibrated priors into high-quality positive and negative geometric prompts. These prompts then guide the Segment Anything Model (SAM) to achieve precise pixel-level predictions. Extensive experiments confirm the superiority of ExACT over existing training-free and weakly-supervised methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向遥感视觉定位的训练免费框架ExACT，通过单样本视觉提示来弥合多模态大语言模型的语义与细粒度视觉之间的鸿沟，从而提升高分辨率遥感图像中的精确定位能力。
AI.motivation: 遥感视觉定位需要根据自然语言描述在复杂、高分辨率遥感场景中找到目标，但现有训练免费方法受限于跨模态语义与细粒度视觉线索之间的模态差异，容易在背景杂乱场景中产生定位偏移，因此需要更稳定的结构化引导。
AI.method: 提出Exemplar-driven Calibrated Refinement（ExACT）框架，包含两个核心模块：1）Vision Exemplar-based Calibrator（VEC），利用给定示例提取细粒度视觉对应关系，校正冻结多模态大语言模型输出的粗略跨模态先验，抑制背景干扰并勾勒目标边界；2）Structure-Aware Refiner（SAR），通过迭代式合并与选择聚类策略，将校准后的先验整合为高质量的正、负几何提示，再引导SAM进行像素级分割。
AI.result: 实验表明，ExACT在训练免费和弱监督方法中均表现出更优性能，能够更有效地抑制背景噪声并实现更精确的目标定位与边界预测。
AI.conclusion: ExACT证明了单样本视觉提示结合结构化校准与精炼策略，可以有效缓解遥感视觉定位中的模态鸿沟问题，并显著提升复杂场景下的像素级定位精度。

title: HKVLM: Faithful Query--Region Binding for Frozen-Detector Visual Grounding
summary:
Visual grounding often fails even when the target object is present in the proposal pool, because the language-side referent is bound to the wrong region. We study this binding failure under frozen perception and ask whether an explicit query--region alignment hook, together with a perception-grounded abstention mechanism, can improve faithful grounding without retraining the detector or the vision-language backbone. HKVLM freezes a language-aligned open-vocabulary detector for localization and learns a lightweight hook that maps referential query embeddings to detector proposals in a shared space; a verifier abstains when no region sufficiently supports the query. We prove an exact proposal-level diagnostic decomposition, $(1-\mathrm{SeeErr})(1-\mathrm{SayErr})$, separating proposal-coverage failures from conditional binding failures, and a monotonicity result that characterizes the faithfulness--recall trade-off induced by abstention.
  Across RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, RefCOCOg, and POPE, HKVLM improves over untrained and trained matched-perception binding controls and substantially reduces hallucination through abstention. Strong coordinate-decoding and end-to-end fine-tuned baselines remain much higher in raw grounding accuracy, and a reasoning-stress set exposes binding as the main current bottleneck. We therefore present HKVLM as a diagnostic and mechanism-level study of query--region binding under frozen perception, not as an absolute localization leader.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究冻结感知条件下的视觉指代绑定失败问题，提出HKVLM：通过轻量级查询—区域对齐钩子和基于感知的拒答机制，在不重训检测器或视觉语言骨干的前提下提升忠实定位，并给出可分解的诊断理论与权衡分析。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉定位即使目标物体已存在于候选区域中，仍可能因语言侧指代与错误区域绑定而失败。作者希望在冻结感知表示的条件下，分析并缓解这种绑定错误，同时减少幻觉式定位。
AI.method: HKVLM冻结一个与语言对齐的开放词表检测器用于定位，学习一个轻量级钩子将指代表达嵌入映射到共享空间中的检测候选区域；同时加入验证器，在没有任何区域足够支持查询时进行拒答。论文还给出了精确的候选级诊断分解$(1-\mathrm{SeeErr})(1-\mathrm{SayErr})$，用于区分候选覆盖失败与条件绑定失败，并证明了拒答带来的忠实性—召回率单调权衡关系。
AI.result: 在RefCOCO、RefCOCO+、RefCOCOg和POPE上，HKVLM优于未训练和已训练的匹配感知绑定基线，并通过拒答显著降低幻觉。尽管如此，强坐标解码与端到端微调基线在原始定位准确率上仍明显更高；在推理压力集上，绑定被证明是当前主要瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: HKVLM更适合作为冻结感知下查询—区域绑定的诊断与机制研究方法，而不是绝对定位性能最强的方法。它表明，显式对齐与感知驱动拒答能够提升忠实性，但也带来召回率下降的代价。

title: COMPASS: Grounding Composition-Intent Guidance in Unified Multimodal Models
summary: Composition is a high-level visual intent that governs where subjects are placed and how a scene is organized, yet current unified multimodal models remain unreliable at fine-grained composition recognition and struggle to turn such intent into controllable generation. We present COMPASS, the first unified multimodal framework that grounds composition-intent control in a single system spanning both composition perception and composition-guided generation, with a shared expert token $蟿_c$ as the central intent anchor. On the perception side, COMPASS injects composition expertise into an MoE backbone in a minimally invasive manner and distills the inferred intent into $蟿_c$. On the generation side, COMPASS reuses $蟿_c$ as a global conditioning signal that steers the denoising trajectory, effectively converting passive composition analysis into explicit layout control. To support systematic instruction-following composition learning and evaluation at scale, we construct Comp-11, a large-scale dataset with an 11-class taxonomy and reasoning-augmented annotations. Extensive experiments show that COMPASS substantially improves category-level composition understanding and delivers more composition-consistent, prompt-faithful generation than strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一多模态框架COMPASS，用共享专家token将“构图意图”同时用于构图感知与构图引导生成，从而提升细粒度构图识别与可控图像生成能力。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型在细粒度构图识别上不可靠，也难以把抽象的构图意图转化为可控生成，因此需要一个同时覆盖感知与生成、且能显式承载构图意图的统一框架。
AI.method: COMPASS采用共享专家token作为核心意图锚点：在感知侧，将构图知识以尽量少的改动注入MoE骨干，并把推断出的意图蒸馏到共享token中；在生成侧，将该token复用为全局条件信号，引导去噪过程，实现从构图分析到布局控制的转换。为训练与评估，作者构建了Comp-11数据集，包含11类构图 taxonomy 和带推理增强标注。
AI.result: 实验表明，COMPASS在构图类别级理解上显著优于强基线，并且生成结果在构图一致性和与提示词的一致性方面更强。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了将构图意图显式压缩到共享token并跨感知与生成复用，是提升统一多模态模型构图理解与可控生成能力的有效路径，同时Comp-11为后续研究提供了规模化数据支持。

title: Detecting Clinical Hallucinations in LVLMs via Counterfactual Visual Grounding Uncertainty
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) are increasingly used for clinical image understanding, yet they remain vulnerable to \emph{hallucinations}--producing textual findings or attributes not supported by the image. We present a vision-traceable hallucination detection framework that audits arbitrary LVLM responses via visual evidence grounding, requiring neither modification nor internal access to the hidden states of LVLMs. Given an LVLM response, we extract visually verifiable entities and use a medical-domain-adapted Qwen-VL grounding verifier to localize each entity on the input image. To enhance the robustness of our detection method, we introduce a counterfactual entity perturbation method and estimate visual evidence uncertainty by contrasting factual and counterfactual grounding results. Specifically, we compute an entity-level uncertainty score from the positive confidence, counterfactual confidence, and their grounding overlap for binary hallucination decision-making. Experiments on multiple medical imaging modalities and LVLM backbones demonstrate that our method consistently improves hallucination detection performance over recent baselines, while providing interpretable localization evidence and strong cross-model transferability. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/Agentic-CliniAI/CounterVHD.

AI.tldr: 该摘要提出了一种用于临床图像场景的视觉可追踪幻觉检测框架，可在不修改模型且无需访问内部状态的情况下，审计大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）的输出是否存在图像不支持的描述。
AI.motivation: 医学图像理解中，LVLM虽便于自动生成文本结论，但容易出现与图像不一致的幻觉内容，影响可靠性与可解释性，因此需要一种可验证、可迁移的检测方法。
AI.method: 先从LVLM回答中抽取可由视觉验证的实体，再用医学领域适配的Qwen-VL作为 grounding 验证器，将每个实体定位到输入图像上；同时设计反事实实体扰动方法，通过对事实实体与反事实实体的定位结果进行对比，估计视觉证据不确定性，并基于正向置信度、反事实置信度及定位重叠计算实体级不确定性分数，用于二分类幻觉判定。
AI.result: 在多种医学影像模态和不同LVLM骨干上的实验表明，该方法相比近期基线能更稳定地提升幻觉检测性能，同时输出可解释的定位证据，并表现出较强的跨模型迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了“基于视觉证据的外部审计”是检测医学LVLM幻觉的有效路线，兼顾检测性能、可解释性与通用性，且代码和数据已开源，便于复现与扩展。

title: Empowering GUI Agents via Autonomous Experience Exploration and Hindsight Experience Utilization for Task Planning
summary: Multimodal web agents can assist humans in operating repetitive GUI tasks, where effective task planning is essential for decomposing complex tasks into executable actions. While small open source MLLMs are cost efficient and privacy preserving compared with commercial large models, they suffer from weak planning and limited cross website generalization. To address these limitations, we introduce the planning experience exploration and utilization (PEEU) method, which autonomously explores environments to discover experiences and utilizes hindsight experience to synthesize strictly aligned, high level training data. To quantitatively analyze the generalization behaviors driving this performance, we propose the task decomposition hierarchical analysis framework (TDHAF) to systematically study compositional generalization across three task granularities: low, middle and high levels. Our analysis reveals that mastering low level atomic skills does not guarantee high level planning competence, while high level task training yields stronger OOD generalization. Experiments on real world benchmarks demonstrate PEEU's superior effectiveness: our 7B model achieves 30.6% accuracy, outperforming the much larger Qwen2.5-VL-32B model. These demonstrate constructing hindsight high level tasks and leveraging experiences is crucial for OOD planning abilities of small MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PEEU方法，通过自主探索环境并利用事后经验合成高质量高层训练数据，以提升小型多模态大模型在网页GUI任务中的规划能力和跨网站泛化；同时提出TDHAF框架分析不同任务粒度下的组合泛化。
AI.motivation: 小型开源多模态大模型虽然更省成本且更注重隐私，但在复杂任务规划和跨网站泛化方面较弱，难以将复杂网页操作拆解为可执行步骤，因此需要一种能够增强高层规划能力的训练与分析方法。
AI.method: 提出两部分工作：1）PEEU（规划经验探索与利用），通过自动探索环境获取经验，并基于事后经验构造严格对齐的高层训练数据；2）TDHAF（任务分解分层分析框架），从低、中、高三个任务粒度系统评估组合泛化能力，分析不同层级任务训练对OOD泛化的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，PEEU显著提升了小型模型的规划效果；其7B模型在真实世界基准上达到30.6%的准确率，优于更大的Qwen2.5-VL-32B模型。分析结果还显示，低层原子技能掌握并不必然带来高层规划能力，而高层任务训练更有助于OOD泛化。
AI.conclusion: 对于小型多模态网页代理而言，构建事后高层任务数据并利用经验进行训练，是提升复杂规划与分布外泛化能力的关键；仅强化低层操作技能不足以保证高层任务成功。

title: Pseudo-Text-Conditioned 3D Grounding DINO for Organ Localization in Abdominal CT
summary: Reliable organ localization in abdominal CT can provide spatial priors for downstream trauma analysis. We propose CT-3GDINO, a lightweight 3D detector that adapts a Grounding-DINO-style query-based architecture to fixed organ localization using frozen pseudo-text class tokens instead of a real text encoder. The model combines a Swin3D visual backbone, bidirectional feature enhancement, pseudo-text-guided query selection, and a cross-modality decoder to predict normalized 3D boxes for liver, spleen, left kidney, right kidney, and bowel. We train and evaluate on 193 matched RSNA/RATIC CT volumes with segmentation-derived boxes. The best multi-scale model, trained from scratch, achieves 0.5830 overall top-1 class-wise mAP over 3D IoU thresholds from 0.1 to 0.7, outperforming fixed- and trainable-backbone classification-pretrained variants with 0.5570 and 0.4657 mAP. Performance is strong for coarse localization, with 0.9649 AP at IoU 0.1, but remains limited for strict box alignment, with 0.1552 AP at IoU 0.7. These results establish CT-3GDINO as an open-source baseline for pseudo-text-conditioned 3D organ localization and motivate future work on localization-aware pretraining, richer multimodal conditioning, and injury-focused detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CT-3GDINO，一种用于腹部CT器官定位的轻量级3D检测器，采用伪文本类别令牌替代真实文本编码器，在193个CT体数据上取得了较好的粗定位性能，但高精度框对齐仍有限。
AI.motivation: 腹部CT中的可靠器官定位可为后续创伤分析提供空间先验。现有方法在固定器官定位任务上仍缺少一种兼顾轻量化、可扩展性和跨模态查询机制的3D检测基线，因此作者希望借鉴Grounding-DINO式查询架构，构建适用于器官定位的开放基线。
AI.method: 提出CT-3GDINO：以Swin3D作为视觉主干，结合双向特征增强、伪文本引导的查询选择和跨模态解码器，使用冻结的伪文本类别令牌替代真实文本编码器，输出肝脏、脾脏、左肾、右肾和肠道的归一化3D框。模型在193个匹配的RSNA/RATIC CT体数据上训练和评估，标注来自分割框。
AI.result: 最佳的多尺度、从零训练模型整体top-1类别mAP为0.5830，优于固定骨干和可训练骨干的分类预训练变体（分别为0.5570和0.4657）。模型在粗定位上表现较强，IoU 0.1时AP达到0.9649，但在严格框对齐上表现较弱，IoU 0.7时AP仅为0.1552。
AI.conclusion: CT-3GDINO可作为面向伪文本条件的3D器官定位开源基线，证明了该类查询式架构在腹部CT定位任务中的可行性；但要提升高IoU下的精确度，仍需面向定位的预训练、更丰富的多模态条件建模，以及更聚焦于损伤检测的后续研究。

title: TAVR-VLM: Risk-Conditioned Causal Grounding for Hallucination-Resistant Report Generation
summary: Transcatheter Aortic Valve Replacement (TAVR) planning requires meticulous multimodal reasoning. However, adapting Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to this high-stakes domain is severely impeded by diagnostic hallucinations, where generated text lacks anatomical grounding.
