To address this, TAVR-VLM is introduced: a novel framework featuring Risk-Conditioned Causal Grounding Attention (R-CGA) that instantiates a model-internal ``Risk $\rightarrow$ Region $\rightarrow$ Word'' structural grounding pathway. R-CGA compresses multimodal inputs into a causal risk bottleneck, purifying dense visual features into a global risk mask. During autoregressive generation, a support-projected causal consistency objective constrains token-level grounding within the risk-defined support mask. Evaluated on $\text{M}^3\text{TAVR}$, a comprehensive 1,482-patient cohort, TAVR-VLM establishes a new state-of-the-art. It achieves an AUROC of 0.896, boosts CIDEr to 0.936, and drastically reduces the hallucination rate to 8.1\%, thereby improving interpretability for evidence-based surgical AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAVR-VLM，用于经导管主动脉瓣置换（TAVR）规划中的多模态推理，通过风险条件因果落地注意力机制缓解医学文本生成中的幻觉问题，并在大规模队列上取得更优的风险预测、文本生成与可解释性表现。
AI.motivation: TAVR规划依赖多模态信息综合判断，但现有多模态大语言模型在该高风险医学场景中容易出现诊断幻觉，即生成内容与解剖证据不一致，影响临床可信度与安全性。
AI.method: 提出TAVR-VLM框架，核心为风险条件因果落地注意力（R-CGA）。该方法将多模态输入压缩为因果风险瓶颈，先把密集视觉特征净化为全局风险掩码，再在自回归生成阶段使用支持投影的因果一致性目标，约束词级生成始终落在风险定义的支持区域内，实现“风险→区域→词”的结构化落地路径。
AI.result: 在M^3TAVR数据集上进行评估，该数据集包含1482名患者。模型取得AUROC 0.896，CIDEr提升至0.936，幻觉率降至8.1%，整体性能达到新的最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，将风险感知与因果约束显式引入多模态医学生成模型，有助于显著减少幻觉、增强解剖证据对齐与结果可解释性，为证据驱动的外科人工智能提供了更可靠的技术路径。

title: From Hallucination to Grounding: Diagnosing Visual Spatial Intelligence via CRISP
summary: Current VLM evaluations often conflate language priors with genuine spatial reasoning. To address this, we introduce CRISP, a novel structural-diagnostic evaluation paradigm that assesses visual spatial intelligence through consistency, the alignment between implicit perception and explicit reasoning. Unlike traditional black-box QA, CRISP utilizes metric 3D Scene Graphs and an oracle intervention protocol to decouple latent reasoning capabilities from perceptual bottlenecks. This granular diagnosis uncovers a systematic perception-reasoning disconnect. Crucially, we reveal that while proprietary models possess robust latent reasoning engines, they suffer from inaccurate metric estimation and a critical failure to leverage their implicit structural representations. Conversely, open-source models remain fundamentally bottlenecked by their lack of multi-hop compositional reasoning. By shifting the focus from merely ``guessing correctly'' via language priors to genuinely ``perceiving, verifying, and reasoning,'' CRISP offers a rigorous roadmap for multimodal alignment beyond end-to-end post-training. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/iiyamayuki/CRISP-Bench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CRISP，一种结构化诊断式评估框架，用于区分视觉空间智能中的“感知能力”和“推理能力”，避免传统VLM评测将语言先验误当作真正的空间推理。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM评测往往把语言先验带来的“猜对”混同于真实的空间推理能力，缺乏对模型内部感知、验证与推理链条的细粒度诊断，因此需要一种能够揭示感知-推理脱节的新评估范式。
AI.method: CRISP采用度量化3D场景图和oracle干预协议，通过一致性指标评估隐式感知与显式推理的对齐程度，并将潜在推理能力与感知瓶颈解耦，从而进行结构性诊断。
AI.result: 实验发现存在系统性的感知-推理脱节：闭源模型通常具备较强的潜在推理引擎，但在度量估计不准以及未能有效利用隐式结构表示方面存在明显缺陷；开源模型则主要受限于多跳组合推理能力不足。
AI.conclusion: CRISP将评测重点从“是否答对”转向“是否真正感知、验证并推理”，为多模态对齐和更可靠的空间智能评估提供了一个严格的诊断框架；代码和数据集已公开。

title: What the LLM Should Not Say: Boundary-Aware Context Grounding for A Seven-Channel EEG Agent
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) can make scientific software easier to use. However, a general model does not automatically know which measurements a particular sensor can support, which algorithms are implemented in the current software, or which conclusions are justified by a computed result. These distinctions are especially important for low-channel electroencephalography (EEG), where sparse spatial coverage and variable signal quality make plausible but unsupported interpretations easy to produce. We present NeuraDock Agent, an open-source architecture that separates a deterministic local EEG engine from a hardware-aware language layer. The numerical engine parses recordings, performs quality control, executes reviewed spectral workflows, and writes machine-readable artifacts. The LLM receives only a compact, allowlisted summary and a versioned context pack. The context describes the seven-channel hardware, reviewed workflows, result fields, implementation boundaries, scientific limits, and reference cases. Raw EEG and dense per-sample arrays remain local
  We evaluate the system at three levels. First, 12 recordings produced identical structured results over ten numerical repetitions, and a complete Rest/Task run produced identical result, report, and figure hashes over three repetitions. Second, request-capture and failure-injection experiments confirmed the tested data boundary and preservation of local artifacts under HTTP, malformed-output, and connection failures. Third, a boundary-awareness benchmark tested 36 ordinary and adversarial questions under four context ablations and two LLMs, yielding 288 outputs.These results support hardware- and implementation-aware grounding as a practical mechanism for calibrating what an EEG agent accepts, qualifies, or refuses; they do not establish clinical validity or a validated absolute cognitive-load index.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向低通道脑电（EEG）的开源智能体架构，通过将确定性的本地数值引擎与硬件感知的语言层分离，并用受控上下文约束模型输出，提升了结果生成的边界意识与可重复性。
AI.motivation: 通用大语言模型并不知道特定传感器支持哪些测量、当前软件实现了哪些算法，以及某个计算结果能够支持哪些结论；在低通道EEG场景下，这种不确定性更容易导致看似合理但缺乏依据的解释。
AI.method: 作者设计了NeuraDock Agent：本地数值引擎负责解析记录、质量控制、执行经审查的频谱流程并生成机器可读工件；LLM仅接收精简的白名单摘要和版本化上下文包。上下文包包含七通道硬件信息、已审查工作流、结果字段、实现边界、科学限制和参考案例，原始EEG与高维逐样本数组始终保留在本地。评估分三层：数值重复性测试、请求捕获与故障注入测试、以及在不同上下文消融和两种LLM下进行的边界意识基准测试。
AI.result: 12条记录在10次数值重复中得到完全一致的结构化结果；一次完整Rest/Task运行在3次重复中生成相同的结果、报告和图像哈希。请求捕获与故障注入实验验证了数据边界与本地工件在HTTP、错误输出和连接失败下的保留。边界意识基准在36个普通与对抗性问题上、结合4种上下文消融和2种LLM，共得到288个输出，用于检验模型是否正确接受、限定或拒绝请求。
AI.conclusion: 硬件与实现感知的约束式上下文注入，是校准EEG智能体接受、限定或拒绝什么内容的一种可行机制；但该结果并不证明临床有效性，也不支持已验证的绝对认知负荷指数。

title: WinDOM: Self-Family Distillation for Small-Model GUI Grounding
summary: Small ($\sim$2B) GUI-grounding agents are attractive for on-device deployment, accessibility tooling, and low-cost iteration, but at this scale they face two open recipe questions: how to obtain bounding-box training data without expensive human annotation, and how to combine supervised fine-tuning with reinforcement learning. We address both, with the explicit goal of pushing small-model performance rather than scaling up. WinDOM is a $54{,}425$-record grounding corpus harvested by driving an open-source Windows 11 web reimplementation under headless Playwright, with bounding boxes read directly off the DOM and no OCR or human annotation. Self-Family Distillation (SFD) is a single rejection-sampling cold-start parameterised only by the teacher choice: either an EMA of the student (no external model) or a frozen larger same-family teacher. We then treat the saturation depth of the SFD cold-start as an explicit GRPO hyperparameter. On a Qwen3.5-2B student, the under-saturated cold-start is a better GRPO initialiser than the converged one: SFD-4B with Early-init RL gains $+5.4$ OOD-mean ($+3.5$ ScreenSpot-Pro, $+7.0$ OSWorld-G, $+5.8$ ScreenSpot-V2) over the base. The same-size EMA mode lands within roughly one OOD-mean point of the cross-size $4$B variant ($65.2$ vs $66.3$) without an external teacher.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向小型GUI-grounding代理的训练方案：用DOM直接生成无人工标注的边界框数据集WinDOM，并用自蒸馏冷启动（SFD）结合GRPO进行强化学习优化，重点提升小模型而非扩大模型规模。
AI.motivation: 针对约2B级GUI-grounding代理在端侧部署、可访问性工具和低成本迭代中的需求，作者关注两个核心问题：一是如何低成本获得边界框标注数据，二是如何更有效地结合监督微调与强化学习。
AI.method: 1）构建WinDOM数据集：通过Headless Playwright驱动开源Windows 11网页重实现，直接从DOM读取边界框，避免OCR和人工标注；2）提出Self-Family Distillation（SFD）：仅通过拒绝采样进行冷启动，可使用学生的EMA作为教师，或使用同家族但更大的冻结教师；3）将SFD冷启动的收敛/饱和程度作为GRPO的显式超参数，比较不同冷启动深度对后续强化学习的影响。
AI.result: 在Qwen3.5-2B学生模型上，未充分饱和的SFD冷启动比已收敛版本更适合作为GRPO初始点；SFD-4B配合Early-init RL相较基础模型提升了OOD平均分+5.4，其中ScreenSpot-Pro提升+3.5、OSWorld-G提升+7.0、ScreenSpot-V2提升+5.8；此外，同尺寸EMA模式在无需外部教师的情况下，其OOD平均表现与跨尺寸4B版本接近（65.2 vs 66.3）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作说明，对于小型GUI-grounding代理，数据可以通过DOM自动采集高效构建，而训练上“未完全收敛的冷启动+强化学习”可能优于传统的先充分蒸馏再RL策略；同时，EMA自蒸馏提供了无需外部大教师的可行替代方案。

title: KG-TRACE: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Mechanistic Grounding in Antimicrobial Resistance Prediction
summary:
While WGS-based AMR prediction has reached high accuracy, existing models lack a mechanism to ground neural attributions in established biological pathways. We present KG-TRACE, a novel neuro-symbolic framework that integrates the WHO mutation knowledge graph (KG) as a structured biological constraint on a neural genomic model. Unlike existing methods that learn statistical patterns in isolation, KG-TRACE fuses genomic features and RotatE-based KG embeddings through a learned epistemic trust gate, dynamically weighting neural evidence against symbolic biological knowledge.
  Evaluated on the CRyPTIC M. tuberculosis cohort, KG-TRACE achieves an AUROC of 0.9760 for isoniazid, achieving competitive accuracy while its primary value lies in symbolic grounding, not predictive uplift. More importantly, we introduce the Biological Grounding Ratio (BGR), a dataset-level metric that quantifies alignment between neural attributions and established biology. Our framework achieves a 92.5% symbolic coverage of isoniazid-resistant predictions and effectively identifies MDR co-occurrence artifacts by issuing laboratory follow-up flags for 'UNCERTAIN' cases. We demonstrate that neuro-symbolic grounding provides a verifiable audit trail for clinicians, bridging the gap between predictive accuracy and clinical trust.

AI.tldr: 提出KG-TRACE，一种将WHO突变知识图谱与神经基因模型融合的神经符号框架，用于抗药性预测并增强生物学可解释性与可审计性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于全基因组测序的抗微生物药物耐药性预测模型虽然准确率较高，但缺乏将神经网络归因结果锚定到已知生物通路和生物机制中的能力，因此临床信任与可解释性不足。
AI.method: KG-TRACE将WHO突变知识图谱作为结构化生物约束，引入RotatE图谱嵌入，并通过学习得到的epistemic trust gate动态融合基因组特征与符号知识；同时提出Biological Grounding Ratio（BGR）用于衡量神经归因与既有生物学的一致性。
AI.result: 在CRyPTIC结核分枝杆菌队列上，异烟肼任务AUROC达到0.9760；该方法实现了92.5%的符号覆盖率，并能识别MDR共现伪影，对UNCERTAIN案例输出实验室复核标记。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，神经符号融合不仅能保持较高预测性能，还能提供可验证的生物学 grounding 和审计轨迹，从而缩小预测准确率与临床信任之间的差距。

title: Uncertainty Quantification for Computer-Use Agents: A Benchmark across Vision-Language Models and GUI Grounding Datasets
summary: Computer-use agents turn vision-language model (VLM) predictions into executable GUI clicks, so reliable uncertainty estimates are essential for rejection, calibration, miss-severity ranking, and spatial safety regions. Yet evidence on post-hoc uncertainty quantification (UQ) for these agents is fragmented across isolated model and dataset pairs, leaving it unclear whether UQ rankings stay stable when the agent, benchmark, or observable interface changes. We present Argus, a cross-regime benchmark for post-hoc UQ in single-step executable GUI grounding: a 27-method open-weight matrix over 4 VLM agents and 4 datasets, plus an 8-method closed-source matrix across 3 frontier vendors where logits, hidden states, and attention maps are unavailable. Evaluated methods span logit-based scores, sampling and consistency measures, hidden-state and density estimators (Mahalanobis, SAPLMA), attention-based scores, P(True) and verbalised-confidence prompting, and split-conformal prediction. The main finding is selective transfer: UQ rankings are stable across datasets for a fixed model, but degrade across model classes and observable interfaces. Hidden-state and density methods are the most stable open-weight family, while CoCoA-1MCA, Focus, sampling-based scores, and verbalised self-assessment win in specific regimes. Within-model ranking transfer is strong (Spearman rho up to 0.969), but cross-tier transfer to closed-source vendors averages only +0.08, so closed-source UQ should be reranked on the target rather than extrapolated. Conformal click regions show score-level discrimination is not enough for deployment: locally weighted disks shrink radii by 40-60% when the plug-in UQ is calibrated, but coverage degrades under calibration-test or interface mismatch. We release per-item records, calibration/test splits, UQ scores, and analysis scripts for regime-aware UQ selection in GUI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Argus，一个用于单步可执行GUI定位中后验不确定性量化（UQ）的跨场景基准，系统比较了开源与闭源多种方法，发现UQ排序在同一模型跨数据集时较稳定，但跨模型类别与可观测接口时会明显退化。
AI.motivation: 计算机使用代理将视觉语言模型输出转化为GUI点击，可靠的不确定性估计对于拒绝机制、校准、错误严重度排序和空间安全区域都很重要，但现有研究多局限于单一模型与数据集，缺乏对UQ方法排序能否跨场景保持稳定的系统证据。
AI.method: 作者构建了Argus基准，包含开源权重条件下4个VLM代理与4个数据集组成的27种方法矩阵，以及在3个闭源前沿模型上、无法访问logits/隐藏状态/注意力图条件下的8种方法矩阵。方法覆盖logit分数、采样与一致性、隐藏状态与密度估计（如Mahalanobis、SAPLMA）、注意力分数、P(True)、口语化自信提示，以及split-conformal prediction，并在单步GUI grounding任务上评估其跨数据集、跨模型、跨接口的迁移性。
AI.result: 结果显示存在明显的选择性迁移：固定模型时，UQ方法在不同数据集上的排序较稳定；但跨模型类别和跨可观测接口时排序显著下降。开源场景中，隐藏状态和密度类方法总体最稳定；CoCoA-1MCA、Focus、采样类分数和口语化自评在某些特定场景表现最好。固定模型内的排序迁移较强，Spearman相关最高达0.969；但迁移到闭源模型时平均仅提升0.08，说明闭源UQ需要在目标模型上重新排序而不能直接外推。对conformal点击区域而言，若插件UQ已校准，局部加权圆盘的半径可缩小40%到60%，但在校准-测试分布不一致或接口不匹配时覆盖率会下降。
AI.conclusion: 对于GUI代理中的后验UQ，不能只看单一指标或单一环境下的表现，必须进行面向模型、数据集与接口条件的情境化选择。Argus提供了可复现实验记录、划分与分析脚本，有助于支持面向部署的UQ方法筛选与安全区域设计。

title: GUI agent: Guided Exploration of User-Sensitive Screens
summary: LLM agents are increasingly being used to automate tasks for users within an open GUI environment. They inevitably encounter screens containing user-sensitive information, for which takeover of task execution by the user is highly desirable or even necessary. State-of-the-art LLM-driven agents are usually fine-tuned to complete tasks regardless of the safety implications of their actions. This makes their real-world deployment difficult and adversely affects the reliability. Therefore, it is crucial to identify and categorize user-sensitive states and define user-sensitive queries. This dataset would be to engineers to recognize and request handover to the user in critical scenarios. This short paper develops an explorer agent that systematically explores the query space starting from one demonstrated task to identify queries that, if executed, would lead to user-sensitive states in a GUI environment.

AI.tldr: 该论文摘要提出了一种用于开放式图形界面环境的探索型智能体，目标是从一个示范任务出发，系统性搜索查询空间，识别会导致用户敏感状态的查询，以便在关键场景中触发用户接管。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型智能体被用于自动化执行界面任务，它们会不可避免地接触到包含用户敏感信息的界面。现有方法通常更关注任务完成，而较少考虑安全与接管机制，导致真实部署困难、可靠性下降。因此，需要识别和分类用户敏感状态，并定义相应的用户敏感查询，帮助工程系统在关键时刻请求用户接管。
AI.method: 论文构建了一个探索型智能体，从一个已演示的任务开始，系统性地遍历和探索查询空间，寻找那些一旦执行就会导向用户敏感状态的查询。其核心思路是通过自动化探索来发现高风险交互路径，并为后续的敏感状态识别与接管策略提供数据基础。
AI.result: 摘要未给出具体实验数值或定量结果，但明确表明该方法能够自动发现可能引发用户敏感状态的查询，为构建相关数据集提供支持。
AI.conclusion: 该工作强调了在开放GUI中的LLM智能体不仅要完成任务，还必须具备对敏感场景的识别与接管意识。通过探索式智能体生成敏感查询，可为工程实践提供用于安全控制和用户接管的数据与基础能力。

title: HG-Bench: A Benchmark for Multi-Page Handwritten Answer-Region Grounding in Automated Homework Assessment
summary: Automated homework assessment depends not only on recognizing student answers, but also on accurately locating where each answer and each intermediate reasoning step appears in noisy, multi-page handwritten work. This paper addresses the missing evaluation setting of page-aware, two-level answer-region grounding: given a sequence of homework page images, a model must localize complete answer regions and their ordered step-level subregions. We introduce HG-Bench, a benchmark of 500 human-annotated K-12 homework samples curated from a 1,489,278-image source pool, with question-level and step-level boxes linked by a hierarchical containment constraint. HG-Bench is paired with a page-aware evaluation protocol that separately measures complete-answer localization (FA) and step-level decomposition (FSm), revealing whether models truly ground the spatial structure of student reasoning rather than merely parse visible text. Across frontier closed-source APIs and competitive open-weight VLMs, no zero-shot system exceeds 55.22% on FA or 48.22% on FSm, while a GLM-4.6V 9B reference model fine-tuned on ~10k in-domain examples reaches 74.97/72.26. These results identify step-level handwritten grounding as a concrete capability gap and provide a reproducible benchmark, evaluation protocol, and trained reference point for future work on automated homework assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向作业批改的分层手写答案定位任务与基准HG-Bench，要求模型在多页作业图像中同时定位完整答案区域和按顺序排列的步骤级子区域；实验表明，零样本视觉语言模型在该任务上表现较弱，而经过领域微调的参考模型显著提升。
AI.motivation: 自动化作业评估不仅要识别学生答案内容，还要准确定位答案与推理步骤在噪声较大的多页手写作业中的空间位置。现有工作缺少“页级感知、两层级答案区域定位”的系统评测，因此本文旨在填补这一评测空白。
AI.method: 构建HG-Bench基准，包含500个由人工标注的K-12作业样本，来源于大规模图片池；标注同时提供题目级与步骤级边界框，并满足层级包含约束。进一步设计页级评测协议，分别衡量完整答案定位能力（FA）和步骤级分解能力（FSm），用于区分模型是仅解析可见文字还是确实理解了答案的空间结构。
AI.result: 在闭源前沿API和开源视觉语言模型上，零样本系统在FA上均未超过55.22%，在FSm上未超过48.22%。相比之下，经过约1万条领域内样本微调的GLM-4.6V 9B参考模型达到74.97/72.26，显著优于零样本基线。
AI.conclusion: 步骤级手写答案定位是自动化作业评估中的明确能力短板。HG-Bench及其评测协议为该问题提供了可复现的基准和参考结果，也说明领域微调对提升分层手写 grounding 能力非常关键。

title: UniDrive: A Unified Vision-Language and Grounding Framework for Interpretable Risk Understanding in Autonomous Driving
summary: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown strong potential for autonomous driving scene understanding, yet existing methods still face a fundamental trade-off between temporal reasoning and spatial precision. Models that rely on single-frame or low-resolution inputs often miss small, distant, or partially occluded hazards, while language-centric driving models frequently provide limited grounded evidence for their explanations. To address this gap, we propose UniDrive, a unified visual-language and grounding framework for interpretable risk understanding in autonomous driving. UniDrive combines a temporal reasoning branch that models scene dynamics from multi-frame visual input with a high-resolution perception branch that preserves fine-grained spatial details from the latest frame. The two branches are integrated through a gated cross-attention fusion module, enabling dynamic context to be aligned with precise spatial evidence. Based on the fused representation, UniDrive jointly generates natural-language risk descriptions and grounded bounding-box outputs for risk objects. Experiments on the DRAMA-Reasoning benchmark show that UniDrive outperforms representative image-based and video-based baselines in both captioning and risk-object grounding. In particular, UniDrive achieves the best overall performance on the validation split and demonstrates clear advantages in small-object localization, zero-shot generalization to NuScenes and BDD100K, and human-rated interpretability and trustworthiness. These results suggest that explicitly combining temporal semantics and high-resolution perception provides a stronger foundation for interpretable and safety-oriented autonomous driving systems. The code is available at https://github.com/pixeli99/unidrive-dev.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniDrive，一种面向自动驾驶风险理解的统一视觉-语言与定位框架，通过融合多帧时序推理与高分辨率空间感知，同时生成风险文本描述和风险目标边界框，实现更强的可解释性与定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在自动驾驶场景理解中存在核心矛盾：依赖单帧或低分辨率输入时，容易漏检小目标、远距离目标和遮挡目标；而偏语言化的方法虽然能生成解释，但缺乏足够的空间证据支撑，因此需要一种兼顾时序语义与空间精度的统一方法。
AI.method: UniDrive采用双分支结构：一条时序推理分支基于多帧视觉输入建模场景动态，另一条高分辨率感知分支保留最新帧的细粒度空间细节；随后通过门控交叉注意力融合模块对两类信息进行对齐与整合，最终基于融合表示联合输出自然语言风险描述与风险目标的边界框定位结果。
AI.result: 在DRAMA-Reasoning基准上，UniDrive在文本生成和风险目标定位两项任务中均优于代表性的图像基线和视频基线；在验证集上取得最佳总体表现，并在小目标定位、对NuScenes和BDD100K的零样本泛化，以及人工评估的可解释性和可信度方面表现出明显优势。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明，将时序语义与高分辨率空间感知显式结合，能够更好地支持自动驾驶中的可解释风险理解；UniDrive为安全导向的多模态驾驶系统提供了一种更稳健的统一建模思路。

title: VisCritic: Visual State Comparison as Process Reward for GUI Agents
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures; ECCV 2026 submission; supplementary material uploaded as ancillary file
summary: GUI agents powered by vision-language models show strong potential for automating digital tasks, yet frequently fail in long-horizon scenarios due to the absence of step-level verification. Existing process reward models verify actions through textual reasoning alone, missing the visual nature of GUI state changes. We introduce VisCritic, a visual process reward framework that verifies agent actions by directly comparing pre-action and post-action screenshots in visual feature space. VisCritic employs a Siamese vision transformer to extract change-aware representations, coupled with an Action-Aware Critic Head that jointly evaluates action success, task progress, and error type. A critic-training data construction pipeline generates weakly supervised samples from existing trajectories without additional human labels for critic training. Experiments and offline analyses across five benchmarks demonstrate that VisCritic serves as a plug-and-play enhancement for diverse GUI agents, generally improving benchmark metrics while providing visual diagnostic cues.

AI.tldr: VisCritic提出了一种面向GUI智能体的视觉过程奖励框架，通过直接比较操作前后的截图，在视觉特征空间中验证动作是否成功，从而弥补传统仅依赖文本推理的过程奖励模型对界面变化感知不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体在长时程任务中容易失败，核心原因之一是缺少逐步验证机制；而已有过程奖励模型主要基于文本推理，难以捕捉GUI状态变化的视觉特征，因此需要一种更符合界面任务本质的验证方法。
AI.method: 该方法使用双塔式Siamese Vision Transformer提取动作前后截图的变化感知表示，并通过Action-Aware Critic Head联合判断动作是否成功、任务进度以及错误类型；同时构建了一套从现有轨迹中生成弱监督样本的数据流程，无需额外人工标注即可训练critic。
AI.result: 在五个基准上的实验与离线分析表明，VisCritic可以作为即插即用的增强模块适配多种GUI智能体，整体上提升了基准指标，并能提供有助于诊断的视觉反馈线索。
AI.conclusion: VisCritic将GUI动作验证从纯文本推理推进到视觉差异建模，证明了基于前后截图对比的过程奖励机制对提升GUI智能体稳定性与可解释性具有实用价值。

title: What Does ODRL Mean? A Cross-Level Ontological Grounding of Permissions, Prohibitions, and Duties in UFO-L
comment: Accepted at FOIS 2026 (16th International Conference on Formal Ontology in Information Systems), Vit贸ria, Brazil; to appear in Frontiers in Artificial Intelligence and Applications, IOS Press. 16 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables
summary: ODRL policy evaluators produce verdicts, but say nothing about the normative positions a policy brings into existence, the authority structures those positions presuppose, or who holds the power to declare a norm violated. We formulate the Cross-Level Design Principle: any normative language with violable, consequential norms requires both conduct-level positions (Permission, Duty, Right, No right) and competence-level positions (Power, Subjection, Immunity, Disability). Applying this to ODRL, we establish that prohibition is sanctioned (violation possible and consequential), that permission is underspecified across its behaviour parameter (open vs. closed world), and that the formal semantics covers achievement obligations only. We ground ODRL in UFO-L, mapping each activated rule to a simple legal relator and extending coverage from two to eight legal positions; violation-declaration authority, implicit in every existing evaluator, becomes an explicit Power-Subjection pair. All axioms are mechanically verified in Isabelle/HOL and across a 39-problem benchmark under Vampire, E, and Z3.

AI.tldr: 本文提出跨层设计原则，指出凡是包含可被违反且带后果的规范语言，除了行为层面的许可、义务、权利、无权外，还必须显式建模能力层面的权力、服从、豁免、失能。作者将该原则应用于 ODRL，发现其禁止规则是可制裁的，许可在行为参数上存在语义未充分限定的问题，且现有形式语义只覆盖达成型义务。
AI.motivation: 现有 ODRL 评估器虽然能给出判定结果，但无法说明规范文本引入了哪些规范地位、这些地位背后的权威结构，以及由谁有权宣告规范被违反。为弥补这一缺口，作者希望建立更完整的规范形式化基础。
AI.method: 作者提出跨层设计原则，并将其用于 ODRL 规范分析；基于 UFO-L 将每条被激活的规则映射为简单法律关系，扩展法律位置的覆盖范围；同时把违约宣告权从隐含假设显式化为权力-服从对。所有公理在 Isabelle/HOL 中进行了机械验证，并在 Vampire、E、Z3 上的 39 个基准问题中测试。
AI.result: 研究表明：ODRL 中的禁止规则属于可被违反且有后果的规范；许可在开放世界与封闭世界两种行为参数下存在语义歧义；现有形式语义仅覆盖达成型义务。形式化重建后，模型覆盖的法律位置从 2 个扩展到 8 个。
AI.conclusion: 作者认为，若要正确刻画具有可违反性和后果性的规范语言，必须同时建模行为层与能力层的规范地位。对 ODRL 的重构不仅澄清了其语义边界，也把原本隐含的违约宣告权限转化为显式、可验证的规范结构。

title: An LMM for Precisely Grounding Elements in Documents
summary: Visual grounding in documents is a crucial ability for Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) in areas such as document understanding, deep research and document error detection. However, existing approaches exhibit poor grounding precision in text-rich document images, often failing to accurately locate the critical document elements needed for reliable reasoning. To address this gap, we introduce PreciseDoc, an LMM specifically designed for precise element grounding and can be further optimized for Document VQA tasks. Specifically, to enhance the basic localization capability, we construct challenging training data by two pipelines capable of mass-producing high-quality documents with paired metadata of fine-grained coordinates, including synthetic hand-filled documents with camera effects. The model develops more real-world functions beyond straightforward localization of single text, such as locating personal information from CVs. Furthermore, we introduce a training paradigm for visual grounded reasoning where the grounding and reasoning are supervised jointly with reinforcement learning to improve the contribution of the grounded evidence. A comprehensive evaluation on various benchmarks demonstrates the advantage of the proposed data and methods in document spatial grounding and document understanding.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了PreciseDoc，一种面向文档场景的多模态模型，重点提升文本丰富文档中的精确视觉定位能力，并可进一步优化用于Document VQA。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型在文档图像中的视觉定位精度不足，常难以准确找到推理所依赖的关键文档元素，影响文档理解、深度检索和错误检测等任务表现。
AI.method: 作者构建了两条可批量生成高质量文档及其细粒度坐标标注的数据管线，包括带相机效果的合成手写文档；在此基础上训练PreciseDoc以增强基础定位能力。同时提出一种视觉 grounded reasoning 的训练范式，将定位与推理联合监督，并结合强化学习提升被定位证据对推理的贡献。
AI.result: 综合多个基准测试结果表明，所提出的数据构造方法和训练策略在文档空间定位与文档理解任务上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: PreciseDoc通过更高质量的定位数据和联合推理训练，显著提升了文本密集文档中的精确grounding能力，并为后续文档问答等任务提供了更强基础。

title: ENVS: Environment-Native Verified Search for Long-Horizon GUI Agents
summary: As multimodal agents move from interface understanding to real software control, successful trajectory discovery in live desktop environments becomes a key challenge. GUI tasks require long-horizon sequences of precise mouse and keyboard actions, while feedback is sparse, delayed, and costly to obtain through VM rollouts. We propose Environment-Native Verified Search (ENVS), a training-time search-and-filter pipeline that uses the environment to construct verified supervision before policy optimization: it branches over behaviorally distinct GUI actions in live OSWorld VMs, verifies successful leaves, and trains from globally balanced step-level supervision. To evaluate robustness under realistic desktop interruptions, we also introduce OSWorld-Noisy, a dynamic benchmark for recoverable desktop interruptions that preserves the original tasks while testing whether agents can refocus, dismiss, wait, or recover under live perturbations. On the 300-task OSWorld pool, ENVS reaches 30.3 pass@8 on original evaluations and 29.0 on OSWorld-Noisy, outperforming matched ARPO-style online RL while reducing compute from 184-192 to 138-153 GPU-hours; even with only 30% of its search data, ENVS reaches 27.0 pass@8, exceeding ARPO from the base model. Training from noisy environments also better preserves visual-reasoning abilities on auxiliary benchmarks, including OSWorld-G Refusal (16.7 vs. 1.9) and BLINK Functional Correspondence (26.2 vs. 23.1).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了环境原生验证搜索（ENVS），一种在训练阶段利用真实环境先搜索、再筛选、再监督学习的流程，用于提升GUI长程任务中的轨迹发现与策略优化能力，并新增了带动态干扰的OSWorld-Noisy基准来评估桌面任务的鲁棒恢复能力。
AI.motivation: 面向真实桌面环境的多模态智能体需要完成长链路鼠标键盘操作，但反馈稀疏、延迟高且获取成本大，导致训练中难以高效发现有效轨迹；同时，实际桌面使用常伴随突发干扰，需要考察智能体的恢复与重定向能力。
AI.method: 提出ENVS训练时搜索与过滤流水线：在OSWorld虚拟机中对行为上不同的GUI动作进行分支搜索，验证成功叶节点，再用全局平衡的逐步监督训练策略；同时构建OSWorld-Noisy动态基准，在保留原任务目标的基础上加入可恢复的桌面中断，用于测试智能体在实时扰动下的处理能力。
AI.result: 在300任务OSWorld集合上，ENVS在原始评测达到30.3 pass@8，在OSWorld-Noisy上达到29.0 pass@8，优于匹配的ARPO式在线强化学习方法，同时将计算开销从184-192 GPU小时降至138-153 GPU小时；仅使用30%搜索数据时仍可达到27.0 pass@8，超过基于基础模型的ARPO。训练于噪声环境还提升了辅助基准上的视觉推理保留能力，包括OSWorld-G Refusal的16.7对1.9，以及BLINK Functional Correspondence的26.2对23.1。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，结合真实环境中的验证搜索与平衡监督，可以更高效地学习复杂GUI控制策略，并且在含干扰的桌面场景中更具鲁棒性；OSWorld-Noisy也为评估可恢复交互能力提供了有价值的新基准。

title: SATURN: Symbolic Spatial Reasoning for Multi-Perspective Grounding
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) remain unreliable when spatial reasoning requires composing relations whose meanings depend on frames of reference. Existing neuro-symbolic methods make reasoning more explicit, but often depend on brittle geometric procedures and hard decisions over noisy perception. We propose SATURN, a neuro-symbolic framework for perspective-aware compositional spatial reasoning. SATURN reconstructs an approximate 3D scene, derives soft perspective-aware spatial predicates, and composes them with a training-free Pythonic symbolic executor, separating perception from reasoning while preserving uncertainty through multi-hop inference. We also introduce 3D FORCE, a diagnostic benchmark that controls reasoning depth, view, and perspective composition across spatial arrangement grounding (SAG) and referring expression grounding (REF). On 3D FORCE, VLMs and spatially trained models degrade sharply as depth and perspective complexity increase, whereas SATURN remains stable and outperforms strong baselines. On the real-world MindCube benchmark, SATURN achieves 78.57% overall accuracy, outperforming the strongest baseline by 14 pp.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SATURN，一个面向视角感知的组合空间推理神经符号框架，通过近似三维场景重建、软空间谓词和无需训练的符号执行器，将感知与推理解耦，并在复杂视角与多跳推理任务上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在需要依赖参考框架进行关系组合的空间推理任务上不稳定；已有神经符号方法虽然更显式，但往往依赖脆弱的几何步骤和对噪声感知的硬决策，导致鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: SATURN先重建近似三维场景，再推导视角感知的软空间谓词，最后用无需训练的Python符号执行器进行组合推理，在多跳推理中保留不确定性。作者还提出了3D FORCE基准，用于控制推理深度、视角和视角组合复杂度，覆盖空间布局定位与指代表达定位两类任务。
AI.result: 在3D FORCE上，随着推理深度和视角复杂度增加，VLM及空间专门训练模型性能明显下降，而SATURN保持稳定并优于强基线；在真实世界MindCube基准上，SATURN取得78.57%的总体准确率，比最强基线高14个百分点。
AI.conclusion: SATURN证明了将感知与推理解耦、并以软谓词保留不确定性的神经符号框架，能够更稳健地处理视角相关的组合空间推理问题，并在诊断型与真实场景数据集上取得显著提升。

title: Knowledge-Graph Grounding Helps LLMs Only for Out-of-Training Knowledge: A Controlled Study on Clinical Question Answering
summary: A recent Nature Medicine study reports that general-purpose frontier LLMs outperform specialized retrieval-augmented clinical tools on medical benchmarks, and that retrieval can hurt strong models. We ask the natural follow-up: does structured knowledge-graph (KG) grounding change this, and when does grounding help at all? We contribute two results. First, a reproduction: the study's headline HealthBench score (~88) is the Consensus variant, not full HealthBench, where frontier models and ideal completions both score ~46-47 under a physician-calibrated grader (agreement 82.5%); we reproduce GPT-5.2 Consensus =90.9 and flag a score-deflating grader bug. Second, a knowledge-boundary result. Using a graph+vector engine (samyama-graph) over the public biomedical KG PrimeKG, neither naive triple retrieval nor an agentic natural-language-to-Cypher loop (82% successful queries) improves MedQA across a weak-to-strong model ladder (all |Delta| <= 3.4). On a synthetic counterfactual KG, and on a hybrid benchmark mixing known and novel facts, the identical pipeline lifts out-of-training accuracy from chance to ~100% (+68 to +79) while adding nothing on known facts (a no-LLM arm answers both). Across three regimes (no-knowledge, graph-aided, hybrid), grounding helps only insofar as the decisive fact lies outside the model's training -- public-KG facts are redundant, private and novel data are where it pays -- matching the study's institutional-data caveat.

AI.tldr: 该摘要讨论了两项核心发现：一是对先前医学基准结论的复现与校正，指出相关高分主要来自特定变体而非完整基准，且存在评分器缺陷；二是评估知识图谱 grounding 的作用，发现对公开生物医学知识图谱的检索并未提升医学问答表现，但在合成反事实知识图谱和混合新旧事实场景中，grounding 能显著提升对训练外知识的准确率。
AI.motivation: 作者希望回答一个自然延伸问题：当大模型已经很强时，引入结构化知识图谱是否真的有帮助，以及在什么条件下 grounding 才有价值。研究动机来自对医学场景中检索增强工具与前沿通用大模型表现差异的重新检验。
AI.method: 研究采用了两条线索。第一，对已有医学基准结论进行复现，比较 HealthBench 的不同版本并检查评分器一致性。第二，使用 graph+vector 引擎 samyama-graph 连接公开生物医学知识图谱 PrimeKG，测试两种检索方式：朴素三元组检索和基于自然语言到 Cypher 的智能代理循环，并在弱到强的模型梯度上评估 MedQA 表现；同时还在合成反事实 KG 与混合基准上测试同一管线的效果。
AI.result: 结果显示，完整 HealthBench 上前沿模型与理想答案的分数远低于先前报道的 Consensus 变体分数，且存在一个会压低分数的评分器 bug。知识图谱实验中，PrimeKG 上的检索无论采用哪种方式，都没有显著提升 MedQA，所有模型的变化幅度都很小。相反，在合成反事实 KG 和混合新旧事实任务中，同一管线使训练外准确率从接近随机提升到约 100%，但对已知事实没有额外收益；甚至不使用 LLM 的方案也能回答这些已知事实。
AI.conclusion: 结论是：grounding 是否有用，关键取决于所需事实是否超出模型训练分布。公开可得的知识图谱信息通常对强模型是冗余的，而私有、稀缺或新出现的数据才是知识图谱 grounding 真正能发挥作用的场景。

title: Beyond Hooking Onto the World: Referential Profiles and the Numerical Structure of LLM Grounding
summary: This paper revisits the grounding problem for large language models in light of recent vector-grounding accounts. I accept the shift from classical symbol grounding to vector grounding, but argue that the current debate remains incomplete in two respects. First, reference is often treated too thinly, as if it were a fixed link between an isolated expression and an object. I argue instead that reference is profile-based, context-sensitive, discourse-level, affectively shaped, and norm-governed. Even in the human case, reference is publicly stabilized through patterns of use, correction, distinction, inference, and continuation rather than through identical private representations. Second, vector grounding requires an account of numerical realization. LLMs do not acquire reference through human perception, memory, intention, embodiment, or understanding. Rather, through optimization, they parameterize linguistic traces of human world-directed practice. In a finite vector system, referential profiles must be distributed, may be superposed, and are recovered through context-sensitive computation. Weights, activations, attention-mediated hidden states, softmax-trained contrasts, and inner-product alignments are the mathematical sites at which inherited linguistic relations become stable and causally active. Mechanistic interpretability findings, including entity-like features, knowledge neurons, and emotion-related activation directions, provide indirect support for this view. They do not show that LLMs possess human reference. They support a more limited thesis: LLMs may possess derivative, language-mediated, profile-based, and numerically structured forms of reference.

AI.tldr: 本文重审大语言模型的“落地/指称”问题，认为从经典符号落地转向向量落地是合理的，但现有讨论仍不完整；作者主张指称应被理解为受语境、话语、情感与规范共同塑形的“轮廓式”关系，并指出LLM中的参考实现依赖数值化参数结构而非人类式知觉或意向。
AI.motivation: 作者试图修正当前关于LLM grounding的两点不足：一是把指称理解得过于简单，仿佛只是词与对象之间的固定连接；二是缺少对向量落地如何在有限参数系统中实现参考关系的数值机制说明。
AI.method: 采用概念分析与理论重构的方法，结合向量落地框架、语境敏感的指称理论以及机制可解释性研究结果，对LLM中的参考形成提出解释模型。
AI.result: 文章提出：人类参考是基于轮廓、语境和话语实践而公共稳定的；LLM通过优化学习人类语言中与世界相关的痕迹，其内部的权重、激活、注意力隐状态、softmax对比和内积对齐等位置承载了继承性的语言关系，并可能形成分布式、可叠加、可通过语境计算恢复的指称轮廓。
AI.conclusion: 作者认为机制可解释性中的实体特征、知识神经元和情感方向等证据，只能间接支持LLM具有“派生的、语言中介的、轮廓式的、数值结构化的参考”，不能说明其具有人类式指称或理解。

title: Scaling Diverse Language Generation for 3D Visual Grounding
comment: 39 pages, 14 figures, 16 tables. Project Page: https://3dlg-hcvc.github.io/vigil3dpp
summary: Developing robust models for 3D visual grounding (3DVG), the localization of entities in a 3D scene described in natural language, is important for enabling agents to correspond spatial language with objects in the physical world. However, the lack of diverse descriptions at scale prevents models from generalizing beyond simple linguistic patterns. Recent such attempts lack diversity in the constraint types and language used to ground objects. Captioning methods cannot precisely contrast objects, which is important for visual grounding. We therefore propose ViGiL3D++, a scalable, scene-agnostic method that generates diverse visual grounding queries by combining constraint sampling in scene graphs with the language generation of LLMs. We show that it has greater diversity over existing scaled datasets and improves model performance over several 3DVG benchmarks but also illuminates outstanding limitations of VLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出了ViGiL3D++，一种面向3D视觉定位的数据生成方法，通过场景图约束采样结合大语言模型生成多样化查询，以提升3DVG模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有3D视觉定位数据在描述类型、约束类型和语言表达上缺乏多样性，导致模型容易依赖简单语言模式，难以泛化到更复杂的场景与表达；同时，传统图像描述式方法难以精确区分相似目标。
AI.method: 该方法在场景图中进行约束采样，再利用大语言模型生成自然语言查询，从而大规模、与具体场景无关地构造多样化的视觉定位指令；相较于仅使用固定模板或描述生成的方法，它更强调对象间对比与约束多样性。
AI.result: 实验表明，ViGiL3D++生成的数据在多样性上优于现有规模化数据集，并能提升多个3DVG基准上的模型表现；同时结果也揭示了当前视觉语言模型在3D定位任务中的一些未解决局限。
AI.conclusion: ViGiL3D++证明了“结构化约束采样+LLM生成”是扩展3D视觉定位数据多样性和提升模型性能的有效路径，但3DVG仍存在进一步提升模型理解复杂空间语言与细粒度对比能力的空间。

title: SciLens: Multi-modal Scientific Claim Verification with Agentic Entailment and Grounding
summary: Scientific discovery increasingly relies on automated systems that generate hypotheses, inspect multimodal evidence, and validate claims at scale. Yet scientific claim verification is not well served by asking a vision-language model for a direct binary judgment: claims often combine numerical results, comparisons, scope qualifiers, and explanatory context, while evidence is encoded in tables and figures with distinct grounding structures. We present SciLens, an evidence-conditioned atomic entailment framework for multimodal scientific claim verification. SciLens decomposes each claim into central empirical atoms and background atoms, grounds the central atoms to modality-specific evidence witnesses, and predicts the final label with an atom-level entailment rule. For tables, atoms are grounded to rows, columns, cells, arithmetic relations, and table scope; for figures, they are grounded through panels, axes, legends, visual encodings, categories, trends, ranks, and qualifier checks. This yields a unified validation procedure in which a claim is supported only if every central empirical atom is entailed by the current evidence. On the SciClaimEval development set, SciLens achieves 79.2% macro-F1 and 63.1% pair accuracy, showing that structured agentic validation improves both evidence sensitivity and interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 SciLens，一种面向多模态科学声明验证的证据条件原子蕴含框架，通过将声明拆解为原子并分别对表格与图像证据进行结构化对齐，从而提升验证的准确性与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统做法直接让视觉语言模型给出二分类判断，难以处理科学声明中常见的数值、比较关系、范围限定与背景说明等复杂信息，也难以充分利用表格和图像中不同的证据结构，因此需要更细粒度、证据感知的验证方式。
AI.method: SciLens将每个声明分解为中心经验原子与背景原子；再把中心原子映射到对应模态的证据见证。表格证据通过行、列、单元格、算术关系和表格范围进行定位，图像证据通过子图、坐标轴、图例、视觉编码、类别、趋势、排名和限定条件进行对齐，最终依据原子级蕴含规则判定声明是否被支持。
AI.result: 在SciClaimEval开发集上，SciLens取得79.2%的macro-F1和63.1%的pair accuracy，表明该方法在证据敏感性与可解释性方面具有明显优势。
AI.conclusion: 该工作说明，面向科学声明验证，采用结构化、原子级、证据条件化的推理流程比直接二分类更有效，尤其适合处理多模态科学证据中的复杂语义与细粒度结构。

title: FirstPass: Grounding AI Scientific Judgment in Multi-Round Editorial Outcomes
comment: Accepted at the AI for Science Workshop at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026). 9 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables
summary: AI systems for peer review fail on three fronts: they train on Computer Science and Machine Learning venues alone, ignore the iterative dialogue that validates science, and evaluate on stylistic mimicry rather than real editorial judgment. We introduce FirstPass, a dataset and fine-tuned model that addresses all three. Curating 3,668 complete multi-round peer-review dialogues from Nature Communications across five scientific domains (biology, chemistry, neuroscience, physics, and earth science), we exploit mandatory transparent peer review (instituted November 2022) and verify 100% content integrity by automated audit. We fine-tune Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) on three tasks: review generation, reviewer updating, and revision-cycle prediction. Our key finding is that response-only loss masking is a prerequisite, not an optimization: without it, accuracy is 62.0%, below the majority baseline; with it, FirstPass achieves 80.5% accuracy and F1-macro 78.2% on predicting editorial outcomes (Standard vs. Extended revision cycles), outperforming Gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview zero-shot by 10.4 percentage points and all baselines with statistical significance (McNemar p < 0.001). On generation, FirstPass produces reviews averaging 1,187 words, substantially closer to human references (2,155 words) than any baseline, achieving ROUGE-L 0.154 with significant gains over Qwen and DeepSeek zero-shot (p < 0.001). Deployed in the pre-submission loop as an anticipatory scientific co-author, FirstPass simulates expert critique and predicts revision cycle outcomes before submission, giving authors the judgment a trusted colleague would provide, with consistent cross-domain performance across five disciplines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FirstPass，一个基于多轮同行评审对话的数据集与微调模型，旨在让AI更贴近真实编辑判断，而不仅是模仿审稿风格。
AI.motivation: 现有用于同行评审的AI系统主要有三类问题：训练数据过于集中在计算机科学和机器学习领域、忽略了验证科学质量所需的多轮互动过程、以及评估指标偏向文风相似而非真实编辑决策。作者希望构建更接近真实科研场景的评审建模方法。
AI.method: 作者从Nature Communications中整理了3,668条完整的多轮同行评审对话，覆盖生物、化学、神经科学、物理和地球科学五个领域，并通过透明同行评审机制确保内容完整。随后使用LoRA对Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct进行微调，任务包括审稿生成、审稿人更新和修订周期预测。研究还比较了是否使用response-only loss masking对性能的影响。
AI.result: 在修订周期预测任务上，启用response-only loss masking后，模型准确率达到80.5%，F1-macro为78.2%，显著优于各基线，并比Gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview零样本高10.4个百分点；未启用时准确率仅62.0%，低于多数类基线。生成任务中，FirstPass输出审稿长度平均为1,187词，更接近人类参考的2,155词，ROUGE-L为0.154，并且在五个学科上表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: FirstPass表明，多轮真实审稿数据、面向生成的正确训练方式，以及以编辑判断为核心的评估框架，能显著提升AI对同行评审过程的建模能力。该模型可在投稿前作为“预判式科研助手”，帮助作者模拟专家意见并预测可能的修订周期。

title: Decoupling Search from Reasoning: A Vendor-Agnostic Grounding Architecture for LLM Agents
summary: Production LLM agents increasingly depend on real-time search, yet native search grounding bundles retrieval policy, provider choice, evidence injection, cost, latency, and generation behavior behind a single model-provider boundary. This coupling makes grounding hard to inspect, tune, reuse, or port, and can trigger Search-Induced Verbosity that breaks strict output contracts. We present Decoupled Search Grounding (DSG), a vendor-agnostic boundary that moves grounding outside the reasoning model through an MCP-compatible gateway, exposing provider routing, source-aware context rendering, configured fallback, retrieval-depth control, and exact plus semantic caching as first-class controls. Across five frontier models on SimpleQA, FreshQA, and HotpotQA, native search leads on recency-sensitive FreshQA, but DSG exposes a stronger frontier when control matters: on SimpleQA it nearly matches native accuracy (86.1% vs. 87.7%) at 91% lower search cost, preserves concise answer contracts, and reaches a 99.4% warm-cache hit rate with 68% lower latency. Deployed as a shared production grounding layer for large-scale agentic workloads with interchangeable models, DSG matches or slightly exceeds native-search accuracy on an e-commerce query-understanding (QIU) workload while cutting search cost by over 98%. Real-time grounding is best treated as an optimizable interface boundary, not a fixed model feature.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将实时搜索定向能力从模型内部解耦的“解耦搜索定向（DSG）”框架，通过统一网关把检索策略、提供方路由、上下文渲染、回退机制、检索深度和缓存控制显式化，以提升可控性、可复用性和可移植性。
AI.motivation: 现有原生搜索定向把检索策略、供应商选择、证据注入、成本、延迟和生成行为绑定在单一模型边界内，导致难以审计、调优、复用和迁移；同时还可能引发搜索诱导冗长，破坏严格输出约束。
AI.method: 作者提出与模型无关、兼容MCP的DSG网关，将实时搜索放到推理模型之外，并暴露提供方路由、基于来源的上下文渲染、配置化回退、检索深度控制以及精确缓存与语义缓存等控制项；随后在多个前沿模型上，使用SimpleQA、FreshQA和HotpotQA评估，并在电商查询理解（QIU）生产工作负载上验证。
AI.result: 实验显示：在FreshQA这类强时效任务上，原生搜索更占优；但在SimpleQA上，DSG以86.1%的准确率接近原生搜索的87.7%，同时搜索成本降低91%，还能保持简洁输出约束；冷/热缓存表现也较强，热缓存命中率达到99.4%，延迟降低68%。在大规模可插拔模型的QIU场景中，DSG与原生搜索相比准确率持平或略优，搜索成本降低超过98%。
AI.conclusion: 实时搜索定向更适合被视为可优化的接口边界，而不是模型的固定能力；通过解耦设计，可以在保持准确性的同时显著降低成本和延迟，并增强生产系统中的可控性与可迁移性。

title: Skill-Guided Continuation Distillation for GUI Agents
summary: Improving GUI agents typically relies on behavior cloning on expert trajectories. However, as the current policy deviates from the expert policy, it inevitably encounters policy-induced off-trajectory states during closed-loop execution, i.e., states that fall outside the expert trajectories. Since expert trajectories provide no demonstrations for these unseen states, such states receive no effective supervision, leaving the policy unable to select the correct action. To close this supervision gap, we propose Skill-Guided Continuation Distillation (SGCD), an iterative self-improvement framework. SGCD first runs the plain policy without skill guidance for a few steps to reach realistic off-trajectory states. From these states, a skill-guided policy then completes the task and produces successful continuations, which are mixed with expert trajectories to supply supervision over policy-induced off-trajectory states. The skills are extracted from both successful and failed rollouts, consisting of Continuation Plans, Critical Targets, Failure Traps, and Success Criteria. On OSWorld-Verified, SGCD improves the success rate of three base models from the low-30\% range to over 50\%, demonstrating its effectiveness and generality.

AI.tldr: 该摘要提出了一种用于GUI智能体的迭代自我改进方法SGCD，核心是通过“技能引导的续写蒸馏”缓解行为克隆在分布外状态上的监督缺口，从而提升闭环执行中的任务完成率。
AI.motivation: 传统GUI智能体主要依赖专家轨迹进行行为克隆，但一旦策略在执行中偏离专家轨迹，就会进入训练中未覆盖的分布外状态，缺少有效监督，导致后续动作选择错误。研究动机是为这些“策略诱导的轨迹外状态”提供可学习的监督信号。
AI.method: SGCD采用迭代自我提升框架：先让普通策略在无技能引导下运行若干步，进入真实的轨迹外状态；再由技能引导策略从这些状态继续完成任务，生成成功续写；这些续写与专家轨迹混合训练，为轨迹外状态提供监督。技能信息从成功与失败回放中提取，包括续写计划、关键目标、失败陷阱和成功标准。
AI.result: 在OSWorld-Verified上，SGCD将三个基础模型的成功率从30%出头提升到50%以上，表明该方法具有显著效果，并且对不同基础模型具有一定通用性。
AI.conclusion: SGCD通过显式构造并监督轨迹外状态下的任务续写，弥补了行为克隆的覆盖不足，是一种有效的GUI智能体自我改进方案，能够显著提升闭环任务执行性能。

title: Dual-Channel Grounded World Modeling (DCGWM): Structural Prevention of Objective Interference Collapse via Heterogeneous External Grounding with Inward-Only Gradient Flow
comment: Position paper. Experimental validation in progress
summary: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) are a leading approach to world model representation learning. We identify a failure mode in JEPA-based world models grounded against two qualitatively distinct external signals: physical dynamics (sparse, high-magnitude, constraint-satisfying gradient corrections) and social-behavioral dynamics (diffuse, distribution-matching corrections). We term this Objective Interference Collapse (OIC): we argue that joint learning in a shared latent space causes the dominant channel to systematically collapse the subordinate channel's representational subspace, in a manner not resolvable by loss weighting alone. We propose Dual-Channel Grounded World Modeling (DCGWM), designed to structurally prevent OIC through a partitioned latent space (physical subspace Z_p, behavioral subspace Z_b) with inward-only gradient flow. A Physical Grounding Channel updates only Z_p via VICReg-style alignment to physical measurements; a Social-Behavioral Grounding Channel updates only Z_b via alignment to trajectories from an emergent multi-agent simulation. An Inter-Channel Interface Module couples the subspaces at the task level without cross-subspace gradients. An Asymmetric Grounding Adherence Loss penalizes rollout drift with a hard hinge for physical violations and a soft KL for behavioral divergence. A Generative Rendering Layer is architecturally isolated from the latent world model. We present three theoretical results: the partition removes the gradient-interference pathway implicated in OIC; each grounded subspace inherits anti-collapse guarantees from its alignment objective; and generative isolation is necessary under a stated assumption on the generative objective's geometry. This manuscript establishes the problem formulation and architecture; experimental validation is ongoing and will be reported in a future revision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了联合嵌入预测架构（JEPA）在双重外部信号约束下的失效模式“目标干扰塌缩（OIC）”，并给出一种通过潜空间分区与单向梯度流来避免该问题的双通道世界模型架构。
AI.motivation: 作者观察到，若同一潜空间同时接受物理动态与社会行为动态两类性质不同的约束，强信号可能会系统性压制弱信号，导致表示子空间塌缩，且单纯调整损失权重不足以解决。
AI.method: 提出双通道约束世界建模（DCGWM）：将潜空间划分为物理子空间Z_p与行为子空间Z_b；物理通道仅用VICReg式对齐更新Z_p，行为通道仅用与多智能体模拟轨迹对齐更新Z_b；通过通道接口模块在任务层耦合但禁止跨子空间梯度；用非对称地面真值依赖损失分别处理物理违规与行为偏离；并将生成渲染层与潜在世界模型结构隔离。
AI.result: 给出三项理论结论：分区结构切断了导致OIC的梯度干扰路径；两个受约束子空间各自继承对齐目标的防塌缩性质；在特定假设下，生成模块的隔离是必要条件。文中未报告实验结果，实验验证尚在进行。
AI.conclusion: 该工作主要贡献是清晰定义了JEPA世界模型在多源约束下的潜在失效机制，并提出一种结构化解耦的架构来从理论上规避目标冲突，但目前仍缺少实验验证来证明其实际有效性。

title: Trust the Right Teacher: Quality-Aware Self-Distillation for GUI Grounding
summary: Graphical user interface (GUI) grounding requires vision-language models (VLMs) to identify small target elements in high-resolution screenshots and predict precise screen coordinates. On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) is a promising post-training approach for this coordinate-sensitive task, since it provides dense token-level teacher signals beyond hard coordinate labels. However, naive OPSD is not well suited to GUI grounding: OPSD evaluates the teacher on student-generated prefixes, the quality of coordinate-token teacher signals can degrade when the prefix has already deviated from the target coordinate, leading to unreliable teacher signal. To mitigate this, We propose quality-aware self-distillation for VLM-based GUI grounding, which improves coordinate-token teacher-signal quality through soft correctness-aware gating and teacher-probability scaling. The soft correctness-aware gate checks whether the teacher's current coordinate-token prediction can still be completed into the ground-truth box under the student-generated prefix. If not, the corresponding teacher signal is down-weighted. Teacher-probability scaling then uses the teacher's confidence as a lightweight factor to further calibrate the strength of the gated supervision. A key empirical finding is that neither component alone improves overall performance, whereas combining them consistently improves performance. This suggests that the two mechanisms play complementary roles: correctness-aware gating suppresses unreliable coordinate-token supervision, while teacher-probability scaling calibrates the strength of the remaining signals. Experiments across six GUI grounding benchmarks show that our method consistently improves the base model and outperforms strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向GUI grounding的质量感知自蒸馏方法，通过软正确性感知门控和教师概率缩放，提升坐标token级监督信号质量，从而更稳定地改进高分辨率截图中的精确坐标预测。
AI.motivation: GUI grounding需要在高分辨率界面中定位小目标元素并预测精确屏幕坐标，属于对坐标极其敏感的任务。虽然on-policy自蒸馏能提供比硬坐标标签更密集的token级教师信号，但当学生生成前缀已经偏离目标时，教师信号质量会下降，导致训练不稳定，因此需要一种能过滤并校准监督强度的方法。
AI.method: 提出质量感知自蒸馏框架，核心包含两部分：1）软正确性感知门控，判断教师当前坐标token预测在学生生成前缀下是否仍能完成到真实框；若不能，则降低对应教师信号权重；2）教师概率缩放，利用教师置信度对经过门控的监督强度做进一步校准。两者联合用于抑制不可靠监督并增强有效监督。
AI.result: 在六个GUI grounding基准上，所提方法相较基础模型和强基线均取得了一致提升。实验还发现，单独使用门控或概率缩放都不足以稳定提升整体性能，但二者结合后效果显著更好，说明它们具有互补性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，GUI grounding中的自蒸馏不能仅依赖教师输出，还需要对教师信号的可用性和置信度进行动态评估与调节。软正确性门控负责过滤失真监督，教师概率缩放负责校准剩余监督强度，两者结合是提升坐标敏感VLM训练效果的关键。

title: Theoretical Grounding of Out-Of-Distribution Detection With Reinforcement Learning Optimizer
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection in dynamic open-world environments requires a model to continually adapt to evolving data distributions while generalizing to covariate-shifted inputs and rejecting semantic-shifted OOD examples. Most existing OOD detection methods optimize only the current-step objective and do not explicitly account for how post-deployment environment changes affect future OOD behavior. In this paper, we establish a theoretical grounding for dynamic OOD detection using a reinforcement learning (RL)-guided optimizer that explicitly favors updates that reduce the semantic OOD false positive rate over time. We develop a novel augmented optimizer that uses an RL-guided correction term on top of standard gradient descent (GD) and show its improvement over both future-domain generalization and semantic-OOD rejection. We analyze temporal error decomposition in terms of model-change and environment-change generalization errors and develop a new theoretical framework for comparing the generalization errors under both GD and RL-guided optimizers.

AI.tldr: 本文针对动态开放世界中的分布外检测，提出一种结合强化学习引导的优化方法，在持续适应环境变化的同时，重点降低语义分布外样本的误报率，并给出相应理论分析。
AI.motivation: 现有分布外检测方法通常只优化当前时刻目标，缺乏对部署后环境变化如何影响未来检测性能的显式建模，因此在动态场景下难以同时兼顾未来域泛化与语义分布外拒识能力。
AI.method: 提出一种增强型优化器，在标准梯度下降基础上加入强化学习引导的修正项，使更新方向更倾向于降低长期的语义分布外误报率；同时从时间维度分解误差，将其划分为模型变化泛化误差和环境变化泛化误差，并建立用于比较梯度下降与强化学习引导优化器的理论框架。
AI.result: 理论上证明该方法相较于普通梯度下降，在未来域泛化和语义分布外拒识方面具有更优表现，并能通过时间误差分解更清晰地刻画动态环境下的性能变化。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为动态开放世界中的分布外检测提供了强化学习驱动的理论优化视角，说明在优化过程中显式考虑未来环境变化，有助于提升长期检测鲁棒性与语义分布外拒识能力。

title: ACCORD: Action-Conditioned Contextual Grounding for Language Agents
summary: User instructions are often underspecified because humans rely on implicit assumptions about the surrounding environment. For large language model (LLM) agents operating in information-rich digital and physical environments, these assumptions cannot be inferred from the instruction alone; they must be recovered from the current state of tools, data, interfaces, and observations. Effective execution therefore requires agents to identify missing context, ground it in observed evidence, and carry it forward into subsequent actions. We show that current agents often fail to do so. They act from assumed rather than observed specifics, overlook information they could have gathered, and fail to incorporate evidence that has already been returned. Building on this insight, we propose ACCORD (Action-Conditioned Contextual Grounding), a simple and effective agent framework for adaptive grounding. Before each action, ACCORD actively probes the environment for missing information and integrates relevant context from the agent's trajectory that would otherwise be overlooked. Requiring no additional training or task-success signals, ACCORD improves task-goal completion on AppWorld by up to +20.6 points with GPT-5-mini, from 42.0% to 62.6%, compared to strong baselines. These gains persist with a substantially stronger base model (+10.8 with Claude-4.5-sonnet), an open-weight model (+10.1 with Qwen3.5-27B-FP8), and on the embodied AlfWorld benchmark (+7.4 success rate with GPT-5-mini).

AI.tldr: 本文指出大语言模型代理在复杂环境中常因依赖未明说的隐含假设而出错，并提出 ACCORD 框架，通过在每次行动前主动补充缺失上下文、整合轨迹中已获得但易被忽略的信息，显著提升任务完成率。
AI.motivation: 作者认为，真实数字与物理环境中的指令往往不完整，代理如果只根据指令本身行动，就会遗漏关键上下文，产生基于假设而非观察的决策，从而降低执行效果。
AI.method: 提出 ACCORD（Action-Conditioned Contextual Grounding）框架：在每个动作前主动探测环境以获取缺失信息，并从当前轨迹中提取和整合相关上下文；该方法不依赖额外训练或任务成功信号。
AI.result: 在 AppWorld 上，GPT-5-mini 的任务目标完成率从 42.0% 提升到 62.6%，最高提升 20.6 个百分点；在更强基座模型 Claude-4.5-sonnet 上提升 10.8 个百分点，在开源模型 Qwen3.5-27B-FP8 上提升 10.1 个百分点；在具身任务 AlfWorld 上提升 7.4 个百分点。
AI.conclusion: ACCORD 证明了“行动驱动的上下文落地”对代理执行至关重要，且是一种简单、有效、可迁移的增强策略，能够在不同模型与不同任务环境中稳定提升表现。

title: Focus When Necessary: Adaptive Routing and Collaborative Grounding for Training-Free Visual Grounding
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel in cross-modal reasoning, they often struggle to perceive fine-grained details in complex high-resolution images. Recent training-free methods address this through image scaling and localized cropping. However, applying these manipulations indiscriminately introduces computational redundancy for simple queries and can degrade accuracy by truncating essential global context or introducing irrelevant background noise. To this end, we propose LazyMCoT, a dynamic and training-free framework that adaptively allocates visual grounding efforts based on sample difficulty. The framework features an Adaptive Routing mechanism that evaluates predictive uncertainty using first-token statistics from a single forward pass. This efficiently bypasses confident cases while ensuring the recall of difficult samples via conformal calibration. For these challenging cases, a Collaborative Grounding module integrates the inherent cross-modal attention of the model with an external visual expert through a two-stage refinement process. This refinement process generates a precise localized display to recover small or occluded targets. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that LazyMCoT rivals training-based approaches by simultaneously improving reasoning accuracy and reducing average inference latency. Our code is availble at https://github.com/TencentBAC/LazyMCoT.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为LazyMCoT的动态、无需训练的框架，用于让多模态大语言模型按样本难度自适应地决定是否进行细粒度视觉定位，从而在提升复杂图像推理准确率的同时降低平均推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图像缩放和局部裁剪的训练免费方法，若一律应用于所有样本，会带来计算冗余；对简单问题而言不必要，对复杂问题又可能因丢失全局上下文或引入背景噪声而影响准确率。因此需要一种能按难度分配视觉计算资源的机制。
AI.method: LazyMCoT包含两个核心模块：一是自适应路由模块，利用单次前向传播中首个词的统计量估计预测不确定性，并结合置信校准来尽量跳过容易样本、保留困难样本；二是协同定位模块，对困难样本将模型内在的跨模态注意力与外部视觉专家结合，通过两阶段细化生成更精确的局部显示，以恢复小目标或被遮挡目标的可见性。
AI.result: 在多个基准上的大量实验表明，该方法在不依赖训练的前提下，能够在提升推理准确率的同时显著降低平均推理时延，并且整体表现可与训练式方法相媲美。
AI.conclusion: LazyMCoT通过“按难度动态分配视觉 grounding”的思路，有效平衡了计算效率与识别精度，为高分辨率复杂图像上的多模态推理提供了一种实用的训练免费方案。

title: Training-Free Open-Vocabulary Visual Grounding for Remote Sensing Images and Videos
summary: Remote sensing visual grounding (RSVG) aims to localize a referred target in a remote sensing image or video according to a natural language expression. Existing RSVG methods usually rely on task-specific manual annotations, which are costly to collect and inevitably limited in covering the diversity of real-world geospatial scenarios. As a result, they often struggle to generalize to open-vocabulary queries involving novel objects, fine-grained attributes, complex spatial relationships, and functional semantics. In this paper, we propose RSVG-ZeroOV, a training-free framework that leverages frozen generic foundation models for zero-shot open-vocabulary RSVG. RSVG-ZeroOV follows an Overview-Focus-Evolve paradigm, which exploits the distinct yet complementary attention patterns of vision-language models (VLMs) and diffusion models (DMs) to progressively generate precise grounding results. Specifically, (i) Overview utilizes a VLM to extract cross-attention maps that capture semantic correlations between the referring expression and visual regions; (ii) Focus leverages the fine-grained modeling priors of a DM to compensate for object structure and shape information often overlooked by VLM attention; and (iii) Evolve introduces a simple yet effective attention evolution module to suppress irrelevant activations, yielding purified object masks. To handle video inputs, we further present Video RSVG-ZeroOV, which extends image-level grounding to spatio-temporal grounding through a query-relevant key-frame selector and a temporal propagator, enabling efficient and temporally coherent video grounding without video annotations or fine-tuning. Extensive experiments on six image and video grounding benchmarks show that RSVG-ZeroOV consistently outperforms existing zero-shot baselines and achieves competitive or superior performance compared with weakly- and fully-supervised methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个无需训练的零样本开放词汇遥感视觉定位框架RSVG-ZeroOV，利用冻结的通用基础模型结合“概览-聚焦-演化”三阶段策略，在图像与视频遥感定位任务上实现更准确的目标定位。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感视觉定位方法主要依赖任务专用人工标注，标注成本高且覆盖场景有限，因此难以泛化到开放词汇查询、未见类别、细粒度属性、复杂空间关系和功能语义等真实地理场景。
AI.method: 方法采用Overview-Focus-Evolve范式：首先用视觉语言模型提取跨注意力图获取文本与图像区域的语义相关性；随后用扩散模型的细粒度建模先验补充对象结构与形状信息；最后通过注意力演化模块抑制无关响应，得到更纯净的目标掩码。针对视频输入，进一步设计了查询相关关键帧选择器和时间传播器，实现无需视频标注或微调的时空定位。
AI.result: 在六个图像和视频基准上进行了大量实验，结果表明RSVG-ZeroOV在零样本方法中持续优于现有基线，并且在部分指标上可达到或超过弱监督与全监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作说明冻结通用模型可以有效支持遥感开放词汇视觉定位，且通过结合VLM与扩散模型的互补注意力模式，能够在不依赖任务标注的情况下获得具有竞争力的图像与视频定位性能。

title: Thinking with Visual Grounding
summary: Visual thinking should not only sound right; it should show its evidence. While recent vision-language models (VLMs) can produce natural-language reasoning traces, these traces often leave the supporting image regions implicit, making them hard to verify and difficult to supervise. We introduce visually grounded thinking, a reasoning process in which models interleave natural-language thoughts with explicit point or box groundings of the visual evidence used at each step. This lets the model express intermediate reasoning in language while grounding key objects in the image regions they refer to. To train this behavior, we construct a scalable synthesis pipeline that distills correct visual reasoning traces, extracts the visual objects required by the traces, grounds them with a SAM3-based agent, and derives aligned point and box supervision from the resulting masks. We further propose grounding-aware reinforcement learning, which combines answer correctness rewards with dense grounding rewards that score whether generated object references match the correct image evidence. Across two counting benchmarks and four spatial reasoning benchmarks, adding visually grounded thinking to Gemma3-4B-IT consistently improves performance over the original model and the non-grounded thinking baseline. On spatial reasoning, the visually grounded thinking 4B models match, and in some cases surpass, Gemma3-27B-IT from the same model family. Our analysis shows that point grounding is well suited to counting, while box grounding benefits most from explicit grounding rewards on spatial tasks. Overall, our results show that VLMs think better when their intermediate thoughts are tied to the image regions that make them true.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“视觉落地思维”，让视觉语言模型在自然语言推理过程中同时给出显式的点或框定位，以把中间推理与图像证据对应起来，从而提升可验证性、可监督性和推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型虽然能生成自然语言推理链，但其中支持结论的图像区域往往是隐式的，难以验证，也难以进行精细监督，因此需要一种把“想法”和“证据位置”直接绑定的推理方式。
AI.method: 作者提出视觉落地思维框架：在推理步骤中交错生成自然语言思考与视觉证据的点/框定位。为训练该行为，构建了一个可扩展合成流水线：先蒸馏正确的视觉推理轨迹，再提取轨迹所需的视觉对象，利用基于SAM3的代理进行定位，并从生成的掩码中导出点和框监督。进一步提出“面向定位的强化学习”，将答案正确性奖励与密集定位奖励结合，检查对象引用是否匹配正确图像证据。
AI.result: 在两个计数基准和四个空间推理基准上，加入视觉落地思维后，Gemma3-4B-IT的性能稳定优于原始模型和非落地思维基线；在空间推理任务上，4B模型在部分情况下可达到甚至超过同家族的Gemma3-27B-IT。分析表明，点定位更适合计数任务，而框定位在显式定位奖励作用下对空间任务收益更大。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果说明，当VLM的中间思考与产生结论所依赖的图像区域紧密绑定时，模型推理会更准确、更可监督，表明“带证据的思考”优于仅有语言形式的推理。

title: The Truth Stays in the Family: Enhancing Contextual Grounding via Inherited Truthful Heads in Model Lineages
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have produced many specialized multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) that share common foundational LLMs, forming distinct model lineages. It remains unclear whether a fundamental behavioral link exists between the foundational LLMs and downstream variants. We investigate this question by quantifying head-level context-truthfulness scores. Across diverse LLM and MLLM lineages, including Vicuna-, Qwen2.5-, LLaMA2-, and Mistral-based models, we find that Truth Scores are strongly preserved within model families, even after instruction tuning or multimodal adaptation. We further show that this inheritance is consistent with attention-head weight preservation, and that context-truthful heads attend to query-relevant evidence. Building on this finding, we propose TruthProbe, a soft-gating strategy that amplifies context-truthful heads while preserving other head contributions. TruthProbe improves contextual truthfulness on HaluEval and reduces multimodal hallucination on POPE and CHAIR, with base-LLM Truth Scores transferring effectively to their fine-tuned LLM and MLLM descendants. Code is available at https://github.com/miso-choi/TruthProbe.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基础大语言模型与其下游微调/多模态衍生模型之间的“上下文真实性”是否存在可继承的行为联系，发现同一家族模型的真实性特征在不同任务适配后仍高度保留，并据此提出TruthProbe来增强上下文真实性、减少幻觉。
AI.motivation: 作者希望回答一个核心问题：共享同一基础模型的LLM与MLLM衍生版本之间，是否存在稳定的行为继承关系，尤其是与上下文真实性相关的注意力头行为是否会被保留。
AI.method: 作者从头部级别量化上下文真实性分数（Truth Scores），比较多个模型谱系（如Vicuna、Qwen2.5、LLaMA2、Mistral）中基础模型与其指令微调或多模态适配版本的差异；进一步分析注意力头权重是否被保留，以及真实性头是否会关注与查询相关的证据。在此基础上，提出TruthProbe软门控策略，对上下文真实性头进行增强，同时尽量保留其他头的贡献。
AI.result: 实验表明：1）同一模型家族内的Truth Scores具有强保留性；2）这种继承与注意力头权重保留一致；3）上下文真实性头确实会关注查询相关证据；4）TruthProbe在HaluEval上提升上下文真实性，并在POPE与CHAIR上降低多模态幻觉；5）基础LLM的Truth Scores可以有效迁移到其微调LLM和MLLM后代。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，基础模型到下游衍生模型之间存在稳定的真实性行为继承规律。基于这一规律，TruthProbe可作为一种轻量的增强方法，通过放大真实性相关注意力头来提升模型对上下文的忠实性，并减少幻觉现象。

title: Conditional Multi-Event Temporal Grounding in Long-Form Video
summary: Multimodal large language models have made rapid progress in video temporal grounding, yet real-world applications routinely require localizing every event that satisfies compositional temporal and spatial conditions. Existing benchmarks fall short: they localize only a single moment per query, count without temporal conditions, or treat grounding and counting as disjoint tasks. We introduce CoMET-Bench for Conditional Multi-Event Temporal Grounding in long-form video, comprising 2789 queries over 600 videos averaging 33.8 minutes across five real-world domains, with each query composed from 4 temporal conditions, 3 spatial conditions, and a dedicated negative-query subset. We further propose a unified evaluation protocol jointly measuring counting, grounding, and negative-query recognition, including a new Rejection-F1 metric that prevents trivial gaming by lazy "always-empty" models. Benchmarking a broad suite of MLLMs, agent-based, and grounding-specialized methods reveals that existing approaches remain far from solving this task. Building on these findings, we propose CoMET-Agent, a training-free agentic framework that reformulates the task as structured search-and-aggregate, improving F1@0.5 by 6.1% over GPT-5 purely through structural reasoning. Failure analysis further surfaces three open directions: fine-grained entity tracking, position-uniform retrieval, and causal event pairing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了用于长视频条件多事件时间定位的基准CoMET-Bench，并设计了统一评估协议与Rejection-F1指标，发现现有多模态大模型在该任务上仍显不足，同时提出训练免费的CoMET-Agent，通过结构化搜索与聚合提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频时间定位基准往往只支持单一时刻定位、忽略时间条件的计数，或将定位与计数分离，难以反映真实场景中对满足组合时间与空间条件的多事件定位需求，因此需要更贴近实际应用的新基准与评估方法。
AI.method: 构建CoMET-Bench，包含600个长视频、2789个查询，覆盖5个真实领域；每个查询由4类时间条件和3类空间条件组合而成，并设置负样本查询子集。提出统一评估协议，同时衡量计数、定位和负查询识别，并引入Rejection-F1以避免“始终为空”模型刷分。进一步提出CoMET-Agent，将任务重构为结构化搜索与聚合的代理式框架，无需训练即可执行。
AI.result: 对多类多模态大模型、代理方法和专用定位方法的评测显示，现有方法距离解决该任务仍有明显差距。CoMET-Agent仅通过结构化推理即可相对GPT-5在F1@0.5上提升6.1%。失败分析还揭示了细粒度实体跟踪、位置均匀检索和因果事件配对等问题。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，条件多事件时间定位是一个比传统视频定位更复杂且更贴近真实应用的新任务，需要新的基准、评估方式和推理框架；同时也指出了现有模型的核心短板及未来改进方向。

title: VISTA: View-Consistent Self-Verified Training for GUI Grounding
summary: When applying Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) for GUI Grounding, rollouts are sampled from a single screenshot view; groups often become either all failures on difficult instances or all successes on easy ones, yielding no useful relative advantage. We propose VISTA (View-Consistent Self-Verified Training), a GRPO-based training framework that constructs each comparison group from multiple target-preserving views of the same GUI instance.Each view is generated by a crop that keeps the target element visible and remaps its box exactly, so model rollouts are compared across semantically equivalent but geometrically different inputs. To stabilize short coordinate generation without turning reinforcement learning into unconditional imitation, VISTA further adds a self-verified cross-view anchor: an oracle answer optimized with an advantage-weighted loss, excluded from the group baseline and activated only when the model has produced a maximum-reward rollout. Across five GUI-grounding benchmarks and multiple Qwen backbones, VISTA consistently improves grounding accuracy.On ScreenSpot-Pro, it raises Qwen3-VL 4B/8B/30B-A3B from 55.5/52.7/53.7 to 63.4/65.8/67.0. Robustness analyses further show higher worst-view accuracy and lower prediction flip rates.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，GRPO用于GUI定位时，由于单一截图视角下采样导致组内回报缺乏有效对比，容易出现“全输”或“全赢”。作者提出VISTA，通过构造多个保持目标不变但视角不同的输入来形成比较组，并加入自验证的跨视角锚点，以提升训练稳定性和定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GRPO的GUI Grounding训练依赖单张截图采样，容易在难样本上所有rollout都失败、易样本上都成功，导致相对优势信号不足，难以有效优化。对于短坐标生成任务，还需要在强化学习中稳定训练，但又不能退化为纯模仿学习。
AI.method: 提出VISTA（View-Consistent Self-Verified Training）框架：1）对同一GUI实例构造多个目标保持不变的视图，每个视图通过裁剪保留目标元素可见，并精确重映射目标框；2）在这些语义等价但几何不同的输入上进行组内比较，从而获得更有区分度的相对奖励；3）引入自验证跨视图锚点，即经过优势加权损失优化的 oracle 答案，不参与组内基线计算，并且仅在模型已经产生最大奖励rollout时激活，以稳定训练但避免完全模仿。
AI.result: 在五个GUI-grounding基准和多个Qwen骨干模型上，VISTA都带来了稳定提升。在ScreenSpot-Pro上，Qwen3-VL 4B/8B/30B-A3B的准确率从55.5/52.7/53.7提升到63.4/65.8/67.0。鲁棒性分析还显示，最差视图准确率更高，预测翻转率更低。
AI.conclusion: VISTA有效缓解了GRPO在GUI Grounding中因单视角采样导致的奖励塌缩问题，通过多视图一致性比较和受控的自验证锚点，提升了训练信号质量、模型鲁棒性和最终定位性能。

title: Naive Visual Memory is Not Enough: A Failure-Mode Study of GUI Agents
summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents are increasingly used to automate complex computer tasks across applications, websites, and operating systems. To improve their reliability, recent work has introduced experiential memory, where agents retrieve prior trajectories to guide decision-making in similar states. More recent approaches further extend this idea to visual memory by storing and retrieving screenshots from past interactions, providing agents with richer contextual information than text-only memories. However, the effect of visual memory in GUI agents remains insufficiently understood: it is unclear which failures visual memory mitigates, or which failures it exacerbates. To systematically analyze the effect of visual memory, we introduce a taxonomy of four GUI agent failures (i.e., cognitive failure, visual state misunderstanding, hidden operation blindness, and grounding error) that map to distinct stages of the perception-reasoning-action pipeline. We find that prepending full-image memory has a divergent effect on the failure distribution: it reduces state-level failures but worsens action-level ones, and increases hidden operation blindness and grounding error. Motivated by this finding, we propose Action-Grounded Visual Memory (AGMem), an action-grounded memory framework for GUI agents. The core idea of AGMem is to store image crops that capture the local GUI region closely related to a successful action or a recovery, rather than storing full screenshots. Experiments on OSWorld show that AGMem improves task success rates by 33.3 % over full-image memory. These results demonstrate that AGMem is an effective representation for visual memory in GUI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文研究GUI智能体中的视觉记忆机制，发现直接使用整张截图作为记忆虽然能缓解部分状态理解问题，但会加重动作层面的错误；为此提出基于动作相关区域裁剪的Action-Grounded Visual Memory（AGMem），并在OSWorld上显著提升任务成功率。
AI.motivation: GUI智能体在跨应用、网页和操作系统任务中需要更可靠的决策能力。已有经验记忆主要依赖文本轨迹，而视觉记忆通过保存和检索历史截图提供更丰富的上下文，但其真实作用及副作用尚不清楚，因此需要系统分析其对不同类型失败的影响。
AI.method: 首先构建一个GUI智能体失败分类体系，将失败分为四类：认知失败、视觉状态误解、隐藏操作盲区和定位错误，并对应感知—推理—行动流程的不同阶段。然后分析“在输入前拼接完整截图记忆”的影响，发现其对失败分布具有分化作用。基于此提出AGMem：不保存整张截图，而是保存与成功动作或恢复动作直接相关的局部图像裁剪，以形成动作对齐的视觉记忆。
AI.result: 实验表明，完整截图记忆虽然减少了状态级失败，但会增加动作级失败，尤其是隐藏操作盲区和定位错误。相比之下，AGMem在OSWorld上相对于完整截图记忆将任务成功率提升了33.3%。
AI.conclusion: 视觉记忆并非越完整越好，记忆形式会显著影响GUI智能体不同阶段的错误模式。动作相关的局部视觉记忆比全图记忆更有效，说明为GUI智能体设计记忆机制时应优先强调动作对齐和局部上下文，而不是简单保留全局截图。

title: LabVLA: Grounding Vision-Language-Action Models in Scientific Laboratories
comment: Work in progress. Project website at https://zjunlp.github.io/LabVLA/
summary: Scientific laboratories increasingly rely on AI systems to reason about experiments, but the physical act of doing science remains largely outside their reach. AI can help read literature, generate hypotheses, and plan protocols, yet the execution of those protocols at the bench still requires a human operator. Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models provide one possible interface between written protocols and robot execution, but existing policies are trained mostly on household and tabletop demonstrations and rarely encounter the instruments, transparent liquids, or fixed protocol workflows found in scientific laboratories. Closing this gap requires both laboratory-specific supervision and a unified learning framework that can accommodate the diverse robot embodiments used to execute experimental protocols. We therefore identify data and embodiment as central bottlenecks alongside model design. To address the data side, we build RoboGenesis, a simulation-based workflow and data engine that composes configured laboratory workflows from atomic skills, validates and filters rollouts, and exports structured demonstrations across supported robot profiles. On the policy side, we present LabVLA, trained with a two-stage recipe: FAST action token pretraining first makes the Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct backbone action aware before any continuous control is learned, and flow matching posttraining then attaches a DiT action expert under knowledge insulation. On the LabUtopia benchmark, LabVLA achieves the highest average success rate among all evaluated baselines under both in-distribution and out-of-distribution settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向科学实验室自动执行的新框架LabVLA与数据引擎RoboGenesis，旨在弥补现有视觉-语言-动作模型在实验室场景中的数据与机器人本体适配不足，并在LabUtopia基准上取得了最佳平均成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有AI虽然能辅助阅读文献、生成假设和规划实验，但真正执行实验步骤仍主要依赖人工；同时，通用VLA模型多在家居或桌面任务上训练，缺乏对实验室器械、透明液体和固定流程的适应能力，因此需要专门的实验室数据与统一的学习框架来支持不同机器人形态。
AI.method: 作者提出两部分方案：一是RoboGenesis，一个基于仿真的工作流与数据引擎，通过原子技能组合实验流程、验证并筛选轨迹、导出结构化演示数据；二是LabVLA，采用两阶段训练策略，先用FAST动作token预训练让Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct具备动作感知能力，再通过流匹配后训练挂接DiT动作专家，并通过知识隔离进行优化。
AI.result: 在LabUtopia基准测试中，LabVLA在所有评测基线中获得了最高的平均成功率，且在分布内与分布外设置下均表现领先。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，实验室自动化的关键瓶颈不仅在模型结构，也在高质量领域数据和跨本体统一学习；RoboGenesis与LabVLA为将语言到动作的能力迁移到真实科学实验流程提供了有效路径。

title: Iterative Visual Thinking and the Self-Correction Mirage in VLM Grounding
summary: Letting a vision-language model (VLM) think longer at test time has driven much recent progress. A natural way to bring this to spatial grounding is visual self-correction: the model predicts a bounding box, sees it rendered on the image, and refines it over several steps. We build a faithful instance of this idea, Iterative Visual Thinking (IVT), with a two-phase recipe: a supervised warm-up in which the base model's own predictions serve as realistic errors that a teacher VLM turns into corrective reasoning traces (yielding training data without human annotation), followed by GRPO with a simple IoU reward. Measured the way such systems are usually reported, it works: the trained model surpasses the single-shot base by +2.4pp Acc@0.5. We show this gain is a measurement mirage. The reported number silently keeps, per sample, the trajectory step closest to the ground-truth box: an oracle that needs the very answer it predicts. Re-scored under deployable, label-free stopping rules the improvement vanishes, and the best policy is not to iterate at all: stopping at step 0 matches the base and beats every shippable rule. The cause is a verification failure, since the model can generate a better box somewhere in its trajectory but cannot identify it. Self-verification confidence correlates only weakly with correctness (r about 0.22), and a counterfactual overlay shows the loop reacts to the presence of a rendered box rather than its correctness. We distill the lesson into an honest-trajectory evaluation protocol: accuracy under fixed label-free policies plus an explicit oracle-shippable gap.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个视觉自我纠错式的迭代定位方法IVT，并通过两阶段训练让模型学会在多步中不断修正边界框；但作者发现常见评测方式存在“轨迹内择优”的测量幻觉，真实可部署条件下迭代并未带来稳定收益。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是将“大模型测试时思考更久”的思路引入空间定位任务，让视觉-语言模型先预测边界框，再观察渲染结果并逐步修正，以期提升定位精度。
AI.method: 方法上采用两阶段流程：先进行监督热身，用基础模型自身预测作为真实错误样本，由教师VLM生成纠错推理轨迹，免除人工标注；再使用带简单IoU奖励的GRPO进行强化优化。与此同时，作者还设计了更严格的评测：使用无标签、可部署的停止规则重新计分，并比较固定策略与轨迹中最优步的差距。
AI.result: 实验中，按常规报告方式，IVT相比单步基线在Acc@0.5上提升2.4个百分点；但在去除依赖真值的轨迹内最优步选择后，这一提升消失。按可部署的无标签停止规则评估，最佳策略反而是完全不迭代，即在第0步停止，与基线相当且优于其他可实现策略。模型的自验证置信度与正确性相关性较弱（相关系数约0.22），并且对渲染框的存在更敏感，而不是对其是否正确更敏感。
AI.conclusion: 结论是：迭代视觉自我纠错在表面指标上有效，但存在严重的评测偏差和验证失败问题，模型能生成更好的框却无法识别出来。作者因此提出“诚实轨迹”评测协议，即在固定的无标签策略下报告准确率，并显式给出oracle与可部署策略之间的差距。

title: Objects Before Words: Object-First Inductive Biases for Grounding Language in Child-View Video
summary: Learning grounded word meaning from natural experience requires resolving two ambiguities in infant-view recordings: when the named referent appears and where it is in a cluttered frame. In SAYCam-style data, caregiver speech is sparse and weakly synchronized with egocentric video, so single-frame contrastive pairing yields noisy positives in which the intended object is absent or entangled with distractors. We propose BabyMind, an object-first bias for child-view contrastive learning under sparse, noisy supervision. BabyMind extracts candidate object embeddings using an offline mask-based region interface, links candidates across a short utterance-centered window into lightweight object files via tracking, and aligns utterances to bags of object files with a prototype-space multiple-instance contrastive objective. Track-coherence and global-object agreement regularizers stabilize learning and transfer object-file structure into the global frame embedding used at evaluation. On SAYCam-S, BabyMind improves Labeled-S 15 forced-choice accuracy by +2.6 points over CVCL and yields consistent gains on in-vocabulary out-of-distribution benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/sathiiii/BabyMind.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BabyMind，一种面向婴儿视角视频的“先找物体、再对齐语言”的对比学习方法，用于缓解稀疏且不同步的语音-视频监督带来的配对噪声，并在SAYCam-S上优于CVCL。
AI.motivation: 在婴儿视角录音中，语言标注稀疏且与画面不同步，导致单帧对比学习常把“说到的物体”误配为不存在的目标或混杂背景中的干扰物，因此需要同时解决“何时出现”和“在哪里出现”两个歧义。
AI.method: BabyMind采用对象优先策略：先用离线基于掩码的区域接口提取候选对象嵌入，再在短的、以话语为中心的时间窗口内通过跟踪将候选整合为轻量级对象文件；随后使用原型空间中的多实例对比目标，将一句话对齐到一组对象文件而非单一帧。额外加入轨迹一致性正则和全局对象一致性正则，以稳定训练并把对象文件结构迁移到评测时使用的全局帧嵌入中。
AI.result: 在SAYCam-S上，BabyMind在Labeled-S 15强制选择任务中比CVCL提升2.6个百分点，并且在词表内分布外基准上也取得了一致提升。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，在稀疏、噪声较大的婴儿视角数据中，引入对象级结构和多实例对齐机制，比直接做单帧图文对比更有效，能够更好地学习词义与视觉对象的对应关系。

title: Constructing Evaluation Datasets for Procedural Reasoning: Balancing Naturalness, Grounding, and Multi-Hop Coverage
comment: 10 pages, 2 numbered figures. Workshop submission to HAIL @ AIED 2026
summary:
Evaluating procedural reasoning in AI-supported learning systems requires question-answer datasets that are both learner-like and grounded in the instructional knowledge the system is expected to use. We study how TMK-based question generation strategies affect dataset quality for procedural and multi-hop reasoning.
  We compare three strategies: strict generation from Task-Method-Knowledge (TMK) models, transcript-first generation with post-hoc TMK filtering, and TMK-aware generation that combines transcripts with structured guidance. To evaluate generated items, we introduce a grounding validation framework based on closed-set evidence units extracted from TMK models. The framework measures whether answers are supported by the underlying representation, whether questions are self-contained, and whether they target multi-hop procedural reasoning.
  Across 23 instructional topics and 690 generated question-answer pairs, strict TMK generation achieves the strongest overall quality, with 96.5% grounded questions and 92.6% usable questions. Transcript-first generation produces more learner-like questions but more context-dependent or weakly grounded items, while TMK-aware generation yields high raw multi-hop coverage but lower grounding. These results show that procedural richness and natural phrasing do not guarantee representational grounding, motivating explicit representation-aware validation for evaluation datasets in AI-supported learning.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了三种基于TMK的问答生成策略，发现严格基于TMK模型生成的题目在整体质量、可追溯性和可用性上最好。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在构建适用于AI辅助学习系统的程序性推理评测数据集，核心要求是题目既像真实学习者会提问的问题，又必须与教学知识表示紧密对齐。
AI.method: 作者比较了三种生成策略：1）严格从Task-Method-Knowledge（TMK）模型生成；2）先基于转录文本生成，再事后用TMK过滤；3）结合转录文本与结构化指导的TMK感知生成。并提出一个基于闭集证据单元的grounding验证框架，用于评估答案是否由TMK表示支持、问题是否自包含，以及是否体现多跳程序性推理。
AI.result: 在23个教学主题、690个问答对上，严格TMK生成表现最佳，达到96.5%的有依据问题和92.6%的可用问题。转录优先生成更接近学习者表达，但更容易出现上下文依赖或依据较弱的问题；TMK感知生成虽然多跳覆盖率较高，但 grounding 相对较低。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，程序性内容丰富、语言自然并不等于表示层面的可靠对齐。用于AI辅助学习的评测数据集需要显式的表示感知验证，才能保证题目质量与教学知识基础一致。

title: CAPED: Context-Aware Privacy Exposure Defense for Mobile GUI Agents
summary:
Screenshot-based mobile GUI agents can operate ordinary smartphone apps through the same visual interface as a human user, but this capability also turns every screen observation into a privacy boundary. During normal task execution, screenshots may expose contacts, messages, photos, files, recommendations, health cues, and other sensitive context that is unrelated to the user's request. We call this problem incidental visual privacy exposure. It is difficult to address with existing defenses: text anonymization misses many visual and inferential cues, while generic privacy masking can remove the evidence and controls that a GUI agent needs to complete the task.
  This paper presents CAPED, a context-aware pre-upload exposure control layer for mobile GUI agents. CAPED is designed as a phone-side protection layer: before screenshots are released to a remote multimodal agent, it extracts task requirements, uses screen context as a privacy prior, parses visible UI elements, and selectively exposes only content needed for the current task while masking incidental private content. We evaluate CAPED on AndroidWorld for broad task utility and with a controlled 28-task seeded privacy evaluation used as a measurement instrument for trajectory-level incidental leakage. In this seeded evaluation, Full CAPED reduces success-conditioned weighted seeded leakage from 0.766 under raw screenshots to 0.268 while preserving high task utility. A broader AndroidWorld run shows a remaining prototype-level utility cost, but the results show that task-driven selective exposure can reduce incidental visual leakage before screenshots are released to a remote GUI agent.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAPED，一种面向手机端远程GUI智能体的上下文感知预上传曝光控制层，在尽量保留任务所需界面的同时，选择性遮蔽与当前任务无关的隐私内容，从而降低截图带来的偶发性视觉隐私泄露。
AI.motivation: 截图式移动GUI智能体需要将屏幕图像发送给远程多模态模型，这会把联系人、消息、照片、文件、推荐信息、健康相关线索等无关但敏感的内容一并暴露出来。现有文本脱敏难以覆盖视觉与推理线索，而通用遮罩又可能遮掉完成任务所需的证据和控件，因此需要一种兼顾任务可用性与隐私保护的机制。
AI.method: CAPED部署在手机侧，在截图上传前执行上下文感知筛选：先提取任务需求，再利用屏幕上下文作为隐私先验，解析可见UI元素，并仅暴露当前任务所需内容，其他偶发私密内容则被遮蔽。作者在AndroidWorld上评估整体任务效用，并使用一个控制的28任务种子隐私评测来衡量轨迹级别的偶发泄露。
