AI.result: 在种子隐私评测中，Full CAPED将成功条件加权的种子泄露率从原始截图的0.766降低到0.268，同时保持较高任务效用。在更广泛的AndroidWorld测试中，仍存在一定原型级效用损失，但总体表明选择性曝光可以在截图发送给远程智能体之前有效降低偶发视觉泄露。
AI.conclusion: CAPED证明了任务驱动的选择性曝光是一条可行路径：它不是简单删除隐私，而是在任务完成所需信息与隐私保护之间进行细粒度权衡。该方法能显著减少移动GUI智能体中的截图隐私暴露，但在实用化层面仍需进一步优化以降低效用开销。

title: Natural-Language Temporal Grounding in Hour-Long Videos is a Search Problem: A Benchmark and Empirical Decomposition
summary: Temporal grounding--returning the interval $[t_s, t_e]$ for a natural-language query over a video--is the language interface to long-form video, yet has been studied on short videos; the dynamics of hour-scale natural-language grounding remain underexplored. We take the position that at hour-scale, the binding constraint is search, not recognition: Video-LLMs are bottlenecked not by localizing a nearby event, but--given a natural-language query--by searching for the relevant region of a long video. To test this, we release ExtremeWhenBench, the first open hour-scale grounding benchmark (2,273 queries over 194 videos, mean 75.7 min, max 9 hr) with an open-form query distribution. Every open Video-LLM collapses while a frame-level retrieval baseline outperforms them; a failure taxonomy attributes 85% of failures to search; and a retrieve-then-ground hybrid recovers 6.7x over the monolithic Video-LLM--mirroring retrieve-then-read in open-domain QA.

AI.tldr: 该摘要提出：在小时级长视频的自然语言时序定位任务中，主要瓶颈不是局部识别，而是搜索相关片段。作者发布了一个开放式长视频基准ExtremeWhenBench，实验表明现有开源视频大模型表现崩溃，帧级检索基线反而更强，且“先检索再定位”的混合方法显著优于单一模型。
AI.motivation: 现有时序定位研究多集中于短视频，但真实长视频场景中，模型需要先在超长时间跨度内找到可能相关区域，再做精细定位。作者希望验证小时级场景下的核心难点到底是识别还是搜索，并通过新基准系统评估现有方法。
AI.method: 作者构建了ExtremeWhenBench作为首个开放的小时级时序定位基准，包含2,273个查询、194段视频，平均时长75.7分钟，最长9小时，且查询分布为开放式。随后对开源Video-LLM、帧级检索基线以及“检索后定位”的混合方案进行对比，并对失败案例做分类分析。
AI.result: 实验显示：所有开源Video-LLM在该基准上都明显失效；帧级检索基线优于这些Video-LLM；失败分析表明85%的错误源于搜索阶段；采用“先检索再定位”的混合方法，相比单体Video-LLM性能提升6.7倍。
AI.conclusion: 小时级长视频时序定位的关键瓶颈是搜索而非识别。对于超长视频理解，应优先采用检索增强式框架，而不是依赖端到端的单一视频大模型。

title: Plan-and-Verify Video Reward Reasoning with Spatio-Temporal Scene Graph Grounding
summary: Reward models for text-to-video (T2V) generation guide post-training but often fail at fine-grained semantic alignment. We trace this to two structural weaknesses in existing reasoning-based reward models: they do not systematically verify every condition described in the prompt, and the visual evidence supporting each judgment remains implicit in their free-form reasoning. We propose SG-PVR, a video reward model that addresses these limitations through plan-and-verify reasoning grounded in spatio-temporal scene graphs. The verification plan decomposes the prompt into atomic claims, ensuring every requirement is checked. The spatio-temporal scene graph, encoding entities, attributes, and temporally-grounded relations, is extracted from the video and maintained as a persistent structured visual reference throughout reasoning. Each claim is verified against both the video and the scene graph, anchoring judgments in explicit visual evidence. SG-PVR achieves strong performance on semantic alignment, including fine-grained temporal semantics. As a test-time reranker, it further enhances compositional alignment in T2V generation.

AI.tldr: 提出了SG-PVR，一种面向文本到视频生成的奖励模型，通过“计划-验证”推理和时空场景图来提升细粒度语义对齐能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于推理的奖励模型在文本到视频任务中往往无法系统检查提示词中的每个条件，且其判断依据缺乏显式的视觉证据，导致细粒度语义对齐不足。
AI.method: SG-PVR将提示词拆分为原子级声明，并生成验证计划，确保逐条检查所有要求；同时从视频中提取时空场景图，编码实体、属性及时间关联关系，并在推理过程中作为持续的结构化视觉参考；每个声明都同时结合视频内容与场景图进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，SG-PVR在语义对齐，尤其是细粒度时间语义方面表现突出；作为测试时重排序器，还能进一步提升文本到视频生成的组合式对齐效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过把验证过程结构化并显式引入时空场景图，SG-PVR有效弥补了现有奖励模型在条件覆盖和视觉证据可解释性方面的不足，从而提升了文本到视频生成的对齐质量。

title: GUI-AC: Enhancing Continual Learning in GUI Agents
summary: Graphical User Interfaces (GUIs) serve as the dominant medium for human-computer interaction, yet building GUI agents that generalize across the vast diversity of real-world interface environments, with the same flexibility and robustness that humans naturally exhibit, remains unsolved. Notably, GUI data are inherently non-stationary: the continual emergence of previously unseen interface instances (e.g., novel domains and resolutions) induces persistent distribution shifts, significantly impeding the continual learning of existing GUI agents. Reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) has attracted considerable attention as a promising approach. Nevertheless, RFT exhibits pronounced instability in its grounding capability, manifested as sharp reward discontinuities and high-variance oscillations. The imbalanced distribution of rollout outcomes introduces substantial noise into advantage estimation, leading to policy overconfidence. The fixed clipping bound suppresses the increase in policy probabilities needed to adapt to new distributions, leading to a collapse in exploration capacity. To address these challenges, we propose GUI-AC, a method that enhances the continual learning capability of GUI agents. GUI-AC introduces grounding certainty to support two core mechanisms: (i) Adaptive Advantage, which down-weights noisy advantage estimates to prevent policy overconfidence; and (ii) Dynamic Clipping, which relaxes the clipping bound to encourage exploration range. Extensive experiments show that these mechanisms jointly improve performance, enabling our method to surpass state-of-the-art baselines. Code is available anonymously at https://github.com/Can-Lin/GUI-AC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GUI-AC，用于提升GUI智能体在持续变化界面环境中的持续学习与泛化能力，核心是通过“地面确定性”来稳定强化微调过程。
AI.motivation: GUI环境具有明显非平稳性，新界面、不同分辨率和新领域会持续带来分布偏移；而现有强化微调方法存在奖励不连续、方差高、优势估计噪声大、策略过度自信以及固定裁剪限制探索等问题，导致训练不稳定。
AI.method: GUI-AC引入“地面确定性”作为基础信号，设计两项机制：一是自适应优势，对噪声较大的优势估计进行降权，以抑制策略过度自信；二是动态裁剪，根据分布变化放宽裁剪边界，以扩大必要的探索范围并适应新分布。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，这两项机制能够协同提升性能，改善GUI智能体在持续学习场景下的稳定性与适应性，并优于现有最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GUI-AC通过结合自适应优势和动态裁剪，有效缓解了GUI强化微调中的不稳定与探索受限问题，为构建更鲁棒的持续学习GUI智能体提供了可行方案。

title: ReflectiChain: Epistemic Grounding in LLM-Driven World Models for Supply Chain Resilience
summary: AI agents in supply chains face a fundamental epistemic gap: large language models (LLMs) interpret policies but lack physical grounding, while reinforcement learning (RL) optimizes flows but is semantically blind to unstructured constraints. We introduce REFLECTICHAIN, bridging this gap through a Generative Supply Chain World Model (SC-WM) - encoding heterogeneous supply networks into a 6-dim graph-latent space with physical conservation - and Double-Loop Learning that separates epistemic uncertainty (KL-trust-region-bounded policy adaptation) from aleatoric uncertainty (stochastic latent rollouts). On Semi-Sim, a 10-node semiconductor benchmark with SIR risk propagation, 6 perturbation types, and 10 policy constraint templates, REFLECTICHAIN improves Rationale Consistency Score by 33.0% (p < 0.0001, d = 2.78), maintains 82.3% operability under adversarial shocks, and exhibits anti-fragile behavior (+40.2% gain under moderate pressure). We identify three operational epistemic mechanisms - uncertainty separation, knowledge-boundary detection, and empirical Bayesian policy updating - and discuss five limitation categories.

AI.tldr: 本文提出REFLECTICHAIN，用生成式供应链世界模型与双循环学习机制，将大语言模型的语义理解能力与强化学习的流程优化能力结合起来，以缓解供应链智能体在物理约束与政策理解之间的认知缺口。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型擅长解释政策与文本约束，但缺乏物理层面的供应链 grounded 认知；强化学习虽能优化物流与流转，却难以理解非结构化约束。作者希望构建一种同时具备语义理解、物理一致性和不确定性处理能力的供应链智能体框架。
AI.method: 提出REFLECTICHAIN框架，核心包括两部分：一是生成式供应链世界模型（SC-WM），将异构供应网络编码到6维图潜变量空间，并引入物理守恒约束；二是双循环学习，将认知不确定性通过KL信任域约束的策略适配进行处理，将随机不确定性通过随机潜变量滚动进行建模。
AI.result: 在Semi-Sim半导体供应链基准上，包含10节点、SIR风险传播、6类扰动和10种策略约束模板，方法使Rationale Consistency Score提升33.0%，在对抗性冲击下保持82.3%的可运行性，并在中等压力下表现出40.2%的增益。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，将世界模型与不确定性分离式学习结合，可以提升供应链智能体的解释一致性、鲁棒性与抗脆弱性；同时作者总结了不确定性分离、知识边界检测和经验贝叶斯策略更新三种机制，并指出该方法仍存在若干局限。

title: Temporal-Aware Reasoning Optimization for Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in video temporal grounding with reinforcement learning for generating reasoning paths. However, existing models often produce superficial reasoning, which offers limited guidance for precise temporal localization. This limitation stems from (1) inefficient random exploration and (2) reward functions that focus solely on the answer correctness while ignoring reasoning quality. To address these issues, we propose TaRO (Temporal-Aware Reasoning Optimization), a framework that explicitly enhances the model's ability of thinking with time. First, we introduce a Constructive Reasoning Exploration that leverages pre-generated dense captions to construct reasoning paths grounded in explicit visual cues and timestamps, enabling efficient exploration of high-quality time-aware reasoning. Second, to evaluate reasoning quality, we design a Temporal-Sensitivity Reward. High-quality reasoning should be anchored to specific events and timestamps. If the event boundary under thinking is disrupted, such reasoning should become invalid, leading to a drop in the logit of the reasoning path. We utilize this drop as a critique of reasoning quality. Finally, TaRO follows a progressive curriculum, which starts by utilizing this reward to select better constructed reasoning paths, and evolves to a free exploration phase where the model autonomously generates effective reasoning. Experiments demonstrate that TaRO achieves state-of-the-art performance on VTG benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/oceanflowlab/TaRO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TaRO，一种面向视频时间定位的时序感知推理优化框架，通过构造式推理探索、时序敏感奖励和渐进式课程学习，提升多模态大语言模型在视频时间定位中的推理质量与定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有视频时间定位中的强化学习方法常产生表面化推理，难以有效指导精确的时间片段定位。其主要原因在于随机探索效率低，以及奖励函数只关注答案是否正确，忽略了推理过程本身的质量。
AI.method: TaRO包含三部分：1）构造式推理探索，利用预生成的密集字幕和时间戳构造与视觉线索对齐的推理路径，以提高高质量时序推理的探索效率；2）时序敏感奖励，通过扰动事件边界并观察推理路径的logit下降来评估推理是否真正依赖具体事件与时间信息，从而刻画推理质量；3）渐进式课程学习，先用该奖励筛选更优推理路径，再进入自由探索阶段，使模型逐步学会自主生成有效推理。
AI.result: 实验表明，TaRO在多个视频时间定位基准上取得了当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明，将时序约束显式注入推理探索与奖励设计，可以显著提升多模态大语言模型的时间定位能力，为视频理解中的“带时间思考”提供了有效训练范式。

title: From USD Scenes to Knowledge Graphs: Zero-Shot Ontology Grounding with LLMs
comment: Accepted to the IEEE ICRA 2026 International Joint Workshop on Ontologies, Semantic Maps and Autonomous Robotics Standardization (J-WOSMARS 2026), Vienna, 2026
summary: Constructing knowledge graphs from 3D simulation scenes is essential for robot task reasoning, but the key bottleneck, grounding scene objects to formal ontology classes, still relies on manually curated dictionaries that are brittle and do not generalize across assets. We investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can automate this grounding step for Universal Scene Description (USD) scenes as a zero-shot, training-free alternative. On a kitchen scene (125 objects) with SOMA-HOME Ontology, LLMs achieve 90-96% exact-match accuracy with descriptive names and 49-89% with abbreviated names, substantially outperforming dictionary and embedding baselines. Under fully opaque names, context-augmented prompting recovers up to 48%. Feature ablation reveals that LLMs primarily exploit semantic cues in the scene graph (sibling names and parent paths); anonymizing these cues reduces accuracy to 0-6%, while geometry alone yields only 4-17%.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨能否用大语言模型在零样本、无需训练的条件下，将3D仿真场景中的对象自动映射到本体类别，以替代脆弱的人工词典方法。结果表明，LLM在名称可读时表现很强，但高度依赖语义上下文而非几何信息。
AI.motivation: 在机器人任务推理中，由3D场景构建知识图谱时，最关键且最费人工的步骤是把场景对象对齐到形式化本体类。传统依赖手工词典的方法泛化性差、维护成本高，因此作者希望验证LLM能否自动完成这一“grounding”过程。
AI.method: 以一个厨房USD场景为对象，包含125个物体，并采用SOMA-HOME本体作为目标类别体系。作者比较了LLM、词典方法和嵌入式基线在不同命名条件下的性能：包括描述性名称、缩写名称和完全匿名名称。同时进行特征消融，分析LLM主要依赖的输入信息来源，如场景图中的兄弟节点名称、父路径以及几何特征。
AI.result: LLM在描述性名称条件下达到90%-96%的完全匹配准确率，在缩写名称条件下为49%-89%，明显优于词典和嵌入基线。在完全匿名名称下，通过加入上下文提示，准确率最高可恢复到48%。消融实验显示，LLM主要利用场景图中的语义线索：当兄弟名称和父路径被匿名化后，准确率降至0%-6%；仅使用几何信息时，准确率只有4%-17%。
AI.conclusion: LLM可作为USD场景本体 grounding 的零样本、训练免费替代方案，尤其在对象名称和场景上下文可用时效果突出。但其能力主要来自语义上下文而非几何理解，因此在名称被完全遮蔽或语义线索缺失时性能显著下降，说明仍需更稳健的结构化表示与上下文设计。

title: Driving Video Retrieval for Complex Queries with Structured Grounding
summary: Video retrieval at scale is central to data curation and safety validation in autonomous driving, where users want to find not only scenes but also dynamic events such as cut-ins and hard braking. Existing vision-language and keyword-based retrieval methods often miss these events because the relevant motion may not be explicitly described in text or captured by lexical overlap. Rule-based retrieval can encode such events more directly, but it is brittle: generated or hand-written rules often fail when their assumptions do not match real driving data. We propose STRIVE-D, a data-calibrated retrieval framework for driving videos. It uses weakly labeled in-domain videos to estimate when a query rule is reliable, adapt rules that mismatch observed data, and fuse calibrated rule scores with vision-language and keyword-based retrieval signals. Across three driving benchmarks, including newly released human-annotated event data on DrivingDojo, STRIVE-D delivers up to 84% relative improvement in top-1 accuracy over state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个用于自动驾驶视频检索的框架STRIVE-D，通过弱标注域内视频对规则进行校准，并融合规则、视觉语言和关键词检索信号，以更稳健地检索动态事件。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中的视频数据治理和安全验证需要检索具体场景及动态事件，如切入、急刹车等；但现有视觉语言和关键词方法常因事件未被文本明确描述而漏检，规则检索虽更直接却容易因与真实数据分布不匹配而失效。
AI.method: STRIVE-D采用数据校准的方式，利用弱标注的域内视频估计查询规则的可靠性，自动调整与观测数据不一致的规则，并将校准后的规则分数与视觉语言及关键词检索信号进行融合。
AI.result: 在三个驾驶基准上进行评测，包括新发布的DrivingDojo人工标注事件数据，STRIVE-D相比当前最优方法在Top-1准确率上最高提升了84%的相对增益。
AI.conclusion: 该方法表明，将弱监督数据用于规则校准并与多种检索信号融合，能够显著提升驾驶视频中动态事件检索的准确性与鲁棒性。

title: CACR:Reinforcing Temporal Answer Grounding in Instructional Video via Candidate-Aware Causal Reasoning
summary: The task of temporal answer grounding in instructional video (TAGV), which aims to locate precise video segments that respond to natural language queries, is increasingly important for direct video answer retrieval. This task remains challenging due to the need to comprehend semantically complex questions and to address the significant length mismatch between untrimmed videos and short target moments. Existing methods often suffer from sensitivity to irrelevant content or insufficient visual reasoning capabilities. To tackle these limitations, we propose a Candidate-Aware Causal Reasoning (CACR) framework. Our approach first employs a Visual-Language Pre-training based Candidate Selection (VBCS) algorithm to efficiently generate K candidate segments, then applies a temporal logic reasoning module enhanced by a rejection reward mechanism and optimized via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) for robust inference. Extensive experiments on six benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of mean Intersection-over-Union (mIoU), providing a new perspective for reasoning-based retrieval in long videos.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向教学视频时间答案定位的候选感知因果推理框架CACR，通过先筛选候选片段、再进行时序逻辑推理，实现对自然语言问题对应视频片段的精确定位，并在六个基准上取得最优结果。
AI.motivation: 该任务的核心难点在于：视频很长而目标片段很短，且问题语义复杂，现有方法容易受无关内容干扰，或缺乏足够的视觉推理能力，因此需要更鲁棒、更高效的定位机制。
AI.method: 方法分两步：首先使用基于视觉语言预训练的候选选择算法VBCS，从长视频中高效生成K个候选片段；随后引入增强了拒绝奖励机制的时序逻辑推理模块，并通过组相对策略优化GRPO进行训练，以提升推理与筛选的稳健性。
AI.result: 在六个公开基准上的实验表明，该方法在平均交并比mIoU上达到当前最优性能，说明其在长视频答案检索场景中具有更强的定位能力。
AI.conclusion: CACR通过“候选生成+因果推理”的两阶段设计，有效缓解了长视频定位中的长度不匹配与噪声干扰问题，为基于推理的视频检索提供了新的技术思路。

title: Efficient Skill Grounding via Code Refactoring with Small Language Models
summary: Effective skill grounding is essential for deploying reusable skills in embodied agents, as even minor embodiment or environmental differences can render an entire skill incompatible. This challenge is particularly pronounced in embodied settings, where agents must operate in dynamic, partially observable environments without access to large language models (LLMs). In this setting, reliance on LLMs is impractical, while small language models (sLMs) remain insufficient for the effective skill grounding required for reliable long-horizon control. We present RECENT, a refactoring-centric agent framework that enables efficient skill grounding with sLMs by decoupling skill semantics from embodiment- and environment-specific execution binding. By representing skills as executable code, RECENT preserves the semantic intent encoded in a skill's control structure while grounding it by modifying only execution bindings through localized refactoring, rather than regenerating code from scratch. We evaluate RECENT across diverse skill grounding scenarios spanning multiple robot embodiments in dynamic environments, demonstrating robust long-horizon performance when deployed with an sLM. Across all scenarios, RECENT achieves the best performance among sLM-based Code-as-Policies (CaP) methods and matches the task performance of LLM-based CaP.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为RECENT的重构中心框架，用于在缺少大语言模型时，借助小语言模型实现高效的技能落地与长程控制。
AI.motivation: 在具身智能任务中，技能在不同机器人形态和环境之间往往难以直接复用；同时，动态、部分可观测场景下又难以依赖大语言模型，而小语言模型在技能落地能力上不足，因此需要一种能在保持语义意图的同时高效适配执行细节的方法。
AI.method: RECENT将技能表示为可执行代码，把技能语义与具体 embodiment 和环境相关的执行绑定解耦；在落地新场景时，不是从头生成代码，而是通过局部重构只修改执行绑定，从而保留控制结构中的语义意图并实现适配。
AI.result: 实验覆盖多个机器人形态与动态环境中的多种技能落地场景，结果显示RECENT在使用小语言模型时具有稳健的长程性能，并且在所有场景中都优于基于小语言模型的Code-as-Policies方法，性能达到基于大语言模型的Code-as-Policies水平。
AI.conclusion: RECENT证明了通过重构式适配而非重新生成代码，可以显著提升小语言模型在具身技能落地中的有效性，为资源受限条件下的可靠长程控制提供了可行方案。

title: Explicit Evidence Grounding via Structured Inline Citation Generation
summary: As AI systems become more widely adopted, the demand for factual and faithful generation grows. Properly attributing information through citations becomes, therefore, crucial. This work introduces FullCite, a framework that, in contrast to most previous works, generates structured inline citations linking each claim to both its source document and supporting evidence. FullCite proposes three strategies to inline citation generation: prompt-based generation, constrained decoding over a citation grammar, and posthoc span alignment. Using three question answering benchmarks, namely, ASQA, BioASQ, and ExpertQA, we assess citation quality and faithfulness along three dimensions: document-level correctness, evidence span identification, and claim-citation faithfulness. Our evaluation shows that while LLMs are generally effective at identifying relevant documents, they struggle to identify the precise supporting spans within them. This gap suggests that achieving faithful attributed QA will require research to place greater emphasis on precise evidence span identification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FullCite框架，用于生成结构化的行内引用，使每个答案主张同时关联来源文档和支撑证据，并指出当前模型更擅长找相关文档，但难以精确定位支持片段。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统的广泛应用，事实性与忠实生成的需求上升，因此需要更可靠的引文归因机制来提升答案可追溯性与可信度。
AI.method: 提出FullCite框架，并设计三种行内引用生成策略：基于提示的生成、基于引文语法的约束解码、以及后处理的片段对齐。使用ASQA、BioASQ和ExpertQA三个问答基准，从文档级正确性、证据片段识别、以及主张-引用忠实性三方面评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，大语言模型通常能够较好识别相关文档，但在精确识别文档内的支持性证据片段方面表现较弱，导致引用忠实性不足。
AI.conclusion: 实现忠实的归因式问答不仅需要找到相关来源，还需要更强调证据片段的精确定位；未来研究应聚焦提升细粒度证据识别能力。

title: StainFlow: Entity-Stain Tracking and Evidence Linking for Process Rewards in GUI Agents
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has become a promising approach for improving GUI Agents in long-horizon, stochastic digital environments, but trajectory-level success feedback is too sparse to provide reliable credit assignment for intermediate exploration steps. To mitigate this issue, recent studies introduce Process Reward Models (PRMs), which provide finer-grained training feedback through global milestone verification or local step-level evaluation. However, these methods still suffer from two level-specific limitations: global milestone decomposition is subjective and singular, making it difficult to accommodate the multiple valid execution paths in real GUI tasks, while fixed local judging windows may miss long-range key evidence or dilute the decision signal with irrelevant frames. Inspired by stain-tracing mechanisms in network flow analysis, we propose StainFlow, an entity-stain-flow process reward model for GUI Agents. To reduce the subjectivity of global partitioning, we introduce the Global Entity Stain Tracking module, which extracts visually verifiable task entities and tracks how their stain concentrations and states evolve along the trajectory, allowing task phases to be objectively separated by changes in the entity evidence flow. To improve the accuracy of local verification, we introduce the Local Stain Evidence Linking module. Centered on the triggering entities of each candidate key node, it retrieves relevant steps based on their stain concentrations and state changes, and dynamically constructs high-density evidence windows for verifying true key nodes. Extensive experiments on AndroidWorld and OGRBench show that StainFlow relatively improves online RL success by 3.2% and trajectory completion judgment accuracy by 1.8%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出StainFlow，一种面向GUI智能体的过程奖励模型，通过“实体污迹流”机制同时改进全局阶段划分与局部关键步骤验证，从而缓解轨迹级反馈稀疏带来的信用分配困难。
AI.motivation: 在长时序、随机性强的GUI任务中，轨迹最终成功信号过于稀疏，难以指导中间探索步骤；现有过程奖励模型又分别存在全局阶段划分主观且单一、局部固定窗口容易漏掉长程证据或引入噪声的问题。
AI.method: 提出两个核心模块：一是全局实体污迹跟踪模块，抽取可视觉验证的任务实体，并跟踪其污迹浓度与状态变化，据此客观划分任务阶段；二是局部污迹证据链接模块，以候选关键节点的触发实体为中心，按污迹浓度和状态变化动态检索相关步骤，构建高密度证据窗口进行验证。
AI.result: 在AndroidWorld和OGRBench上的实验表明，StainFlow使在线强化学习成功率相对提升3.2%，轨迹完成判断准确率相对提升1.8%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过实体级证据流建模，提高了GUI任务中过程奖励反馈的客观性与局部验证的有效性，适合用于改进长时序GUI智能体的训练与评估。

title: AxisGuide: Grounding Robot Action Coordinate System in RGB Observations for Robust Visuomotor Manipulation
comment: Accepted to Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) 2026
summary: Visuomotor manipulation policies trained via large-scale behavior cloning have achieved strong semantic scene understanding, yet often fail to reliably execute correct low-level actions under distribution shifts. For example, even in a simple pickup task with identical scene layouts, camera viewpoints, and illumination, performance can degrade substantially when the object is placed at unseen locations. We argue that this gap arises from insufficient action understanding, namely the inability to interpret the robot's base-frame action coordinate system in image space. To address this issue, we introduce AxisGuide, a lightweight guidance method that bridges semantic scene understanding and action-coordinate interpretation. Using camera parameters and end-effector poses, AxisGuide renders the robot base-frame axes in each camera view and augments RGB observations with a small set of cue channels that explicitly visualize the meaning of the +x, +y, and +z motions in image space. Extensive evaluations in both the LIBERO simulation and real-world environments demonstrate that AxisGuide yields substantial performance gains and improved generalization, highlighting the effectiveness of explicit action-coordinate cues for learning reliable and transferable generalist visuomotor policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AxisGuide，一种轻量级引导方法，通过在图像中显式可视化机器人基坐标系的动作轴，帮助策略同时理解场景语义和动作坐标，从而提升受分布偏移影响下的低层控制泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大规模行为克隆训练的视觉运动控制策略虽然具备较强的场景语义理解能力，但在面对位置变化等分布偏移时，常因无法正确理解图像空间中的动作坐标含义而导致低层动作执行不稳定。作者认为，问题核心在于动作理解不足，即不能把机器人基坐标系中的+x、+y、+z运动与图像中的视觉线索对应起来。
AI.method: AxisGuide利用相机参数和末端执行器位姿，将机器人基坐标轴投影到每个相机视图中，并在RGB观测上额外加入少量提示通道，显式展示基坐标中三个方向动作在图像空间里的含义。该方法设计轻量，不改变主干策略学习框架，只是提供更直接的动作坐标提示。
AI.result: 在LIBERO仿真环境和真实世界环境中的大量实验表明，AxisGuide显著提升了任务成功率和泛化能力，尤其在物体位置未见过的情况下表现更稳定。实验结果说明，显式动作坐标提示能够有效弥补语义理解与低层动作执行之间的鸿沟。
AI.conclusion: AxisGuide证明了在通用视觉运动策略中，除了场景语义外，显式注入动作坐标信息同样关键。通过让模型更容易理解基坐标动作在图像中的对应关系，可以获得更可靠、更具迁移性的策略。

title: Towards One-to-Many Temporal Grounding
summary: Temporal Grounding (TG) aims to localize video segments corresponding to a textual query. Prior research predominantly focuses on single-segment retrieval. Real-world scenarios, however, often require localizing multiple disjoint segments for a single query -- a setting we term One-to-Many Temporal Grounding (OMTG). Previous state-of-the-art MLLMs, optimized for one-to-one settings, struggle in this context, often yielding near-zero scores due to a lack of event cardinality perception. To bridge this gap, we present a systematic solution with three key contributions. First, we establish the first comprehensive OMTG benchmark, introducing Count Accuracy (C-Acc) and Effective Temporal F1 (EtF1) as evaluation metrics. Second, we curate a high-quality OMTG dataset comprising 56k samples through a sophisticated construction pipeline. Third, we develop novel temporal and caption reward functions specifically designed for OMTG. In particular, the caption reward leverages Chain-of-Thought reasoning over dense video captions to explicitly guide policy optimization toward both preciseness and completeness. Extensive experiments show our model achieves a new state-of-the-art EtF1 of 43.65\% on OMTG Bench, outperforming Gemini 2.5 Pro and Seed-1.8 by 15.85\% and 15.61\%, respectively. Project Page: https://insomniaaac.github.io/OMTG/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向“一对多时间定位（OMTG）”的新任务与系统方案，针对同一文本查询需要定位多个不相交视频片段的场景，构建了基准、数据集和专用奖励函数，并显著提升了定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有时间定位研究主要聚焦于“单查询-单片段”检索，但真实应用中常需要根据一个文本查询定位多个分散片段。由于传统多模态大模型更擅长一对一设置，在一对多场景中往往表现很差，核心问题在于缺乏对事件数量的感知能力。
AI.method: 作者提出三项贡献：1）建立首个完整的OMTG基准，并设计Count Accuracy（C-Acc）与Effective Temporal F1（EtF1）作为评估指标；2）通过复杂构建流程整理出56k高质量OMTG数据集；3）设计面向OMTG的时序奖励与字幕奖励函数，其中字幕奖励利用密集视频字幕上的链式思维推理，显式引导策略优化同时提升定位的准确性与完整性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在OMTG Bench上取得了43.65%的EtF1新SOTA，分别比Gemini 2.5 Pro和Seed-1.8高出15.85和15.61个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将时间定位从传统单片段检索扩展到更贴近实际的一对多场景，提供了新的基准、数据和训练信号，证明通过显式建模事件数量与完整性，可以显著提升多片段时间定位性能。

title: Where, What, Why, and Importance: Structured Defect Grounding for Text-to-Image Feedback
summary: Despite generating increasingly photorealistic images, text-to-image (T2I) models still exhibit localized, subtle, and structurally complex failures. Diagnosing these failures requires instance-level feedback that answers where a defect occurs, what type it is, why it is defective, and its importance to overall image quality. While recent dense-feedback methods move beyond scalar supervision, their heatmap-centric representations still formulate diagnosis as pixel-field regression, making it difficult to localize variable-cardinality defects and bind semantic reasons to individual failures. To address this representation bottleneck, we propose Structured Defect Grounding (SDG), which casts T2I diagnosis as structured set prediction by modeling each defect as a (location, type, reason, importance) tuple. To make this formulation trainable and measurable, we introduce SDG-30K, a 30K-image dataset with box-grounded annotations across four modern T2I generators, together with a dedicated evaluation protocol, SDG-Eval. Building on this structured representation, we further present a diagnosis-to-alignment framework in which a Vision-Language Model (VLM) serves as the SDG detector, and BoxFlow-GRPO converts predicted defect sets into box-derived, importance-weighted spatial rewards for diffusion model alignment. Extensive experiments show that our SDG detector outperforms leading proprietary VLMs on structured defect grounding, while SDG-guided rewards consistently improve T2I alignment and support localized image refinement. These results establish SDG as a unified, instance-level interface for diagnosing, evaluating, and enhancing modern generative models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出结构化缺陷定位（SDG）框架，将文本生成图像中的缺陷诊断从热力图回归转为集合预测，统一表示每个缺陷的位置、类型、原因和重要性，并进一步用于模型对齐与图像细化。
AI.motivation: 现有文本生成图像模型虽然更逼真，但仍会出现局部、细微且结构复杂的缺陷；传统稠密反馈方法多依赖热力图，难以同时处理缺陷数量可变、语义原因绑定困难等问题，因此需要一种更结构化、实例级的诊断方式。
AI.method: 提出SDG，将每个缺陷建模为（位置、类型、原因、重要性）四元组；构建SDG-30K数据集，包含4种现代文本生成图像模型的3万张带框标注样本，并设计SDG-Eval评测协议；进一步提出诊断到对齐框架，使用视觉语言模型作为SDG检测器，并用BoxFlow-GRPO把预测缺陷集合转化为基于框和重要性加权的空间奖励，用于扩散模型对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明，SDG检测器在结构化缺陷定位任务上优于领先的商用视觉语言模型；基于SDG生成的奖励能够稳定提升文本生成图像对齐效果，并支持局部图像修正。
AI.conclusion: SDG为现代生成模型提供了统一的实例级接口，可同时用于缺陷诊断、评测和性能增强，突破了以热力图为中心的反馈表达瓶颈。

title: Benchmarking Living-Screen-Native GUI Agents on Short-Video Platforms
summary: GUI agents today assume a static screen, where the world is frozen between two actions. However, real interfaces such as short-video applications violate this assumption, as their content keeps playing, and a competent user must decide what to watch and for how long. We formalize this task as Living-Screen-Native GUI agents and introduce LivingScreen, the first benchmark instantiating it on short-video platforms, with a faithful browser-based environment, a three-tier task suite, and metrics that jointly score accuracy and information efficiency. Evaluating extensive frontier models, we find that none reaches the human cost-accuracy performance, and that their dominant failure mode is over- and under-observation, pointing to observation control as a missing capability axis for future GUI agents. All data and code will be available at https://github.com/BITHLP/LivingScreen.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“活屏原生GUI代理”任务，针对内容持续变化的短视频界面，构建了LivingScreen基准，并发现现有前沿模型在准确率与信息效率上都未达到人类水平，主要问题是观察过多或过少。
AI.motivation: 传统GUI代理默认屏幕在交互间保持静态，但短视频等真实界面会持续播放内容，用户需要决定看什么以及看多久，因此需要一种能够处理动态屏幕的新型代理任务。
AI.method: 作者将该问题形式化为Living-Screen-Native GUI agents，并搭建了LivingScreen基准：包括一个逼真的浏览器环境、三层任务集合，以及同时评估准确率和信息效率的指标。随后对多个前沿模型进行系统评测。
AI.result: 实验显示，没有任何模型达到人类在成本-准确率上的表现；模型最主要的失败模式是观察过多或观察不足，说明其缺乏对观察行为进行有效控制的能力。
AI.conclusion: 动态、持续变化的界面是当前GUI代理的重要缺口。未来研究需要把“观察控制”作为新的核心能力轴，以提升代理在真实活屏环境中的表现。

title: Knowledge-Preserved Model Tuning in Null-Space for Robust Spatio-Temporal Video Grounding
summary: Spatio-Temporal Video Grounding aims to localize object tubes based on textual queries. While recent methods have achieved remarkable success, they mainly focus on high-quality(HQ) inputs, neglecting the widespread presence of low-quality(LQ) videos in real-world scenarios. Although tuning methods like LoRA can adapt to degraded inputs, they inevitably disrupt pre-trained knowledge. To address this, we propose Null-Space Tuning (NST). This framework exploits the geometric property that adding vectors within the null-space of frozen weights to the layer input does not affect the output. Leveraging this, NST injects learnable residuals into input features that can be selectively invisible to the pre-trained backbone. Specifically, NST combines the Quality-Adaptive Unit and Dual-Space Reparameterization to synthesize these residuals by confining components for HQ inputs to the null-space, while directing restoration components for LQ inputs to the non-null space. As the frozen weights eliminate null-space components, we effectively rectify degraded inputs while preserving pre-trained knowledge for HQ inputs. Extensive experiments show that NST outperforms state-of-the-art methods on our Mixed-Quality benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于时空视频定位的无空间调参方法NST，旨在同时兼顾高质量视频与低质量视频，在尽量不破坏预训练知识的前提下提升退化输入的恢复与定位效果。
AI.motivation: 现有时空视频定位方法主要面向高质量输入，但真实场景中低质量视频更常见；现有微调方法如LoRA虽然能适应退化输入，却可能干扰预训练模型已有知识，因此需要一种既能处理低质量视频、又能保持高质量视频表现的适配策略。
AI.method: 提出Null-Space Tuning（NST）。其核心利用冻结权重的零空间性质：注入到层输入中的零空间分量不会影响输出。NST在输入特征中引入可学习残差，并通过质量自适应单元与双空间重参数化进行构造：对高质量输入，将成分约束到零空间以避免影响骨干网络；对低质量输入，则将恢复成分引导到非零空间以实现修复。由于冻结权重会消除零空间分量，因此可在保留预训练知识的同时修正退化输入。
AI.result: 在Mixed-Quality基准上的大量实验表明，NST优于现有最先进方法，说明该方法在混合质量视频场景下具有更强的定位性能与适应能力。
AI.conclusion: NST通过零空间调参实现了对高质量输入的知识保留和对低质量输入的有效恢复，为混合质量场景下的时空视频定位提供了一个兼顾性能与稳定性的有效框架。

title: P$^2$-DPO: Grounding Hallucination in Perceptual Processing via Calibration Direct Preference Optimization
summary: Hallucination has recently garnered significant research attention in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs). Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) aims to learn directly from the corrected preferences provided by humans, thereby addressing the hallucination issue. Despite its success, this paradigm has yet to specifically target the perceptual bottleneck in attended regions or address insufficient Visual Robustness against image degradation. Furthermore, existing preference pairs are often vision-agnostic and their inherently off-policy nature limits their effectiveness in guiding model learning. To address these challenges, we propose Perceptual Processing Direct Preference Optimization (P$^2$-DPO), a novel training paradigm in which the model generates and learns from its own preference pairs, thereby directly addressing the identified visual bottlenecks while inherently avoiding the issues of vision-agnostic and off-policy data. It introduces: (1) an on-policy preference pairs construction method targeting Focus-and-Enhance perception and Visual Robustness, and (2) a well-designed Calibration Loss to precisely align visual signals with the causal generation of text. Experimental results demonstrate that with a comparable amount of training data and cost, P$^2$-DPO outperforms strong baselines that rely on costly human feedback on benchmarks. Furthermore, evaluations on Attention Region Fidelity (ARF) and image degradation scenarios validate the effectiveness of P$^2$-DPO in addressing perceptual bottleneck in attended regions and improving Visual Robustness against degraded inputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出P²-DPO，一种面向大视觉语言模型幻觉问题的新训练范式，通过模型自生成偏好对、构建在策略样本，并引入校准损失，以同时缓解注意区域感知瓶颈和图像退化下的视觉鲁棒性不足。
AI.motivation: 现有DPO虽然能利用人类偏好缓解幻觉，但存在三个不足：一是未直接针对注意区域中的感知瓶颈；二是对图像退化的视觉鲁棒性提升有限；三是偏好对通常与视觉内容弱相关且属于离策略数据，影响训练效果。因此需要一种更贴近视觉问题本身、且更有效的偏好优化方法。
AI.method: 提出Perceptual Processing Direct Preference Optimization（P²-DPO）。核心包括两部分：1）在策略偏好对构建方法，让模型基于自身输出生成偏好对，针对Focus-and-Enhance感知与视觉鲁棒性目标构建训练样本；2）校准损失（Calibration Loss），用于更精确地对齐视觉信号与文本生成过程中的因果关系，从而强化视觉信息对生成的约束。
AI.result: 实验表明，在相近的训练数据量与计算成本下，P²-DPO优于依赖昂贵人类反馈的强基线方法；在Attention Region Fidelity（ARF）和图像退化场景评估中，也验证了其对注意区域感知瓶颈和退化输入鲁棒性的改进效果。
AI.conclusion: P²-DPO通过在策略偏好学习和视觉-文本因果对齐，提供了一种更直接、更高效的LVLM幻觉缓解方案，兼顾局部感知质量与鲁棒性提升，并在无需额外高成本人工反馈的情况下取得更优表现。

title: EntSQL: A Benchmark for Grounding Text-to-SQL in Long-Context Enterprise Knowledge
summary: Text-to-SQL enables natural language access to databases, and recent LLMs have substantially advanced its capabilities. Existing benchmarks such as Spider, BIRD, and Spider~2.0 evaluate schema generalization, large-scale databases, and realistic workflows, but largely overlook enterprise scenarios where SQL generation depends on private business knowledge, such as internal metrics, reporting conventions, and organizational rules. We introduce EntSQL, an enterprise-oriented Text-to-SQL benchmark for evaluating long-context grounding over proprietary business documents. EntSQL contains 1,066 aligned Chinese-English semantic examples across five business domains, with most examples requiring domain knowledge beyond the question and schema and involving complex SQL structures. On English inputs, the best evaluated system reaches only 15.9\% when long-form documents are provided, highlighting the difficulty of grounding SQL generation in enterprise knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向企业场景的Text-to-SQL基准EntSQL，用于评估模型是否能在长上下文中结合私有业务文档生成SQL。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要关注模式泛化、超大数据库和真实工作流，但较少覆盖企业环境中依赖内部指标、报表规范和组织规则的SQL生成需求，因此需要一个更贴近企业知识场景的评测集。
AI.method: 构建EntSQL基准，包含1066个中英对齐的语义样本，覆盖五个业务领域；样本多数需要依赖题目和数据库模式之外的领域知识，并包含复杂SQL结构；通过在提供长篇业务文档的条件下评测现有系统，考察长上下文知识对SQL生成的支撑能力。
AI.result: 在英文输入下，表现最好的系统在提供长文档时仅达到15.9%的准确率，说明企业知识 grounding 仍然十分困难。
AI.conclusion: EntSQL补充了企业级Text-to-SQL评测空白，表明当前LLM在将私有业务文档与SQL生成有效结合方面仍存在明显不足。

title: Regret Pre-training: Bridging Prior and Posterior Views for Enhanced Knowledge Grounding
summary: Causal language models factorize sequence probabilities using only preceding context, leaving future information unexploited during training despite its availability in the training data. This paper introduces Regret Pre-training, a self-supervised framework grounded in the Learning Using Privileged Information (LUPI) paradigm. The framework employs a dual-view architecture in which a single model generates both a causal Student distribution and a future-conditioned Teacher distribution. The training objective augments standard language modeling with a regret loss that minimizes the KL divergence from teacher to student, transferring future-aware signals to the causal representations. We investigate two teacher configurations on the OLMoE-1B-7B architecture:LocalRegret, which extends attention by one future token, andGlobalRegret, which conditions on bidirectional context with the target position masked. Experiments on nine downstream tasks following 4 billion tokens of training demonstrate that both configurations consistently outperform the baseline. On average,GlobalRegret andLocalRegret achieve 33.9% and 32.2% accuracy respectively, surpassing the baseline's 30.2%. Most notably,GlobalRegret improves BoolQ performance by 18.1 percentage points (61.0% vs 42.9%). The framework introduces no additional parameters and requires only one extra inference-mode forward pass per training step.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“Regret Pre-training”自监督预训练框架，通过在训练时引入未来信息监督因果语言模型，使学生分布向未来感知的教师分布靠拢，从而提升下游任务表现。
AI.motivation: 因果语言模型只能利用前文信息建模，训练时虽然数据中存在未来上下文，但通常未被有效利用。作者希望在不增加参数的前提下，把这些“可见但未用”的未来信息转化为对表示学习有益的监督信号。
AI.method: 基于LUPI范式设计双视图架构：同一模型同时产生因果的学生分布和未来条件的教师分布。训练目标在标准语言建模损失上加入regret loss，用KL散度约束教师到学生的差异。作者在OLMoE-1B-7B上测试两种教师配置：LocalRegret仅扩展到下一个未来token，GlobalRegret使用双向上下文但遮蔽目标位置。
AI.result: 在4B tokens训练后，九个下游任务上两种方法均优于基线。平均准确率方面，GlobalRegret为33.9%，LocalRegret为32.2%，基线为30.2%。其中GlobalRegret在BoolQ上提升最明显，从42.9%提升到61.0%，提高18.1个百分点。
AI.conclusion: Regret Pre-training能够在不增加模型参数的情况下，把未来信息有效蒸馏到因果表示中，并带来稳定的下游性能提升；其中全局条件教师通常优于局部未来教师。

title: Hand Trajectory Fusion for Egocentric Natural Language Query Grounding
comment: Accepted for the poster session at the Egocentric Vision (EgoVis) Workshop in Conjunction with CVPR 2026
summary: Egocentric Natural Language Query (NLQ) grounding asks a model to localize, in a long first-person video, the temporal interval that answers a free-form text query. Existing methods fuse video appearance with the query but ignore hand motion, despite the fact that roughly 41% of Ego4D NLQ queries are answered at a moment of hand--object manipulation or their immediate outcomes.We propose a hand-trajectory encoder for converting a sequence of hand skeletons into highly-semantic hand kinematic features, which are then aligned and combined with pretrained video--text features through a cross-attention fusion strategy with adaptive gating. On the Ego4D NLQ v2 validation split, the clearest gains appear for Hand-Object Interaction queries (+2.54 R1@IoU=0.3) and Quantity/State queries (+4.32 R1@IoU=0.3), indicating that hand trajectory provides grounding cues beyond appearance alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于第一人称自然语言查询定位的手轨迹编码与跨模态融合方法，通过引入手部骨架序列的运动信息，提升了对手-物交互相关查询的时间区间定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要融合视频外观与文本查询，但忽略了手部运动线索；由于大量查询与手-物交互及其结果相关，手轨迹信息具有重要的定位价值。
AI.method: 设计手轨迹编码器，将连续手部骨架序列转换为高语义的手运动学特征；再与预训练视频-文本特征进行对齐，并通过带自适应门控的交叉注意力融合策略进行联合建模。
AI.result: 在 Ego4D NLQ v2 验证集上，方法在手-物交互查询上提升最明显，R1@IoU=0.3 提升2.54；在数量/状态查询上提升4.32，说明手轨迹能提供超越外观的有效定位线索。
AI.conclusion: 手部轨迹是第一人称视频自然语言查询定位中的关键补充信息，可显著增强对与操作动作、状态变化相关查询的时间定位性能。

title: Goal2Pixel: Grounding Goals to Pixels for Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have become a common foundation for vision-and-language navigation in continuous environments (VLN-CE). Yet most VLM-based methods cast navigation as low-level action prediction, an interface that is ambiguous, tied to short-horizon motion primitives, and inefficient due to repeated VLM querying. We propose Goal2Pixel, a pure pixel-based paradigm that reformulates VLN-CE as navigable pixel grounding. Rather than predicting actions, Goal2Pixel uses the image plane as a unified spatial interface between VLM reasoning and robot motion: the model predicts a visible navigable pixel to the agent, which is back-projected into a 3D waypoint for forward navigation. For non-forward actions, we append auxiliary directive regions to the image plane, where the left/right/bottom regions are interpreted as turning left, turning right, and stopping, respectively. To enable long-horizon navigation, we propose a visibility-aware keyframe memory for compact and informative history representation. To adapt pretrained VLMs to navigable pixel grounding, we introduce semantic embeddings and coordinate-aware auxiliary losses. Goal2Pixel achieves competitive state-of-the-art performance while requiring fewer VLM inference calls than prior methods. On R2R-CE Val-Unseen it achieves 54.1% SR and 52.5% SPL with just 7.75 VLM calls per episode, 6x fewer than the 46.62 required by direct action prediction at 32.9% SR. The same trend holds on RxR-CE.Project Page: https://baobao0926.github.io/Goal2Pixel/.

AI.tldr: 该工作提出Goal2Pixel，将连续环境中的视觉语言导航从“动作预测”改写为“可导航像素定位”，以像素平面作为VLM推理与机器人运动之间的统一接口，从而提升效率并保持较强性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于VLM的导航方法大多直接预测低层动作，存在接口歧义、受限于短时运动原语、且需要反复调用VLM导致推理开销较大。作者希望用更直接、统一且高效的空间表达来改进长程导航。
AI.method: 方法核心是纯像素式范式：模型不直接输出动作，而是在图像平面上预测一个可导航像素点，再将其反投影为三维航路点以执行前进。对于左转、右转和停止等非前进操作，作者在图像平面中加入辅助指令区域分别对应这些动作。为支持长程任务，引入了可见性感知的关键帧记忆，用于压缩且保留信息性的历史表示；同时通过语义嵌入和坐标感知的辅助损失，将预训练VLM适配到可导航像素定位任务。
AI.result: 在R2R-CE Val-Unseen上，Goal2Pixel取得54.1% SR和52.5% SPL，并且每个episode仅需7.75次VLM调用；相比直接动作预测方法32.9% SR且需要46.62次VLM调用，推理次数减少约6倍。作者还指出，在RxR-CE上同样呈现类似趋势。
AI.conclusion: Goal2Pixel证明了“像素定位”可以作为VLN-CE中一种更统一、更高效的导航接口，在减少VLM调用成本的同时达到有竞争力的最新性能，说明将视觉推理与空间落点直接对齐是提升长程导航效率的有效方向。

title: Self-Improving Small Object Grounding in LVLMs
summary: Can internal attention patterns in Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) identify reliable small-object boxes without fine-tuning? In this work, we provide an affirmative answer. Attention structure in LVLMs encodes grounding quality-a lightweight IoU regressor trained solely on attention maps achieves strong IoU prediction (Pearson r > 0.67). This regressor powers the regressor-based variant of our Attention-based Candidate Selection (ACS) framework, called ACS-Learned, which selects the best box from multiple sampled candidates to improve object grounding. By analyzing what the regressor learns, we reveal which transformer layers and heads are most critical and derive ACS-Free: a training-free selector that ranks candidates by attention entropy on these discriminative heads, with no learned component at inference. Experiments on COCO and Objects365 demonstrate up to 19% self-improvement on small object localization, with ACS-Free ranking best among all training-free methods, demonstrating that useful attention structure improves both localization reliability and interpretability in LVLMs.

AI.tldr: 该工作表明，大型视觉语言模型中的内部注意力模式可以用于可靠地判断小目标框的质量，无需微调即可改进目标定位。
AI.motivation: 作者关注的问题是：LVLM内部的注意力是否包含足够的定位信息，能够直接识别更可靠的小目标框，从而减少对额外训练和人工标注的依赖。
AI.method: 提出了两种基于注意力的候选框选择框架。首先训练一个仅基于注意力图的IoU回归器，用于预测候选框与真实框的重叠质量，形成ACS-Learned；随后分析回归器依赖的关键层和注意力头，进一步设计无需训练的ACS-Free，利用这些判别性注意力头上的注意力熵对候选框进行排序。
AI.result: 在COCO和Objects365上，该方法最多带来19%的小目标定位自提升；ACS-Free在所有无需训练的方法中排序效果最好，且注意力图与IoU之间的相关性较强（Pearson r大于0.67）。
AI.conclusion: LVLM的注意力结构不仅包含可用于定位的有效信息，还具有一定可解释性；基于注意力的候选选择可以在不微调的情况下提升小目标定位的可靠性，并提供更透明的决策依据。

title: TLG: Temporal-Logic Grounding for Video Question Answering via Source-Annotation Reconstruction and Category-Targeted Reasoning
summary: The TimeLogic Challenge evaluates formal temporal-logic reasoning over video - 16 operators (before, after, until, since, always, co-occur, ordering, ...) in boolean and 4-way multiple-choice form. End-to-end video-language models (VLMs) hover near chance on this task because they treat video as a bag of frames and cannot localize when actions occur. We present TLG (Temporal-Logic Grounding), a three-tier system that (i) reconstructs each video's action timeline from the public source-dataset annotations the benchmark was generated from, parses every question into a temporal-logic program, and executes it deterministically; (ii) falls back to a strong open VLM where no annotation exists; and (iii) routes only the question categories where the VLM is empirically weakest to a frontier reasoning model. TLG raises test accuracy from a 46.9% VLM baseline to 71.37%, a +24.5 absolute gain, reaching within 3 points of the leaderboard top. We report extensive ablations, including three model-based timeline-reconstruction variants that all underperform a holistic VLM, isolating temporal grounding as the irreducible bottleneck and showing that real annotations - not larger models - drive accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为TLG的三层系统，用于视频时间逻辑推理：先基于公开标注重建动作时间线并将问题解析为可执行的时间逻辑程序，再在缺少标注时回退到强视觉语言模型，最后将最弱的问题类别路由给更强的推理模型。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端视频语言模型在时间逻辑推理任务上接近随机，主要原因是把视频当作帧集合处理，无法准确定位动作发生的时间。
AI.method: TLG采用三层策略：(i) 利用基准来源数据集的公开注释重建每个视频的动作时间线，并将问题解析为时间逻辑程序后确定性执行；(ii) 当缺少标注时，回退到一个强的开源视觉语言模型；(iii) 只把模型表现最弱的问题类别交给更强的推理模型。
AI.result: 测试准确率从46.9%的VLM基线提升到71.37%，绝对提升24.5个百分点，距离排行榜第一名仅差3个百分点。消融实验还表明，三种基于模型的时间线重建方案都不如整体VLM，说明时间定位是核心瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 真实的时间标注比单纯扩大模型规模更关键。该工作证明了时间逻辑推理任务中，显式时间 grounding 是提升性能的主要来源，而分层路由与确定性执行能显著优于纯端到端方法。

title: Citation Grounding: Detecting and Reducing LLM Citation Hallucinations via Legal Citation Graphs
comment: 14 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Code and data: https://huggingface.co/datasets/overthelex/citation-grounding-eval
summary: Large language models systematically hallucinate legal citations -- fabricating statute references, citing repealed provisions, and confusing jurisdictions -- yet no automated method exists to measure or reduce this behavior at scale. We propose citation grounding (CG), a metric that verifies LLM-generated legal citations against a ground-truth citation graph extracted from 100.8 million Ukrainian court decisions (502 million edges, 21,736 unique statute nodes). CG decomposes into three components -- citation precision (does the cited provision exist?), citation relevance (is it contextually appropriate?), and citation temporality (was it valid at the relevant date?) -- enabling differential diagnosis of hallucination types. Empirical evaluation on 100 Ukrainian legal queries across five systems -- four commercial LLMs via AWS Bedrock (Claude Haiku 4.5, Mistral Pixtral Large, Amazon Nova Pro/Lite) and one RAG-augmented production system -- reveals CG ranging from 0.791 to 0.873, with 13-21% of citations hallucinated. To reduce hallucinations without human annotation, we introduce Citation Grounding DPO (CG-DPO): a method that constructs preference pairs algorithmically by corrupting verified citations from real court decisions via four targeted strategies. On a dataset of 2,244 court decisions, a Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct model fine-tuned with LoRA achieves 98.5% mean validation accuracy in distinguishing correct from corrupted citations (rewards margin +14.9, std < 0.3 pp across 3 seeds). The citation graph, evaluation framework, and CG-DPO dataset are released as open resources.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向法律引用幻觉的自动评测与优化框架：先用“引用约束度”指标从存在性、相关性和时效性三个维度衡量大模型生成法律引文是否可靠，再用基于真实判决的自动构造偏好对训练方法CG-DPO来减少幻觉引用。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在法律场景中容易出现编造法条、引用已废止条文或混淆司法辖区等问题，而现有方法缺乏可规模化的自动评测与抑制手段，因此需要一种既能诊断不同类型错误、又能在不依赖人工标注的情况下降低引用幻觉的方法。
AI.method: 作者构建了一个从100.8百万份乌克兰法院判决中抽取的真实引用图谱，并提出CG指标，将法律引用质量拆分为引用精确性、引用相关性和引用时效性三部分，用于细粒度评测模型输出；同时提出CG-DPO，通过四种定向腐化策略自动生成“正确引用/错误引用”偏好对，在2,244份判决上对Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct进行LoRA微调，以学习区分真实与伪造引用。
AI.result: 在100个乌克兰法律查询、五个系统上评测时，CG得分为0.791到0.873，约13%到21%的引用存在幻觉；在CG-DPO训练任务中，模型达到98.5%的平均验证准确率，奖励间隔为+14.9，且三个随机种子间波动很小。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明法律引用幻觉可以被系统化测量，并可通过自动构造的偏好学习显著缓解；同时，所发布的引用图谱、评测框架与训练数据为后续法律LLM的可靠性研究提供了可复用资源。

title: Decomposed On-Policy Distillation for Vision-Language Reasoning: Steering Gradients for Visual Grounding
summary: While on-policy distillation offers dense supervision for training small reasoning models, its optimization dynamics in the multimodal domain remain under-explored. In this work, we challenge the standard monolithic view of Vision-Language Model (VLM) distillation by mathematically decomposing the loss into two distinct components: the language prior and visual grounding. Our analysis uncovers that gradient vectors for these components are nearly orthogonal, indicating that the objective of aligning with the teacher's language distribution is geometrically independent from the objective of matching its visual perception. Consequently, standard optimization passively follows a suboptimal compromise trajectory that implicitly balances the two objectives. Hypothesizing that visual grounding constitutes the primary bottleneck for vision-language reasoning, we introduce Visual Gradient Steering (VGS), a method that dynamically reorients the update vector to prioritize the visual subspace. Experimental results on multiple distillation settings and complex multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that VGS significantly outperforms the standard monolithic formulation of on-policy distillation, achieving superior grounding with minimal training overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多模态蒸馏中的优化动态，指出传统把视觉语言蒸馏当作单一目标的做法会掩盖两个近乎正交的梯度来源：语言先验与视觉对齐。作者提出视觉梯度引导方法，通过动态重定向更新方向来强化视觉子空间，从而提升视觉语言推理效果。
AI.motivation: 现有在策略蒸馏虽能提供稠密监督，但在多模态场景下如何优化并不清楚。作者认为标准单体式目标会把语言分布匹配与视觉感知匹配混在一起，导致优化走向折中而非针对性改进，尤其视觉对齐可能是主要瓶颈。
AI.method: 作者先从数学上将蒸馏损失分解为语言先验和视觉定位两个部分，并分析其梯度关系，发现二者几乎正交。基于此，提出Visual Gradient Steering（VGS），在训练中动态调整更新向量，使优化更偏向视觉子空间，同时保持较低额外开销。
AI.result: 在多个蒸馏设置和复杂多模态基准上，VGS相比标准单体式在策略蒸馏取得更好表现，显著提升视觉定位能力，并且训练开销增加很小。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，多模态蒸馏不应简单视为单一目标优化，而应区分语言与视觉两个相对独立的优化方向。通过针对视觉梯度进行定向控制，可以更有效地提升视觉语言模型的推理与对齐能力。

title: Improving Visual Grounding in Remote Sensing via Cluster-Guided Refinement and Model Ensemble Voting
summary: Visual grounding aims to locate image regions that correspond to natural language descriptions and is a key component of interpretable vision systems. In remote sensing imagery, grounding is particularly challenging due to complex scenes, small objects, and large variations in scale. Relying on a single model is often insufficient to address these diverse challenges. In this work, we propose two grounding pipelines, Sequential Grounding Refinement (SGR) and Cluster-Aware Grounding Refinement (CGR), that combine the complementary strengths of RemoteSAM, a visual grounding model specialized for remote sensing, and SAM3, a powerful general-purpose segmentation model. Our approach first uses RemoteSAM to obtain an initial estimate of object location, which is then refined using SAM3 to produce more accurate and spatially consistent segmentations. Additionally, we explore an ensemble strategy based on majority voting across six diverse grounding pipelines, each with distinct capabilities. This multi-model framework improves robustness and significantly enhances localization accuracy. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed pipelines and ensemble approach outperform individual models, leading to more reliable and precise visual grounding predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出面向遥感图像的多模型视觉定位框架，结合RemoteSAM与SAM3构建顺序式与聚类感知式两种精炼流程，并通过六路投票集成提升定位精度与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像中的视觉定位面临场景复杂、目标小、尺度变化大等问题，单一模型难以同时兼顾准确性与稳定性，因此需要利用不同模型的互补能力来增强定位效果。
AI.method: 提出两条定位精炼管线：顺序式定位精炼（先用RemoteSAM获取初始目标区域，再用SAM3进行细化）和聚类感知定位精炼（结合聚类信息进行更有针对性的分割优化）；同时设计基于六个不同定位管线的多数投票集成策略，以融合多模型优势。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提两种管线及集成方法均优于单一模型，在遥感视觉定位任务上获得了更高的定位准确率、更好的空间一致性和更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究说明，在遥感视觉定位中，将专用模型与通用分割模型进行级联/协同，并辅以多模型投票集成，可以有效缓解复杂场景下的定位困难，显著提升结果可靠性。

title: HiERO-StepG @ Ego4D Step Grounding Challenge: hierarchical activity understanding enables zero-shot step grounding
comment: Technical report for the Ego4D Goal Step - Step Grounding challenge at CVPR 2026, derived from arXiv:2505.12911
summary: Procedural activities follow well-defined structures: whether we consider a cooking recipe or a mechanic repairing a car, these activities naturally decompose in a hierarchy of steps and sub-steps. Traditional approaches for step grounding require extensive annotations and scale poorly. Instead, we argue that such hierarchical structure can emerge naturally from uncurated videos of human activities through recurring patterns of co-occurring actions and activities. Our approach builds on HiERO, a weakly-supervised representation learning approach that maps close in the feature space actions that are functionally related to each other, leveraging only fine-grained action-level narrations. In this feature space, procedure steps can be detected by a simple clustering, with no additional task-specific fine-tuning. For the Ego4D Step Grounding challenge, we augment this approach by ensuring fine and coarse level agreement in step assignments, enforcing strict temporal monotonicity of the grounded steps and post-processing the detected steps to reduce the impact of noisy predictions. We call this approach HiERO-StepG and it achieves 56.27 % on the R@1 (IoU = 0.3) metric on the global leaderboard at submission time, ranking second while being completely zero-shot and not requiring procedure-specific annotations. Project page: https://github.com/andreazenotto/HiERO-StepG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiERO-StepG，一种面向步骤定位的零样本方法，利用弱监督表征学习从未整理的人类活动视频中自动发现层级化流程结构，并通过聚类直接检测步骤，无需特定任务标注。
AI.motivation: 传统步骤定位方法依赖大量人工标注，成本高且难以扩展。作者希望利用视频中自然存在的重复动作模式和功能相关性，让流程步骤结构在特征空间中自发显现，从而减少对流程级标注的依赖。
AI.method: 方法基于HiERO：仅使用细粒度动作级叙述进行弱监督表示学习，将功能相关的动作映射到特征空间中的相近位置。随后通过简单聚类识别流程步骤，不做额外任务微调。针对Ego4D Step Grounding任务，进一步加入粗细粒度步骤分配一致性约束、严格时间单调性约束，并用后处理降低噪声预测的影响。
AI.result: 在Ego4D Step Grounding挑战中，该方法在提交时取得R@1（IoU=0.3）56.27%的成绩，全球排行榜排名第二，同时保持完全零样本且不依赖流程特定标注。
AI.conclusion: HiERO-StepG表明，借助弱监督表征学习与聚类，流程步骤的层级结构可以从非精标视频中有效挖掘出来。该方法在减少标注成本的同时保持了较强性能，证明了零样本步骤定位的可行性。

title: Probing Collision Grounding in Vision-Language Models for Safe Human-Robot Collaboration
summary: Safe human--robot collaboration requires more than visual description: a monitor must determine whether the robot body is safely separated, already colliding with the scene or a person, or about to collide. We call this capability collision grounding: binding visual observations to robot body geometry, camera viewpoint, scene layout, human proximity, and temporal motion in order to infer present and imminent contact. We introduce TouchSafeBench, a physics-grounded benchmark for evaluating collision grounding in vision-language models (VLMs). Built in Habitat~3.0, TouchSafeBench contains 2,940 simulated indoor co-presence episodes across social navigation and social rearrangement, with synchronized multi-view RGB-D observations, top-down trajectory maps, calibrated camera metadata, and simulator-derived contact labels. We study two deployment-facing tasks: classifying the current safety state and warning about imminent collision before contact. Across three frontier or robotics-oriented VLMs and nine visual representations, current models remain far from reliable: the best average Macro-F1 stays below 50\%, explicit depth is not automatically transformed into robot-body collision evidence, and robot--scene contact is consistently harder than human-contact risk. TouchSafeBench reveals a central limitation of embodied VLMs: visual fluency does not imply physical accountability. Reliable robot safety monitors will need representations that explicitly bind viewpoint, robot morphology, metric geometry, and future collision. We will release the benchmark upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向机器人安全监控的物理约束基准TouchSafeBench，用于评估视觉语言模型是否能判断机器人当前是否接触障碍物/人员，以及是否即将发生碰撞。实验表明，现有模型在该任务上表现较弱，最高平均Macro-F1仍低于50%，说明“看得懂图像”并不等于“能做物理安全判断”。
AI.motivation: 人机协作场景中，安全监控不能只依赖视觉描述，还必须判断机器人本体与场景、人员之间的实际接触状态及其即将发生的碰撞风险。现有视觉语言模型虽有较强视觉理解能力，但缺乏将视角、机器人形态、几何位置和运动趋势绑定到物理接触判断中的能力，因此需要专门评测其“碰撞定位/碰撞 grounding”能力。
AI.method: 作者在Habitat 3.0中构建了TouchSafeBench，包含2940个室内共存仿真片段，覆盖社交导航和社交整理两类任务，提供多视角RGB-D观测、俯视轨迹图、相机标定信息以及由模拟器生成的接触标签。基准设置了两个任务：一是判断当前安全状态，二是在接触前预测即将发生的碰撞。随后对三种前沿或机器人导向的视觉语言模型，以及九种视觉表示进行评测。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，当前模型整体仍不可靠：最佳平均Macro-F1低于50%；显式深度信息并不会自动转化为机器人本体碰撞证据；并且机器人与场景发生接触的判定比人类接触风险的判定更困难。
AI.conclusion: TouchSafeBench揭示了具身视觉语言模型的关键短板：视觉理解能力并不能直接推出物理安全判断能力。要构建可靠的机器人安全监控系统，模型需要显式利用视角、机器人形态、度量几何和未来碰撞等信息进行绑定推理。

title: GUI-C$^2$: Coarse-to-Fine GUI Grounding via Difficulty-Aware Reinforcement Learning
summary: Existing agentic reinforcement learning methods for GUI grounding have limitations at two levels. At the data level, current approaches typically treat all training samples equally, although their training value to the baseline model varies with difficulty. Overlooking this can greatly reduce training efficiency or even cause collapse. At the strategy level, existing frameworks struggle to balance the trade-off between cropping larger regions for sufficient context and smaller ones for reduced redundancy, a tension inherent to tool-augmented grounding agents. In addition, overly complex decision-making is difficult for small-parameter models and significantly increases inference time. To address these issues, at the data level, we propose GUI-D, a data mining and difficulty scoring pipeline that identifies the training-worthy samples by proper testing and assigns difficulty scores to guide subsequent training weights. At the strategy level, we propose GUI-C$^2$, which employs an area-gated coarse-to-fine refinement mechanism that progressively narrows the visual field via model-internal uncertainty signals, adaptively reserving context for large targets while amplifying precision for small ones, reinforced by improvement-aware stage rewards that ensure each refinement genuinely advances grounding. Meanwhile, we simplify the decision-making process to greatly reduce additional inference time. Finally, extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. The code and data will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一套面向GUI定位的分层改进方案：在数据层面通过样本挖掘与难度评分提升训练效率，在策略层面通过由粗到细的区域细化机制平衡上下文与精度，并简化决策过程以降低推理开销，实验结果表明整体性能达到当前最优。
AI.motivation: 现有面向GUI定位的强化学习方法存在两个核心问题：一是训练样本被等同对待，忽略不同样本对模型训练价值的差异，容易降低效率甚至引发训练不稳定；二是工具增强型定位策略难以兼顾大区域上下文与小区域精度之间的权衡，同时复杂决策对小参数模型不友好且推理耗时高。
AI.method: 作者提出两部分方法：其一是GUI-D，一套数据挖掘与难度评分流程，通过适当测试筛选出更有训练价值的样本，并为样本分配难度分数，用于指导后续训练权重；其二是GUI-C^2，采用基于区域门控的粗到细细化机制，利用模型内部不确定性信号逐步缩小视觉范围，在大目标场景保留更多上下文、在小目标场景提升定位精度，并结合“改进感知”的阶段奖励，确保每次细化都真正推动定位结果提升，同时简化决策流程以减少额外推理时间。
AI.result: 大量实验显示，该方法在GUI grounding任务上取得了当前最优性能，并在训练效率、定位精度与推理开销之间实现了更好的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了“数据价值感知 + 粗到细策略优化”的联合设计对GUI定位有效：前者提升训练质量，后者缓解上下文-精度冲突并降低计算成本，整体上增强了强化学习式GUI grounding的实用性与性能。

title: Annotations Are Not All You Need: A Cross-modal Knowledge Transfer Network for Unsupervised Temporal Sentence Grounding
summary: This paper addresses the task of temporal sentence grounding (TSG). Although many respectable works have made decent achievements in this important topic, they severely rely on massive expensive video-query paired annotations, which require a tremendous amount of human effort to collect in real-world applications. To this end, in this paper, we target a more practical but challenging TSG setting: unsupervised temporal sentence grounding, where both paired video-query and segment boundary annotations are unavailable during the network training. Considering that some other cross-modal tasks provide many easily available yet cheap labels, we tend to collect and transfer their simple cross-modal alignment knowledge into our complex scenarios: 1) We first explore the entity-aware object-guided appearance knowledge from the paired Image-Noun task, and adapt them into each independent video frame; 2) Then, we extract the event-aware action representation from the paired Video-Verb task, and further refine the action representation into more practical but complicated real-world cases by a newly proposed copy-paste approach; 3) By modulating and transferring both appearance and action knowledge into our challenging unsupervised task, our model can directly utilize this general knowledge to correlate videos and queries, and accurately retrieve the relevant segment without training. Extensive experiments on two challenging datasets (ActivityNet Captions and Charades-STA) show our effectiveness, outperforming existing unsupervised methods and even competitively beating supervised works.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于无监督时间句子定位（TSG）的跨模态知识迁移方法，在训练阶段不依赖视频-文本配对标注和片段边界标注，通过从其他低成本跨模态任务中迁移外观与动作知识，实现对视频与查询的直接匹配和相关片段检索。
AI.motivation: 现有TSG方法虽然效果较好，但高度依赖昂贵的视频-查询配对标注和边界标注，标注成本高、难以落地。作者希望构建一种更实用的无监督TSG框架，利用更容易获取的辅助任务知识替代大量人工标注。
AI.method: 方法核心是跨任务知识迁移：1）从Image-Noun配对任务中提取实体感知、目标引导的外观知识，并适配到单帧视频表示；2）从Video-Verb配对任务中提取事件感知的动作表示，并通过新提出的copy-paste方式增强其对真实复杂场景的适应性；3）将外观知识与动作知识共同调制并迁移到无监督TSG中，使模型无需监督训练即可关联视频与查询并定位相关片段。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet Captions和Charades-STA两个数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于现有无监督方法，并且在部分指标上可与监督方法竞争。
AI.conclusion: 该研究说明，借助来自低成本跨模态任务的通用对齐知识，可以显著缓解TSG对昂贵标注的依赖，为无监督时间句子定位提供了一条有效且更实用的技术路线。

title: GMOS: Grounding Moving Object Segmentation in 3D Space and Time
summary: Moving Object Segmentation (MOS) aims to discover, segment, and track objects that move independently of the camera. Current MOS methods, however, exhibit two fundamental limitations: they rely on pre-computed 2D auxiliary modalities such as optical flow or point trajectories that lack 3D geometric information, and they treat motion as a sequence-level attribute, overlooking the instantaneous motion state of each object. We address both by grounding MOS in 3D space and time, and propose GMOS, a framework that operates directly on RGB video to produce 3D-aware, temporally fine-grained segmentation of multiple moving objects, alongside a foreground--background variant GMOS-S for faster deployment. To support training and evaluation in this regime, we curate GMOS-2K, a dataset of 2,210 real-world videos with per-object temporal motion annotations drawn from five established Video Object Segmentation (VOS) benchmarks, and formalise MOS-I ("I" for instantaneous), a temporally fine-grained evaluation protocol with three complementary metrics. GMOS achieves state-of-the-art results across MOS, MOS-I, and Unsupervised VOS benchmarks, while running significantly faster than prior multi-object MOS methods and supporting online inference for streaming deployment.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了GMOS，一种直接基于RGB视频、具备3D感知和时间细粒度能力的移动物体分割框架，用于发现、分割并跟踪独立于相机运动的多个移动目标，同时提供更快的前景-背景变体GMOS-S。
AI.motivation: 现有移动物体分割方法主要有两点不足：一是依赖光流或点轨迹等预计算的二维辅助模态，缺乏三维几何信息；二是把运动视为序列级属性，忽略了每个目标的瞬时运动状态。作者希望将移动物体分割建立在三维空间与时间建模之上，以获得更准确、更细粒度的结果。
AI.method: 提出GMOS框架，直接输入RGB视频，输出多个移动物体的3D感知、时间细粒度分割；同时提出适合快速部署的GMOS-S前景-背景版本。为训练与评测，构建GMOS-2K数据集，包含2210个真实视频及逐目标的时间运动标注，来源于5个成熟的视频目标分割基准。并形式化MOS-I评测协议，包含3个互补指标，用于衡量瞬时运动分割性能。
AI.result: GMOS在MOS、MOS-I以及无监督VOS基准上都取得了最先进的性能；同时相比以往多目标MOS方法具有显著更快的运行速度，并支持在线推理，适合流式部署。
AI.conclusion: 该工作从3D几何和瞬时运动两个角度推进了移动物体分割研究，提供了新框架、新数据集和新评测协议，证明了直接基于RGB视频进行高效、细粒度多目标运动分割的可行性与优势。

title: Dissociative Identity: Language Model Agents Lack Grounding for Reputation Mechanisms
summary: As autonomous language model agents proliferate, forming an emerging agentic web with real-world consequences, what credibility signals can you use to decide whether to trust an unfamiliar agent in the wild and delegate to it? A natural governance intuition is to extend human identity verification and reputation mechanisms, from "Know Your Customer" and credit scores to "Know Your Agent" regimes. However, we argue that this analogy is fundamentally incomplete. Reputation mechanisms function both as social signals and as corrective feedback that sustain an equilibrium of trustworthy behavior, presuming a persistent identity associated with behavioral continuity, sanction sensitivity, and costly non-fungibility. Yet language model agents are ontologically dissociative: they are essentially an assemblage of mutable modules--foundation models, system prompts, tool-access policies, external memory, and, in some cases, a multi-agent system as a whole--any of which may change agent behavior--with a fluid persona that is also vulnerable to adversarial attack and may not internalize sanctions. Drawing on dissociative identity disorder jurisprudence, this dissociativity leaves agents without grounding for identifiability, predictability, credibility, and rehabilitability--the very properties that reputation mechanisms aim to sustain--thereby collapsing trust. We argue that identity-based, ex post, regulative, sanction-based governance, such as reputation, is structurally inapplicable to dissociative agents, and we suggest a shift to observability-based, ex ante, constitutive, protocol-based behavioral harnesses.

AI.tldr: 本文认为，将人类身份验证和声誉机制直接套用于语言模型代理并不成立，因为这类代理的行为由多个可变组件共同塑造，缺乏稳定、可持续的身份连续性，因此传统“先识别、后追责”的治理逻辑难以生效。
AI.motivation: 随着自主语言模型代理在现实场景中增多，作者关心一个核心问题：面对陌生代理时，应该依据哪些可信信号决定是否委托其执行任务。
AI.method: 作者采用规范性与概念分析方法，将人类身份治理中的声誉机制与语言模型代理的结构特征进行对比，并借鉴“解离”相关法理讨论，分析代理在可识别性、可预测性、可追责性和可修复性上的不足。
AI.result: 作者指出，声誉机制依赖于稳定身份、行为连续性、对制裁的敏感性以及不可轻易替代性，但语言模型代理由基础模型、系统提示、工具权限、外部记忆等可变模块构成，且可被攻击或重构，因此不具备声誉机制所需的基础条件。
AI.conclusion: 结论是，基于身份、事后规制和制裁的治理方式不适用于这类“解离式”代理，治理重点应转向可观测性、事前约束、构成性规则与协议式行为控制。

title: DGSG-Mind: Dynamic 3D Gaussian Scene Graphs for Long-Term Scene Understanding and Grounding
summary: Integrating open-vocabulary semantic information into dynamic 3D scene representations is essential for long-term embodied scene understanding. However, existing methods often suffer from fragile instance association due to incomplete cross-view cues, while their limited ability to handle object-level topological changes restricts long-term robotic task execution. Moreover, current 3D scene understanding methods either rely on simple feature matching without explicit spatial reasoning or assume offline ground-truth 3D geometry. To address these challenges, we present DGSG-Mind, a hybrid instance-aware 3D Gaussian dynamic scene graph system with an embodied reasoning agent. Our system couples a probabilistic voxel grid with explicit 3D Gaussians to enable robust cross-modal instance fusion and incremental semantic mapping. It handles dynamic changes through Gaussian-based visual relocalization and localized masked refinement guided by geometric-semantic consistency. Built on the instance Gaussian map, DGSG-Mind further constructs a hierarchical scene graph and develops the 3D Gaussian Mind, which integrates structural relations, spatial-semantic information, and visually annotated RoI Gaussian renderings for multimodal reasoning. Extensive experiments show that DGSG-Mind achieves the best zero-shot 3DVG performance among methods operating on self-reconstructed maps, while also delivering strong performance in 3D open-vocabulary semantic segmentation and scene reconstruction. We further deploy DGSG-Mind on real-world robots to demonstrate its target-oriented reasoning and dynamic update capabilities. The project page of DGSG-Mind is available at https://icr-lab.github.io/DGSG-Mind

AI.tldr: 本文提出DGSG-Mind，一种融合实例感知的3D高斯动态场景图系统，用于长时程具身场景理解与目标导向推理，在动态环境中实现更稳健的跨视角实例融合、语义建图和空间关系推理。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇3D场景理解方法普遍存在跨视角线索不完整导致的实例关联脆弱、难以处理物体级拓扑变化、缺乏显式空间推理，以及依赖离线真值几何等问题，限制了长期机器人任务执行。
AI.method: 系统采用概率体素网格与显式3D高斯联合建模，进行鲁棒的跨模态实例融合与增量语义映射；通过基于高斯的视觉重定位和局部掩码细化处理动态变化，并利用几何-语义一致性进行引导；在实例高斯地图基础上构建层次化场景图，进一步提出3D Gaussian Mind，将结构关系、空间-语义信息与带视觉标注的RoI高斯渲染整合到多模态推理中。
AI.result: 实验表明，DGSG-Mind在基于自重建地图的方法中取得了最佳的零样本3D视觉语言导航/指代表现，同时在3D开放词汇语义分割和场景重建上也表现出较强性能；此外，系统已在真实机器人上部署，验证了其面向目标的推理能力与动态更新能力。
AI.conclusion: DGSG-Mind通过将动态3D高斯表示、实例级场景图与多模态具身推理结合起来，提升了开放词汇场景理解在动态环境中的鲁棒性和长期任务适用性，为机器人长期自主感知与推理提供了有效方案。

title: UI-KOBE: Knowledge-Oriented Behavior Exploration for Lightweight Graph-Guided GUI Agents
summary: Recent advances in mobile GUI agents have shown strong potential for automating mobile tasks, but most effective systems still depend on large vision-language models for screenshot understanding and long-horizon planning. Small GUI agents that can be deployed directly on mobile devices are more attractive for practical use, offering lower inference cost and better protection of sensitive on-device information. However, due to limited model capacity, such lightweight agents remain unreliable when planning and executing GUI tasks end-to-end from screenshots alone. We propose Knowledge-Oriented Behavior Exploration (\textbf{UI-KOBE}), a framework that improves lightweight mobile GUI agents with reusable app-specific graph knowledge. UI-KOBE first autonomously explores a mobile application and constructs an app knowledge graph, where nodes represent distinct UI states and edges represent executable transitions. At runtime, a lightweight GUI agent uses the graph as external guidance: given a user task and the current screenshot, it identifies the current graph node and selects among self-loop actions, neighboring transitions, task completion, or fallback free actions associated with that node. By supporting runtime decisions with app-specific graph guidance, UI-KOBE reduces the burden of end-to-end GUI planning and helps lightweight models perform mobile GUI tasks more effectively, offering a practical step toward efficient, interpretable, and privacy-conscious on-device GUI agents.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出UI-KOBE，用应用特定的图知识增强轻量级移动GUI代理，降低仅依赖截图进行端到端规划的难度，从而提升端侧执行移动任务的可靠性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有效果较好的移动GUI代理通常依赖大规模视觉语言模型，推理成本高且不利于本地隐私保护；而轻量级代理虽然更适合部署到移动设备上，但由于模型容量有限，单靠截图进行长程规划和执行不够稳定，因此需要一种可复用的外部知识支持机制。
AI.method: UI-KOBE先自动探索一个移动应用，构建应用知识图谱，其中节点表示不同UI状态，边表示可执行的状态转移；在运行时，轻量级GUI代理结合当前截图与用户任务，定位当前图节点，并在自环动作、邻接转移、任务完成或备用自由动作之间进行选择，以图知识作为外部指导完成决策。
AI.result: 该方法通过在运行时引入应用特定图结构，减少了轻量模型对端到端GUI规划的依赖，使其更容易识别当前状态并选择合适动作，从而提升了移动GUI任务执行的有效性、可解释性和对端侧隐私的友好性。
AI.conclusion: UI-KOBE为轻量级移动GUI代理提供了一条实用路线：先离线构建可复用的应用图知识，再在在线推理时用图辅助决策，兼顾效率、可解释性与隐私保护，适合面向设备端的实际部署。

title: Recovering Policy-Induced Errors: Benchmarking and Trajectory Synthesis for Robust GUI Agents
comment: ICML 2026 Spotlight. 36 pages, 19 figures, includes appendix
summary: While GUI agents have advanced rapidly, they often lack the robustness to recover from their own errors, hindering real-world deployment. To bridge this gap at both the evaluation and data levels, we introduce GUI-RobustEval and propose Robustness-driven Trajectory Synthesis. GUI-RobustEval contains $1,216$ executable test cases that systematically measure error recovery capabilities across a broad and realistic spectrum of error modes. At the data level, RoTS is a scalable synthesis framework that creates $800k$ high-quality data via a tree-based pipeline that proactively discovers diverse error modes and synthesizes corresponding recovery steps. Our two models, RoTS-7B and RoTS-32B, fine-tuned on our dataset, both demonstrate significant gains on GUI-RobustEval and traditional GUI benchmarks. Notably, RoTS-32B achieves state-of-the-art performance on OSWorld, with a $47.4\%$ success rate and a $33.8\%$ All-Pass@4 score, suggesting that improved long-horizon error recovery ability contributes to both robustness and overall performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/RoTS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向GUI智能体错误恢复能力的评测集GUI-RobustEval，以及一个用于生成恢复轨迹数据的RoTS合成框架；基于该数据微调的RoTS-7B和RoTS-32B在鲁棒性评测和传统GUI基准上均有明显提升。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体虽然进展很快，但在执行过程中一旦出错，缺乏有效的自我恢复能力，限制了真实场景中的应用。因此，作者希望同时从评测和数据两个层面补齐“错误恢复”这一关键能力。
AI.method: 在评测层面，构建了GUI-RobustEval，包含1216个可执行测试用例，系统覆盖多种现实中的错误模式；在数据层面，提出RoTS（Robustness-driven Trajectory Synthesis）框架，通过树状流程主动发现多样错误模式，并合成对应的恢复步骤，最终生成约80万条高质量训练数据。基于该数据微调了两个模型：RoTS-7B和RoTS-32B。
AI.result: 实验表明，两个RoTS模型在GUI-RobustEval和传统GUI基准上都取得了显著提升。其中RoTS-32B在OSWorld上达到47.4%的成功率和33.8%的All-Pass@4，刷新了当时的最优表现。
AI.conclusion: 研究说明，提升长程任务中的错误恢复能力不仅能增强GUI智能体的鲁棒性，还能带来整体性能提升；GUI-RobustEval和RoTS框架为后续GUI智能体的评测与训练提供了有价值的基础。

title: STAMP: Training Explicit Memory for Mobile GUI Agents in Controllable and Scalable Virtual Environments
summary: Mobile GUI agents excel at immediate reactive control but frequently fail in realistic, long-horizon tasks that require memory. This failure stems from a fundamental conflict between limited context windows and token-heavy screenshots. To save the limited context, agents must progressively discard older visual history, permanently losing crucial transient information. Furthermore, existing action-centric datasets fail to teach agents what or when to explicitly memorize, and augmenting static real-world data is prohibitively expensive and lacks interactive verification. To resolve this, we present STAMP, a framework that trains explicit memory in mobile agents through controllable virtual environments, where deterministic memory variables are programmatically injected into synthesized tasks to control what must be memorized, when it should be encoded, and when it must later be retrieved, thereby producing verifiable supervised data at scale and enabling online reinforcement learning through environment-driven reward feedback. Evaluated on our newly introduced Memory-World benchmark, the resulting Stamp-GUI agent achieves state-of-the-art performance among GUI-specialized models and sets a new high watermark on our Memory-World benchmark, demonstrating exceptional memory accuracy and task resilience while maintaining strong general mobile navigation capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出STAMP框架，通过可控虚拟环境为移动端GUI智能体显式训练记忆能力，缓解长时任务中因上下文窗口受限而导致的历史信息丢失问题，并在新基准Memory-World上取得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 移动GUI智能体擅长即时反应式操作，但在需要跨长时间跨度记忆的真实任务中表现较差。根本原因是上下文窗口有限，而截图又极其占用token，导致智能体必须不断丢弃早期视觉历史，从而失去关键的短暂信息。现有以动作为中心的数据集也无法教会模型何时、什么内容需要记忆，静态真实数据的扩增成本高且缺乏可交互验证。
AI.method: STAMP通过可控虚拟环境训练显式记忆：在合成任务中以程序化方式注入确定性的记忆变量，精确控制需要记住的内容、何时编码、何时检索，从而生成可验证的监督数据并支持规模化训练。同时，利用环境驱动的奖励反馈进行在线强化学习，进一步强化记忆策略。
AI.result: 在新提出的Memory-World基准上，Stamp-GUI在GUI专用模型中达到最先进性能，并刷新该基准最高纪录；同时展现出很强的记忆准确率、任务鲁棒性，以及较好的通用移动导航能力。
AI.conclusion: STAMP证明了通过可控环境显式塑造记忆行为是提升移动GUI智能体长时任务能力的有效路径，能够在不牺牲通用导航能力的前提下显著增强记忆与恢复能力。

title: MusTBENCH: Benchmarking and Advancing Temporal Grounding in Music LLMs
summary: Recent Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) have demonstrated promising abilities in understanding musical content. However, whether their responses are grounded in the correct temporal regions of the audio remains underexplored. This limitation is particularly critical for music understanding, where key information often occurs as temporally localized events, such as instrument entries and rhythmic transitions. To address this gap, we introduce MusTBENCH, a music-expert-validated benchmark designed to evaluate temporal grounding in LALMs through five temporally grounded question-answering tasks. To further improve temporal grounding in existing models, we propose MusT, a novel four-stage temporal optimization recipe spanning music encoder adaptation, LLM adaptation, LLM supervised fine-tuning, and RL-based optimization. Experiments on MusTBENCH show that existing LALMs struggle with precise temporal grounding, while MusT brings significant improvements over strong baselines. These results establish temporal grounding as a key missing capability in current LALMs and position MusTBENCH as a challenging benchmark for future research in temporally grounded music understanding.

AI.tldr: 该研究指出现有大型音频-语言模型在音乐理解中存在时间定位不足的问题，并提出了专门的评测基准MusTBENCH与四阶段优化方法MusT，以提升模型对音频中关键时间片段的对齐与回答能力。
AI.motivation: 音乐理解往往依赖于瞬时发生的关键信息，例如乐器进入、节奏变化和结构转折；如果模型不能将回答正确对应到这些时间区域，就会影响可信度与可解释性。因此，作者关注现有LALMs是否真正具备精确的时间定位能力，并希望构建可系统评测和改进该能力的方案。
AI.method: 作者构建了由音乐专家验证的MusTBENCH，用五类具有时间约束的问答任务评估时间定位能力；同时提出MusT四阶段优化流程，包括音乐编码器适配、LLM适配、LLM监督微调以及基于强化学习的优化，用于增强模型的时间对齐表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有LALMs在精确时间定位方面表现较弱；相比强基线，MusT能够带来显著提升。MusTBENCH也显示出较高挑战性，能够有效区分不同模型在时间性音乐理解上的能力差异。
AI.conclusion: 时间定位是当前大型音频-语言模型在音乐理解中的关键缺失能力。MusTBENCH为后续研究提供了有价值的评测标准，而MusT则证明了通过分阶段优化可以有效增强模型的时间 grounded 能力。

title: MaskClaw: Edge-Side Personalized Privacy Arbitration for GUI Agents with Behavior-Driven Skill Evolution
comment: Preprint. Submitted to EMNLP 2026. 21 pages, including appendices; 5 figures Under review. Yanqiu Zhao and Dongying Zheng contributed equally to this work
summary: GUI agents rely on screenshots to infer intent and operate across applications, but these screenshots often contain private messages, medical records, payment credentials, and workplace-specific workflows. Privacy decisions in this setting depend on task, recipient, application state, and user role, yet static PII detectors miss these boundaries and cloud-side VLM reasoning can upload the raw screen before deciding what should be protected. We present MaskClaw, an edge-side privacy arbitrator for GUI agents. MaskClaw extracts local visual evidence, retrieves user- and task-specific policy memory, and decides Allow, Mask, or Ask before raw screenshots leave a trusted user- or organization-controlled environment. In five designed skill-evolution scenarios, it turns corrections, cancellations, and edits into reusable privacy skills checked by a sandbox gate. We introduce P-GUI-Evo, a benchmark built from real UI patterns, reconstructed HTML screens, and sanitized labels. Experiments show that pattern matching, cloud reasoning, and routing alone tend to over-confirm, over-mask, or expose raw screenshots under the same protocol. The artifact is available at https://github.com/Theodora-Y/MaskClaw.

AI.tldr: 该摘要提出了一个面向GUI智能体的边缘侧隐私仲裁器MaskClaw，在截图离开受信任环境前，根据任务、用户角色、应用状态和策略记忆做出允许、遮罩或询问的决策，以减少原始屏幕泄露风险。
AI.motivation: GUI智能体依赖截图理解界面并跨应用操作，但截图中常包含私密消息、医疗记录、支付凭据和组织内部流程；现有静态检测难以处理上下文边界，而云端视觉语言模型在决策前可能已经上传原始屏幕，带来隐私泄露风险。
AI.method: MaskClaw在本地提取视觉证据，结合用户与任务相关的策略记忆进行推理，在原始截图离开受信任环境之前输出允许、遮罩或询问三类决策；同时通过五种技能演化场景将纠正、取消和编辑转化为可复用的隐私技能，并由沙箱门控验证。作者还构建了P-GUI-Evo基准，来源于真实界面模式、重建HTML屏幕和已脱敏标签。
AI.result: 实验表明，在相同协议下，模式匹配、云端推理和路由方法分别容易出现过度确认、过度遮罩或直接暴露原始截图的问题；MaskClaw通过本地决策与策略记忆机制改善了这些缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，GUI场景中的隐私保护需要结合任务上下文和策略演化的边缘侧决策机制，而非仅依赖静态PII检测或云端统一推理；MaskClaw和P-GUI-Evo为此提供了可复现的方案与评测资源。

title: GUI-CIDER: Mid-training GUI Agents via Causal Internalization and Density-aware Exemplar Reselection
summary: Despite the rapid progress of multimodal large language models in building Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents, their real-world task completion is fundamentally bottlenecked by a lack of world knowledge about GUI operations. Existing solutions typically rely on expensive multi-agent scaffolding or conventional post-training paradigms, such as Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). However, post-training only allows agents to implicitly absorb world knowledge through action annotations or reward signals, leading to inefficient trajectory memorization rather than genuine comprehension. Therefore, an approach that enables explicit learning of this knowledge is imperative. To this end, we propose GUI-CIDER, a mid-training method that explicitly internalizes GUI world knowledge through Causal Internalization and Density-aware Exemplar Reselection. GUI-CIDER operates in three stages: (1) data synthesis, which distills static planning and dynamic causal knowledge from GUI trajectories into text; (2) exemplar reselection, which filters the corpus by rewarding causal structures and penalizing semantic redundancy; and (3) mid-training, where the refined data is used to embed the acquired knowledge. Extensive experiments on two GUI knowledge benchmarks and three task completion benchmarks demonstrate that GUI-CIDER consistently improves both the agent's understanding of GUI operations and its task success rates.The codes are available at https://github.com/Wuzheng02/GUI-CIDER.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出GUI-CIDER，一种用于GUI智能体的中训练方法，通过显式内化GUI世界知识来提升任务完成能力，而不是仅依赖SFT或RL进行隐式轨迹记忆。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在GUI智能体上的真实任务完成受限于缺乏GUI操作相关的世界知识。传统后训练方法多通过动作标注或奖励信号间接学习，容易导致低效的轨迹记忆，缺少真正的知识理解，因此需要一种能够显式学习GUI知识的方法。
AI.method: GUI-CIDER包含三个阶段：1）数据合成，将GUI轨迹中的静态规划知识和动态因果知识蒸馏为文本；2）示例重选，通过奖励因果结构并惩罚语义冗余来筛选语料；3）中训练，使用精炼后的数据将获得的知识嵌入模型中。该方法强调因果内化和密度感知的示例重选。
AI.result: 在两个GUI知识基准和三个任务完成基准上，GUI-CIDER都表现出稳定提升，既增强了智能体对GUI操作的理解，也提高了任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: GUI-CIDER证明了通过中训练显式内化GUI世界知识是一条有效路径，相比传统后训练范式更有利于获得可泛化的GUI操作理解与更高的实际任务完成性能。

title: SSR3D-LLM: Structured Spatial Reasoning via Latent Steps for Fine-Grained Grounding in Unified 3D-LLMs
summary: 3D object grounding localizes referred objects in a 3D scene from natural language. Unified instance-centric 3D-LLMs aim to solve grounding together with dialog, QA, and captioning, yet many rely on a single pointer-style grounding decision that compresses a relational instruction into one selection. This is brittle for fine-grained queries where multiple same-class candidates must be ruled out by context objects and spatial relations. We propose Structured Spatial Reasoning 3D-LLM (SSR3D-LLM), a structured grounding interface for unified 3D-LLMs. Given fixed Mask3D object proposals, the LLM writes a sequence of latent spatial reasoning steps and memory tokens from the query, and a geometry-aware scorer reads these latent steps in order to refine candidate rankings step by step with step-length masking. The latent steps are learned from standard benchmark target supervision with auxiliary referential-cue supervision during training, while inference uses only the input query and Mask3D proposals.
