Across ReferIt3D, ScanRefer, and Multi3DRef, SSR3D-LLM achieves the strongest results among unified 3D-LLM baselines, with substantial gains over the single-pointer QPG baseline on fine-grained grounding and consistent improvements over prior unified 3D-LLMs, while preserving the default language-task route.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出SSR3D-LLM，一种面向统一3D-LLM的结构化空间推理接口，用多步潜在推理和几何感知打分器替代单次指针式定位，从而提升细粒度3D目标指代与定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有统一实例中心3D-LLM虽然可同时处理定位、对话、问答和描述，但很多方法把关系型指令压缩成一次选择，面对同类候选较多、需要依赖上下文和空间关系排除干扰的任务时不够稳健，因此需要更结构化的推理与定位机制。
AI.method: 在固定的Mask3D候选实例基础上，LLM根据输入查询生成一串潜在空间推理步骤和记忆token；几何感知评分器按顺序读取这些潜在步骤，结合步长掩码逐步细化候选排序。训练时使用标准基准的目标监督，并加入辅助指代线索监督；推理时仅需查询和Mask3D提案，不依赖额外标注。
AI.result: 在ReferIt3D、ScanRefer和Multi3DRef上，SSR3D-LLM相较统一3D-LLM基线取得了最优或最强结果；尤其在细粒度 grounding 上，相比单指针QPG基线有显著提升，同时也持续优于以往统一3D-LLM，并保持了默认语言任务路径不受影响。
AI.conclusion: SSR3D-LLM证明了将3D指代定位从单次决策改为结构化的多步空间推理，能够更有效地处理复杂关系约束下的目标定位，并且可作为统一3D-LLM中的通用 grounding 接口。

title: GUI Agents for Continual Game Generation
summary: Generating a game is not the same as making one that can be played. Despite advances in code generation, existing approaches treat game generation as one-shot translation from prompt to artifact, leaving interaction-level failures undetected. We argue that evaluating and improving game generation requires a player, and study two roles for graphical user interface (GUI) agents in this process: (1) as an objective evaluator, for which we introduce PlaytestArena, a new evaluation environment that pairs 200 browser-based game generation tasks across eight genres with rubrics of expected in-play behaviors, adjudicated by a GUI agent that loads each build in a browser and plays it; and (2) as a subjective playtester, for which we propose Play2Code, where a game agent and a GUI agent operate in a sustained loop with shared memory, turning game generation into a dialogue between coding and playing. Our experiments show that even frontier models struggle to generate playable games directly, while Play2Code achieves a 66.8\% rubric pass-rate, improving over single-pass and agentic-coding baselines by 37.1 and 14.6 points respectively. Further analysis shows that GUI playtester feedback is more traceable than a human report, yet idiosyncratic in ways reminiscent of human testers, establishing game playtesting as a critical testbed for interactive code generation. Our project website is available at https://continual-game-generation.vercel.app/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向游戏生成的评测与改进框架，指出“生成可运行代码”不等于“生成可玩游戏”，并引入GUI代理作为客观评测者与主观试玩者。
AI.motivation: 现有游戏生成方法多把任务视为从提示词到成品的一次性转换，容易忽略交互层面的失败。作者认为，要真正评估并提升游戏生成能力，必须引入“玩家”视角，尤其是能在界面中实际操作的GUI代理。
AI.method: 提出两个角色与对应系统：1）PlaytestArena：一个新的评测环境，包含200个浏览器游戏生成任务，覆盖8种类型，并配有可在游戏中验证的行为准则，由GUI代理在浏览器中加载并试玩后进行裁决；2）Play2Code：一种持续循环的人机/代理协同方式，游戏代理与GUI代理共享记忆，形成“编码—试玩—反馈—再编码”的对话式生成流程。
AI.result: 实验显示，前沿模型直接生成可玩游戏仍然困难；Play2Code达到66.8%的准则通过率，相比单次生成基线提升37.1个百分点，相比具备代理能力的编码基线提升14.6个百分点。进一步分析表明，GUI试玩反馈比人工报告更可追踪，同时又具有类似人工测试者的非一致性特征。
AI.conclusion: 游戏试玩应被视为交互式代码生成的重要测试场景。GUI代理不仅能更客观地评测游戏可玩性，也能作为有效反馈来源，帮助生成更稳定、可玩的游戏。

title: MIRAGE: Context-Aware Prompt Injection against Mobile GUI Agents via User-Generated Content
summary: Mobile graphical user interface (GUI) agents driven by vision-language models (VLMs) perceive the screen as rendered pixels and choose actions from what they see, so they cannot reliably separate trusted interface elements from user-generated content. We present MIRAGE (Mobile Injection of Realistic Adversarial GUI Examples), a pipeline that turns benign mobile screenshots into prompt-injection samples by placing attacker-controlled text into ordinary user-generated content regions, without modifying the agent, the application, or the operating system. MIRAGE operates in three stages: a Localizer identifies user-controllable regions on the screenshot, a Generator synthesises context-aware payloads and renders them in the application's native style, and a Curator moderates realism and balances the samples across applications, region types, and attack intents. A key challenge is that an injected screenshot must stay visually indistinguishable from genuine user content while still diverting the agent; we address this by separating the stages that control reach, realism, and distributional balance. On a 1,111-sample benchmark spanning ten applications and eleven attack intents, all five evaluated VLM agents are vulnerable, with attack success rates of 23%-30%, and MIRAGE scores higher on human realism ratings than the strongest prior attack (3.02 versus 2.52 out of 5). We further find that per-sample realism and attack success are uncorrelated, so visual-quality filtering alone cannot reliably defend against this threat.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个面向移动端GUI智能体的注入攻击生成管线MIRAGE，通过把攻击文本嵌入普通用户生成内容区域，在不修改模型、应用或系统的前提下，构造逼真的恶意截图来诱导VLM智能体做出错误操作。
AI.motivation: 移动端GUI智能体依赖视觉输入做决策，难以区分可信界面元素与用户生成内容，因此容易受到界面注入类攻击。作者希望系统化生成真实感更强、覆盖更广的攻击样本，以评估并暴露这类智能体的脆弱性。
AI.method: MIRAGE包含三个阶段：Localizer定位截图中的用户可控区域；Generator结合上下文生成并按应用原生风格渲染攻击载荷；Curator对样本的真实性和分布进行审核与平衡，覆盖不同应用、区域类型和攻击意图。整体上通过分离可达性、逼真度和分布均衡三个控制环节来构造攻击样本。
AI.result: 在包含10个应用、11种攻击意图、共1111个样本的基准上，5个被评估的VLM智能体全部存在漏洞，攻击成功率为23%到30%。在人类真实性评分上，MIRAGE优于最强先前方法，得分为3.02/5，对比基线为2.52/5；同时作者发现单样本真实性与攻击成功率不相关。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，移动GUI中的用户生成内容可成为有效注入载体，且仅依赖视觉质量筛选不足以防御此类攻击。MIRAGE为评估和研究移动端VLM智能体安全性提供了更强的攻击样本生成框架，也提示需要超越单纯外观检测的防护机制。

title: SIGMA: Semantic-Difference Instruction-Grounding Mask Annotator for Text-Driven Image Manipulation Localization
summary: Text-driven image editing has advanced rapidly, but reliably localizing these manipulations requires image manipulation localization (IML) models trained on large pixel-annotated datasets, and there is still no low-cost way to obtain such training data at scale. We observe that these data already exist in disguise: public editing datasets contain millions of structurally identical (original, edited) pairs to IML training samples, lacking only pixel-level masks. Recovering these masks automatically is non-trivial: pixel differencing is overwhelmed by diffusion-induced perturbations across all pixels, and instruction-only grounding localizes only what the prompt describes, missing unintended editor side-effects. We propose SIGMA (Semantic-difference Instruction-Grounding Mask Annotator), which performs semantic-feature differencing in a vision foundation backbone and injects an instruction-derived spatial prior into this visual stream via bidirectional cross-modal refinement, amplifying the difference signal at intended-edit regions when the editor faithfully realizes user intent. SIGMA is trained in two complementary stages: Stage I supervises on inpainting masks; Stage II closes the diffusion-domain shift via VAE-roundtrip noise calibration, EMA self-training, and an edit-noise disentanglement loss. SIGMA outperforms existing automatic mask generators on five benchmarks (+12.20% F1, +11.16% IoU). When applied to public editing corpora, it produces a ~1.1M IML training set that improves six diverse detectors by +18.34% F1 across five datasets, turning previously unused editing data into a model-agnostic supervisory resource for IML. We'll release the full codebase as soon as the paper is accepted.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIGMA，一种用于从图文编辑数据中自动恢复像素级编辑掩码的方法，弥补训练图像操作定位（IML）模型所需标注数据不足的问题，并进一步将公开编辑数据转化为可用于训练检测器的大规模监督资源。
AI.motivation: 图像文本编辑发展迅速，但可靠定位编辑区域通常需要大量像素级标注数据，而这类数据获取成本高。公开编辑数据中其实已经存在大量（原图，编辑图）配对样本，只缺少掩码标注；然而直接做像素差分会被扩散模型带来的全局扰动干扰，仅靠指令对齐又会遗漏编辑器带来的非显式副作用，因此需要一种更稳健的自动掩码恢复方法。
AI.method: 提出SIGMA（Semantic-difference Instruction-Grounding Mask Annotator），核心思路是在视觉基础模型中进行语义特征差分，并将由编辑指令提取的空间先验通过双向跨模态细化注入到视觉流中，从而放大目标编辑区域的差异信号。训练上分两阶段：第一阶段使用修复任务的掩码进行监督；第二阶段通过VAE往返噪声校准、EMA自训练和编辑噪声解耦损失，缩小扩散域偏移。
AI.result: 在五个基准上，SIGMA相比现有自动掩码生成方法取得更好效果，F1提升12.20%，IoU提升11.16%。将其应用于公开编辑语料后，构建出约110万规模的IML训练集，使六种不同检测器在五个数据集上的平均F1提升18.34%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明公开编辑数据可以被自动转化为高质量的像素级监督信号，SIGMA不仅提升了编辑区域定位能力，也为图像操作定位任务提供了可扩展、模型无关的训练数据来源。

title: AndroidDaily: A Verifiable Benchmark for Mobile GUI Agents on Real-World Closed-Source Applications
summary: The rapid development of GUI foundation models and mobile GUI agents has spurred numerous evaluation benchmarks, yet most rely on simulated environments or open-source applications, leaving real-world closed-source applications largely unevaluated. The core difficulty is that closed-source applications do not expose internal states, making traditional automatic verification inapplicable. To bridge this gap, we introduce AndroidDaily, a large-scale benchmark comprising 350 realistic daily-use tasks across 94 high-frequency Android applications spanning transportation, shopping, local services, entertainment, content creation, social media, and everyday utilities. To enable automatic and verifiable assessment in these opaque environments, we propose Guideline-grounded Reviewer for Automatic Diagnostic Evaluation (GRADE), a process-aware evaluator built on a three-tiered system of observable external guidelines: operational obligations, output quality, and negative constraints. GRADE tracks the agent's visual trajectory against these criteria and produces step-level diagnostic judgments, turning long-horizon, open-ended mobile interactions into verifiable evaluation without relying on hidden internal states. Experiments show that GRADE achieves 87.37\% agreement with human evaluators. The strongest model reaches a 62.0\% success rate on AndroidDaily, highlighting a substantial gap between current reasoning capabilities and practical execution in realistic mobile workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AndroidDaily，一个面向真实安卓闭源应用的移动GUI评测基准；同时提出GRADE，一种基于外部可观测准则的自动诊断评估方法，用于在无法访问内部状态的场景下实现可验证评测。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI基础模型和移动GUI代理的评测多依赖模拟环境或开源应用，难以覆盖真实世界中的闭源应用；而闭源应用不暴露内部状态，导致传统自动验证方法失效，因此需要一种适用于开放式、长程、不可见环境的评测框架。
AI.method: 构建AndroidDaily，包含350个日常任务，覆盖94个高频安卓应用；提出GRADE评估器，采用三层外部可观测准则：操作义务、输出质量、负面约束，并根据代理的视觉轨迹进行逐步、过程化诊断判断，从而实现无需内部状态的自动评测。
AI.result: 实验表明，GRADE与人工评估者的一致率达到87.37%；在AndroidDaily上，表现最强的模型成功率为62.0%，说明当前模型在真实移动工作流中的执行能力仍有明显不足。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了真实闭源安卓应用评测的空白，并证明基于外部准则的过程化自动评测是可行的；同时，基准结果表明现阶段GUI代理在复杂真实任务中的实际执行仍存在较大提升空间。

title: Reading or Guessing? Visual Grounding Failures of Vision-Language Models for OCR in Ancient Greek Editions
summary: Recent work has shown that Vision-Language Models (VLMs) used for optical character recognition (OCR) can generate plausible but visually unsupported text, suggesting reliance on language priors. Comparing open-weight VLMs with traditional OCR baselines on low-resource Ancient Greek critical editions, we show that VLM errors often remain fluent even when wrong, producing plausible Greek substitutions where traditional engines produce local recognition noise. To analyze visual evidence during decoding, we introduce controlled image perturbations and token-level grounding measures based on conditional versus image-free decoding distributions. Under character-level perturbations, VLMs diverge sharply from the perturbed ground truth while traditional OCR remains comparatively faithful; however, token-level analysis shows that prior reliance is model-specific: in an OCR-specialist model, fluent lexical errors are produced with little reliance on the image, whereas general-purpose VLMs remain conditioned on the visual input even when wrong. Decode-time interventions fail to reliably restore grounding, while post-OCR language-model correction improves several systems only by repairing text after generation. Our results extend prior evidence of OCR language-prior reliance to low-resource historical documents and a broader set of models, showing that fluent output is not necessarily visually grounded and motivating interpretability-driven evaluation beyond aggregate accuracy.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了开放权重视觉语言模型与传统OCR在低资源古希腊文献上的表现，发现VLM虽然输出更流畅，但常生成视觉上缺乏依据的“似是而非”文本，且不同模型对图像信息的依赖程度存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 作者希望检验OCR类视觉语言模型是否真正依赖图像证据，而不是主要依靠语言先验生成结果，尤其是在低资源、历史文献这类困难场景中。
AI.method: 通过与传统OCR基线比较，作者在古希腊校勘本上分析错误类型；进一步引入受控图像扰动，并使用基于“有图像条件”与“无图像条件”解码分布差异的词元级对齐/锚定指标，评估解码时图像证据的作用；同时考察解码时干预与OCR后语言模型纠错的效果。
AI.result: 结果显示：在字符级扰动下，VLM往往偏离被扰动后的真实文本，而传统OCR仍更接近局部识别噪声；词元级分析表明，OCR专用模型更容易产生流畅但主要依赖语言先验的词汇错误，而通用VLM即使答错，仍通常受图像条件约束。解码时干预难以稳定恢复图像锚定，而后处理语言模型纠错能改善部分系统，但主要是对生成后的文本进行修补。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，流畅输出并不等于视觉上有依据，且OCR中的语言先验依赖具有模型差异性。作者建议超越单纯准确率指标，采用更强调可解释性与视觉锚定的评估方法，尤其适用于低资源历史文献OCR场景。

title: LocateAnything: Fast and High-Quality Vision-Language Grounding with Parallel Box Decoding
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) commonly formulate visual grounding and detection as a coordinate-token generation problem, serializing each 2D box into multiple 1D tokens that are learned and decoded largely independently. This token-by-token decoding mismatches the coupled structure of box geometry and creates a practical inference bottleneck due to strictly sequential generation. We introduce LocateAnything, a unified generative grounding and detection framework based on Parallel Box Decoding (PBD). By decoding geometric elements such as bounding boxes and points as atomic units in a single step, LocateAnything preserves intra-box geometric coherence and unlocks substantial parallelism. We show that PBD improves both decoding throughput and localization accuracy. We further develop a scalable data engine and curate LocateAnything-Data, a large-scale dataset with more than 138 million training samples, substantially increasing data diversity for high-precision localization. Extensive evaluations show that LocateAnything advances the speed-accuracy frontier, achieving significantly higher decoding throughput while improving high-IoU localization quality across diverse benchmarks. The results highlight the complementary benefits of Parallel Box Decoding and large-scale training data in enabling efficient and precise unified visual grounding and detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LocateAnything，将视觉定位与检测统一为生成式框架，并用并行框解码（PBD）把边界框和点作为原子单位一次性解码，以提升几何一致性、推理速度和定位精度；同时构建了超过1.38亿样本的数据集，进一步增强高精度定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM通常把二维框拆成多个一维坐标token逐个生成，这会造成框内几何关系被割裂，并且严格串行解码带来明显的推理瓶颈。因此需要一种既保持几何一致性、又能显著提升解码效率的统一定位与检测方法。
AI.method: 提出LocateAnything统一生成式框架，核心是并行框解码（Parallel Box Decoding, PBD），将边界框和点等几何元素作为原子单元一步并行输出，而不是逐token串行生成；同时设计可扩展的数据引擎，构建LocateAnything-Data大规模训练集，包含超过1.38亿训练样本，用于提升数据多样性和高精度定位能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，PBD同时改善了解码吞吐量和定位精度；在多个基准上，LocateAnything在保持更高解码速度的同时，提升了高IoU条件下的定位质量，并在速度-精度权衡上取得更优表现。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了并行框解码与大规模训练数据具有互补性：前者解决串行生成的效率与几何一致性问题，后者提升复杂场景下的定位泛化与精细度，从而推动统一视觉定位与检测框架在效率和精度上的同步提升。

title: Grounding Text Embeddings in Stakeholder Associations
summary: Text embeddings are widely used to analyse large corpora of complex texts. However, it is unclear whether the embeddings capture the same semantic distances as the human experts using them. Ensuring alignment between embedding representations and human intentions is essential for valid analyses. We present the Stakeholder Grounding Exercise, a method for making expert associations explicit and grounding embedding model results in human understanding. In our primary case study on Danish policy issues, we find that neural text embeddings are substantially less reliable than human experts (19-26 pp gap), and that this misalignment propagates to downstream clustering performance (Spearman $蟻=0.9$ between exercise ranking and cluster quality). A secondary study on US Federal AI use cases replicates the gap (16pp) in English, using a digital protocol and a different community of experts -- demonstrating that the gap is not an artefact of a single instrument or domain. The Stakeholder Grounding Exercise offers a practical method for assessing whether embedding models capture the semantic distinctions that matter most to domain experts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“利益相关者锚定练习”方法，用于把文本嵌入结果与领域专家的语义判断对齐，并验证嵌入是否真正捕捉专家关心的语义差异。
AI.motivation: 文本嵌入常用于分析大规模复杂文本，但其语义距离是否与人类专家的理解一致并不明确。若二者不一致，后续聚类与分析结论可能失真，因此需要一种能显式检验并校准这种对齐关系的方法。
AI.method: 作者提出“利益相关者锚定练习”，将专家对文本的关联判断显式化，并用其评估嵌入模型结果是否符合人类理解。研究包含两个案例：其一是丹麦政策议题的主研究；其二是美国联邦人工智能使用案例的次研究，采用数字化流程和另一组专家，以检验结果的可重复性。
AI.result: 主研究发现，神经文本嵌入的可靠性显著低于人类专家，存在19到26个百分点的差距；这种不一致还会传导到下游聚类性能。练习中的排序结果与聚类质量高度相关（Spearman相关系数为0.9）。次研究在英语场景中也复现了约16个百分点的差距，说明该问题并非单一工具或单一领域导致。
AI.conclusion: 文本嵌入并不一定自动反映领域专家真正关心的语义边界。本文的方法可作为一种实用评估框架，用于判断嵌入模型是否抓住了对特定领域最重要的语义区分，并为后续分析提供更可靠的基础。

title: The Need for an External Observer Formalizing the Sufficiency Gap: A Mathematical Extension of Mixture Identifiability and Contextual Grounding in Sequence Models
summary: We construct a binary mixed-regime process with one deterministic textual regime and one random regime governed by an unobserved latent state. Even an ideal infinite-capacity sequence predictor that exactly recovers the text-only marginal law can become overconfident when the observed prefix is compatible with the wrong latent regime. The resulting entropy difference is not an ordinary optimization error; it is a sufficiency gap caused by marginalization over an unobserved state. We then formalize retrieval, tool use, and external grounding through an auxiliary binary signal with fidelity $纬\in [1/2,1]$. The resulting Bayesian update yields a contextual dominance threshold: a corrective signal reverses the posterior odds induced by the textual history exactly when its fidelity exceeds the text-only posterior weight assigned to the misleading regime. This threshold reduces, but does not generally eliminate, the sufficiency gap; complete closure requires perfect revelation of the relevant latent state or an equivalent verification mechanism. The analysis clarifies why temperature scaling cannot restore missing context, why grounding mechanisms must be both informative and learnably usable by the model, and why autonomous sequence models require structurally decoupled observers or verifiers in high-stakes domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个二元混合机制过程，用来解释序列模型在存在未观测潜在状态时的过度自信问题，并给出一个由辅助信号可信度决定的“上下文主导阈值”。
AI.motivation: 作者想说明：即使一个容量无限、能精确拟合文本边际分布的理想序列预测器，也可能因为只看到了文本而缺少关键潜在状态信息，导致置信度偏高。这种误差不是普通优化误差，而是由对未观测状态边缘化引起的“充分性缺口”。
AI.method: 构造一个包含确定性文本机制和随机机制的二元混合过程，其中随机机制由未观测潜在状态控制；再将检索、工具使用和外部接地抽象为一个带有可信度参数的辅助二元信号，并通过贝叶斯更新分析其对后验赔率的影响，推导出能够翻转误导性后验的上下文主导阈值。
AI.result: 结果表明：当辅助信号的可信度高于文本历史赋予“误导性机制”的后验权重时，它可以逆转文本造成的后验偏置；但这一机制通常只能缓解充分性缺口，不能彻底消除。完全闭合该缺口需要对相关潜在状态的完全揭示，或等价的验证机制。
AI.conclusion: 文章的核心结论是：温度缩放无法弥补缺失上下文；有效的接地机制不仅要有信息量，还必须能被模型可学习地利用；在高风险场景中，自治序列模型应配备与生成过程结构上解耦的观察者或验证器。

title: MedVol-R1: Reward-Driven Evidence Grounding for Volumetric Reasoning Segmentation
summary: Volumetric Reasoning Segmentation (VRS) aims to segment a target region in a 3D medical scan from a free-form clinical query, where the referent is often implicit and requires both medical knowledge and volume-grounded reasoning. Existing methods typically rely on specialized segmentation tokens to connect language with mask decoding, but this coupling collapses the decision process into opaque latent representations, limiting interpretability and generalization to diverse narrative expressions. In this paper, we present MedVol-R1, a reinforcement learning-based framework for VRS that explicitly decouples evidence grounding from volumetric delineation: the LVLM grounds clinical reasoning to a verifiable 2D evidence anchor (key axial slice and 2D bounding boxes), which is then propagated into a coherent 3D mask by a frozen MedSAM2 module. We train MedVol-R1 with cold-start supervised fine-tuning followed by GRPO, guided by a multi-component reward that encourages informative evidence selection, accurate 2D spatial grounding, and cross-slice volumetric coherence, without requiring costly chain-of-thought annotations. Experiments on CT-ORG, AbdomenCT-1K, and KiTS23 from the M3D-Seg benchmark demonstrate that MedVol-R1 consistently outperforms strong baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance, with reinforcement learning providing clear gains over pure supervised fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MedVol-R1，用强化学习把“临床文本推理”和“3D分割”解耦：先由多模态大模型定位可验证的2D证据锚点，再由冻结的MedSAM2扩展为3D掩码，从而提升可解释性与泛化能力，并在多个医学CT分割数据集上取得最优或领先表现。
AI.motivation: 现有体积推理分割方法通常依赖专门的分割token将语言与掩码解码耦合，虽然能完成任务，但决策过程隐藏在黑箱表示中，难以解释，也不利于适配多样化的自然语言临床描述。因此需要一种能显式暴露证据、同时保持3D分割能力的方法。
AI.method: 提出MedVol-R1框架：先通过LVLM将自由形式临床查询中的隐含指代，推理并定位到可验证的2D证据锚点（关键轴向切片与2D框），再将该证据传播到3D体积中生成分割结果。训练上采用冷启动监督微调，再进行GRPO强化学习；奖励由多项组成，分别约束证据选择的信息量、2D空间定位准确性和跨切片体积一致性。整个过程不需要人工链式推理标注，且MedSAM2保持冻结。
AI.result: 在CT-ORG、AbdomenCT-1K和KiTS23等M3D-Seg基准数据集上，MedVol-R1稳定优于强基线，并取得当前最优性能。实验还显示，相比仅进行监督微调，引入强化学习带来了明显增益。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了将医学体积推理分割拆解为“证据 grounding + 体积分割”是有效的：既提升了结果性能，也增强了可解释性与泛化能力。强化学习在该框架中起到了关键作用，能够在无需昂贵推理标注的情况下提升临床查询到3D分割的映射质量。

title: MinhwaNet: Faithful but Insufficient Object Grounding in Korean Folk Painting
summary: Korean folk painting (minhwa) is built from a small vocabulary of auspicious symbols, a tiger for protection, a pair of birds for marital harmony, a peony for wealth, that recur across many of its painted genres. This suggests an obvious computational approach, identify which symbols appear in a painting and read the genre from the inventory. Working with a public corpus that pairs whole paintings, eight-field bilingual curatorial captions, and a separate set of expert object crops, we find that this approach does not work. A model given only a list of which symbols a painting contains predicts the genre far worse than a model that fuses the image with the curatorial text, and forcing the genre representation to be object-grounded actively hurts accuracy. The visual evidence on which the genre prediction rests is nonetheless localized and inspectable. A leakage-safe object evidence map projected from a part-level detector is spatially faithful to where curators isolated symbolic objects and to a patch-based surrogate's own gradient saliency. We name this configuration a faithful-but-insufficient dissociation. The part-level explanation is honest about what the part-level model sees, yet the genre target turns on how symbols are arranged rather than on which ones appear. The same lens separates a content label that survives transfer to held-out source institutions, genre, from a style label that does not, era, a prediction we confirm on two further labels in the corpus. We release the multimodal system, a worked-example reading of one painting's evidence map against its catalogue, and a set of evaluation cautions that recur in long-tailed heritage collections.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现，韩国民画的画种识别并不能仅靠“出现了哪些吉祥符号”来完成；更关键的是符号的空间排列与组合方式。尽管模型的判别依据可以被定位并可视化，但把类别表示强行绑定到对象级证据上反而会降低性能。
AI.motivation: 作者希望验证一种直观的计算思路：民画由少量反复出现的象征性图像构成，因此可通过识别符号清单来推断画种。同时也希望评估这种基于对象的解释是否真的足以支撑分类，并区分“内容类”与“风格类”标签在跨来源数据中的可迁移性。
AI.method: 研究使用一个公开语料库，其中包含整幅画、八字段双语策展说明，以及独立的专家对象裁剪标注。作者比较了多种模型：仅使用符号列表的模型、融合图像与策展文本的多模态模型，以及将类别表征强制对象对齐的模型；同时构建了从部件级检测器投影得到的、避免信息泄漏的对象证据图，并与补丁级替代模型的梯度显著性进行对照。
AI.result: 仅给出符号是否出现的模型效果明显不如图像与文本融合模型；把类别表示强制做对象级 grounding 还会降低准确率。尽管如此，模型依据的视觉证据是局部化且可检查的，所构建的证据图与策展人标注的符号区域以及梯度显著性都高度一致。作者进一步发现，画种这一内容标签在留出源机构数据上仍能稳定迁移，而时代这一风格标签则不稳定；这一现象也在语料库中的另外两个标签上得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提出“忠实但不足的分离”这一现象：对象级解释能够忠实反映模型看到了什么，但画种判别真正依赖的是符号如何组织与布局，而不是单纯有哪些符号。研究因此提醒，在长尾文化遗产数据中，基于对象清单的解释和评估可能不够，应重视空间关系、跨机构泛化与评价陷阱。

title: MobileExplorer: Accelerating On-Device Inference for Mobile GUI Agents via Online Exploration
summary: Mobile graphical user interface (GUI) agents enable AI models to autonomously operate smartphones on behalf of users. However, most existing systems focus primarily on optimizing task accuracy and rely on cloud-hosted models for inference, which introduces privacy concerns and network-dependent latency. As a result, fully on-device deployment of mobile GUI agents remains underexplored. We propose MobileExplorer, a new framework that accelerates on-device inference for vision-based mobile GUI agents via online exploration. The key idea is to exploit the long per-step reasoning time of vision-language models (VLMs) by performing lightweight, parallel exploration of UI elements. During model inference, the agent proactively probes semantically relevant UI elements and records these exploration traces as structured memory. To ensure reliable execution in live mobile environments, we design a two-level rollback mechanism that robustly restores the initial UI state when a fast but naive backtracking strategy fails. The collected exploration traces are then summarized into concise contextual hints and injected into the prompt to enhance the subsequent reasoning step. We evaluate MobileExplorer on multiple off-the-shelf devices using the AndroidWorld benchmark, as well as newly designed, more complex tasks and dynamic on-device environments. MobileExplorer reduces the average number of reasoning steps and end-to-end latency by 23\%, while maintaining or improving task success rates by up to 5\%. A video demonstration of MobileExplorer performance in the real world is available at https://youtu.be/thK7MJmdlvM .

AI.tldr: 本文提出MobileExplorer，用在线探索机制加速完全端侧部署的移动GUI智能体，在尽量不损失任务成功率的前提下减少推理步数与端到端延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有移动GUI智能体多依赖云端模型，存在隐私风险和网络延迟；而端侧部署又常因视觉语言模型推理耗时较长而效率较低，因此需要一种适用于本地设备的加速框架。
AI.method: MobileExplorer利用视觉语言模型单步推理时间较长的特点，在推理过程中并行、轻量地探索与任务语义相关的界面元素，并将探索轨迹记录为结构化记忆；同时设计两级回滚机制，在快速回退失败时可靠恢复初始界面状态；最后把探索轨迹总结为简洁上下文提示并注入后续提示词中，增强下一步推理。
AI.result: 在AndroidWorld基准、多台现成设备以及更复杂的任务和动态端侧环境上评测显示，MobileExplorer将平均推理步数和端到端延迟降低了23%，同时任务成功率最高提升了5%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了在线探索结合结构化记忆与回滚机制，能够有效提升端侧移动GUI智能体的运行效率，并在实际设备环境中保持或提升任务完成能力。

title: AnchorDiff: Training-Free Concept Grounding for MM-DiTs via Anchor-Based Graph Propagation
summary: Multi-Modal Diffusion Transformers (MM-DiTs) encode rich representations for training-free concept grounding, but existing attention-based methods often produce overlapping activations on visually confusable concepts, a failure mode we call concept leakage, where target responses spill over to non-target objects. To address this issue, we propose AnchorDiff, a training-free grounding method that decouples semantic localization from structural refinement. AnchorDiff selects a high-confidence anchor from concept-to-image attention map and propagates it as a one-hot seed over a hybrid graph derived from image-to-image self-attention. The graph uses output-space similarity for dense within-object propagation and a row-wise attention gate to suppress cross-object connections. Additionally, we introduce the Multi-Concept Confusion Dataset, which contains images with multiple visually similar concepts and separate masks, enabling explicit evaluation of concept leakage. Experiments show that AnchorDiff achieves strong grounding performance on ImageNet-Segmentation and PascalVOC, while substantially reducing concept leakage on our Multi-Concept Confusion Dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的概念定位方法AnchorDiff，用于缓解多模态扩散Transformer在视觉可混淆概念上的“概念泄漏”问题，并构建了用于显式评估该问题的数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有基于注意力的训练自由定位方法，在多个外观相近目标共存时，容易把目标响应扩散到非目标区域，导致定位不准。作者希望在不额外训练的前提下，提高语义定位的准确性并减少跨对象误激活。
AI.method: AnchorDiff将流程拆分为语义定位与结构细化两步：先从概念到图像的注意力图中选取高置信度锚点，再将其作为one-hot种子在由图像到图像自注意力构建的混合图上进行传播。该图利用输出空间相似性增强同一对象内部的密集传播，并通过逐行注意力门控抑制跨对象连接，从而减少概念泄漏。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-Segmentation和PascalVOC上，AnchorDiff取得了较强的定位性能；在新提出的Multi-Concept Confusion Dataset上，它显著降低了概念泄漏，证明了方法对相似概念干扰的抑制效果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，将高置信锚点选择与受控图传播结合，是提升训练自由概念定位鲁棒性的有效思路；同时，新数据集为评估多概念混淆场景下的泄漏问题提供了更直接的基准。

title: Rethinking Weakly-supervised Video Temporal Grounding From a Game Perspective
summary: This paper addresses the challenging task of weakly-supervised video temporal grounding. Existing approaches are generally based on the moment proposal selection framework that utilizes contrastive learning and reconstruction paradigm for scoring the pre-defined moment proposals. Although they have achieved significant progress, we argue that their current frameworks have overlooked two indispensable issues: 1) Coarse-grained cross-modal learning: previous methods solely capture the global video-level alignment with the query, failing to model the detailed consistency between video frames and query words for accurately grounding the moment boundaries. 2) Complex moment proposals: their performance severely relies on the quality of proposals, which are also time-consuming and complicated for selection. To this end, in this paper, we make the first attempt to tackle this task from a novel game perspective, which effectively learns the uncertain relationship between each vision-language pair with diverse granularity and flexible combination for multi-level cross-modal interaction.Specifically, we creatively model each video frame and query word as game players with multivariate cooperative game theory to learn their contribution to the cross-modal similarity score. By quantifying the trend of frame-word cooperation within a coalition via the game-theoretic interaction, we are able to value all uncertain but possible correspondence between frames and words. Finally, instead of using moment proposals, we utilize the learned query-guided frame-wise scores for better moment localization.Experiments show that our method achieves superior performance on both Charades-STA and ActivityNet Caption datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文针对弱监督视频时序定位，提出一种基于博弈论的多粒度跨模态交互方法，用帧级与词级协作关系替代传统候选片段提议，从而提升边界定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖候选时段提议选择与全局级视频-文本对齐，存在两点不足：一是只建模粗粒度的跨模态一致性，难以准确刻画帧与词之间的细节对应；二是对预定义提议质量依赖强，选择过程复杂且耗时。
AI.method: 将视频中的每一帧和查询中的每个词视为博弈参与者，采用多变量合作博弈理论建模不同粒度下的帧词协作贡献，量化帧-词之间的不确定但可能的对应关系，并据此生成查询引导的帧级得分，最终直接用于时段定位，而不再依赖手工设计的moment proposals。
AI.result: 在Charades-STA和ActivityNet Caption两个数据集上取得了优于现有方法的实验结果，说明该方法在弱监督时序定位任务中具有更强的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过博弈论视角实现了更细粒度、更灵活的跨模态交互，并以帧级打分替代候选提议机制，能够更好地解决弱监督视频时序定位中的对齐粗糙和提议依赖问题。

title: MobileGym: A Verifiable and Highly Parallel Simulation Platform for Mobile GUI Agent Research
summary: We present MobileGym, a browser-hosted, lightweight, fully controllable environment for everyday mobile use, targeting interaction fidelity without replicating proprietary backends. It enables two capabilities previously out of reach for everyday apps: verifiable outcome signals through deterministic state-based judging over structured JSON state, and scalable online RL through low-cost parallel rollouts. The full environment state is captured, configured, forked, and compared as structured JSON, and a single server can host hundreds of parallel instances, with about 400 MB memory per instance and about 3 s cold start. A layered state model and a declarative task-definition framework keep state programmability and task creation practical at scale, and a single programmatic judging mechanism delivers both deterministic evaluation verdicts and dense RL rewards. The accompanying MobileGym-Bench provides 416 parameterized task templates, including 256 test and 160 train templates, over 28 apps, with deterministic judges and a structured AnswerSheet protocol that avoids free-text matching failures. In a Sim-to-Real case study, GRPO on Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct gains +12.8 percentage points on the 256-task test set, and on a 59-task real-device signal subset, real-device execution retains 95.1% of the simulation-side training gain. Project page: https://mobilegym.github.io.

AI.tldr: MobileGym提出了一个可在浏览器中托管的轻量级、可完全控制的移动应用环境，通过结构化JSON状态实现可验证结果判定，并支持低成本并行强化学习；配套的MobileGym-Bench包含416个任务模板，实验显示其在仿真到真实设备迁移中具有较好效果。
AI.motivation: 该工作旨在解决日常移动应用研究中的两个关键难题：一是难以获得可靠、可验证的任务完成信号，二是难以低成本地进行大规模并行在线强化学习。作者希望在不复制专有后端的前提下，仍能保持较高的交互保真度与可扩展性。
AI.method: 系统采用分层状态模型和声明式任务定义框架，将完整环境状态以结构化JSON进行捕获、配置、分叉与比较；同时引入统一的程序化判定机制，既可输出确定性评测结果，也可提供稠密奖励。平台支持单服务器并行运行数百实例，约每实例400 MB内存、约3秒冷启动。配套基准MobileGym-Bench提供28个应用上的416个参数化任务模板，并通过结构化AnswerSheet协议减少自由文本匹配带来的失败。
AI.result: 实验部分给出两个主要结果：1）GRPO在Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct上训练后，在256个测试任务上提升了12.8个百分点；2）在59个真实设备信号子集上，真实设备执行保留了仿真侧训练增益的95.1%。
AI.conclusion: MobileGym证明了可控、可扩展的移动应用研究环境是可实现的，其基于结构化状态的判定与并行执行机制同时满足了评测可靠性和在线强化学习效率需求。MobileGym-Bench则为后续研究提供了可复用的任务基准与评测协议。

title: EVIDENT: Routing MLLM Adaptation through Entity-Grounded Visual Evidence for Cross-Domain Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Fine-tuning MLLMs for Video Temporal Grounding (VTG) often improves in-domain performance but degrades sharply under domain shift. In this work, we find that this failure is primarily driven not just by unseen query concepts, but by visual domain shift, which prevents the model from coupling its learned temporal localization knowledge with its inherent entity-attention capability. To address this, we introduce EVIDENT, a parameter-efficient adaptation framework that anchors temporal grounding in the inherent entity-attention of pre-trained MLLMs by routing VTG adaptation through explicit visual entity evidence. EVIDENT consists of three components: (i) an Entity Bottleneck Adapter that transforms dense visual tokens into compact entity-level slots, (ii) an Entity-Binding Distillation loss that instills objectness priors into the semantically unstructured MLLM visual space, guiding each slot to bind to a coherent entity, and (iii) an Entity-to-eVidence gating mechanism that leverages the captured entities as evidence, steering the model to localize moments containing query-relevant entities. Together, these components enable VTG fine-tuning to rely on entity-grounded evidence rather than brittle dataset shortcuts. Experiments on cross-domain VTG benchmarks show that EVIDENT consistently improves out-of-domain robustness while preserving competitive in-domain performance with modest parameter overhead. These results suggest that entity-level grounding is an effective inductive bias for generalizable temporal localization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EVIDENT，一种面向视频时间定位（VTG）的参数高效适配框架，通过显式视觉实体证据将时间定位能力锚定到预训练多模态大模型的实体注意力上，从而提升跨域鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统VTG微调虽然能提升域内表现，但在域外数据上性能会明显下降。作者发现，问题不仅来自查询概念未见过，更关键的是视觉域偏移破坏了模型将时间定位知识与实体注意能力的结合，因此需要一种更稳健的归纳偏置。
AI.method: EVIDENT包含三个核心部分：1）实体瓶颈适配器，将密集视觉token压缩为少量实体级槽位；2）实体绑定蒸馏损失，向模型视觉空间注入目标物体的结构先验，使每个槽位绑定到一致实体；3）实体到证据门控机制，利用已捕获的实体作为证据，引导模型定位包含与查询相关实体的时间片段。
AI.result: 在跨域VTG基准上，EVIDENT在参数开销较小的情况下，稳定提升了域外鲁棒性，同时保持了具有竞争力的域内性能，说明其适配方式比依赖数据集捷径的方法更泛化。
AI.conclusion: 实体级 grounding 是一种有效的时间定位归纳偏置。通过把VTG微调过程显式建立在实体证据之上，可以更好地缓解视觉域偏移带来的性能退化，并增强多模态大模型的跨域泛化能力。

title: MAGIC: Multimodal Alignment & Grounding-aware Instruction Coreset for Vision-Language Models
summary: Instruction tuning of large vision-language models (LVLMs) increasingly depends on massive multimodal corpora, yet these datasets contain samples with substantial redundancy, low visual dependency, and highly imbalanced coverage of multimodal reasoning behaviors. As a result, uniform subsampling or naive score-based selection often yields suboptimal training subsets. We introduce MAGIC, a training-free, forward-only coreset selection method designed to construct compact yet behaviorally faithful subsets for multimodal instruction tuning. MAGIC is built on three intrinsic signals extracted from a pretrained VLM: Multimodal Gain, which measures the likelihood improvement obtained from visual input; Bridging Relevance, which captures the sharpness of answer-token grounding over visual tokens; and Skill-Neuron Signatures, which characterize the functional computation elicited by each sample via top-activated feed-forward neurons. MAGIC combines these signals in a three-stage pipeline: filtering low-gain examples, ranking candidates by a normalized quality objective, and performing bucket-wise budget allocation over discrete neuron signatures to preserve latent multimodal skill coverage. This formulation avoids backpropagation, auxiliary selector training, and expensive clustering in continuous activation spaces, while remaining efficient and easily deployable in existing VLMs. Across LLaVA-665K and Vision-Flan datasets, and transfer settings to large target models, LLaVA-1.5-7B and -13B, MAGIC consistently improves over strong baselines under matched 20% budgets: it achieves 100.3% relative performance to full finetuning on LLaVA-665K and 101.6% relative performance on Vision-Flan-186K, while yielding a 73.7% reduction in wall-clock run time.

AI.tldr: MAGIC是一种无需训练、仅前向传播的多模态指令微调子集选择方法，通过三类内在信号筛选并分配样本，在20%预算下比强基线更高效且性能接近或超过全量微调。
AI.motivation: 大规模视觉-语言指令数据集中存在大量冗余、视觉依赖弱和多模态推理行为覆盖不均的问题，导致简单随机采样或基于单一分数的筛选难以构建高质量训练子集。
AI.method: MAGIC从预训练VLM中提取三种信号：多模态增益（视觉输入带来的答案概率提升）、桥接相关性（答案token对视觉token的聚焦强度）、以及技能神经元签名（样本激活的前馈神经元模式）。方法包含三步：先过滤低增益样本，再按归一化质量目标排序候选样本，最后根据离散神经元签名进行分桶预算分配，以保留潜在的多模态技能覆盖。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-665K与Vision-Flan数据集，以及迁移到LLaVA-1.5-7B和13B的大模型设置中，MAGIC在匹配20%预算下持续优于强基线；在LLaVA-665K上达到全量微调的100.3%相对性能，在Vision-Flan-186K上达到101.6%，同时将壁钟运行时间降低73.7%。
AI.conclusion: MAGIC证明了利用预训练VLM的内在行为信号进行前向式核心集选择，可以在不依赖反向传播、额外选择器训练或昂贵聚类的情况下，高效构建更具代表性的多模态指令微调子集，并兼顾性能与计算效率。

title: AgentGrounder: Zero-Shot 3D Visual Pointcloud Grounding using Multimodal Language Models
summary: 3D Visual Grounding (3DVG) is an essential capability for embodied AI, requiring agents to localize objects in 3D scenes based on natural language descriptions. Recent zero-shot methods leverage 2D vision-language models (LVLMs). However, they often rely on existing sets of multi-view images and struggle with the limited semantic and spatial details provided by standard 3D segmentation tools. We present $\textbf{AgentGrounder}$, a zero-shot 3D visual grounding framework that operates directly on colored point clouds without task-specific 3D training. Our approach follows a two-stage design: (1) an offline stage that applies 3D model to build an Object Lookup Table (OLT) with instance IDs, semantic labels, 3D bounding boxes; and (2) an online tool-driven agent that decomposes each query, retrieves only relevant candidates from the OLT, performs geometric scoring, and triggers image rendering on demand when additional visual evidence (e.g., color, material, or viewpoint-sensitive cues) is required. Compared with fixed anchor-target matching pipelines, this design reduces cascading matching errors and improves context-window efficiency by avoiding prompts overloaded with irrelevant objects. We evaluate on ScanRefer and Nr3D under a zero-shot setting and observe consistent improvements over SeeGround in our setup, including +2.5% Acc@0.5 on ScanRefer and +6.3% on Nr3D, with a notable +6.3% gain on Nr3D view-independent queries. These results show that combining selective retrieval, geometric reasoning, and adaptive visual inspection yields a practical and robust foundation for open-vocabulary 3D grounding. Our code is available at https://github.com/be2rlab/AgentGrounder.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种零样本三维视觉指代表达框架AgentGrounder，直接基于带颜色的点云完成目标定位，通过离线构建对象查找表与在线工具驱动代理协同推理，在ScanRefer和Nr3D上相较基线取得稳定提升。
AI.motivation: 三维视觉指代表达需要根据自然语言在三维场景中定位目标，但现有零样本方法主要依赖二维视觉语言模型和多视图图像，容易受限于三维分割工具提供的语义与空间信息不足，且上下文输入冗余会带来效率和误差问题。
AI.method: 方法采用两阶段设计：离线阶段利用三维模型构建对象查找表，记录实例ID、语义标签和三维边界框；在线阶段由代理对查询进行拆解，只从查找表中检索相关候选，进行几何评分，并在需要颜色、材质或视角相关线索时按需触发图像渲染。该设计避免了固定锚点匹配带来的级联错误，并提升了上下文窗口利用效率。
AI.result: 在零样本设置下，作者在ScanRefer和Nr3D上验证了方法有效性，相比SeeGround在其设定下获得一致提升，包括ScanRefer上Acc@0.5提升2.5%，Nr3D提升6.3%，其中Nr3D的视角无关查询提升尤为明显，达到6.3%。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明，将选择性检索、几何推理与自适应视觉检查结合起来，能够形成一种更实用且鲁棒的开放词汇三维视觉指代表达基础框架。

title: ScaleWoB: Guiding GUI Agents with Coding Agents via Large-Scale Environmental Synthesis
summary: GUI agents powered by large language models are advancing rapidly, creating urgent needs for evaluation and training based on realistic environments. However, directly doing so in real-world environments introduces some challenges that cannot be overlooked. Real-world environments are complex and uncontrollable, making it difficult to construct verifiable rewards and to save or reset states. Existing works prioritize reproducibility but are often limited to open-source apps or file-operation tasks for reliable reward building, leaving a persistent gap from real-world usage. Furthermore, relying on virtual machines or docker images demand high resource requirements and suffer from slow response speeds, which limit the efficiency. We present \sys, a framework that could produce high-fidelity synthesized interactive environments for GUI agents across platforms with verifiable rewards. These environments behave as backend-free webpages accessible via URL, requiring near-zero setup and low resource cost, making the approach suitable for both large-scale evaluation and downstream agent training. We support multiple GUI platforms including mobile, desktop, and automotive/in-vehicle interfaces based on the same pipeline, covering 100+ environments and 1000+ verifiable tasks. Among them, 120 challenging tasks across 63 simulated mobile applications are released as a fully synthesized mobile GUI agent benchmark. Experiment results on five state-of-the-art mobile GUI agents reveal substantial headroom -- the average success rate is only 27.92\%, dropping to 17.82\% on long-horizon subset -- while humans reach 92.08\%. A comparison against real-world sample tasks shows that assessments made in our synthetic environments generalize to real apps. The project website is at https://scalewob.github.io.

AI.tldr: 该摘要提出了一个跨平台的合成交互环境框架，用于GUI智能体的评测与训练，强调低成本、可验证奖励和接近真实应用的交互体验。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体评测与训练在真实环境中面临多重困难：环境复杂且不可控，难以构造可验证奖励，也难以保存和重置状态；已有方案多局限于开源应用或文件操作任务，且虚拟机和容器方案资源消耗高、响应慢，因此与真实使用场景仍有差距。
AI.method: 作者提出一个框架，可生成高保真合成交互环境，并以无后端网页形式通过URL访问，几乎无需配置且资源开销低。该框架使用统一流水线支持移动端、桌面端和车载界面，构建了100多个环境和1000多个可验证任务，并发布了一个包含120个任务、63个模拟移动应用的全合成基准。
AI.result: 实验中，5个先进移动GUI智能体的平均成功率仅为27.92%，长程任务子集上降至17.82%，而人类成功率为92.08%。此外，与真实世界样本任务的对比表明，该合成环境中的评测结果能够较好泛化到真实应用。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了合成GUI环境可以在低成本条件下实现高保真、可验证、可扩展的评测与训练，并且在多个平台上具有通用性，为未来GUI智能体基准构建和能力提升提供了可行路径。

title: IQA-Spider: Unifying Multi-Granularity Image Quality Assessment with Reasoning, Grounding and Referring
summary: We present IQA-Spider, the first image quality assessment (IQA) framework that unifies reasoning, grounding, and referring into a single LMM-based framework for multi-granularity quality understanding. Existing LMM-based IQA methods typically support only partial perception dimensions, such as quality description and question answering~(\textit{i.e.}, reasoning) or pixel-level grounding. This limitation largely stems from the absence of (i) a unified task and data formulation and (ii) effective optimization paradigms for multi-granularity learning. To address these limitations, we formulate a rigorous four-task paradigm covering global and local quality description, pixel-level grounding, and region-level referring. Based on this formulation, we construct a corresponding IQA dataset with a scalable and automatic annotation pipeline, thereby providing a solid foundation for unified multi-granularity learning. To further enable unified perception, we adopt a conflict-free two-stage design that progressively extends text-level multi-granularity understanding to pixel-level grounding: (i) the first stage equips the model with fine-grained text-level reasoning across multiple IQA tasks, and (ii) the second stage introduces a training-free text-to-point grounding paradigm, which bridges textual semantics and pixel-level perception by mapping token logits to spatial coordinates. Based on these efforts, we achieve IQA-Spider with unified multi-granularity explainable image quality assessment. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate strong performance, validating the effectiveness and versatility of the proposed formulation and framework.

AI.tldr: 提出IQA-Spider，一个将推理、定位和指代统一到同一LMM框架中的图像质量评估方法，实现多粒度、可解释的质量理解。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大模型的图像质量评估方法通常只覆盖部分感知能力，例如质量描述与问答推理，或仅支持像素级定位，缺少统一的任务定义、数据构建和适配多粒度学习的优化范式。
AI.method: 作者构建了一个四任务范式，涵盖全局质量描述、局部质量描述、像素级定位和区域级指代，并设计了自动化、可扩展的数据标注流程。在模型上采用两阶段、无冲突的训练设计：第一阶段增强文本层面的细粒度推理能力，第二阶段通过训练免费的文本到点定位范式，将文本语义映射到空间坐标，实现像素级感知。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的实验结果表明，该方法表现强，验证了所提出的统一任务定义、数据构建和两阶段框架的有效性与通用性。
AI.conclusion: IQA-Spider提供了一种统一的多粒度可解释图像质量评估新框架，弥补了现有方法在任务覆盖和跨粒度学习上的不足。

title: PGT: Procedurally Generated Tasks for improving visual grounding in MLLMs
summary: Despite remarkable progress in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), these models still struggle with fine-grained understanding tasks. In this work, we propose Procedurally Generated Tasks (PGT), a simple data-driven framework that serves a dual purpose: inducing fine-grained visual understanding and acting as a low-cost diagnostic tool to identify the source of perception failures. By overlaying unambiguous geometric primitives on images, PGT generate additional dense supervision that disentangles visual grounding capability from semantic priors. Extensive experiments on relational, quantitative, and 3D/depth understanding benchmarks show that PGT yields remarkable gains across diverse architectures. Instruction tuning MLLMs on LLaVA-v1.5-Instruct augmented with PGT data results in improvements of up to +20% on the What'sUp benchmark and +13.3% on CV-Bench-2D, while maintaining general perception capabilities. Moreover, finetuning state-of-the-art MLLMs on PGT data leads to boosts of up to +5.5% on What'sUp and +8.3% on CV-Bench-2D. These findings demonstrate that PGT effectively address the bottleneck of fine-grained perception, revealing that many spatial reasoning deficits stem from inadequate supervision signals rather than inherent architectural or resolution limitations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PGT的程序化生成任务框架，通过在图像上叠加明确的几何图形，为多模态大语言模型提供低成本、密集且可诊断的细粒度视觉监督，从而显著提升其精细理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在细粒度视觉理解任务上仍存在明显不足，尤其是在关系、数量以及三维/深度理解等方面。作者希望通过一种简单的数据驱动方法，同时实现能力增强与失败原因分析，定位感知瓶颈究竟来自监督不足还是模型结构限制。
AI.method: 作者设计了Procedurally Generated Tasks（PGT）框架：在原始图像上覆盖无歧义的几何原语，生成额外的密集监督信号，以解耦视觉定位能力与语义先验。随后将PGT数据用于指令微调和模型微调，并在关系、数量、3D/深度理解等基准上进行系统评测。
AI.result: 实验表明，PGT能在多种架构上带来稳定提升。基于LLaVA-v1.5-Instruct加入PGT进行指令微调后，在What'sUp上最高提升20%，在CV-Bench-2D上最高提升13.3%，同时保持了整体感知能力。对当前最先进的多模态模型进行PGT微调后，在What'sUp上最高提升5.5%，在CV-Bench-2D上最高提升8.3%。
AI.conclusion: PGT有效缓解了细粒度感知中的监督瓶颈，说明许多空间推理缺陷主要源于监督信号不足，而非模型结构或分辨率本身的根本限制。该方法既能增强细粒度视觉理解，也能作为诊断工具帮助识别感知失败来源。

title: Simulating Hate Speech Cascades with Multi-LLM Agents: Empirical Grounding, Modeling Fidelity, and Intervention Strategies
summary: Faithful modeling of hateful content propagation on online platforms remains an open problem for moderation research. Classical cascade models that do not explicitly represent the profile, community, and content factors associated with hateful-content propagation may yield moderation strategies that behave less effectively when deployed in real-world scenarios. Multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems can, in principle, make each reshare decision depend on the user's profile, the surrounding community, and the post's content, but it remains unclear whether this added flexibility actually reproduces real hateful cascades more faithfully than classical baselines. We study three hateful Bluesky cascades and a size-matched benign control. In the empirical Bluesky data, we found that: 97.4--99.7\% of reposters take a hostile stance; toxicity-engagement homophily is higher on the diffusion tree than on the follower graph for hateful cascades; topology is star-like for the hateful cascades (most reposts come directly from the root) versus tree-like for the benign cascade (reposts propagate through multi-hop chains). In simulation, a multi-LLM-agent simulator reproduces the stance monoculture and the toxicity-delta direction. A structured ablation identifies agent heterogeneity as the leading fidelity factor, and amplifier targeting on dense networks yields 7.5--12.9\% reduction at 5.7\% benign collateral.

AI.tldr: 该摘要研究了在线平台上仇恨内容传播的建模问题，比较了经典级联模型与多智能体大语言模型模拟器在重现真实传播特征方面的效果，发现多智能体方案在立场一致性、毒性同质性方向等方面更接近真实数据，并识别出智能体异质性是关键因素。
AI.motivation: 传统级联模型未显式刻画用户画像、社区关系与内容因素，可能导致审核策略在真实场景中效果不佳；因此作者希望评估多智能体大语言模型是否能更真实地模拟仇恨内容扩散。
AI.method: 作者分析了3个仇恨Bluesky级联和1个大小匹配的良性对照级联，并结合真实传播数据与多智能体LLM仿真进行对比；同时通过结构化消融实验评估不同设计因素对仿真保真度的影响，并测试了在密集网络上的放大器定向干预效果。
AI.result: 真实数据中，97.4%—99.7%的转发者持敌对立场；仇恨级联在传播树上的毒性-参与同质性高于关注图；其拓扑更偏星型，而良性级联更偏树型、多跳传播。仿真中，多智能体LLM可重现立场单一性和毒性差异方向；消融结果表明智能体异质性是最重要的保真因素；在密集网络上的定向干预可减少7.5%—12.9%的传播，但伴随5.7%的良性误伤。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体LLM系统比经典基线更能逼真地复现仇恨内容级联的关键传播特征，尤其是在刻画用户异质性方面具有优势，可为更可靠的审核与干预策略建模提供支持。

title: Graph Alignment Topology as an Inductive Bias for Grounding Detection
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are optimized to produce distributionally plausible continuations rather than to explicitly verify whether generated propositions are entailed by source documents. This inductive bias enables generalization, but it does not encode whether responses are grounded with respect to a reference. These issues limit the use of LLMs in domains where strict factual correctness is crucial, such as clinical decision support. Existing hallucination detection approaches improve factuality through retrieval augmentation, self-consistency, or claim verification, but generally do not learn directly over alignment topology. To leverage alignment topology as an inductive bias, we construct aligned bipartite graphs between reference information and LLM outputs and train a graph neural network (GNN) to model alignment structure using message passing. The method achieves state-of-the-art results on four diverse hallucination and question-answering datasets, outperforming all compared methods, including foundational LLMs such as GPT-4o.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对齐拓扑的幻觉检测方法：先将参考信息与LLM输出构造成对齐二部图，再用图神经网络通过消息传递学习对齐结构，以判断生成内容是否被源文档支撑。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型更擅长生成“看起来合理”的续写，而不是显式验证生成命题是否被参考文档蕴含，因此在临床决策支持等对事实正确性要求极高的场景中容易出现幻觉。现有方法多依赖检索增强、自一致性或声明验证，但通常没有直接学习对齐拓扑结构。
AI.method: 构建参考信息与LLM输出之间的对齐二部图，将对齐关系作为归纳偏置输入图神经网络；通过消息传递建模节点与边的结构信息，从而学习生成内容与证据之间的匹配模式，并据此进行幻觉检测或问答判断。
AI.result: 在四个不同的幻觉检测与问答数据集上取得了最先进的结果，优于所有对比方法，包括GPT-4o等基础大模型。
AI.conclusion: 将对齐拓扑显式建模为图结构，并结合GNN学习其关系信息，是提升生成内容事实一致性判别能力的有效途径，尤其适用于对真实性要求严格的应用场景。

title: Transcoders Trace Visual Grounding and Hallucinations in Vision-Language Models
summary: Generative Vision-Language Models (VLMs) perform well on multimodal reasoning, but how visual inputs are transformed to text remains poorly understood. Existing interpretability work on VLMs uses Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs), which decompose static residual representations and miss the functional updates that drive cross-modal interaction. We adopt a function-centric framework based on Transcoders, sparse approximations of MLP sublayers that act as a causal proxy for layer-wise computation. Applied to Gemma 3-4B-IT, the framework decomposes the model into interpretable computational pathways linking image patches to directions in token generation. Transcoder attributions produce stronger and more stable effects on visually grounded tokens under patch ablation than SAE attributions, and align better with semantically relevant image regions. A False Visual Grounding counterfactual analysis confirms that the recovered pathways are specific to vision-language interaction.Finally, we perform a structural analysis of hallucinated generations, by extracting graph-based indicators from circuit traces produced by the transcoders. A logistic classifier over these mechanistic graph features predicts hallucinations at AUC $0.68$. These results show that function-centric circuit decomposition yields interpretable and predictive accounts of multimodal computation in VLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向函数的VLM可解释性框架，使用Transcoder替代仅分析静态残差表示的SAE，以更好刻画视觉输入到文本生成的因果计算路径，并能对幻觉生成进行一定预测。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM可解释性方法多依赖Sparse Autoencoders分解静态残差表示，难以捕捉驱动跨模态交互的实际功能更新，因此需要一种更贴近层内计算过程的分析方法。
AI.method: 作者采用基于Transcoder的函数中心框架，对Gemma 3-4B-IT进行分解，将模型表示为可解释的计算通路，连接图像patch与token生成方向；随后通过patch消融比较Transcoder与SAE归因效果，并用False Visual Grounding反事实分析验证路径特异性，最后从Transcoder产生的电路轨迹中提取图结构特征，用逻辑分类器预测幻觉生成。
AI.result: Transcoder归因在视觉锚定token上的效果更强、更稳定，且与语义相关图像区域的对齐更好；反事实分析表明恢复出的路径确实特异于视觉-语言交互；基于机制图特征的分类器预测幻觉的AUC达到0.68。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，基于函数的电路分解比仅分析静态表示更能解释多模态计算机制，同时还能提供对幻觉生成的可预测信号，具有更强的可解释性和实用性。

title: GLeVE: Graph-Guided Lesion Grounding with Proposal Verification in 3D CT
summary: Grounding radiology report descriptions to 3D CT volumes is essential for verifiable clinical interpretation, yet remains challenging due to the semantic-spatial gap between free-text narratives and volumetric anatomy. Existing report-assisted and vision-language grounding methods typically rely on phrase-level alignment or dense pixel supervision, resulting in limited lesion-wise correspondence and suboptimal localization accuracy. We propose GLeVE, a graph-guided lesion grounding framework with anatomical prior verification and octree-based autoregressive refinement. GLeVE treats each lesion description as an atomic semantic unit and encodes organ attribution, attributes, and inter-lesion relations through relation-aware graph reasoning to produce discriminative lesion-wise queries. Anatomy-aware proposal generation with region-level verification enforces one-to-one text-lesion alignment, while hierarchical octree refinement progressively improves boundary delineation. Experiments on AbdomenAtlas 3.0 demonstrate consistent gains over classical multimodal foundation models and report-supervised baselines in both segmentation accuracy and lesion-level localization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLeVE，一种面向3D CT体积的病灶级报告定位框架，通过图结构推理、解剖先验验证和八叉树自回归细化，实现更准确的病灶定位与分割。
AI.motivation: 将放射学报告中的病灶描述可靠地对应到3D CT体积中的具体病灶，对可验证的临床解读很重要，但自由文本与三维解剖结构之间存在显著的语义-空间鸿沟，现有方法多停留在短语级对齐或依赖密集像素监督，因而病灶级对应不充分、定位精度受限。
AI.method: GLeVE将每个病灶描述视为原子语义单元，利用关系感知图推理编码器官归属、属性及病灶间关系，生成更具判别性的病灶查询；随后通过具备解剖意识的候选框生成与区域级验证，强化文本与病灶的一对一对齐；最后采用分层八叉树自回归细化，逐步提升边界刻画精度。
AI.result: 在AbdomenAtlas 3.0上的实验表明，GLeVE在分割精度和病灶级定位方面均优于传统多模态基础模型及基于报告监督的基线方法，并取得稳定提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，将病灶级语义建模、解剖先验约束与分层细化结合起来，能够有效缩小报告文本与3D CT解剖之间的鸿沟，显著提升可解释的病灶定位与分割表现。

title: GeoWeaver: Grounding Visual Tokens with Geometric Evidence before Scene Reasoning
summary: Spatio-temporal reasoning in vision-language models requires visual representations that preserve physical geometry rather than merely semantic appearance. Recent multimodal models incorporate geometric information through structural branches, 3D-aware supervision, reasoning-stage fusion, or long-horizon memory. While these approaches demonstrate the importance of geometry for spatial intelligence, they typically treat geometric cues as a shared signal across all visual tokens. We note that this overlooks a finer-grained challenge: different visual tokens require different geometric evidence depending on their spatial roles. To address this limitation, we introduce GeoWeaver, a pre-reasoning geometric grounding framework that treats geometry as a representational prerequisite for spatio-temporal reasoning. GeoWeaver constructs a multi-level geometry bank from a frozen geometry encoder and performs token-adaptive geometric evidence allocation, enabling each visual token to retrieve the most relevant geometric abstractions. The selected evidence is incorporated into visual tokens via a residual grounding operation prior to language modeling, yielding geometry-grounded representations for downstream reasoning. Extensive evaluations on spatial reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that GeoWeaver consistently enhances geometry-aware reasoning while retaining general multimodal capabilities. This indicates that geometric information yields the greatest benefit not as a late-fusion auxiliary signal but as a fundamental prerequisite that shapes the representational foundation on which large language models perform reasoning. All source code and models will be released at https://github.com/yahooo-m/GeoWeaver .

AI.tldr: 该工作提出GeoWeaver，一种在推理前进行几何对齐的视觉语言框架，通过多层几何库和按token自适应的几何证据分配，为不同视觉token注入最相关的几何信息，从而提升时空推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态模型虽然引入了几何信息，但通常把几何线索当作所有视觉token共享的同质信号，忽视了不同token在空间角色上需要不同几何证据这一更细粒度的问题。因此，需要一种在语言建模之前完成几何 grounding 的方法，让几何成为推理的表示基础，而不是后期辅助信号。
AI.method: GeoWeaver先利用冻结的几何编码器构建多层几何库，再对每个视觉token进行自适应几何证据检索，选择最相关的几何抽象；随后通过残差式 grounding 操作将这些证据注入视觉token，在进入语言模型前形成几何对齐的表示。
AI.result: 在多个空间推理基准上，GeoWeaver稳定提升了几何感知推理表现，同时保持了通用多模态能力。实验表明，几何信息在推理前作为表示基础引入，比作为晚期融合辅助信号更有效。
AI.conclusion: GeoWeaver验证了一个关键观点：几何信息应被视为时空推理的表征前提，而非简单的附加特征。按token分配几何证据的机制能够更精细地支持视觉语言模型的空间智能，并兼顾泛化能力。

title: Survive or Collapse: The Asymmetric Roles of Data Gating and Reward Grounding in Self-Play RL
summary: Self-play reinforcement learning trains language models on their own generated tasks, co-evolving a proposer and solver without human labels. Recent systems report strong reasoning gains, but collapse and instability are widely observed and poorly understood. The dominant response treats this as a reward-design problem. We argue instead that self-play stability is governed by two distinct levers: a data-level gate that decides which proposer-generated tasks enter the training pool, and the reward signal that updates the policy on tasks already admitted. Through controlled experiments on a Python output-prediction task and a deterministic-DSL twin task that strips pretraining priors, output ambiguity, and executor noise, we find the two levers are asymmetric. A strict gate is sufficient for stability under every reward variant we test, including a self-consistency reward with no access to ground truth; while no reward variant is sufficient once the gate is removed. This asymmetry exposes a counter-intuitive coupling we call the Grounded Proposer Paradox: a proposer with ground-truth access accelerates collapse faster than an ungrounded one when paired with a self-consistency solver, by concentrating training on clean tasks that form the fastest path to a spurious self-consistent attractor. Replacing the binary gate with a continuous strictness parameter $\varepsilon$ further reveals a two-stage phase transition: training-side metrics decouple at low $\varepsilon$, while validation accuracy holds until $\varepsilon$ is much higher. Data-level gating, not reward calibration, is the binding constraint on self-play stability.

AI.tldr: 本文认为，自博弈强化学习的稳定性主要由“数据门控”而非“奖励设计”决定：只要严格筛选提议任务，即使奖励不接触真值也能稳定；一旦去掉门控，任何奖励形式都无法阻止崩塌。
AI.motivation: 现有自博弈语言模型虽然能带来推理提升，但常出现崩塌与不稳定，且其根因长期被归结为奖励设计问题。作者希望澄清稳定性的真正控制因素。
AI.method: 作者将稳定性拆分为两个机制：任务是否进入训练池的数据级门控，以及对已进入任务施加的奖励信号。通过受控实验，分别在Python输出预测任务和去除预训练先验、输出歧义与执行器噪声的确定性DSL任务上比较不同门控与奖励组合，并进一步用连续严格度参数ε分析相变行为。
AI.result: 实验表明，两种机制具有明显不对称性：严格门控在所有测试奖励下都足以保证稳定，包括不访问真值的自一致性奖励；但一旦移除门控，无论奖励如何都无法避免不稳定。作者还发现一种反直觉耦合现象：在与自一致性求解器搭配时，具有真值访问的提议器反而比无真值提议器更快导致崩塌，因为它会更快集中到“干净任务”，从而形成通向伪自洽吸引子的最快路径。连续门控参数ε还显示出两阶段相变：训练侧指标在低ε时先解耦，而验证准确率直到更高ε才下降。
AI.conclusion: 自博弈稳定性的关键约束是数据级门控，而不是奖励校准；要防止崩塌，首先应控制哪些任务进入训练池，其次才是奖励设计。

title: AgroVG: A Large-Scale Multi-Source Benchmark for Agricultural Visual Grounding
summary: Visual grounding, the task of localizing objects described by natural-language expressions, is a foundational capability for agricultural AI systems, enabling applications such as selective weeding, disease monitoring, and targeted harvesting. Reliable evaluation of agricultural visual grounding remains challenging because agricultural targets are often small, repetitive, occluded, or irregularly shaped, and instructions may refer to one, many, or no objects in an image. Evaluating this capability therefore requires jointly testing localization accuracy, target-set completeness, and existence-aware abstention. To address these challenges, we introduce \textbf{AgroVG}, a multi-source benchmark that formulates agricultural grounding as generalized set prediction: given an image and a referring expression, a model must return all matching target instances or abstain when no target is present. AgroVG contains 10{,}071 annotation-grounded image-query pairs from ten source datasets across six target families: crop/weed, fruit, wheat head, pest, plant disease, and tree canopy. It supports bounding-box grounding (T1) across all six families and instance-mask grounding (T2) on sources with reliable instance-level pixel annotations, with queries covering single-target, multi-target, and target-absent regimes. AgroVG further provides task-specific protocols for box-set matching and query-level mask coverage. Zero-shot evaluation of 26 model configurations spanning closed-source MLLMs, open-source VLMs, and specialized grounding systems reveals persistent gaps: the best multi-target Set-$F_1$ reaches only 0.35, and the best positive-query mask success rate at IoU@0.75 remains below 0.17. Data and code are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/AgroVG-5172/ .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了农业场景视觉指代定位基准AgroVG，将任务统一表述为广义集合预测：根据图像和文本指令返回所有匹配目标，若无目标则需要放弃回答。
AI.motivation: 农业视觉定位面临目标小、重复、遮挡、形状不规则以及指令可能对应单个、多个或不存在目标等挑战，因此传统只评估单目标框定位的方式不足以全面衡量模型能力。
AI.method: 构建了一个多源基准AgroVG，包含来自10个源数据集的10,071对图文标注样本，覆盖作物/杂草、果实、小麦穗、害虫、植物病害和树冠六类目标；同时支持框级定位任务T1和具备实例级像素标注时的掩码定位任务T2，并设计了面向框集合匹配与查询级掩码覆盖的评测协议。
AI.result: 对26种模型配置进行零样本评测后发现，现有模型在农业视觉定位上仍有明显缺口：最佳多目标Set-F1仅为0.35，最佳正样本查询在IoU@0.75下的掩码成功率仍低于0.17。
AI.conclusion: AgroVG为农业场景提供了更贴近实际需求的视觉定位评测框架，能够同时检验定位准确性、目标集合完整性和无目标时的正确放弃能力；实验结果表明当前通用多模态模型和专用定位系统在该任务上仍有较大提升空间。

title: Foresee-to-Ground: From Predictive Temporal Perception to Evidence-Driven Reasoning for Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Current Video-LLM approaches for Video Temporal Grounding (VTG) typically rely on direct timestamp generation from an unstructured visual-token stream, often leading to brittle numerics and inconsistent boundaries. To address this, we propose Foresee-to-Ground (F2G), a framework that reformulates VTG as a verifiable Identify-then-Measure problem. F2G integrates Predictive Temporal Perception with Evidence-Driven Reasoning: it learns boundary-sensitive temporal representations to build a video-wide evidence pool of candidate event segments, and exposes these segments to the LLM as citable evidence units that bind boundary prediction to explicit event hypotheses. By decoupling event identification from precise boundary measurement, F2G stabilizes grounding and makes predictions verifiable. Extensive experiments demonstrate that F2G consistently improves grounding accuracy across diverse benchmarks, transfers robustly across different Video-LLM backbones, and preserves general video understanding capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出F2G，将视频时间定位从直接生成时间戳改为“先识别、再测量”的可验证框架，以提升边界预测的稳定性与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有Video-LLM进行视频时间定位时，通常直接从非结构化视觉token流生成时间戳，容易出现数值不稳定、边界不一致和定位脆弱等问题，因此需要一种更稳健、可验证的建模方式。
AI.method: F2G结合预测式时间感知与证据驱动推理：先学习边界敏感的时间表示，构建覆盖整段视频的候选事件片段证据池；再将这些片段作为可引用的证据单元提供给LLM，使边界预测与明确的事件假设绑定，从而把任务分解为事件识别与精确边界测量两个步骤。
AI.result: 实验表明，F2G在多个基准上持续提升了时间定位准确率，并且能够在不同Video-LLM骨干模型之间稳定迁移，同时保持整体视频理解能力不受明显影响。
AI.conclusion: F2G通过将VTG重构为可验证的“先识别后测量”问题，显著增强了定位稳定性、可解释性和跨模型泛化能力，是一种有效的Video-LLM时间定位框架。

title: MLLMs Know When Before Speaking: Revealing and Recovering Temporal Grounding via Attention Cues
summary: Video temporal grounding (VTG), which localizes the start and end times of a queried event in an untrimmed video, is a key test of whether multimodal large language models (MLLMs) understand not only what happens but also when it happens. Although modern MLLMs describe video content fluently, their timestamp predictions remain unreliable, while existing remedies either require costly post-training on temporal annotations or rely on coarse training-free heuristics. In this work, we probe the cross-modal attention of MLLMs and uncover a perception-generation gap. Our key finding is that MLLMs often know the target interval during prefill, but lose this signal when generating the final answer. In the prefill stage, a sparse set of attention heads, which we call \emph{Temporal Grounding Heads} (TG-Heads), concentrates query-to-video attention on the ground-truth interval. During autoregressive decoding, however, the answer tokens shift attention away from this interval toward visually salient but query-irrelevant segments. This observation motivates an inference-time read-then-regenerate framework. We first convert TG-Head prefill attention into a debiased frame-level relevance signal and extract the high-attention interval it highlights. We then re-invoke the MLLM with visual context restricted to this interval, using video cropping or attention masking to suppress distractors. Without parameter updates and architectural changes, our framework consistently improves MiMo-VL-7B, Qwen3-VL-8B, and TimeLens-8B on three VTG benchmarks, with gains of up to +3.5 mIoU. The project website can be found at https://ddz16.github.io/mllmsknowwhen.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文指出多模态大语言模型在视频时间定位任务中存在“感知-生成鸿沟”：模型在前向预填充阶段其实能关注到目标时间段，但在生成最终答案时注意力会偏移到无关但显眼的片段。作者据此提出一种无需训练的推理时“先读后重生”框架，通过提取并重聚焦高相关时间区间来提升定位精度。
AI.motivation: 视频时间定位要求模型同时理解事件“发生了什么”和“何时发生”。现有方法要么依赖代价较高的时序标注后训练，要么只使用粗糙的无训练启发式，难以稳定提升多模态大语言模型的时间戳预测能力。因此需要一种不改参数、低成本且能直接利用模型内部时序线索的方法。
AI.method: 作者分析跨模态注意力，发现少量“时间定位头”在预填充阶段会将查询到视频的注意力集中到真实目标区间。随后将这些注意力转换为去偏的帧级相关性信号，提取其指出的高注意力区间；再以该区间为视觉上下文重新调用模型，通过视频裁剪或注意力掩码抑制干扰片段，从而在推理阶段强化时间定位。
AI.result: 该方法无需参数更新和架构修改，在 MiMo-VL-7B、Qwen3-VL-8B 和 TimeLens-8B 上，对三个视频时间定位基准测试都取得了一致提升，最高提升达到 +3.5 mIoU。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，多模态大语言模型并非完全“不知道时间位置”，而是存在生成阶段对已获得时序线索的丢失。利用预填充阶段的时间定位注意力，并在推理时进行重读与重聚焦，可以显著改善视频时间定位性能，且实现简单、成本较低。

title: MM-Conv: A Multimodal Dataset and Benchmark for Context-Aware Grounding in 3D Dialogue
comment: Extended version of the paper published at LREC 2026 (Palma de Mallorca, Spain), with expanded VLM baselines and inter-annotator agreement analysis
summary: Grounding language in the physical world requires AI systems to interpret references that emerge dynamically during conversation. While current vision-language models (VLMs) excel at static image tasks, they struggle to resolve ambiguous expressions in spontaneous, multi-turn dialogue. We address this gap by introducing (1) a benchmark for referential communication in dynamic 3D environments, built from 6.7 hours of egocentric VR interaction with synchronized speech, motion, gaze, and 3D scene geometry, and (2) a two-stage grounding pipeline that explicitly resolves conversational ambiguity before visual localization. The benchmark includes over 4,200 manually verified referring expressions spanning full, partitive, and pronominal types. Our contextual rewriting approach improves grounding performance by 11-22 percentage points on average, with a pure detector (GroundingDINO) reaching 56.7% on pronominals after rewriting, nearly double the best end-to-end baseline. Results demonstrate that decoupling linguistic reasoning from visual perception is more effective than end-to-end approaches for conversational grounding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向动态三维环境中指代表达理解的新基准，并设计了一个先消歧、后定位的两阶段 grounding 管线；实验表明这种“语言推理与视觉定位解耦”的方法显著优于端到端方案。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在静态图像任务上表现较好，但在真实对话中的多轮、动态、歧义指代解析上能力不足，尤其难以处理上下文中临时出现的指称对象。
AI.method: 一是构建了一个用于动态三维环境指代交流的基准数据集，来源于 6.7 小时具备语音、动作、视线和三维场景几何同步记录的第一视角 VR 交互，包含 4200+ 条人工验证的指代表达，覆盖完整指代、部分指代和代词指代；二是提出两阶段 grounding 流程，先通过上下文改写显式消歧，再进行视觉定位。
AI.result: 上下文改写策略使 grounding 性能平均提升 11 到 22 个百分点；其中仅使用检测器 GroundingDINO，在代词指代任务上的准确率达到 56.7%，几乎是最佳端到端基线的两倍。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果说明，在对话式指代理解中，将语言歧义消解与视觉感知分离，比直接端到端建模更有效，尤其适合动态三维交互场景。

title: SceneGraphGrounder: Zero-Shot 3D Visual Grounding via Structured Scene Graph Matching
summary: Zero-shot 3D visual grounding requires localizing objects in unstructured environments from free-form natural language. Recent vision-language model (VLM) approaches achieve promising results but rely on view-dependent reasoning or implicit representations, limiting spatial consistency and interpretability for compositional queries. We propose SceneGraphGrounder, a framework that reformulates 3D grounding as structured graph matching over a reconstructed 3D scene graph. To enable this formulation, we introduce a visual marker prompting strategy that enables a VLM to infer object-object relationships from 2D views, which are subsequently lifted into a persistent 3D scene graph encoding both spatial and semantic relations. Given a query, we construct a query graph and perform constrained alignment with the scene graph, ensuring multi-view consistency and interpretable reasoning. Experiments on the ScanRefer benchmark demonstrate that our method achieves competitive performance among zero-shot approaches, using only RGB-D inputs. We further validate our framework through real-world deployment on a mobile robot, demonstrating robust spatial reasoning in long-horizon physical environments. We will make our code publicly available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SceneGraphGrounder，将零样本3D视觉定位从基于视图的隐式推理，改写为在重建的3D场景图上进行结构化图匹配，以提升空间一致性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM方法虽然在零样本3D视觉定位上表现不错，但往往依赖视角相关推理或隐式表示，容易导致多视图空间不一致，且对组合式查询的推理过程不够透明，因此需要一种更结构化、可解释的建模方式。
AI.method: 方法先通过视觉标记提示策略，让VLM从2D视图中推断物体间关系；再将这些关系提升为包含空间与语义信息的持久化3D场景图。对输入自然语言查询，则构建查询图，并在查询图与场景图之间执行受约束对齐，从而实现多视图一致的目标定位与可解释推理。
AI.result: 在ScanRefer基准上，该方法在仅使用RGB-D输入的零样本方法中取得了具有竞争力的性能；此外，在移动机器人真实部署中也表现出较强的长时程物理环境空间推理鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SceneGraphGrounder通过“场景图 + 查询图”的结构化匹配范式，兼顾了零样本3D定位中的空间一致性、语义表达能力和可解释性，显示出从2D观测到3D结构化推理的有效路径。

title: SR-Ground: Image Quality Grounding for Super-Resolved Content
summary:
Super-Resolution (SR) has advanced rapidly in recent years, with diffusion-based models achieving unprecedented fidelity at the cost of introducing new types of visual artifacts. While existing Image Quality Assessment (IQA) methods provide holistic quality scores, they lack interpretability and fail to distinguish between different artifact types arising from modern SR approaches.
  To address this gap, we introduce SR-Ground, a large-scale dataset specifically designed for fine-grained artifact segmentation in super-resolved images. The dataset comprises images processed by a diverse set of state-of-the-art SR models, with pixel-level annotations for multiple artifact categories. We conduct a large-scale crowdsourcing study involving 1,062 participants to validate and refine automatically generated segmentations, resulting in a high-quality dataset of 63,000 images spanning 6 distinct artifact types.
  We demonstrate that training IQA models with grounding capabilities on SR-Ground significantly improves performance on downstream tasks. Furthermore, we introduce a fine-tuning pipeline that leverages our grounding model to reduce perceptible artifacts in SR outputs, showcasing the practical utility of our dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向超分辨率图像伪影细粒度分割的大规模数据集SR-Ground，并证明它可提升图像质量评估模型的可解释性与下游性能，还可用于优化超分辨率输出中的可感知伪影。
AI.motivation: 现有图像质量评估方法虽然能给出整体质量分数，但缺乏对不同伪影类型的区分能力，也难以解释现代超分辨率方法产生的复杂视觉问题，尤其是扩散式模型带来的新型伪影。
AI.method: 作者构建了SR-Ground数据集，包含来自多种先进超分辨率模型的图像，并提供像素级多类别伪影标注；同时通过1062名参与者的大规模众包研究对自动生成分割结果进行验证和修正，最终形成63000张图像、6类伪影的高质量数据集。基于该数据集，作者训练具备grounding能力的IQA模型，并设计了一个利用grounding模型进行微调的流程，用于降低超分辨率输出中的可见伪影。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用SR-Ground训练的具备定位能力的IQA模型在下游任务上性能显著提升；同时，所提出的微调流程能够有效减少超分辨率结果中的可感知伪影，体现了该数据集的实用价值。
AI.conclusion: SR-Ground为超分辨率伪影的细粒度识别与分割提供了重要资源，弥补了传统IQA方法在解释性和伪影类型区分上的不足，并为提升超分辨率质量评估与后处理优化提供了新的基础。

title: Grounding Driving VLA via Inverse Kinematics
summary: Existing Driving VLAs predict trajectories while largely ignoring their visual tokens -- a phenomenon we trace not to insufficient training but to a structurally ill-posed task formulation. We show that trajectory recovery, when viewed through the lens of inverse kinematics, requires both a current and a future visual state as boundary conditions; existing VLAs supply only the former, which encourages the model to shortcut through ego status and text commands alone. To address this, we re-design Driving VLA in the style of an inverse kinematics solver. First, a next visual state prediction objective that requires the LLM to predict the future visual scene provides dense visual supervision and suppresses shortcut paths. Second, a separate Inverse Kinematics Network (a cross-attention-based conditional diffusion model) that takes only the current and future visual states as input is designed to suppress reliance on ego status and textual shortcuts during trajectory decoding. With this simple prescription alone, our 0.5B-scale model recovers visual grounding and reaches trajectory planning performance comparable to 7B--8B VLAs more than an order of magnitude larger, on both the closed-loop NAVSIM-v2 and the nuScenes benchmarks. Extensive analysis further shows that this improvement stems from a recovered ability to exploit visual features, with the effect being most pronounced in dynamic driving situations such as turning.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有驾驶视觉-语言-动作模型（VLA）在轨迹预测中过度依赖自车状态和文本指令，忽视视觉token，根因在于任务形式设计不合理；作者将其重构为逆运动学问题，并通过未来视觉状态预测与独立的逆运动学网络恢复视觉 grounding，使0.5B模型达到接近7B--8B模型的轨迹规划性能。
AI.motivation: 现有驾驶VLA虽然能预测轨迹，但往往没有真正利用视觉信息，导致模型走“捷径”，主要依赖ego状态和文本命令。这种现象并非单纯训练不足，而是因为当前任务只提供当前视觉状态，缺少未来视觉状态作为约束，造成问题设定不充分。
AI.method: 作者提出两项改造：第一，增加下一视觉状态预测目标，让LLM预测未来场景，从而提供更密集的视觉监督并抑制捷径路径；第二，设计一个独立的逆运动学网络，采用交叉注意力条件扩散模型，仅以当前和未来视觉状态为输入，用于轨迹解码，以减少对ego状态和文本信息的依赖。
AI.result: 在0.5B参数规模下，模型在NAVSIM-v2和nuScenes两个基准上取得了与7B--8B规模VLA相当的轨迹规划性能，且分析表明性能提升主要来自对视觉特征利用能力的恢复，尤其在转弯等动态驾驶场景中效果更明显。
AI.conclusion: 该工作说明驾驶VLA性能瓶颈的关键不在于模型规模或训练量，而在于任务表述是否合理；通过引入未来视觉监督并将轨迹解码重构为逆运动学式求解，可以显著提升视觉 grounding 与规划能力。

title: RECIPE: Procedural Planning via Grounding in Instructional Video
summary: Visual planning asks a model to generate the remaining steps of a procedure in natural language given a partial video context and a goal. Progress on this task is bottlenecked by annotation: clean labeled datasets are small, domain-narrow, and encode a single execution trajectory per example, even though many valid orderings exist. Large-scale instructional video corpora offer orders of magnitude more procedural content, but supervised fine-tuning on pseudo-labels from their noisy ASR narrations propagates segmentation and alignment errors and stays single-trajectory. We identify a key asymmetry: extracting clean step labels from noisy video is hard, but verifying whether a generated step sequence is temporally grounded in ASR transcripts is cheap and scales to millions of videos via precomputed text embeddings. We exploit this asymmetry in RECIPE, which uses grounding quality as a reward for GRPO, turning the noisy corpus into a verifier rather than a label source. The framework applies uniformly to two planner input configurations (Socratic, with a textual history extracted by a frozen VLM, and Video, consuming video tokens directly) and to annotated and weakly supervised regimes. We evaluate on 7 procedural benchmarks using a reference-based LLM-as-judge protocol scoring plans across 6 procedural criteria. RECIPE-RL improves over the base checkpoint at all scales (0.5B, 3B, 7B) and every benchmark, with macro-accuracy gains of +7 to +8 points in-domain and up to +16 points zero-shot. It outperforms supervised fine-tuning on both annotated and pseudo-labeled plans (the latter degrades the base) and remains robust without human annotations. Used as the proposal stage of a prior propose-assess-search planner, it improves over the strongest zero-shot baseline at every horizon on Visual Planning for Assistance, and on COIN it preserves the generation diversity that SFT collapses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RECIPE，一种利用大规模教学视频中的ASR文本作为“验证器”而非伪标签来源的强化学习框架，用生成步骤序列与转录文本的时序对齐质量作为奖励，缓解视觉规划任务中的标注稀缺和单轨迹问题，并在多个规模与基准上显著优于监督微调。
AI.motivation: 视觉规划需要根据部分视频上下文和目标生成剩余步骤，但高质量标注数据稀缺、领域狭窄且每个样本通常只含单一执行轨迹，无法覆盖真实操作中的多种合法顺序。大规模教学视频虽包含丰富过程知识，但直接基于噪声ASR伪标签做监督微调会引入分割和对齐错误，并继续固化单轨迹偏置，因此需要一种能利用海量弱监督数据、同时避免错误标签传播的方法。
AI.method: RECIPE利用一个关键不对称性：从噪声视频中提取干净步骤标签很难，但判断模型生成的步骤序列是否在ASR转录中得到时序支撑相对容易。作者将这种“grounding quality”作为奖励信号，采用GRPO进行强化学习，把大规模噪声语料转化为验证器而非标签源。该框架同时适用于两种输入设置：Socratic（由冻结VLM提取文本历史）和Video（直接消费视频token），并可在有标注与弱监督两种训练范式下工作。
AI.result: 在7个程序性基准上、使用基于参考答案的LLM-as-judge协议并从6个过程性标准评估，RECIPE-RL在0.5B、3B、7B各规模及所有基准上都优于基础模型，域内宏平均准确率提升约7到8个百分点，零样本条件下最高提升达16个百分点。它同时超过了基于人工标注和伪标注步骤的监督微调，其中伪标注SFT甚至会削弱基础模型表现。将其作为先验“提议-评估-搜索”规划器的提议阶段时，在Visual Planning for Assistance上各个预测跨度都优于最强零样本基线；在COIN上还能保持SFT会压缩掉的生成多样性。
AI.conclusion: RECIPE表明，大规模噪声教学视频不必先被转化为高质量步骤标签，也可以通过“可验证的时序对齐奖励”直接用于训练视觉规划器。该方法在不同模型规模、输入形式和监督强度下都有效，兼顾性能提升与生成多样性，说明基于验证的弱监督强化学习是缓解程序生成任务标注瓶颈的有效方向。

title: WildRoadBench: A Wild Aerial Road-Damage Grounding Benchmark for Vision-Language Models and Autonomous Agents
summary: We introduce WildRoadBench, a wild aerial road-damage grounding benchmark that couples direct visual grounding by vision-language models with autonomous research-and-engineering by LLM-driven agents on a single professionally annotated UAV corpus. The same image set and the same per-class AP_50 metric are evaluated under two protocols. The VLM Track measures whether a fixed VLM can localise domain-specific damage from one image and one short prompt under a unified prompting, decoding and parsing pipeline. The Agent Track measures whether an autonomous agent, given only a written task brief, a small exploratory slice and a fixed interaction budget, can search the public web, adapt pretrained components, write training and inference code, and submit predictions through a scalar-feedback oracle on a hidden holdout. We benchmark a broad pool of closed-source frontier models and open-source VLMs together with several frontier LLM-driven agents. Both routes remain far from reliable performance in this wild setting: closed-source frontier models lead the VLM leaderboard but still leave more than half of the metric on the table; open-source grounders plateau well below them, and newer generations or reasoning-style variants do not consistently improve grounding; small targets collapse for every open-source model; agents lag the strongest VLM despite richer affordances, and several fail to land a valid submission within the budget. We release the code and data at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/wildroadbench-0607 to support reproducible follow-up research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为WildRoadBench的无人机道路损伤基准，在同一套专业标注图像上同时评测视觉语言模型（VLM）的直接定位能力和LLM驱动智能体的自主研究工程能力，结果显示现有方法在该野外场景中整体表现仍然较弱。
AI.motivation: 现有道路损伤检测与定位方法在真实、复杂、野外无人机图像上的泛化能力不足，因此需要一个既能评估固定模型的视觉定位能力，又能评估智能体端到端研究与实现能力的统一基准。
AI.method: 作者构建了WildRoadBench，并在同一图像集和相同的AP_50指标下设置两个协议：VLM Track用于测试固定VLM在单图像、短提示和统一解码解析流程下的损伤定位能力；Agent Track用于测试LLM驱动智能体在仅有任务说明、小规模探索数据和固定交互预算条件下，是否能通过网络检索、组件适配、代码编写与推理提交完成任务。
AI.result: 实验覆盖了多种闭源前沿模型、开源VLM以及若干前沿LLM智能体。结果表明，闭源前沿模型在VLM排行榜上领先，但仍未达到令人满意的水平；开源模型整体明显落后，小目标几乎对所有开源模型都造成明显退化；新一代模型或推理风格变体并未稳定提升定位效果；智能体虽然具备更多操作自由度，但总体仍落后于最强VLM，且部分智能体甚至无法在预算内完成有效提交。
AI.conclusion: WildRoadBench揭示了当前模型在野外无人机道路损伤 grounding 任务上的显著短板，说明无论是直接视觉定位还是自主智能体式解决方案，都还有很大提升空间；该基准及其代码数据发布有助于推动后续可复现研究。

title: From Prompts to Pavement Through Time: Temporal Grounding in Agentic Scene-to-Plan Reasoning
summary: Recent attempts to support high-level scene interpretation and planning in Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) using ensembles of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) continue to treat time as a secondary property. This lack of temporal grounding leads to inconsistencies in reasoning about continuous actions, undermining both safety and interpretability. This work explores whether temporal conditioning within inter-agent communication can preserve or enhance coherence without introducing degradation in semantic or logical consistency. To investigate this, we introduce three planner architectures with progressively increasing temporal integration and evaluate them on curated subsets of the BDD-X dataset using semantic, syntactic, and logical metrics. Results show that while temporal conditioning reshapes reasoning style, it yields no statistically significant improvements in standard NLP-based correctness metrics. However, qualitative analysis reveals predictive hazard reasoning, stable corrective behavior, and strategic divergence in the Sentinel. These findings clarify the limits of prompt-based temporal grounding and establish the first empirical benchmark for temporal scene-to-plan reasoning.

AI.tldr: 该摘要研究了在自动驾驶场景理解与规划中，引入时间条件是否能提升多模型协作推理的一致性。实验表明，时间条件会改变推理风格，但在常规NLP正确性指标上并未带来显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型和多模态模型的自动驾驶场景理解与规划方法往往忽视时间因素，导致对连续动作的推理不稳定，影响安全性与可解释性。作者希望验证：在智能体间通信中加入时间约束，是否能改善或至少不损害语义与逻辑一致性。
AI.method: 构建了三种规划器架构，时间整合程度逐步增强；在BDD-X数据集的精选子集上进行评估；使用语义、句法和逻辑指标进行量化分析，并结合定性分析观察推理行为变化。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，时间条件确实改变了推理表达方式，但在标准基于NLP的正确性指标上没有统计显著提升。定性分析则发现，系统表现出一定的风险预判、稳定的纠错行为以及策略性差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究说明，单纯通过提示词级别的时间建模，对场景到规划的推理提升存在明显局限。与此同时，该工作建立了首个面向时间场景到规划推理的实证基准，为后续研究提供了评测参考。

title: CutVerse: A Compositional GUI Agents Benchmark for Media Post-Production Editing
summary: While GUI agents have made significant progress in web navigation and basic operating system tasks, their capabilities in professional creative workflows remain largely underexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce Cutverse, a benchmark designed to systematically evaluate autonomous GUI agents in realistic media post-production environments.
