We curate expert demonstrations across 7 professional applications (e.g., Premiere Pro, Photoshop), covering 186 complex, long-horizon tasks grounded in authentic editing workflows, involving dense multimodal interfaces and tightly coupled interaction sequences. To support scalable evaluation, we develop a lightweight parser that transforms raw screen recordings and low-level interaction logs into structured, compositional GUI action trajectories with precise grounding. Extensive evaluations reveal that existing agents achieve only 36.0\% task success on realistic media editing tasks, underscoring the challenges posed by complex, long-horizon media post-production workflows in our benchmark.While current models demonstrate promising spatial grounding, multimodal alignment, and coordinated action execution, they remain limited in long-horizon reliability and domain-specific planning.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Cutverse的基准，用于评测自治GUI代理在专业媒体后期制作工作流中的能力。该基准包含7款专业应用、186个复杂长程任务，并提供可扩展的结构化评测方法；实验显示现有代理在真实媒体编辑任务上的成功率仅为36.0%。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI代理在网页导航和基础系统任务上已有进展，但在专业创意工作流，尤其是媒体后期制作场景中的能力仍缺乏系统评估。作者希望通过真实、复杂、长流程的编辑任务，填补这一评测空白。
AI.method: 构建Cutverse基准，收集来自7个专业应用的专家演示，覆盖186个真实编辑任务，任务具有多模态界面密集、交互链条紧密、流程长等特点。同时开发轻量级解析器，将原始屏幕录制和底层交互日志转换为结构化、可组合的GUI动作轨迹，以支持精细且可扩展的评测。
AI.result: 大规模评测表明，现有代理在该基准上的任务成功率只有36.0%。虽然模型在空间定位、多模态对齐和协同动作执行方面表现出一定能力，但在长程任务可靠性和领域特定规划方面仍明显不足。
AI.conclusion: Cutverse揭示了当前GUI代理在专业媒体后期制作场景中的关键短板，说明复杂长流程、强耦合的创意工作流仍是自治代理的重要挑战，也为后续研究提供了更贴近真实应用的评测平台。

title: Concept-Guided Noisy Negative Suppression for Zero-Shot Classification and Grounding of Chest X-Ray Findings
summary: Vision-language alignment using chest X-rays and radiology reports has emerged as an advanced paradigm for zero-shot classification and grounding of chest X-ray findings. However, standard contrastive learning typically treats radiographs and reports from different patients simply as negative pairs. This assumption introduces noisy negatives, as different patients frequently exhibit similar findings. Such noisy negatives cause semantic ambiguity and degrade performance in zero-shot understanding tasks. To address this challenge, we propose CoNNS, a concept-guided noisy-negative suppression framework. To support the negative suppression mechanism, unlike previous methods that use raw reports or templatized texts, we construct a hierarchical concept ontology using large language models. The ontology structures 41 key clinical concepts by explicitly modeling presence, attributes (location and characteristics), and texts (evidential segment and presence statement). Leveraging this ontology, we implement a cross-patient pair relabeling strategy comprising three steps: (1) Fine-Grained Breakdown to categorize pairs based on finding presence; (2) Noisy Negative Filtering to resolve semantic conflicts by removing false negatives; and (3) Hard Negative Mining to identify subtle attribute discrepancies using a lightweight language model. Finally, we propose a Concept-Aware NCE loss to align visual features with text while suppressing the identified noisy negatives. Extensive experiments across multi-granularity zero-shot grounding tasks and five zero-shot classification datasets validate that CoNNS outperforms existing state-of-the-art models. The code is available at https://github.com/DopamineLcy/conns.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoNNS，一种概念引导的噪声负样本抑制框架，用于胸部X光与放射学报告的视觉-语言对齐，旨在缓解标准对比学习中不同患者间“假负样本”带来的语义歧义，从而提升零样本分类与定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有胸部X光-报告对齐方法通常把不同患者的图文配对直接视为负样本，但不同患者可能具有相似病灶，这会产生大量噪声负样本，导致语义混淆并削弱零样本理解任务效果。
AI.method: 作者构建了一个由大语言模型辅助生成的层次化概念本体，覆盖41个关键临床概念，并显式建模存在性、属性（位置与特征）以及文本证据片段和存在陈述。基于该本体，提出跨患者配对重标注策略：首先进行细粒度拆分以按病灶存在情况分类；然后通过噪声负样本过滤消除语义冲突和假负样本；最后利用轻量语言模型挖掘细微属性差异以识别困难负样本。进一步设计概念感知的NCE损失，在对齐视觉特征与文本的同时抑制已识别的噪声负样本。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，CoNNS在多粒度零样本定位任务和5个零样本分类数据集上均优于现有最先进方法，说明其对噪声负样本的抑制机制能够有效提升视觉-语言对齐质量和下游零样本性能。
AI.conclusion: CoNNS通过概念本体建模、跨患者重标注和概念感知对比学习，系统性解决了胸部X光零样本对齐中的假负样本问题，为医学影像-文本联合理解提供了一种更稳健的训练范式。

title: AQuaUI: Visual Token Reduction for GUI Agents with Adaptive Quadtrees
summary: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have recently emerged as promising backbones for GUI-agent models, where high-resolution GUI screenshots are introduced to the prompts at each iteration step. However, these screenshots exhibit highly non-uniform spatial information density: large regions may carry little information and are visually homogeneous, while key text and icons may require high visual fidelity. Existing approaches to this problem either require additional training or rely on attention-based token compression, ignoring the structured layout and spatial redundancy of GUI screenshots. To fill the gap, this paper proposes AquaUI, a training-free inference-time token reduction method for GUI agent models that utilizes the non-uniform information density in screenshots. AQuaUI constructs an adaptive quadtree on each screenshot input and keeps one representative merged token per leaf of the quadtree. AQuaUI preserves the spatial positions of retained tokens throughout the pipeline to ensure that all position-encoding stages remain consistent. To further improve temporal consistency across multi-step GUI interactions, we propose a conditional quadtree algorithm that leverages the continuity between consecutive screenshots within a single request. Specifically, it refines the current quadtree using previous quadtrees as references, helping preserve fine-grained regions across static or mildly shifted GUI states. We implement AQuaUI on state-of-the-art GUI agent models and conduct experiments on standard grounding and navigational benchmarks. AQuaUI consistently shows improved accuracy-efficiency trade-offs over prior baselines. Notably, on GUI-Owl-1.5-32B-Instruct, AQuaUI achieves up to 13.22% speedup and 29.52% fewer visual tokens while retaining 99.06% of full-token performance, suggesting that the spatial redundancy of GUI screenshots can be exploited at inference without retraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AquaUI，一种无需训练的推理阶段GUI截图token压缩方法，通过自适应四叉树利用截图中不均匀的信息密度，在尽量保留关键信息的同时减少视觉token数量。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体通常将高分辨率截图直接输入多模态模型，但GUI截图存在大量空间冗余：背景区域信息少，而文本和图标区域信息密集。已有方法要么需要额外训练，要么仅基于注意力进行token压缩，未充分利用GUI截图的结构化布局与空间冗余，因此需要一种训练开销低、适配推理阶段的token减少方案。
AI.method: AquaUI在每张截图上构建自适应四叉树，根据局部信息密度进行区域划分，并在每个叶节点保留一个代表性合并token，同时在整个流程中保持token的空间位置一致，以兼容位置编码。为增强多步交互中的时序一致性，作者进一步设计条件四叉树算法，利用前一时刻四叉树作为参考，对当前截图进行细化，从而在静态或轻微位移场景下保留细粒度区域。
AI.result: 在标准grounding与navigation基准上，AquaUI相较已有基线取得了更好的精度-效率权衡。以GUI-Owl-1.5-32B-Instruct为例，最高实现13.22%的速度提升、29.52%的视觉token减少，同时保留99.06%的全token性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，GUI截图中的空间冗余可以在不重新训练模型的前提下通过推理阶段的结构化token压缩有效利用；AquaUI证明了自适应四叉树是一种兼顾效率与性能的有效方案。

title: MementoGUI: Learning Agentic Multimodal Memory Control for Long-Horizon GUI Agents
summary: Recent GUI agents have made substantial progress in visual grounding and action prediction, yet they remain brittle in long-horizon tasks that require maintaining task state across many interface transitions. Existing agents typically rely on raw history replay or text-only memory, which either overwhelms the model with redundant screenshots or discards localized visual evidence needed for future decisions. To address these limitations, we introduce \textbf{MementoGUI}, a plug-in agentic memory framework that equips MLLM-based GUI agents with \textbf{MementoCore}, a learned controller for online memory selection, compression, and retrieval. Rather than treating interaction history as a fixed context, MementoGUI formulates long-horizon GUI control as an online memory-control problem: working memory selectively preserves task-relevant interface events with textual summaries and ROI-level visual evidence, while episodic memory retrieves reusable past trajectories through learned relevance selection. MementoCore modularizes memory control into specialized operators for step processing, memory compression, episodic writing, and episodic selection, enabling plug-in memory augmentation without finetuning the GUI agent backbone. We further develop a scalable data curation pipeline that converts computer-use trajectories into memory-controller training data, introduce \textbf{MementoGUI-Bench} for evaluating long-horizon decision-making in GUI agents, and design MLLM-based metrics for semantic action matching, task progress, and memory consistency. Experiments on GUI-Odyssey, MM-Mind2Web, and MementoGUI-Bench show that MementoGUI consistently improves GUI agents over no-history, history-replay, and text-only memory baselines, with larger MementoCore backbones further strengthening memory-augmented GUI control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于GUI智能体的插件式记忆框架MementoGUI，通过在线记忆选择、压缩与检索来增强长程任务中的状态保持与决策能力，减少原始历史回放带来的冗余与纯文本记忆丢失局部视觉证据的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体虽然在视觉定位和动作预测上有进展，但在需要跨多个界面切换持续维护任务状态的长程任务中表现脆弱；原始历史回放信息过载，纯文本记忆又会丢失关键视觉细节，因此需要一种更高效、更可控的记忆机制。
AI.method: 作者提出MementoGUI框架，其中核心组件MementoCore作为学习型控制器，负责在线记忆选择、压缩和检索；工作记忆保留带文本摘要和ROI级视觉证据的任务相关事件，情景记忆通过学习到的相关性选择可复用轨迹；同时设计了可插拔的记忆控制操作模块，并构建了将computer-use轨迹转为训练数据的数据管线，提出MementoGUI-Bench及基于MLLM的评测指标。
AI.result: 实验在GUI-Odyssey、MM-Mind2Web和MementoGUI-Bench上表明，MementoGUI相较于无历史、历史回放和纯文本记忆基线均有稳定提升；更大的MementoCore骨干还能进一步增强记忆辅助的GUI控制效果。
AI.conclusion: MementoGUI证明了将长程GUI控制建模为在线记忆控制问题是有效的，其插件式设计无需对GUI骨干模型进行微调即可提升长程任务性能，并为GUI智能体记忆机制与评测提供了可扩展方案。

title: TIGER-FG: Text-Guided Implicit Fine-Grained Grounding for E-commerce Retrieval
summary: E-commerce image search often takes a cropped image as the query, while each candidate is represented by full item images and structured text. This image-to-multimodal retrieval setting presents two asymmetries: a modality disparity -- a visual query must match image--text items, and a granularity disparity -- a cropped query must be compared with full images containing background context and possible distractors. Detection-based pipelines handle the granularity disparity through explicit localization but incur extra cost and error propagation, whereas CLIP-style encoders avoid detection, but are vulnerable to backgrounds or irrelevant items. To address these limitations, we propose TIGER-FG, a text-guided implicit fine-grained grounding framework for image-to-multimodal e-commerce retrieval. TIGER-FG uses item text as semantic guidance to produce target-focused item representations without object detection for retrieval. We further introduce dual distillation objectives that preserve target-region spatial consistency and query--item similarity structure, yielding more stable and discriminative multimodal representations. In addition, we construct ECom-RF-IMMR, a realistic benchmark suite with a 10M-pair training set and two evaluation benchmarks covering standard and cluttered item layouts. TIGER-FG improves Recall@1 over the strongest baseline by 6.1 and 34.4 percentage points on the two evaluation benchmarks, respectively, with only 85.7M query-side parameters and 256-dim embeddings. Results on public e-commerce benchmarks further demonstrate its generalization to noisy and one-to-many retrieval scenarios. Code and data will be released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TIGER-FG，一种面向电商图像检索的文本引导隐式细粒度定位框架，利用商品文本指导图像编码，在不依赖显式检测的情况下生成更聚焦目标的多模态表示，并通过双蒸馏目标提升稳定性与判别性。
AI.motivation: 电商图像检索中，查询通常是裁剪图，而候选商品由整图和结构化文本组成，存在模态差异与粒度差异。现有检测式方法虽能处理粒度问题，但成本高且易误差传播；CLIP式方法虽简洁，但容易受背景和无关物体干扰，因此需要一种兼顾效率与鲁棒性的方案。
AI.method: 提出TIGER-FG框架，使用商品文本作为语义引导，对商品图像进行隐式细粒度聚焦表示学习，无需目标检测；同时设计双蒸馏目标，一方面保持目标区域的空间一致性，另一方面保留查询与商品之间的相似度结构，从而学习更稳定、区分性更强的多模态表征。
AI.result: 构建了ECom-RF-IMMR基准，包含1000万对训练数据及两个评测集，覆盖标准与杂乱布局。实验显示，TIGER-FG在两个评测基准上的Recall@1分别较最强基线提升6.1和34.4个百分点，仅使用85.7M查询侧参数和256维嵌入；在公开电商基准上也表现出对噪声与一对多检索场景的良好泛化。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，利用文本引导的隐式细粒度定位可以有效缓解电商图像检索中的背景干扰与粒度不匹配问题，在保持较低复杂度的同时显著提升检索性能，并具备较强的泛化能力。

title: Visualizing the Invisible: Generative Visual Grounding Empowers Universal EEG Understanding in MLLMs
summary: Leveraging the universal representations of pre-trained LLMs and MLLMs offers a promising path toward brain foundation models. However, visually-evoked EEG datasets remain scarce, leading existing methods to align neural signals mainly with abstract text, a lossy translation that may discard fine-grained perceptual information encoded in brain activity. We propose Generative Visual Grounding (GVG), a framework that visualizes the invisible by using an EEG-to-image generative model as a visual translator. Instead of forcing EEG into text alone, GVG hallucinates instance-specific proxy images for non-visual EEG, providing structured visual contexts that allow MLLMs to exploit their visual priors for clinical-state interpretation. We validate this idea on two MLLM backbones, GVG-X-Omni and GVG-Janus. Image-only alignment is already competitive: the lightweight GVG-X-Omni matches 1.7B-parameter text-aligned baselines while tuning only 170M parameters on a frozen 7B backbone. We further extend GVG-Janus with trimodal Image+Text alignment, where text supplies categorical semantic anchors and visual proxies enrich neural representations with perceptual details. Experiments show consistent gains in EEG understanding and visual generation, suggesting visual proxy grounding as an effective complement to textual alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成式视觉锚定框架GVG，用EEG到图像的生成模型为非视觉EEG合成实例级代理图像，从而把脑信号从仅文本对齐扩展到视觉上下文对齐，提升多模态大模型对EEG的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有脑基础模型研究受限于带视觉刺激的EEG数据稀缺，很多方法只能把EEG对齐到抽象文本，这种映射信息损失较大，可能丢掉脑活动中编码的细粒度感知信息，因此需要一种更保留感知细节的对齐方式。
AI.method: 提出Generative Visual Grounding（GVG）框架，使用EEG到图像生成模型作为“视觉翻译器”，为非视觉EEG生成对应的代理图像；在此基础上验证了两个多模态大模型骨干：GVG-X-Omni和GVG-Janus。其中GVG-X-Omni采用图像单模态对齐，在冻结7B骨干的情况下仅微调170M参数；GVG-Janus进一步加入图像+文本三模态对齐，用文本提供语义类别锚点、用生成图像补充感知细节。
AI.result: 实验表明，图像单模态对齐已经具有竞争力，轻量级GVG-X-Omni在参数效率上可匹敌1.7B参数的文本对齐基线；加入图像+文本后，GVG-Janus在EEG理解和图像生成任务上都取得持续提升，说明视觉代理信息能有效增强神经表征。
AI.conclusion: 视觉代理锚定是一种可行且有效的补充策略，能够弥补纯文本对齐对EEG信息表达不足的问题，为构建更强的脑基础模型提供了新路径。

title: DocOS: Towards Proactive Document-Guided Actions in GUI Agents
summary: While Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents have shown promising performance in automated device interaction, they primarily depend on static parametric knowledge from pre-training or instruction tuning. This reliance fundamentally limits their ability to handle long-tailed tasks that require explicit procedural knowledge absent from model parameters, often forcing agents to resort to inefficient and brittle trial-and-error exploration. To mitigate this limitation, we introduce \textbf{Proactive Document-Guided Action} for GUI agents in dynamic, open-web environments, a novel paradigm that mirrors human problem-solving by enabling agents to autonomously search for relevant documentation to resolve long-tailed tasks. To evaluate agents' capability in this paradigm, we propose \textbf{DocOS}, a benchmark designed to assess document-guided problem solving in fully interactive environments. DocOS requires agents to autonomously navigate a web browser, locate relevant online documentation, comprehend procedural instructions, and faithfully ground them into executable GUI actions. Extensive experiments reveal that progress is strictly constrained by dual bottlenecks: agents struggle to reliably locate relevant information during proactive search and frequently fail to faithfully ground retrieved instructions into precise actions, pointing toward document-guided interaction as a crucial pathway for enabling self-evolving GUI agents in dynamic environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向GUI智能体的新范式“主动文档引导行动”，让智能体在开放式网页环境中先自主检索相关文档，再将文档中的流程性知识转化为可执行操作；同时构建了评测基准DocOS，用于衡量这类能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体主要依赖预训练或指令微调中的静态参数知识，面对长尾任务时，往往缺少显式流程知识，只能通过低效且脆弱的试错来完成任务，因此需要一种能够按需获取外部文档知识的方法。
AI.method: 作者提出“Proactive Document-Guided Action”框架，并设计DocOS基准，在完全交互式环境中评估智能体是否能够自主浏览网页、定位相关在线文档、理解操作步骤，并将文档中的指令准确映射为GUI动作。
AI.result: 实验表明，当前智能体的进展主要受两类瓶颈限制：一是主动搜索阶段难以稳定找到相关信息；二是即使检索到文档，也常无法将其中的步骤忠实、准确地转化为具体操作。
AI.conclusion: 文档引导式交互是提升动态环境中GUI智能体能力的重要方向，未来“自我进化”的GUI智能体需要增强主动检索、文档理解与动作落地这三方面能力。

title: DiagEval: Trajectory-Conditioned Diagnosis for Reliable Software Evaluation with GUI Agents
summary: Evaluating LLM-generated interactive software requires execution in addition to static analysis. The key difficulty is that correctness is a graph-level reachable property over latent UI state-transition graphs, whereas a GUI evaluator observes only a single execution trajectory. A failed rollout therefore rules out only one realized path, leaving failure attribution ambiguous between evaluator-side execution error and genuine software defect. We present DiagEval, a trajectory-conditioned diagnostic evaluation protocol for post-failure GUI-agent evaluation of interactive software. Rather than blindly retrying from scratch, DiagEval reuses the failed trajectory to choose targeted diagnostic probes and aggregates their outcomes into an internal attribution signal. The latent-graph view motivates the diagnostic problem; DiagEval does not reconstruct the graph or estimate calibrated posterior probabilities. We evaluate DiagEval on WebDevJudge-Unit and RealDevBench across multiple GUI-agent evaluators and LLM backbones. On false-negative cases, DiagEval recovers 45.6-62.1% of failures that were initially misattributed to software defects, outperforming retry-based baselines with 34.4-160.6% relative gains. On the full evaluation sets, this recovery improves accuracy from 69.9% to 78.3% on WebDevJudge-Unit and from 65.0% to 81.6% on RealDevBench. These results suggest that reliable GUI-agent evaluation requires not only stronger execution, but also active failure diagnosis to disambiguate evaluator-side errors from genuine software defects. Our code is available at https://github.com/scutGit/DiagEval.

AI.tldr: 提出DiagEval，一种面向交互式软件评估的轨迹条件诊断协议，用失败轨迹来做定向探测，从而区分评测器执行错误与真实软件缺陷，显著提升GUI代理评估准确率。
AI.motivation: 静态分析不足以评估LLM生成的交互式软件，因为正确性依赖于潜在的UI状态转移图，而评测器通常只能看到单条执行轨迹。一次失败回放只能排除一条路径，无法明确失败究竟来自评测器还是软件本身，因此需要更可靠的故障归因方法。
AI.method: DiagEval不从头盲目重试，而是复用失败轨迹，选择针对性的诊断探针，并将探针结果聚合为内部归因信号。它基于潜在图视角提出诊断问题，但不重建完整图结构，也不估计校准后的后验概率。
AI.result: 在WebDevJudge-Unit和RealDevBench上，DiagEval针对假阴性案例可恢复45.6%到62.1%的原本被误判为软件缺陷的失败，相比重试基线有34.4%到160.6%的相对提升；在完整评测集上，准确率从69.9%提升到78.3%，以及从65.0%提升到81.6%。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的GUI代理评估不仅需要更强的执行能力，还需要主动的失败诊断来区分评测器侧错误与真实软件缺陷。DiagEval证明了基于失败轨迹的定向诊断能够有效提升交互式软件评估的准确性。

title: EPIC-Bench: A Perception-Centric Benchmark for Fine-Grained Embodied Visual Grounding in Vision-Language Models
summary: While large vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly adopted as the perceptual backbone for embodied agents, existing benchmarks often rely on question-answering or multiple-choice formats. These protocols allow models to exploit linguistic priors rather than demonstrating genuine visual grounding. To address this, we present EPIC-Bench, Embodied PerceptIon BenChmark, a fine-grained grounding benchmark designed to systematically evaluate the visual perceptual capabilities of VLMs in real-world embodied environments. Comprising 6.6k meticulously annotated tuples (Image, Text, Mask), EPIC-Bench spans 23 fine-grained tasks across three core stages of the embodied interaction pipeline: Target Localization, Navigation, and Manipulation. Extensive evaluations of over 89 leading VLMs reveal that while advanced reasoning models show promise, current VLMs universally struggle with complex visual-text alignment for physical interactions. Specifically, models exhibit critical bottlenecks in multi-target counting, part-whole relationship understanding, and affordance region detection. EPIC-Bench provides a robust foundation and actionable insights for advancing the next generation of vision-driven embodied models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EPIC-Bench，一个面向具身智能的细粒度视觉对齐评测基准，用于更真实地检验大视觉语言模型在实体环境中的感知能力，而不仅仅是问答式推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能评测多采用问答或多选形式，模型可能依赖语言先验而非真正的视觉理解，因此需要一个能够系统评估真实视觉 grounding 的基准。
AI.method: 构建了EPIC-Bench，包含6600个精细标注的（图像，文本，掩码）三元组，覆盖23个细粒度任务，并按具身交互流程划分为目标定位、导航和操作三阶段；随后对89个以上主流VLM进行全面评测。
AI.result: 评测显示，尽管部分高级推理模型表现较好，但总体上当前VLM在复杂视觉-文本对齐上仍存在明显困难，尤其是在多目标计数、部分-整体关系理解以及可供性区域检测等任务上表现薄弱。
AI.conclusion: EPIC-Bench为具身视觉模型提供了更可靠的评测基础，也揭示了当前模型在真实物理交互感知方面的关键瓶颈，可为后续模型改进提供明确方向。

title: TRACE: Evidence Grounding-Guided Multi-Video Event Understanding and Claim Generation
summary: Multi-video event understanding demands models that can locate and attribute query-relevant evidence scattered across long, heterogeneous video corpora. Existing large vision-language models (LVLMs) often underperform in this regime because they quickly exhaust their context budget and struggle to precisely localize evidentially important segments, frequently missing dense informational cues such as broadcast graphics, subtitles, and scoreboards. We introduce TRACE, an evidence grounding-guided framework that follows a ground-before-reasoning strategy for multi-video event reasoning. Our approach first builds a structured, text-searchable timeline for each video using OCR and object detection. A text-only LLM then conducts query-aware evidence localization, selecting relevant moments prior to any downstream visual reasoning. The retrieved frames and their grounding summaries are subsequently used to steer LVLM-based claim generation and cross-video citation consolidation. Experiments on MAGMaR 2026 and WikiVideo demonstrate that structured grounding markedly boosts factual completeness and attribution fidelity. On the MAGMaR validation split, TRACE raises macro-average MiRAGE F1 from 0.705 to 0.811 compared to an unguided Qwen3-VL-30B baseline, with especially strong improvements in citation recall from 0.440 to 0.628. The method also attains state-of-the-art results on the official MAGMaR 2026 leaderboard. Code is released at https://github.com/pengyu965/TRACE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRACE，一种面向多视频事件理解的“先定位证据、再推理”框架，通过结构化时间线与文本检索先找出与查询相关的关键片段，再指导多模态模型生成结论与完成跨视频引用整合，从而提升事实完整性与证据归因能力。
AI.motivation: 多视频事件理解需要在长且异构的视频库中定位分散证据，但现有大视觉语言模型容易受上下文长度限制，且难以精确锁定关键片段，尤其容易遗漏字幕、OCR图形和比分牌等密集信息，因此需要更强的证据定位与归因机制。
AI.method: TRACE采用“先grounding后reasoning”的流程：先对每个视频利用OCR和目标检测构建可文本检索的结构化时间线；再由纯文本LLM基于查询进行证据定位，选择相关时刻；随后将检索到的帧及其grounding摘要输入LVLM，用于生成主张并整合跨视频引用。
AI.result: 在MAGMaR 2026和WikiVideo实验中，TRACE显著提升了事实完整性与引用准确性。于MAGMaR验证集上，宏平均MiRAGE F1由0.705提升至0.811，引用召回率由0.440提升至0.628，并在官方MAGMaR 2026排行榜上达到当前最优结果。
AI.conclusion: 结构化证据grounding能有效缓解长视频语境下的信息遗漏问题，显著增强多视频事件推理中的事实覆盖和证据归因；TRACE证明了“先定位、后推理”是一条有效的技术路线。

title: From Failure to Feedback: Group Revision Unlocks Hard Cases in Object-Level Grounding
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2026
summary: Finetuning Large Vision-Language Models with reinforcement learning has emerged as a promising approach to enhance their capability in object-level grounding. However, existing methods, mainly based on GRPO, assign rewards at the response level. Such sparse reward, often criterion-induced, leads to minimal learning signals when all candidate responses fail in challenging scenarios. In this work, we propose a group-revision optimisation paradigm that enhances learning on hard cases. It begins with a sampled initial response and generates a set of revised candidates to explore improved grounding outcomes. Inspired by reward shaping, we introduce a consolidation process that quantifies each candidate's improvement over the initial attempt and converts it into informative shaping signals. These signals are used to both refine the reward and modulate the advantage, amplifying the influence of high-quality revisions. Our method achieves consistent gains across referring and reasoning segmentation, REC, and counting benchmarks compared with prior GRPO-based models. Our code is available at https://github.com/yyliu01/GroupRevision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于大型视觉语言模型微调的组修订优化范式，通过生成多个修订候选并将其相对初始答案的改进转化为奖励塑形信号，缓解基于响应级稀疏奖励在困难样本上的学习不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GRPO的方法主要在响应层面分配奖励，奖励信号稀疏，尤其在复杂场景下若所有候选都失败，模型几乎得不到有效学习信号，因此需要更密集、更有信息量的训练反馈来提升对象级定位能力。
AI.method: 方法从一个采样得到的初始响应出发，进一步生成一组修订候选以探索更优的定位结果；随后设计“整合”过程，量化每个候选相对初始响应的改进幅度，并将其转换为奖励塑形信号；这些信号同时用于细化奖励和调节优势函数，从而增强高质量修订结果对训练的贡献。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在指代分割、推理分割、目标识别和计数等多个基准上，相比之前的GRPO类模型取得了稳定提升。
AI.conclusion: 组修订优化通过将“修订过程中的改进”显式纳入训练信号，能更有效地处理困难样本并强化对象级对齐能力，是对现有响应级强化学习微调的一种有益改进。

title: DRS-GUI: Dynamic Region Search for Training-Free GUI Grounding
summary: GUI agents powered by Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated impressive capability in understanding and executing user instructions. However, accurately grounding instruction-relevant elements from high-resolution screenshots cluttered with irrelevant UI components remains challenging for existing approaches. Inspired by how humans dynamically adjust their perceptual scope to locate task-related regions on complex screens, we propose DRS-GUI, a training-free dynamic region search framework for GUI grounding that can be seamlessly integrated into existing MLLMs. DRS-GUI introduces a lightweight UI Perceptor that performs three human-like perceptual actions (Focus, Shift, and Scatter) to progressively explore the interface and generate region proposals. To dynamically schedule these actions, we further design an Action Planner based on Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS). A region quality reward is employed to evaluate and select the highly instruction-relevant region, efficiently pruning redundant UI elements. Experiments demonstrate that DRS-GUI yields a 14\% improvement on ScreenSpot-Pro for general and GUI-specific MLLMs (Qwen2.5-VL-7B and UGround-V1-7B), significantly enhancing grounding performance and generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个无需训练的GUI定位框架DRS-GUI，用于在高分辨率、元素密集的界面截图中更准确地找到与指令相关的区域，并可无缝接入现有多模态大模型。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI代理在复杂界面上难以从大量无关UI组件中准确定位任务相关元素，导致指令理解后的落点不够稳定。作者借鉴人类会根据任务动态缩小或扩展观察范围的方式，旨在提升界面区域检索与定位能力。
AI.method: DRS-GUI包含两个核心部分：一是轻量级UI感知器，执行三种类人感知动作——聚焦、移动和扩散——逐步探索界面并生成候选区域；二是基于蒙特卡洛树搜索的动作规划器，用于动态决定何时使用哪种动作。系统再通过区域质量奖励对候选区域进行评分，筛选出与指令最相关的区域并去除冗余元素。
AI.result: 实验表明，DRS-GUI在ScreenSpot-Pro上对通用和GUI专用多模态大模型（Qwen2.5-VL-7B、UGround-V1-7B）均带来了约14%的性能提升，并显著改善了定位效果与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了训练免费、动态区域搜索的思路能够有效增强GUI grounding性能，尤其适合高分辨率复杂界面中的指令相关区域定位。

title: Video2GUI: Synthesizing Large-Scale Interaction Trajectories for Generalized GUI Agent Pretraining
summary: Recent advances in multimodal large language models have driven growing interest in graphical user interface (GUI) agents, yet their generalization remains constrained by the scarcity of large-scale training data spanning diverse real-world applications. Existing datasets rely heavily on costly manual annotations and are typically confined to narrow domains. To address this challenge, we propose Video2GUI, a fully automated framework that extracts grounded GUI interaction trajectories directly from unlabeled Internet videos. Video2GUI employs a coarse-to-fine filtering strategy to identify high-quality GUI tutorial videos and convert them into structured agent trajectories. Applying this pipeline to 500 million video metadata entries, we construct WildGUI, a large-scale dataset containing 12 million interaction trajectories spanning over 1,500 applications and websites. Pre-training Qwen2.5-VL and Mimo-VL on WildGUI yields consistent improvements of 5-20% across multiple GUI grounding and action benchmarks, matching or surpassing state-of-the-art performance. We will release both the WildGUI dataset and the Video2GUI pipeline to support future research of GUI agents.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个名为Video2GUI的全自动框架，从未标注的互联网视频中提取GUI交互轨迹，并构建了大规模数据集WildGUI，以提升GUI智能体的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI数据集主要依赖昂贵的人工标注，且覆盖场景有限，难以支持模型在真实多样应用中的泛化；因此需要一种可规模化、自动化的数据构建方法。
AI.method: Video2GUI采用粗到细的过滤策略，先从海量视频元数据中筛选高质量GUI教程视频，再将其转换为结构化的智能体交互轨迹；随后基于500万亿?（原文为500 million）视频元数据条目构建了WildGUI数据集，并用于预训练Qwen2.5-VL和Mimo-VL。
AI.result: WildGUI包含1200万条交互轨迹，覆盖1500多个应用和网站；在多个GUI grounding和action基准上，预训练后的模型性能提升5%到20%，达到或超过当前最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了从互联网视频自动挖掘GUI训练数据的可行性，为构建更大规模、更具泛化性的GUI智能体数据集与训练流程提供了有效方案。

title: EARL: Towards a Unified Analysis-Guided Reinforcement Learning Framework for Egocentric Interaction Reasoning and Pixel Grounding
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. Project page: https://github.com/yuggiehk/EARL
summary: Understanding human--environment interactions from egocentric vision is essential for assistive robotics and embodied intelligent agents, yet existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) still struggle with accurate interaction reasoning and fine-grained pixel grounding. To this end, this paper introduces EARL, an Egocentric Analysis-guided Reinforcement Learning framework that explicitly transfers coarse interaction semantics to query-oriented answering and grounding. Specifically, EARL adopts a two-stage parsing framework including coarse-grained interpretation and fine-grained response. The first stage holistically interprets egocentric interactions and generates a structured textual description. The second stage produces the textual answer and pixel-level mask in response to the user query. To bridge the two stages, we extract a global interaction descriptor as a semantic prior, which is integrated via a novel Analysis-guided Feature Synthesizer (AFS) for query-oriented reasoning. To optimize heterogeneous outputs, including textual answers, bounding boxes, and grounding masks, we design a multi-faceted reward function and train the response stage with GRPO. Experiments on Ego-IRGBench show that EARL achieves 65.48% cIoU for pixel grounding, outperforming previous RL-based methods by 8.37%, while OOD grounding results on EgoHOS indicate strong transferability to unseen egocentric grounding scenarios.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出EARL框架，用于从第一人称视角中更准确地理解人机交互，并同时完成问答与像素级定位。方法通过“粗粒度解析+细粒度响应”的两阶段设计、分析引导特征融合模块以及基于强化学习的多目标优化，提升了交互推理和分割定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在第一人称视觉中的交互推理不够准确，且难以实现细粒度像素级 grounding，因此需要一种能将粗略交互语义有效传递到具体问答与定位任务中的框架。
AI.method: 提出EARL（Egocentric Analysis-guided Reinforcement Learning）框架，包含两阶段解析：先进行粗粒度交互解释并生成结构化文本描述，再根据用户问题输出文本答案和像素掩码；通过提取全局交互描述作为语义先验，并用Analysis-guided Feature Synthesizer（AFS）融合到查询驱动推理中；同时设计多维奖励函数，使用GRPO优化文本答案、边界框和分割掩码等异构输出。
AI.result: 在Ego-IRGBench上，EARL的像素级grounding达到65.48% cIoU，较之前基于强化学习的方法提升8.37%；在EgoHOS上的OOD grounding结果表明，该方法对未见过的第一人称场景具有较强迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: EARL通过显式的交互分析与强化学习优化，将粗粒度语义更有效地转化为查询导向的回答和定位结果，显著提升了第一人称视觉中的交互理解与细粒度grounding性能。

title: EvoGround: Self-Evolving Video Agents for Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Video temporal grounding (VTG) takes an untrimmed video and a natural-language query as input and localizes the temporal moment that best matches the query. Existing methods rely on large, task-specific datasets requiring costly manual annotation. We introduce EvoGround, a framework of two coupled self-evolving agents, a proposer and a solver, that learn temporal grounding from raw videos without any human-labeled data. The proposer generates query--moment pairs from raw videos, while the solver learns to ground them and feeds back signals that improve the proposer in return. Through this self-reinforcing reinforcement-learning loop, the two agents are initialized from the same backbone and mutually improve across iterations. Trained on 2.5K unlabeled videos, EvoGround matches or surpasses fully supervised models across multiple VTG benchmarks, while emerging as a state-of-the-art fine-grained video captioner without manual labels.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个名为EvoGround的无标注视频时间定位框架，通过“提议者-求解者”两个耦合的自进化智能体在原始视频上进行互相强化学习，实现无需人工标注即可学习时间片段定位，并在多个基准上达到或超过全监督方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频时间定位方法通常依赖大规模、任务特定且需要昂贵人工标注的数据集，标注成本高、扩展性差，因此需要一种能够利用原始视频自动学习的方案。
AI.method: EvoGround由两个共享同一骨干初始化的智能体组成：提议者从原始视频中生成查询-片段对，求解者学习对这些对进行时间定位，并将反馈信号反向用于改进提议者；二者通过自我强化的循环式强化学习持续迭代优化。
AI.result: 仅使用2.5K个无标注视频训练后，EvoGround在多个视频时间定位基准上可匹配或优于全监督模型，同时在无需人工标注的情况下表现为先进的细粒度视频字幕生成器。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了视频时间定位可以在完全无人工标签的条件下高效学习，双智能体自进化机制能够有效替代昂贵的标注依赖，并具有较强的跨任务泛化能力。

title: Towards Unified Surgical Scene Understanding:Bridging Reasoning and Grounding via MLLMs
summary: Surgical scene understanding is a cornerstone of computer-assisted intervention. While recent advances, particularly in surgical image segmentation, have driven progress, real-world clinical applications require a more holistic understanding that jointly captures procedural context, semantic reasoning, and precise visual grounding. However, existing approaches typically address these components in isolation, leading to fragmented representations and limited semantic consistency. To address this limitation, we propose SurgMLLM, a unified surgical scene understanding framework that bridges high-level reasoning and low-level visual grounding within a single model. Given surgical videos, SurgMLLM fine-tunes a multimodal large language model (MLLM) to support structured interpretability reasoning, which is used to jointly model phases, instrument-verb-target (IVT) triplets, and triplet-entity segmentation tokens. These tokens are then temporally aggregated and serve as prompts for a segmentation network, enabling accurate pixel-wise grounding of triplet instruments and targets. The entire framework is trained end-to-end with a unified objective that couples language-based reasoning supervision with visual grounding losses, promoting coherent cross-task learning and clinically consistent scene representations. To facilitate unified evaluation, we introduce CholecT45-Scene, extending CholecT45 dataset with 64,299 frames of pixel-level mask annotations for instruments and targets, aligned with existing triplet labels. Extensive experiments show that SurgMLLM significantly advances surgical scene understanding, improving the primary triplet recognition metric AP_IVT from 40.7% to 46.0% and consistently outperforming prior methods in phase recognition and segmentation. These results highlight the effectiveness of unified reasoning-and-grounding for reliable, context-aware surgical assistance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SurgMLLM，一个将手术场景中的高层推理与低层视觉定位统一到同一模型中的框架，用于同时建模手术阶段、IVT三元组和像素级分割。
AI.motivation: 现有手术场景理解方法通常将过程上下文、语义推理和视觉分割分开处理，导致表示割裂、语义一致性不足，难以满足临床应用对整体理解的需求。
AI.method: SurgMLLM基于多模态大语言模型进行微调，先生成结构化、可解释的推理结果，再联合建模阶段信息、器械-动词-目标（IVT）三元组以及三元组实体分割token；这些token经过时间聚合后作为分割网络提示，实现对器械和目标的像素级定位。整个框架端到端训练，使用统一目标函数联合语言推理监督与视觉定位损失。同时构建了CholecT45-Scene数据集，在CholecT45基础上增加了64,299帧器械和目标的像素级mask标注。
AI.result: 实验表明，SurgMLLM在手术场景理解任务上取得显著提升，核心指标AP_IVT从40.7%提升到46.0%，并在阶段识别与分割任务上持续优于已有方法。
AI.conclusion: 统一的“推理+定位”范式能够增强跨任务学习的一致性，提升手术场景理解的准确性与临床相关性，为可靠、上下文感知的手术辅助系统提供了有效路径。

title: ReTool-Video: Recursive Tool-Using Video Agents with Meta-Augmented Tool Grounding
summary: Video understanding requires active evidence seeking, motivating tool-augmented video agents for temporal reasoning, cross-modal understanding, and complex question answering. Existing video agents have improved video reasoning with retrieval, memory, frame inspection, and verifier tools, but they still face two limitations: (1) a coarse tool space that lacks fine-grained operations for compositional reasoning; and (2) a flat action space that forces high-level video intents into primitive executable tool calls. In this paper, we address these challenges with two complementary designs. First, we construct a MetaAug-Video Tool Library (MVTL), an extensible tool library with 134 registered tools, including 26 base tools for general multimodal signal processing and 108 meta tools for filtering, aggregation, reranking, formatting, and other intermediate-result operations. MVTL supports dual-level access to both structured video information and raw modal evidence, enabling diverse video reasoning scenarios. Second, we propose ReTool-Video, a recursive tool-using method that grounds high-level video intents into executable tool chains. In ReTool-Video, matched actions are executed directly, while unmatched intents are delegated to a resolver for parameter repair, tool substitution, or decomposition. This allows abstract actions such as temporal merging, cross-modal verification, or repeated-event aggregation to be progressively translated into concrete multimodal operations at runtime. Experiments on MVBench, MLVU, and Video-MME w/o sub. show that ReTool-Video consistently outperforms strong baselines. Further analysis demonstrates that recursive grounding and fine-grained meta tools improve the stability and effectiveness of complex video understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于视频理解的双层工具体系和递归调用方法，以提升复杂视频推理、跨模态理解和问答能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频智能体在工具空间上过于粗糙，缺少适合组合式推理的细粒度操作；同时动作空间过于平面化，难以把高层视频意图直接映射为可执行工具调用。
AI.method: 构建了MetaAug-Video Tool Library（MVTL），包含134个注册工具，其中26个基础工具和108个元工具，用于过滤、聚合、重排序、格式化等中间结果处理；同时提出ReTool-Video递归工具使用方法，将高层意图逐步分解、修复参数或替换工具，并在运行时递归地转换为具体多模态操作链。
AI.result: 在MVBench、MLVU和Video-MME w/o sub.上，ReTool-Video相较强基线取得了稳定更好的表现；分析表明递归落地机制和细粒度元工具能提升复杂视频理解的稳定性与效果。
AI.conclusion: 双层工具库结合递归式意图分解，可以更有效地支持复杂视频推理与跨模态证据利用，是增强视频智能体能力的有效方向。

title: CLIP Tricks You: Training-free Token Pruning for Efficient Pixel Grounding in Large VIsion-Language Models
summary: In large vision-language models, visual tokens typically constitute the majority of input tokens, leading to substantial computational overhead. To address this, recent studies have explored pruning redundant or less informative visual tokens for image understanding tasks. However, these methods struggle with pixel grounding tasks, where token importance is highly contingent on the input text. Through an in-depth analysis of CLIP, we observe that visual tokens within referent regions often exhibit low similarity to their textual representation. Motivated by this insight, we introduce LiteLVLM, a training-free, text-guided token pruning strategy for efficient pixel grounding inference. By reversing the ranking of CLIP's visual-text similarity, LiteLVLM effectively retains visual tokens covering the referent regions, while recovering context tokens to enable clear foreground-background separation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LiteLVLM significantly outperforms existing methods by over 5% across diverse token budgets. Without any training or fine-tuning, LiteLVLM maintains 90% of the original performance with a 22% speedup and a 2.3X memory reduction. Our code is available at https://github.com/sejong-rcv/LiteLVLM.

AI.tldr: 该工作提出了一种无需训练的文本引导视觉令牌剪枝方法LiteLVLM，用于高效的像素定位推理，核心思路是利用CLIP视觉-文本相似度的反向排序来保留目标区域并恢复上下文令牌，从而在降低计算开销的同时保持较高性能。
AI.motivation: 大规模视觉-语言模型中，视觉令牌数量通常占输入的大头，带来显著计算和显存开销。现有令牌剪枝方法虽然适合图像理解任务，但在像素级定位任务中效果不佳，因为令牌重要性强烈依赖输入文本，且目标区域内的视觉令牌在CLIP中往往与文本相似度较低，容易被误删。
AI.method: LiteLVLM是一种训练自由的文本引导令牌剪枝策略。作者先分析CLIP中视觉令牌与文本表示的相似度分布，再将常规排序反转，以优先保留与文本相似度较低、但可能对应指代区域的视觉令牌；同时补回部分上下文令牌，以帮助前景与背景清晰分离，从而提升像素定位推理效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，LiteLVLM在多种令牌预算下相比现有方法提升超过5%；在无需训练或微调的情况下，可保留原始性能的90%，同时实现22%的速度提升和2.3倍的显存降低。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了文本引导的反向相似度剪枝对像素定位任务更有效，能够在不依赖训练的前提下显著降低视觉-语言模型推理成本，并优于已有令牌剪枝方案。

title: Early Semantic Grounding in Image Editing Models for Zero-Shot Referring Image Segmentation
summary: Instruction-based image editing (IIE) models have recently demonstrated strong capability in modifying specific image regions according to natural language instructions, which implicitly requires identifying where an edit should be applied. This indicates that such models inherently perform language-conditioned visual semantic grounding. In this work, we investigate whether this implicit grounding can be leveraged for zero-shot referring image segmentation (RIS), a task that requires pixel-level localization of objects described by natural language expressions. Through systematic analysis, we reveal that strong foreground-background separability emerges in the internal representations of these models at the earliest denoising timestep, well before any visible image transformation occurs. Building on this insight, we propose a training-free framework that repurposes pretrained image editing models for RIS by exploiting their intermediate representations. Our approach decomposes localization into two complementary components: attention-based spatial priors that estimate where to focus, and feature-based semantic discrimination that determines what to segment. By leveraging feature-space separability, the framework produces accurate segmentation masks using only a single denoising step, without requiring full image synthesis. Extensive experiments on RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, and RefCOCOg demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance over existing zero-shot baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，指令式图像编辑模型在最早的去噪时刻就已形成较强的前景/背景可分性，因此可被直接复用到零样本指代表达分割任务中，无需训练即可实现较好的像素级定位。
AI.motivation: 作者关注一个关键问题：图像编辑模型虽然主要用于按文本修改图像，但其内部其实隐含了“根据语言定位目标区域”的能力。基于这一现象，作者希望探索能否不重新训练模型，而是直接利用其中间表示来完成零样本指代表达分割，从而降低任务迁移成本。
AI.method: 作者先对指令式图像编辑模型的内部表示进行系统分析，发现最早的去噪步骤就出现明显的前景-背景分离。随后提出一个无需训练的框架，将图像编辑模型改造为分割器：一部分利用注意力信息提供空间先验，估计应关注的位置；另一部分利用特征表示进行语义判别，判断哪些像素属于目标。该方法只需单步去噪，不依赖完整图像生成。
AI.result: 在RefCOCO、RefCOCO+和RefCOCOg等数据集上的实验表明，该方法在零样本基线中表现更优，能够以更少的生成步骤实现更准确的分割掩码。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明，预训练图像编辑模型不仅具有语言条件下的编辑能力，还蕴含可直接用于视觉语义定位的表示。通过挖掘其早期中间特征，可以训练免费地实现高效零样本指代表达分割，说明这类模型具有更强的任务复用潜力。

title: ViDR: Grounding Multimodal Deep Research Reports in Source Visual Evidence
summary: Recent deep research systems have improved the ability of large language models to produce long, grounded reports through iterative retrieval and reasoning. However, most text-centered systems rely mainly on textual evidence, while multimodal systems often retrieve images only weakly or generate charts themselves, leaving source figures underused as evidence. We present ViDR, a multimodal deep research framework that grounds long-form reports in source figures. ViDR treats source figures as retrievable, interpretable, routable, and verifiable evidence objects, while still generating analytical charts when needed. It builds an evidence-indexed outline linking claims to textual and visual evidence, refines noisy web images into source-figure evidence atoms through context-aware filtering, outline-aware reranking, and VLM-based visual analysis, and generates each section with section-specific evidence. ViDR further validates visual references to reduce hallucinated or misplaced figures. We also introduce MMR Bench+, a benchmark for evaluating visual evidence use in deep research reports, covering source-figure retrieval, placement, interpretation, verifiability, and analytical chart generation. Experiments show that ViDR improves overall report quality, source-figure integration, and verifiability over strong commercial and open-source baselines. These results suggest that source visual evidence is important for multimodal deep research, as it strengthens evidential grounding, visual support, and report verifiability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViDR，一种面向长篇多模态深度研究报告的框架，重点把源图像作为可检索、可解释、可路由、可验证的证据来使用，并通过新基准MMR Bench+系统评估视觉证据利用效果。
AI.motivation: 现有深度研究系统虽然提升了长报告生成能力，但多数文本系统过度依赖文本证据；多模态系统则常常对图像检索不充分，或更多自行生成图表，导致原始源图未被有效利用。作者希望解决“视觉证据被低估、引用不准确、报告可验证性不足”的问题。
AI.method: ViDR通过构建“证据索引大纲”将论点与文本/视觉证据绑定；对网络图像进行上下文感知过滤、基于大纲的重排序和VLM视觉分析，将噪声图像细化为源图证据单元；在生成各节时使用节级证据；并对视觉引用进行校验，以减少图像幻觉或错位引用。同时提出MMR Bench+，用于评测源图检索、放置、解释、可验证性及分析图生成。
AI.result: 实验表明，ViDR在整体报告质量、源图整合程度和可验证性方面均优于强商业模型和开源基线；MMR Bench+能够更细致地衡量视觉证据在深度研究报告中的使用效果。
AI.conclusion: 源视觉证据对多模态深度研究具有重要价值。将源图作为核心证据对象并进行结构化管理，可以增强报告的证据锚定、视觉支撑与可验证性，从而显著提升长篇研究报告的质量。

title: WinDeskGround: A Benchmark for Robust GUI Grounding in Complex Multi-Window Desktop Environments
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have revolutionized GUI automation, yet their efficacy is largely established on idealized, single-layer interfaces. This paper identifies a critical reliability gap: state-of-the-art agents face distinct robustness challenges in real-world desktop environments characterized by multi-window stacking, occlusion, and visual clutter. To address this, we introduce WinDeskGround, a novel benchmark and synthesis framework tailored for evaluating GUI grounding robustness. Unlike static datasets, our framework parametrically generates complex desktop scenarios by controlling window occlusion, layout density, and semantic similarity, thereby simulating the distribution shifts of authentic workflows. We construct a diverse meta-dataset of 1,356 high-fidelity instruction-target pairs and conduct comprehensive evaluations of five leading MLLMs. Our results demonstrate that while top-tier agents excel in simplified settings, their accuracy declines under partial occlusion. WinDeskGround provides a valuable benchmark to facilitate the assessment and advancement of GUI agent robustness in realistic environments. The code is available at https://github.com/ZZZhr-1/WinDeskGround.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向桌面GUI鲁棒性评测的新基准与合成框架WinDeskGround，用于检验多模态大语言模型在多窗口遮挡、布局拥挤和视觉干扰等真实场景下的GUI定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI自动化研究多基于理想化、单层界面，难以反映真实桌面环境中的多窗口叠加、遮挡和视觉杂乱问题，因此存在明显的鲁棒性评估缺口。
AI.method: 作者设计了WinDeskGround框架，通过参数化控制窗口遮挡程度、布局密度和语义相似度，自动生成复杂桌面场景；同时构建了包含1,356对高保真指令-目标样本的元数据集，并对5种主流多模态大语言模型进行了系统评测。
AI.result: 实验表明，顶级模型在简化场景中表现较好，但在部分遮挡条件下准确率明显下降，说明现有模型对真实桌面环境的鲁棒性不足。
AI.conclusion: WinDeskGround为GUI grounding鲁棒性评估提供了更贴近真实工作的基准与数据生成方案，可用于推动后续GUI代理在复杂桌面环境中的可靠性提升。

title: Executable Agentic Memory for GUI Agent
summary: Modern GUI agents typically rely on a model-centric and step-wise interaction paradigm, where LLMs must re-interpret the UI and re-decide actions at every screen, which is fragile in long-horizon tasks. In this paper, we propose Executable Agentic Memory (EAM), a structured Knowledge Graph (KG) that shifts GUI planning from free-form generation to a robust retrieval-and-execution process. Our approach includes a sample-efficient memory construction pipeline using state-aware DFS and action-group mining to compress multi-step routines. To ensure efficient planning, we introduce a value-guided graph search where a lightweight Q-function model steers Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) over the KG. We theoretically establish bias-consistency for the Q-model and derive sample complexity bounds for path recovery. Empirically, EAM outperforms state-of-the-art baselines like UI-TARS-7B by up to $19.6\%$ on AndroidWorld, while reducing token costs $6\times$ relative to GPT-4o. With a $2.8$s average latency, EAM enables reliable, quick, and long-horizon GUI automation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出可执行代理记忆（EAM），用结构化知识图谱替代传统GUI智能体逐步重规划的方式，通过检索与执行实现更稳定的长程GUI自动化，并在准确率、成本和时延上取得明显提升。
AI.motivation: 传统GUI智能体依赖大模型在每个界面反复理解和决策，面对长任务时容易不稳定、成本高、且易受状态变化影响，因此需要一种更鲁棒、更高效的规划机制。
AI.method: 作者构建了可执行代理记忆（EAM）这一结构化知识图谱，并设计了三部分核心方法：1）基于状态感知DFS和动作组挖掘的高效记忆构建流程，用于压缩多步操作模式；2）价值引导的图搜索方法，使用轻量级Q函数模型引导蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）在知识图谱上进行路径规划；3）提供理论分析，包括Q模型的偏差一致性以及路径恢复的样本复杂度界限。
AI.result: 实验表明，EAM在AndroidWorld上相比UI-TARS-7B等先进基线最高提升19.6%；相较GPT-4o，token成本降低6倍；平均时延为2.8秒，说明其在效率和实用性上都有较强优势。
AI.conclusion: EAM将GUI规划从“每步重新生成”转为“检索+执行”的范式，结合结构化记忆与价值引导搜索，能够更可靠地完成长程GUI任务，并显著降低推理成本与响应时间。

title: Grounding by Remembering: Cross-Scene and In-Scene Memory for 3D Functional Affordances
summary: Functional affordance grounding requires more than recognizing an object: an agent must localize the specific region that supports an interaction, such as the handle to pull or the button to press. This is difficult for training-free vision-language pipelines because actionable regions are often small, visually ambiguous, and repeated across multiple same-category instances in a scene. We propose AFFORDMEM, a framework that grounds 3D functional affordances by remembering geometry at two levels. The first is cross-scene affordance memory: the agent maintains a category-level memory bank of RGB images with affordance regions rendered as overlays, and recalls the most informative examples at query time to guide a frozen VLM toward small operable subregions that text-only prompting consistently misses. The second is in-scene spatial memory: as the agent processes the scene, it organizes candidate instances and their 3D spatial relations into a structured scene graph, enabling the language model to resolve references over distant or currently unobserved candidates such as "the second handle from the top." AFFORDMEM requires no model fine-tuning and no target-scene annotation, using a reusable memory bank built from source scenes. On SceneFun3D, our method improves AP50 over the prior training-free state of the art by 3.23 on Split 0 and 3.7 on Split 1. Ablation studies support complementary benefits: cross-scene affordance memory improves fine-grained localization, while in-scene spatial memory provides the larger gain on spatially qualified queries. The project homepage is available at the project page.

AI.tldr: AFFORDMEM提出一种无需微调、无需目标场景标注的三维功能可供性定位框架，通过“跨场景可供性记忆”和“场内空间记忆”两层机制，提升对小而模糊可操作区域的定位能力，并在SceneFun3D上优于先前训练自由方法。
AI.motivation: 仅识别物体类别不足以完成交互定位，实际需要找到支持动作的具体局部区域，如把手或按钮；而训练自由的视觉语言流水线在面对小目标、视觉歧义和同类多实例时容易失败，因此需要更强的记忆与引用消解能力。
AI.method: AFFORDMEM包含两部分：一是跨场景可供性记忆，维护带有可供性区域标注的RGB图像记忆库，在查询时检索最相关示例，引导冻结的视觉语言模型关注细粒度可操作子区域；二是场内空间记忆，将当前场景中的候选实例及其三维空间关系组织为结构化场景图，使模型能够解析诸如“自上而下第二个把手”这类带空间修饰的引用。该方法不进行模型微调，且记忆库可由源场景复用构建。
AI.result: 在SceneFun3D上，相比先前最优的训练自由方法，AFFORDMEM的AP50在Split 0提升3.23，在Split 1提升3.7。消融实验表明，跨场景可供性记忆更有利于精细定位，而场内空间记忆对带空间限定的查询带来更大收益。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，将跨场景示例记忆与场内结构化空间记忆结合，可以有效增强冻结视觉语言模型的三维可供性定位能力，尤其适合处理小目标、重复实例和复杂空间指代问题。

title: Attractor-Vascular Coupling Theory: Formal Grounding and Empirical Validation for AAMI-Standard Cuffless Blood Pressure Estimation from Smartphone Photoplethysmography
summary: This work proposes Attractor-Vascular Coupling Theory (AVCT), a mathematical framework showing that cardiac attractor geometry encodes blood pressure (BP) information sufficient for AAMI-standard estimation, and validates the theory through a calibrated cuffless BP model using photoplethysmography (PPG). AVCT is grounded in Cardiac Stability Theory and operationalized using Takens delay embedding and attractor morphology extraction. Two theorems, one proposition, and one corollary formally justify the use of PPG attractor features for BP estimation and predict the feature-importance hierarchy. A LightGBM model trained on pulse transit time (PTT) and Cardiac Stability Index (CSI) attractor features under single-point calibration was evaluated using strict leave-one-subject-out cross-validation (LOSO-CV) on 46 subjects from BIDMC ICU (n = 9) and VitalDB surgical data (n = 37), comprising 29,684 windows. The model achieved systolic BP (SBP) mean absolute error (MAE) of 2.05 mmHg and diastolic BP (DBP) MAE of 1.67 mmHg, with correlations r = 0.990 and r = 0.991, satisfying the AAMI/IEEE SP10 requirement of MAE below 5 mmHg. Median per-subject MAE was 1.87/1.54 mmHg, and 70%/76% of subjects individually satisfied AAMI criteria. A PPG-only ablation using nine smartphone attractor features matched the ECG+PPG model within 0.05 mmHg, demonstrating that clinical-grade BP tracking is achievable using only a smartphone camera while surpassing prior generalized LOSO-CV results using fewer sensors. All four AVCT predictions were quantitatively confirmed, with 91.5% error reduction from uncalibrated to calibrated estimation (epsilon_cal = 0.915). Unlike post-hoc explainable AI methods, AVCT predicts features satisfying the architectural faithfulness criterion of the Explainable-AI Trustworthiness (EAT) framework and grounding BP estimation in nonlinear dynamical systems theory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出吸引子-血管耦合理论（AVCT），用非线性动力学中的吸引子几何特征来解释和估计血压，并通过基于PPG的单点校准无袖带血压模型进行了验证；在严格的留一受试者交叉验证下，模型达到AAMI/IEEE标准要求，且仅用手机摄像头特征也能接近ECG+PPG效果。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在解决无袖带血压估计中“可泛化性不足、校准依赖强、可解释性弱”的问题，希望建立一个既有理论支撑又能满足临床精度标准的血压估计框架。
AI.method: 作者基于心脏稳定性理论提出AVCT，并结合Takens延迟嵌入与吸引子形态特征提取，构建PTT和CSI等吸引子特征；使用LightGBM进行单点校准血压估计，在BIDMC ICU和VitalDB共46名受试者、29684个窗口上采用严格LOSO-CV评估，同时进行了PPG-only消融实验与多项理论预测验证。
AI.result: 模型在SBP/DBP上的MAE分别为2.05/1.67 mmHg，相关系数r分别为0.990/0.991，满足AAMI/IEEE SP10要求；中位个体MAE为1.87/1.54 mmHg，70%/76%受试者分别满足AAMI标准；仅用9个手机吸引子特征的PPG-only模型与ECG+PPG模型差距不超过0.05 mmHg，且校准后误差较未校准下降91.5%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，血压信息可以从PPG吸引子几何中被有效编码并用于高精度估计，AVCT不仅提供了可验证的理论解释，也实现了接近临床级的无袖带血压追踪，并优于以往基于更少泛化约束的结果。

title: How Mobile World Model Guides GUI Agents?
summary: Recent advances in vision-language models have enabled mobile GUI agents to perceive visual interfaces and execute user instructions, but reliable prediction of action consequences remains critical for long-horizon and high-risk interactions. Existing mobile world models provide either text-based or image-based future states, yet it remains unclear which representation is useful, whether generated rollouts can replace real environments, and how test-time guidance helps agents of different strengths. To answer the above questions, we filter and annotate mobile world-model data, then train world models across four modalities: delta text, full text, diffusion-based images, and renderable code. These models achieve SoTA performance on both MobileWorldBench and Code2WorldBench. Furthermore, by evaluating their downstream utility on AITZ, AndroidControl, and AndroidWorld, we obtain three findings. First, renderable code reconstruction achieves high in-distribution fidelity and provides effective multimodal supervision for data construction, while text-based feedback is more robust for online out-of-distribution (OOD) execution. Second, world-model-generated trajectories can provide transferable interaction experience in the training process and improve agents' end-to-end task performance, although these data do not preserve the original distribution. Last, for overconfident mobile agents with low action entropy, posterior self-reflection provides limited gains, suggesting that world models are more effective as prior perception or training supervision than as universal post-hoc verifiers.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了移动端GUI智能体的世界模型表示与下游价值，比较了四种未来状态表征（差分文本、完整文本、扩散图像、可渲染代码），并验证了其在数据构建、训练增益和测试时指导中的作用。
AI.motivation: 移动端图形界面任务往往具有长时序和高风险交互，智能体不仅要识别当前界面，还需要可靠预测下一步动作后果。现有世界模型多只生成文本或图像形式的未来状态，但尚不清楚哪种表示更有用、合成轨迹能否替代真实环境，以及测试时指导对不同能力智能体的效果如何。
AI.method: 作者先筛选并标注移动端世界模型数据，再训练四种模态的世界模型：差分文本、完整文本、基于扩散的图像和可渲染代码。随后在MobileWorldBench与Code2WorldBench上评估模型性能，并进一步在AITZ、AndroidControl和AndroidWorld上分析其下游效用，考察数据构建、轨迹生成和后验自反思三类应用。
AI.result: 这些模型在MobileWorldBench和Code2WorldBench上达到最优性能。实验发现：1）可渲染代码重建在分布内具有很高保真度，且能有效用于多模态监督的数据构建；文本式反馈在在线分布外执行时更稳健。2）世界模型生成的轨迹虽然不保留原始分布，但能提供可迁移的交互经验，并提升端到端任务表现。3）对于动作熵较低、过度自信的智能体，后验自反思收益有限。
AI.conclusion: 世界模型在移动GUI任务中更适合作为先验感知或训练监督，而不是通用的事后验证器；其中，代码/文本等结构化表示在不同场景下各有优势，合成轨迹可作为有效训练资源，但难以完全替代真实环境。

title: From Passive Reuse to Active Reasoning: Grounding Large Language Models for Neuro-Symbolic Experience Replay
summary: While experience replay is essential for data efficiency in reinforcement learning (RL), standard methods treat the replay buffer as a passive memory system, prioritizing samples based on numerical prediction errors rather than their semantic significance. This approach stands in contrast to human learning, which accelerates mastery by actively abstracting fragmented experiences into behavioral rules. To bridge this gap, we propose Neuro-Symbolic Experience Replay (NSER), a framework that transforms experience replay from a passive sample reuse mechanism into an active engine for knowledge construction. Specifically, NSER addresses the incompatibility between linguistic reasoning and numerical optimization through a novel neuro-symbolic grounding pipeline. It leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) in a zero-shot manner to induce candidate behavioral rules from accumulated trajectories, grounds these insights into differentiable first-order logic representations, and utilizes the resulting symbolic structures to dynamically reweight the replay distribution. By allowing abstract knowledge to directly shape policy optimization, NSER achieves consistent superior sample efficiency and convergence speed across reactive, rule-based, and procedural benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种神经符号经验回放框架NSER，把经验回放从“按误差选样本”的被动机制，升级为“从轨迹中提炼规则并反向指导训练”的主动知识构建机制，从而提升样本效率和收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习中的经验回放主要依据数值预测误差筛选样本，忽视了样本的语义与规则层面信息；这与人类学习中通过抽象经验形成行为规则的方式不同，因此作者希望弥合数值优化与语言/符号推理之间的差距。
AI.method: NSER采用神经符号接地流程：先利用大语言模型以零样本方式从累积轨迹中归纳候选行为规则，再将这些规则映射为可微的一阶逻辑表示，最后用生成的符号结构动态重加权回放分布，使抽象知识参与策略优化。
AI.result: 在反应式、规则型和过程型基准任务上，NSER均表现出更好的样本效率和更快的收敛速度，并且整体结果稳定优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，将语言模型诱导的抽象规则与可微逻辑表示结合，并用于重塑经验回放分布，可以有效提升强化学习中的知识利用效率，是一种更接近人类学习方式的经验回放范式。

title: What Happens Before Decoding? Prefill Determines GUI Grounding in VLMs
summary: Existing training-free approaches for GUI grounding often rely on multiple inference runs, such as iterative cropping or candidate aggregation, to identify target elements. Despite this additional computation, each forward pass still independently interprets the instruction and parses the visual layout, without enabling progressive interaction among visual tokens. In this paper, we study what happens during GUI grounding in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) and identify a previously overlooked bottleneck. We show that grounding follows a two-stage paradigm: the prefill stage determines candidate UI elements, while the decoding stage subsequently refines the final coordinates. This asymmetry establishes prefill as the critical step, as errors in candidate selection cannot be effectively corrected during decoding. Based on this observation, we propose Re-Prefill, a training-free method that revisits inference by introducing an attention-guided second prefill stage to refine target selection. Specifically, visual tokens that consistently receive high attention from the query position, i.e., the final token, across layers are extracted as a preliminary target hypothesis and appended to the input, together with the instruction hidden states, enabling the model to deeply re-think its decision before coordinate generation. Experiments across four VLMs and five benchmarks, including ScreenSpot-Pro, ScreenSpot-V2, OSWorld-G, UI-Vision, and MMBench-GUI, demonstrate consistent improvements without additional training, with gains of up to 4.3% on ScreenSpot-Pro. Code will be available at https://github.com/linjiaping1/Re-Prefill.

AI.tldr: 本文发现GUI grounding在视觉语言模型中存在“预填充阶段决定候选、解码阶段细化坐标”的两阶段不对称机制，并提出无需训练的Re-Prefill，通过注意力引导的第二次预填充来重新筛选目标，从而提升定位效果。
AI.motivation: 现有无训练的GUI grounding方法通常依赖多次推理，如迭代裁剪或候选聚合，计算开销较大，但每次前向传播仍是独立理解指令和布局，缺少视觉token之间的渐进式交互。作者希望揭示模型在GUI grounding中的真实工作机制，并找到性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 作者分析VLM在GUI grounding中的推理过程，提出其遵循两阶段范式：预填充阶段负责确定候选UI元素，解码阶段负责细化最终坐标。基于此，提出Re-Prefill：在首次推理后，收集跨层中持续获得高注意力的视觉token作为初步目标假设，将其与指令隐藏状态一起重新加入输入，触发第二次预填充，让模型在生成坐标前重新思考并修正候选选择。
AI.result: 在四个VLM和五个基准上，Re-Prefill均带来稳定提升，覆盖ScreenSpot-Pro、ScreenSpot-V2、OSWorld-G、UI-Vision和MMBench-GUI；其中在ScreenSpot-Pro上最高提升4.3%。
AI.conclusion: GUI grounding的关键瓶颈不在坐标解码，而在预填充阶段的候选选择。通过注意力引导的第二次预填充，Re-Prefill能够在不额外训练的情况下增强候选筛选能力，并显著改善定位性能。

title: Mem-W: Latent Memory-Native GUI Agents
summary: GUI agents are beginning to operate the web, mobile, and desktop as interactive worlds, where successful control depends on carrying forward visual, procedural, and task-level evidence beyond the fleeting present screen. Yet most agents still treat memory as an external, human-readable artifact: histories are summarized, categorized, retrieved, and reinserted as text or structured records before being encoded again by the policy. This creates a mismatch between the representational form in which experience is stored and the latent embedding sequence over which modern GUI policies actually act. We introduce Mem-W, a series of latent-memory-native GUI agents that treat memory as part of the agent's continuous context rather than as an auxiliary symbolic scaffold. Mem-W weaves both historical trajectories (as experiential memory) and in-session segments (as working memory) into compact memory tokens through a shared trajectory-to-latent compressor. These tokens are woven with the current GUI observation and local context into one continuous embedding sequence, allowing the agent to read successes, failures, and unfinished progress through the same machine-native interface. Mem-W is trained with self-distillation and outcome-aware supervision to preserve decision-relevant state while filtering memory toward evidence that truly supports task success. Across four web and mobile navigation benchmarks, Mem-W consistently improves diverse backbones and memory-enhanced baselines, with gains of up to $+30.0$, suggesting that latent-context-native memory can serve as a scalable foundation for long-horizon GUI agency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Mem-W，一种原生于潜在表示的 GUI 代理记忆框架，将历史轨迹记忆与会话内工作记忆压缩为紧凑的记忆 token，并与当前观察共同组成连续嵌入序列，从而更贴合现代 GUI 策略的表示空间。
AI.motivation: 现有 GUI 代理通常把记忆当作外部的、可读的文本或结构化记录，再重新编码后供策略使用，导致“存储形式”与“实际决策所用的潜在表示”不一致，影响长时程任务中的信息保留与利用。
AI.method: Mem-W 采用共享的轨迹到潜在表示压缩器，将历史轨迹作为经验记忆、将当前会话片段作为工作记忆，统一压缩为记忆 token；这些 token 与当前 GUI 观察及局部上下文拼接成连续嵌入序列。训练上使用自蒸馏与结果感知监督，促使记忆保留对任务成功有用的决策相关状态并过滤无效信息。
AI.result: 在四个 web 与 mobile 导航基准上，Mem-W 能稳定提升不同骨干模型及已有记忆增强基线，最高提升达到 +30.0，说明该方法具有较强的通用性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，将记忆直接构建为潜在上下文的一部分，而非外部符号化附加物，能够更适合长时程 GUI 代理的决策机制，并可作为可扩展的长程 GUI 智能基础方案。

title: Investigating Anisotropy in Visual Grounding under Controlled Counterfactual Perturbations
comment: To be published in the proceedings of the 5th Explainable AI for Computer Vision (XAI4CV) Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary:
Visual Grounding benchmarks assume that the object described by a referring expression is always present in the image, and grounding models are therefore rarely evaluated under semantically mismatched captions. In such cases, models frequently exhibit approximation behavior, producing a plausible bounding box that satisfies only part of the expression (\eg, preserving the original object while ignoring modified contextual cues). Because mismatched captions represent realistic edge cases, this behavior compromises reliability and raises concerns from an explainability perspective. Identifying its underlying causes is thus essential for improving model faithfulness and interpretability.
  Adopting a mechanistic interpretability viewpoint, this work examines whether embedding anisotropy contributes to counterfactual failures. A similarity-controlled counterfactual caption generation protocol is introduced to systematically perturb object or contextual components within predefined embedding similarity intervals, enabling a fine-grained analysis of grounding behavior as a function of alignment. Experiments on two Transformer-based models with markedly different embedding geometries (BERT-based TransVG and CLIP-based SwimVG) reveal no meaningful correlation between cosine similarity and approximation. These findings suggest that anisotropy alone does not account for counterfactual errors, and that robustness requires investigating finer-grained geometric properties of the embedding space.

AI.tldr: 本文研究视觉定位模型在“描述与图像不匹配”时为何会产生近似式错误。通过控制反事实字幕与原始表达的语义相似度，作者发现嵌入各向异性并不能解释这种失败现象。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉定位基准默认目标对象一定存在于图像中，导致模型很少在语义不匹配的字幕上被评估。但现实中这类边缘情况很常见，模型往往会给出只部分满足表达的“近似”框，影响可靠性、可解释性和忠实性，因此需要分析其根因。
AI.method: 从机械可解释性视角出发，作者提出一种相似度可控的反事实字幕生成协议，在预定义的嵌入相似度区间内分别扰动对象或上下文成分，以细粒度考察定位行为随对齐程度变化的规律。实验在两种Transformer模型上进行：基于BERT的TransVG和基于CLIP的SwimVG。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，余弦相似度与模型的近似式输出之间没有显著相关性。即使两种模型的嵌入几何结构差异明显，embedding anisotropy 也未能解释反事实条件下的错误。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，嵌入各向异性不是导致反事实失败的主要原因。要提升视觉定位模型的鲁棒性与可解释性，需要进一步研究嵌入空间中更细粒度的几何属性，而不是仅关注整体各向异性。

title: Language-Conditioned Visual Grounding with CLIP Multilingual
summary: Multilingual vision-language models exhibit systematic performance gaps across languages, but the mechanism remains ambiguous: cross-language divergence could arise from the visual encoder, the text branch, or their interaction. We resolve this ambiguity through a dense multilingual CLIP probe in which the visual encoder is held identical across thirteen typologically diverse languages and only the XLM-RoBERTa text branch varies. We evaluate two CLIP architectures spanning a 7x visual-encoder scale gap (XLM-R base + ViT-B/32, ~87M visual parameters; XLM-R large + ViT-H/14, ~632M) on 11 concepts and 210 images, and quantify cross-language agreement via cluster-mask IoU, top-percentile IoU, and Spearman rank correlation against an English reference (n=2,310 paired observations per language). Three findings emerge. First, low-resource languages (Arabic, Basque, Luxembourgish) incur a structural penalty at both backbone scales (Wilcoxon HR>LR p<10^-300; cluster-mask IoU gap +0.114 at base, +0.143 at large), isolating the deficit to the text branch. Second, scaling the encoder 7x widens the gap for structural failure cases (Basque 螖=-0.056, Luxembourgish 螖=-0.076) while improving Arabic (螖=+0.033), separating corpus-coverage from tokeniser-fertility failures. Third, peak similarity is preserved across languages (mean ratio 0.94 at large scale) while cluster-mask IoU drops sharply, identifying spatial misalignment, not signal collapse, as the dominant failure mode. At 3.4-3.9 Wh per 1,000 queries, dense-CLIP grounding is competitive with high-throughput inference budgets, positioning it as a practical substrate for energy-aware multilingual deployment.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过密集多语种CLIP探针，将视觉编码器固定不变、仅变化文本分支，系统分析了13种语言中的跨语言性能差异来源，发现主要问题并不在视觉端，而更集中于文本分支及其与视觉特征的空间对齐失败。
AI.motivation: 多语种视觉-语言模型在不同语言上存在稳定性能差距，但此前难以判断差距究竟来自视觉编码器、文本分支，还是二者交互。作者希望通过控制变量方法消除歧义，定位性能不均衡的机制，并评估其对实际部署的意义。
AI.method: 构建密集多语种CLIP探针，保持视觉编码器完全一致，仅替换XLM-RoBERTa文本分支，覆盖13种类型学多样语言；比较两种架构规模（XLM-R base + ViT-B/32 与 XLM-R large + ViT-H/14）；在11个概念和210张图像上进行评估；使用cluster-mask IoU、top-percentile IoU和Spearman秩相关，与英文参考进行对齐比较，并统计每种语言的跨语言一致性。
AI.result: 结果显示：1）低资源语言（阿拉伯语、巴斯克语、卢森堡语）在两种规模下都存在结构性劣势，说明问题主要来自文本分支；2）视觉编码器扩大7倍后，某些结构性失败语言的差距反而扩大，但阿拉伯语有所改善，表明不同语言的失败机制可能分别与语料覆盖和分词器可分解性有关；3）峰值相似度在各语言间基本保持稳定，但cluster-mask IoU显著下降，说明主要失败模式是空间错位而非信号整体崩溃。
AI.conclusion: 多语种视觉-语言模型的跨语言性能差异主要由文本分支及其空间对齐问题驱动，而非视觉特征本身的缺失。该探针方法在能耗预算上也具有可行性，可作为面向多语种、能效感知部署的实用分析与评估工具。

title: The Grounding Gap: How LLMs Anchor the Meaning of Abstract Concepts Differently from Humans
summary: Abstract concepts - justice, theory, availability - have no single perceivable referent; in the human brain, their meaning emerges from a web of experiences, affect, and social context. Do large language models (LLMs) ground abstract concepts in a similar way? We study this by replicating property-generation experiments from cognitive science on 21 frontier and open-weight LLMs. Across models and experiments, we find a consistent pattern: when compared to humans, models rely too heavily on word associations, and underproduce properties tied to emotion and internal states. This yields a large and consistent grounding gap: no model exceeds a Pearson correlation r=0.37 with human responses, compared to a human-to-human ceiling above r=0.9. To better interpret this gap, we also replicate a rating experiment on grounding categories and find that here LLMs align more closely with human judgment, and alignment improves as models get larger. We then use sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to inspect whether this information is also reflected in the models' internal features, and we do identify features connected to grounding dimensions such as "sensorimotor" and "social". These findings suggest that current LLMs can recover grounding dimensions when explicitly queried, but do not recruit them in a human-like way when words are generated freely.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，大语言模型在抽象概念的“落地”上与人类存在明显差距：它们更依赖词语联想，较少涉及情绪和内部状态相关属性，因此自由生成时的概念表征方式并不接近人类。
AI.motivation: 作者希望回答一个认知科学问题：大语言模型是否像人类一样，把“正义、理论、可用性”等抽象概念建立在经验、情感与社会语境之上，而不只是基于词语共现和关联。
AI.method: 研究复现了认知科学中的属性生成实验，比较21个前沿与开源大模型和人类的反应；同时复现了对“落地类别”的评分实验，并进一步使用稀疏自编码器分析模型内部是否存在与感觉运动、社会等落地维度相关的特征。
AI.result: 结果显示，所有模型都存在稳定的“落地差距”：相对人类，它们过度依赖词语关联，且低估情绪和内部状态相关属性；没有模型与人类回答的皮尔逊相关超过0.37，而人类间上限超过0.9。评分实验中模型与人类一致性更高，且模型越大一致性越好；SAE也找到了与感觉运动、社会等维度相关的内部特征。
AI.conclusion: 当前大模型能够在被明确提问时识别抽象概念的落地维度，但在自由生成属性时并不会像人类那样调动这些维度，说明其抽象概念表征仍缺乏人类式的深层落地机制。

title: When Agents Overtrust Environmental Evidence: An Extensible Agentic Framework for Benchmarking Evidence-Grounding Defects in LLM Agents
summary:
Large language model agents increasingly operate through environment-facing scaffolds that expose files, web pages, APIs, and logs. These observations influence tool use, state tracking, and action sequencing, yet their reliability and authority are often uncertain. Environmental grounding is therefore a systems-level problem involving context admission, evidence provenance, freshness checking, verification policy, action gating, and model reasoning. Existing agent benchmarks mainly evaluate task capability or specific attacks such as prompt injection and memory poisoning, but they under-specify a fundamental reliability question: whether agents remain grounded in the true environment state when observations are stale, incorrect, or malicious.
  We introduce EnvTrustBench, an agentic framework for benchmarking this failure mode. We define an evidence-grounding defect (EGD) as a behavioral failure in which an agent treats an environment-facing claim as sufficient evidence for action without resolving it against available current evidence, leading to a task-incorrect false path under the true environment state. Given a task scenario, EnvTrustBench generates the workspace, environment, agent-facing objective, and validation oracle, executes the evaluated agent, records its action-observation trajectory and final state, and applies the oracle to produce a verdict.
  Using 6 LLM backbones and 5 widely used scaffolds, we evaluate 55 generated cases across 11 task scenarios, with each scenario expanded through five feedback-guided generation iterations. Results show that EGDs consistently emerge across operational workflows, highlighting environmental grounding as a core agent reliability problem with important security implications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EnvTrustBench，用于评估大语言模型智能体在面对过时、错误或恶意环境信息时是否仍能保持与真实环境状态一致。作者将这类失效定义为“证据锚定缺陷（EGD）”，并通过多种模型与常用脚手架的实验发现该问题在不同工作流中普遍存在。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体基准主要关注任务完成能力或单一攻击类型，但没有充分回答一个基础可靠性问题：当环境观测不可信时，智能体能否仍基于真实环境状态做出正确决策。由于文件、网页、API和日志等环境面对式信息会影响工具使用、状态跟踪和动作序列，这类“环境锚定”本质上是一个系统级可靠性问题。
AI.method: 作者构建了EnvTrustBench框架：先生成任务场景所需的工作区、环境、智能体目标和验证判据，再运行被测智能体，记录其动作-观察轨迹与最终状态，最后用oracle进行判定。框架中定义了证据锚定缺陷（EGD），即智能体把某个环境面对式声明当作足够证据直接行动，而没有结合当前可用证据进行核验，最终走向与真实环境状态不一致且任务错误的路径。实验中使用6种LLM底座、5种常用脚手架，在11个任务场景上评估了55个生成案例，每个场景通过5轮反馈式生成迭代扩展。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，EGD在不同操作流程中都稳定出现，说明该失效模式并非个别现象，而是广泛存在的智能体可靠性问题。作者还指出，这一问题具有重要的安全含义，因为不可靠的环境信息可能导致错误工具调用、错误状态判断和错误行动序列。
AI.conclusion: EnvTrustBench补足了现有基准对“环境真实性”和“证据可信度”评估不足的问题，强调环境锚定应被视为智能体系统中的核心可靠性维度。该工作为后续研究环境证据验证、动作门控和证据溯源等机制提供了基准与分析框架。

title: SYNCR: A Cross-Video Reasoning Benchmark with Synthetic Grounding
summary:
Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made rapid progress in single-video understanding, yet their ability to reason across multiple independent video streams remains poorly understood. Existing multi-video benchmarks rely largely on human-annotated real-world footage, limiting the precision of spatial, temporal, and physical ground truth and making it difficult to diagnose model failures. We introduce SYNCR, a controlled synthetic benchmark for cross-video reasoning with programmatically verified grounding. Built using Habitat, Kubric, and CLEVRER simulator engines, SYNCR contains 8,163 multi-video question-answer pairs grounded in 9,650 unique videos. It evaluates MLLMs across eight tasks spanning four diagnostic pillars: Temporal Alignment, Spatial Tracking, Comparative Reasoning, and Holistic Synthesis.
  Our zero-shot evaluation of leading open- and closed-weight MLLMs reveals a substantial gap between current models and humans: the best model achieves only 52.5% average accuracy, compared to an 89.5% human baseline. Models perform relatively well on temporal ordering but struggle with precise physical and spatial reasoning, with the best model reaching only 26.0% accuracy on Kinematic Comparison. We further find that parameter scaling and reasoning-specialized post-training improve temporal alignment capabilities, but do not reliably address fine-grained physical tracking or global spatial synthesis. Finally, an exploratory sim-to-real correlation analysis suggests that several SYNCR tasks track model-level trends on real-world multi-video benchmarks, while also exposing reasoning capabilities underrepresented by existing evaluations. Code available at https://github.com/SaraGhazanfari/SYNCR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为SYNCR的合成多视频推理基准，用于系统评估多模态大语言模型在跨视频推理中的能力，并发现当前模型与人类在该任务上仍存在明显差距，尤其是在精细空间与物理推理方面。
AI.motivation: 现有多视频基准主要依赖真实世界视频和人工标注，导致空间、时间和物理真值不够精确，也不利于诊断模型具体失败原因。因此需要一个可控、可验证、能细分能力维度的合成基准。
AI.method: 作者使用Habitat、Kubric和CLEVRER等模拟器构建了SYNCR，包含8163组多视频问答对和9650个独特视频。基准覆盖8个任务，归纳为四类诊断维度：时间对齐、空间追踪、比较推理和整体综合。并对多种开源与闭源MLLM进行零样本评测，同时分析参数规模、推理专项后训练以及仿真到真实的相关性。
AI.result: 实验显示最佳模型平均准确率为52.5%，显著低于89.5%的人类基线。模型在时间顺序判断上表现相对较好，但在物理和空间推理上明显薄弱，其中Kinematic Comparison任务最佳仅26.0%。参数扩展和推理专项后训练能提升时间对齐能力，但对精细物理追踪和全局空间综合的改善不稳定。
AI.conclusion: SYNCR提供了一个可精确诊断跨视频推理能力的合成评测框架，揭示了当前MLLM在多视频理解中的核心短板，尤其是细粒度空间、物理与综合推理能力不足；同时该基准的部分任务与真实多视频评测趋势具有一定一致性，具有研究与诊断价值。

title: LiteGUI: Distilling Compact GUI Agents with Reinforcement Learning
summary: Developing lightweight, on-device vision-language GUI agents is essential for efficient cross-platform automated interaction. However, current on-device agents are constrained by limited model capacity, and further performance improvements remain urgently needed. Traditional Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for small-scale models often leads to overfitting, catastrophic forgetting and policy rigidity, and thus fails to fully address these challenges. In this work, we propose a novel SFT-free training paradigm that significantly enhances the performance of small-scale models. We first present the initial systematic integration of generalized knowledge distillation into the GUI agent domain via Guided On-policy Distillation. By incorporating oracle reference trajectories together with a dynamic retrieval mechanism, our method reduces hallucinations and mitigates the cognitive misalignment inherent in multi-solution GUI tasks. Building on this foundation, we further introduce a Multi-solution Dual-level GRPO framework that jointly aligns macro-level subtask planning with micro-level execution matching, thereby improving exploration in long-horizon GUI agent scenarios. In addition, we construct an automated data generation pipeline to synthesize GUI task trajectories with rich multi-solution annotations. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance among lightweight models while remaining competitive with substantially larger-scale models across all benchmarks. Ablation studies further demonstrate that structured on-policy distillation and multi-solution dual-level exploration can fully unlock the capabilities of 2B/3B scale agents, surpassing the performance limits of conventional imitation learning.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种无需传统监督微调的轻量级GUI视觉语言智能体训练范式，通过在线蒸馏、动态检索和双层强化学习，显著提升2B/3B小模型在跨平台GUI任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有端侧GUI智能体受限于模型规模，难以兼顾泛化能力与执行稳定性；传统监督微调容易导致过拟合、灾难性遗忘和策略僵化，无法充分提升小模型性能。
AI.method: 提出三项核心方法：1）Guided On-policy Distillation，将通用知识蒸馏引入GUI智能体，结合oracle参考轨迹与动态检索，降低幻觉并缓解多解任务中的认知错配；2）Multi-solution Dual-level GRPO，从宏观子任务规划和微观执行匹配两个层面联合对齐，增强长程任务中的探索能力；3）自动化数据生成流水线，用于合成带有丰富多解标注的GUI轨迹数据。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在轻量级模型上取得了当前最优性能，并在所有基准上与更大规模模型保持竞争力；消融实验验证了结构化的on-policy蒸馏和多解双层探索能充分释放2B/3B模型能力，超过传统模仿学习的性能上限。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了SFT-free训练范式在轻量级GUI智能体上的有效性，为端侧高效跨平台自动交互提供了可扩展的训练方案，并为小模型性能突破提供了新的技术路径。

title: ChartREG++: Towards Benchmarking and Improving Chart Referring Expression Grounding under Diverse referring clues and Multi-Target Referring
summary: Referring expression grounding is a core problem in visual grounding and is widely used as a diagnostic of spatial grounding and reasoning in vision and language models, yet most prior work focuses on natural images. In contrast, existing chart referring expression grounding-related benchmarks remain limited: (1) they largely adopt bounding boxes, constraining localization precision for fine chart elements (2) they mostly assume a single and two referred target instances, failing to handle multi-instance target references; (3) the language expressions over-rely on textual cues or data-rank clues (4) they cover only a narrow range of chart types. To address these issues, we introduce a chart referring expression grounding benchmark that systematically supports multiple localization forms, multiple referred targets, diverse grounding cues and diverse chart types. Results across representative multimodal large models reveal a significant performance gap. We further introduce a code-driven synthesis pipeline that exploits the inherent alignment between plotting programs and rendered chart primitives to derive pixel accurate instance masks across chart element types and granularities. We train an instance segmentation model with the synthesized masks and integrate it into a general-purpose multimodal grounding framework. The resulting system consistently outperforms baselines on our benchmark and generalizes well to a ChartQA-derived real-chart grounding benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向图表的指代表达定位基准，覆盖多种定位形式、多目标引用、多样线索和多类图表；同时构建了基于代码驱动合成的像素级实例掩码数据，并训练实例分割模型集成到通用多模态定位框架中，显著提升了图表定位性能并具备较好的跨基准泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有图表指代表达定位基准存在明显局限：多依赖边界框，难以精确定位细粒度图表元素；通常只考虑单个或两个目标实例，无法处理多目标引用；语言表达过于依赖文本或数值排序线索；图表类型覆盖面较窄。因此需要一个更全面、更贴近真实场景的图表定位评测与方法体系。
AI.method: 首先构建一个新的图表指代表达定位基准，支持多种定位形式、多目标引用、多样 grounding 线索和多种图表类型。其次提出代码驱动的合成流水线，利用绘图程序与渲染后图表原语之间的天然对齐关系，生成跨图表元素类型和粒度的像素级实例掩码。然后使用这些掩码训练实例分割模型，并将其整合进通用多模态定位框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，代表性多模态大模型在该基准上表现出显著性能差距，说明图表指代表达定位仍较具挑战。所提出的系统在新基准上持续优于基线方法，并且在由 ChartQA 构造的真实图表定位基准上也表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作补足了图表指代表达定位在评测覆盖、目标形式和精细定位方面的不足，证明代码驱动合成与实例分割结合是一条有效路径，可提升多模态模型对图表中细粒度元素的定位能力与泛化能力。

title: Qwen3-VL-Seg: Unlocking Open-World Referring Segmentation with Vision-Language Grounding
summary: Open-world referring segmentation requires grounding unconstrained language expressions to precise pixel-level regions. Existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) exhibit strong open-world visual grounding, but their outputs remain limited to sparse bounding-box coordinates and are insufficient for dense visual prediction. Recent MLLM-based segmentation methods either directly predict sparse contour coordinates, struggling to reconstruct continuous object boundaries, or rely on external segmentation foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM), introducing substantial architectural and deployment overhead. We present Qwen3-VL-Seg, a parameter-efficient framework that treats the MLLM-predicted box as a semantically grounded structural prior and decodes it into pixel-level referring segmentation. At its core, a lightweight box-guided mask decoder combines multi-scale spatial feature injection, spatial-semantic query construction, box-guided high-resolution pixel fusion, and iterative mask-aware query refinement, introducing only 17M parameters (about 0.4\% of the base model). For scalable open-world training, we construct SA1B-ORS, an SA-1B-derived dataset with two subsets: SA1B-CoRS (category-oriented samples) and SA1B-DeRS (descriptive, instance-specific samples). For evaluation, we curate ORS-Bench, a manually screened benchmark with in-distribution and out-of-distribution subsets covering diverse referring expression types. Extensive experiments on referring expression segmentation, visual grounding, and ORS-Bench show that Qwen3-VL-Seg performs strongly across closed-set and open-world settings, with clear advantages on language-intensive instructions and strong out-of-distribution generalization. Evaluations on general multimodal benchmarks further show that the model broadly preserves general-purpose multimodal competence after segmentation-oriented adaptation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种参数高效的开放世界指代分割框架Qwen3-VL-Seg，将多模态大模型预测的框作为语义结构先验，再解码为像素级分割结果；同时构建了训练数据集SA1B-ORS和评测基准ORS-Bench，实验表明其在指代表达分割、视觉定位和开放世界泛化上表现较强，并能较好保持通用多模态能力。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型虽具备较强的开放世界视觉定位能力，但输出通常只到稀疏边界框，难以满足像素级密集预测需求；已有分割方法要么直接预测稀疏轮廓点导致边界重建困难，要么依赖外部分割基础模型，带来较大的结构与部署开销。
AI.method: Qwen3-VL-Seg采用轻量级框引导掩码解码器，在仅新增约1700万参数的条件下，将MLLM预测框作为结构先验进行细化分割。解码器包含多尺度空间特征注入、空间-语义查询构建、框引导的高分辨率像素融合以及迭代式掩码感知查询优化。训练数据方面，构建了SA1B-ORS，其中包括类别导向的SA1B-CoRS和描述型、实例特定的SA1B-DeRS；评测方面，构建了覆盖分布内与分布外样本的ORS-Bench。
AI.result: 在指代表达分割、视觉定位和ORS-Bench上的实验显示，该方法在闭集与开放世界场景中均表现良好，尤其在语言描述更复杂的指令上优势明显，并具备较强的分布外泛化能力；同时，在通用多模态基准上的测试表明，分割适配后模型仍能较好保留通用多模态能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了“先由多模态大模型给出语义对齐框，再用轻量分割头细化为像素级掩码”的路径是可行且高效的，为开放世界指代分割提供了低开销、可扩展的实现方案，并通过新的数据集与基准推动了该方向的系统评测。

title: BAMI: Training-Free Bias Mitigation in GUI Grounding
summary: GUI grounding is a critical capability for enabling GUI agents to execute tasks such as clicking and dragging. However, in complex scenarios like the ScreenSpot-Pro benchmark, existing models often suffer from suboptimal performance.
