Utilizing the proposed \textbf{Masked Prediction Distribution (MPD)} attribution method, we identify that the primary sources of errors are twofold: high image resolution (leading to precision bias) and intricate interface elements (resulting in ambiguity bias). To address these challenges, we introduce \textbf{Bias-Aware Manipulation Inference (BAMI)}, which incorporates two key manipulations, coarse-to-fine focus and candidate selection, to effectively mitigate these biases. Our extensive experimental results demonstrate that BAMI significantly enhances the accuracy of various GUI grounding models in a training-free setting. For instance, applying our method to the TianXi-Action-7B model boosts its accuracy on the ScreenSpot-Pro benchmark from 51.9\% to 57.8\%. Furthermore, ablation studies confirm the robustness of the BAMI approach across diverse parameter configurations, highlighting its stability and effectiveness. Code is available at https://github.com/Neur-IO/BAMI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的GUI定位增强方法BAMI，针对高分辨率带来的精度偏差和复杂界面造成的歧义偏差进行修正，可显著提升多种GUI grounding模型在ScreenSpot-Pro等复杂场景下的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI agent在复杂界面中执行点击、拖拽等任务时表现不足，尤其在高分辨率图像和细粒度界面元素密集的场景下，容易出现定位不准和目标歧义，导致任务失败。
AI.method: 作者先使用Masked Prediction Distribution（MPD）归因方法分析错误来源，识别出两类主要偏差：精度偏差和歧义偏差；随后提出Bias-Aware Manipulation Inference（BAMI），通过两项核心操作——由粗到细的聚焦机制和候选选择机制——在推理阶段缓解上述偏差，无需额外训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，BAMI能稳定提升多种GUI grounding模型的性能。例如，TianXi-Action-7B在ScreenSpot-Pro上的准确率由51.9%提升至57.8%。消融实验进一步验证了该方法在不同参数设置下的鲁棒性、稳定性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: BAMI为复杂GUI grounding提供了一种有效的训练自由推理增强方案，能够针对高分辨率和界面复杂性引发的系统性错误进行针对性修正，并在多个模型上带来一致收益。

title: RLearner-LLM: Balancing Logical Grounding and Fluency in Large Language Models via Hybrid Direct Preference Optimization
summary: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), the efficient alternative to PPO-based RLHF, falls short on knowledge-intensive generation: standard preference signals from human annotators or LLM judges exhibit a systematic verbosity bias that rewards fluency over logical correctness. This blindspot leaves a logical alignment gap -- SFT models reach NLI entailment of only 0.05-0.22 despite producing fluent text. We propose RLearner-LLM with Hybrid-DPO: an automated preference pipeline that fuses a DeBERTa-v3 NLI signal with a verifier LLM score, removing human annotation while overcoming the "alignment tax" of single-signal optimization. Evaluated across five academic domains (Biology, Medicine, Law) with three base architectures (LLaMA-2-13B, Qwen3-8B, Gemma 4 E4B-it), RLearner-LLM yields up to 6x NLI improvement over SFT, with NLI gains in 11 of 15 cells and consistent answer-coverage gains. On Gemma 4 E4B-it (4.5B effective params), Hybrid-DPO lifts NLI in four of five domains (+11.9% to +2.4x) with faster inference across all five, scaling down to compact base models without losing the alignment-tax mitigation. Our Qwen3-8B RLearner-LLM wins 95% of pairwise comparisons against its own SFT baseline; GPT-4o-mini in turn wins 95% against our concise output -- alongside the 69% win the same judge gives a verbose SFT over our DPO model, this replicates verbosity bias on a frontier comparator and motivates logic-aware metrics (NLI, ACR) over LLM-as-a-judge for knowledge-intensive generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RLearner-LLM与Hybrid-DPO，用NLI信号和验证器LLM分数融合替代单一偏好信号，缓解知识密集型生成中的“冗长偏置”与逻辑对齐不足问题，并在多个学科与模型规模上取得显著NLI提升。
AI.motivation: 现有DPO在知识密集型生成任务中容易受到人类标注或LLM裁判偏好中的冗长偏置影响，导致模型更重流畅性而非逻辑正确性，出现“对齐税”与逻辑对齐缺口。
AI.method: 提出自动化偏好管线RLearner-LLM和Hybrid-DPO，将DeBERTa-v3的自然语言推理（NLI）信号与验证器LLM评分融合，去除人工标注，并用于多领域、多基座模型的偏好优化与评估。
AI.result: 在生物、医学、法律等五个学术领域及LLaMA-2-13B、Qwen3-8B、Gemma 4 E4B-it等基座上，方法在15个设置中的11个取得NLI提升，最高达6倍；Gemma 4 E4B-it上四个领域NLI提升明显且推理更快；Qwen3-8B模型在与SFT基线的成对比较中胜率达95%，同时实验复现了LLM裁判的冗长偏置。
AI.conclusion: 融合逻辑一致性信号的Hybrid-DPO能更有效地提升知识密集型生成的事实/推理对齐，并且可扩展到较小模型；在此类任务中，NLI和ACR等逻辑感知指标比单纯依赖LLM-as-a-judge更可靠。

title: From Priors to Perception: Grounding Video-LLMs in Physical Reality
summary: While Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) excel in general understanding, they exhibit systematic deficits in fine-grained physical reasoning. Existing interventions not only suffer from limited generalization but fundamentally conflate generative artifacts with genuine physical fallacies. Furthermore, we find that models fail systematically not only in anti-physics anomalies but also in counter-intuitive scenarios where visual facts contradict statistical expectations. Accordingly, we propose the Unified Attribution Theory: this dual failure stems not from perception deficiency, but from Semantic Prior Dominance -- the reasoning mechanism is deeply hijacked by internal narrative scripts. To address this, we construct the Programmatic Adversarial Curriculum (PACC), the first high-fidelity adversarial video dataset synthesized based on physical laws, thoroughly decoupling visual artifacts from logical errors. Concurrently, we design the Visual-Anchored Reasoning Chain (VARC) to force models to explicitly ground their judgments in low-level visual facts prior to logical adjudication. Experiments demonstrate that without invasive architectural modifications, standard LoRA fine-tuning with the PACC curriculum effectively neutralizes prior interference in state-of-the-art (SOTA) models, yielding a substantial leap in physical reasoning capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文指出Video-LLM在细粒度物理推理上存在系统性缺陷，并提出“统一归因理论”解释其错误主要来自语义先验主导而非感知不足；同时构建物理法则驱动的对抗视频数据集PACC，并设计视觉锚定推理链VARC，引导模型先基于低层视觉事实再做逻辑判断，实验表明该方法可显著提升物理推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有干预方法泛化有限，且容易把生成伪影与真实物理错误混为一谈，导致难以准确提升Video-LLM的物理推理能力；作者希望建立更高保真、可分离视觉伪影与逻辑错误的训练与评测方案。
AI.method: 提出统一归因理论，将模型在反常物理与反直觉场景中的失败归因于语义先验支配；构建基于物理定律合成的对抗视频数据集PACC；设计VARC，强制模型在逻辑裁决前显式锚定低层视觉事实；并采用标准LoRA微调结合PACC课程训练。
AI.result: 实验显示，在不修改模型结构的前提下，使用PACC课程进行LoRA微调可有效削弱先验干扰，显著提升包括SOTA模型在内的物理推理表现。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，Video-LLM的物理推理瓶颈主要来自内部语义先验对推理过程的劫持。通过物理法则驱动的数据构造与视觉锚定式推理约束，可以较低成本地提升模型的细粒度物理理解能力。

title: MASRA: MLLM-Assisted Semantic-Relational Consistent Alignment for Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Video Temporal Grounding (VTG) faces a cross-modal semantic gap that often leads to background features being incorrectly aligned with the query, while directly matching the query to moments results in insufficient discriminability and consistency of temporal semantics. To address this issue, we propose MLLM-Assisted Semantic-Relational Consistent Alignment (MASRA), a training-time MLLM-based optimization framework for VTG. MASRA leverages an MLLM during training to produce two forms of textual priors, namely event-level descriptions with temporal spans and clip-level captions, and instantiates two MLLM-assisted alignments. Event Semantic Temporal Alignment (ESTA) aligns temporal context with event semantics to explicitly strengthen the correspondence between semantics and temporal events and improve span-level separability. Local Relational Consistency Alignment (LRCA) constructs a textual relation matrix derived from clip-level captions and aligns it with the temporal feature similarity matrix in the model, enhancing temporal consistency while capturing local structural information. MASRA includes two simple supporting modules, semantic-guided enhancement and second-order relational attention, to better utilize the learned semantic context and relational structure. Moreover, we introduce Decoupled Alignment Interaction (DAI) with a context-aware codebook to adaptively absorb query-irrelevant semantics and alleviate the cross-modal gap. The MLLM is only invoked during training and is not used at inference. Extensive experiments show that MASRA outperforms existing methods, and ablation studies validate its effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MASRA，一种仅在训练阶段使用多模态大模型（MLLM）的VTG优化框架，通过事件级语义-时间对齐与局部关系一致性对齐，缓解跨模态语义鸿沟并提升时间定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频时间定位方法容易将背景特征错误对齐到查询上，且直接做查询-时刻匹配时，时间语义的判别性与一致性不足，因此需要更强的语义与时序结构建模。
AI.method: MASRA在训练时利用MLLM生成两类文本先验：带时间跨度的事件级描述和片段级字幕；基于此构建两种对齐机制：ESTA用于对齐时间上下文与事件语义，增强跨度级可分性；LRCA将文本关系矩阵与模型中的时间特征相似矩阵对齐，提升局部关系一致性。框架还加入语义引导增强、二阶关系注意力，以及带上下文感知码本的解耦对齐交互（DAI）以吸收与查询无关语义。
AI.result: 实验表明，MASRA优于现有方法；消融实验进一步验证了各模块在提升对齐质量、时间一致性和跨模态匹配方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了训练时引入MLLM生成的语义先验与关系先验，能够有效改善VTG中的跨模态对齐问题，并在不增加推理阶段MLLM开销的前提下提升定位性能。

title: Does it Really Count? Assessing Semantic Grounding in Text-Guided Class-Agnostic Counting
summary: Open-world text-guided class-agnostic counting (CAC) has emerged as a flexible paradigm for counting arbitrary object classes by using natural language prompts. However, current evaluation protocols primarily focus on standard counting errors within single-category images, overlooking a fundamental requirement: the ability to correctly ground the textual prompt in the visual scene. In this paper, we show that several state-of-the-art CAC models often struggle to determine which object class should be counted based on the given prompt, revealing a misalignment between textual semantics and visual object representations. This limitation leads to spurious counting responses and reduced reliability in real-world scenarios. To systematically address these limitations, we propose a new evaluation framework focused on model robustness and trustworthiness. Our contribution is two-fold: (i) we introduce PrACo++ (Prompt-Aware Counting++), a novel test suite featuring two dedicated evaluation protocols -- the negative-label test and the distractor test -- paired with new specialized metrics; and (ii) we present the MUCCA (MUlti-Category Class-Agnostic counting) evaluation dataset, a new collection of real-world images featuring multiple annotated object categories per scene, unlike existing CAC benchmarks that typically include a single category per image. Our extensive experimental evaluation of 10 state-of-the-art methods shows that, despite strong performance under standard counting metrics, current models exhibit significant weaknesses in understanding and grounding object class descriptions. Finally, we provide a quantitative analysis of how semantic similarity between prompts influences these failures. Overall, our results underscore the need for more semantically grounded architectures and offer a reliable framework for future assessment in open-world text-guided CAC methods.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有开放世界文本引导类别无关计数方法，虽然在标准计数指标上表现不错，但常常无法正确把文本提示对齐到图像中的目标类别，从而导致错误计数；为此提出了面向提示理解与鲁棒性的评测框架PrACo++和多类别数据集MUCCA。
AI.motivation: 现有评测主要关注单类别图像中的计数误差，忽略了模型是否真正理解并正确定位文本提示所指向的目标类别这一基础能力，导致模型在真实场景中可靠性不足。
AI.method: 提出两个部分：一是PrACo++测试套件，包含负标签测试和干扰项测试，并配套新的专用指标，用于评估提示理解、语义对齐与鲁棒性；二是构建MUCCA数据集，包含每张图像多个已标注类别的真实场景，用于更贴近复杂开放世界条件下的评测。
AI.result: 对10种先进方法的实验表明，这些模型在标准计数指标下虽表现较强，但在识别应计数对象、抵抗干扰以及语义提示对齐方面存在明显短板；同时，提示语义相似度会显著影响失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，开放世界文本引导类别无关计数不仅需要准确计数，更需要可靠的语义理解与视觉 grounding；PrACo++和MUCCA为未来方法提供了更可信、更系统的评估基础。

title: AnchorD: Metric Grounding of Monocular Depth Using Factor Graphs
summary: Dense and accurate depth estimation is essential for robotic manipulation, grasping, and navigation, yet currently available depth sensors are prone to errors on transparent, specular, and general non-Lambertian surfaces. To mitigate these errors, large-scale monocular depth estimation approaches provide strong structural priors, but their predictions can be potentially skewed or mis-scaled in metric units, limiting their direct use in robotics. Thus, in this work, we propose a training-free depth grounding framework that anchors monocular depth estimation priors from a depth foundation model in raw sensor depth through factor graph optimization. Our method performs a patch-wise affine alignment, locally grounding monocular predictions in metric real-world depth while preserving fine-grained geometric structure and discontinuities. To facilitate evaluation in challenging real-world conditions, we introduce a benchmark dataset with dense scene-wide ground truth depth in the presence of non-Lambertian objects. Ground truth is obtained via matte reflection spray and multi-camera fusion, overcoming the reliance on object-only CAD-based annotations used in prior datasets. Extensive evaluations across diverse sensors and domains demonstrate consistent improvements in depth performance without any (re-)training. We make our implementation publicly available at https://anchord.cs.uni-freiburg.de.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需再训练的深度“锚定”框架，用因子图优化将单目深度基础模型的先验与原始传感器深度对齐，从而提升在非朗伯表面等困难场景下的度量深度可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度传感器在透明、镜面和其他非朗伯表面上容易出错；而大规模单目深度模型虽然具备强结构先验，但输出常存在尺度偏差或度量不准确，难以直接用于机器人任务。
AI.method: 方法采用训练无关的深度 grounding 框架，通过因子图优化把单目深度预测与原始传感器深度进行局部的 patch 级仿射对齐，在保留细粒度几何结构和深度不连续性的同时，将预测锚定到真实度量尺度。作者还构建了一个新的基准数据集，利用消光喷雾和多相机融合获取包含非朗伯物体的场景级稠密真值深度。
AI.result: 在多种传感器和不同数据域上的系统评估表明，该方法无需任何额外训练即可持续提升深度估计性能，并在困难真实场景中表现更稳健。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了将基础模型的单目深度先验与传感器度量深度进行局部对齐，是提升机器人场景深度估计精度的有效途径；同时，新基准为非朗伯场景的深度评测提供了更可靠的数据支持。

title: AutoFocus: Uncertainty-Aware Active Visual Search for GUI Grounding
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have enabled autonomous GUI agents that translate natural language instructions into executable screen coordinates. However, grounding performance degrades in high-resolution interfaces, where dense layouts and small interactive elements expose a resolution gap between modern displays and model input constraints. Existing zoom-in strategies rely on fixed anchors, heuristic grids, or reinforcement learning, lacking a principled mechanism to adaptively determine where refinement is needed and how much spatial uncertainty should be explored. We propose AutoFocus, a training-free, uncertainty-aware active visual search framework for GUI grounding. Our key insight is that token-level perplexity in coordinate generation naturally reflects spatial uncertainty. Rather than committing to a single prediction, AutoFocus samples multiple coordinate hypotheses and converts their axial perplexities into an anisotropic gaussian spatial probability field, explicitly modeling directional uncertainty. Based on this field, we generate global and local region proposals and introduce Shape-Aware Zooming to balance tight localization with contextual preservation. A visual prompt-based aggregation step then selects the most consistent prediction via structured comparison. Extensive experiments on ScreenSpot-Pro and ScreenSpot-V2 demonstrate consistent improvements across both general-purpose and GUI-specialized VLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoFocus，一种无需训练的、不确定性感知的GUI视觉定位框架，用于缓解高分辨率界面中的“分辨率鸿沟”问题；它通过坐标生成时的token级困惑度估计空间不确定性，并据此自适应地进行区域提议、形状感知缩放和结果聚合。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI grounding在高分辨率界面上性能下降，原因是界面元素更密集且更小，而模型输入分辨率受限。已有放大/缩放方法通常依赖固定锚点、启发式网格或强化学习，缺乏一种原则化机制来判断应关注哪里以及需要探索多大的空间范围。
AI.method: AutoFocus采用训练-free的主动视觉搜索框架。核心是利用坐标生成过程中token级困惑度反映空间不确定性；不直接输出单点，而是采样多个坐标假设，并将各轴困惑度转换为各向异性高斯空间概率场，以显式建模方向性不确定。随后基于该概率场生成全局与局部区域提议，引入Shape-Aware Zooming在紧致定位与上下文保留之间平衡，最后通过基于视觉提示的聚合步骤对多个预测进行结构化比较，选出最一致的结果。
AI.result: 在ScreenSpot-Pro和ScreenSpot-V2上的大量实验表明，该方法在通用VLM和GUI专用VLM上均带来稳定提升，说明其对高分辨率GUI grounding具有普适增益。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，token级困惑度可以作为GUI坐标预测中空间不确定性的有效信号；将其转化为方向敏感的概率搜索与形状感知缩放，可在不额外训练的情况下提升高分辨率界面上的定位精度。

title: Talk is Cheap, Communication is Hard: Dynamic Grounding Failures and Repair in Multi-Agent Negotiation
summary: Grounding is the collaborative process of establishing mutual belief sufficient for a communicative goal. While static grounding maps language to a shared context, dynamic grounding requires agents to negotiate meaning across turns. Current multi-agent Large Language Model (LLM) benchmarks largely emphasize static, one-shot tasks, overlooking whether agents can repair grounding breakdowns through interaction. We introduce an iterated multi-turn negotiation game where two agents allocate shared resources to private projects with verifiable jointly optimal outcomes. Although individual agents can identify Pareto-optimal allocations in isolation, agent dyads consistently fail to reach them across models. We identify four failure modes: (1) loss of shared interaction history, (2) stubborn anchoring to early proposals, (3) defaulting to equal splits over reward-maximizing coordination, and (4) referential binding errors across turns. Our baselines show that the coordination gap is not explained by individual reasoning limits or insufficient information exchange alone. Instead, the bottleneck lies in dynamic grounding: joint plan formation, commitment, and execution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个多轮协商博弈，用于检验多智能体大语言模型在动态共识建立中的能力，发现现有模型虽然单体推理能找到最优分配，但在交互协商中往往无法达成联合最优。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体大语言模型基准多聚焦静态、一次性交互，忽略了智能体是否能在多轮对话中修复理解偏差并逐步形成共同计划，因此需要一个更能反映动态协商能力的评测设置。
AI.method: 作者设计了一个迭代式多轮协商游戏：两个智能体要将共享资源分配给各自的私人项目，且结果可验证是否达到联合最优。通过比较不同模型的对话表现，并分析失败案例，归纳出四类失效模式：共享交互历史丢失、早期提议锚定、偏向平均分而非收益最大化、以及跨轮指代绑定错误。
AI.result: 实验表明，多个模型的智能体对在该任务中普遍难以达成帕累托最优分配，这一协调差距不能仅用个体推理能力不足或信息交换不充分来解释。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体协作的关键瓶颈不在于静态理解或单步推理，而在于动态共识建立，即联合方案的形成、承诺与执行能力；因此，评测多智能体系统时应重点考察多轮互动中的grounding能力。

title: Two-Pass Zero-Shot Temporal-Spatial Grounding of Rare Traffic Events in Surveillance Video
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026 AUTOPILOT Workshop (Non-Archival Track). 7 pages (4 main + references + appendix), 3 figures, 5 tables
summary: Grounding traffic accidents in real CCTV footage is a rare-event problem where training on labeled accident video is often prohibited, yet accurate joint localization in time, space, and collision type is required. We present a no-fine-tuning pipeline that elicits this joint output from frozen vision-language models through two ideas. First, a coarse-to-fine two-pass decomposition: a full-video pass at 1 fps produces a coarse (t, x, y, c) tuple, then a second pass at 5 fps within a +/- 3 s window refines time and location, with two deterministic confidence gates that revert to the coarse estimate on boundary hedges or edge-clamped coordinates. Second, a specialist role assignment: Qwen3-VL-Plus handles grounding, Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite handles typing on a centered video clip. On the ACCIDENT@CVPR 2026 benchmark (2,027 real CCTV videos) we reach ACC^S = 0.539 (95% CI [0.525, 0.553]): +0.127 over the benchmark paper's best-of-baselines oracle (0.412), +0.143 over the strongest single-VLM baseline (Molmo-7B, 0.396), and +0.250 over the naive baseline (0.289). The VLM path uses up to three API calls per video (17% fall back to physics on API failures); the full run costs ~$20.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需微调的交通事故视频理解流程，利用冻结视觉语言模型完成时间、空间与碰撞类型的联合定位，并在真实CCTV事故基准上取得较高准确率。
AI.motivation: 真实交通事故视频属于罕见事件，标注样本难以获取，传统监督训练受限，因此需要一种可直接利用通用视觉语言模型的低成本方案来完成事故定位与分类。
AI.method: 采用两阶段粗到细推理：先以1 fps对全视频进行首轮分析，得到粗略的(t, x, y, c)结果；再在±3秒窗口内以5 fps进行第二轮精修，并设置两个确定性置信门控，在边界含糊或坐标贴边时回退到粗结果。与此同时，将模型分工为专门角色：Qwen3-VL-Plus负责定位，Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite负责中心裁剪视频上的类型判断。
AI.result: 在ACCIDENT@CVPR 2026基准（2,027段真实CCTV视频）上，方法达到ACC^S = 0.539，95%置信区间为[0.525, 0.553]；相比基准论文最强基线oracle提升0.127，相比最强单模型基线Molmo-7B提升0.143，相比朴素基线提升0.250。系统每个视频最多调用3次API，约17%的样本在API失败时回退到物理方法，总体成本约20美元。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，冻结视觉语言模型结合粗到细推理与任务分工，可以在无需微调的前提下有效完成事故视频的时空定位与类型识别，并在真实稀有事件场景中取得明显优于基线的性能。

title: Grounding Multi-Hop Reasoning in Structural Causal Models via Group Relative Policy Optimization
summary: Multi-Hop Fact Verification requires complex reasoning across disparate evidence, posing significant challenges for Large Language Models , which may suffer from hallucinations and fractured logical chains. Existing methods, while improving transparency via Chain-of-Thought , often lack explicit modeling of the structural dependencies between evidence and claims. In this work, we introduce an SCM-inspired framework that grounds reasoning in explicit directed dependency graphs, treating verification as a constructive structural reasoning process rather than full causal inference with interventions or counterfactual semantics. We empirically identify an "inverted U-shaped" correlation between reasoning-chain length and accuracy, revealing that excessive structural complexity can degrade performance. To address this, we propose a rule-based reinforcement learning strategy using Group Relative Policy Optimization. This approach dynamically optimizes the trade-off between structural depth and conciseness. Extensive experiments on HoVer and EX-FEVER demonstrate that our SCM-GRPO framework outperforms strong baselines while producing more traceable reasoning structures for complex fact verification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向多跳事实验证的结构因果启发框架SCM-GRPO，用显式有向依赖图建模证据与结论之间的结构关系，并结合基于规则的强化学习动态平衡推理深度与简洁性，从而提升验证准确率与推理可追踪性。
AI.motivation: 多跳事实验证需要跨多个证据进行复杂推理，现有大语言模型容易出现幻觉和推理链断裂；虽然链式推理能增强透明度，但通常没有显式刻画证据与声明之间的结构依赖关系，因此难以稳定处理复杂验证任务。
AI.method: 作者提出一种受结构因果模型启发的框架，将事实验证建模为构造性的结构推理过程，使用显式有向依赖图表达证据-声明关系，而非做完整因果推断；同时发现推理链长度与准确率存在倒U型关系，即过长的结构会降低性能。为此，引入基于规则的强化学习策略，并采用Group Relative Policy Optimization，在结构深度与简洁性之间进行动态优化。
AI.result: 在HoVer和EX-FEVER数据集上的大量实验表明，SCM-GRPO优于强基线方法，并能生成更具可追溯性的推理结构，尤其在复杂事实验证场景中表现更好。
AI.conclusion: 该研究说明，显式结构建模结合受约束的强化学习优化，能够有效缓解多跳事实验证中的推理冗长与结构失衡问题，为提升大语言模型的事实核查能力提供了一条可解释、可控的路径。

title: Recall to Predict: Grounding Motion Forecasting in Interpretable Motion Bank
summary: Motion forecasting often requires trading interpretability for predictive accuracy. Standard anchor-based architectures rely on opaque latent queries that are highly prone to latent collapse, or naive trajectory sampling that limits multi-modal diversity. We propose an end-to-end differentiable framework that grounds predictions in a comprehensive "motion bank", a structured embedding space of physically realizable trajectories constructed via contrastive learning. Rather than regressing paths from a blank slate, our architecture dynamically retrieves explicit motion priors using a novel Anchor Retrieval Layer. This module adapts orthogonally initialized queries via a Dual-Level Gated Cross-Attention mechanism and executes discrete trajectory selection using a Straight-Through Gumbel-Softmax estimator to preserve continuous gradient flow. The retrieved semantically grounded anchors are then geometrically refined by a DETR-style decoder, optimized jointly with a Winner-Takes-All (WTA) kinematic Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM), a latent diversity penalty, and a soft-min weighted endpoint loss. By strictly conditioning the decoding phase on diverse, interpretable motion primitives, our approach eliminates the "black box" of standard latent queries while achieving competitive multi-modal accuracy on the Argoverse 2 and Waymo Open Motion datasets. Code is available at: https://github.com/abviv/recall2predict

AI.tldr: 提出一种端到端可微的运动预测框架，通过“motion bank”检索显式运动先验，替代传统黑箱式潜变量查询，以提升可解释性和多模态预测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于anchor的方法要么依赖不透明的潜变量查询，容易发生潜在塌缩；要么使用简单轨迹采样，难以覆盖足够丰富的多模态轨迹。作者希望在保证预测精度的同时增强可解释性，并缓解多模态不足问题。
AI.method: 方法核心是构建一个由对比学习得到的、物理可行轨迹组成的结构化embedding空间“motion bank”。模型通过Anchor Retrieval Layer动态检索显式运动先验，使用双层门控交叉注意力调整正交初始化查询，并用Straight-Through Gumbel-Softmax实现离散轨迹选择且保持梯度传播。随后，检索到的锚点由DETR风格解码器进一步几何细化，并联合优化WTA kinematic GMM、潜在多样性惩罚和soft-min加权终点损失。
AI.result: 在Argoverse 2和Waymo Open Motion数据集上，该方法在保持多模态输出的同时取得了有竞争力的准确率，并显式减少了传统潜变量查询带来的黑箱特性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，将运动预测建立在可检索、语义清晰且物理可行的轨迹原型上，可以同时提升可解释性与多模态性能，是对传统anchor/latent query范式的有效改进。

title: Faithful Mobile GUI Agents with Guided Advantage Estimator
summary: Vision-language model based graphical user interface (GUI) agents have shown strong interaction capabilities. However, they often behave unfaithfully, relying on memorized shortcuts rather than grounding actions in displayed screen evidence or user instructions. To address this, we propose Faithful-Agent, a faithfulness-first framework that reformulates GUI interaction to prioritize evidence groundedness and internal consistency. Faithful-Agent employs a two-stage pipeline: (i) a faithfulness-oriented SFT stage to instill abstainment behaviors under evidence perturbations; (ii) an RFT stage that further amplifies faithfulness by introducing the guided advantage estimator (GuAE), an anchor-based and variance-adaptive advantage tempering mechanism built upon GRPO. GuAE prevents advantage collapse in low-variance rollout groups under sparse GUI rewards, and with a thought-action consistency reward, Faithful-Agent (Stage II) elevates the Trap SR from 13.88\% to 80.21\% relative to the baseline, while preserving robust general instruction-following performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Faithful-Agent，一个以“忠实性优先”为目标的GUI智能体框架，通过两阶段训练提升模型对屏幕证据和用户指令的依赖，减少记忆化捷径行为。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉-语言模型的GUI智能体虽然交互能力强，但常会出现不忠实行为，即不真正依据当前界面证据或用户指令行动，而是依赖训练中学到的捷径。作者希望通过显式强化“基于证据决策”和“内部一致性”，提升智能体的可信性。
AI.method: 方法采用两阶段流水线：第一阶段是面向忠实性的监督微调（SFT），在证据扰动条件下训练模型学会拒绝回答或谨慎处理，从而培养放弃式行为；第二阶段是强化微调（RFT），在GRPO基础上引入Guided Advantage Estimator（GuAE），这是一种锚定式、方差自适应的优势调节机制，用于缓解GUI稀疏奖励场景下低方差rollout组的优势坍塌问题；同时加入思考-动作一致性奖励，进一步约束推理与操作的一致性。
AI.result: 实验显示，Faithful-Agent在第二阶段将Trap SR从13.88%提升到80.21%，相较基线显著增强了忠实性；同时仍保持了较强的通用指令跟随性能，说明忠实性增强并未明显牺牲整体可用性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，在GUI智能体中显式引入证据依赖、拒答训练、优势调节和一致性奖励，可以有效提升模型的忠实性与稳健性，并为构建更可信的界面交互智能体提供了可行框架。

title: Ablation Study of Multimodal Perception, Language Grounding, and Control for Human-Robot Interaction in an Object Detection and Grasping Task
summary: This manuscript extends our previous multimodal human-robot interaction system by introducing a controlled ablation study of the three modules that most strongly influence end-to-end performance: the large language model used for action extraction, the perception system used for visual grounding, and the controller used for motion execution. The goal is not to redesign the full pipeline, but to isolate the contribution of each component under a common experimental protocol and then evaluate the best combinations end-to-end. We therefore compare three language models, five perception configurations, and three controllers, followed by a second-stage factorial study over the best candidates. The resulting analysis is intended to clarify which choices primarily affect execution time, which primarily affect success rate, and where the largest engineering gains are likely to come from in future revisions of the system.

AI.tldr: 本文对既有多模态人机交互系统进行控制变量消融研究，分别比较动作提取的语言模型、视觉定位的感知系统和运动执行的控制器，以识别各模块对端到端性能的贡献，并进一步评估最佳组合。
AI.motivation: 研究目标是将复杂流水线中的关键模块拆分开来，明确每个组件对执行时间、成功率等指标的影响，从而为后续系统迭代提供更有针对性的工程优化方向。
AI.method: 采用统一实验协议，对三类模块进行分阶段评估：首先比较3种语言模型、5种感知配置和3种控制器；随后针对表现最优的候选项开展第二阶段因子实验，分析不同组合的端到端效果。
AI.result: 实验设计可区分不同模块对系统性能的主要影响来源，重点用于判断哪些选择更影响执行时间，哪些更影响成功率，以及潜在的性能提升空间主要来自哪里。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过系统性的消融与组合评估，能够清晰揭示多模态交互系统中各模块的相对贡献，为未来在语言理解、视觉感知和动作控制方面的工程优化提供依据。

title: Static and Dynamic Graph Alignment Network for Temporal Video Grounding
summary: Temporal Video Grounding (TVG) aims to localize temporal moments in an untrimmed video that semantically correspond to given natural language queries. Recently, Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN) have been widely adopted in TVG to model temporal relations among video clips and enhance contextual reasoning by constructing clip-level graphs. Despite their effectiveness, existing GCN-based TVG methods encounter three critical bottlenecks: 1) Most methods construct graph nodes using either static or dynamic features alone, resulting in incomplete visual representation and overlooking complementary semantics, 2) Most methods construct temporal graphs in a query-agnostic manner, leading to inefficient feature interaction within the temporal graph representation, and 3) Most methods often suffer from a single-granularity semantic matching, while direct training on complex temporal localization task may lead to slow convergence and suboptimal precision. To address these challenges, we propose Static and Dynamic Graph Alignment Network (SDGAN). First, SDGAN jointly exploits static and dynamic visual features to construct two complementary temporal graphs and performs Position-wise Nodes Alignment, enabling more expressive and robust visual representation. Second, SDGAN introduces Query-Clip Contrastive Learning and Adaptive Graph Modeling to explicitly align visual clips with their corresponding textual queries, yielding query-aware visual representations. Third, SDGAN incorporates multi-granularity temporal proposals within Progressive Easy-to-Hard Training Strategy, effectively bridging coarse-grained semantic localization and fine-grained temporal boundary refinement. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that SDGAN achieves superior performance across complex TVG scenarios. Codes and datasets are available at https://github.com/ZhanJieHu/SDGAN.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出SDGAN，用于时序视频定位（TVG）。核心思路是同时利用静态与动态视觉特征构建互补时序图，并通过查询感知对齐与多粒度逐步训练，提升定位精度与收敛效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图卷积网络的TVG方法主要存在三点不足：一是只使用静态或动态特征之一，视觉表示不完整；二是时序图构建通常与查询无关，导致图内特征交互效率低；三是多为单粒度语义匹配，复杂定位任务训练收敛慢且精度受限。
AI.method: SDGAN包含三部分：1）联合静态与动态视觉特征，构建两类互补时序图，并进行位置级节点对齐，以增强视觉表征；2）引入查询-片段对比学习与自适应图建模，使视觉片段与文本查询显式对齐，形成查询感知的视觉表示；3）采用多粒度时序候选与由易到难的渐进式训练策略，先做粗粒度语义定位，再逐步细化边界。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，SDGAN在多种复杂TVG场景中均取得了优于现有方法的性能，说明其在定位精度和鲁棒性方面具有优势。
AI.conclusion: SDGAN通过静态-动态互补建模、查询感知对齐以及渐进式多粒度训练，系统性缓解了现有TVG方法的关键瓶颈，是一种有效的时序视频定位框架。

title: Learn where to Click from Yourself: On-Policy Self-Distillation for GUI Grounding
summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) grounding maps natural language instructions to the visual coordinates of target elements and serves as a core capability for autonomous GUI agents. Recent reinforcement learning methods (e.g., GRPO) have achieved strong performance, but they rely on expensive multiple rollouts and suffer from sparse signals on hard samples. These limitations make on-policy self-distillation (OPSD), which provides dense token-level supervision from a single rollout, a promising alternative. However, its applicability to GUI grounding remains unexplored. In this paper, we present GUI-SD, the first OPSD framework tailored for GUI grounding. First, it constructs a visually enriched privileged context for the teacher using a target bounding box and a Gaussian soft mask, providing informative guidance without leaking exact coordinates. Second, it employs entropy-guided distillation, which adaptively weights tokens based on digit significance and teacher confidence, concentrating optimization on the most impactful and reliable positions. Extensive experiments on six representative GUI grounding benchmarks show that GUI-SD consistently outperforms GRPO-based methods and naive OPSD in both accuracy and training efficiency. Code and training data are available at https://zhangyan-ucas.github.io/GUI-SD/.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了面向GUI定位任务的GUI-SD框架，这是首个专门为GUI grounding设计的在线策略自蒸馏方法。它用单次rollout提供密集的token级监督，并通过视觉增强的特权上下文与熵引导蒸馏提升训练效率和准确率。
AI.motivation: GUI grounding的目标是把自然语言指令映射到界面目标元素的视觉坐标，是自治GUI代理的核心能力。现有强化学习方法虽然效果较强，但通常依赖多次rollout，训练成本高，而且在困难样本上反馈稀疏，导致优化效率受限。因此，作者希望寻找一种更高效、监督更密集的替代方案。
AI.method: 作者提出GUI-SD，属于在线策略自蒸馏（OPSD）框架。其核心包括两点：第一，为教师模型构造视觉增强的特权上下文，利用目标边界框和高斯软掩码，在不直接泄露精确坐标的前提下提供更有信息量的指导；第二，采用熵引导蒸馏，根据数字位置的重要性和教师置信度自适应加权token，使训练重点集中在最关键且最可靠的位置。
AI.result: 在六个代表性的GUI grounding基准上，GUI-SD在准确率和训练效率上都稳定优于基于GRPO的方法以及朴素OPSD方法。结果表明，单次rollout的密集token级监督能够有效缓解稀疏信号和高训练开销问题。
AI.conclusion: GUI-SD证明了OPSD在GUI grounding任务中的可行性与优势，为GUI代理的坐标定位学习提供了一种更高效的训练范式。该方法兼顾性能与效率，且代码与训练数据已公开，具有较强的复现和应用价值。

title: A11y-Compressor: A Framework for Enhancing the Efficiency of GUI Agent Observations through Visual Context Reconstruction and Redundancy Reduction
comment: 18 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Accepted to ACL SRW 2026. Project page: https://iyatomilab.github.io/a11y-compressor/
summary: AI agents that interact with graphical user interfaces (GUIs) require effective observation representations for reliable grounding. The accessibility tree is a commonly used text-based format that encodes UI element attributes, but it suffers from redundancy and lacks structural information such as spatial relationships among elements. We propose A11y-Compressor, a framework that transforms linearized accessibility trees into compact and structured representations. Our implementation, Compressed-a11y, applies a lightweight and structured transformation pipeline with modal detection, redundancy reduction, and semantic structuring. Experiments on the OSWorld benchmark show that Compressed-a11y reduces input tokens to 22% of the original while improving task success rates by 5.1 percentage points on average.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了A11y-Compressor，将线性化的辅助功能树压缩为更紧凑且更具结构性的表示，以提升GUI智能体的观察与操作效果。
AI.motivation: 现有辅助功能树虽然便于文本化输入，但存在信息冗余、缺乏空间关系等结构信息的问题，影响智能体对界面的可靠理解与执行表现。
AI.method: 提出A11y-Compressor框架，具体实现为Compressed-a11y，采用轻量级结构化转换流程，包括模态检测、冗余削减和语义结构化，对线性化辅助功能树进行压缩与重组。
AI.result: 在OSWorld基准上，Compressed-a11y将输入token减少到原始的22%，同时平均任务成功率提升了5.1个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了对辅助功能树进行结构化压缩不仅能显著降低输入成本，还能提升GUI智能体的任务表现，说明更紧凑且保留结构信息的表示更适合此类场景。

title: FineState-Bench: Benchmarking State-Conditioned Grounding for Fine-grained GUI State Setting
summary: Despite the rapid progress of large vision-language models (LVLMs), fine-grained, state-conditioned GUI interaction remains challenging. Current evaluations offer limited coverage, imprecise target-state definitions, and an overreliance on final-task success, obscuring where and why agents fail. To address this gap, we introduce \textbf{FineState-Bench}, a benchmark that evaluates whether an agent can correctly ground an instruction to the intended UI control and reach the exact target state. FineState-Bench comprises 2,209 instances across desktop, web, and mobile platforms, spanning four interaction families and 23 UI component types, with each instance explicitly specifying an exact target state for fine-grained state setting. We further propose \textit{FineState-Metrics}, a four-stage diagnostic pipeline with stage-wise success rates: Localization Success Rate (SR@Loc), Interaction Success Rate (SR@Int), Exact State Success Rate at Locate (ES-SR@Loc), and Exact State Success Rate at Interact (ES-SR@Int), and a plug-and-play \textit{Visual Diagnostic Assistant} (VDA) that generates a Description and a bounding-box Localization Hint to diagnose visual grounding reason via controlled w/ vs.\ w/o comparisons. On FineState-Bench, exact goal-state success remains low: ES-SR@Int peaks at 32.8\% on Web and 22.8\% on average across platforms. With VDA localization hints, Gemini-2.5-Flash gains +14.9 ES-SR@Int points, suggesting substantial headroom from improved visual grounding, yet overall accuracy is still insufficient for reliable fine-grained state-conditioned interaction \href{https://github.com/FengxianJi/FineState-Bench}{Github.}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于细粒度GUI交互评测的新基准FineState-Bench，专门检验模型能否将指令正确定位到目标UI控件并达到精确目标状态，同时给出分阶段诊断指标和可插拔的视觉诊断助手。
AI.motivation: 现有LVLM在GUI交互评测中存在覆盖不足、目标状态定义不够精确、过度依赖最终任务成功率等问题，难以定位模型在“找控件”和“到达精确状态”两个环节中的具体失效原因，因此需要更细粒度、可诊断的评测体系。
AI.method: 构建FineState-Bench，包含2209个跨桌面、网页和移动端的实例，覆盖四类交互家族和23类UI组件，并为每个实例显式标注精确目标状态；提出FineState-Metrics四阶段诊断流程，包括定位成功率SR@Loc、交互成功率SR@Int、定位时精确状态成功率ES-SR@Loc、交互时精确状态成功率ES-SR@Int；同时设计Visual Diagnostic Assistant（VDA），通过描述和边界框定位提示，在有/无提示的对照条件下诊断视觉 grounding 问题。
AI.result: 实验显示，精确目标状态达成率整体仍然较低，Web平台最高ES-SR@Int仅32.8%，跨平台平均为22.8%；加入VDA定位提示后，Gemini-2.5-Flash的ES-SR@Int提升14.9个百分点，说明视觉定位仍有较大改进空间，但总体性能仍不足以支撑可靠的细粒度状态条件GUI交互。
AI.conclusion: FineState-Bench和FineState-Metrics为GUI代理提供了更细粒度、可解释的评测框架，能够更准确地区分“定位失败”和“交互失败”，实验也表明当前LVLM在精确状态设定任务上仍存在明显短板，尤其是视觉 grounding 能力仍需加强。

title: From Mirage to Grounding: Towards Reliable Multimodal Circuit-to-Verilog Code Generation
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly used to translate visual artifacts into code, from UI mockups into HTML to scientific plots into Python scripts. A circuit diagram can be viewed as a visual domain-specific language for hardware: it encodes timing, topology, and bit level semantics that are invisible to casual inspection yet safety critical once fabricated in silicon. Translating such diagrams into register-transfer-level(RTL) code therefore represents an extreme reliability test for vision-to-code generation. We reveal a phenomenon we call Mirage: replacing a circuit diagram with a blank image leaves Pass@k unchanged or even higher, because models bypass the visual input and instead exploit identifier semantics in the module header to retrieve canonical RTL templates. This constitutes a new, highly covert class of defect in AI-assisted code generation that directly undermines MLLMs' trustworthiness. To quantify the effect, we construct C2VEVAL and evaluate eight MLLMs under a paired Normal/Anony protocol in which Anony mode anonymizes all identifiers in both the diagram and the module header; Anony-mode scores drop sharply across all models, confirming that high Normal-mode accuracy is largely a Mirage. We then propose VeriGround (4B), trained with identifier anonymization, refusal augmentation, and D-ORPO (Decision-Focused ORPO) preference alignment that up-weights pivotal generate-or-refuse tokens. VeriGround achieves Functional Pass@1 of 46.11%/42.51%(Normal/Anony) with a False Refusal Rate of only 1.20%/0.00%, while maintaining >92% Refusal Rate on blank images. With only 4B parameters, VeriGround performs on par with GPT-5.4 under Normal and significantly outperforms all baselines under Anony, confirming genuine visual grounding.

AI.tldr: 本文指出多模态大模型在电路图转RTL代码任务中存在“幻影”现象：模型可能忽略图像本身，转而利用模块标题中的标识符语义套用模板，导致表面高分但缺乏真实视觉理解。作者据此构建基准C2VEVAL，并提出VeriGround以增强真正的视觉对齐与拒答能力。
AI.motivation: 电路图到RTL代码的翻译属于高风险、高可靠性要求的视觉转代码任务，不能只看表面准确率，必须验证模型是否真正依赖图像输入而非文本捷径。
AI.method: 1）提出Normal/Anony配对评测协议：Anony模式对图和模块头中的所有标识符匿名化；2）构建C2VEVAL并评测8个MLLM；3）设计VeriGround（4B），结合标识符匿名化训练、拒答增强和D-ORPO偏好对齐，强调关键生成/拒答token。
AI.result: 实验发现，去掉电路图换成空白图后，Pass@k几乎不变甚至更高，说明模型可绕过视觉输入；Anony模式下各模型成绩显著下降，证明Normal模式高分多为捷径所致。VeriGround在Functional Pass@1上达到46.11%/42.51%（Normal/Anony），误拒率仅1.20%/0.00%，对空白图拒答率超过92%，且在Normal下接近GPT-5.4，在Anony下优于所有基线。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了MLLMs在视觉转代码中的一种隐蔽缺陷——表面高性能并不等于真实视觉理解；通过匿名化评测和定向对齐训练，可以显著提升模型的可验证视觉 grounding 与可信度。

title: GUI Agents with Reinforcement Learning: Toward Digital Inhabitants
summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents have emerged as a promising paradigm for intelligent systems that perceive and interact with graphical interfaces visually. Yet supervised fine-tuning alone cannot handle long-horizon credit assignment, distribution shifts, and safe exploration in irreversible environments, making Reinforcement Learning (RL) a central methodology for advancing automation. In this work, we present the first comprehensive overview of the intersection between RL and GUI agents, and examine how this research direction may evolve toward digital inhabitants. We propose a principled taxonomy that organizes existing methods into Offline RL, Online RL, and Hybrid Strategies, and complement it with analyses of reward engineering, data efficiency, and key technical innovations. Our analysis reveals several emerging trends: the tension between reliability and scalability is motivating the adoption of composite, multi-tier reward architectures; GUI I/O latency bottlenecks are accelerating the shift toward world-model-based training, which can yield substantial performance gains; and the spontaneous emergence of System-2-style deliberation suggests that explicit reasoning supervision may not be necessary when sufficiently rich reward signals are available. We distill these findings into a roadmap covering process rewards, continual RL, cognitive architectures, and safe deployment, aiming to guide the next generation of robust GUI automation and its agent-native infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 该摘要综述了强化学习与图形界面智能体（GUI agents）的交叉研究，提出了一个覆盖离线RL、在线RL和混合策略的分类框架，并总结了奖励设计、数据效率与关键技术进展，旨在为未来更稳健的GUI自动化提供路线图。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体仅依赖监督微调，难以应对长程信用分配、分布偏移以及不可逆环境中的安全探索问题，因此需要引入强化学习作为核心方法来提升自动化能力与泛化性。
AI.method: 作者采用综述与归纳分析的方法，对RL与GUI智能体相关工作进行系统梳理，建立离线RL、在线RL和混合策略三类 taxonomy，并进一步分析奖励工程、数据效率、I/O延迟瓶颈及世界模型训练等技术路径。
AI.result: 分析显示，可靠性与可扩展性的矛盾推动了复合式、多层级奖励架构的发展；GUI输入输出延迟促使研究转向基于世界模型的训练；在足够丰富的奖励信号下，智能体可自发形成类似System-2的延迟推理能力，未必需要显式推理监督。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为RL驱动的GUI智能体研究提供了结构化框架和发展路线，重点指向过程奖励、持续强化学习、认知架构与安全部署等方向，目标是推动下一代鲁棒GUI自动化及其原生智能体基础设施的发展。

title: WindowsWorld: A Process-Centric Benchmark of Autonomous GUI Agents in Professional Cross-Application Environments
summary: While GUI agents have shown impressive capabilities in common computer-use tasks such as OSWorld, current benchmarks mainly focus on isolated and single-application tasks. This overlooks a critical real-world requirement of coordinating across multiple applications to accomplish complex profession-specific workflows. To bridge this gap, we present a computer-use benchmark in cross-application workflows, named WindowsWorld, designed to systematically assess GUI Agents on complex multi-step tasks that mirror real-world professional activities. Our methodology uses a multi-agent framework steered by 16 occupations to generate four difficulty-level tasks with intermediate inspection, which are then refined by human review and executed in a simulated environment. The resulting benchmark contains 181 tasks with an average of 5.0 sub-goals across 17 common desktop applications, of which 78% are inherently multi-application. Experimental results of leading large models and agents show that: 1) All computer-use agents perform poorly on multi-application tasks (< 21% success rate), far below the performance of simple single-app tasks; 2) They largely fail at tasks requiring conditional judgment and reasoning across $\geq$ 3 applications, stalling at early sub-goals; 3) Low execution efficiency, where tasks often fail despite far exceeding human step limits. Code, benchmark data, and evaluation resources are available at github.com/HITsz-TMG/WindowsWorld.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个名为 WindowsWorld 的跨应用计算机使用基准，用于评估 GUI 代理在真实职业场景中的多应用协作能力，并发现现有模型在这类任务上表现显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有 GUI 代理基准主要聚焦单一应用或孤立任务，无法反映现实工作中跨多个桌面应用协同完成复杂流程的需求，因此需要一个更贴近真实专业工作流的评测基准。
AI.method: 作者构建了 WindowsWorld 基准，采用由 16 类职业驱动的多智能体框架生成四个难度级别的任务，并加入中间检查点；随后通过人工审核，在模拟环境中执行与评测。基准共包含 181 个任务，平均 5.0 个子目标，覆盖 17 个常见桌面应用，其中 78% 为天然多应用任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，主流大模型和 GUI 代理在多应用任务上的成功率都低于 21%，远低于简单单应用任务；当任务需要跨 3 个及以上应用进行条件判断与推理时，模型通常在早期子目标就停滞；同时存在明显的执行效率低下问题，许多任务在步数远超人类上限后仍然失败。
AI.conclusion: WindowsWorld 有效揭示了当前 GUI 代理在跨应用、长链路、带推理决策的真实工作流中的能力短板，说明现有系统离可靠的专业级计算机使用仍有明显差距，也为后续研究提供了更具挑战性的评测平台。

title: Auditing Frontier Vision-Language Models for Trustworthy Medical VQA: Grounding Failures, Format Collapse, and Domain Adaptation
summary: Deploying vision-language models (VLMs) in clinical settings demands auditable behavior under realistic failure conditions, yet the failure landscape of frontier VLMs on specialized medical inputs is poorly characterized. We audit five recent frontier and grounding-aware VLMs (Gemini~2.5~Pro, GPT-5, o3, GLM-4.5V, Qwen~2.5~VL) on Medical VQA along two trust-relevant axes. Perception: all models localize anatomical and pathological targets poorly -- the best model reaches only 0.23 mean IoU and 19.1% Acc@0.5 -- and exhibit clinically dangerous laterality confusion. Pipeline integration: a self-grounding pipeline, where the same model localizes then answers, degrades VQA accuracy for every model -- driven by both inaccurate localization and format-compliance failures under the two-step prompt (parse failure rises to 70%--99% for Gemini and GPT-5 on VQA-RAD). Replacing predicted boxes with ground-truth annotations recovers and improves VQA accuracy, consistent with the failure residing in the perception module rather than in the decomposition itself. These observational findings identify grounding quality as a primary trustworthiness bottleneck in our SLAKE bounding-box setting. As a complementary fine-tuning follow-up, supervised fine-tuning of Qwen~2.5~VL on combined Med-VQA training data attains the highest reported SLAKE open-ended recall (85.5%) among comparable methods, suggesting that the VQA-level gap is tractable with domain adaptation; whether this also closes the perception/trustworthiness bottleneck is left to future work.

AI.tldr: 本文审计了5个前沿医学视觉语言模型在医疗VQA中的可信性与失败模式，发现它们的定位能力普遍较弱，且自我分解式“先定位后回答”流程会进一步降低性能；用真实框替换预测框后性能回升，说明主要瓶颈在感知/定位而非问答分解本身。
AI.motivation: 补充说明：该研究强调了医疗场景中模型失效的可审计性，以及定位错误对下游诊断问答的系统性影响。
AI.method: 作者对Gemini 2.5 Pro、GPT-5、o3、GLM-4.5V、Qwen 2.5 VL五个模型在Medical VQA任务上进行审计，沿两个轴评估：一是感知能力，包括解剖与病灶目标定位及左右侧混淆；二是流程集成能力，构建同模型自定位再回答的自我定位管线，并将预测框与真实标注框对照，以区分定位误差和提示格式失败的影响；另外还对Qwen 2.5 VL进行监督微调作为补充实验。
AI.result: 所有模型的定位表现都较差，最佳模型平均IoU仅0.23、Acc@0.5仅19.1%，并出现临床上危险的左右侧混淆；在自我定位管线中，所有模型的VQA准确率都下降，部分模型在VQA-RAD上的两步提示解析失败率高达70%到99%；当用真实框替代预测框时，VQA准确率恢复并提升，表明主要问题来自感知模块；微调后的Qwen 2.5 VL在SLAKE开放式召回上达到85.5%，为同类方法中的最高报告结果。
AI.conclusion: 医学VLM在临床可信部署中的主要瓶颈是 grounding/定位质量，而不是简单的问答分解策略本身；领域适配可以显著提升VQA层面的性能，但是否能真正解决感知与可信性问题仍需进一步研究。

title: InterPartAbility: Phrase-Region Grounding for Interpretable Text-to-Image Person Re-Identification
summary: Text-to-image person re-identification (TI-ReID) relies on natural-language text descriptions to retrieve top matching individuals from a gallery of reference images. While recent large vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong retrieval performance, their decisions remain largely uninterpretable. Existing interpretability approaches in TI-ReID rely solely on slot-attention to highlight attended regions, but fail to reliably bind visual regions to semantically meaningful concepts, limiting interpretation to qualitative visualizations over a restricted vocabulary. This paper introduces InterPartAbility, an interpretable TI-ReID method that performs explicit part-wise matching and enables phrase-region grounding. Unlike parameter-heavy slot-attention methods that yield only qualitative interpretability, our open-vocabulary patch-phrase interaction module (PPIM) guides a standard TI-ReID model with concept-level phrases. Concept-based part phrases provide evidence that encourages the model to attend to the corresponding local image regions. InterPartAbility further leverages CLIP ViT self-attention to produce spatially concentrated patch activations aligned with each part-level phrase, yielding grounded explanation maps. Finally, a quantitative interpretability protocol for TI-ReID is introduced that extends current perturbation-based evaluation metrics into the TI-Reid domain. This includes a counterfactual region removal that measures retrieval degradation when top-ranked explanatory regions are removed. Empirical results on three challenging benchmarks show that InterPartAbility can achieve SOTA interpretability performance under these metrics, while sustaining competitive retrieval accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InterPartAbility，一种面向文本到图像行人重识别的可解释方法，通过部件级短语与图像区域的显式对齐，实现更具语义一致性的检索解释，同时保持有竞争力的检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有TI-ReID方法虽然检索效果较强，但可解释性不足，尤其是基于slot-attention的方法往往只能给出定性热图，难以把视觉区域可靠绑定到语义概念，解释范围也受限于较小词表。
AI.method: 方法包含三个核心部分：一是开放词汇的patch-phrase interaction module（PPIM），利用概念级短语引导标准TI-ReID模型关注对应的局部图像区域；二是结合CLIP ViT自注意力，生成与部件级短语对齐的空间集中patch激活，从而形成grounded解释图；三是提出面向TI-ReID的定量可解释性评估协议，扩展扰动式指标，并引入反事实区域移除来衡量删除关键解释区域后检索性能的下降。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在新提出的可解释性指标下取得了SOTA表现，同时检索准确率保持在具有竞争力的水平。
AI.conclusion: InterPartAbility证明了TI-ReID可以在不显著牺牲检索性能的前提下实现更强的部件级、短语-区域级可解释性，并为该领域提供了更系统的定量评测框架。

title: AirZoo: A Unified Large-Scale Dataset for Grounding Aerial Geometric 3D Vision
summary: Despite the rapid progress in data-driven 3D vision, aerial geometric 3D vision remains a formidable challenge due to the severe scarcity of large-scale, high-fidelity training data. Existing benchmarks, predominantly biased toward ground-level or object-centric views, do not account for complex viewpoint transformations and diverse environmental conditions in UAV-based sensing. To bridge this critical gap, we propose AirZoo, a unified large-scale dataset and benchmark for grounding aerial geometric 3D vision. AirZoo possesses three appealing properties: 1) Scalable Generation Pipeline: Leveraging freely available, world-scale photogrammetric 3D meshes, it renders vast outdoor environments with customizable UAV flight trajectories and configurable weather/illumination. 2) Comprehensive Scene Diversity: It provides the most extensive coverage of region types to date (spanning 378 regions across 22 countries), systematically encompassing both highly structured urban landscapes and complex unstructured natural environments. 3) Rich Geometric Annotations: Each frame provides synchronized, pixel-level metric depth and precise 6-DoF geo-referenced poses, essential for geometry-aware learning. Through three rigorous evaluation tracks -- aerial image retrieval, cross-view matching, and multi-view 3D reconstruction -- we demonstrate that AirZoo serves as a powerful pre-training engine. Extensive experiments on both public and newly collected real-world benchmarks reveal that fine-tuning on AirZoo yields substantial performance gains for SoTA models (e.g., MegaLoc, RoMa, VGGT, and Depth Anything 3), establishing a new performance upper bound for aerial spatial intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AirZoo，一个面向无人机航拍几何3D视觉的统一大规模数据集与基准，旨在弥补现有数据在视角变化、场景多样性和几何标注方面的不足，并显著提升多类先进模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 航拍几何3D视觉受限于高质量大规模训练数据稀缺，而现有基准多偏向地面视角或物体中心视角，难以覆盖无人机感知中的复杂视角变换与多样环境条件，因此需要构建更适合航拍场景的数据集与评测体系。
AI.method: AirZoo基于公开的大规模摄影测量三维网格，结合可定制的无人机飞行轨迹与天气/光照配置，生成大规模户外场景渲染数据；数据集覆盖378个区域、22个国家，兼具城市与自然场景；每帧提供像素级度量深度和精确的6自由度地理参考位姿，并设置航拍图像检索、跨视角匹配和多视图三维重建三项评测任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，AirZoo可作为强大的预训练引擎；在公共和新采集的真实世界基准上进行微调后，MegaLoc、RoMa、VGGT、Depth Anything 3等先进模型均获得显著性能提升，并达到新的性能上限。
AI.conclusion: AirZoo通过大规模生成、场景多样性和高精度几何标注，系统性地推动了航拍几何3D视觉研究，为无人机空间智能提供了更有效的数据与评测基础。

title: Grounding vs. Compositionality: On the Non-Complementarity of Reasoning in Neuro-Symbolic Systems
summary: Compositional generalization remains a foundational weakness of modern neural networks, limiting their robustness and applicability in domains requiring out-of-distribution reasoning. A central, yet unverified, assumption in neuro-symbolic AI is that compositional reasoning will emerge as a byproduct of successful symbol grounding. This work presents the first systematic empirical analysis to challenge this assumption by disentangling the contributions of grounding and reasoning. To operationalize this investigation, we introduce the Iterative Logic Tensor Network ($i$LTN), a fully differentiable architecture designed for multi-step deduction. Using a formal taxonomy of generalization -- probing for novel entities, unseen relations, and complex rule compositions -- we demonstrate that a model trained solely on a grounding objective fails to generalize. In contrast, our full $i$LTN, trained jointly on perceptual grounding and multi-step reasoning, achieves high zero-shot accuracy across all tasks. Our findings provide conclusive evidence that symbol grounding, while necessary, is insufficient for generalization, establishing that reasoning is not an emergent property but a distinct capability that requires an explicit learning objective.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了组合泛化与符号落地之间的关系，发现仅依赖符号落地并不能带来推理泛化；必须显式加入多步推理学习目标，模型才能在新实体、新关系和复杂规则组合上实现高零样本准确率。
AI.motivation: 作者旨在检验神经符号AI中的一个核心假设：成功的符号落地是否会自然涌现组合推理能力。为此，他们将“落地”和“推理”两部分贡献分离，系统分析两者对泛化的影响，以澄清现代神经网络在分布外推理中的根本短板。
AI.method: 提出了可微分的迭代逻辑张量网络 iLTN，用于多步演绎。研究采用形式化的一般化分类框架，分别测试模型在新实体、未见关系以及复杂规则组合三类情形下的表现，并对比仅训练落地目标的模型与同时训练落地和多步推理的完整模型。
AI.result: 实验显示，仅用落地目标训练的模型无法实现有效泛化；而完整的 iLTN 在联合训练后，能够在所有任务上取得很高的零样本准确率，表明其具有更强的组合推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 论文得出结论：符号落地是必要条件，但不足以保证泛化；推理不是落地的自然副产物，而是一种需要通过明确学习目标单独获得的能力。

title: Multiple Consistent 2D-3D Mappings for Robust Zero-Shot 3D Visual Grounding
summary:
Zero-shot 3D Visual Grounding (3DVG) is a critical capability for open-world embodied AI. However, existing methods are fundamentally bottlenecked by the poor quality of open-vocabulary 3D proposals, suffering from inaccurate categories and imprecise geometries, as well as the spatial redundancy of exhaustive multi-view reasoning. To address these challenges, we propose MCM-VG, a novel framework that achieves robust zero-shot 3DVG by explicitly establishing Multiple Consistent 2D-3D Mappings. Instead of passively relying on noisy 3D segments, MCM-VG enforces 2D-3D consistency across three fundamental dimensions to achieve precise target localization and reliable reasoning. First, a Semantic Alignment module corrects category mismatches via LLM-driven query parsing and coarse-to-fine 2D-3D matching. Second, an Instance Rectification module leverages VLM-guided 2D segmentations to reconstruct missing targets, back-projecting these reliable visual priors to establish accurate 3D geometries. Finally, to eliminate spatial redundancy, a Viewpoint Distillation module clusters 3D camera directions to extract optimal frames. By pairing these optimal RGB frames with Bird's Eye View maps into concise visual prompt sets, we formulate the final target disambiguation as a multiple-choice reasoning task for Vision-Language Models.
  Extensive evaluations on ScanRefer and Nr3D benchmarks demonstrate that MCM-VG sets a new state-of-the-art for zero-shot 3D visual grounding. Remarkably, it achieves 62.0\% and 53.6\% in Acc@0.25 and Acc@0.5 on ScanRefer, outperforming previous baselines by substantial margins of 6.4\% and 4.0\%.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出MCM-VG，用多一致性2D-3D映射来提升零样本3D视觉定位能力，重点解决开放词汇3D候选质量差、几何不准和多视角推理冗余的问题，并在两个基准上取得新的最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本3D视觉定位方法主要受三类瓶颈限制：开放词汇3D候选的类别容易出错、几何边界不精确，以及需要对大量视角进行穷举式推理导致冗余和低效。因此，作者希望通过显式建立2D与3D之间的一致映射，提升定位的准确性与推理效率。
AI.method: MCM-VG包含三个核心模块：1）语义对齐模块，利用大语言模型解析查询，并通过由粗到细的2D-3D匹配纠正类别不一致；2）实例校正模块，借助视觉语言模型指导的2D分割补全缺失目标，再将可靠的2D视觉先验反投影到3D以修正几何；3）视角蒸馏模块，对3D相机方向聚类，筛选最优视角，并将这些RGB帧与鸟瞰图组合成紧凑视觉提示集，把最终歧义消解转化为视觉语言模型的多项选择推理任务。
AI.result: 在ScanRefer和Nr3D上进行了大量实验，MCM-VG取得零样本3D视觉定位的新最优性能。尤其在ScanRefer上，Acc@0.25达到62.0%，Acc@0.5达到53.6%，相比之前方法分别提升6.4%和4.0%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法表明，将2D视觉信息与3D空间结构进行显式一致性建模，并结合视角选择与多项选择式推理，可以有效缓解零样本3DVG中的语义偏差、几何噪声和视角冗余问题，从而显著提升开放世界场景下的定位性能。

title: Benchmarking and Improving GUI Agents in High-Dynamic Environments
summary: Recent advancements in Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents have predominantly focused on training paradigms like supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL). However, the challenge of high-dynamic GUI environments remains largely underexplored. Existing agents typically rely on a single screenshot after each action for decision-making, leading to a partially observable (or even unobservable) Markov decision process, where the key GUI state including important information for actions is often inadequately captured. To systematically explore this challenge, we introduce DynamicGUIBench, a comprehensive online GUI benchmark spanning ten applications and diverse interaction scenarios characterized by important interface changes between actions. Furthermore, we present DynamicUI, an agent designed for dynamic interfaces, which takes screen-recording videos of the interaction process as input and consists of three components: a dynamic perceiver, a refinement strategy, and a reflection. Specifically, the dynamic perceiver clusters frames of the GUI video, generates captions for the centroids, and iteratively selects the most informative frames as the salient dynamic context. Considering that there may be inconsistencies and noise between the selected frames and the textual context of the agent, the refinement strategy employs an action-conditioned filtering to refine thoughts to mitigate thought-action inconsistency and redundancy. Based on the refined agent trajectories, the reflection module provides effective and accurate guidance for further actions. Experiments on DynamicGUIBench demonstrate that DynamicUI significantly improves the performance in dynamic GUI environments, while maintaining competitive performance on other public benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向高动态GUI环境的基准DynamicGUIBench，以及一个利用屏幕录制视频进行决策的智能体DynamicUI，用于缓解单帧观测带来的状态信息缺失问题，并显著提升动态界面下的任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体主要依赖每次动作后的单张截图进行决策，在界面变化快、关键信息易丢失的场景中，往往只能获得部分可观测状态，导致决策不稳定、信息不足，因此需要更系统地研究动态GUI环境下的交互建模与推理。
AI.method: 作者构建了DynamicGUIBench，覆盖十个应用和多种动态交互场景，重点考察动作之间界面发生重要变化的任务；同时提出DynamicUI，输入为交互过程的视频，包含三个模块：动态感知器通过帧聚类与关键帧字幕生成提取显著动态上下文；细化策略基于动作条件过滤，对思维轨迹进行去噪与去冗余；反思模块则利用细化后的轨迹提供更准确的后续行动指导。
AI.result: 实验表明，DynamicUI在DynamicGUIBench上的动态界面任务表现明显优于现有方法，同时在其他公开基准上也保持了具有竞争力的性能，说明该方法兼顾了动态场景适应性与通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作说明：仅依赖单帧截图不足以应对高动态GUI环境，结合视频级上下文、关键帧筛选、动作条件细化和反思机制，能够更有效地支持GUI智能体在复杂动态界面中的稳定决策。

title: OmniVTG: A Large-Scale Dataset and Training Paradigm for Open-World Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Video Temporal Grounding (VTG), the task of localizing video segments from text queries, struggles in open-world settings due to limited dataset scale and semantic diversity, causing performance gaps between common and rare concepts. To overcome these limitations, we introduce OmniVTG, a new large-scale dataset for open-world VTG, coupled with a Self-Correction Chain-of-Thought (CoT) training paradigm designed to enhance the grounding capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). Our OmniVTG is constructed via a novel Semantic Coverage Iterative Expansion pipeline, which first identifies gaps in the vocabulary of existing datasets and collects videos that are highly likely to contain these target concepts. For high-quality annotation, we leverage the insight that modern MLLMs excel at dense captioning more than direct grounding and design a caption-centric data engine to prompt MLLMs to generate dense, timestamped descriptions. Beyond the dataset, we observe that simple supervised finetuning (SFT) is insufficient, as a performance gap between rare and common concepts still persists. We find that MLLMs' video understanding ability significantly surpasses their direct grounding ability. Based on this, we propose a Self-Correction Chain-of-Thought (CoT) training paradigm. We train the MLLM to first predict, then use its understanding capabilities to reflect on and refine its own predictions. This capability is instilled via a three-stage pipeline of SFT, CoT finetuning, and reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments show our approach not only excels at open-world grounding in our OmniVTG dataset but also achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot performance on four existing VTG benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/oceanflowlab/OmniVTG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向开放世界视频时间定位的新数据集OmniVTG，并结合自我修正链式思维训练范式，提升多模态大语言模型的定位能力，在自建数据集和多个现有基准上取得了优异结果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频时间定位任务在开放世界场景中受限于数据规模小、语义多样性不足，导致常见概念与稀有概念之间存在明显性能差距，因此需要更大规模、更具语义覆盖度的数据与更强的训练方法。
AI.method: 作者构建了OmniVTG数据集，采用语义覆盖迭代扩展流程，先识别现有数据集的词汇空缺，再收集高概率包含目标概念的视频；标注上采用以字幕为中心的数据引擎，引导多模态大语言模型生成带时间戳的密集描述。方法上进一步提出自我修正链式思维训练范式，通过三阶段流程进行监督微调、链式思维微调和强化学习，使模型先预测再反思并修正自身结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在OmniVTG开放世界数据集上表现突出，并且在四个现有视频时间定位基准上实现了新的零样本最优性能；同时缓解了稀有概念与常见概念之间的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: OmniVTG数据集与自我修正链式思维训练能够有效提升开放世界视频时间定位能力，说明通过扩展语义覆盖和增强模型自我反思机制，可以显著改善多模态大语言模型的定位性能。

title: Dynamic Decision Learning: Test-Time Evolution for Abnormality Grounding in Rare Diseases
summary: Clinical abnormality grounding for rare diseases is often hindered by data scarcity, making supervised fine-tuning impractical and single-pass inference highly unstable. We propose Dynamic Decision Learning (DDL), a framework that enables frozen large vision-language models (LVLMs) to refine their decisions across both language and visual spaces by optimizing instructions and consolidating predictions under visual perturbations. This process improves localization quality and produces a consensus-based reliability score that quantifies model confidence. Results on brain imaging benchmarks, including a rare-disease dataset with 281 pathology types across models ranging from 3B to 72B parameters, show that DDL improves mAP@75 by up to 105% on rare-disease cases and outperforms adaptation baselines and supervised fine-tuning. Furthermore, DDL demonstrates stronger calibration between reliability scores and localization accuracy under severe distribution shifts and increasing task difficulty. Code is available at: https://lijunrio.github.io/DDL/

AI.tldr: 提出了一种动态决策学习（DDL）框架，用于在不微调参数的前提下，提升大规模视觉语言模型在稀缺疾病临床异常定位中的稳定性、定位精度和置信度校准。
AI.motivation: 稀有疾病场景中标注数据稀缺，导致监督微调不现实；同时，单次推理在分布偏移和任务难度增加时容易不稳定，难以可靠完成临床异常定位。
AI.method: DDL通过冻结的大型视觉语言模型，在语言空间和视觉空间中进行决策迭代优化：一方面优化指令以改进推理方向，另一方面在多种视觉扰动下整合多次预测，形成基于共识的结果与可靠性评分，从而同时提升定位质量和置信度评估能力。
AI.result: 在脑影像基准和包含281类病理类型的稀有疾病数据集上，DDL对3B到72B参数规模的模型均有效，稀有疾病样本的mAP@75最高提升达105%，并且整体表现优于适配类基线和监督微调方法；同时在严重分布偏移和任务更困难时，可靠性评分与定位准确率的相关性更强。
AI.conclusion: DDL为冻结式大视觉语言模型提供了一种无需微调的稳健决策增强方案，能够显著改善稀有疾病异常定位的性能与可校准性，具有较强的临床应用潜力。

title: MEG-RAG: Quantifying Multi-modal Evidence Grounding for Evidence Selection in RAG
summary: Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (MRAG) addresses key limitations of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), such as hallucination and outdated knowledge. However, current MRAG systems struggle to distinguish whether retrieved multimodal data truly supports the semantic core of an answer or merely provides superficial relevance. Existing metrics often rely on heuristic position-based confidence, which fails to capture the informational density of multimodal entities. To address this, we propose Multi-modal Evidence Grounding (MEG), a semantic-aware metric that quantifies the contribution of retrieved evidence. Unlike standard confidence measures, MEG utilizes Semantic Certainty Anchoring, focusing on high-IDF information-bearing tokens that better capture the semantic core of the answer. Building on MEG, we introduce MEG-RAG, a framework that trains a multimodal reranker to align retrieved evidence with the semantic anchors of the ground truth. By prioritizing high-value content based on semantic grounding rather than token probability distributions, MEG-RAG improves the accuracy and multimodal consistency of generated outputs. Extensive experiments on the M$^2$RAG benchmark show that MEG-RAG consistently outperforms strong baselines and demonstrates robust generalization across different teacher models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向多模态检索增强生成的语义感知评估指标MEG及其框架MEG-RAG，用于更准确衡量检索证据是否真正支撑答案核心语义，并提升生成结果的准确性与多模态一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态RAG系统难以区分检索到的多模态证据是仅具有表面相关性，还是能够真正支撑答案的语义核心；同时，已有置信度或评估指标多依赖位置启发式方法，无法反映多模态实体的信息密度。
AI.method: 提出Multi-modal Evidence Grounding（MEG）作为语义感知指标，使用Semantic Certainty Anchoring，聚焦高IDF、信息量更高的词元来刻画答案的语义核心；在此基础上构建MEG-RAG，训练多模态重排序器，使检索证据与真实答案的语义锚点对齐，并以语义 grounding 替代仅基于词元概率分布的打分方式。
AI.result: 在M^2RAG基准上的大量实验表明，MEG-RAG稳定优于强基线；同时，在不同教师模型设置下都表现出较强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，以语义核心对齐为中心的证据评估与重排序机制，能够更有效地提升多模态RAG的检索质量和生成可靠性，MEG可作为更合理的多模态证据贡献度度量。

title: Global Context or Local Detail? Adaptive Visual Grounding for Hallucination Mitigation
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are frequently undermined by object hallucination--generating content that contradicts visual reality--due to an over-reliance on linguistic priors. We introduce Positive-and-Negative Decoding (PND), a training-free inference framework that intervenes directly in the decoding process to enforce visual fidelity. PND is motivated by our key finding of a critical attention deficit in VLMs, where visual features are empirically under-weighted. Our framework corrects this via a dual-path contrast: The positive path amplifies salient visual evidence using multi-layer attention to encourage faithful descriptions, directly counteracting the attention deficit. Simultaneously, the negative path identifies and degrades the core object's features to create a strong counterfactual, which penalizes ungrounded, prior-dominant generation. By contrasting the model's outputs from these two perspectives at each step, PND steers generation towards text that is not just linguistically probable, but visually factual. Extensive experiments on benchmarks like POPE, MME, and CHAIR show that PND achieves state-of-the-art performance with up to 6.5% accuracy improvement, substantially reducing object hallucination while also enhancing descriptive detail--all without requiring any model retraining. The method generalizes effectively across diverse VLM architectures including LLaVA, InstructBLIP, InternVL, and Qwen-VL.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需训练的解码框架PND，通过正负双路径对比在生成阶段抑制视觉语言模型的对象幻觉，提升视觉一致性与描述质量。
AI.motivation: 研究指出视觉语言模型容易因过度依赖语言先验而产生与图像不一致的内容，核心原因是视觉特征在注意力中被系统性低估，即存在注意力缺失问题。
AI.method: PND在推理阶段直接干预解码过程，采用双路径对比：正路径通过多层注意力增强显著视觉证据，强化忠实描述；负路径有意削弱核心对象特征，构造反事实样本以惩罚非视觉约束、过度依赖先验的生成。每一步都比较两种路径的输出，引导模型生成更符合视觉事实的文本。
AI.result: 在POPE、MME和CHAIR等基准上取得了最佳或接近最佳表现，最高准确率提升达6.5%；同时显著减少对象幻觉，并提升描述细节。该方法无需重新训练，并可迁移到LLaVA、InstructBLIP、InternVL和Qwen-VL等多种架构。
AI.conclusion: PND证明了通过训练无关的解码级干预，可以有效纠正视觉语言模型的注意力失衡，降低幻觉并增强视觉忠实性，是一种具有良好通用性的推理期改进方案。

title: Grounding Before Generalizing: How AI Differs from Humans in Causal Transfer
summary: Extracting abstract causal structures and applying them to novel situations is a hallmark of human intelligence. While Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) have shown strong performance on a wide range of reasoning tasks, their capacity for interactive causal learning -- inducing latent structures through sequential exploration and transferring them across contexts -- remains uncharacterized. Human learners accomplish such transfer after minimal exposure, whereas classical Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents fail catastrophically. Whether state-of-the-art Artificial Intelligence (AI) models possess human-like mechanisms for abstract causal structure transfer is an open question. Using the OpenLock paradigm requiring sequential discovery of Common Cause (CC) and Common Effect (CE) structures, here we show that models exhibit fundamentally delayed or absent transfer: even successful models require initial environmental-specific mapping -- what we term environmental grounding -- before efficiency gains emerge, whereas humans leverage prior structural knowledge from the very first solution attempt. In the text-only condition, models matched or exceeded human discovery efficiency. In contrast, visual information -- in both the image-only and text-and-image conditions -- overall degraded rather than enhanced performance, revealing a broad reliance on symbolic processing rather than integrated multimodal reasoning. Models further exhibited systematic CC/CE asymmetries absent in humans, suggesting heuristic biases rather than direction-neutral causal abstraction. These findings reveal that large-scale statistical learning does not produce the decontextualized causal schemas underpinning human analogical reasoning, establishing grounding-dependent transfer as a fundamental limitation of current LLMs and VLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究大模型在开放式因果学习中的抽象迁移能力，发现其在序列探索中对新结构的迁移明显滞后，往往需要先进行环境特定的“落地映射”后才出现效率提升；相比之下，人类可凭借既有结构知识从首次尝试就高效迁移。
AI.motivation: 作者想回答一个关键问题：当前大语言模型和视觉语言模型是否具备类似人类的抽象因果结构学习与跨情境迁移能力，尤其是在需要交互式探索和少样本转移的任务中。
AI.method: 采用OpenLock范式，让模型在序列化探索中发现两类因果结构：共同原因（CC）和共同结果（CE）。比较文本单独输入、图像单独输入以及图文结合三种条件下，模型与人类的发现效率、迁移表现和结构偏好。
AI.result: 结果显示，模型即使最终成功，也通常先经历环境特定映射阶段，之后才出现效率提升，表现出延迟或缺失的结构迁移；人类则能从第一次解题就利用抽象结构。文本条件下模型效率可与或超过人类，但加入视觉信息后整体表现下降，说明其更依赖符号处理而非真正的多模态整合。此外，模型在CC/CE结构上出现系统性不对称，而人类没有这种偏差。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，当前大规模统计学习并不能自动形成去情境化的因果图式，因此LLM和VLM在抽象因果结构迁移上仍存在根本局限，尤其依赖环境落地后才能实现转移，这与人类的类比推理机制有本质差异。

title: Robust Grounding with MLLMs Against Occlusion and Small Objects via Language-Guided Semantic Cues
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have enhanced grounding capabilities in general scenes, their robustness in crowded scenes remains underexplored. Crowded scenes entail visual challenges (i.e., occlusion and small objects), which impair object semantics and degrade grounding performance. In contrast, language expressions are immune to such degradation and preserve object semantics. In light of these observations, we propose a novel method that overcomes such constraints by leveraging Language-Guided Semantic Cues (LGSCs). Specifically, our approach introduces a Semantic Cue Extractor (SCE) to derive semantic cues of objects from the visual pipeline of an MLLM. We then guide these cues using corresponding text embeddings to produce LGSCs as linguistic semantic priors. Subsequently, they are reintegrated into the original visual pipeline to refine object semantics. Extensive experiments and analyses demonstrate that incorporating LGSCs into an MLLM effectively improves grounding accuracy in crowded scenes.

AI.tldr: 该工作针对拥挤场景中的多模态大语言模型定位鲁棒性不足问题，提出语言引导语义线索（LGSCs）方法，用文本语义先验来补强被遮挡和小目标造成的视觉语义退化，从而提升定位精度。
AI.motivation: 拥挤场景中存在遮挡和小目标等视觉困难，容易削弱目标语义并导致定位性能下降；相比之下，语言表达通常不受这类视觉退化影响，因此可以作为更稳定的语义补充来源。
AI.method: 方法提出语义线索提取器（SCE），从MLLM的视觉流程中提取目标语义线索，再利用对应文本嵌入对这些线索进行引导，生成作为语言语义先验的LGSCs，最后将其重新融合回原始视觉流程以细化目标语义。
AI.result: 实验与分析表明，在MLLM中引入LGSCs后，拥挤场景下的定位准确率得到有效提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语言信息补偿复杂场景中的视觉语义损失，证明了语言引导语义先验对增强MLLM在拥挤场景中定位鲁棒性的有效性。

title: GoClick: Lightweight Element Grounding Model for Autonomous GUI Interaction
summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) element grounding (precisely locating elements on screenshots based on natural language instructions) is fundamental for agents interacting with GUIs. Deploying this capability directly on resource-constrained devices like mobile phones is increasingly critical for GUI agents requiring low latency. However, this goal faces a significant challenge, as current visual grounding methods typically employ large vision-language model (VLM) (more than 2.5B parameters), making them impractical for on-device execution due to memory and computational constraints. To address this, this paper introduces GoClick, a lightweight GUI element grounding VLM with only 230M parameters that achieves excellent visual grounding accuracy, even on par with significantly larger models. Simply downsizing existing decoder-only VLMs is a straightforward way to design a lightweight model, but our experiments reveal that this approach yields suboptimal results. Instead, we select an encoder-decoder architecture, which outperforms decoder-only alternatives at small parameter scales for GUI grounding tasks. Additionally, the limited capacity of small VLMs encourages us to develop a Progressive Data Refinement pipeline that utilizes task type filtering and data ratio adjustment to extract a high-quality 3.8M-sample core set from a 10.8M raw dataset. Training GoClick using this core set brings notable grounding accuracy gains. Our experiments show that GoClick excels on multiple GUI element grounding benchmarks while maintaining a small size and high inference speed. GoClick also enhances GUI agent performance when integrated into a device-cloud collaboration framework, where GoClick helps cloud-based task planners perform precise element localization and achieve higher success rates. We hope our method serves as a meaningful exploration within the GUI agent community.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GoClick，一种仅230M参数的轻量级GUI元素定位模型，面向移动端等资源受限设备，在多项基准上实现接近大模型的性能，并提升GUI智能体的实际任务成功率。
AI.motivation: GUI智能体需要在截图中根据自然语言指令精确定位界面元素，但现有方法多依赖超过2.5B参数的大型视觉语言模型，难以在手机等设备上低延迟部署，因此需要更小、更快且仍具高精度的模型。
AI.method: 作者没有简单缩小现有decoder-only VLM，而是采用encoder-decoder架构以适应小参数规模下的GUI定位任务；同时提出Progressive Data Refinement数据流程，通过任务类型过滤与数据比例调整，从10.8M原始数据中筛选出3.8M高质量核心集进行训练。
AI.result: GoClick在多个GUI元素定位基准上表现优秀，精度可与更大模型竞争，同时保持较小模型体积和较高推理速度；在设备-云协同框架中，GoClick还能帮助云端任务规划器实现更精确的元素定位并提高任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，针对GUI元素定位任务，小规模模型并非只能依赖简单缩放，大规模数据的高质量筛选与合适的编码器-解码器架构结合，能够在轻量化与性能之间取得良好平衡，适合面向端侧部署的GUI智能体应用。

title: FinGround: Detecting and Grounding Financial Hallucinations via Atomic Claim Verification
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Industry Track. 14 pages, 1 figure, 14 tables
summary: Financial AI systems must produce answers grounded in specific regulatory filings, yet current LLMs fabricate metrics, invent citations, and miscalculate derived quantities. These errors carry direct regulatory consequences as the EU AI Act's high-risk enforcement deadline approaches (August 2026). Existing hallucination detectors treat all claims uniformly, missing 43% of computational errors that require arithmetic re-verification against structured tables. We present FinGround, a three-stage verify-then-ground pipeline for financial document QA. Stage 1 performs finance-aware hybrid retrieval over text and tables. Stage 2 decomposes answers into atomic claims classified by a six-type financial taxonomy and verified with type-routed strategies including formula reconstruction. Stage 3 rewrites unsupported claims with paragraph- and table-cell-level citations. To cleanly isolate verification value from retrieval quality, we propose retrieval-equalized evaluation as standard methodology for RAG verification research: when all systems receive identical retrieval, FinGround still reduces hallucination rates by 68% over the strongest baseline ($p < 0.01$). The full pipeline achieves a 78% reduction relative to GPT-4o. An 8B distilled detector retains 91.4% F1 at 18x lower per-claim latency, enabling $0.003/query deployment, supported by qualitative signals from a four-week analyst pilot.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个面向金融文档问答的三阶段“先验证、后落地”流程 FinGround，用于减少大模型在监管文件中的幻觉、错误引用和计算失误，并通过更严格的评测方式证明了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 金融 AI 需要基于具体监管文件给出可追溯、可核验的答案；但现有大模型常出现编造指标、虚构引用和计算错误，且传统幻觉检测器把所有错误一视同仁，难以发现需要重新计算核验的数值类错误。因此需要一种更适合金融场景、可区分不同错误类型的验证框架。
AI.method: FinGround 包含三个阶段：第一阶段进行面向金融文本与表格的混合检索；第二阶段将答案拆分为原子级主张，并按六类金融错误 taxonomy 分类，采用与类型匹配的验证策略（包括公式重建）；第三阶段对不被支持的主张进行重写，并补充段落级和表格单元格级引用。作者还提出“检索等化评测”方法，在比较不同系统时为其提供相同检索结果，以隔离验证模块本身的贡献。
AI.result: 在相同检索条件下，FinGround 相比最强基线将幻觉率降低了 68%（p < 0.01）；完整流程相较 GPT-4o 的幻觉率降低了 78%。此外，一个蒸馏后的 8B 检测器在每条主张的延迟降低 18 倍的情况下仍保持 91.4% 的 F1，并支持约 0.003 美元/查询的部署成本。四周分析师试点也提供了定性支持。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，金融文档 QA 不能只依赖通用幻觉检测，而应采用面向财务主张类型的分层验证与可追溯引用机制；同时，“检索等化评测”可作为 RAG 验证研究的更公平标准。FinGround 在准确性、可解释性和部署成本之间取得了较好的平衡。

title: GSAR: Typed Grounding for Hallucination Detection and Recovery in Multi-Agent LLMs
summary:
Autonomous multi-agent LLM systems are increasingly deployed to investigate operational incidents and produce structured diagnostic reports. Their trustworthiness hinges on whether each claim is grounded in observed evidence rather than model-internal inference. Existing groundedness evaluators (binary classifiers, LLM-as-judge scalars, self-correction loops) treat supporting evidence as interchangeable and emit a single signal that offers no principled control over downstream action.
  We present GSAR, a grounding-evaluation and replanning framework that (i) partitions claims into a four-way typology (grounded, ungrounded, contradicted, complementary), giving first-class standing to non-redundant alternative perspectives; (ii) assigns evidence-type-specific weights reflecting epistemic strength; (iii) computes an asymmetric contradiction-penalised weighted groundedness score; and (iv) couples that score to a three-tier decision function (proceed, regenerate, replan) driving a bounded-iteration outer loop under an explicit compute budget.
  We formalise the algorithm, prove six structural properties, and evaluate five design claims on FEVER with gold Wikipedia evidence under four independently-trained LLM judges (gpt-5.4, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-7, gemini-2.5-pro). Every ablation reproduces in the same direction on every judge: bootstrap 95% CIs on the rho=0 effect exclude 0 on all four; the no-complementary ablation under Opus 4.7 has CI [-96,-68] of 200; at n=1000 three independent judges converge to DeltaS(rho=0)=+0.058. A head-to-head against Vectara HHEM-2.1-Open is included. To our knowledge, GSAR is the first published groundedness framework coupling evidence-typed scoring with tiered recovery under an explicit compute budget.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GSAR，一种用于多智能体LLM事件诊断的grounding评估与重规划框架，将证据分为四类并加权评分，再按三档决策驱动有预算约束的迭代恢复流程。
AI.motivation: 现有groundedness评估方法通常把证据视为等价输入，只输出单一分数或二分类信号，难以区分不同证据的认识强度，也缺乏对后续重生成、重规划等动作的可控性，因此需要更细粒度、可执行的评估机制。
AI.method: GSAR包含四个核心设计：1）将主张划分为grounded、ungrounded、contradicted、complementary四类；2）为不同证据类型分配体现认识强度的权重；3）计算带有非对称矛盾惩罚的加权groundedness分数；4）将分数映射到proceed、regenerate、replan三档决策，并在显式计算预算下运行有界外循环。作者还形式化了算法并证明六个结构性质。
AI.result: 在FEVER与gold Wikipedia evidence上，作者使用四个独立训练的LLM评审器进行评估，并检验五个设计主张。所有消融实验在四个评审器上都表现出一致方向的结果；bootstrap 95%置信区间在rho=0时均不含0；去除complementary的消融在Opus 4.7下区间为[-96,-68]（200次）；n=1000时三个独立评审器收敛到DeltaS(rho=0)=+0.058。文中还给出了与Vectara HHEM-2.1-Open的直接对比。
AI.conclusion: GSAR通过“证据类型感知评分 + 分层恢复决策 + 显式预算控制”把groundedness评估从单一判别信号推进到可驱动系统行为的框架化机制，作者声称这是首个将证据类型评分与分层恢复在明确计算预算下耦合的已发表groundedness框架。

title: Grounding Video Reasoning in Physical Signals
comment: Benchmark for Grounding Video Reasoning in Physical Signals
summary: Physical video understanding requires more than naming an event correctly. A model can answer a question about pouring, sliding, or collision from textual regularities while still failing to localize the event in time or space. We introduce a grounded benchmark for physical video understanding that extends the what--when--where evaluation structure of V-STaR to four video sources, six physics domains, three prompt families (physics, vstar_like, and neutral_rstr), and four input conditions (original, shuffled, ablated, and frame-masked). The benchmark contains 1,560 base video clips from SSV2, YouCook2, HoloAssist, and Roundabout-TAU. Each clip is first converted into a shared grounded event record, and the three query families are derived from that record. Temporal and spatial targets are shared across prompt families, while the non-physics families use deterministic family-appropriate semantic a_what targets derived from the same record. Across models and prompt families, physics remains the strongest regime overall, vstar_like is the clearest non-physics semantic comparison, and neutral_rstr behaves as a harder templated control. Prompt-family robustness is selective rather than universal, perturbation gains cluster in weak original cases, and spatial grounding is the weakest across settings. These results suggest that video Q&A reasoning benchmarks shall report physically grounded, prompt-aware, and perturbation-aware diagnostics alongside aggregate accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个面向物理视频理解的“有根基”基准，用统一的事件记录连接不同视频来源、问题类型和输入扰动，以评估模型是否真正具备时间与空间定位能力，而不只是依赖文本模式猜答案。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答模型可能在“是什么”上答对，却无法正确定位事件发生的时间和空间，因此需要更严格的评测框架来区分表面语义匹配与物理层面的真实理解。
AI.method: 基准扩展了V-STaR的what--when--where评测结构，覆盖4类视频来源、6个物理领域、3类提示家族（physics、vstar_like、neutral_rstr）和4种输入条件（original、shuffled、ablated、frame-masked）。共包含1,560个基础视频片段；每个片段先转为共享的有根基事件记录，再从中生成三类查询。时间与空间目标在各提示家族间共享，非物理家族则使用由同一记录确定性生成的语义a_what目标。
AI.result: 实验表明，physics提示家族整体表现最强；vstar_like是最清晰的非物理语义对照；neutral_rstr是更难的模板化控制。提示家族鲁棒性并不普遍，扰动带来的提升主要集中在原始表现较弱的样本中；其中空间定位在各设置下始终最弱。
AI.conclusion: 视频问答/推理基准不应只报告总体准确率，还应同时给出物理对齐、提示敏感性与扰动敏感性的诊断结果，以更准确地评估模型是否真正理解视频中的物理事件。

title: Agentic AI-assisted coding offers a unique opportunity to instill epistemic grounding during software development
summary: The capabilities of AI-assisted coding are progressing at breakneck speed. Chat-based vibe coding has evolved into fully fledged AI-assisted, agentic software development using agent scaffolds where the human developer creates a plan that agentic AIs implement. One current trend is utilizing documents beyond this plan document, such as project and method-scoped documents. Here we propose GROUNDING$.$md, a community-governed, field-scoped epistemic grounding document, using mass spectrometry-based proteomics as an example. This explicit field-scoped grounding document encodes Hard Constraints (non-negotiable validity invariants empirically required for scientific correctness) and Convention Parameters (community-agreed defaults) that override all other contexts to enforce validity, regardless of what the user prompts. In practice, this will empower a non-domain expert to generate code, tools, and software that have best practices baked in at the ground level, providing confidence to the software developer but also to those reviewing or using the final product. Undoubtedly it is easier to have agentic AIs adhere to guidelines than humans, and this opportunity allows for organizations to develop epistemic grounding documents in such a way as to keep domain experts in the loop in a future of democratized generation of bespoke software solutions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向特定学科的“基础约束文档”GROUNDING.md，用于在AI辅助编程中把领域级正确性要求和社区默认规范显式写入，从而指导智能体生成更可靠的软件。
AI.motivation: 随着AI辅助开发从聊天式编程演进到智能体式软件开发，仅有计划文档已不足以保证专业场景下的正确性。作者希望通过引入领域范围的基础文档，让非领域专家也能生成符合最佳实践的代码，并降低审查与使用风险。
AI.method: 以基于质谱的蛋白质组学为例，提出社区治理的领域范围“认识论基础文档”GROUNDING.md。该文档包含两类内容：一类是不可妥协的有效性不变量，另一类是社区约定的默认参数；其优先级高于其他上下文，用于约束AI智能体的输出。
AI.result: 该框架在概念上可以让AI更容易遵循领域规范，使生成的软件在基础层面就内置最佳实践，并帮助组织将领域专家持续纳入工作流。
AI.conclusion: GROUNDING.md提供了一种把领域知识结构化注入AI开发流程的方法，有潜力提升专用软件生成的可靠性、可审查性和一致性。

title: Symbolic Grounding Reveals Representational Bottlenecks in Abstract Visual Reasoning
