summary: Vision--language models (VLMs) often fail on abstract visual reasoning benchmarks such as Bongard problems, raising the question of whether the main bottleneck lies in reasoning or representation. We study this on Bongard-LOGO, a synthetic benchmark of abstract concept learning with ground-truth generative programs, by comparing end-to-end VLMs on raw images with large language models (LLMs) given symbolic inputs derived from those images. Using symbolic inputs as a diagnostic probe rather than a practical multimodal architecture, our \emph{Componential--Grammatical (C--G)} paradigm reformulates Bongard-LOGO as a symbolic reasoning task based on LOGO-style action programs or structured descriptions. LLMs achieve large and consistent gains, reaching mid--90s accuracy on Free-form problems, while a strong visual baseline remains near chance under matched task definitions. Ablations on input format, explicit concept prompts, and minimal visual grounding show that these factors matter much less than the shift from pixels to symbolic structure. These results identify representation as a key bottleneck in abstract visual reasoning and show how symbolic input can serve as a controlled diagnostic upper bound.

AI.tldr: 本文研究VLM在抽象视觉推理基准Bongard-LOGO上失败的原因，发现主要瓶颈更可能是表示而非推理；当把图像转换为符号化输入后，LLM在任务上显著提升，说明结构化表示对抽象概念学习至关重要。
AI.motivation: 作者关注视觉-语言模型在Bongard类抽象视觉推理任务上表现不佳的问题，试图区分性能瓶颈究竟来自推理能力不足，还是来自原始图像表示难以承载抽象概念。
AI.method: 在Bongard-LOGO数据集上，对比两类设定：一类是端到端VLM直接处理原始图像；另一类是将图像转为符号输入后交给LLM进行推理。作者提出Componential-Grammatical（C-G）范式，把任务重构为基于LOGO风格动作程序或结构化描述的符号推理。并通过输入格式、显式概念提示、最小视觉 grounding 等消融实验分析影响因素。
AI.result: LLM在符号输入下取得显著且稳定的提升，在Free-form任务上达到中90%左右的准确率；而在匹配任务定义下，强视觉基线仍接近随机水平。消融结果表明，输入格式、显式提示和少量视觉对齐的作用远小于从像素到符号结构这一表示转换本身。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，抽象视觉推理中的关键瓶颈主要在表示层面，而非单纯推理能力不足；符号化输入可以作为一种受控的诊断工具，用于评估模型在抽象概念学习上的上限。

title: Measure Twice, Click Once: Co-evolving Proposer and Visual Critic via Reinforcement Learning for GUI Grounding
summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) grounding requires mapping natural language instructions to precise pixel coordinates. However, due to visually homogeneous elements and dense layouts, models typically grasp semantic intent yet struggle with achieving precise localization. While scaling sampling attempts (Pass@k) reveals potential gains, static self-consistency strategies derived from geometric clustering often yield limited improvements, as the model's predictions tend to be spatially dispersed. In this paper, we propose replacing static consistency strategies with a learnable selection mechanism that selects the optimal target by critiquing its own proposals rendered on the screenshot. Given the significant disparity between the model's grounding and critiquing capabilities, we propose a co-evolving Propose-then-Critic framework. To jointly optimize these, we introduce a maturity-aware adaptive co-evolutionary reinforcement learning paradigm. This approach dynamically balances the training objectives of proposer and critic, where the diversity of the proposer's outputs enhances critic robustness, while the critic's maturing discrimination capability conversely unlocks the proposer's potential for extensive spatial exploration, fostering the mutual reinforcement and co-evolution of both capabilities, thereby ensuring generalizability to adapt to diverse and complex interface layouts. Extensive experiments over 6 benchmarks show that our method significantly enhances both grounding accuracy and critic reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于GUI定位的协同框架：先由模型生成多个候选点，再通过可学习的自我评判机制在截图上挑选最优目标，以提升像素级定位精度。
AI.motivation: GUI grounding需要将自然语言指令精确映射到屏幕坐标，但界面元素常常相似且布局密集，导致模型虽然能理解语义，却难以稳定完成精确定位。传统基于几何聚类的一致性策略对分散预测的提升有限，因此作者希望用可学习的选择机制替代静态自一致策略。
AI.method: 提出Propose-then-Critic协同框架：先生成多个定位候选，再将候选渲染到截图上由critic进行评估与筛选；同时设计成熟度感知的自适应协同强化学习机制，动态平衡proposer与critic的训练，使候选多样性和判别能力相互促进、共同演化。
AI.result: 在6个基准测试上，方法显著提升了grounding准确率，并提高了critic的可靠性，说明该协同机制能够更有效地处理复杂界面布局。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，针对GUI精确定位，与其依赖静态一致性，不如采用可学习的“生成-批判”协同范式，并通过自适应强化学习实现两者共同优化，从而获得更好的泛化能力与定位性能。

title: Beyond Pixels: Introspective and Interactive Grounding for Visualization Agents
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) frequently misread values, hallucinate details, and confuse overlapping elements in charts. Current approaches rely solely on pixel interpretation, creating a Pixel-Only Bottleneck: agents treat interactive charts as static images, losing access to the structured specification that encodes exact values. We introduce Introspective and Interactive Visual Grounding (IVG), a framework that combines (1) spec-grounded introspection, which queries the underlying specification for deterministic evidence, with (2) view-grounded interaction, which manipulates the view to resolve visual ambiguity. To enable evaluation without VLM bias, we present iPlotBench, a benchmark of 500 interactive Plotly figures with 6,706 binary questions and ground-truth specifications. Experiments show that introspection improves data reconstruction fidelity, while the combination with interaction achieves the highest QA accuracy (0.81), with +6.7 % gains on overlapping geometries. We further demonstrate IVG in deployed agents that explore data autonomously and collaborate with human users in real time.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出IVG框架，针对VLM在图表理解中易出现数值误读、幻觉和重叠元素混淆的问题，通过“规格推理+视图交互”联合提升图表问答与数据还原能力，并构建了iPlotBench基准进行评测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法只依赖像素理解，把交互式图表当作静态图片处理，无法利用图表底层结构化规格中的精确数值与关系，导致在重叠几何、遮挡和细节读取任务上表现不稳定。
AI.method: 提出Introspective and Interactive Visual Grounding（IVG）框架，包含两部分：1）基于规格的内省（spec-grounded introspection），直接查询底层规格获取确定性证据；2）基于视图的交互（view-grounded interaction），通过操控视图消解视觉歧义。与此同时，构建iPlotBench基准，包含500个交互式Plotly图表、6706个二分类问题及对应真值规格，用于避免VLM偏置评测。
AI.result: 实验表明，内省机制可提升数据重建保真度；结合交互后取得最高问答准确率0.81；在重叠几何场景上提升最明显，准确率提升6.7%。
AI.conclusion: IVG有效缓解了“只看像素”的瓶颈，使模型能同时利用结构化规格与交互视图信息，从而提升图表理解、自动探索和人机协作场景中的表现。

title: AgentLens: Adaptive Visual Modalities for Human-Agent Interaction in Mobile GUI Agents
summary: Mobile GUI agents can automate smartphone tasks by interacting directly with app interfaces, but how they should communicate with users during execution remains underexplored. Existing systems rely on two extremes: foreground execution, which maximizes transparency but prevents multitasking, and background execution, which supports multitasking but provides little visual awareness. Through iterative formative studies, we found that users prefer a hybrid model with just-in-time visual interaction, but the most effective visualization modality depends on the task. Motivated by this, we present AgentLens, a mobile GUI agent that adaptively uses three visual modalities during human-agent interaction: Full UI, Partial UI, and GenUI. AgentLens extends a standard mobile agent with adaptive communication actions and uses Virtual Display to enable background execution with selective visual overlays. In a controlled study with 21 participants, AgentLens was preferred by 85.7% of participants and achieved the highest usability (1.94 Overall PSSUQ) and adoption-intent (6.43/7).

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了面向手机GUI智能体的人机交互框架AgentLens，用自适应的三种可视化方式平衡执行透明度与多任务并行需求，并在用户研究中表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 现有手机GUI智能体在人机沟通上主要依赖两种极端：前台执行虽然透明但会阻碍用户并行操作，后台执行虽然便于多任务却缺乏可视化反馈，因此需要一种更灵活的交互方式。
AI.method: 作者通过迭代式形成性研究发现用户更偏好“即时可视化交互”的混合模式，并据此设计了AgentLens。该系统在标准移动智能体基础上加入自适应通信动作，结合虚拟显示技术，实现后台执行与选择性视觉覆盖，并根据任务动态使用三种视觉模态：完整界面、局部界面和生成式界面。
AI.result: 在21名参与者的对照研究中，AgentLens获得85.7%的参与者偏好，整体可用性得分达到1.94（PSSUQ），使用意愿为6.43/7，均为最优表现。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，手机GUI智能体的人机交互不应局限于前台或后台两种固定模式，而应根据任务灵活切换视觉呈现方式；AgentLens证明了自适应可视化通信能够显著提升可用性和接受度。

title: Cortex 2.0: Grounding World Models in Real-World Industrial Deployment
summary: Industrial robotic manipulation demands reliable long-horizon execution across embodiments, tasks, and changing object distributions. While Vision-Language-Action models have demonstrated strong generalization, they remain fundamentally reactive. By optimizing the next action given the current observation without evaluating potential futures, they are brittle to the compounding failure modes of long-horizon tasks. Cortex 2.0 shifts from reactive control to plan-and-act by generating candidate future trajectories in visual latent space, scoring them for expected success and efficiency, then committing only to the highest-scoring candidate. We evaluate Cortex 2.0 on a single-arm and dual-arm manipulation platform across four tasks of increasing complexity: pick and place, item and trash sorting, screw sorting, and shoebox unpacking. Cortex 2.0 consistently outperforms state-of-the-art Vision-Language-Action baselines, achieving the best results across all tasks. The system remains reliable in unstructured environments characterized by heavy clutter, frequent occlusions, and contact-rich manipulation, where reactive policies fail. These results demonstrate that world-model-based planning can operate reliably in complex industrial environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Cortex 2.0，将工业机器人操控从“即时反应式控制”转向“规划-执行”范式：先在视觉潜在空间中生成多个未来轨迹，再按成功率与效率打分，选择最优轨迹执行，从而提升长时序任务的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有 Vision-Language-Action 模型虽具备较强泛化能力，但本质上是反应式的，只依据当前观测选择下一步动作，缺乏对未来结果的显式评估；在长时序操控中容易因错误累积而失效。
AI.method: Cortex 2.0 采用基于世界模型的规划策略：在视觉潜在空间生成候选未来轨迹，对候选轨迹进行成功概率与执行效率评分，然后仅执行得分最高的方案。实验在单臂与双臂操控平台上进行，覆盖四个逐步增难任务：抓取放置、物品与垃圾分类、螺丝分类、鞋盒拆包。
AI.result: Cortex 2.0 在四项任务上均优于当前最先进的 Vision-Language-Action 基线，取得最佳表现；在杂乱、遮挡频繁、接触交互复杂的非结构化环境中仍保持稳定，而反应式策略更容易失败。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，基于世界模型的规划能够显著提升工业机器人在复杂长时序操控任务中的鲁棒性与可靠性，具备在真实工业场景中应用的潜力。

title: Temporal UI State Inconsistency in Desktop GUI Agents: Formalizing and Defending Against TOCTOU Attacks on Computer-Use Agents
summary: GUI agents that control desktop computers via screenshot-and-click loops introduce a new class of vulnerability: the observation-to-action gap (mean 6.51 s on real OSWorld workloads) creates a Time-Of-Check, Time-Of-Use (TOCTOU) window during which an unprivileged attacker can manipulate the UI state. We formalize this as a Visual Atomicity Violation and characterize three concrete attack primitives: (A) Notification Overlay Hijack, (B) Window Focus Manipulation, and (C) Web DOM Injection. Primitive B, the closest desktop analog to Android Action Rebinding, achieves 100% action-redirection success rate with zero visual evidence at the observation time. We propose Pre-execution UI State Verification (PUSV), a lightweight three-layer defense that re-verifies the UI state immediately before each action dispatch: masked pixel SSIM at the click target (L1), global screenshot diff (L2a), and X Window snapshot diff (L2b). PUSV achieves 100% Action Interception Rate across 180 adversarial trials (135 Primitive A + 45 Primitive B) with zero false positives and < 0.1 s overhead. Against Primitive C (zero-visual-footprint DOM injection), PUSV reveals a structural blind spot (~0% AIR), motivating future OS+DOM defense-in-depth architectures. No single PUSV layer alone achieves full coverage; different primitives require different detection signals, validating the layered design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出桌面GUI代理中的“视觉原子性违背”漏洞：由于观察到执行之间存在时间差，攻击者可在此窗口操纵界面状态并劫持动作。作者给出三类攻击原语，并提出预执行UI状态验证（PUSV）作为分层防御，在大多数可见型攻击上实现高拦截率，但对零视觉足迹的DOM注入存在明显盲区。
AI.motivation: 桌面GUI代理依赖“截图-点击”循环完成操作，但从观察界面到实际执行命令之间存在延迟，容易形成TOCTOU窗口。研究动机是识别这一新型安全风险，并设计一种开销低、可在执行前重新确认界面状态的防御机制，以减少攻击者利用界面变化误导代理的机会。
AI.method: 作者将问题形式化为视觉原子性违背，并归纳三种攻击原语：通知覆盖劫持、窗口焦点操控和Web DOM注入。随后提出PUSV分三层验证：L1在点击目标处进行掩码像素SSIM比对，L2a进行全局截图差分，L2b进行X Window快照差分。系统在动作发送前重新检查UI状态，以判断是否发生异常变化。
AI.result: 实验显示，原语B在无视觉证据条件下即可实现100%动作重定向成功率。PUSV在180次对抗试验中对原语A和B达到100%动作拦截率，且零误报、额外开销小于0.1秒。但对原语C，即零视觉足迹的DOM注入，PUSV几乎无效，动作拦截率接近0%，表明其存在结构性盲区。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明桌面GUI代理存在由观察到执行延迟引发的可利用安全漏洞，且单一检测信号难以覆盖所有攻击类型。PUSV的分层设计对可见型界面篡改有效，但对隐藏在DOM层的攻击不足，说明未来需要结合OS层与DOM层的联合防御，形成更完整的纵深防护架构。

title: ReCap: Lightweight Referential Grounding for Coherent Story Visualization
summary: Story Visualization aims to generate a sequence of images that faithfully depicts a textual narrative that preserve character identity, spatial configuration, and stylistic coherence as the narratives unfold. Maintaining such cross-frame consistency has traditionally relied on explicit memory banks, architectural expansion, or auxiliary language models, resulting in substantial parameter growth and inference overhead. We introduce ReCap, a lightweight consistency framework that improves character stability and visual fidelity without modifying the base diffusion backbone. ReCap's CORE (COnditional frame REferencing) module treats anaphors, in our case pronouns, as visual anchors, activating only when characters are referred to by a pronoun and conditioning on the preceding frame to propagate visual identity. This selective design avoids unconditional cross-frame conditioning and introduces only 149K additional parameters, a fraction of the cost of memory-bank and LLM-augmented approaches. To further stabilize identity, we incorporate SemDrift (Guided Semantic Drift Correction) applied only during training. When text is vague or referential, the denoiser lacks a visual anchor for identity-defining attributes, causing character appearance to drift across frames, SemDrift corrects this by aligning denoiser representations with pretrained DINOv3 visual embeddings, enforcing semantic identity stability at zero inference cost. ReCap outperforms previous state-of-the-art, StoryGPT-V, on the two main benchmarks for story visualization by 2.63% Character-Accuracy on FlintstonesSV and by 5.65% on PororoSV, establishing a new state-of-the-art character consistency on both benchmarks. Furthermore, we extend story visualization to human-centric narratives derived from real films, demonstrating the capability of ReCap beyond stylized cartoon domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出轻量级一致性框架ReCap，用于故事可视化中的跨帧角色一致性与视觉保真提升，且无需改动基础扩散骨干。
AI.motivation: 故事可视化需要在多帧图像生成中保持角色身份、空间关系和风格一致性，但现有方法通常依赖显式记忆库、架构扩展或辅助语言模型，带来参数量和推理开销增加，因此需要更轻量的方案。
AI.method: ReCap包含两个核心部分：一是CORE模块，将代词视为视觉锚点，仅在角色被代词指代时激活，并条件化前一帧以传递身份信息，从而避免无条件跨帧条件控制；二是SemDrift，仅在训练阶段使用，通过将去噪器表示与预训练DINOv3视觉嵌入对齐，缓解语义漂移并稳定角色外观。
AI.result: 该方法仅新增149K参数，推理阶段无额外开销。实验表明，ReCap在FlintstonesSV上将Character-Accuracy提升2.63%，在PororoSV上提升5.65%，超过现有最优方法StoryGPT-V，并在两个基准上取得新的角色一致性最佳结果；同时还能扩展到真人电影文本叙事的故事可视化任务。
AI.conclusion: ReCap证明了通过选择性条件引用与训练期语义漂移校正，可以在保持低参数与低推理成本的前提下显著提升故事可视化的跨帧一致性，并具备向真实人物叙事场景泛化的能力。

title: TacticGen: Grounding Adaptable and Scalable Generation of Football Tactics
summary: Success in association football relies on both individual skill and coordinated tactics. While recent advancements in spatio-temporal data and deep learning have enabled predictive analyses like trajectory forecasting, the development of tactical design remains limited. Bridging this gap is essential, as prediction reveals what is likely to occur, whereas tactic generation determines what should occur to achieve strategic objectives. In this work, we present TacticGen, a generative model for adaptable and scalable tactic generation. TacticGen formulates tactics as sequences of multi-agent movements and interactions conditioned on the game context. It employs a multi-agent diffusion transformer with agent-wise self-attention and context-aware cross-attention to capture cooperative and competitive dynamics among players and the ball. Trained with over 3.3 million events and 100 million tracking frames from top-tier leagues, TacticGen achieves state-of-the-art precision in predicting player trajectories. Building on it, TacticGen enables adaptable tactic generation tailored to diverse inference-time objectives through classifier guidance mechanism, specified via rules, natural language, or neural models. Its modeling performance is also inherently scalable. A case study with football experts confirms that TacticGen generates realistic, strategically valuable tactics, demonstrating its practical utility for tactical planning in professional football. The project page is available at: https://shengxu.net/TacticGen/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TacticGen，一种用于足球战术生成的生成式模型，将战术表示为受比赛上下文条件约束的多智能体运动与交互序列；在大规模跟踪数据上训练后，不仅能高精度预测球员轨迹，还能通过分类器引导按规则、自然语言或神经模型指定的目标生成可调整、可扩展的战术。
AI.motivation: 现有研究更多聚焦于轨迹预测，即判断“会发生什么”，但职业足球中的战术设计更需要回答“应该发生什么”以服务战略目标，因此需要一种能够生成战术方案而不仅仅是进行预测的方法。
AI.method: TacticGen采用多智能体扩散Transformer建模战术序列，利用按球员划分的自注意力捕捉球员间协同与对抗关系，并通过上下文交叉注意力融合比赛情境；模型在超过330万事件和1亿帧跟踪数据上训练，并在推理阶段借助分类器引导机制，根据规则、自然语言或神经模型定义的目标进行定制化战术生成。
AI.result: 实验表明，TacticGen在球员轨迹预测上达到最先进的精度；同时，它能够生成适应不同目标的战术方案，并保持良好的可扩展性。专家案例研究进一步验证了生成战术的真实性与战术价值。
AI.conclusion: TacticGen将足球分析从“预测”推进到“生成”，为战术规划提供了一个可定制、可扩展且具备实际应用潜力的生成式框架。

title: DiffuSAM: Diffusion Guided Zero-Shot Object Grounding for Remote Sensing Imagery
summary: Diffusion models have emerged as powerful tools for a wide range of vision tasks, including text-guided image generation and editing. In this work, we explore their potential for object grounding in remote sensing imagery. We propose a hybrid pipeline that integrates diffusion-based localization cues with state-of-the-art segmentation models such as RemoteSAM and SAM3 to obtain more accurate bounding boxes. By leveraging the complementary strengths of generative diffusion models and foundational segmentation models, our approach enables robust and adaptive object localization across complex scenes. Experiments demonstrate that our pipeline significantly improves localization performance, achieving over a 14% increase in Acc@0.5 compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向遥感图像目标定位的混合式流程，结合扩散模型提供的定位线索与RemoteSAM、SAM3等分割模型，提升边界框定位精度。
AI.motivation: 遥感场景通常目标尺度变化大、背景复杂、遮挡和类别多样，传统定位方法难以稳定给出准确框。作者希望利用扩散模型的生成式感知能力，与基础分割模型的精细分割能力互补，从而增强目标grounding能力。
AI.method: 构建一个融合式定位管线：先利用扩散模型提取与目标相关的定位提示，再将这些线索输入到RemoteSAM和SAM3等先进分割模型中，生成更精确的分割结果，并进一步转换为更准确的边界框。该方法强调生成式模型与分割模型的协同。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该管线相较现有最优方法在Acc@0.5上提升超过14%，说明其在复杂遥感场景中的目标定位性能更强、更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明扩散模型不仅可用于生成任务，也可作为遥感目标定位的有效辅助信号；与强分割模型结合后，可显著提升grounding/定位精度，具有较好的应用潜力。

title: AutoVQA-G: Self-Improving Agentic Framework for Automated Visual Question Answering and Grounding Annotation
comment: Accepted at IEEE ICASSP 2026. 5 pages, 5 figures. Code available at https://github.com/rohnson1999/AutoVQA-G
summary: Manual annotation of high-quality visual question answering with grounding (VQA-G) datasets, which pair visual questions with evidential grounding, is crucial for advancing vision-language models (VLMs), but remains unscalable. Existing automated methods are often hindered by two key issues: (1) inconsistent data fidelity due to model hallucinations; (2) brittle verification mechanisms based on simple heuristics. To address these limitations, we introduce AutoVQA-G, a self-improving agentic framework for automated VQA-G annotation. AutoVQA-G employs an iterative refinement loop where a Consistency Evaluation module uses Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning for fine-grained visual verification. Based on this feedback, a memory-augmented Prompt Optimization agent analyzes critiques from failed samples to progressively refine generation prompts. Our experiments show that AutoVQA-G generates VQA-G datasets with superior visual grounding accuracy compared to leading multimodal LLMs, offering a promising approach for creating high-fidelity data to facilitate more robust VLM training and evaluation. Code: https://github.com/rohnson1999/AutoVQA-G

AI.tldr: 该工作提出了一个名为AutoVQA-G的自我改进式自动标注框架，用于生成带证据定位的视觉问答（VQA-G）数据集，以缓解人工标注难以扩展的问题，并提升自动生成数据的视觉一致性与可信度。
AI.motivation: 高质量VQA-G数据对视觉语言模型的训练和评测很重要，但人工构建成本高、扩展性差。现有自动方法主要受两点限制：一是模型幻觉导致数据真实性不稳定；二是验证机制过于依赖简单启发式，鲁棒性不足。因此需要一种更可靠的自动化标注方法。
AI.method: AutoVQA-G采用迭代式自我改进流程：首先通过生成模块产生候选VQA-G样本；随后由一致性评估模块利用链式思维推理进行细粒度视觉核验；对于失败样本的反馈，记忆增强的提示词优化代理会分析批评信息并持续改进生成提示，从而在循环中逐步提升输出质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，AutoVQA-G生成的VQA-G数据集在视觉定位准确性上优于现有领先的多模态大模型生成方案，说明该框架能更有效地产生高保真标注数据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动构建高质量VQA-G数据提供了一个可扩展且可迭代优化的方案，有望支持更稳健的视觉语言模型训练与评测，并减少对人工标注的依赖。

title: HalluClear: Diagnosing, Evaluating and Mitigating Hallucinations in GUI Agents
summary: While progress in GUI agents has been largely driven by industrial-scale training, ungrounded hallucinations often trigger cascading failures in real-world deployments.Unlike general VLM domains, the GUI agent field lacks a hallucination-focused suite for fine-grained diagnosis, reliable evaluation, and targeted mitigation.To bridge this gap, we introduce HalluClear, a comprehensive suite for hallucination mitigation in GUI agents as a complement to computation-intensive scaling. HalluClear comprises: (1) a GUI-specific hallucination taxonomy derived from empirical failure analysis; (2) a calibrated three-stage evaluation workflow which enhances VLM-as-a-judge reliability via expert-annotated benchmarking and ensemble credibility estimation; and (3) a mitigation scheme based on closed-loop structured reasoning, enabling lightweight continual post-training with cold-start initialization for both generalist and GUI-specialist agents. Experiments across representative agents and public benchmarks demonstrate that post-training on only 9K samples within our suite can significantly reduce hallucinations, thereby improving grounding and action fidelity, offering a compute-efficient pathway to robust GUI automation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HalluClear，一个面向GUI智能体幻觉缓解的综合套件，用于细粒度诊断、可靠评测和定向修正，以低算力后训练方式提升GUI自动化的稳定性与动作一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体的发展主要依赖大规模训练，但在真实部署中，未被约束的幻觉会引发连锁失败；同时，该领域缺少专门面向幻觉问题的诊断与评测体系，因此需要一个兼顾评测与缓解的专用方案。
AI.method: 作者构建了三部分内容：一是基于实际失败分析提炼GUI专用幻觉分类体系；二是设计三阶段校准评测流程，通过专家标注基准与集成可信度估计提升VLM作为评审的可靠性；三是提出基于闭环结构化推理的缓解策略，支持冷启动初始化下的轻量持续后训练，适用于通用型和GUI专用智能体。
AI.result: 在代表性智能体和公开基准上的实验表明，仅使用套件中的9000个样本进行后训练，就能显著降低幻觉，并提升 grounding 能力和动作忠实度。
AI.conclusion: HalluClear为GUI智能体提供了一条不同于单纯扩规模训练的、计算更高效的鲁棒化路径，能够在有限训练成本下有效缓解幻觉并提升真实场景可用性。

title: Prompt Sensitivity in Vision-Language Grounding: How Small Changes in Wording Affect Object Detection
comment: 5 pages, 9 figures, 1 table. Accepted at ICCAI 2026 (The 12th International Conference on Computing and Artificial Intelligence), Okinawa, Japan, April 24-27, 2026
summary: Vision-language models enable open-vocabulary object grounding through natural language queries, under the implicit assumption that semantically equivalent descriptions yield consistent outputs. We examine this assumption using a controlled pipeline combining DETR for object proposals with CLIP for language-conditioned selection on 263 COCO val2017 images. We find that overlapping prompts such as "a person," "a human," and "a pedestrian" frequently select different instances, with mean instability of 2.11 distinct selections across six prompts. PCA analysis shows this variability is structured and directional, not random. Prompt ensembling does not improve quality and often shifts selections toward generic regions. We further show that text embedding proximity explains only 34% of grounding disagreement (r = -0.58), confirming that instability arises from the argmax selection mechanism rather than text-level distances alone.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现，视觉-语言模型在开放词汇对象定位中对语义等价提示并不稳定，不同表述常会选中不同实例；这种不稳定具有结构性，且主要来自最终的最大值选择机制，而不只是文本嵌入距离。
AI.motivation: 作者想检验一个隐含前提：语义等价的自然语言描述应当给出一致的定位结果。这个问题关系到视觉-语言模型在开放词汇目标定位中的可靠性与可解释性。
AI.method: 研究构建了一个受控流程，将DETR用于生成候选目标框，再用CLIP根据文本提示进行条件选择；在COCO val2017的263张图像上测试了6个相近提示，并用PCA分析结果分布，同时评估提示集成和文本嵌入距离对不一致性的解释能力。
AI.result: 结果显示，诸如“a person”“a human”“a pedestrian”这类重叠提示经常选择不同实例，平均每组提示产生2.11个不同选择；PCA表明这种变化具有方向性和结构性，而非随机噪声；提示集成通常不会提升质量，反而倾向于把结果推向更泛化的区域；文本嵌入距离只能解释34%的定位分歧，相关系数为r = -0.58。
AI.conclusion: 研究结论是，视觉-语言定位的不稳定主要源于argmax式选择机制，而不是文本语义距离本身。换言之，即便提示在语义上接近，模型也可能因选择决策而产生明显不同的定位输出。

title: GRAIL: Autonomous Concept Grounding for Neuro-Symbolic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Neuro-symbolic Reinforcement Learning (NeSy-RL) combines symbolic reasoning with gradient-based optimization to achieve interpretable and generalizable policies. Relational concepts, such as "left of" or "close by", serve as foundational building blocks that structure how agents perceive and act. However, conventional approaches require human experts to manually define these concepts, limiting adaptability since concept semantics vary across environments. We propose GRAIL (Grounding Relational Agents through Interactive Learning), a framework that autonomously grounds relational concepts through environmental interaction. GRAIL leverages large language models (LLMs) to provide generic concept representations as weak supervision, then refines them to capture environment-specific semantics. This approach addresses both sparse reward signals and concept misalignment prevalent in underdetermined environments. Experiments on the Atari games Kangaroo, Seaquest, and Skiing demonstrate that GRAIL matches or outperforms agents with manually crafted concepts in simplified settings, and reveals informative trade-offs between reward maximization and high-level goal completion in the full environment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRAIL框架，用于在神经符号强化学习中自动落地关系概念，借助大语言模型提供弱监督并结合环境交互进行细化，从而减少人工定义概念的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统神经符号强化学习依赖人工专家手工定义“左边”“靠近”等关系概念，但这些概念在不同环境中的语义会变化，导致适应性差；同时，欠确定环境中还存在稀疏奖励和概念不匹配问题。
AI.method: GRAIL先利用大语言模型生成通用的关系概念表示作为弱监督，再通过与环境的交互对这些表示进行迭代修正，使其对齐具体环境中的语义，从而支持关系概念的自动落地与强化学习优化。
AI.result: 在Atari的Kangaroo、Seaquest和Skiing任务上，GRAIL在简化环境中达到或超过了使用人工构造概念的智能体；在完整环境中，还揭示了奖励最大化与高层目标完成之间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: GRAIL证明了结合大语言模型弱监督与环境交互，可以更有效地自动学习关系概念，为可解释、可泛化的神经符号强化学习提供了一种更具适应性的方案。

title: GIST: Multimodal Knowledge Extraction and Spatial Grounding via Intelligent Semantic Topology
summary: Navigating complex, densely packed environments like retail stores, warehouses, and hospitals poses a significant spatial grounding challenge for humans and embodied AI. In these spaces, dense visual features quickly become stale given the quasi-static nature of items, and long-tail semantic distributions challenge traditional computer vision. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) help assistive systems navigate semantically-rich spaces, they still struggle with spatial grounding in cluttered environments. We present GIST (Grounded Intelligent Semantic Topology), a multimodal knowledge extraction pipeline that transforms a consumer-grade mobile point cloud into a semantically annotated navigation topology. Our architecture distills the scene into a 2D occupancy map, extracts its topological layout, and overlays a lightweight semantic layer via intelligent keyframe and semantic selection. We demonstrate the versatility of this structured spatial knowledge through critical downstream Human-AI interaction tasks: (1) an intent-driven Semantic Search engine that actively infers categorical alternatives and zones when exact matches fail; (2) a one-shot Semantic Localizer achieving a 1.04 m top-5 mean translation error; (3) a Zone Classification module that segments the walkable floor plan into high-level semantic regions; and (4) a Visually-Grounded Instruction Generator that synthesizes optimal paths into egocentric, landmark-rich natural language routing. In multi-criteria LLM evaluations, GIST outperforms sequence-based instruction generation baselines. Finally, an in-situ formative evaluation (N=5) yields an 80% navigation success rate relying solely on verbal cues, validating the system's capacity for universal design.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出GIST，一种将消费级移动点云转化为带语义标注的导航拓扑的多模态知识抽取流水线，用于复杂密集环境中的空间定位与人机交互导航。
AI.motivation: 在零售店、仓库、医院等密集环境中，视觉特征容易失效且语义长尾分布显著，传统视觉方法和现有视觉语言模型在拥挤场景中的空间定位能力不足，因此需要更结构化的空间语义表示来支撑导航与交互。
AI.method: GIST先将场景压缩为二维占据地图，再提取拓扑结构，并通过关键帧与语义选择叠加轻量语义层，形成语义标注导航拓扑；随后在该表示上实现四类下游任务：语义搜索、一次性语义定位、区域分类以及视觉约束的指令生成。
AI.result: 实验表明，GIST可支持多种导航相关任务；其中一次性语义定位达到1.04米的top-5平均平移误差。在多标准LLM评估中，GIST优于基于序列的指令生成基线；小规模现场评估（N=5）中，仅依赖口头线索即可达到80%的导航成功率。
AI.conclusion: 该工作说明，将点云场景结构化为拓扑加轻量语义层，能够有效提升复杂环境中的空间语义理解、定位与自然语言导航生成能力，具有较好的通用设计潜力。

title: Zoom Consistency: A Free Confidence Signal in Multi-Step Visual Grounding Pipelines
summary: Multi-step zoom-in pipelines are widely used for GUI grounding, yet the intermediate predictions they produce are typically discarded after coordinate remapping. We observe that these intermediate outputs contain a useful confidence signal for free: zoom consistency, the distance between a model's step-2 prediction and the crop center. Unlike log-probabilities or token-level uncertainty, zoom consistency is a geometric quantity in a shared coordinate space, making it directly comparable across architecturally different VLMs without calibration. We prove this quantity is a linear estimator of step-1 spatial error under idealized conditions (perfect step-2, target within crop) and show it correlates with prediction correctness across two VLMs (AUC = 0.60; Spearman rho = -0.14, p < 10^{-6} for KV-Ground-8B; rho = -0.11, p = 0.0003 for Qwen3.5-27B). The correlation is small but consistent across models, application categories, and operating systems. As a proof-of-concept, we use zoom consistency to route between a specialist and generalist model, capturing 16.5% of the oracle headroom between them (+0.8%, McNemar p = 0.19). Code is available at https://github.com/omxyz/zoom-consistency-routing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“缩放一致性”作为GUI定位中的一种几何置信信号：它定义为第二步预测与裁剪中心的距离，可用于跨不同VLM直接比较，不依赖概率校准。作者证明在理想条件下它是第一步空间误差的线性估计量，并在两个模型上验证了其与预测正确性存在稳定但较弱的相关性，还展示了其在专家/通用模型路由中的初步应用。
AI.motivation: 多步缩放式GUI定位流程中，模型的中间预测通常在坐标映射后被丢弃，但这些中间结果可能包含额外的置信信息。作者希望找到一种不依赖log概率、且可在不同架构模型间直接比较的通用不确定性指标，以支持更可靠的模型选择与路由。
AI.method: 作者定义“缩放一致性”为步2预测点到裁剪中心的欧氏距离，并从理论上分析其与步1空间误差的关系，证明在理想条件下该量可作为步1误差的线性估计。随后在两个VLM（KV-Ground-8B与Qwen3.5-27B）上进行实证评估，计算AUC、Spearman相关系数及显著性，并进一步将该指标用于在专家模型与通用模型之间进行路由实验。
AI.result: 实验表明缩放一致性与预测正确性存在一致但较弱的相关关系：KV-Ground-8B的AUC为0.60，Spearman rho为-0.14（p < 10^-6）；Qwen3.5-27B的rho为-0.11（p = 0.0003）。这种相关性在不同模型、应用类别和操作系统中均较稳定。作为概念验证，基于该指标的路由策略实现了专家与通用模型间oracle差距的16.5%，带来+0.8%的提升，但统计上不显著（McNemar p = 0.19）。
AI.conclusion: 缩放一致性是一种简单、几何化、无需校准的中间置信信号，能够跨VLM通用比较，并对GUI grounding中的正确性提供稳定但有限的预测能力。尽管单独作为决策信号的强度不高，但其在模型路由和置信估计方面显示出实际应用潜力。

title: UI-Zoomer: Uncertainty-Driven Adaptive Zoom-In for GUI Grounding
summary: GUI grounding, which localizes interface elements from screenshots given natural language queries, remains challenging for small icons and dense layouts. Test-time zoom-in methods improve localization by cropping and re-running inference at higher resolution, but apply cropping uniformly across all instances with fixed crop sizes, ignoring whether the model is actually uncertain on each case. We propose \textbf{UI-Zoomer}, a training-free adaptive zoom-in framework that treats both the trigger and scale of zoom-in as a prediction uncertainty quantification problem. A confidence-aware gate fuses spatial consensus among stochastic candidates with token-level generation confidence to selectively trigger zoom-in only when localization is uncertain. When triggered, an uncertainty-driven crop sizing module decomposes prediction variance into inter-sample positional spread and intra-sample box extent, deriving a per-instance crop radius via the law of total variance. Extensive experiments on ScreenSpot-Pro, UI-Vision, and ScreenSpot-v2 demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines across multiple model architectures, achieving gains of up to +13.4\%, +10.3\%, and +4.2\% respectively, with no additional training required.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个无需训练的自适应放大框架UI-Zoomer，用不确定性来决定何时放大以及放大多少，从而提升GUI界面元素定位效果。
AI.motivation: 界面定位在小图标和密集布局场景下容易失败，现有测试时放大方法虽然能提升精度，但通常对所有样本统一裁剪、固定裁剪尺度，无法针对单个样本的模型不确定性进行调整。
AI.method: UI-Zoomer将放大触发和放大尺度都建模为不确定性量化问题：先用置信感知门控融合随机候选的空间一致性与token级生成置信度，判断是否需要放大；若需要，再通过不确定性感知裁剪模块分解预测方差，结合样本间位置离散和样本内框大小，利用总方差定理为每个实例自适应计算裁剪半径。
AI.result: 在ScreenSpot-Pro、UI-Vision和ScreenSpot-v2上，UI-Zoomer在多种模型架构上都稳定优于强基线，最高分别带来+13.4%、+10.3%和+4.2%的提升，且无需额外训练。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了基于不确定性的自适应测试时放大比固定策略更有效，能够以训练-free方式显著增强GUI grounding在复杂界面中的定位能力。

title: GUI-Perturbed: Domain Randomization Reveals Systematic Brittleness in GUI Grounding Models
summary: GUI grounding models report over 85% accuracy on standard benchmarks, yet drop 27-56 percentage points when instructions require spatial reasoning rather than direct element naming. Current benchmarks miss this because they evaluate each screenshot once with a single fixed instruction. We introduce GUI-Perturbed, a controlled perturbation framework that independently varies visual scenes and instructions to measure grounding robustness. Evaluating three 7B models from the same architecture lineage, we find that relational instructions cause systematic accuracy collapse across all models, a 70% browser zoom produces statistically significant degradation, and rank-8 LoRA fine-tuning with augmented data degrades performance rather than improving it. By perturbing along independent axes, GUI-Perturbed isolates which specific capability axes are affected-spatial reasoning, visual robustness, reasoning calibration-providing diagnostic signal that aggregate benchmarks cannot. We release the dataset, augmentation pipeline, and a fine-tuned model.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个名为 GUI-Perturbed 的受控扰动评测框架，用于更细致地检测 GUI grounding 模型在空间推理、视觉鲁棒性和推理校准等能力轴上的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 现有 GUI 基准通常只在单一截图和固定指令上评测，无法揭示当指令涉及空间关系推理、视觉变化或输入分布偏移时模型性能的真实退化情况。论文旨在填补这一评测盲区。
AI.method: 作者构建了 GUI-Perturbed 框架，分别独立扰动视觉场景与文本指令，以控制变量方式测量模型鲁棒性。实验评估了三个同架构谱系的 7B 模型，并引入浏览器缩放、关系型指令、以及带增强数据的 rank-8 LoRA 微调等设置，比较不同扰动对性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验发现：关系型指令会在所有模型上引发系统性准确率下降；70% 的浏览器缩放会带来显著性能退化；而加入增强数据进行 rank-8 LoRA 微调不仅没有提升，反而降低了表现。
AI.conclusion: GUI-Perturbed 能够通过沿独立轴的扰动，将整体分数拆解为更具诊断意义的能力评估，从而识别传统聚合基准难以暴露的具体薄弱环节。论文还释放了数据集、增强管线和一个微调模型，便于后续复现与研究。

title: RiskWebWorld: A Realistic Interactive Benchmark for GUI Agents in E-commerce Risk Management
summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents show strong capabilities for automating web tasks, but existing interactive benchmarks primarily target benign, predictable consumer environments. Their effectiveness in high-stakes, investigative domains such as authentic e-commerce risk management remains underexplored. To bridge this gap, we present RiskWebWorld, the first highly realistic interactive benchmark for evaluating GUI agents in e-commerce risk management. RiskWebWorld features 1,513 tasks sourced from production risk-control pipelines across 8 core domains, and captures the authentic challenges of risk operations on uncooperative websites, partially environmental hijackments. To support scalable evaluation and agentic reinforcement learning (RL), we further build a Gymnasium-compliant infrastructure that decouples policy planning from environment mechanics. Our evaluation across diverse models reveals a dramatic capability gap: top-tier generalist models achieve 49.1% success, while specialized open-weights GUI models lag at near-total failure. This highlights that foundation model scale currently matters more than zero-shot interface grounding in long-horizon professional tasks. We also demonstrate the viability of our infrastructure through agentic RL, which improves open-source models by 16.2%. These results position RiskWebWorld as a practical testbed for developing robust digital workers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向电商风控的高保真GUI交互基准RiskWebWorld，用于评估智能体在真实、高风险、长周期网页任务中的能力，并验证了可扩展评测与强化学习训练框架的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体基准多聚焦于普通、可预测的消费级场景，缺少对真实电商风险管理这类高复杂度、高不确定性任务的评测，因此需要一个更接近生产环境的测试平台。
AI.method: 构建了RiskWebWorld基准，共包含1,513个任务，来源于8个核心领域的生产级风控流程；同时搭建了兼容Gymnasium的基础设施，将策略规划与环境机制解耦，以支持可扩展评测和智能体强化学习。
AI.result: 实验显示不同模型能力差异显著：顶级通用模型成功率达到49.1%，而专门的开源GUI模型几乎接近失效；进一步的智能体强化学习使开源模型性能提升了16.2%。
AI.conclusion: RiskWebWorld填补了电商风险管理GUI评测的空白，说明在长链路专业任务中，基础模型规模当前比零样本界面理解更关键，同时该基准和框架可作为训练鲁棒数字员工的实用测试平台。

title: Towards Scalable Lightweight GUI Agents via Multi-role Orchestration
summary: Autonomous Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents powered by Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) enable digital automation on end-user devices. While scaling both parameters and data has yielded substantial gains, advanced methods still suffer from prohibitive deployment costs on resource-constrained devices. When facing complex in-the-wild scenarios, lightweight GUI agents are bottlenecked by limited capacity and poor task scalability under end-to-end episodic learning, impeding adaptation to multi-agent systems (MAS), while training multiple skill-specific experts remains costly. Can we strike an effective trade-off in this cost-scalability dilemma, enabling lightweight MLLMs to participate in realistic GUI workflows? To address these challenges, we propose the LAMO framework, which endows a lightweight MLLM with GUI-specific knowledge and task scalability, allowing multi-role orchestration to expand its capability boundary for GUI automation. LAMO combines role-oriented data synthesis with a two-stage training recipe: (i) supervised fine-tuning with Perplexity-Weighted Cross-Entropy optimization for knowledge distillation and visual perception enhancement, and (ii) reinforcement learning for role-oriented cooperative exploration. With LAMO, we develop a task-scalable native GUI agent, LAMO-3B, supporting monolithic execution and MAS-style orchestration. When paired with advanced planners as a plug-and-play policy executor, LAMO-3B can continuously benefit from planner advances, enabling a higher performance ceiling. Extensive static and online evaluations validate the effectiveness of our design.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出LAMO框架，用角色化数据合成、两阶段训练与协作探索来增强轻量级MLLM的GUI自动化能力，使其在资源受限场景下兼顾成本与可扩展性，并支持单体执行与多智能体式编排。
AI.motivation: 现有高级GUI代理虽性能较强，但部署成本高；轻量级代理又受限于容量不足、任务扩展性差，难以适应复杂真实场景和多智能体协作，因此需要一种更有效的成本-可扩展性折中方案。
AI.method: LAMO采用三部分设计：1）角色导向的数据合成，补充GUI领域知识与多角色任务分工；2）两阶段训练，包括基于困惑度加权交叉熵的监督微调，用于知识蒸馏和视觉感知增强；3）强化学习阶段，用于角色导向的协作式探索。基于此构建了LAMO-3B，支持单体执行与MAS式编排，并可作为可插拔策略执行器与更强规划器配合。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，LAMO-3B在静态评测和在线评测中均表现有效，具备更强的任务扩展性与GUI自动化能力；同时，接入更先进规划器后，可持续受益于规划能力提升，进一步抬升性能上限。
AI.conclusion: LAMO为轻量级MLLM参与真实GUI工作流提供了一种可行路径：通过领域知识增强与协作训练，在控制部署成本的同时提升任务可扩展性和系统上限，适合资源受限设备上的GUI自动化应用。

title: PrecisionCUA: Iterative Visual Refinement for Pixel-Precise Cursor Grounding in Code Editors
summary: Computer Use Agents (CUAs) fundamentally rely on graphical user interface (GUI) grounding to translate language instructions into executable screen actions, but editing-level grounding in dense coding interfaces (such as VS Code and Cursor), where sub-pixel accuracy is required to interact with dense IDE elements, remains underexplored. Existing approaches typically rely on single-shot coordinate prediction, which lacks a mechanism for error correction and often fails in high-density interfaces. In this technical report, we conduct an empirical study of pixel-precise cursor localization in coding environments. Instead of a single-step execution, our agent engages in an iterative refinement process, utilizing visual feedback from previous attempts to reach the target element. This closed-loop grounding mechanism allows the agent to self-correct displacement errors and adapt to dynamic UI changes. We evaluate our approach across Claude, Qwen, and GPT on a suite of complex coding benchmarks, demonstrating that multi-turn refinement significantly outperforms state-of-the-art single-shot models in both click precision and overall task success rate. Our results suggest that iterative visual reasoning is a critical component for the next generation of reliable software engineering agents. Code: https://github.com/microsoft/precision-cua-bench/tree/main.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在密集代码编辑界面中进行像素级光标定位的问题，提出基于视觉反馈的多轮迭代细化机制，显著优于单次坐标预测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机使用代理在图形界面任务中多依赖单步坐标预测，但在 VS Code、Cursor 等高密度编辑界面里，元素间距极小，单次定位容易产生偏差且缺乏纠错能力，因此需要更可靠的编辑级界面对齐方法。
AI.method: 作者开展了代码环境中像素级光标定位的实证研究，设计闭环式 grounding 流程：代理不是一次性输出点击坐标，而是根据前一次尝试后的视觉反馈反复修正位置，逐步逼近目标元素；并在 Claude、Qwen、GPT 等模型上，于复杂编码基准上进行评测。
AI.result: 实验表明，多轮细化在点击精度和整体任务成功率上都明显优于当前最先进的单次预测模型，且能够更好地纠正位移误差并适应界面变化。
AI.conclusion: 迭代式视觉推理与闭环纠错是提升软件工程代理在高密度 GUI 中可靠性的关键组件，尤其适用于需要像素级精确操作的开发环境。

title: DocSeeker: Structured Visual Reasoning with Evidence Grounding for Long Document Understanding
summary: Existing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) suffer from significant performance degradation on the long document understanding task as document length increases. This stems from two fundamental challenges: 1) a low Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR), with crucial evidence buried in irrelevant pages; and 2) supervision scarcity, as datasets offering only final short answers provide a weak learning signal. In this paper, we address these challenges by proposing a paradigm that requires the model to execute a structured Analysis, Localization and Reasoning workflow. To instill this capability, we design a two-stage training framework: we first perform Supervised Fine-Tuning on high-quality data generated via an efficient knowledge distillation strategy. Subsequently, we employ an Evidence-aware Group Relative Policy Optimization which jointly optimizes for both evidence localization and answer accuracy. Additionally, we introduce a Evidence-Guided Resolution Allocation strategy to mitigate memory constraints of training on multi-pages documents. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DocSeeker achieves superior performance on both in-domain and out-of-domain tasks. We show it robustly generalizes from short-page training to ultra-long documents and is naturally synergistic with visual Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems, serving as a solid foundation for their implementation.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多模态大语言模型在长文档理解中随文档长度增加而性能下降的问题，提出了一种“分析—定位—推理”的结构化流程，并通过两阶段训练与证据感知策略提升证据定位和答案生成能力。
AI.motivation: 长文档理解面临两个核心困难：一是关键证据容易淹没在无关页面中，导致信噪比低；二是现有数据通常只提供最终简短答案，监督信号较弱，难以学到有效的证据定位与推理能力。
AI.method: 作者提出DocSeeker框架，包含三项关键设计：1）要求模型执行结构化的分析、定位和推理流程；2）两阶段训练，先用高质量蒸馏数据进行监督微调，再用证据感知的组相对策略优化同时优化证据定位与答案准确率；3）引入证据引导的分辨率分配策略，以缓解多页文档训练中的显存与内存限制。
AI.result: 实验表明，DocSeeker在域内和域外任务上都取得了更优性能，并且能够从短页训练稳定泛化到超长文档。同时，它与视觉检索增强生成系统具有良好的协同效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过将证据定位纳入训练目标，并结合高质量监督与强化优化，显著增强了多模态模型的长文档理解能力，可作为长文档检索增强生成系统的有效基础。

title: Unlocking the Potential of Grounding DINO in Videos: Parameter-Efficient Adaptation for Limited-Data Spatial-Temporal Localization
summary: Spatio-temporal video grounding (STVG) aims to localize queried objects within dynamic video segments. Prevailing fully-trained approaches are notoriously data-hungry. However, gathering large-scale STVG data is exceptionally challenging: dense frame-level bounding boxes and complex temporal language alignments are prohibitively expensive to annotate, especially for specialized video domains. Consequently, conventional models suffer from severe overfitting on these inherently limited datasets, while zero-shot foundational models lack the task-specific temporal awareness needed for precise localization. To resolve this small-data challenge, we introduce ST-GD, a data-efficient framework that adapts pre-trained 2D visual-language models (e.g., Grounding DINO) to video tasks. To avoid destroying pre-trained priors on small datasets, ST-GD keeps the base model frozen and strategically injects lightweight adapters (~10M trainable parameters) to instill spatio-temporal awareness, alongside a novel temporal decoder for boundary prediction. This design naturally counters data scarcity. Consequently, ST-GD excels in data-scarce scenarios, achieving highly competitive performance on the limited-scale HC-STVG v1/v2 benchmarks, while maintaining robust generalization on the VidSTG dataset. This validates ST-GD as a powerful paradigm for complex video understanding under strict small-data constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ST-GD，一种面向时空视频定位（STVG）的数据高效框架，通过冻结预训练2D视觉-语言模型并加入轻量适配器与时序解码器，在小样本条件下实现视频目标的精确时空定位。
AI.motivation: 现有STVG方法通常依赖大量标注数据，但该任务需要逐帧框选和复杂的时序语言对齐，标注成本极高，导致数据集规模有限。传统全监督模型容易过拟合，而零样本基础模型又缺乏任务所需的时序感知能力，因此需要一种适合小数据场景的方案。
AI.method: ST-GD以预训练2D视觉-语言模型（如Grounding DINO）为基础，保持主干冻结以保护已有先验，仅注入约1000万可训练参数的轻量适配器来增强时空建模能力，并设计新的时序解码器用于边界预测，从而在不破坏预训练知识的前提下适配视频任务。
AI.result: 在数据稀缺的HC-STVG v1/v2基准上，ST-GD取得了具有竞争力的性能，同时在VidSTG数据集上也表现出稳定的泛化能力，说明该方法在小样本视频理解场景中有效且鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: ST-GD展示了一种面向复杂视频理解任务的有效小数据适配范式：通过冻结大模型、引入轻量模块和时序建模机制，可以在标注受限条件下实现高质量的时空定位。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation Must Move Beyond Factual Grounding to Represent Diverse Opinions
summary: This position paper argues that Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems exhibit a systematic factual bias-optimizing for epistemic uncertainty reduction while ignoring the aleatoric uncertainty inherent in opinion-rich content - and that this misalignment demands a paradigm shift in retrieval system design. A survey of 35 major RAG benchmarks reveals that only one addresses opinion synthesis, confirming that the bias is structural: embedded in datasets, retrieval objectives, and evaluation metrics alike. Beyond technical limitations, this bias poses risks to transparent and accountable AI: echo chamber effects that amplify dominant viewpoints, systematic under-representation of minority voices, and potential opinion manipulation through biased information synthesis. We formalize the problem through the lens of uncertainty quantification, showing that factual queries should minimize posterior entropy while opinion queries must preserve it, and derive a unified objective over coverage, fidelity, and fairness using the Wasserstein distance. As an existence proof, we present Opinion-Aware RAG (O-RAG), an architecture featuring LLM-based opinion extraction and entity-linked opinion metadata, and evaluate it across two domains - e-commerce seller forums and public hotel reviews - spanning 10K+ discussions and 6K+ customer reviews. Experiments demonstrate 18-48% reduction in Wasserstein distance to corpus-level sentiment distributions, +26.8% sentiment diversity, and +42.7% entity match rate, with human evaluators preferring opinion-enriched responses 79.2% of the time. We propose a research agenda and argue that as RAG systems increasingly mediate access to information, their ability to represent diverse perspectives is not optional but essential.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，当前检索增强生成（RAG）系统过度优化“事实性”信息，忽视了带有观点和不确定性的内容表达，导致观点汇总与多样性呈现不足；作者提出观点感知RAG（O-RAG）并在两个领域实验验证其可提升观点覆盖、情感多样性和实体匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG评测与检索目标主要面向事实查询，倾向降低认识性不确定性，却忽略意见类内容本身包含的随机性与多元性。这会带来视角单一、少数观点被压制以及信息合成偏置等问题，因此需要重新设计RAG系统，使其能在不同任务中正确处理不确定性。
AI.method: 作者先基于35个主流RAG基准做调查，指出只有一个基准涉及意见综合，说明偏置存在于数据集、检索目标与评估指标中。随后从不确定性量化角度形式化问题：事实查询应最小化后验熵，而意见查询应保留熵，并基于覆盖度、保真度与公平性构建统一目标，使用Wasserstein距离进行优化。作为验证，提出O-RAG架构，包含基于大模型的观点抽取和实体关联的观点元数据，并在电商卖家论坛与酒店评论两个场景中进行评估。
AI.result: 实验显示，O-RAG相较基线在到语料级情感分布的Wasserstein距离上降低18–48%，情感多样性提升26.8%，实体匹配率提升42.7%；人类评审者在79.2%的情况下更偏好引入观点信息的回答。
AI.conclusion: 文章认为，RAG系统不能只追求事实正确，还必须具备表达多元观点的能力。对于事实型与意见型查询，应采用不同的不确定性处理策略；未来RAG研究需要把观点覆盖、公平性与多样性纳入核心设计与评测标准。

title: ClawGUI: A Unified Framework for Training, Evaluating, and Deploying GUI Agents
summary: GUI agents drive applications through their visual interfaces instead of programmatic APIs, interacting with arbitrary software via taps, swipes, and keystrokes, reaching a long tail of applications that CLI-based agents cannot. Yet progress in this area is bottlenecked less by modeling capacity than by the absence of a coherent full-stack infrastructure: online RL training suffers from environment instability and closed pipelines, evaluation protocols drift silently across works, and trained agents rarely reach real users on real devices. We present \textbf{ClawGUI}, an open-source framework addressing these three gaps within a single harness. \textbf{ClawGUI-RL} provides the first open-source GUI agent RL infrastructure with validated support for both parallel virtual environments and real physical devices, integrating GiGPO with a Process Reward Model for dense step-level supervision. \textbf{ClawGUI-Eval} enforces a fully standardized evaluation pipeline across 6 benchmarks and 11+ models, achieving 95.8\% reproduction against official baselines. \textbf{ClawGUI-Agent} brings trained agents to Android, HarmonyOS, and iOS through 12+ chat platforms with hybrid CLI-GUI control and persistent personalized memory. Trained end to end within this pipeline, \textbf{ClawGUI-2B} achieves 17.1\% Success Rate on MobileWorld GUI-Only, outperforming the same-scale MAI-UI-2B baseline by 6.0\%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出开源框架ClawGUI，统一解决GUI代理领域的三项关键瓶颈：在线强化学习训练、标准化评测和真实设备部署，并给出端到端训练的2B模型ClawGUI-2B，在MobileWorld GUI-Only上取得17.1%的成功率。
AI.motivation: GUI代理能够通过视觉界面直接操作各种应用，覆盖传统CLI代理难以触达的长尾软件场景。但该领域受限于缺乏一致的全栈基础设施，主要问题包括训练环境不稳定、评测协议不统一、以及模型难以真正部署到用户设备上。
AI.method: 作者构建了三个组件：ClawGUI-RL用于在线强化学习，支持并行虚拟环境和真实物理设备，并结合GiGPO与过程奖励模型提供步级稠密监督；ClawGUI-Eval用于统一6个基准和11个以上模型的评测流程，以保证可复现性；ClawGUI-Agent用于将训练好的代理部署到Android、HarmonyOS和iOS等平台，并支持12个以上聊天平台、CLI-GUI混合控制和个性化持久记忆。
AI.result: ClawGUI-Eval在对6个基准和11+模型的评测中实现了95.8%的与官方基线一致复现率。端到端训练得到的ClawGUI-2B在MobileWorld GUI-Only上达到17.1%的Success Rate，相比同规模MAI-UI-2B基线提升6.0个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该工作不仅提出了一个开源的GUI代理全栈框架，还在训练、评测与部署三个层面形成了统一闭环，增强了GUI代理研究的可复现性和落地能力。

title: Mobile GUI Agent Privacy Personalization with Trajectory Induced Preference Optimization
summary: Mobile GUI agents powered by Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) can execute complex tasks on mobile devices. Despite this progress, most existing systems still optimize task success or efficiency, neglecting users' privacy personalization. In this paper, we study the often-overlooked problem of agent personalization. We observe that personalization can induce systematic structural heterogeneity in execution trajectories. For example, privacy-first users often prefer protective actions, e.g., refusing permissions, logging out, and minimizing exposure, leading to logically different execution trajectories from utility-first users. Such variable-length and structurally different trajectories make standard preference optimization unstable and less informative. To address this issue, we propose Trajectory Induced Preference Optimization (TIPO), which uses preference-intensity weighting to emphasize key privacy-related steps and padding gating to suppress alignment noise. Results on our Privacy Preference Dataset show that TIPO improves persona alignment and distinction while preserving strong task executability, achieving 65.60% SR, 46.22 Compliance, and 66.67% PD, outperforming existing optimization methods across various GUI tasks. The code and dataset will be publicly released at https://github.com/Zhixin-L/TIPO.

AI.tldr: 本文研究移动GUI智能体在隐私个性化上的偏好对齐问题，提出TIPO方法，通过轨迹级偏好强度加权和填充门控抑制对齐噪声，从而提升不同用户人设下的执行差异性与任务可执行性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多模态大语言模型的移动GUI智能体主要优化任务成功率和效率，忽视了用户隐私偏好个性化。由于不同用户的隐私偏好会导致执行轨迹在结构和长度上显著不同，传统偏好优化在这种场景下不稳定且信息利用不足。
AI.method: 提出Trajectory Induced Preference Optimization（TIPO）。该方法利用轨迹中的偏好强度加权，突出隐私相关关键步骤的重要性；同时通过填充门控机制抑制由可变长度和结构差异带来的对齐噪声，以更稳健地进行偏好优化。
AI.result: 在Privacy Preference Dataset上，TIPO在保持较强任务执行能力的同时，提高了人设对齐与区分能力，取得65.60% SR、46.22 Compliance和66.67% PD，并且在多种GUI任务上优于现有优化方法。
AI.conclusion: TIPO表明，将用户隐私偏好显式纳入轨迹级优化，有助于缓解移动GUI智能体中的个性化对齐难题，并在不牺牲可执行性的前提下提升隐私偏好匹配效果。

title: Script-a-Video: Deep Structured Audio-visual Captions via Factorized Streams and Relational Grounding
summary: Advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are transforming video captioning from a descriptive endpoint into a semantic interface for both video understanding and generation. However, the dominant paradigm still casts videos as monolithic narrative paragraphs that entangle visual, auditory, and identity information. This dense coupling not only compromises representational fidelity but also limits scalability, since even local edits can trigger global rewrites. To address this structural bottleneck, we propose Multi-Stream Scene Script (MTSS), a novel paradigm that replaces monolithic text with factorized and explicitly grounded scene descriptions. MTSS is built on two core principles: Stream Factorization, which decouples a video into complementary streams (Reference, Shot, Event, and Global), and Relational Grounding, which reconnects these isolated streams through explicit identity and temporal links to maintain holistic video consistency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MTSS consistently enhances video understanding across various models, achieving an average reduction of 25% in the total error rate on Video-SALMONN-2 and an average performance gain of 67% on the Daily-Omni reasoning benchmark. It also narrows the performance gap between smaller and larger MLLMs, indicating a substantially more learnable caption interface. Finally, even without architectural adaptation, replacing monolithic prompts with MTSS in multi-shot video generation yields substantial human-rated improvements: a 45% boost in cross-shot identity consistency, a 56% boost in audio-visual alignment, and a 71% boost in temporal controllability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的多模态视频描述范式MTSS，用结构化、分流式、显式关联的场景脚本替代传统一段式视频字幕，以提升视频理解与生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频字幕通常把视觉、音频和身份信息混在单一长文本中，容易造成表征不精确；同时局部修改会引发整体重写，影响可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出Multi-Stream Scene Script（MTSS），包含两项核心设计：1）流分解，将视频拆分为Reference、Shot、Event、Global四类互补信息流；2）关系锚定，通过显式的身份与时间链接把各信息流重新连接，保持整体一致性。
AI.result: 实验显示，MTSS在多种模型上提升视频理解能力，在Video-SALMONN-2上总错误率平均降低25%，在Daily-Omni推理基准上平均提升67%；同时缩小了小模型与大模型的性能差距。直接将单一提示替换为MTSS后，视频生成的人评也显著改善：跨镜头身份一致性提升45%，音画对齐提升56%，时间可控性提升71%。
AI.conclusion: MTSS将视频字幕从“单段叙事”转向“因子化且可显式对齐的场景接口”，更利于学习、扩展与生成控制，并能在不改模型结构的情况下带来稳定收益。

title: Test-time Scaling over Perception: Resolving the Grounding Paradox in Thinking with Images
summary: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have begun to support Thinking with Images by invoking visual tools such as zooming and cropping during inference. Yet these systems remain brittle in fine-grained visual reasoning because they must decide where to look before they have access to the evidence needed to make that decision correctly. We identify this circular dependency as the Grounding Paradox. To address it, we propose Test-Time Scaling over Perception (TTSP), a framework that treats perception itself as a scalable inference process. TTSP generates multiple exploratory perception traces, filters unreliable traces using entropy-based confidence estimation, distills validated observations into structured knowledge, and iteratively refines subsequent exploration toward unresolved uncertainty. Extensive experiments on high-resolution and general multimodal reasoning benchmarks show that TTSP consistently outperforms strong baselines across backbone sizes, while also exhibiting favorable scalability and token efficiency. Our results suggest that scaling perception at test time is a promising direction for robust multimodal reasoning under perceptual uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了“感知的测试时扩展（TTSP）”框架，用于缓解多模态大语言模型在细粒度视觉推理中因“先决定看哪里、再获取证据”而产生的循环依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型虽然支持借助缩放、裁剪等视觉工具进行图像思维，但在细粒度视觉推理时仍然脆弱，因为在获得足够证据之前就必须先做出关注区域判断，容易导致错误定位与推理失败。
AI.method: 作者将感知过程视为一种可扩展的测试时推理任务，提出TTSP：生成多条探索性的感知轨迹，使用基于熵的置信度估计筛除不可靠轨迹，将验证过的观察结果蒸馏为结构化知识，并通过迭代方式把后续探索聚焦到仍未解决的不确定性上。
AI.result: 在高分辨率与通用多模态推理基准上，TTSP在不同规模的骨干模型上均稳定优于强基线，同时表现出良好的可扩展性和更高的token效率。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，将感知过程在测试时进行扩展，是提升多模态模型在感知不确定条件下稳健推理能力的一条有前景的方向。

title: Verify Before You Fix: Agentic Execution Grounding for Trustworthy Cross-Language Code Analysis
comment: 20 pages (13 main + 7 appendices), 9 figures, 10 tables. Submitted to NeurIPS 2026
summary: Learned classifiers deployed in agentic pipelines face a fundamental reliability problem: predictions are probabilistic inferences, not verified conclusions, and acting on them without grounding in observable evidence leads to compounding failures across downstream stages. Software vulnerability analysis makes this cost concrete and measurable. We address this through a unified cross-language vulnerability lifecycle framework built around three LLM-driven reasoning stages-hybrid structural-semantic detection, execution-grounded agentic validation, and validation-aware iterative repair-governed by a strict invariant: no repair action is taken without execution-based confirmation of exploitability. Cross-language generalization is achieved via a Universal Abstract Syntax Tree (uAST) normalizing Java, Python, and C++ into a shared structural schema, combined with a hybrid fusion of GraphSAGE and Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B embeddings through learned two-way gating, whose per-sample weights provide intrinsic explainability at no additional cost. The framework achieves 89.84-92.02% intra-language detection accuracy and 74.43-80.12% zero-shot cross-language F1, resolving 69.74% of vulnerabilities end-to-end at a 12.27% total failure rate. Ablations establish necessity: removing uAST degrades cross-language F1 by 23.42%, while disabling validation increases unnecessary repairs by 131.7%. These results demonstrate that execution-grounded closed-loop reasoning is a principled and practically deployable mechanism for trustworthy LLM-driven agentic AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个面向软件漏洞分析的跨语言闭环框架，将检测、执行验证和迭代修复整合到统一流程中，并强调“未经执行确认不进行修复”的严格约束，以提升LLM驱动代理系统的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有分类器和LLM代理在下游流程中直接依赖概率性预测，容易因缺乏可观测证据而产生级联错误。软件漏洞分析提供了一个成本可量化、可验证的场景，适合检验“以执行证据为基础”的可靠推理机制。
AI.method: 框架包含三个阶段：1）基于混合结构-语义表示进行漏洞检测；2）通过执行结果驱动的代理式验证确认可利用性；3）在验证通过后进行迭代修复。跨语言能力依赖Universal Abstract Syntax Tree（uAST）将Java、Python和C++统一到共享结构表示，并结合GraphSAGE与Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B嵌入，通过双向门控学习融合；门控权重同时提供样本级可解释性。
AI.result: 实验显示，框架在语言内检测准确率达到89.84%–92.02%，零样本跨语言F1达到74.43%–80.12%，可端到端解决69.74%的漏洞，总失败率为12.27%。消融结果表明，去除uAST会使跨语言F1下降23.42%，取消验证会使不必要修复增加131.7%。
AI.conclusion: 结果说明，基于执行证据的闭环推理能够显著提升LLM代理系统在漏洞分析中的可信度、跨语言泛化能力和修复效率，且具有实际部署价值。

title: Enhancing Fine-Grained Spatial Grounding in 3D CT Report Generation via Discriminative Guidance
summary: Vision--language models (VLMs) for radiology report generation (RRG) can produce long-form chest CT reports from volumetric scans and show strong potential to improve radiology workflow efficiency and consistency. However, existing methods face two key limitations: (i) training supervision is often coarse, aligning a whole CT volume with a full free-text report without explicit alignment for fine-grained attributes or pathology locations; and (ii) evaluation is typically holistic (lexical overlap, entity matching, or LLM-as-a-judge scores) and not diagnostic for spatial grounding. We propose \emph{Discriminative Cue-Prompting with Prompt Dropout (DCP-PD)}, a plug-and-play framework that distills fine-grained cues from free-text reports and uses them to guide report generation while mitigating shortcut reliance via prompt dropout. DCP-PD achieves state-of-the-art performance on CT-RATE, improving macro F1 from $=0.501$ to $0.603$ (20% relative), and substantially boosts out-of-distribution performance on Rad-ChestCT from F1 $=0.266$ to $0.503$ (89% relative). Finally, we introduce a hierarchical, location-aware question-set protocol (presence $\rightarrow$ laterality $\rightarrow$ lobe) to directly assess pathology-location grounding, showing that fine-grained spatial localization remains challenging even for models that score highly on current benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 该工作提出一种用于放射学报告生成的即插即用框架DCP-PD，通过从自由文本报告中提取细粒度线索并结合prompt dropout，提升胸部CT报告生成的准确性与泛化能力，同时引入分层、位置感知的评估协议来检验病灶空间定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM用于胸部CT报告生成时存在两大问题：一是训练监督过于粗粒度，通常只对齐整幅CT与整篇报告，缺乏对具体属性和病灶位置的明确监督；二是评估多为整体性指标，难以诊断模型是否真正学到了空间定位能力。因此需要一种能利用细粒度线索并减少捷径依赖的方法，以及更具诊断性的评估方式。
AI.method: 提出Discriminative Cue-Prompting with Prompt Dropout（DCP-PD）框架：先从自由文本报告中蒸馏出细粒度判别线索，再用这些线索引导报告生成；同时采用prompt dropout抑制模型过度依赖提示中的捷径信息。并设计分层位置感知问答协议，按presence、laterality、lobe三个层级评估病灶—位置对齐。
AI.result: 在CT-RATE上，macro F1从0.501提升到0.603，约提升20%；在分布外数据集Rad-ChestCT上，F1从0.266提升到0.503，约提升89%。此外，新的分层评估显示，即使在现有基准上表现很高的模型，细粒度空间定位仍然具有明显挑战。
AI.conclusion: DCP-PD能够有效提升胸部CT报告生成性能与跨域泛化能力，证明细粒度线索蒸馏与prompt dropout是有价值的设计；同时，该研究强调仅靠整体指标不足以反映临床可用性，必须加入位置感知的诊断性评估来检验模型的真实空间 grounding 能力。

title: EE-MCP: Self-Evolving MCP-GUI Agents via Automated Environment Generation and Experience Learning
summary: Computer-use agents that combine GUI interaction with structured API calls via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) show promise for automating software tasks. However, existing approaches lack a principled understanding of how agents should balance these two modalities and how to enable iterative self-improvement across diverse applications. We formulate MCP-GUI interplay as a unified hybrid policy learning problem where the agent learns when each modality provides complementary advantages, and show that distillation and experience augmentation target fundamentally different failure modes - requiring application-aware mechanism selection. Built on this formulation, we propose a self-evolving framework with a fully automatic pipeline that orchestrates automatic environment generation and validation, trajectory collection, gap-driven task synthesis, and quality-filtered training - all without manual intervention. A key innovation is our experience bank, which accumulates LLM-learned rules from trajectory comparison, enabling inference-time improvement without fine-tuning. Systematic \textbf{cross-application analysis} across three desktop applications reveals that the optimal strategy depends on MCP-GUI composition: distillation achieves 77.8\% pass rate on MCP-dominant tasks (+17.8pp), while the experience bank excels on GUI-intensive tasks (+10.0pp).

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向电脑操作智能体的混合策略学习框架，用于协调GUI交互与MCP结构化API调用，并支持跨应用的自我演化与推理时改进。
AI.motivation: 现有方法缺乏对GUI与MCP两种模态如何互补的系统性理解，也缺少可在不同应用中自动持续改进的机制，因此需要一种统一的学习与优化框架。
AI.method: 作者将MCP-GUI协同建模为统一的混合策略学习问题，提出全自动自演化流程，包括环境自动生成与验证、轨迹采集、基于差距的任务合成和质量过滤训练；同时引入经验库，从轨迹对比中积累LLM学习到的规则，用于无需微调的推理时增强。
AI.result: 在三个桌面应用的跨应用分析中，不同任务组合对应不同最优策略：在MCP主导任务上，蒸馏方法达到77.8%的通过率，较基线提升17.8个百分点；在GUI密集任务上，经验库方法表现更优，提升10.0个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，MCP与GUI的最佳协同方式具有应用和任务依赖性，蒸馏与经验增强分别适用于不同失败模式；因此，应根据应用中MCP-GUI构成选择相应机制，而非采用单一统一方案。

title: Agentic Jackal: Live Execution and Semantic Value Grounding for Text-to-JQL
summary: Translating natural language into Jira Query Language (JQL) requires resolving ambiguous field references, instance-specific categorical values, and complex Boolean predicates. Single-pass LLMs cannot discover which categorical values (e.g., component names or fix versions) actually exist in a given Jira instance, nor can they verify generated queries against a live data source, limiting accuracy on paraphrased or ambiguous requests. No open, execution-based benchmark exists for mapping natural language to JQL. We introduce Jackal, the first large-scale, execution-based text-to-JQL benchmark comprising 100,000 validated NL-JQL pairs on a live Jira instance with over 200,000 issues. To establish baselines on Jackal, we propose Agentic Jackal, a tool-augmented agent that equips LLMs with live query execution via the Jira MCP server and JiraAnchor, a semantic retrieval tool that resolves natural-language mentions of categorical values through embedding-based similarity search. Among 9 frontier LLMs evaluated, single-pass models average only 43.4% execution accuracy on short natural-language queries, highlighting that text-to-JQL remains an open challenge. The agentic approach improves 7 of 9 models, with a 9.0% relative gain on the most linguistically challenging variant; in a controlled ablation isolating JiraAnchor, categorical-value accuracy rises from 48.7% to 71.7%, with component-field accuracy jumping from 16.9% to 66.2%. Our analysis identifies inherent semantic ambiguities, such as issue-type disambiguation and text-field selection, as the dominant failure modes rather than value-resolution errors, pointing to concrete directions for future work. We publicly release the benchmark, all agent transcripts, and evaluation code to support reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个面向Jira查询语言（JQL）的执行式大规模基准Jackal，并提出结合实时执行与语义检索的Agentic Jackal方法，以提升自然语言到JQL的生成准确率。
AI.motivation: 自然语言转JQL存在字段歧义、实例特定分类值识别困难以及复杂布尔逻辑生成等问题；单次生成式大模型无法获知实例中真实可用的分类值，也难以借助真实数据源校验查询结果，因此在改写、歧义和复杂表达上准确率受限。
AI.method: 构建Jackal基准：基于一个含20万+问题的真实Jira实例，收集并验证10万条自然语言-JQL配对，采用执行结果作为评测标准。提出Agentic Jackal：通过Jira MCP server提供实时查询执行能力，并使用JiraAnchor进行基于嵌入相似度的语义检索，用于解析自然语言中指代的分类值。随后对9个前沿大模型进行评测，并通过消融实验分析JiraAnchor的贡献。
AI.result: 单次生成模型在短自然语言查询上的平均执行准确率仅为43.4%，说明该任务仍具挑战性。Agentic方法提升了9个模型中的7个，在最复杂语言变体上带来9.0%的相对提升。仅引入JiraAnchor的消融显示，分类值准确率从48.7%提升到71.7%，其中component字段准确率从16.9%提升到66.2%。
AI.conclusion: JQL生成的主要难点并非单纯的值检索，而是语义歧义，尤其是issue type消歧与文本字段选择。Jackal提供了可复现的执行式评测资源，Agentic Jackal则表明工具增强与实时验证能显著改善性能，为后续自然语言到查询语言研究提供了明确方向。

title: See Fair, Speak Truth: Equitable Attention Improves Grounding and Reduces Hallucination in Vision-Language Alignment
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently hallucinate objects that are absent from the visual input, often because attention during decoding is disproportionately drawn to visually dominant or frequently occurring content. We observe that this inequity in attention allocation is a root cause of object hallucination: when rare, small, or contextually peripheral objects receive insufficient attention, the model fails to ground its generation in the full visual scene. We argue that every object in an image, regardless of its size, frequency or visual salience, deserves equal representational opportunity during decoding. To this end, we propose DOP-OBC, a training-free and architecture-agnostic decoding strategy built on the principle of equitable attention. Two complementary object-aware signals work in tandem: a Dominant Object Penalty (DOP) that softly suppresses attention over-concentration on visually dominant regions, and an Outlier Boost Coefficient (OBC) that amplifies attention toward rare yet confidently detected objects. These signals are injected as per-row logit modulations within the causal attention mask, requiring no weight updates and preserving autoregressive decoding properties. Extensive experiments across image and video MLLMs demonstrate consistent reductions in object hallucination on CHAIR and POPE benchmarks, alongside improvements in GPT-4o assessed captioning quality across correctness, consistency, detail, context and temporal dimensions. DOP-OBC establishes that fairness in attention allocation is not merely a design principle but a practical and effective path toward more faithful multimodal generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练、与架构无关的解码策略DOP-OBC，通过均衡注意力分配来减少多模态大语言模型中的对象幻觉，并在图像与视频任务上取得了更低的幻觉率和更好的生成质量。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在生成时常把注意力过度集中到视觉上显著或高频出现的对象，导致稀有、小型或边缘对象被忽视，从而产生对象幻觉。作者认为，注意力分配不均是对象幻觉的重要根因。
AI.method: 提出DOP-OBC解码策略，包含两个互补的对象感知信号：DOP（Dominant Object Penalty）用于软性抑制对视觉主导区域的注意力过度集中，OBC（Outlier Boost Coefficient）用于增强对稀有但被可靠检测到对象的注意力。两者作为因果注意力掩码中的逐行logit调制项注入，不需要更新模型参数，并保持自回归解码特性。
AI.result: 在图像和视频多模态大语言模型上，DOP-OBC在CHAIR和POPE基准上持续降低对象幻觉；同时在GPT-4o评估的图像描述质量上提升了正确性、一致性、细节、上下文和时序等维度表现。
AI.conclusion: 公平的注意力分配不仅是设计理念，也是一种切实有效的提升多模态生成真实性的方法。DOP-OBC证明了通过解码阶段的注意力校正，可以在不训练和不改结构的前提下有效缓解对象幻觉。

title: How Should Video LLMs Output Time? An Analysis of Efficient Temporal Grounding Paradigms
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have advanced Video Temporal Grounding (VTG), existing methods often couple output paradigms with different backbones, datasets, and training protocols. This makes it challenging to isolate the specific impact of the output design. Additionally, as VTG systems are increasingly considered for resource-constrained edge deployment, the trade-off between output formulation and system-level efficiency requires systematic investigation. In this paper, we present a controlled empirical study comparing three dominant VTG output paradigms: Text Numeral Generation, Temporal Token Generation, and Continuous Temporal Decoding. We evaluate these paradigms across identical compact VLMs (SmolVLM2, FastVLM, and Molmo2) using consistent datasets and LoRA fine-tuning protocols. Evaluations on Charades-STA, QVHighlights, and YouCook2 measure both localization accuracy and system efficiency, including inference latency, training throughput, and parameter overhead. Our results demonstrate that the choice of output formulation significantly affects both grounding accuracy and computational cost, independent of model scale. Specifically, the continuous distribution paradigm consistently achieves the most favorable efficiency-accuracy trade-off on the Pareto frontier, delivering robust localization with minimal latency overhead. These findings provide objective empirical guidelines for designing efficient, deployment-ready VTG systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过统一模型、数据集和训练协议，对三种视频时序定位输出范式进行控制变量比较，发现连续分布式时间解码在精度与效率之间表现最佳，最适合部署场景。
AI.motivation: 现有视频时序定位方法常把输出范式与不同骨干网络、数据集和训练流程绑定，难以判断性能差异究竟来自输出设计还是其他因素；同时，面向边缘部署时，输出形式对系统效率的影响也缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 作者在相同的紧凑型视觉语言模型SmolVLM2、FastVLM和Molmo2上，使用一致的数据集和LoRA微调协议，比较了三类主流输出范式：文本数字生成、时间标记生成和连续时间解码，并在Charades-STA、QVHighlights和YouCook2上同时评估定位精度与系统效率指标，包括推理延迟、训练吞吐和参数开销。
AI.result: 实验表明，输出范式会显著影响视频时序定位的准确率和计算成本，且这种影响不依赖于模型规模。连续分布式时间解码范式在多项设置下都取得了最优的效率-精度权衡，在Pareto前沿上表现最好，能够以较低的延迟开销实现稳定定位性能。
AI.conclusion: 对于资源受限或需要部署的VTG系统，连续分布式时间解码是更优的输出设计选择。该研究为VTG输出范式选择提供了可操作的实证依据，有助于构建更高效、可部署的时序定位系统。

title: UniversalVTG: A Universal and Lightweight Foundation Model for Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Video temporal grounding (VTG) is typically tackled with dataset-specific models that transfer poorly across domains and query styles. Recent efforts to overcome this limitation have adapted large multimodal language models (MLLMs) to VTG, but their high compute cost and limited video context still hinder long-video grounding. We instead scale unified supervision while keeping the model lightweight. We present UniversalVTG, a single VTG model trained with large-scale cross-dataset pretraining. An offline Query Unifier canonicalizes heterogeneous query formats into a shared declarative space, reducing linguistic mismatch and preventing the negative transfer observed under na茂ve joint training. Combined with an efficient grounding head, UniversalVTG scales to long, untrimmed videos. Across diverse benchmarks-GoalStep-StepGrounding, Ego4D-NLQ, TACoS, Charades-STA, and ActivityNet-Captions-one UniversalVTG checkpoint achieves state-of-the-art performance versus dedicated VTG models. Moreover, despite being $>100\times$ smaller than recent MLLM-based approaches, UniversalVTG matches or exceeds their accuracy on multiple benchmarks, offering a practical alternative to parameter-heavy MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniversalVTG，一种轻量级通用视频时序定位模型，通过大规模跨数据集预训练和查询统一器缓解不同数据集与查询风格带来的迁移困难，在多个基准上取得了优于专用模型的结果，并以远小于多模态大模型的参数规模达到相当或更好的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频时序定位方法往往依赖数据集特定模型，跨域与跨查询风格泛化能力较弱；而基于多模态大语言模型的方法虽然提升了统一建模能力，但计算开销高、视频上下文长度受限，不适合长视频定位，因此需要一种更轻量且更具通用性的方案。
AI.method: 作者提出UniversalVTG，核心包括两部分：一是大规模跨数据集预训练，将多个VTG数据集的监督统一利用起来；二是离线查询统一器，将不同来源、不同形式的查询规范化为共享的声明式表示，以减少语言分布差异并避免朴素联合训练中的负迁移。同时配合高效的定位头，使模型能够处理长且未裁剪的视频。
AI.result: 在GoalStep-StepGrounding、Ego4D-NLQ、TACoS、Charades-STA和ActivityNet-Captions等多个基准上，单一UniversalVTG模型都达到或超过了现有专用VTG模型的最优水平；并且在参数量上比近期基于多模态大模型的方法小100倍以上，但在多个基准上的准确率可匹敌甚至更优。
AI.conclusion: UniversalVTG证明了通过统一监督与查询规范化，可以在保持模型轻量的同时实现跨数据集、跨查询风格的强泛化能力，为长视频时序定位提供了一种更实用的替代方案。

title: Entropy-Gradient Grounding: Training-Free Evidence Retrieval in Vision-Language Models
summary: Despite rapid progress, pretrained vision-language models still struggle when answers depend on tiny visual details or on combining clues spread across multiple regions, as in documents and compositional queries. We address this by framing grounding as test-time evidence retrieval: given a query, the model should actively identify where to look next to resolve ambiguity. To this end, we propose a training-free, model-intrinsic grounding method that uses uncertainty as supervision. Specifically, we compute the entropy of the model's next-token distribution and backpropagate it to the visual token embeddings to obtain an entropy-gradient relevance map, without auxiliary detectors or attention-map heuristics. We then extract and rank multiple coherent regions to support multi-evidence queries, and introduce an iterative zoom-and-reground procedure with a spatial-entropy stopping rule to avoid over-refinement. Experiments on seven benchmarks across four VLM architectures demonstrate consistent improvements over existing methods, with the largest gains on detail-critical and high-resolution settings, while also producing more interpretable evidence localizations.

AI.tldr: 该方法将视觉定位视为测试时证据检索，利用输出不确定性反向生成视觉相关性图，并通过迭代缩放与重新定位提升对细粒度、多区域证据问题的处理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练视觉语言模型在依赖极小视觉细节或跨多个区域整合线索的任务上表现不足，尤其是在文档理解和组合式查询中，容易因证据定位不准而出错。
AI.method: 提出一种无需训练的模型内生定位方法：先计算模型下一词分布的熵，并将其梯度反传到视觉 token 嵌入，得到熵梯度相关性图；再从中提取并排序多个连贯区域以支持多证据查询；最后设计迭代式缩放与重新定位流程，并用空间熵停止规则避免过度细化。
AI.result: 在四种视觉语言模型架构上的七个基准测试中，相比现有方法取得了一致提升，尤其在细节敏感和高分辨率场景下增益最明显，同时输出的证据定位更具可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了不确定性可以作为有效监督信号，用于测试时的视觉证据检索与定位；所提出的方法在无需额外检测器或启发式注意力规则的情况下，兼顾性能提升与可解释性。

title: GroundingAnomaly: Spatially-Grounded Diffusion for Few-Shot Anomaly Synthesis
summary: The performance of visual anomaly inspection in industrial quality control is often constrained by the scarcity of real anomalous samples. Consequently, anomaly synthesis techniques have been developed to enlarge training sets and enhance downstream inspection. However, existing methods either suffer from poor integration caused by inpainting or fail to provide accurate masks. To address these limitations, we propose GroundingAnomaly, a novel few-shot anomaly image generation framework. Our framework introduces a Spatial Conditioning Module that leverages per-pixel semantic maps to enable precise spatial control over the synthesized anomalies. Furthermore, a Gated Self-Attention Module is designed to inject conditioning tokens into a frozen U-Net via gated attention layers. This carefully preserves pretrained priors while ensuring stable few-shot adaptation. Extensive evaluations on the MVTec AD and VisA datasets demonstrate that GroundingAnomaly generates high-quality anomalies and achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple downstream tasks, including anomaly detection, segmentation, and instance-level detection.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为GroundingAnomaly的少样本异常图像生成框架，通过空间条件模块和门控自注意力模块实现对合成异常的精确空间控制与稳定适配，并在多个下游任务上取得了领先结果。
AI.motivation: 工业质检中的视觉异常样本稀缺，导致异常检测与分割模型训练受限；现有异常合成方法要么因修补式生成带来融合不自然，要么无法提供准确的异常掩码，因此需要一种既能精准控制异常位置又能保持生成质量的方法。
AI.method: 框架包含两个核心模块：一是空间条件模块，利用逐像素语义图为异常生成提供精确的空间约束；二是门控自注意力模块，将条件token通过门控注意力层注入冻结的U-Net，在尽量保留预训练先验的同时实现稳定的少样本适配。
AI.result: 在MVTec AD和VisA数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法能够生成高质量异常图像，并在异常检测、分割以及实例级检测等多个下游任务中达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: GroundingAnomaly有效解决了少样本异常合成中的空间控制不足与掩码不精确问题，为工业异常数据增强和后续质检模型训练提供了更实用的生成式方案。

title: Grounding Clinical AI Competency in Human Cognition Through the Clinical World Model and Skill-Mix Framework
comment: Code, data (Clinical AI Skill-Mix dimension specifications), and an exploratory dashboard are available at https://github.com/Sdamirsa/Clinical-World-Model
summary:
The competency of any intelligent agent is bounded by its formal account of the world in which it operates. Clinical AI lacks such an account. Existing frameworks address evaluation, regulation, or system design in isolation, without a shared model of the clinical world to connect them. We introduce the Clinical World Model, a framework that formalizes care as a tripartite interaction among Patient, Provider, and Ecosystem. To formalize how any agent, whether human or artificial, transforms information into clinical action, we develop parallel decision-making architectures for providers, patients, and AI agents, grounded in validated principles of clinical cognition.
  The Clinical AI Skill-Mix operationalizes competency through eight dimensions. Five define the clinical competency space (condition, phase, care setting, provider role, and task) and three specify how AI engages human reasoning (assigned authority, agent facing, and anchoring layer). The combinatorial product of these dimensions yields a space of billions of distinct competency coordinates. A central structural implication is that validation within one coordinate provides minimal evidence for performance in another, rendering the competency space irreducible. The framework supplies a common grammar through which clinical AI can be specified, evaluated, and bounded across stakeholders. By making this structure explicit, the Clinical World Model reframes the field's central question from whether AI works to in which competency coordinates reliability has been demonstrated, and for whom.

AI.tldr: 该摘要提出了“临床世界模型”与“临床AI技能组合”两个互补框架，用于把临床AI的能力、评估与边界放到统一的临床世界结构中来描述。
AI.motivation: 现有临床AI框架往往把评估、监管和系统设计分开处理，缺少一个共同的世界模型来连接人类、患者与医疗生态中的决策关系，因此难以准确界定AI在不同临床场景中的可靠性。
AI.method: 作者将临床照护形式化为患者、提供者与生态系统三方交互，并构建面向提供者、患者与AI代理的并行决策架构；同时用八个维度定义“临床AI技能组合”，其中五个维度刻画临床能力空间（疾病、阶段、护理场景、提供者角色、任务），三个维度刻画AI与人类推理的交互方式（授权方式、面向对象、锚定层）。
AI.result: 该框架将能力空间展开为数十亿种不同的“能力坐标”，并指出在一个坐标中验证通过，并不能充分证明其在其他坐标中的表现；因此，临床AI的验证结果具有强烈的坐标依赖性，能力空间不可简单压缩或外推。
AI.conclusion: 临床世界模型提供了一套通用语法，用于描述、评估和限定临床AI的能力范围，把领域核心问题从“AI是否有效”转变为“AI在哪些具体能力坐标中被证明可靠，以及对谁可靠”。

title: IoT-Brain: Grounding LLMs for Semantic-Spatial Sensor Scheduling
comment: To appear in ACM MobiCom 2026; 13 pages, 12 figures
summary: Intelligent systems powered by large-scale sensor networks are shifting from predefined monitoring to intent-driven operation, revealing a critical Semantic-to-Physical Mapping Gap. While large language models (LLMs) excel at semantic understanding, existing perception-centric pipelines operate retrospectively, overlooking the fundamental decision of what to sense and when. We formalize this proactive decision as Semantic-Spatial Sensor Scheduling (S3) and demonstrate that direct LLM planning is unreliable due to inherent gaps in representation, reasoning, and optimization. To bridge these gaps, we introduce the Spatial Trajectory Graph (STG), a neuro-symbolic paradigm governed by a verify-before-commit discipline that transforms open-ended planning into a verifiable graph optimization problem. Based on STG, we implement IoT-Brain, a concrete system embodiment, and construct TopoSense-Bench, a campus-scale benchmark with 5,250 natural-language queries across 2,510 cameras. Evaluations show that IoT-Brain boosts task success rate by 37.6% over the strongest search-intensive methods while running nearly 2 times faster and using 6.6 times fewer prompt tokens. In real-world deployment, it approaches the reliability upper bound while reducing 4.1 times network bandwidth, providing a foundational framework for LLMs to interact with the physical world with unprecedented reliability and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向大规模传感网络的语义-空间传感调度问题，并用神经符号方法把“先验规划”转化为可验证的图优化任务，以提升大模型在物理世界中的可靠决策能力。
AI.motivation: 现有感知管线主要是事后式处理，只回答“看到了什么”，却忽略了更关键的“该看什么、何时看”。作者指出，大语言模型虽然语义理解强，但直接用于传感器规划时，在表示、推理和优化上存在明显缺口，因此需要新的调度框架来弥合语义到物理的映射鸿沟。
AI.method: 作者形式化提出语义-空间传感调度（S3）任务，并设计空间轨迹图（STG）作为神经符号框架，采用“先验证、后提交”的机制，把开放式规划转化为可验证的图优化问题。在此基础上实现了IoT-Brain系统，并构建TopoSense-Bench基准，包含5,250条自然语言查询和2,510个摄像头，用于评估系统性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，IoT-Brain相较于最强的搜索密集型方法，任务成功率提升37.6%，运行速度接近提升2倍，提示词token使用减少6.6倍。在真实部署中，其可靠性接近理论上限，同时网络带宽消耗降低4.1倍。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为大模型与物理世界交互提供了一种更可靠、更高效的基础框架，核心价值在于把语义理解与传感器调度结合起来，并通过可验证的图优化机制提升实际部署可行性。

title: Bridging Time and Space: Decoupled Spatio-Temporal Alignment for Video Grounding
summary: Spatio-Temporal Video Grounding requires jointly localizing target objects across both temporal and spatial dimensions based on natural language queries, posing fundamental challenges for existing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). We identify two core challenges: \textit{entangled spatio-temporal alignment}, arising from coupling two heterogeneous sub-tasks within the same autoregressive output space, and \textit{dual-domain visual token redundancy}, where target objects exhibit simultaneous temporal and spatial sparsity, rendering the overwhelming majority of visual tokens irrelevant to the grounding query. To address these, we propose \textbf{Bridge-STG}, an end-to-end framework that decouples temporal and spatial localization while maintaining semantic coherence. While decoupling is the natural solution to this entanglement, it risks creating a semantic gap between the temporal MLLM and the spatial decoder. Bridge-STG resolves this through two pivotal designs: the \textbf{Spatio-Temporal Semantic Bridging (STSB)} mechanism with Explicit Temporal Alignment (ETA) distills the MLLM's temporal reasoning context into enriched bridging queries as a robust semantic interface; and the \textbf{Query-Guided Spatial Localization (QGSL)} module leverages these queries to drive a purpose-built spatial decoder with multi-layer interactive queries and positive/negative frame sampling, jointly eliminating dual-domain visual token redundancy. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that Bridge-STG achieves state-of-the-art performance among MLLM-based methods.
