Bridge-STG improves average m\_vIoU from $26.4$ to $34.3$ on VidSTG and demonstrates strong cross-task transfer across various fine-grained video understanding tasks under a unified multi-task training regime.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Bridge-STG，用于解决基于自然语言查询的时空视频定位问题，通过解耦时间与空间定位并引入语义桥接机制，提升了多项基准上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在时空视频定位中面临两类核心困难：一是时间与空间对齐任务在同一自回归输出空间中相互耦合，导致对齐混乱；二是视频中目标在时间和空间上都具有稀疏性，绝大多数视觉token与查询无关，造成冗余严重。
AI.method: 提出端到端框架Bridge-STG，采用时空语义桥接（STSB）将MLLM的时间推理上下文蒸馏为桥接查询，并通过显式时间对齐（ETA）增强语义接口；再利用查询引导的空间定位（QGSL）模块，以多层交互查询和正负帧采样驱动专用空间解码器，从而同时缓解语义割裂与视觉token冗余。
AI.result: 在多个基准上达到基于MLLM方法的最佳性能；在VidSTG上平均m_vIoU从26.4提升到34.3，并在统一多任务训练下展现出对多种细粒度视频理解任务的良好跨任务迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: Bridge-STG通过“时间定位与空间定位解耦 + 语义桥接”的设计，有效提升了时空视频定位的准确性与泛化性，是一种面向MLLM的有效解决方案。

title: Are GUI Agents Focused Enough? Automated Distraction via Semantic-level UI Element Injection
comment: 44 pages, 10 figures, public code will be available at https://github.com/HashTAG00002/UI-Injection
summary: Existing red-teaming studies on GUI agents have important limitations. Adversarial perturbations typically require white-box access, which is unavailable for commercial systems, while prompt injection is increasingly mitigated by stronger safety alignment. To study robustness under a more practical threat model, we propose Semantic-level UI Element Injection, a red-teaming setting that overlays safety-aligned and harmless UI elements onto screenshots to misdirect the agent's visual grounding. Our method uses a modular Editor-Overlapper-Victim pipeline and an iterative search procedure that samples multiple candidate edits, keeps the best cumulative overlay, and adapts future prompt strategies based on previous failures. Across five victim models, our optimized attacks improve attack success rate by up to 4.4x over random injection on the strongest victims. Moreover, elements optimized on one source model transfer effectively to other target models, indicating model-agnostic vulnerabilities. After the first successful attack, the victim still clicks the attacker-controlled element in more than 15% of later independent trials, versus below 1% for random injection, showing that the injected element acts as a persistent attractor rather than simple visual clutter.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种更贴近真实场景的GUI代理红队测试方法：通过在截图中叠加语义上安全且无害的UI元素，诱导代理在视觉定位上出错，从而评估其鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI代理的红队研究主要依赖白盒访问或提示注入，但前者不适用于商业系统，后者又因安全对齐增强而逐渐受限，因此需要一种更实用的威胁模型来测试代理在视觉层面的脆弱性。
AI.method: 作者提出语义级UI元素注入（Semantic-level UI Element Injection），采用Editor-Overlapper-Victim模块化流程，并结合迭代搜索：采样多个候选编辑、保留累计效果最好的叠加结果，并根据前一次失败调整后续提示策略，以优化攻击效果。
AI.result: 实验覆盖五个受害模型。优化后的攻击在最强模型上相较随机注入将攻击成功率最高提升至4.4倍；此外，在一个源模型上优化出的元素可有效迁移到其他目标模型，显示出模型无关的脆弱性。第一次攻击成功后，受害模型在后续独立试验中仍有超过15%的概率点击攻击者控制的元素，而随机注入仅低于1%，说明该元素具有持续吸引效应。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，GUI代理不仅会受到显式提示注入影响，也会在视觉语义层面被无害UI元素误导；其方法为评估商业GUI系统提供了更现实的红队框架，并揭示了跨模型迁移的通用脆弱性。

title: Yale-DM-Lab at ArchEHR-QA 2026: Deterministic Grounding and Multi-Pass Evidence Alignment for EHR Question Answering
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures. System description for ArchEHR-QA 2026 shared task
summary: We describe the Yale-DM-Lab system for the ArchEHR-QA 2026 shared task. The task studies patient-authored questions about hospitalization records and contains four subtasks (ST): clinician-interpreted question reformulation, evidence sentence identification, answer generation, and evidence-answer alignment. ST1 uses a dual-model pipeline with Claude Sonnet 4 and GPT-4o to reformulate patient questions into clinician-interpreted questions. ST2-ST4 rely on Azure-hosted model ensembles (o3, GPT-5.2, GPT-5.1, and DeepSeek-R1) combined with few-shot prompting and voting strategies. Our experiments show three main findings. First, model diversity and ensemble voting consistently improve performance compared to single-model baselines. Second, the full clinician answer paragraph is provided as additional prompt context for evidence alignment. Third, results on the development set show that alignment accuracy is mainly limited by reasoning. The best scores on the development set reach 88.81 micro F1 on ST4, 65.72 macro F1 on ST2, 34.01 on ST3, and 33.05 on ST1.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了 Yale-DM-Lab 针对 ArchEHR-QA 2026 共享任务的系统，覆盖四个子任务：问题改写、证据句识别、答案生成和证据-答案对齐。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是处理患者针对住院记录提出的问题，并提升系统在临床语境下对问题理解、证据定位与答案对齐的能力。
AI.method: ST1 采用 Claude Sonnet 4 与 GPT-4o 的双模型流水线，将患者问题改写为临床可理解的问题；ST2-ST4 使用部署在 Azure 上的模型集成（o3、GPT-5.2、GPT-5.1、DeepSeek-R1），结合少样本提示与投票策略；在证据对齐中还额外加入完整的临床答案段落作为上下文。
AI.result: 实验表明，模型多样性与集成投票相较单模型基线稳定提升性能；开发集上最佳结果分别为 ST4 的 88.81 micro F1、ST2 的 65.72 macro F1、ST3 的 34.01、以及 ST1 的 33.05。
AI.conclusion: 结论是：多模型集成和投票机制对该任务有效，而证据对齐的主要瓶颈在于推理能力不足；引入完整答案段落有助于增强对齐阶段的上下文支持。

title: ValueGround: Evaluating Culture-Conditioned Visual Value Grounding in MLLMs
summary: Cultural values are expressed not only through language but also through visual scenes and everyday social practices. Yet existing evaluations of cultural values in language models are almost entirely text-only, leaving it unclear whether culture-conditioned judgments remain stable when response options are visualized. We introduce ValueGround, a benchmark for evaluating culture-conditioned visual value grounding in multimodal large language models (MLLMs). Built from World Values Survey questions, ValueGround uses minimally contrastive image pairs to represent opposing response options while controlling irrelevant variation. Given a country, a question, and an image pair, a model must choose the image that best matches the country's value tendency without access to the original response-option texts. Experiments across six MLLMs and 13 countries show that models perform substantially worse with visualized response options than with the original textual options, with average accuracy dropping from 72.8% to 62.6%. Our benchmark provides a controlled testbed for studying cross-modal transfer of culture-conditioned value judgments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为ValueGround的多模态基准，用于评估多模态大语言模型在“文化价值判断”任务中的视觉化落地能力。实验表明，当把原本的文本选项改为成对图像选项后，模型准确率明显下降，说明文化条件下的判断在跨模态迁移时并不稳定。
AI.motivation: 现有关于文化价值评测的研究几乎都只基于文本，无法回答一个关键问题：模型在基于文化背景做判断时，这种判断是否能稳定迁移到视觉场景中。作者希望构建一个更接近真实多模态环境、且能够控制干扰因素的评测框架。
AI.method: 作者基于世界价值观调查（World Values Survey）问题构建了ValueGround，使用最小对比的图像对来表示相互对立的回答选项，并尽量控制无关视觉差异。给定国家、问题和一对图像，模型需要在不看到原始文本选项的情况下，选择更符合该国价值倾向的图像。研究在6个多模态大模型和13个国家上进行了测试，并将图像选项条件下的表现与原始文本选项条件下进行比较。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，模型在视觉化选项上的表现显著下降：平均准确率从72.8%降至62.6%。这表明多模态模型在处理文化条件化的价值判断时，文本到视觉的跨模态转移存在明显困难。
AI.conclusion: ValueGround为研究文化价值判断的跨模态迁移提供了一个受控测试平台。结果说明，当前多模态大模型虽然在文本场景中能较好利用文化信息，但这种能力在图像化表达下并不稳健，未来需要专门提升其文化价值的视觉落地能力。

title: Reasoning-Guided Grounding: Elevating Video Anomaly Detection through Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Video Anomaly Detection (VAD) has traditionally been framed as binary classification or outlier detection, providing neither interpretable reasoning nor precise spatial localization of anomalous events. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) offer rich scene understanding, they struggle with reliable spatial grounding - often producing hallucinated or geometrically invalid bounding boxes when asked to localize objects. We propose VANGUARD (Video Anomaly Understanding through Reasoning and Grounding), a framework that unifies anomaly classification, spatial grounding, and chain-of-thought reasoning within a single VLM. VANGUARD introduces a three-stage curriculum that progressively layers training objectives: (1) classifier warmup on frozen backbone features, (2) LoRA-adapted spatial grounding, and (3) chain-of-thought generation. To overcome the sparse annotation typical of VAD benchmarks, we employ a teacher-student annotation pipeline in which a VLM (Qwen3-VL-4B) generates structured per-subclip reasoning trajectories based on manual annotations available from the UCA Dataset. Further, GroundingDINO provides bounding box supervision. On UCF-Crime, VANGUARD achieves 94% ROC-AUC with 84% F1 while simultaneously producing interpretable chain-of-thought explanations and spatial grounding of anomalous objects - capabilities absent from prior VAD methods. Ablations confirm that staged training outperforms monolithic optimization, and that structured reasoning acts as an implicit regularizer yielding more balanced predictions than classification-only fine-tuning. Zero-shot transfer to XD-Violence and ShanghaiTech demonstrates cross-domain generalization without target-domain adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VANGUARD，一个将异常分类、空间定位和链式推理统一到同一视觉语言模型中的视频异常检测框架，旨在同时提升可解释性与定位能力。
AI.motivation: 传统视频异常检测多停留在二分类或离群检测层面，缺乏可解释推理和精确空间定位；而视觉语言模型虽具备强场景理解能力，但在目标定位上常出现幻觉或不符合几何约束的框。
AI.method: 采用三阶段渐进式训练：先用冻结骨干特征进行分类预热，再通过LoRA适配进行空间定位学习，最后加入链式推理生成；同时使用教师-学生标注流水线，由Qwen3-VL-4B基于人工标注生成结构化逐子剪辑推理轨迹，并结合GroundingDINO提供边界框监督。
AI.result: 在UCF-Crime上达到94% ROC-AUC和84% F1，并能同步输出链式解释与异常目标的空间定位；消融实验表明分阶段训练优于单阶段联合优化，结构化推理还能作为隐式正则化，使分类结果更平衡；在XD-Violence和ShanghaiTech上实现零样本迁移，表现出跨域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: VANGUARD证明了将分类、定位与推理统一建模的可行性，可在提升检测性能的同时增强解释性和空间 grounding，是面向视频异常检测的一个更完整的多任务框架。

title: FileGram: Grounding Agent Personalization in File-System Behavioral Traces
summary: Coworking AI agents operating within local file systems are rapidly emerging as a paradigm in human-AI interaction; however, effective personalization remains limited by severe data constraints, as strict privacy barriers and the difficulty of jointly collecting multimodal real-world traces prevent scalable training and evaluation, and existing methods remain interaction-centric while overlooking dense behavioral traces in file-system operations; to address this gap, we propose FileGram, a comprehensive framework that grounds agent memory and personalization in file-system behavioral traces, comprising three core components: (1) FileGramEngine, a scalable persona-driven data engine that simulates realistic workflows and generates fine-grained multimodal action sequences at scale; (2) FileGramBench, a diagnostic benchmark grounded in file-system behavioral traces for evaluating memory systems on profile reconstruction, trace disentanglement, persona drift detection, and multimodal grounding; and (3) FileGramOS, a bottom-up memory architecture that builds user profiles directly from atomic actions and content deltas rather than dialogue summaries, encoding these traces into procedural, semantic, and episodic channels with query-time abstraction; extensive experiments show that FileGramBench remains challenging for state-of-the-art memory systems and that FileGramEngine and FileGramOS are effective, and by open-sourcing the framework, we hope to support future research on personalized memory-centric file-system agents.

AI.tldr: 提出了FileGram框架，把文件系统中的细粒度行为轨迹作为个性化记忆与用户画像的基础，并包含数据引擎、评测基准和记忆架构三部分。
AI.motivation: 现有面向协作式AI代理的个性化方法受限于隐私和多模态真实轨迹数据稀缺，且多聚焦对话交互，忽视了文件系统中的密集行为信息，因此需要一种以文件系统行为轨迹为中心的训练与评测方案。
AI.method: FileGram由三部分组成：FileGramEngine用于模拟真实工作流并大规模生成多模态动作序列；FileGramBench用于评估记忆系统在画像重建、轨迹解耦、画像漂移检测和多模态对齐等任务上的表现；FileGramOS则从原子动作和内容增量出发构建用户画像，并将轨迹编码到程序性、语义和情节性通道，在查询时进行抽象。
AI.result: 实验表明，FileGramBench对当前最先进的记忆系统仍然具有挑战性；同时，FileGramEngine和FileGramOS在生成数据与记忆建模方面表现有效。
AI.conclusion: FileGram提供了一个面向文件系统代理个性化记忆的完整开源框架，可为未来的记忆中心化、人机协作文件系统代理研究提供数据、评测和架构支持。

title: Beyond the Global Scores: Fine-Grained Token Grounding as a Robust Detector of LVLM Hallucinations
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) achieve strong performance on visual reasoning tasks but remain highly susceptible to hallucination. Existing detection methods predominantly rely on coarse, whole-image measures of how an object token relates to the input image. This global strategy is limited: hallucinated tokens may exhibit weak but widely scattered correlations across many local regions, which aggregate into deceptively high overall relevance, thus evading the current global hallucination detectors. We begin with a simple yet critical observation: a faithful object token must be strongly grounded in a specific image region. Building on this insight, we introduce a patch-level hallucination detection framework that examines fine-grained token-level interactions across model layers. Our analysis uncovers two characteristic signatures of hallucinated tokens: (i) they yield diffuse, non-localized attention patterns, in contrast to the compact, well-focused attention seen in faithful tokens; and (ii) they fail to exhibit meaningful semantic alignment with any visual region. Guided by these findings, we develop a lightweight and interpretable detection method that leverages patch-level statistical features, combined with hidden-layer representations. Our approach achieves up to 90% accuracy in token-level hallucination detection, demonstrating the superiority of fine-grained structural analysis for detecting hallucinations.

AI.tldr: 该摘要提出一种基于图像补丁级别的幻觉检测方法，用细粒度的 token-图像区域交互来识别大视觉语言模型中的幻觉，效果可达90%准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉检测主要依赖整幅图像的全局相关性判断，容易被分散在多个局部区域的弱相关性误导，从而漏检幻觉 token。
AI.method: 作者从“可信对象 token 必须与某个具体图像区域强绑定”这一观察出发，分析跨层的 token 级交互，提取补丁级统计特征和隐藏层表示，构建一个轻量且可解释的细粒度幻觉检测框架。
AI.result: 分析发现幻觉 token 具有两类特征：注意力分布更分散、非局部化；且与任何视觉区域都缺乏有效语义对齐。基于这些特征的方法在 token 级幻觉检测中最高达到90%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 补丁级、结构化的细粒度分析比传统全局方法更适合识别 LVLM 幻觉，说明提升检测性能的关键在于捕捉局部区域与 token 的真实对齐关系。

title: GUIDE: Interpretable GUI Agent Evaluation via Hierarchical Diagnosis
summary: Evaluating GUI agents presents a distinct challenge: trajectories are long, visually grounded, and open-ended, yet evaluation must be both accurate and interpretable. Existing approaches typically apply a single holistic judgment over the entire action-observation sequence-a strategy that proves unreliable on long-horizon tasks and yields binary verdicts offering no insight into where or why an agent fails. This opacity limits the utility of evaluation as a diagnostic tool for agent development. We introduce GUIDE (GUI Understanding and Interpretable Diagnostic Evaluation), a framework that decomposes trajectory assessment into three sequential stages mirroring the compositional structure of GUI tasks. Trajectory Segmentation partitions the full trace into semantically coherent subtask units. Subtask Diagnosis evaluates each unit in context, assigning a completion verdict and generating a structured error analysis with corrective recommendations. Overall Summary aggregates per-subtask diagnoses into a task-level judgment. By operating on bounded subtask segments rather than full trajectories, GUIDE mitigates the context overload that degrades existing evaluators as task complexity grows. We validate GUIDE on three benchmarks: an industrial e-commerce dataset of 932 trajectories, AGENTREWARDBENCH spanning five web agent tasks with 1302 trajectories, and AndroidBench for mobile device control. Across all settings, GUIDE substantially outperforms existing evaluators-achieving up to 5.35 percentage points higher accuracy than the strongest baseline-while producing structured diagnostic reports that directly inform agent improvement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GUIDE，一种面向GUI智能体轨迹评估的分层诊断框架，通过“轨迹分段—子任务诊断—整体汇总”三阶段，将长轨迹评估拆解为可解释的局部判断，以提升长程任务上的评估准确性与可诊断性。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体评估通常对整段动作-观察序列给出单一整体结论，面对长时序、视觉相关、开放式任务时容易出现上下文过载、判断不稳定，并且只能输出二元结果，无法说明失败位置和原因，因此难以作为开发调试工具。
AI.method: GUIDE包含三个顺序阶段：1）轨迹分段，将完整轨迹切分为语义一致的子任务单元；2）子任务诊断，在上下文中评估每个单元是否完成，并生成结构化错误分析与修正建议；3）整体汇总，基于所有子任务诊断结果形成任务级判断。该方法通过限制评估范围到子任务片段，降低长轨迹带来的上下文负担。
AI.result: 作者在三个基准上验证了GUIDE：工业电商数据集（932条轨迹）、AGENTREWARDBENCH（5类网页智能体任务，共1302条轨迹）以及AndroidBench。结果显示，GUIDE在各场景均显著优于现有评估器，最高比最强基线提升5.35个百分点准确率，并能输出结构化诊断报告。
AI.conclusion: GUIDE证明了将GUI轨迹评估分解为可解释的子任务级诊断是有效的，不仅能提升长程任务评估的准确性，还能为智能体改进提供直接、可操作的错误分析与建议。

title: Toward an Artificial General Teacher: Procedural Geometry Data Generation and Visual Grounding with Vision-Language Models
summary: We study visual explanation in geometry education as a Referring Image Segmentation (RIS) problem: given a diagram and a natural language description, the task is to produce a pixel-level mask for the referred geometric element. However, existing RIS models trained on natural image benchmarks such as RefCOCO fail catastrophically on geometric diagrams due to the fundamental domain shift between photographic scenes and abstract, textureless schematics. To address the absence of suitable training data, we present a fully automated procedural data engine that generates over 200,000 synthetic geometry diagrams with pixel-perfect segmentation masks and linguistically diverse referring expressions, requiring zero manual annotation. We further propose domain-specific fine-tuning of vision-language models (VLMs), demonstrating that a fine-tuned Florence-2 achieves 49% IoU and 85% Buffered IoU (BIoU), compared to <1% IoU in zero-shot settings. We introduce Buffered IoU, a geometry-aware evaluation metric that accounts for thin-structure localization, and show that it better reflects true segmentation quality than standard IoU. Our results establish a foundation for building Artificial General Teachers (AGTs) capable of providing visually grounded, step-by-step explanations of geometry problems.

AI.tldr: 本文将几何教育中的视觉讲解任务建模为指代表达图像分割（RIS）问题，提出了自动化合成数据引擎、领域微调方法和几何感知评测指标，显著提升了几何图示中的目标定位与分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有在自然图像数据集上训练的RIS模型迁移到几何图示时表现极差，根本原因是照片场景与抽象、无纹理示意图之间存在明显领域偏移；同时，几何任务缺乏高质量标注数据，阻碍了模型训练与评测。
AI.method: 构建了一个全自动程序化数据生成引擎，合成超过20万张带像素级分割标注的几何图，并生成多样化自然语言指代表达；在此基础上对视觉语言模型进行领域特定微调，并提出Buffered IoU这一面向几何细长结构定位的评估指标。
AI.result: 微调后的Florence-2在几何图示分割任务上达到49%的IoU和85%的Buffered IoU，而零样本设置下IoU低于1%；Buffered IoU相比标准IoU更能反映细结构目标的真实分割质量。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了通过合成数据和领域微调可有效解决几何图示中的视觉解释问题，并为构建能够提供具身、逐步几何讲解的Artificial General Teachers奠定了基础。

title: OmniGUI: Benchmarking GUI Agents in Omni-Modal Smartphone Environments
summary: Current benchmarks for graphical user interface (GUI) agents predominantly rely on static screenshots. However, real-world smartphone interaction routinely requires agents to process transient audio cues and temporal video dynamics that are tightly coupled with the moment of action. To bridge this gap, we introduce OmniGUI, the first step-level benchmark designed to evaluate GUI agents in omni-modal smartphone environments. OmniGUI provides continuous, interleaved multimodal inputs comprising static images, synchronous audio, and video clips at every action step. The dataset encompasses 709 expert-demonstrated episodes (2,579 action steps) across 29 applications, systematically annotated with objective multimodal dependency levels. Because dedicated omni-modal GUI agent frameworks are currently in their nascent stage, we select foundational omni-modal models capable of natively processing interleaved inputs to serve as agent proxies for our initial baselines. Our empirical evaluation reveals that while current models exhibit competency on visually static tasks, their action prediction performance degrades significantly in environments requiring synchronous temporal and auditory signals. Furthermore, ablation studies isolate specific operational bottlenecks, notably cross-modal interference when processing task-irrelevant environmental noise. The complete dataset, evaluation pipeline, and baseline prompts are provided in the supplementary material. Project page: https://omni-gui.github.io.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个面向全模态智能手机图形界面代理的逐步评测基准OmniGUI，用于衡量模型在每个动作步骤中同时处理图像、音频和视频的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI代理基准主要依赖静态截图，难以反映真实手机交互中需要同步处理瞬时音频和时序视频信息的场景，因此需要一个更贴近实际交互过程的评测框架。
AI.method: 构建OmniGUI基准，包含709段专家演示轨迹、2579个动作步骤、29个应用，并为每一步提供连续交错的多模态输入（静态图像、同步音频、视频片段）及客观标注的多模态依赖等级；由于专用全模态GUI代理框架尚不成熟，采用可原生处理交错输入的基础全模态模型作为代理基线，并进行主实验与消融分析。
AI.result: 实验显示，当前模型在视觉静态任务上表现尚可，但在需要同步时序与音频信号的环境中，动作预测性能显著下降；消融结果进一步表明，处理与任务无关的环境噪声时会出现明显的跨模态干扰瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: OmniGUI填补了GUI代理评测中对“图像-音频-视频”同步交互能力的缺口，可用于系统评估全模态智能手机代理的真实能力，并揭示当前模型在跨模态融合与抗干扰方面的关键不足。

title: A Paradigm Shift: Fully End-to-End Training for Temporal Sentence Grounding in Videos
summary: Temporal sentence grounding in videos (TSGV) aims to localize a temporal segment that semantically corresponds to a sentence query from an untrimmed video. Most current methods adopt pre-trained query-agnostic visual encoders for offline feature extraction, and the video backbones are frozen and not optimized for TSGV. This leads to a task discrepancy issue for the video backbone trained for visual classification, but utilized for TSGV. To bridge this gap, we propose a fully end-to-end paradigm that jointly optimizes the video backbone and localization head. We first conduct an empirical study validating the effectiveness of end-to-end learning over frozen baselines across different model scales. Furthermore, we introduce a Sentence Conditioned Adapter (SCADA), which leverages sentence features to train a small portion of video backbone parameters adaptively. SCADA facilitates the deployment of deeper network backbones with reduced memory and significantly enhances visual representation by modulating feature maps through precise integration of linguistic embeddings. Experiments on two benchmarks show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches. The code and models will be released.

AI.tldr: 本文针对视频中的时间句子定位任务，指出常见做法依赖冻结的视频特征提取器，导致与下游定位任务存在任务不匹配。作者提出一种端到端训练框架，并引入句子条件适配器SCADA，用少量可训练参数结合句子信息自适应调整视频骨干网络，从而提升定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多采用预训练且与查询无关的视频编码器进行离线特征提取，视频骨干通常被冻结，未针对时间句子定位任务优化。由于分类任务与定位任务目标不同，导致特征表示与下游需求存在偏差，因此需要一种能够联合优化视频表示与定位头的方案来缩小任务差距。
AI.method: 提出完全端到端的训练范式，联合优化视频骨干网络与定位头；同时设计Sentence Conditioned Adapter（SCADA），利用句子特征对视频骨干中的少量参数进行自适应训练，通过语言嵌入调制特征图，实现更精细的跨模态融合，并降低深层骨干部署时的显存开销。
AI.result: 作者进行了不同模型规模下的实证研究，验证端到端学习优于冻结特征基线；在两个基准数据集上，所提方法优于当前最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，将视频骨干纳入任务驱动的端到端优化，并引入基于句子条件的轻量适配模块，可以有效缓解预训练分类任务与时间句子定位任务之间的差异，提升视频表示质量与定位性能。

title: Explorable Theorems: Making Written Theorems Explorable by Grounding Them in Formal Representations
summary: LLM-generated explanations can make technical content more accessible, but there is a ceiling on what they can support interactively. Because LLM outputs are static text, they cannot be executed or stepped through. We argue that grounding explanations in a formalized representation enables interactive affordances beyond what static text supports. We instantiate this idea for mathematical proof comprehension with explorable theorems, a system that uses LLMs to translate a theorem and its written proof into Lean, a programming language for machine-checked proofs, and links the written proof with the Lean code. Readers can work through the proof at a step-level granularity, test custom examples or counterexamples, and trace the logical dependencies bridging each step. Each worked-out step is produced by executing the Lean proof on that example and extracting its intermediate state. A user study ($n = 16$) shows potential advantages of this approach: in a proof-reading task, participants who had access to the provided explorability features gave better, more correct, and more detailed answers to comprehension questions, demonstrating a stronger overall understanding of the underlying mathematics.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种将LLM生成的解释“落地”到形式化表示的方法，用于提升数学证明的可交互理解能力，并通过用户研究验证了其对证明理解的帮助。
AI.motivation: 静态的LLM文本解释虽然能降低技术内容门槛，但无法被执行、逐步查看或与示例交互，存在交互能力上限。作者希望通过形式化表示来突破这一限制，使解释不仅可读，还可探索。
AI.method: 作者提出“explorable theorems”系统：利用LLM把定理及其书面证明翻译成Lean代码，并将自然语言证明与形式化代码对应起来。系统支持按步骤查看证明、输入自定义例子或反例、追踪逻辑依赖关系；每一步的展开状态通过执行Lean证明并提取中间状态得到。随后进行了一项包含16名参与者的用户研究，对比有无这些可探索功能时的证明理解表现。
AI.result: 在证明阅读任务中，具备可探索功能的参与者在理解问题上的回答更好、更准确、也更详细，显示出对底层数学内容更强的整体理解。
AI.conclusion: 将LLM解释与形式化证明系统结合，可以显著增强技术内容的可交互性和可理解性；对于数学证明等领域，这种“可探索解释”可能比纯静态文本更有效。

title: Beyond Referring Expressions: Scenario Comprehension Visual Grounding
summary: Existing visual grounding benchmarks primarily evaluate alignment between image regions and literal referring expressions, where models can often succeed by matching a prominent named category. We explore a complementary and more challenging setting of scenario-based visual grounding, where the target must be inferred from roles, intentions, and relational context rather than explicit naming. We introduce Referring Scenario Comprehension (RSC), a benchmark designed for this setting. The queries in this benchmark are paragraph-length texts that describe object roles, user goals, and contextual cues, including deliberate references to distractor objects that often require deep understanding to resolve. Each instance is annotated with interpretable difficulty tags for uniqueness, clutter, size, overlap, and position which expose distinct failure modes and support fine-grained analysis. RSC contains approximately 31k training examples, 4k in-domain test examples, and a 3k out-of-distribution split with unseen object categories. We further propose ScenGround, a curriculum reasoning method serving as a reference point for this setting, combining supervised warm-starting with difficulty-aware reinforcement learning. Experiments show that scenario-based queries expose systematic failures in current models that standard benchmarks do not reveal, and that curriculum training improves performance on challenging slices and transfers to standard benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个新的场景式视觉定位基准RSC，用于评估模型是否能依据角色、意图和上下文推断目标，而不仅是匹配显式类别名；同时提出ScenGround作为课程化推理方法，实验表明该任务能揭示现有模型的系统性不足，且课程训练可提升困难样本与跨基准表现。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉定位基准主要考察图像区域与字面指代表达的对齐，模型往往只需识别明显类别即可完成，难以反映真实场景中对语义推理、上下文理解和干扰消解的能力，因此需要更具挑战性的评测设置。
AI.method: 构建Referring Scenario Comprehension（RSC）基准：查询为段落级文本，描述对象角色、用户目标与上下文线索，并包含干扰对象；每个样本附带唯一性、杂乱度、大小、重叠和位置等可解释难度标签；数据规模约31k训练、4k同域测试、3k分布外测试。进一步提出ScenGround，采用监督预热结合难度感知强化学习的课程化训练方法。
AI.result: 实验显示，场景式查询会暴露当前模型在标准基准中不易显现的系统性失败，尤其在复杂上下文、干扰多和分布外类别上表现更差；同时，ScenGround能提升困难子集上的性能，并对标准基准产生正迁移。
AI.conclusion: RSC为视觉定位引入了更接近真实应用的场景推理评测范式，证明仅靠字面指代匹配不足以衡量模型能力；课程化推理训练是一条有效路线，可增强模型对复杂语境和难样本的理解能力。

title: GroundVTS: Visual Token Sampling in Multimodal Large Language Models for Video Temporal Grounding
comment: Published as a conference paper at CVPR 2026
summary: Video temporal grounding (VTG) is a critical task in video understanding and a key capability for extending video large language models (Vid-LLMs) to broader applications. However, existing Vid-LLMs rely on uniform frame sampling to extract video information, resulting in a sparse distribution of key frames and the loss of crucial temporal cues. To address this limitation, we propose Grounded Visual Token Sampling (GroundVTS), a Vid-LLM architecture that focuses on the most informative temporal segments. GroundVTS employs a fine-grained, query-guided mechanism to filter visual tokens before feeding them into the LLM, thereby preserving essential spatio-temporal information and maintaining temporal coherence. Futhermore, we introduce a progressive optimization strategy that enables the LLM to effectively adapt to the non-uniform distribution of visual features, enhancing its ability to model temporal dependencies and achieve precise video localization. We comprehensively evaluate GroundVTS on three standard VTG benchmarks, where it outperforms existing methods, achieving a 7.7-point improvement in mIoU for moment retrieval and 12.0-point improvement in mAP for highlight detection. Code is available at https://github.com/Florence365/GroundVTS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GroundVTS，一种面向视频时序定位（VTG）的Vid-LLM架构，通过查询引导的细粒度视觉token采样与渐进式优化策略，减少均匀采样带来的关键信息丢失，并显著提升时序定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Vid-LLM通常采用均匀抽帧，导致关键帧分布稀疏、重要时序线索缺失，从而限制了模型在视频时序理解、片段定位和高亮检测中的表现。
AI.method: GroundVTS在输入LLM前先对视觉token进行查询引导的筛选，聚焦最具信息量的时间片段，以保留关键时空信息并维持时序连贯性；同时引入渐进式优化策略，使LLM逐步适应非均匀视觉特征分布，从而更好建模时间依赖关系并实现精确定位。
AI.result: 在三个标准VTG基准上，GroundVTS均优于现有方法；在moment retrieval任务上mIoU提升7.7个百分点，在highlight detection任务上mAP提升12.0个百分点。
AI.conclusion: GroundVTS证明了“面向关键时序片段的视觉token采样”对Vid-LLM进行视频时序定位是有效的，能够在保持时序信息的同时显著提升视频定位与高亮检测性能。

title: CompassAD: Intent-Driven 3D Affordance Grounding in Functionally Competing Objects
summary: When told to "cut the cake," a robot must choose the knife over nearby scissors, despite both objects affording the same cutting function. In real-world scenes, multiple objects may share identical affordances, yet only one is appropriate under the given task context. We call such cases confusing pairs. However, existing 3D affordance methods largely sidestep this challenge by evaluating isolated single objects, often with explicit category names provided in the query. We formalize Intent-Driven Confusable Affordance Grounding, a new 3D affordance setting that requires predicting a per-point affordance mask on the correct object within a multi-object point cloud, conditioned on implicit natural language intent. To study this problem, we construct CompassAD, the first benchmark centered on implicit intent in confusing multi-object compositions. It comprises 30 confusing object pairs spanning 16 affordance types, 6,422 compositions, and 88K+ query-answer pairs. Furthermore, we propose CompassNet, a framework that incorporates two dedicated modules tailored to this task. Instance-bounded Cross Injection (ICI) constrains language-geometry alignment within object boundaries to prevent cross-object semantic leakage. Bi-level Contrastive Refinement (BCR) enforces discrimination at both geometric-group and point levels, sharpening distinctions between target and confusable surfaces. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art results on both seen and unseen queries, and deployment on a robotic manipulator confirms effective transfer to real-world grasping in confusing multi-object compositions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个新的三维可供性任务：在多物体场景中，仅根据隐式自然语言意图，定位正确对象上的逐点可供性区域，重点解决多个物体具有相同功能但语境下只有一个正确目标的“易混对”问题。
AI.motivation: 现有三维可供性方法多在单一物体上评估，且通常依赖显式类别词，无法处理真实场景中多个物体共享相同可供性的歧义情况。因此需要一种面向隐式意图、能在复杂多物体组合中区分目标与干扰对象的新设置。
AI.method: 作者形式化提出“意图驱动的易混可供性定位”任务，并构建首个基准CompassAD，包含30组易混物体对、16类可供性、6422个组合和8.8万余问答对。基于此提出CompassNet，包括两个模块：Instance-bounded Cross Injection（在物体边界内约束语言与几何对齐，减少跨物体语义泄漏）和Bi-level Contrastive Refinement（在几何组和点级别进行对比学习，增强目标面与干扰面的区分）。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在已见和未见查询上均达到当前最优性能；进一步在机器人机械臂上的部署验证了其向真实抓取任务的有效迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作把三维可供性研究从“单物体、显式类别”推进到“多物体、隐式意图”的更真实场景，并通过新基准与专用模型显著提升了对易混对象的可供性定位能力，具有较强的实际应用价值。

title: Ego-Grounding for Personalized Question-Answering in Egocentric Videos
summary: We present the first systematic analysis of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in personalized question-answering requiring ego-grounding - the ability to understand the camera-wearer in egocentric videos. To this end, we introduce MyEgo, the first egocentric VideoQA dataset designed to evaluate MLLMs' ability to understand, remember, and reason about the camera wearer. MyEgo comprises 541 long videos and 5K personalized questions asking about "my things", "my activities", and "my past". Benchmarking reveals that competitive MLLMs across variants, including open-source vs. proprietary, thinking vs. non-thinking, small vs. large scales all struggle on MyEgo. Top closed- and open-source models (e.g., GPT-5 and Qwen3-VL) achieve only~46% and 36% accuracy, trailing human performance by near 40% and 50% respectively. Surprisingly, neither explicit reasoning nor model scaling yield consistent improvements. Models improve when relevant evidence is explicitly provided, but gains drop over time, indicating limitations in tracking and remembering "me" and "my past". These findings collectively highlight the crucial role of ego-grounding and long-range memory in enabling personalized QA in egocentric videos. We hope MyEgo and our analyses catalyze further progress in these areas for egocentric personalized assistance. Data and code are available at https://github.com/Ryougetsu3606/MyEgo

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个用于个性化问答的第一视角视频数据集MyEgo，用来评估多模态大语言模型对“摄像者本人”的理解、记忆与推理能力。实验显示，无论开源还是闭源、是否显式推理、模型规模大小，现有模型在该任务上都表现不佳，且与人类存在明显差距。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在第一视角视频中的个性化问答能力不足，尤其难以理解“我”的物品、活动和过去经历。作者希望通过系统评测，量化模型在自我定位、长程记忆和个性化推理方面的能力瓶颈。
AI.method: 构建了MyEgo数据集，包含541段长视频和约5000个个性化问题，问题覆盖“我的东西”“我的活动”“我的过去”等类别。随后对多种多模态大语言模型进行基准测试，并比较开源/闭源、思维链/非思维链、小模型/大模型等设置下的表现，同时分析提供显式证据后的性能变化。
AI.result: 顶级闭源模型和开源模型的准确率分别约为46%和36%，比人类低约40%和50%。实验发现，显式推理和模型扩展并未带来稳定提升；当相关证据被直接提供时模型会进步，但这种收益会随时间推移明显下降，说明模型在跟踪“我”以及记住“我的过去”方面仍然薄弱。
AI.conclusion: MyEgo揭示了当前多模态大语言模型在第一视角个性化问答中对ego-grounding与长程记忆的关键短板。该数据集和分析为后续研究第一视角个性化助手、记忆建模与自我相关理解提供了重要基准。

title: Enhancing Medical Visual Grounding via Knowledge-guided Spatial Prompts
summary: Medical Visual Grounding (MVG) aims to identify diagnostically relevant phrases from free-text radiology reports and localize their corresponding regions in medical images, providing interpretable visual evidence to support clinical decision-making. Although recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit promising multimodal reasoning ability, their grounding remains insufficient spatial precision, largely due to a lack of explicit localization priors when relying solely on latent embeddings. In this work, we analyze this limitation from an attention perspective and propose KnowMVG, a Knowledge-prior and global-local attention enhancement framework for MVG in VLMs that explicitly strengthens spatial awareness during decoding. Specifically, we present a knowledge-enhanced prompting strategy that encodes phrase related medical knowledge into compact embeddings, together with a global-local attention that jointly leverages coarse global information and refined local cues to guide precise region localization. localization. This design bridges high-level semantic understanding and fine-grained visual perception without introducing extra textual reasoning overhead. Extensive experiments on four MVG benchmarks demonstrate that our KnowMVG consistently outperforms existing approaches, achieving gains of 3.0% in AP50 and 2.6% in mIoU over prior state-of-the-art methods. Qualitative and ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of each component.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KnowMVG，用于医学视觉定位任务，通过知识增强提示和全局-局部注意力机制提升模型对医学图像中相关区域的定位精度，在四个基准上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 医学视觉定位旨在从放射学报告中找出诊断相关短语，并定位其在医学图像中的对应区域，以提供可解释的视觉依据。现有视觉语言模型虽然具备多模态推理能力，但由于缺乏显式定位先验，往往空间精度不足，因此需要增强其空间感知能力。
AI.method: 作者从注意力视角分析了现有模型定位不精确的原因，并提出KnowMVG框架。该方法包含两部分：一是知识增强提示，将与短语相关的医学知识编码为紧凑嵌入；二是全局-局部注意力机制，同时利用粗粒度全局信息和细粒度局部线索，引导模型在解码阶段进行更精确的区域定位。该设计在不增加额外文本推理开销的前提下，连接了高层语义理解与细粒度视觉感知。
AI.result: 在四个医学视觉定位基准上，KnowMVG均优于现有方法，较此前最佳方法在AP50上提升3.0%，在mIoU上提升2.6%。定性分析和消融实验也验证了各模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: KnowMVG通过引入医学知识先验与全局-局部注意力增强了视觉语言模型的空间定位能力，显著提升了医学视觉定位性能，并为医学图文对齐提供了更精确、可解释的解决方案。

title: ProVG: Progressive Visual Grounding via Language Decoupling for Remote Sensing Imagery
summary: Remote sensing visual grounding (RSVG) aims to localize objects in remote sensing imagery according to natural language expressions. Previous methods typically rely on sentence-level vision-language alignment, which struggles to exploit fine-grained linguistic cues, such as \textit{spatial relations} and \textit{object attributes}, that are crucial for distinguishing objects with similar characteristics. Importantly, these cues play distinct roles across different grounding stages and should be leveraged accordingly to provide more explicit guidance. In this work, we propose \textbf{ProVG}, a novel RSVG framework that improves localization accuracy by decoupling language expressions into global context, spatial relations, and object attributes. To integrate these linguistic cues, ProVG employs a simple yet effective progressive cross-modal modulator, which dynamically modulates visual attention through a \textit{survey-locate-verify} scheme, enabling coarse-to-fine vision-language alignment. In addition, ProVG incorporates a cross-scale fusion module to mitigate the large-scale variations in remote sensing imagery, along with a language-guided calibration decoder to refine cross-modal alignment during prediction. A unified multi-task head further enables ProVG to support both referring expression comprehension and segmentation tasks. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks, \textit{i.e.}, RRSIS-D and RISBench, demonstrate that ProVG consistently outperforms existing methods, achieving new state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProVG，一种用于遥感视觉定位的新框架，通过将语言表达解耦为全局上下文、空间关系和目标属性，并以渐进式跨模态调制实现由粗到细的对齐，从而提升定位与分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖句子级图文对齐，难以充分利用空间关系和目标属性等细粒度语言线索；而这些线索在不同定位阶段作用不同，若能按阶段分别利用，可提供更明确的引导并提高准确率。
AI.method: ProVG采用三部分设计：1）将语言表达解耦为全局上下文、空间关系、目标属性；2）使用渐进式跨模态调制器，通过“浏览-定位-验证”机制动态调节视觉注意力，实现粗到细的图文对齐；3）加入跨尺度融合模块缓解遥感图像尺度变化，并通过语言引导校准解码器细化预测时的跨模态对齐；此外，统一多任务头同时支持指代表达理解与分割任务。
AI.result: 在RRSIS-D和RISBench两个基准上进行了大量实验，结果表明ProVG持续优于现有方法，并取得新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: ProVG通过显式拆分语言信息并结合渐进式跨模态对齐、跨尺度融合与语言引导校准，有效提升了遥感视觉定位的精度与泛化能力，同时具备多任务扩展性。

title: Grounding AI-in-Education Development in Teachers' Voices: Findings from a National Survey in Indonesia
summary: Despite emerging use in Indonesian classrooms, there is limited large-scale, teacher-centred evidence on how AI is used in practice and what support teachers need, hindering the development of context-appropriate AI systems and policies. To address this gap, we conduct a nationwide survey of 349 K-12 teachers across elementary, junior high, and senior high schools. We find increasing use of AI for pedagogy, content development, and teaching media, although adoption remains uneven. Elementary teachers report more consistent use, while senior high teachers engage less; mid-career teachers assign higher importance to AI, and teachers in Eastern Indonesia perceive greater value. Across levels, teachers primarily use AI to reduce instructional preparation workload (e.g., assessment, lesson planning, and material development). However, generic outputs, infrastructure constraints, and limited contextual alignment continue to hinder effective classroom integration.

AI.tldr: 这项全国性调查显示，印尼K-12教师已开始在教学、内容开发和教学媒体制作中使用AI，但采用程度不均衡，且仍受通用化输出、基础设施限制和情境适配不足等问题制约。
AI.motivation: 作者关注印尼课堂中AI应用快速增长但缺乏大规模、以教师为中心的实证证据的问题，旨在识别教师实际如何使用AI以及他们需要什么支持，以便为本地化AI系统和教育政策提供依据。
AI.method: 研究采用全国性问卷调查，覆盖349名来自小学、初中和高中的教师，比较不同学段、教龄阶段及地区教师对AI的使用情况、价值判断与主要需求。
AI.result: 结果表明，教师对AI的使用总体呈上升趋势，主要集中在备课相关任务，如评估、教案设计和教学材料生成。小学教师使用更稳定，高中教师使用较少；中期教龄教师对AI重要性的评价更高；东印尼教师感知到的AI价值更大。
AI.conclusion: AI已成为缓解教师教学准备负担的实用工具，但要实现有效课堂融合，仍需提升输出的情境相关性，并改善基础设施与支持条件。

title: Think, Act, Build: An Agentic Framework with Vision Language Models for Zero-Shot 3D Visual Grounding
summary: 3D Visual Grounding (3D-VG) aims to localize objects in 3D scenes via natural language descriptions. While recent advancements leveraging Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have explored zero-shot possibilities, they typically suffer from a static workflow relying on preprocessed 3D point clouds, essentially degrading grounding into proposal matching. To bypass this reliance, our core motivation is to decouple the task: leveraging 2D VLMs to resolve complex spatial semantics, while relying on deterministic multi-view geometry to instantiate the 3D structure. Driven by this insight, we propose "Think, Act, Build (TAB)", a dynamic agentic framework that reformulates 3D-VG tasks as a generative 2D-to-3D reconstruction paradigm operating directly on raw RGB-D streams. Specifically, guided by a specialized 3D-VG skill, our VLM agent dynamically invokes visual tools to track and reconstruct the target across 2D frames. Crucially, to overcome the multi-view coverage deficit caused by strict VLM semantic tracking, we introduce the Semantic-Anchored Geometric Expansion, a mechanism that first anchors the target in a reference video clip and then leverages multi-view geometry to propagate its spatial location across unobserved frames. This enables the agent to "Build" the target's 3D representation by aggregating these multi-view features via camera parameters, directly mapping 2D visual cues to 3D coordinates. Furthermore, to ensure rigorous assessment, we identify flaws such as reference ambiguity and category errors in existing benchmarks and manually refine the incorrect queries. Extensive experiments on ScanRefer and Nr3D demonstrate that our framework, relying entirely on open-source models, significantly outperforms previous zero-shot methods and even surpasses fully supervised baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAB框架，将3D视觉定位从“预处理点云+候选匹配”改为直接处理原始RGB-D流的动态2D到3D重建式方法，结合2D视觉语言模型与多视图几何，在ScanRefer和Nr3D上取得了显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉语言模型的零样本3D视觉定位方法通常依赖静态流程和预处理点云，导致任务退化为提案匹配，难以充分利用语言中的复杂空间语义。作者希望将语义理解与3D结构构建解耦：由2D VLM负责解析复杂语义，再由确定性的多视图几何完成3D实例化。
AI.method: 提出Think, Act, Build（TAB）动态智能体框架，直接对原始RGB-D流执行生成式2D到3D重建。系统先由专门的3D-VG技能驱动VLM智能体在2D帧中动态调用视觉工具追踪目标；再引入Semantic-Anchored Geometric Expansion，先在参考视频片段中锚定目标语义位置，然后利用多视图几何将其传播到未观测帧；最后结合相机参数聚合多视图特征，映射为3D坐标。同时，作者还修正了现有基准中的参考歧义和类别错误等标注问题。
AI.result: 在ScanRefer和Nr3D上的实验表明，该方法完全依赖开源模型，却显著优于之前的零样本方法，并且在某些设置下超过了全监督基线。
AI.conclusion: TAB验证了“2D语义理解+几何重建”分工式范式在3D视觉定位中的有效性。其核心贡献在于用动态智能体和多视图几何弥补传统VLM零样本3D-VG对预处理点云的依赖，同时通过改进评测数据提高了实验可信度。

title: RegFormer: Transferable Relational Grounding for Efficient Weakly-Supervised Human-Object Interaction Detection
summary: Weakly-supervised Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection is essential for scalable scene understanding, as it learns interactions from only image-level annotations. Due to the lack of localization signals, prior works typically rely on an external object detector to generate candidate pairs and then infer their interactions through pairwise reasoning. However, this framework often struggles to scale due to the substantial computational cost incurred by enumerating numerous instance pairs. In addition, it suffers from false positives arising from non-interactive combinations, which hinder accurate instance-level HOI reasoning. To address these issues, we introduce Relational Grounding Transformer (RegFormer), a versatile interaction recognition module for efficient and accurate HOI reasoning. Under image-level supervision, RegFormer leverages spatially grounded signals as guidance for the reasoning process and promotes locality-aware interaction learning. By learning localized interaction cues, our module distinguishes humans, objects, and their interactions, enabling direct transfer from image-level interaction reasoning to precise and efficient instance-level reasoning without additional training. Our extensive experiments and analyses demonstrate that RegFormer effectively learns spatial cues for instance-level interaction reasoning, operates with high efficiency, and even achieves performance comparable to fully supervised models. Our code is available at https://github.com/mlvlab/RegFormer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于弱监督人-物交互检测的关系定位Transformer（RegFormer），旨在在仅有图像级标注的条件下，更高效、准确地完成实例级交互推理。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督HOI检测方法通常依赖外部目标检测器生成大量候选人-物配对，再逐对推理交互关系，这会带来较高计算开销，并且容易因非交互组合产生误检，影响实例级推理精度。
AI.method: 作者提出RegFormer作为通用交互识别模块，在图像级监督下利用空间定位信号引导推理过程，强化局部感知的交互学习；通过学习局部交互线索，同时区分人、物体及其交互关系，从而实现由图像级交互推理直接迁移到精确且高效的实例级推理，无需额外训练。
AI.result: 大量实验与分析表明，RegFormer能够有效学习用于实例级交互推理的空间线索，具有较高效率，并且性能可接近全监督模型。
AI.conclusion: RegFormer为弱监督HOI检测提供了一种更具可扩展性的方法，兼顾效率与精度，说明利用空间定位引导的局部交互学习可以显著提升图像级到实例级的交互推理能力。

title: PET-DINO: Unifying Visual Cues into Grounding DINO with Prompt-Enriched Training
summary: Open-Set Object Detection (OSOD) enables recognition of novel categories beyond fixed classes but faces challenges in aligning text representations with complex visual concepts and the scarcity of image-text pairs for rare categories. This results in suboptimal performance in specialized domains or with complex objects. Recent visual-prompted methods partially address these issues but often involve complex multi-modal designs and multi-stage optimizations, prolonging the development cycle. Additionally, effective training strategies for data-driven OSOD models remain largely unexplored. To address these challenges, we propose PET-DINO, a universal detector supporting both text and visual prompts. Our Alignment-Friendly Visual Prompt Generation (AFVPG) module builds upon an advanced text-prompted detector, addressing the limitations of text representation guidance and reducing the development cycle. We introduce two prompt-enriched training strategies: Intra-Batch Parallel Prompting (IBP) at the iteration level and Dynamic Memory-Driven Prompting (DMD) at the overall training level. These strategies enable simultaneous modeling of multiple prompt routes, facilitating parallel alignment with diverse real-world usage scenarios. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that PET-DINO exhibits competitive zero-shot object detection capabilities across various prompt-based detection protocols. These strengths can be attributed to inheritance-based philosophy and prompt-enriched training strategies, which play a critical role in building an effective generic object detector. Project page: https://fuweifuvtoo.github.io/pet-dino.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PET-DINO，一种同时支持文本提示和视觉提示的通用开放集目标检测器，旨在缓解文本表征难以对齐复杂视觉概念、稀有类别图文对不足，以及视觉提示方法设计复杂、训练周期长等问题。
AI.motivation: 开放集目标检测需要识别固定类别之外的新类别，但在专业领域或复杂目标场景中，文本语义与视觉概念对齐困难，且稀有类别的图文配对数据稀缺，导致性能不足。现有视觉提示方法虽有改进，但多模态结构和多阶段优化较复杂，开发效率较低；同时，面向数据驱动OSOD的有效训练策略仍缺乏系统探索。
AI.method: 作者提出PET-DINO，核心包括：1）AFVPG（对齐友好视觉提示生成模块），基于更先进的文本提示检测器生成视觉提示，以弥补仅靠文本引导的局限并缩短开发流程；2）两种提示增强训练策略，分别是迭代层面的IBP（批内并行提示）和整体训练层面的DMD（动态记忆驱动提示），用于同时建模多条提示路径，并支持与不同真实使用场景的并行对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明，PET-DINO在多种基于提示的检测协议下都具有有竞争力的零样本目标检测能力。作者认为，这主要归功于其继承式设计理念以及提示增强训练策略。
AI.conclusion: PET-DINO展示了一种更通用、更高效的开放集目标检测框架思路，即在保留强基模型能力的基础上，引入更友好的视觉提示生成与系统化训练策略，从而提升多场景零样本检测表现并缩短模型开发周期。

title: First Logit Boosting: Visual Grounding Method to Mitigate Object Hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Recent Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance across various multimodal tasks that require understanding both visual and linguistic inputs. However, object hallucination -- the generation of nonexistent objects in answers -- remains a persistent challenge. Although several approaches such as retraining and external grounding methods have been proposed to mitigate this issue, they still suffer from high data costs or structural complexity. Training-free methods such as Contrastive Decoding (CD) are more cost-effective, avoiding additional training or external models, but still suffer from long-term decay, where visual grounding weakens and language priors dominate as the generation progresses. In this paper, we propose First Logit Boosting (FLB), a simple yet effective training-free technique designed to alleviate long-term decay in LVLMs. FLB stores the logit of the first generated token and adds it to subsequent token predictions, effectively mitigating long-term decay of visual information. We observe that FLB (1) sustains the visual information embedded in the first token throughout generation, and (2) suppresses hallucinated words through the stabilizing effect of the ``The'' token. Experimental results show that FLB significantly reduces object hallucination across various tasks, benchmarks, and backbone models. Notably, it causes negligible inference overhead, making it highly applicable to real-time multimodal systems. Code is available at https://github.com/jiwooha20/FLB

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的首个词日志增强方法（FLB），通过将首个生成词的logit注入后续预测，缓解大型视觉语言模型中的长期衰减与对象幻觉问题，并且几乎不增加推理开销。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型在多模态任务中表现优异，但容易生成不存在的对象；现有缓解方案要么依赖重训练、数据成本高，要么依赖外部对齐模块、结构复杂。训练无关方法虽然更省成本，但在生成后期会出现视觉信息逐渐衰减、语言先验占主导的问题，因此需要一种简单、低成本且有效的改进方式。
AI.method: 提出First Logit Boosting（FLB）：在生成过程中保存首个生成词的logit，并将其加到后续词的预测logit中，以持续保留首词携带的视觉信息，抑制后续生成中的语言偏置与幻觉；该方法不需要额外训练，也不依赖外部模型。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，FLB在多个任务、基准和不同骨干模型上都能显著降低对象幻觉；同时推理开销几乎可以忽略，适合实时多模态系统。
AI.conclusion: FLB是一种实现简单、训练成本为零、推理代价极低的有效方法，能够通过强化首词的稳定作用缓解LVLM的长期衰减问题，从而显著提升视觉 grounding 并减少幻觉。

title: SceneTeract: Agentic Functional Affordances and VLM Grounding in 3D Scenes
summary: Embodied AI depends on interactive 3D environments that support meaningful activities for diverse users, yet assessing their functional affordances remains a core challenge. We introduce SceneTeract, a framework that verifies 3D scene functionality under agent-specific constraints. Our core contribution is a grounded verification engine that couples high-level semantic reasoning with low-level geometric checks. SceneTeract decomposes complex activities into sequences of atomic actions and validates each step against accessibility requirements (e.g., reachability, clearance, and navigability) conditioned on an embodied agent profile, using explicit physical and geometric simulations. We deploy SceneTeract to perform an in-depth evaluation of (i) synthetic indoor environments, uncovering frequent functional failures that prevent basic interactions, and (ii) the ability of frontier Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to reason about and predict functional affordances, revealing systematic mismatches between semantic confidence and physical feasibility even for the strongest current models. Finally, we leverage SceneTeract as a reward engine for VLM post-training, enabling scalable distillation of geometric constraints into reasoning models. We release the SceneTeract verification suite and data to bridge perception and physical reality in embodied 3D scene understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SceneTeract，用于在具身智能场景中验证3D场景的功能可供性，并将语义推理与几何物理检查结合，评估场景功能缺陷及VLM的可供性判断能力。
AI.motivation: 具身AI依赖可交互的3D环境，但现有方法难以可靠评估场景是否真正满足不同智能体的功能需求，尤其是语义上“看起来可用”与物理上“实际可用”之间常存在偏差。
AI.method: 提出SceneTeract框架：将复杂活动分解为原子动作序列；基于智能体画像，对每一步进行可达性、通行空间、导航性等约束验证；通过显式物理与几何模拟，将高层语义推理与低层几何检查耦合；并将其作为奖励引擎用于VLM后训练，将几何约束蒸馏到推理模型中。
AI.result: 在合成室内环境上发现了大量阻碍基本交互的功能性失败；同时揭示了当前前沿VLM在可供性推理上存在系统性偏差，即语义置信度与物理可行性不一致；此外，利用SceneTeract进行后训练可提升模型对几何约束的学习能力。
AI.conclusion: SceneTeract提供了一种可扩展的3D场景功能验证与评测方案，有助于连接感知与物理现实，并推动面向具身智能的场景理解、模型评估与训练。

title: PSPA-Bench: A Personalized Benchmark for Smartphone GUI Agent
summary: Smartphone GUI agents execute tasks by operating directly on app interfaces, offering a path to broad capability without deep system integration. However, real-world smartphone use is highly personalized: users adopt diverse workflows and preferences, challenging agents to deliver customized assistance rather than generic solutions. Existing GUI agent benchmarks cannot adequately capture this personalization dimension due to sparse user-specific data and the lack of fine-grained evaluation metrics. To address this gap, we present PSPA-Bench, the benchmark dedicated to evaluating personalization in smartphone GUI agents. PSPA-Bench comprises over 12,855 personalized instructions aligned with real-world user behaviors across 10 representative daily-use scenarios and 22 mobile apps, and introduces a structure-aware process evaluation method that measures agents' personalized capabilities at a fine-grained level. Through PSPA-Bench, we benchmark 11 state-of-the-art GUI agents. Results reveal that current methods perform poorly under personalized settings, with even the strongest agent achieving limited success. Our analysis further highlights three directions for advancing personalized GUI agents: (1) reasoning-oriented models consistently outperform general LLMs, (2) perception remains a simple yet critical capability, and (3) reflection and long-term memory mechanisms are key to improving adaptation. Together, these findings establish PSPA-Bench as a foundation for systematic study and future progress in personalized GUI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PSPA-Bench，一个面向智能手机GUI智能体个性化能力评测的新基准，用于衡量智能体在真实用户偏好和工作流下的适配能力。
AI.motivation: 现有手机GUI智能体多面向通用任务，难以反映用户在应用操作中的高度个性化需求；同时，已有基准缺少用户特定数据和细粒度评估指标，无法系统评估个性化能力。
AI.method: 构建PSPA-Bench，包含超过12,855条与真实用户行为对齐的个性化指令，覆盖10类日常场景和22个移动应用；并提出一种结构感知的过程评估方法，对智能体的个性化执行过程进行细粒度测量。
AI.result: 对11个先进GUI智能体的测试表明，当前方法在个性化设置下整体表现较差，即使最强模型也只能取得有限成功；分析还发现推理型模型优于通用大语言模型，感知能力仍是关键基础能力，而反思与长期记忆机制有助于提升适应性。
AI.conclusion: PSPA-Bench为个性化手机GUI智能体研究提供了系统化评测基础，并指出未来提升方向主要包括更强的推理能力、更可靠的感知，以及引入反思和长期记忆机制。

title: SemLoc: Structured Grounding of Free-Form LLM Reasoning for Fault Localization
summary:
Fault localization identifies program locations responsible for observed failures. Existing techniques rank suspicious code using syntactic spectra--signals derived from execution structure such as statement coverage, control-flow divergence, or dependency reachability. These signals collapse for semantic bugs, where failing and passing executions follow identical code paths and differ only in whether semantic intent is satisfied. Recent LLM-based approaches introduce semantic reasoning but produce stochastic, unverifiable outputs that cannot be systematically cross-referenced across tests or distinguish root causes from cascading effects.
  We present SemLoc, a fault localization framework based on structured semantic grounding. SemLoc converts free-form LLM reasoning into a closed intermediate representation that binds each inferred property to a typed program anchor, enabling runtime checking and attribution to program structure. It executes instrumented programs to construct a semantic violation spectrum--a constraint-by-test matrix--from which suspiciousness scores are derived analogously to coverage-based methods. A counterfactual verification step further prunes over-approximate constraints and isolates primary causal violations.
  We evaluate SemLoc on SemFault-250, a corpus of 250 Python programs with single semantic faults. SemLoc outperforms five coverage-, reduction-, and LLM-based baselines, achieving Top-1 accuracy of 42.8% and Top-3 of 68%, while reducing inspection to 7.6% of executable lines. Counterfactual verification provides an additional 12% accuracy gain and identifies primary causal semantic constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为SemLoc的故障定位框架，利用结构化语义约束和反事实验证，将大语言模型的语义推理转化为可运行、可追踪的中间表示，从而提升语义型缺陷的定位能力。
AI.motivation: 传统故障定位方法主要依赖语法层面的执行谱信息，在语义错误场景下往往失效，因为正确与错误执行路径可能完全相同；而直接使用大语言模型的语义推理又存在随机性强、结果不可验证、难以跨测试关联和区分根因与连锁影响的问题。
AI.method: SemLoc将自由形式的LLM推理转化为一个闭合的结构化中间表示，并把每个推断属性绑定到带类型的程序锚点上，支持运行时检查与程序结构归因；随后通过插桩执行构建“语义违约谱”（约束-测试矩阵），据此计算可疑度分数；最后通过反事实验证筛除过近似约束，定位主要因果违规。
AI.result: 在SemFault-250数据集上，SemLoc优于5种覆盖式、缩减式和LLM基线，Top-1准确率达到42.8%，Top-3达到68%，且平均仅需检查7.6%的可执行代码行；反事实验证还能额外带来12%的准确率提升，并识别主要因果语义约束。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，将LLM语义推理与程序结构化锚点和可验证约束结合，可以显著提升语义缺陷的故障定位效果，并使结果具备更强的可追踪性和可解释性。

title: AMIGO: Agentic Multi-Image Grounding Oracle Benchmark
summary: Agentic vision-language models increasingly act through extended interactions, but most evaluations still focus on single-image, single-turn correctness. We introduce AMIGO (Agentic Multi-Image Grounding Oracle Benchmark), a long-horizon benchmark for hidden-target identification over galleries of visually similar images. In AMIGO, the oracle privately selects a target image, and the model must recover it by asking a sequence of attribute-focused Yes/No/Unsure questions under a strict protocol that penalizes invalid actions with Skip. This setting stresses (i) question selection under uncertainty, (ii) consistent constraint tracking across turns, and (iii) fine-grained discrimination as evidence accumulates. AMIGO also supports controlled oracle imperfections to probe robustness and verification behavior under inconsistent feedback. We instantiate AMIGO with Guess My Preferred Dress task and report metrics covering both outcomes and interaction quality, including identification success, evidence verification, efficiency, protocol compliance, noise tolerance, and trajectory-level diagnostics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AMIGO，一个面向长时程、多轮交互的代理式视觉语言模型基准，用于在相似图像集合中通过受限问答识别隐藏目标，并同时评估识别结果与交互过程质量。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型评测大多停留在单图、单轮的正确性检验，难以反映模型在多轮交互中进行不确定性管理、约束跟踪和逐步细化区分的能力，因此需要更贴近代理式使用场景的基准。
AI.method: AMIGO采用“隐藏目标识别”设定：oracle私下选定目标图像，模型需在严格协议下提出属性导向的Yes/No/Unsure问题来逐步定位目标；无效动作会被Skip惩罚。该基准还可引入可控的oracle噪声，以测试模型在反馈不一致时的鲁棒性与验证行为，并通过多项指标综合评估。
AI.result: 作者将AMIGO实例化为Guess My Preferred Dress任务，并报告了多维指标，包括识别成功率、证据验证、效率、协议遵从度、噪声容忍度以及轨迹级诊断结果，用于刻画模型的最终表现和交互质量。
AI.conclusion: AMIGO提供了一个更符合代理式视觉语言模型应用特征的长程评测框架，能够系统考察模型在多轮问答、约束遵循、证据累积判断和噪声环境下的综合能力。

title: Coherent Without Grounding, Grounded Without Success: Observability and Epistemic Failure
summary: When an agent can articulate why something works, we typically take this as evidence of genuine understanding. This presupposes that effective action and correct explanation covary, and that coherent explanation reliably signals both. I argue that this assumption fails for contemporary Large Language Models (LLMs). I introduce what I call the Bidirectional Coherence Paradox: competence and grounding not only dissociate but invert across epistemic conditions. In low-observability domains, LLMs often act successfully while misidentifying the mechanisms that produce their success. In high-observability domains, they frequently generate explanations that accurately track observable causal structure yet fail to translate those diagnoses into effective intervention. In both cases, explanatory coherence remains intact, obscuring the underlying dissociation. Drawing on experiments in compiler optimization and hyperparameter tuning, I develop the Epistemic Triangle, a model of how priors, signals, and domain knowledge interact under varying observability. The results suggest that neither behavioral success nor explanatory accuracy alone suffices for attributing understanding. I argue that evaluating artificial epistemic agents requires a tripartite framework -- coherence, grounding, and a proper basing relation linking explanation to action. The systematic separation of knowing-that and knowing-how in LLMs thus challenges assumptions inherited from both epistemology and current AI evaluation practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“双向一致性悖论”：大语言模型的有效行动、正确解释与真实理解并不总是同步出现，甚至会在不同可观测性条件下出现反向分离。
AI.motivation: 作者认为，人们常把“能说明原因”视为“真正理解”的证据，但这一前提对当代大语言模型并不可靠，因此需要重新审视人工智能中的理解判定标准。
AI.method: 通过编译器优化和超参数调优两个实验场景，构建“认识三角”框架，分析先验、信号与领域知识在不同可观测性下如何交互，并考察模型的解释、行动与基础依赖关系。
AI.result: 结果表明：在低可观测领域，模型可能做得对但解释错；在高可观测领域，模型可能解释得对却无法据此采取有效行动。两种情况下解释表面的连贯性都可能掩盖能力与理解的脱节。
AI.conclusion: 仅凭行为成功或解释准确都不足以判断模型是否真正理解；评估人工智能应同时考察一致性、扎根性以及解释与行动之间的恰当基于关系。

title: MedLoc-R1: Performance-Aware Curriculum Reward Scheduling for GRPO-Based Medical Visual Grounding
comment: 2026 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
summary: Medical visual grounding serves as a crucial foundation for fine-grained multimodal reasoning and interpretable clinical decision support. Despite recent advances in reinforcement learning (RL) for grounding tasks, existing approaches such as Group Relative Policy Optimization~(GRPO) suffer from severe reward sparsity when directly applied to medical images, primarily due to the inherent difficulty of localizing small or ambiguous regions of interest, which is further exacerbated by the rigid and suboptimal nature of fixed IoU-based reward schemes in RL. This leads to vanishing policy gradients and stagnated optimization, particularly during early training. To address this challenge, we propose MedLoc-R1, a performance-aware reward scheduling framework that progressively tightens the reward criterion in accordance with model readiness. MedLoc-R1 introduces a sliding-window performance tracker and a multi-condition update rule that automatically adjust the reward schedule from dense, easily obtainable signals to stricter, fine-grained localization requirements, while preserving the favorable properties of GRPO without introducing auxiliary networks or additional gradient paths. Experiments on three medical visual grounding benchmarks demonstrate that MedLoc-R1 consistently improves both localization accuracy and training stability over GRPO-based baselines. Our framework offers a general, lightweight, and effective solution for RL-based grounding in high-stakes medical applications. Code \& checkpoints are available at \hyperlink{}{https://github.com/MembrAI/MedLoc-R1}.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向医学视觉定位的强化学习奖励调度框架MedLoc-R1，通过根据模型训练状态逐步收紧奖励标准，缓解了固定IoU奖励导致的稀疏回报和早期训练停滞问题。
AI.motivation: 医学视觉定位对于细粒度多模态推理和可解释临床辅助决策很重要，但直接将现有RL方法用于医学图像时，由于目标区域往往小且模糊，奖励非常稀疏，容易出现策略梯度消失和优化停滞。固定的IoU奖励规则也过于僵硬，难以适应训练不同阶段的需求。
AI.method: MedLoc-R1采用性能感知的奖励调度机制，包含滑动窗口性能跟踪器和多条件更新规则；根据模型当前表现自动将奖励从容易获得的稠密信号逐步过渡到更严格的细粒度定位要求，同时保持GRPO的优点，不引入辅助网络或额外梯度路径。
AI.result: 在三个医学视觉定位基准上，MedLoc-R1相比基于GRPO的基线在定位准确率和训练稳定性上均有一致提升，说明该奖励调度策略能够有效缓解稀疏奖励问题。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一种轻量、通用且有效的RL定位优化方案，适合高风险医学场景中的视觉 grounding 任务，并且具有较好的实践可部署性。

title: MolmoPoint: Better Pointing for VLMs with Grounding Tokens
summary: Grounding has become a fundamental capability of vision-language models (VLMs). Most existing VLMs point by generating coordinates as part of their text output, which requires learning a complicated coordinate system and results in a high token count. Instead, we propose a more intuitive pointing mechanism that directly selects the visual tokens that contain the target concept. Our model generates a special pointing token that cross-attends to the input image or video tokens and selects the appropriate one. To make this model more fine-grained, we follow these pointing tokens with an additional special token that selects a fine-grained subpatch within the initially selected region, and then a third token that specifies a location within that subpatch. We further show that performance improves by generating points sequentially in a consistent order, encoding the relative position of the previously selected point, and including a special no-more-points class when selecting visual tokens. Using this method, we set a new state-of-the-art on image pointing (70.7% on PointBench), set a new state-of-the-art among fully open models on GUI pointing (61.1% on ScreenSpotPro), and improve video pointing (59.1% human preference win rate vs. a text coordinate baseline) and tracking (+6.3% gain on Molmo2Track). We additionally show that our method achieves much higher sample efficiency and discuss the qualitative differences that emerge from this design change.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种更直观的视觉语言模型指代机制：不再直接生成坐标，而是通过特殊指代令牌逐步选择图像或视频中的视觉 token、子块和更细位置，从而提升精度、样本效率与多任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型通常用文本形式输出坐标，这会带来坐标系统学习复杂、输出 token 数过多的问题，因此需要一种更自然、更高效的指代方式。
AI.method: 模型先生成一个专门的指代令牌，通过与图像或视频 token 交互来选择目标区域；随后再生成第二个令牌细化到子块，第三个令牌进一步定位到更细粒度位置。同时采用顺序生成点位、编码前一个点的相对位置，并加入“无更多点”类别，以提升一致性和选择能力。
AI.result: 该方法在多个基准上取得提升：图像指代在 PointBench 上达到 70.7% 新SOTA；GUI 指代在 ScreenSpotPro 上以 61.1% 成为全开源模型中的最佳；视频指代相较文本坐标基线的人类偏好胜率为 59.1%；跟踪任务在 Molmo2Track 上提升 6.3%。
AI.conclusion: 直接基于视觉 token 的逐级指代机制比坐标生成更自然、效率更高，并能带来更好的精度、样本效率和跨任务泛化能力。

title: Learning to Focus and Precise Cropping: A Reinforcement Learning Framework with Information Gaps and Grounding Loss for MLLMs
summary: To enhance the perception and reasoning capabilities of multimodal large language models in complex visual scenes, recent research has introduced agent-based workflows. In these works, MLLMs autonomously utilize image cropping tool to analyze regions of interest for question answering. While existing training strategies, such as those employing supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning, have made significant progress, our empirical analysis reveals a key limitation. We demonstrate the model's strong reliance on global input and its weak dependence on the details within the cropped region. To address this issue, we propose a novel two-stage reinforcement learning framework that does not require trajectory supervision. In the first stage, we introduce the ``Information Gap" mechanism by adjusting the granularity of the global image. This mechanism trains the model to answer questions by focusing on cropped key regions, driven by the information gain these regions provide. The second stage further enhances cropping precision by incorporating a grounding loss, using a small number of bounding box annotations. Experiments show that our method significantly enhances the model's attention to cropped regions, enabling it to achieve state-of-the-art performance on high-resolution visual question-answering benchmarks. Our method provides a more efficient approach for perceiving and reasoning fine-grained details in MLLMs. Code is available at: https://github.com/XuanPu-Z/LFPC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于多模态大语言模型的两阶段强化学习框架，专门提升其在复杂视觉场景中对裁剪区域细节的依赖与利用能力，从而改进高分辨率视觉问答表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基于监督微调和强化学习的代理式工作流虽然进展明显，但模型仍过度依赖全局图像输入，对裁剪区域中的细粒度信息利用不足，导致对局部关键区域的感知和推理能力受限。
AI.method: 第一阶段通过“信息差”机制调节全局图像粒度，让模型在回答问题时更多依赖裁剪出的关键区域所带来的信息增益；第二阶段加入少量边界框标注的定位损失，进一步提升裁剪精度。整个框架不需要轨迹监督。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著增强了模型对裁剪区域的关注，提升了局部细节利用能力，并在高分辨率视觉问答基准上达到最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了通过分阶段强化学习与有限定位监督，可以更有效地训练多模态大语言模型关注细粒度视觉信息，为复杂场景下的感知与推理提供了一种更高效的方案。

title: Grounding Social Perception in Intuitive Physics
summary: People infer rich social information from others' actions. These inferences are often constrained by the physical world: what agents can do, what obstacles permit, and how the physical actions of agents causally change an environment and other agents' mental states and behavior. We propose that such rich social perception is more than visual pattern matching, but rather a reasoning process grounded in an integration of intuitive psychology with intuitive physics. To test this hypothesis, we introduced PHASE (PHysically grounded Abstract Social Events), a large dataset of procedurally generated animations, depicting physically simulated two-agent interactions on a 2D surface. Each animation follows the style of the Heider and Simmel movie, with systematic variation in environment geometry, object dynamics, agent capacities, goals, and relationships (friendly/adversarial/neutral). We then present a computational model, SIMPLE, a physics-grounded Bayesian inverse planning model that integrates planning, probabilistic planning, and physics simulation to infer agents' goals and relations from their trajectories. Our experimental results showed that SIMPLE achieved high accuracy and agreement with human judgments across diverse scenarios, while feedforward baseline models -- including strong vision-language models -- and physics-agnostic inverse planning failed to achieve human-level performance and did not align with human judgments. These results suggest that our model provides a computational account for how people understand physically grounded social scenes by inverting a generative model of physics and agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PHASE数据集和SIMPLE模型，用于研究人类如何从物理约束的代理交互中推断社会信息；结果表明，结合直觉物理与直觉心理的贝叶斯逆向规划模型能更接近人类判断。
AI.motivation: 作者关注人们如何从他人行为中推断目标、关系等社会信息，并指出这种推断不仅依赖视觉模式识别，还受物理环境中可行动作、障碍与因果变化的约束，因此需要将社会认知与物理推理统一建模。
AI.method: 构建了PHASE数据集，包含大量程序生成的二维动画，模拟两个代理在不同环境几何、物体动力学、能力、目标和关系条件下的交互；同时提出SIMPLE模型，将规划、概率规划与物理仿真结合，采用物理约束的贝叶斯逆向规划来从轨迹推断代理的目标和关系，并与前馈基线、视觉语言模型及不含物理的逆向规划方法进行比较。
AI.result: 实验显示，SIMPLE在多种场景下具有较高准确率，并且与人类判断高度一致；相比之下，前馈基线模型、包括强视觉语言模型在内的方法，以及不考虑物理的逆向规划模型，都未达到人类水平，也与人类判断不匹配。
AI.conclusion: 研究支持这样一种观点：人类理解物理约束下的社会场景，是通过对包含物理与代理行为的生成模型进行逆向推断实现的；SIMPLE为这种“直觉物理+直觉心理”的计算机制提供了较强证据。

title: Beyond Language: Grounding Referring Expressions with Hand Pointing in Egocentric Vision
summary: Traditional Visual Grounding (VG) predominantly relies on textual descriptions to localize objects, a paradigm that inherently struggles with linguistic ambiguity and often ignores non-verbal deictic cues prevalent in real-world interactions. In natural egocentric engagements, hand-pointing combined with speech forms the most intuitive referring mechanism. To bridge this gap, we introduce EgoPoint-Ground, the first large-scale multimodal dataset dedicated to egocentric deictic visual grounding. Comprising over \textbf{15k} interactive samples in complex scenes, the dataset provides rich, multi-grained annotations including hand-target bounding box pairs and dense semantic captions. We establish a comprehensive benchmark for hand-pointing referring expression resolution, evaluating a wide spectrum of mainstream Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) and state-of-the-art VG architectures. Furthermore, we propose SV-CoT, a novel baseline framework that reformulates grounding as a structured inference process, synergizing gestural and linguistic cues through a Visual Chain-of-Thought paradigm. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SV-CoT achieves an $\textbf{11.7\%}$ absolute improvement over existing methods, effectively mitigating semantic ambiguity and advancing the capability of agents to comprehend multimodal physical intents. The dataset and code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向第一视角指向性视觉定位的新数据集EgoPoint-Ground，并基于此建立基准测试，同时提出SV-CoT方法，将手势与语言线索结合进行结构化推理，显著提升定位性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉定位主要依赖文本描述，容易受语言歧义影响，也忽略了真实交互中常见的非语言指向线索。作者希望弥补第一视角场景中“手指指向+语言”这一更自然的指代方式与现有任务之间的差距。
AI.method: 构建了超过1.5万条交互样本的EgoPoint-Ground数据集，包含手-目标框对和密集语义描述等多粒度标注；据此建立基准，评测多种多模态大模型和视觉定位架构；并提出SV-CoT，将定位重写为结构化推理过程，通过视觉链式思维融合手势与语言信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，SV-CoT相较已有方法取得了11.7%的绝对性能提升，说明显式建模手势与语言的协同推理能够更好缓解语义歧义并提升定位效果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作在第一视角指向性视觉定位上提供了新的数据、基准与方法，为理解多模态物理意图和真实交互中的指代解析提供了有价值的推进。

title: Scene Grounding In the Wild
summary: Reconstructing accurate 3D models of large-scale real-world scenes from unstructured, in-the-wild imagery remains a core challenge in computer vision, especially when the input views have little or no overlap. In such cases, existing reconstruction pipelines often produce multiple disconnected partial reconstructions or erroneously merge non-overlapping regions into overlapping geometry. In this work, we propose a framework that grounds each partial reconstruction to a complete reference model of the scene, enabling globally consistent alignment even in the absence of visual overlap. We obtain reference models from dense, geospatially accurate pseudo-synthetic renderings derived from Google Earth Studio. These renderings provide full scene coverage but differ substantially in appearance from real-world photographs. Our key insight is that, despite this significant domain gap, both domains share the same underlying scene semantics. We represent the reference model using 3D Gaussian Splatting, augmenting each Gaussian with semantic features, and formulate alignment as an inverse feature-based optimization scheme that estimates a global 6DoF pose and scale while keeping the reference model fixed. Furthermore, we introduce the WikiEarth dataset, which registers existing partial 3D reconstructions with pseudo-synthetic reference models. We demonstrate that our approach consistently improves global alignment when initialized with various classical and learning-based pipelines, while mitigating failure modes of state-of-the-art end-to-end models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向大规模真实场景三维重建的全局对齐框架，即使输入视角几乎没有重叠，也能将局部重建稳定地对齐到完整参考模型，从而减少断裂重建和错误合并问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界无组织图像的三维重建在大尺度场景下很困难，尤其当不同视图缺乏重叠时，传统流程容易产生多个彼此分离的局部结果，或把本不重叠的区域错误拼接在一起，因此需要一种具备全局一致性的对齐方法。
AI.method: 作者从 Google Earth Studio 生成具备地理精度的伪合成渲染，作为覆盖完整场景的参考模型；将参考模型表示为带语义特征的三维高斯点；然后把局部重建与参考模型之间的对齐建模为一种基于逆特征优化的问题，在固定参考模型的前提下估计全局 6DoF 位姿和尺度；同时构建了 WikiEarth 数据集，用于将现有局部三维重建与伪合成参考模型配准。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多种初始化来源下，包括经典管线和学习式管线，都能持续提升全局对齐效果，并且能够缓解当前最先进端到端模型中的部分失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了即使存在显著域差异，利用共享的场景语义和完整参考模型仍可实现稳健的全局配准，为大规模无重叠图像的三维重建提供了一种有效的统一对齐框架。

title: SemConFlow: Semantic Grounding of Holistic Co-Speech Gesture Generation with Contrastive Flow-Matching
summary: While the field of co-speech gesture generation has seen significant advances, producing holistic, semantically grounded gestures remains a challenge. Existing approaches rely on external semantic retrieval methods, which limit their generalisation capability due to dependency on predefined linguistic rules. Flow-matching-based methods produce promising results; however, the network is optimised using only semantically congruent samples without exposure to negative examples, leading to learning rhythmic gestures rather than sparse motion, such as iconic and metaphoric gestures. Furthermore, by modelling body parts in isolation, the majority of methods fail to maintain crossmodal consistency. We introduce a Contrastive Flow Matching-based co-speech gesture generation model that uses mismatched audio-text conditions as negatives, training the velocity field to follow the correct motion trajectory while repelling semantically incongruent trajectories. Our model ensures cross-modal coherence by embedding text, audio, and holistic motion into a composite latent space via cosine and contrastive objectives. Extensive experiments and a user study demonstrate that our proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods on two datasets, BEAT2 and SHOW.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的流匹配共语手势生成方法，通过引入音频-文本不匹配样本作为负例，并在联合潜在空间中约束文本、音频与整体动作的一致性，以提升语义相关性与跨模态一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有共语手势生成方法存在三点不足：一是依赖外部语义检索与预定义语言规则，泛化能力受限；二是流匹配方法通常只使用语义一致样本训练，缺少负样本，容易学到偏节律性的动作而非稀疏、具象或隐喻性手势；三是将身体部位孤立建模，难以保持文本、语音与整体动作之间的跨模态一致性。
AI.method: 作者提出对比流匹配共语手势生成模型：将音频-文本不匹配条件构造为负样本，训练速度场既沿正确运动轨迹生成动作，又远离语义不一致轨迹；同时通过余弦目标与对比目标，将文本、音频和整体动作嵌入统一的复合潜在空间，以增强跨模态对齐与整体性建模。
AI.result: 在BEAT2和SHOW两个数据集上进行了大量实验，并结合用户研究，结果表明该方法优于当前最先进的方法，在生成质量、语义匹配和跨模态一致性方面表现更好。
AI.conclusion: 该工作说明，在流匹配框架中显式引入负样本和跨模态对比约束，能够有效提升共语手势生成的语义表达能力与整体一致性，为生成更自然、语义更丰富的手势提供了有效路径。

title: GUIDE: Resolving Domain Bias in GUI Agents through Real-Time Web Video Retrieval and Plug-and-Play Annotation
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. 30 pages: 15-page main paper followed by supplementary material as an appendix (Sections A-F). Project page: https://sharryXR.github.io/GUIDE/
summary: Large vision-language models have endowed GUI agents with strong general capabilities for interface understanding and interaction. However, due to insufficient exposure to domain-specific software operation data during training, these agents exhibit significant domain bias - they lack familiarity with the specific operation workflows (planning) and UI element layouts (grounding) of particular applications, limiting their real-world task performance. In this paper, we present GUIDE (GUI Unbiasing via Instructional-Video Driven Expertise), a training-free, plug-and-play framework that resolves GUI agent domain bias by autonomously acquiring domain-specific expertise from web tutorial videos through a retrieval-augmented automated annotation pipeline. GUIDE introduces two key innovations. First, a subtitle-driven Video-RAG pipeline unlocks video semantics through subtitle analysis, performing progressive three-stage retrieval - domain classification, topic extraction, and relevance matching - to identify task-relevant tutorial videos. Second, a fully automated annotation pipeline built on an inverse dynamics paradigm feeds consecutive keyframes enhanced with UI element detection into VLMs, inferring the required planning and grounding knowledge that are injected into the agent's corresponding modules to address both manifestations of domain bias. Extensive experiments on OSWorld demonstrate GUIDE's generality as a plug-and-play component for both multi-agent systems and single-model agents. It consistently yields over 5% improvements and reduces execution steps - without modifying any model parameters or architecture - validating GUIDE as an architecture-agnostic enhancement to bridge GUI agent domain bias.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GUIDE，一种无需训练、即插即用的框架，通过从网页教程视频中自动获取领域知识，缓解GUI代理在特定软件上的领域偏差，从而提升任务执行效果。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型驱动的GUI代理虽然具备通用界面理解能力，但由于训练时缺少特定软件的操作数据，容易在具体应用上表现出两类不足：一是不会规划具体操作流程，二是难以准确定位界面元素，导致真实任务完成率受限。
AI.method: GUIDE采用检索增强的自动标注流程，从教程视频中提取领域专长。首先通过字幕驱动的Video-RAG进行三阶段检索，包括领域分类、主题提取和相关性匹配，筛选任务相关视频；随后利用逆动力学范式，对连续关键帧与UI元素检测结果进行自动标注，并将推断得到的规划知识与定位知识注入代理对应模块，从而同时改善规划与 grounding 能力。
AI.result: 在OSWorld上的实验表明，GUIDE可作为多代理系统和单模型代理的通用插件使用，通常带来超过5%的性能提升，并减少执行步骤；且全过程无需修改模型参数或架构。
AI.conclusion: GUIDE证明了可以通过自动从教程视频中抽取领域知识，作为架构无关的增强模块有效缓解GUI代理的领域偏差，为提升特定软件场景下的实际任务表现提供了可行方案。

title: Towards GUI Agents: Vision-Language Diffusion Models for GUI Grounding
summary: Autoregressive (AR) vision-language models (VLMs) have long dominated multimodal understanding, reasoning, and graphical user interface (GUI) grounding. Recently, discrete diffusion vision-language models (DVLMs) have shown strong performance in multimodal reasoning, offering bidirectional attention, parallel token generation, and iterative refinement. However, their potential for GUI grounding remains unexplored. In this work, we evaluate whether discrete DVLMs can serve as a viable alternative to AR models for GUI grounding. We adapt LLaDA-V for single-turn action and bounding-box prediction, framing the task as text generation from multimodal input. To better capture the hierarchical structure of bounding-box geometry, we propose a hybrid masking schedule that combines linear and deterministic masking, improving grounding accuracy by up to 6.1 points in Step Success Rate (SSR) over the GUI-adapted LLaDA-V trained with linear masking. Evaluations on four datasets spanning web, desktop, and mobile interfaces show that the adapted diffusion model with hybrid masking consistently outperforms the linear-masked variant and performs competitively with autoregressive counterparts despite limited pretraining. Systematic ablations reveal that increasing diffusion steps, generation length, and block length improves accuracy but also increases latency, with accuracy plateauing beyond a certain number of diffusion steps. Expanding the training data with diverse GUI domains further reduces latency by about 1.3 seconds and improves grounding accuracy by an average of 20 points across benchmarks. These results demonstrate that discrete DVLMs are a promising modeling framework for GUI grounding and represent an important step toward diffusion-based GUI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文评估离散扩散视觉语言模型（DVLM）用于GUI grounding的可行性，并对LLaDA-V进行单轮动作与边界框预测适配。通过提出混合掩码策略，模型在四个界面数据集上较线性掩码版本显著提升定位精度，并在有限预训练条件下接近自回归模型表现。
AI.motivation: 作者关注现有自回归视觉语言模型在GUI理解与定位任务中的主导地位，希望验证离散扩散模型是否能成为其有效替代方案。由于GUI grounding需要精确生成动作与边界框，研究重点在于扩散模型是否能更好地利用双向注意、并行生成和迭代细化能力。
AI.method: 将LLaDA-V改造为面向单轮GUI grounding的文本生成模型，输入为多模态信息，输出为动作和边界框。为更好建模边界框的层次几何结构，设计了结合线性掩码与确定性掩码的混合掩码调度。随后在四个覆盖网页、桌面和移动端界面的数据集上进行评测，并通过消融实验分析扩散步数、生成长度、块长度以及训练数据多样性对性能与延迟的影响。
AI.result: 混合掩码相较于线性掩码训练的LLaDA-V，Step Success Rate最高提升6.1个百分点。改造后的扩散模型在四个数据集上稳定优于线性掩码版本，并在有限预训练下与自回归方法表现相当。实验还表明，增加扩散步数、生成长度和块长度通常提升准确率但会增加延迟，且扩散步数达到一定程度后性能趋于饱和。扩大训练数据覆盖更多GUI领域可将延迟降低约1.3秒，并使各基准平均准确率提升约20个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 离散扩散视觉语言模型可以作为GUI grounding的有前景建模框架。混合掩码策略显著提升了边界框与动作预测能力，表明扩散式GUI agent具有可行性，并为后续构建基于扩散的界面交互智能体提供了基础。

title: SlotVTG: Object-Centric Adapter for Generalizable Video Temporal Grounding
comment: Accepted to GRAIL-V workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown strong performance on Video Temporal Grounding (VTG). However, their coarse recognition capabilities are insufficient for fine-grained temporal understanding, making task-specific fine-tuning indispensable. This fine-tuning causes models to memorize dataset-specific shortcuts rather than faithfully grounding in the actual visual content, leading to poor Out-of-Domain (OOD) generalization. Object-centric learning offers a promising remedy by decomposing scenes into entity-level representations, but existing approaches require re-running the entire multi-stage training pipeline from scratch. We propose SlotVTG, a framework that steers MLLMs toward object-centric, input-grounded visual reasoning at minimal cost. SlotVTG introduces a lightweight slot adapter that decomposes visual tokens into abstract slots via slot attention and reconstructs the original sequence, where objectness priors from a self-supervised vision model encourage semantically coherent slot formation. Cross-domain evaluation on standard VTG benchmarks demonstrates that our approach significantly improves OOD robustness while maintaining competitive In-Domain (ID) performance with minimal overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个名为SlotVTG的轻量框架，用于提升多模态大语言模型在视频时间定位任务中的对象中心化推理能力，从而增强跨域泛化与OOD鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型虽然在视频时间定位上表现不错，但对细粒度时间理解不足，往往依赖数据集偏置而非真实视觉内容；对象中心学习虽有帮助，但传统方法通常需要从头重训整个多阶段流程，成本较高。
AI.method: SlotVTG在视觉编码与语言模型之间加入轻量级slot adapter，利用slot attention将视觉token分解为抽象slots，再重建原始序列；同时引入来自自监督视觉模型的objectness先验，促进slot形成语义一致的实体表示。
AI.result: 在标准视频时间定位基准的跨域评估中，SlotVTG显著提升了OOD鲁棒性，同时保持了具有竞争力的域内性能，并且额外开销很小。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了以低成本方式将多模态大语言模型引导到对象中心、输入对齐的视觉推理是可行的，能够有效缓解任务微调带来的数据集捷径问题并改善泛化能力。

title: CVA: Context-aware Video-text Alignment for Video Temporal Grounding
summary: We propose Context-aware Video-text Alignment (CVA), a novel framework to address a significant challenge in video temporal grounding: achieving temporally sensitive video-text alignment that remains robust to irrelevant background context. Our framework is built on three key components. First, we propose Query-aware Context Diversification (QCD), a new data augmentation strategy that ensures only semantically unrelated content is mixed in. It builds a video-text similarity-based pool of replacement clips to simulate diverse contexts while preventing the ``false negative" caused by query-agnostic mixing.
