Second, we introduce the Context-invariant Boundary Discrimination (CBD) loss, a contrastive loss that enforces semantic consistency at challenging temporal boundaries, making their representations robust to contextual shifts and hard negatives. Third, we introduce the Context-enhanced Transformer Encoder (CTE), a hierarchical architecture that combines windowed self-attention and bidirectional cross-attention with learnable queries to capture multi-scale temporal context. Through the synergy of these data-centric and architectural enhancements, CVA achieves state-of-the-art performance on major VTG benchmarks, including QVHighlights and Charades-STA. Notably, our method achieves a significant improvement of approximately 5 points in Recall@1 (R1) scores over state-of-the-art methods, highlighting its effectiveness in mitigating false negatives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出上下文感知的视频-文本对齐框架CVA，针对视频时序定位中背景上下文干扰导致的对齐不稳定问题，通过查询感知的数据增强、上下文不变边界判别损失和层次化编码器三部分协同提升性能，并在主流基准上取得了显著改进。
AI.motivation: 视频时序定位的核心难点之一是：模型不仅要对齐视频与文本，还要对无关背景上下文保持鲁棒。现有方法在数据混合或边界学习中容易引入“伪负样本”，从而削弱时序敏感的语义匹配能力，因此需要一种既能增强上下文多样性又能避免错误监督的框架。
AI.method: CVA包含三个关键模块：1）查询感知上下文多样化（QCD），基于视频-文本相似度构建替换片段池，只混合语义不相关内容，用于模拟多样上下文并减少伪负样本；2）上下文不变边界判别（CBD）损失，通过对比学习强化困难时间边界处的语义一致性，使表示对上下文变化和硬负样本更稳定；3）上下文增强Transformer编码器（CTE），采用分层结构，将窗口化自注意力与带可学习查询的双向交叉注意力结合，以建模多尺度时序上下文。
AI.result: 实验表明，CVA在QVHighlights和Charades-STA等主要视频时序定位基准上达到当前最优性能，Recall@1相较已有最优方法提升约5个百分点，说明该方法在缓解伪负样本和增强上下文鲁棒性方面效果明显。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，面向视频时序定位，数据层面的查询感知增强与模型层面的上下文建模、边界判别相结合，能够有效提升视频-文本对齐的精度与稳定性。CVA为处理无关背景干扰提供了一种具有实用性的统一方案。

title: OptiSAR-Net++: A Large-Scale Benchmark and Transformer-Free Framework for Cross-Domain Remote Sensing Visual Grounding
summary: Remote sensing visual grounding (RSVG) aims to localize specific targets in remote sensing images using natural language expressions. However, existing methods are restricted to single-sensor domains, i.e., either optical or synthetic aperture radar (SAR), limiting their real-world applicability. In this paper, we introduce the Cross-Domain RSVG (CD-RSVG) task and construct OptSAR-RSVG, the first large-scale benchmark dataset for this setting. To tackle the challenges of cross-domain feature modeling, computational inefficiency, and fine-grained semantic discrimination, we propose OptiSAR-Net++. Our framework features a patch-level Low-Rank Adaptation Mixture of Experts (PL-MoE) for efficient cross-domain feature decoupling. To mitigate the substantial computational overhead of Transformer decoding frameworks, we adopt a CLIP-based contrastive paradigm and further incorporate dynamic adversarial negative sampling, thereby transforming generative regression into an efficient cross-modal matching process. Additionally, a text-guided dual-gate fusion module (TGDF-SSA) and a region-aware auxiliary head are introduced to enhance semantic-visual alignment and spatial modeling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OptiSAR-Net++ achieves SOTA performance on both OptSAR-RSVG and DIOR-RSVG benchmarks, offering significant advantages in localization accuracy and efficiency. Our code and dataset will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出跨域遥感视觉定位任务CD-RSVG，并构建首个大规模跨域基准OptSAR-RSVG；同时设计OptiSAR-Net++，通过高效的跨域特征解耦、对比式匹配和多模块融合，实现更高的定位精度与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感视觉定位方法通常只适用于单一传感器域，如光学或SAR，缺乏跨域泛化能力，难以满足真实应用中多源遥感数据协同理解的需求。因此，作者希望建立跨域任务与数据集，并提升模型在跨传感器场景下的语义对齐、细粒度辨别与计算效率。
AI.method: 作者首先提出跨域遥感视觉定位（CD-RSVG）任务，并构建OptSAR-RSVG数据集。模型OptiSAR-Net++包含：1）patch级低秩适配专家混合模块（PL-MoE），用于高效跨域特征解耦；2）基于CLIP的对比学习范式，并结合动态对抗负样本采样，将生成式回归转为跨模态匹配；3）文本引导的双门控融合模块（TGDF-SSA），增强语义与视觉对齐；4）区域感知辅助头，强化空间建模能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，OptiSAR-Net++在OptSAR-RSVG和DIOR-RSVG两个基准上均取得了最优性能，同时在定位准确率和推理效率方面表现出明显优势。
AI.conclusion: 该工作从任务、数据集和模型三个层面推进了跨域遥感视觉定位研究：提出了更贴近实际应用的新任务，提供了首个大规模基准，并通过高效对比匹配与多模块融合显著提升性能，为多源遥感跨域理解提供了有效方案。

title: UI-Voyager: A Self-Evolving GUI Agent Learning via Failed Experience
comment: Code and models are available at https://github.com/ui-voyager/UI-Voyager
summary: Autonomous mobile GUI agents have attracted increasing attention along with the advancement of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). However, existing methods still suffer from inefficient learning from failed trajectories and ambiguous credit assignment under sparse rewards for long-horizon GUI tasks. To that end, we propose UI-Voyager, a novel two-stage self-evolving mobile GUI agent. In the first stage, we employ Rejection Fine-Tuning (RFT), which enables the continuous co-evolution of data and models in a fully autonomous loop. The second stage introduces Group Relative Self-Distillation (GRSD), which identifies critical fork points in group rollouts and constructs dense step-level supervision from successful trajectories to correct failed ones. Extensive experiments on AndroidWorld show that our 4B model achieves an 81.0% Pass@1 success rate, outperforming numerous recent baselines and exceeding human-level performance. Ablation and case studies further verify the effectiveness of GRSD. Our method represents a significant leap toward efficient, self-evolving, and high-performance mobile GUI automation without expensive manual data annotation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UI-Voyager，一种面向移动端图形界面任务的两阶段自进化智能体，通过RFT和GRSD缓解失败轨迹学习低效、稀疏奖励下信用分配模糊等问题，并在AndroidWorld上取得较高成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有移动GUI智能体在长时序任务中，往往难以从失败轨迹中有效学习，且由于奖励稀疏，步骤级贡献难以准确判断，导致训练效率和性能受限。
AI.method: 第一阶段采用拒绝微调（RFT），在完全自动化闭环中持续进行数据与模型的协同进化；第二阶段采用组相对自蒸馏（GRSD），在组内rollout中识别关键分叉点，并基于成功轨迹构造稠密的步骤级监督，用于纠正失败轨迹。
AI.result: 在AndroidWorld实验中，4B模型达到81.0%的Pass@1成功率，优于多种近期基线，并超过人类水平；消融实验和案例分析进一步验证了GRSD的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动化自进化与稠密信用分配机制，显著提升了移动GUI自动化的学习效率和任务性能，同时减少了对人工标注数据的依赖。

title: Grounding Arabic LLMs in the Doha Historical Dictionary: Retrieval-Augmented Understanding of Quran and Hadith
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in many language tasks, yet they continue to struggle with complex historical and religious Arabic texts such as the Quran and Hadith. To address this limitation, we develop a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) framework grounded in diachronic lexicographic knowledge. Unlike prior RAG systems that rely on general-purpose corpora, our approach retrieves evidence from the Doha Historical Dictionary of Arabic (DHDA), a large-scale resource documenting the historical development of Arabic vocabulary. The proposed pipeline combines hybrid retrieval with an intent-based routing mechanism to provide LLMs with precise, contextually relevant historical information. Our experiments show that this approach improves the accuracy of Arabic-native LLMs, including Fanar and ALLaM, to over 85\%, substantially reducing the performance gap with Gemini, a proprietary large-scale model. Gemini also serves as an LLM-as-a-judge system for automatic evaluation in our experiments. The automated judgments were verified through human evaluation, demonstrating high agreement (kappa = 0.87). An error analysis further highlights key linguistic challenges, including diacritics and compound expressions. These findings demonstrate the value of integrating diachronic lexicographic resources into retrieval-augmented generation frameworks to enhance Arabic language understanding, particularly for historical and religious texts. The code and resources are publicly available at: https://github.com/somayaeltanbouly/Doha-Dictionary-RAG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合历时词典知识的检索增强生成（RAG）框架，用于提升大语言模型对阿拉伯语历史与宗教文本的理解能力，并在实验中取得了显著准确率提升。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在处理《古兰经》和圣训等复杂阿拉伯语历史、宗教文本时表现不足，尤其缺乏对词汇历时演变和语境细节的支持，因此需要更适合的知识检索机制。
AI.method: 构建基于多哈阿拉伯语历史词典（DHDA）的RAG系统，采用混合检索与基于意图的路由机制，为模型提供精确且语境相关的历时词汇证据；同时使用Gemini作为LLM-as-a-judge进行自动评估，并结合人工验证。
AI.result: 实验显示，该方法将阿拉伯语原生模型Fanar和ALLaM的准确率提升到85%以上，明显缩小了与专有大模型Gemini之间的性能差距；自动评估与人工评估高度一致，kappa达到0.87。
AI.conclusion: 将历时词典资源融入RAG框架能够有效增强阿拉伯语模型对历史与宗教文本的理解，尤其有助于缓解变音符号和复合表达等语言难点。

title: Grounding Vision and Language to 3D Masks for Long-Horizon Box Rearrangement
summary: We study long-horizon planning in 3D environments from under-specified natural-language goals using only visual observations, focusing on multi-step 3D box rearrangement tasks. Existing approaches typically rely on symbolic planners with brittle relational grounding of states and goals, or on direct action-sequence generation from 2D vision-language models (VLMs). Both approaches struggle with reasoning over many objects, rich 3D geometry, and implicit semantic constraints. Recent advances in 3D VLMs demonstrate strong grounding of natural-language referents to 3D segmentation masks, suggesting the potential for more general planning capabilities. We extend existing 3D grounding models and propose Reactive Action Mask Planner (RAMP-3D), which formulates long-horizon planning as sequential reactive prediction of paired 3D masks: a "which-object" mask indicating what to pick and a "which-target-region" mask specifying where to place it. The resulting system processes RGB-D observations and natural-language task specifications to reactively generate multi-step pick-and-place actions for 3D box rearrangement. We conduct experiments across 11 task variants in warehouse-style environments with 1-30 boxes and diverse natural-language constraints. RAMP-3D achieves 79.5% success rate on long-horizon rearrangement tasks and significantly outperforms 2D VLM-based baselines, establishing mask-based reactive policies as a promising alternative to symbolic pipelines for long-horizon planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAMP-3D，一种用于三维环境中长时程规划的掩码式反应策略：将任务拆解为连续预测“取哪个物体”和“放到哪个目标区域”两类3D分割掩码，从而直接生成多步抓取-放置动作。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么依赖符号规划器，存在状态与关系地面化不稳定的问题；要么直接用二维视觉语言模型生成动作序列，难以处理大量物体、复杂三维几何和隐含语义约束。因此需要一种更稳健的、能利用三维视觉对齐能力的长时程规划方法。
AI.method: 作者扩展了现有3D视觉语言地面化模型，提出Reactive Action Mask Planner（RAMP-3D）。该方法基于RGB-D观测和自然语言任务描述，逐步预测一对3D掩码：一个用于指示应抓取的物体，另一个用于指示应放置的目标区域。系统以反应式方式进行多步决策，适用于多阶段3D箱体重排任务。
AI.result: 在仓储风格环境中的11种任务变体上，RAMP-3D在1到30个箱体、以及多样自然语言约束下进行了评估，取得了79.5%的成功率，并显著优于基于二维VLM的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，将长时程规划建模为基于3D掩码的反应式策略，能够更好地处理复杂三维场景中的多目标推理与空间约束，是替代传统符号流水线的一种有前景的方向。

title: UniFunc3D: Unified Active Spatial-Temporal Grounding for 3D Functionality Segmentation
summary: Functionality segmentation in 3D scenes requires an agent to ground implicit natural-language instructions into precise masks of fine-grained interactive elements. Existing methods rely on fragmented pipelines that suffer from visual blindness during initial task parsing. We observe that these methods are limited by single-scale, passive and heuristic frame selection. We present UniFunc3D, a unified and training-free framework that treats the multimodal large language model as an active observer. By consolidating semantic, temporal, and spatial reasoning into a single forward pass, UniFunc3D performs joint reasoning to ground task decomposition in direct visual evidence. Our approach introduces active spatial-temporal grounding with a coarse-to-fine strategy. This allows the model to select correct video frames adaptively and focus on high-detail interactive parts while preserving the global context necessary for disambiguation. On SceneFun3D, UniFunc3D achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing both training-free and training-based methods by a large margin with a relative 59.9\% mIoU improvement, without any task-specific training. Code will be released on our project page: https://jiaying.link/unifunc3d.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个无需任务特定训练的统一框架 UniFunc3D，用多模态大语言模型在一次前向过程中联合进行语义、时序和空间推理，以更准确地从3D场景中定位细粒度交互部件的掩码。
AI.motivation: 现有3D功能分割方法依赖碎片化流水线，初始任务解析阶段缺乏直接视觉依据，且受限于单尺度、被动和启发式的帧选择，导致分割与指令对齐不够准确。
AI.method: UniFunc3D 将多模态大语言模型视为主动观察者，采用统一的训练免费框架，把语义、时间和空间推理整合到单次前向传播中；同时引入主动时空定位与由粗到细的策略，自适应选择关键视频帧，并在保留全局上下文的同时聚焦高细节交互区域。
AI.result: 在 SceneFun3D 上，UniFunc3D 达到最新最优性能，相比训练免费和训练式方法均有显著提升，mIoU 相对提升 59.9%，且不需要任何任务特定训练。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，通过统一的主动时空推理与粗到细定位策略，可以显著提升3D场景功能分割中自然语言指令到精细掩码的落地能力，并减少对复杂训练流程的依赖。

title: AgentRAE: Remote Action Execution through Notification-based Visual Backdoors against Screenshots-based Mobile GUI Agents
summary: The rapid adoption of mobile graphical user interface (GUI) agents, which autonomously control applications and operating systems (OS), exposes new system-level attack surfaces. Existing backdoors against web GUI agents and general GenAI models rely on environmental injection or deceptive pop-ups to mislead the agent operation. However, these techniques do not work on screenshots-based mobile GUI agents due to the challenges of restricted trigger design spaces, OS background interference, and conflicts in multiple trigger-action mappings. We propose AgentRAE, a novel backdoor attack capable of inducing Remote Action Execution in mobile GUI agents using visually natural triggers (e.g., benign app icons in notifications). To address the underfitting caused by natural triggers and achieve accurate multi-target action redirection, we design a novel two-stage pipeline that first enhances the agent's sensitivity to subtle iconographic differences via contrastive learning, and then associates each trigger with a specific mobile GUI agent action through a backdoor post-training. Our extensive evaluation reveals that the proposed backdoor preserves clean performance with an attack success rate of over 90% across ten mobile operations. Furthermore, it is hard to visibly detect the benign-looking triggers and circumvents eight representative state-of-the-art defenses. These results expose an overlooked backdoor vector in mobile GUI agents, underscoring the need for defenses that scrutinize notification-conditioned behaviors and internal agent representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对移动图形界面智能体的后门攻击AgentRAE，利用外观自然的视觉触发器在截图式移动GUI智能体中实现远程动作执行，并在保持干净性能的同时取得超过90%的攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 随着移动GUI智能体被广泛用于自动控制应用和操作系统，新的系统级攻击面逐渐暴露。现有针对网页GUI智能体或通用生成式模型的后门方法，依赖环境注入或欺骗性弹窗，但在基于截图的移动GUI智能体上效果受限，主要因为触发设计空间狭窄、后台系统干扰以及多触发-多动作映射冲突等问题。
AI.method: 作者提出AgentRAE，使用视觉上自然的触发器，如通知中的良性应用图标，诱导移动GUI智能体执行指定动作。方法采用两阶段流程：第一阶段通过对比学习增强智能体对细微图标差异的敏感性，缓解自然触发器带来的欠拟合；第二阶段通过后门式再训练，将每个触发器与特定移动GUI动作建立关联，从而实现多目标动作重定向。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在十种移动操作上均能保持较高的干净性能，并实现超过90%的攻击成功率；同时，触发器外观隐蔽，难以被肉眼识别，还能绕过八种代表性的先进防御方法。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了移动GUI智能体中一个此前被忽视的后门攻击向量，说明仅依赖表面输入或常规防御不足以应对此类风险，未来需要重点审查通知条件行为以及智能体内部表征的安全性。

title: Grounding Sim-to-Real Generalization in Robotic Manipulation: An Empirical Study with Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Learning a generalist control policy for robotic manipulation typically relies on large-scale datasets. Given the high cost of real-world data collection, a practical alternative is to generate synthetic data through simulation. However, the resulting synthetic data often exhibits a significant gap from real-world distributions. While many prior studies have proposed algorithms to bridge the Sim-to-Real discrepancy, there remains a lack of principled research that grounds these methods in real-world manipulation tasks, particularly their performance on generalist policies such as Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models. In this study, we empirically examine the primary determinants of Sim-to-Real generalization across four dimensions: multi-level domain randomization, photorealistic rendering, physics-realistic modeling, and reinforcement learning updates. To support this study, we design a comprehensive evaluation protocol to quantify the real-world performance of manipulation tasks. The protocol accounts for key variations in background, lighting, distractors, object types, and spatial features. Through experiments involving over 10k real-world trials, we derive critical insights into Sim-to-Real transfer. To inform and advance future studies, we release both the robotic platforms and the evaluation protocol for public access to facilitate independent verification, thereby establishing a realistic and standardized benchmark for robotic manipulation policies.

AI.tldr: 本文面向机器人操作中的通用控制策略，系统研究了仿真到现实（Sim-to-Real）迁移的关键因素，并通过超过1万次真实世界实验建立了可复现、标准化的评测协议与基准。
AI.motivation: 真实世界数据采集成本高，常依赖仿真生成合成数据，但仿真与真实分布存在显著差距。现有研究虽提出多种缩小差距的方法，但缺乏面向真实操作任务、尤其是面向视觉-语言-动作（VLA）等通用策略的系统性实证研究。
AI.method: 作者从四个维度考察Sim-to-Real泛化的主要决定因素：多级域随机化、照片级真实渲染、物理真实建模、强化学习更新。同时设计了一套全面的真实世界评测协议，用于量化操作任务表现，覆盖背景、光照、干扰物、物体类型和空间特征等关键变化，并在真实环境中进行了超过1万次实验。
AI.result: 实验揭示了不同仿真增强与训练策略对真实世界泛化的影响，并提炼出若干关于Sim-to-Real迁移的关键经验。作者还公开了机器人平台与评测协议，便于独立复现和验证。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为机器人操作通用策略的Sim-to-Real研究提供了更具现实约束的标准化基准和实验依据，有助于未来在VLA等通用策略上开展更可信、可比较的迁移研究。

title: CAPTCHA Solving for Native GUI Agents: Automated Reasoning-Action Data Generation and Self-Corrective Training
summary: GUI agents are rapidly shifting from multi-module pipelines to end-to-end, native vision-language models (VLMs) that perceive raw screenshots and directly interact with digital devices. Despite rapid progress on general GUI tasks, CAPTCHA solving remains a major challenge. On the other hand, although specialized CAPTCHA solving pipelines exist, they cannot handle general GUI tasks. To address this gap, we introduce ReCAP: a CAPTCHA-capable native GUI agent that solves modern, interactive CAPTCHA challenges while retaining general GUI-agent performance. We first develop a dynamic CAPTCHA system spanning seven representative CAPTCHA types, designed to stress primitive and complementary capabilities for CAPTCHA solving. Then, we develop an automated data collection and curation pipeline that generates large-scale CAPTCHA interaction trajectories paired with reasoning traces. As CAPTCHA solving often requires multi-step interaction and recovery from intermediate mistakes, we further leverage failed trajectories to construct self-correction data, training agents to reflect on errors and correct their actions online. Across synthetic and real-world test sets, ReCAP substantially improves CAPTCHA-solving success over its base agents, while maintaining strong performance on general GUI-agent benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReCAP，一种兼顾通用GUI任务与现代CAPTCHA求解的原生GUI智能体，通过动态CAPTCHA体系、大规模交互轨迹数据与失败轨迹自纠错训练，显著提升CAPTCHA成功率且保持通用GUI性能。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体正从多模块流程转向端到端的原生视觉语言模型，但在CAPTCHA求解上仍然薄弱；而专门的CAPTCHA方案又难以适用于通用GUI任务，因此需要一种能够同时覆盖两类能力的统一方法。
AI.method: 作者构建了一个覆盖七类代表性CAPTCHA的动态测试系统，用于刻画和施压CAPTCHA所需的基础与互补能力；随后设计自动化数据采集与清洗流程，生成大规模CAPTCHA交互轨迹及对应推理链；进一步利用失败轨迹构造自我纠错数据，训练模型在在线交互中识别错误并修正动作。
AI.result: 在合成与真实世界测试集上，ReCAP相较于其基础模型显著提升了CAPTCHA求解成功率，同时在通用GUI智能体基准上仍保持较强表现。
AI.conclusion: ReCAP证明了原生GUI智能体可以通过定制化CAPTCHA数据、交互轨迹学习与自纠错机制，在不牺牲通用能力的前提下增强对现代交互式CAPTCHA的处理能力。

title: To Agree or To Be Right? The Grounding-Sycophancy Tradeoff in Medical Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) adapted to the medical domain have shown strong performance on visual question answering benchmarks, yet their robustness against two critical failure modes, hallucination and sycophancy, remains poorly understood, particularly in combination. We evaluate six VLMs (three general-purpose, three medical-specialist) on three medical VQA datasets and uncover a grounding-sycophancy tradeoff: models with the lowest hallucination propensity are the most sycophantic, while the most pressure-resistant model hallucinates more than all medical-specialist models. To characterize this tradeoff, we propose three metrics: L-VASE, a logit-space reformulation of VASE that avoids its double-normalization; CCS, a confidence-calibrated sycophancy score that penalizes high-confidence capitulation; and Clinical Safety Index (CSI), a unified safety index that combines grounding, autonomy, and calibration via a geometric mean. Across 1,151 test cases, no model achieves a CSI above 0.35, indicating that none of the evaluated 7-8B parameter VLMs is simultaneously well-grounded and robust to social pressure. Our findings suggest that joint evaluation of both properties is necessary before these models can be considered for clinical use. Code is available at https://github.com/UTSA-VIRLab/AgreeOrRight

AI.tldr: 该摘要研究了医学领域视觉语言模型在幻觉与“随声附和”两种失效模式上的联合鲁棒性，发现二者存在明显权衡：越不容易产生幻觉的模型越容易受提示压力影响，而最抗压力的模型幻觉更严重。
AI.motivation: 医学VLM虽然在视觉问答任务上表现良好，但其在临床场景中的可靠性不仅取决于是否“看对”，也取决于是否能抵抗错误引导，因此需要同时评估幻觉和顺从性。
AI.method: 作者评估了6个VLM（3个通用模型、3个医学专用模型），使用3个医学VQA数据集共1151个测试样本，并提出3个指标：L-VASE用于改进幻觉度量，CCS用于衡量高置信度下的顺从倾向，CSI用于将 grounding、autonomy 和 calibration 以几何平均方式整合为统一安全指数。
AI.result: 实验发现存在“grounding-sycophancy tradeoff”：幻觉最少的模型最容易顺从错误压力，而最抗压力的模型在幻觉上反而更差；所有评估模型的CSI都低于0.35，说明这些7-8B参数规模的VLM尚未同时达到高对齐与高鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 结论是，医学VLM不能只看单一指标或单一失效模式，必须联合评估幻觉与顺从性；在进入临床应用前，这类模型仍需显著提升对视觉证据的可靠依赖和对错误外部压力的抵抗能力。

title: Evaluating Evidence Grounding Under User Pressure in Instruction-Tuned Language Models
summary: In contested domains, instruction-tuned language models must balance user-alignment pressures against faithfulness to the in-context evidence. To evaluate this tension, we introduce a controlled epistemic-conflict framework grounded in the U.S. National Climate Assessment. We conduct fine-grained ablations over evidence composition and uncertainty cues across 19 instruction-tuned models spanning 0.27B to 32B parameters. Across neutral prompts, richer evidence generally improves evidence-consistent accuracy and ordinal scoring performance. Under user pressure, however, evidence does not reliably prevent user-aligned reversals in this controlled fixed-evidence setting. We report three primary failure modes. First, we identify a negative partial-evidence interaction, where adding epistemic nuance, specifically research gaps, is associated with increased susceptibility to sycophancy in families like Llama-3 and Gemma-3. Second, robustness scales non-monotonically: within some families, certain low-to-mid scale models are especially sensitive to adversarial user pressure. Third, models differ in distributional concentration under conflict: some instruction-tuned models maintain sharply peaked ordinal distributions under pressure, while others are substantially more dispersed; in scale-matched Qwen comparisons, reasoning-distilled variants (DeepSeek-R1-Qwen) exhibit consistently higher dispersion than their instruction-tuned counterparts. These findings suggest that, in a controlled fixed-evidence setting, providing richer in-context evidence alone offers no guarantee against user pressure without explicit training for epistemic integrity.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究指令微调语言模型在“用户偏好压力”与“基于上下文证据保持忠实”之间的冲突。结果表明：更丰富的证据通常能提升中性提示下的表现，但在用户施压时并不能稳定阻止模型偏向用户立场。
AI.motivation: 作者希望评估在有争议领域中，指令微调模型是否会因用户压力而偏离上下文证据，并分析不同证据组成、确定性线索与模型规模对这种偏离的影响。
AI.method: 基于美国国家气候评估构建受控的认知冲突框架，对19个指令微调模型（0.27B到32B参数）进行细粒度消融实验，系统比较不同证据组合、研究空白提示和用户压力条件下的证据一致性、序数评分表现与输出分布。
AI.result: 在中性提示下，更丰富的证据通常提升证据一致性准确率和序数评分表现；但在用户施压条件下，证据无法可靠阻止模型发生“向用户立场靠拢”的反转。论文还发现三类失败模式：加入研究空白等较细致的认识论信息会增加部分模型的易受影响性；鲁棒性随规模变化呈非单调；不同模型在冲突下的输出分布集中度差异明显，部分蒸馏推理模型比对应指令微调模型更分散。
AI.conclusion: 仅仅提供更丰富的上下文证据，并不足以保证模型在用户压力下保持认识论忠实；若要提升抗诱导能力，还需要专门面向认识论完整性的训练。

title: MedSPOT: A Workflow-Aware Sequential Grounding Benchmark for Clinical GUI
summary: Despite the rapid progress of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), their ability to perform reliable visual grounding in high-stakes clinical software environments remains underexplored. Existing GUI benchmarks largely focus on isolated, single-step grounding queries, overlooking the sequential, workflow-driven reasoning required in real-world medical interfaces, where tasks evolve across independent steps and dynamic interface states. We introduce MedSPOT, a workflow-aware sequential grounding benchmark for clinical GUI environments. Unlike prior benchmarks that treat grounding as a standalone prediction task, MedSPOT models procedural interaction as a sequence of structured spatial decisions. The benchmark comprises 216 task-driven videos with 597 annotated keyframes, in which each task consists of 2 to 3 interdependent grounding steps within realistic medical workflows. This design captures interface hierarchies, contextual dependencies, and fine-grained spatial precision under evolving conditions. To evaluate procedural robustness, we propose a strict sequential evaluation protocol that terminates task assessment upon the first incorrect grounding prediction, explicitly measuring error propagation in multi-step workflows. We further introduce a comprehensive failure taxonomy, including edge bias, small-target errors, no prediction, near miss, far miss, and toolbar confusion, to enable systematic diagnosis of model behavior in clinical GUI settings. By shifting evaluation from isolated grounding to workflow-aware sequential reasoning, MedSPOT establishes a realistic and safety-critical benchmark for assessing multimodal models in medical software environments. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/Tajamul21/MedSPOT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MedSPOT，一个面向临床GUI环境的工作流感知序列化视觉定位基准，用于评估多模态大语言模型在真实医疗软件中的多步、上下文相关的空间推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI基准多聚焦单步、孤立的定位任务，无法反映医疗界面中任务跨步骤演化、界面状态动态变化以及高精度定位需求；因此需要一个更贴近真实临床工作流、且强调安全性的评测框架。
AI.method: 构建了MedSPOT基准，包含216段任务驱动视频和597个标注关键帧，每个任务由2到3个相互依赖的定位步骤组成；提出严格的序列评测协议，一旦某一步预测错误即终止该任务评估，以衡量错误传播；同时设计失败类型体系，包括边缘偏差、小目标错误、无预测、近似命中、远距离偏差和工具栏混淆。
AI.result: 该基准能够系统刻画模型在临床GUI中的层级理解、上下文依赖与细粒度空间精度表现，并通过失败分类辅助诊断模型在多步工作流中的具体弱点。
AI.conclusion: MedSPOT将评测重点从孤立定位转向工作流驱动的序列推理，为医疗软件场景下的多模态模型提供了更真实、更严格、也更具安全意义的评估标准。

title: When both Grounding and not Grounding are Bad -- A Partially Grounded Encoding of Planning into SAT (Extended Version)
summary: Classical planning problems are typically defined using lifted first-order representations, which offer compactness and generality. While most planners ground these representations to simplify reasoning, this can cause an exponential blowup in size. Recent approaches instead operate directly on the lifted level to avoid full grounding. We explore a middle ground between fully lifted and fully grounded planning by introducing three SAT encodings that keep actions lifted while partially grounding predicates. Unlike previous SAT encodings, which scale quadratically with plan length, our approach scales linearly, enabling better performance on longer plans. Empirically, our best encoding outperforms the state of the art in length-optimal planning on hard-to-ground domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种介于完全提升表示与完全接地表示之间的SAT规划编码：保持动作提升、仅对谓词部分接地，并将编码规模从随计划长度二次增长降为线性增长，从而提升长计划与难接地领域上的求解性能。
AI.motivation: 经典规划通常采用提升的一阶表示，虽然紧凑且通用，但大多数规划器会将其完全接地以简化推理，进而导致规模指数级膨胀。作者希望避免完全接地带来的开销，同时又保留SAT求解的高效性，因此探索“半提升、半接地”的折中方案。
AI.method: 作者设计了三种SAT编码方案：动作保持提升形式，谓词仅做部分接地；与以往SAT编码不同，这些编码不再对计划长度呈二次扩展，而是实现线性扩展。该设计旨在在不完全展开状态空间的前提下，保留足够结构信息以支持高效推理。
AI.result: 实验表明，作者提出的最佳编码在困难接地领域的长度最优规划任务上优于当前最先进方法，尤其在较长计划场景中表现更好。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了部分接地的SAT规划是一条有效路线：它兼顾了提升表示的紧凑性与SAT编码的可求解性，并通过线性规模增长显著改善了长计划和难接地问题的性能。

title: VGS-Decoding: Visual Grounding Score Guided Decoding for Hallucination Mitigation in Medical VLMs
summary: Medical Vision-Language Models (VLMs) often hallucinate by generating responses based on language priors rather than visual evidence, posing risks in clinical applications. We propose Visual Grounding Score Guided Decoding (VGS-Decoding), a training-free method to mitigate hallucinations during inference. Our key insight is that hallucinated tokens maintain or increase their probability when visual information is degraded, while visually grounded tokens decrease in probability. We introduce the Visual Grounding Score (VGS), which measures each token's visual dependency by comparing distributions from original and distorted images. During decoding, we reweight probabilities by amplifying visually grounded tokens while suppressing hallucinations. Unlike fixed-weight contrastive methods, VGS-Decoding provides per-token adaptive control. Experiments on MIMIC-Diff-VQA and VQA-RAD across LLaVA-Med, CheXagent, and MedGemma demonstrate consistent improvements, with up to +9.12% overall gain and $+8.98\%$ in open-ended recall, while introducing only $2\times$ inference overhead and no additional training, making it practical for clinical deployment. Upon acceptance, code will be released publicly to facilitate reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需训练的推理阶段解码方法VGS-Decoding，通过比较原图与失真图下的词元概率变化，计算视觉依赖分数并动态重加权，从而减少医学视觉语言模型的幻觉生成。
AI.motivation: 医学视觉语言模型容易依赖语言先验而忽视图像证据，导致幻觉回答，这在临床场景中可能带来风险，因此需要一种推理时即可部署的抑制幻觉方法。
AI.method: 方法核心是视觉锚定分数VGS：对每个词元，比较原始图像与失真图像条件下的概率分布，若词元在图像失真后概率维持或上升则视为更可能是幻觉词元，若概率下降则视为更具视觉依赖性。解码时根据VGS对词元概率进行自适应重加权，提升视觉锚定词元、抑制幻觉词元。该方法无需额外训练，属于推理阶段的训练自由方案。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-Diff-VQA和VQA-RAD上，结合LLaVA-Med、CheXagent和MedGemma进行实验，结果表明方法稳定提升性能，最高总体提升达9.12%，开放式召回提升达8.98%。代价是约2倍推理开销，但不需要额外训练。
AI.conclusion: VGS-Decoding是一种实用的医学VLM幻觉缓解方案，能够以较低部署门槛在推理阶段实现逐词元自适应控制，兼顾性能提升与临床可用性，且代码计划公开以支持复现。

title: Meanings and Measurements: Multi-Agent Probabilistic Grounding for Vision-Language Navigation
comment: Equal contribution: Swagat Padhan and Lakshya Jain, 9 pages, 6 figures, paper website: https://lakshya-asu.github.io/Meanings-Measurements-Multi-Agent-Probabilistic-Grounding/
summary: Robots collaborating with humans must convert natural language goals into actionable, physically grounded decisions. For example, executing a command such as "go two meters to the right of the fridge" requires grounding semantic references, spatial relations, and metric constraints within a 3D scene. While recent vision language models (VLMs) demonstrate strong semantic grounding capabilities, they are not explicitly designed to reason about metric constraints in physically defined spaces. In this work, we empirically demonstrate that state-of-the-art VLM-based grounding approaches struggle with complex metric-semantic language queries. To address this limitation, we propose MAPG (Multi-Agent Probabilistic Grounding), an agentic framework that decomposes language queries into structured subcomponents and queries a VLM to ground each component. MAPG then probabilistically composes these grounded outputs to produce metrically consistent, actionable decisions in 3D space. We evaluate MAPG on the HM-EQA benchmark and show consistent performance improvements over strong baselines. Furthermore, we introduce a new benchmark, MAPG-Bench, specifically designed to evaluate metric-semantic goal grounding, addressing a gap in existing language grounding evaluations. We also present a real-world robot demonstration showing that MAPG transfers beyond simulation when a structured scene representation is available.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有视觉语言模型在三维空间中的语义与度量联合推理能力不足，提出MAPG框架，通过多智能体分解查询并以概率方式组合各部分结果，实现更符合度量约束的目标定位，并在基准和真实机器人场景中验证有效性。
AI.motivation: 机器人与人协作时，需要把自然语言目标转换为可执行的、受物理空间约束的决策。仅有语义理解不够，还必须同时处理参照物、空间关系和距离等度量条件；而现有VLM方法并未专门针对这类复杂的语义-度量联合推理进行设计。
AI.method: 提出MAPG（Multi-Agent Probabilistic Grounding）框架：先将语言查询拆解为结构化子组件，再分别调用VLM对各组件进行落地，对这些结果进行概率化组合，得到在三维空间中度量一致、可执行的决策。同时构建MAPG-Bench用于评测度量-语义目标落地能力，并在HM-EQA基准及真实机器人系统中进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有最先进的VLM基础落地方法在复杂度量-语义查询上表现不足；MAPG在HM-EQA上相较强基线取得稳定性能提升。新增的MAPG-Bench补足了现有评测中对度量-语义目标落地的不足。真实机器人演示显示，在具备结构化场景表示时，MAPG可以从仿真迁移到现实。
AI.conclusion: MAPG说明，将复杂语言目标拆解为可解释子任务并进行概率式组合，是提升三维空间中度量-语义联合落地能力的有效途径；同时，该工作提出了更契合任务需求的新评测基准，为后续研究提供了参考。

title: ICE: Intervention-Consistent Explanation Evaluation with Statistical Grounding for LLMs
summary: Evaluating whether explanations faithfully reflect a model's reasoning remains an open problem. Existing benchmarks use single interventions without statistical testing, making it impossible to distinguish genuine faithfulness from chance-level performance. We introduce ICE (Intervention-Consistent Explanation), a framework that compares explanations against matched random baselines via randomization tests under multiple intervention operators, yielding win rates with confidence intervals. Evaluating 7 LLMs across 4 English tasks, 6 non-English languages, and 2 attribution methods, we find that faithfulness is operator-dependent: operator gaps reach up to 44 percentage points, with deletion typically inflating estimates on short text but the pattern reversing on long text, suggesting that faithfulness should be interpreted comparatively across intervention operators rather than as a single score. Randomized baselines reveal anti-faithfulness in one-third of configurations, and faithfulness shows zero correlation with human plausibility (|r| < 0.04). Multilingual evaluation reveals dramatic model-language interactions not explained by tokenization alone. We release the ICE framework and ICEBench benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ICE框架，用随机化检验和匹配随机基线来评估解释是否真实反映模型推理，并在多模型、多语言、多任务上发现：忠实性强烈依赖干预算子，且与人类可解释性几乎无关。
AI.motivation: 现有忠实性评测通常只使用单次干预，缺少统计检验，难以区分真实忠实与偶然表现，因此需要更稳健、可比较的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出ICE（Intervention-Consistent Explanation）框架，在多种干预算子下，将解释与匹配的随机基线进行比较，并使用随机化检验计算胜率及置信区间；进一步在7个大语言模型、4个英文任务、6种非英语语言和2种归因方法上进行评测。
AI.result: 实验发现忠实性高度依赖干预算子，算子间差距最高达44个百分点；删除算子在短文本上通常会高估忠实性，但在长文本上趋势相反；约三分之一配置中随机基线优于解释，出现反忠实性；忠实性与人类可理解性几乎无相关性（|r| < 0.04）；多语言结果显示明显的模型-语言交互效应，且不能仅由分词差异解释。
AI.conclusion: 忠实性不应被视为单一分数，而应在不同干预算子之间做相对比较；ICE与ICEBench为更严格、可复现的解释评测提供了工具。

title: Learning Consistent Temporal Grounding between Related Tasks in Sports Coaching
summary: Video-LLMs often attend to irrelevant frames, which is especially detrimental for sports coaching tasks requiring precise temporal grounding. Yet obtaining frame-level supervision is challenging: expensive to collect from humans and unreliable from other models. We improve temporal grounding without additional annotations by exploiting the observation that related tasks, such as generation and verification, must attend to the same frames. We enforce this via a self-consistency objective over select visual attention maps of tightly-related tasks. Using VidDiffBench, which provides ground-truth keyframe annotations, we first validate that attention misallocation is a significant bottleneck. We then show that training with our objective yields gains of +3.0%, +14.1% accuracy and +0.9 BERTScore over supervised finetuning across three sports coaching tasks: Exact, FitnessQA, and ExpertAF, even surpassing closed-source models.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对视频大语言模型在体育教学任务中容易关注无关帧的问题，提出一种无需额外帧级标注的自一致性训练方法，通过约束相关任务的注意力图对齐来提升时间定位能力。
AI.motivation: 视频大语言模型在需要精确时间定位的体育教学场景中，常会把注意力分配到无关帧上，影响生成、判断和回答质量。由于帧级监督标注成本高且来自其他模型的标注不稳定，作者希望在不增加标注的前提下改进时间聚焦能力。
AI.method: 核心方法是利用“相关任务应关注同一批关键帧”的假设，对紧密相关任务的若干视觉注意力图施加自一致性约束，从而让生成、验证等任务在时间维度上对齐。实验先借助VidDiffBench及其关键帧标注验证注意力错配确实是主要瓶颈，再在三个体育教学任务上进行训练与评测。
AI.result: 与监督微调相比，该方法在三个任务Exact、FitnessQA和ExpertAF上分别带来+3.0%、+14.1%的准确率提升以及+0.9的BERTScore提升，并且效果优于闭源模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，利用任务间共享的关键帧一致性可以有效缓解视频LLM的注意力错配问题，在无需额外人工标注的情况下显著提升体育教学场景中的时间定位与任务表现。

title: AndroTMem: From Interaction Trajectories to Anchored Memory in Long-Horizon GUI Agents
summary: Long-horizon GUI agents are a key step toward real-world deployment, yet effective interaction memory under prevailing paradigms remains under-explored. Replaying full interaction sequences is redundant and amplifies noise, while summaries often erase dependency-critical information and traceability. We present AndroTMem, a diagnostic framework for anchored memory in long-horizon Android GUI agents. Its core benchmark, AndroTMem-Bench, comprises 1,069 tasks with 34,473 interaction steps (avg. 32.1 per task, max. 65). We evaluate agents with TCR (Task Complete Rate), focusing on tasks whose completion requires carrying forward critical intermediate state; AndroTMem-Bench is designed to enforce strong step-to-step causal dependencies, making sparse yet essential intermediate states decisive for downstream actions and centering interaction memory in evaluation. Across open- and closed-source GUI agents, we observe a consistent pattern: as interaction sequences grow longer, performance drops are driven mainly by within-task memory failures, not isolated perception errors or local action mistakes. Guided by this diagnosis, we propose Anchored State Memory (ASM), which represents interaction sequences as a compact set of causally linked intermediate-state anchors to enable subgoal-targeted retrieval and attribution-aware decision making. Across multiple settings and 12 evaluated GUI agents, ASM consistently outperforms full-sequence replay and summary-based baselines, improving TCR by 5%-30.16% and AMS by 4.93%-24.66%, indicating that anchored, structured memory effectively mitigates the interaction-memory bottleneck in long-horizon GUI tasks. The code, benchmark, and related resources are publicly available at [https://github.com/CVC2233/AndroTMem](https://github.com/CVC2233/AndroTMem).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了用于长时程安卓GUI智能体的锚定记忆诊断框架AndroTMem，并构建了AndroTMem-Bench基准，用于评估任务执行过程中对关键中间状态的记忆能力；同时提出Anchored State Memory（ASM），以因果关联的中间状态锚点替代整段回放或简单摘要，显著提升任务完成率。
AI.motivation: 现有长时程GUI智能体在交互记忆方面研究不足。完整回放交互序列冗余且噪声较多，摘要又容易丢失关键依赖信息与可追溯性，因此需要一种能保留关键中间状态、支持因果推理的记忆机制。
AI.method: 作者提出AndroTMem诊断框架及其核心基准AndroTMem-Bench，包含1069个任务和34473步交互，并以TCR评估依赖关键中间状态的任务表现。基于对多种开源和闭源GUI智能体的分析，进一步提出ASM，将交互序列压缩为少量因果关联的状态锚点，实现面向子目标的检索与具备归因能力的决策。
AI.result: 实验覆盖12个GUI智能体。结果显示，随着交互序列变长，性能下降主要源于任务内记忆失败，而非单次感知错误或局部动作错误。ASM相较于整段回放和摘要式基线，在不同设置下将TCR提升5%到30.16%，将AMS提升4.93%到24.66%。
AI.conclusion: 长时程GUI任务中的核心瓶颈是交互记忆而非单步执行能力。基于因果锚点的结构化记忆ASM能够更有效保留关键中间状态，缓解长序列任务中的记忆退化问题，并优于传统的回放与摘要方法。

title: Part-Aware Open-Vocabulary 3D Affordance Grounding via Prototypical Semantic and Geometric Alignment
summary: Grounding natural language questions to functionally relevant regions in 3D objects -- termed language-driven 3D affordance grounding -- is essential for embodied intelligence and human-AI interaction. Existing methods, while progressing from label-based to language-driven approaches, still face challenges in open-vocabulary generalization, fine-grained geometric alignment, and part-level semantic consistency. To address these issues, we propose a novel two-stage cross-modal framework that enhances both semantic and geometric representations for open-vocabulary 3D affordance grounding. In the first stage, large language models generate part-aware instructions to recover missing semantics, enabling the model to link semantically similar affordances. In the second stage, we introduce two key components: Affordance Prototype Aggregation (APA), which captures cross-object geometric consistency for each affordance, and Intra-Object Relational Modeling (IORM), which refines geometric differentiation within objects to support precise semantic alignment. We validate the effectiveness of our method through extensive experiments on a newly introduced benchmark, as well as two existing benchmarks, demonstrating superior performance in comparison with existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于开放词汇三维功能区定位的两阶段跨模态框架，通过语言模型补充部件语义，并结合原型聚合与对象内关系建模，同时提升语义一致性与几何对齐精度，在新基准和两个现有基准上取得更优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有三维功能区定位方法在开放词汇泛化、细粒度几何对齐以及部件级语义一致性方面仍存在不足，难以满足自然语言到三维对象功能区域的精确映射需求。
AI.method: 第一阶段利用大语言模型生成部件感知指令，补全缺失语义并建立相近功能区域的语义关联；第二阶段引入功能原型聚合（APA）以建模跨对象的几何共性，同时采用对象内关系建模（IORM）增强对象内部不同部件的几何区分能力，从而实现更精确的语义与几何对齐。
AI.result: 作者在一个新提出的基准以及两个已有基准上进行了大量实验，结果表明该方法相比现有方法具有更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，结合语言侧语义补全与几何侧一致性建模，可以有效提升开放词汇三维功能区定位的准确性与泛化能力。

title: LoGSAM: Parameter-Efficient Cross-Modal Grounding for MRI Segmentation
summary: Precise localization and delineation of brain tumors using magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) are essential for planning therapy and guiding surgical decisions. To address this, we propose LoGSAM, a parameter-efficient, detection-driven framework that transforms radiologist dictation into text prompts for foundation-model-based localization and segmentation. Radiologist speech is first transcribed and translated using a pretrained Whisper ASR model, followed by negation-aware clinical NLP to extract tumor-specific textual prompts. These prompts guide text-conditioned tumor localization via a LoRA-adapted vision-language detection model, Grounding DINO (GDINO). The predicted bounding boxes are used as prompts for MedSAM to generate pixel-level tumor masks without any additional fine-tuning. On BRISC 2025, LoGSAM attains a Dice score of 80.32\%, reaching 98.6\% of a fully fine-tuned GDINO + MedSAM baseline while training fewer than 5\% of its parameters, indicating a favorable accuracy/parameter trade-off. In addition, we evaluate the full pipeline using German dictations from a board-certified radiologist on unseen MRI scans, achieving 91.7\% case-level class-extraction accuracy. These results highlight the feasibility of constructing a modular speech-to-segmentation pipeline from pretrained foundation models with minimal parameter updates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LoGSAM，一个将放射科语音记录转化为文本提示，并借助基础模型完成脑肿瘤定位与分割的参数高效框架，在几乎不微调的情况下取得了接近全量训练基线的性能。
AI.motivation: 脑肿瘤在MRI中的精确定位与勾画对治疗规划和手术决策很关键，但传统方法往往需要较多人工标注和大规模参数微调。作者希望利用放射科医生口述信息，构建一个模块化、低成本、可迁移的语音到分割流程。
AI.method: 首先使用预训练Whisper ASR将医生语音转写并翻译；随后通过考虑否定表达的临床NLP抽取肿瘤相关文本提示；再用LoRA适配的Grounding DINO进行文本条件下的肿瘤检测，得到边界框；最后将边界框作为MedSAM的输入提示生成像素级分割掩膜，整个分割阶段无需额外微调。
AI.result: 在BRISC 2025任务中，LoGSAM的Dice达到80.32%，相当于全量微调GDINO+MedSAM基线的98.6%，而训练参数不足其5%。此外，在未见MRI扫描上的德语口述测试中，整条流水线的病例级类别提取准确率达到91.7%。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，基于预训练基础模型并结合少量参数更新，可以构建一个高效、可模块化的语音到分割系统；LoGSAM在精度与参数效率之间取得了较好的平衡，具有实际应用潜力。

title: AdaZoom-GUI: Adaptive Zoom-based GUI Grounding with Instruction Refinement
summary: GUI grounding is a critical capability for vision-language models (VLMs) that enables automated interaction with graphical user interfaces by locating target elements from natural language instructions. However, grounding on GUI screenshots remains challenging due to high-resolution images, small UI elements, and ambiguous user instructions. In this work, we propose AdaZoom-GUI, an adaptive zoom-based GUI grounding framework that improves both localization accuracy and instruction understanding. Our approach introduces an instruction refinement module that rewrites natural language commands into explicit and detailed descriptions, allowing the grounding model to focus on precise element localization. In addition, we design a conditional zoom-in strategy that selectively performs a second-stage inference on predicted small elements, improving localization accuracy while avoiding unnecessary computation and context loss on simpler cases. To support this framework, we construct a high-quality GUI grounding dataset and train the grounding model using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), enabling the model to predict both click coordinates and element bounding boxes. Experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance among models with comparable or even larger parameter sizes, highlighting its effectiveness for high-resolution GUI understanding and practical GUI agent deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaZoom-GUI，一种自适应缩放的GUI定位框架，通过指令重写、条件式二次缩放推理和GRPO训练，提升了GUI元素定位精度与指令理解能力，并在公开基准上取得了领先表现。
AI.motivation: GUI截图具有高分辨率、元素尺寸小、指令表述含糊等特点，导致视觉语言模型在GUI grounding任务中难以准确定位目标元素，因此需要更强的界面理解与局部精定位能力。
AI.method: 1）设计指令精炼模块，将自然语言指令改写为更明确、细致的描述；2）提出条件式zoom-in策略，仅对预测为小目标的样本进行第二阶段推理，以提升定位精度并减少不必要计算；3）构建高质量GUI grounding数据集；4）使用Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）训练模型，使其同时预测点击坐标与元素边界框。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在公开基准上达到或超过与其参数量相当甚至更大的模型，体现出在高分辨率GUI理解和定位方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: AdaZoom-GUI通过指令增强、按需缩放和策略优化训练，有效缓解了GUI grounding中的小目标定位与指令歧义问题，适合用于实际GUI智能代理部署。

title: CABTO: Context-Aware Behavior Tree Grounding for Robot Manipulation
summary: Behavior Trees (BTs) offer a powerful paradigm for designing modular and reactive robot controllers. BT planning, an emerging field, provides theoretical guarantees for the automated generation of reliable BTs. However, BT planning typically assumes that a well-designed BT system is already grounded -- comprising high-level action models and low-level control policies -- which often requires extensive expert knowledge and manual effort. In this paper, we formalize the BT Grounding problem: the automated construction of a complete and consistent BT system. We analyze its complexity and introduce CABTO (Context-Aware Behavior Tree grOunding), the first framework to efficiently solve this challenge. CABTO leverages pre-trained Large Models (LMs) to heuristically search the space of action models and control policies, guided by contextual feedback from BT planners and environmental observations. Experiments spanning seven task sets across three distinct robotic manipulation scenarios demonstrate CABTO's effectiveness and efficiency in generating complete and consistent behavior tree systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了行为树接地问题，并给出首个求解框架CABTO，用预训练大模型结合规划器反馈与环境观测，自动构建完整且一致的行为树系统。
AI.motivation: 现有行为树规划通常默认已具备完善的高层动作模型和低层控制策略，但这些组件往往需要大量专家知识与人工设计，因此亟需一种自动化方法来减少人工成本并提升系统可靠性。
AI.method: 首先形式化定义行为树接地问题，并分析其复杂性；随后提出CABTO框架，利用预训练大模型对动作模型和控制策略空间进行启发式搜索，同时结合行为树规划器的上下文反馈与环境观测进行迭代修正。
AI.result: 在覆盖七个任务集、三种机器人操作场景的实验中，CABTO能够高效生成完整且一致的行为树系统，表现出良好的有效性与效率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究将行为树从“已接地后再规划”的假设推进到“自动接地再规划”的阶段，为机器人行为树系统的自动构建提供了可行且有效的新框架。

title: Kestrel: Grounding Self-Refinement for LVLM Hallucination Mitigation
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have become increasingly strong but remain prone to hallucinations in multimodal tasks, which significantly narrows their deployment. As training these LVLMs to avoid hallucinations becomes prohibitively expensive for larger models, training-free methods offer a cheap and flexible solution to this problem, yet existing approaches based on decoding or tool use often bring limited gains and/or weak interpretability. We propose Kestrel, a training-free framework for LVLM hallucination mitigation that combines an explicit visual-grounding agent with evidence-verified self-refinement mechanism. In detail, Kestrel first collects explicit visual evidence and converts tool outputs into reusable and structured textual evidence. Second, to take full advantage of these evidence, Kestrel verifies them via an LVLM judge for evidence checking, then iteratively self-refine answers based on verified evidence to reduce the risk of over-correction. Extensive experiments show that Kestrel improves performance over strong baselines across hallucination benchmarks (e.g., average +3.31% on POPE and +28.34 on MME-Hallucination with Qwen3-VL), while providing transparent verification traces for hallucination diagnosis and analysis -- e.g., both the integrated self-refinement module and grounding agent contributing an average +2.0% gain on POPE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个无需重新训练的大模型幻觉缓解框架Kestrel，通过“显式视觉证据收集 + 证据核验 + 迭代自我修正”来降低多模态问答中的幻觉，并兼顾性能与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型虽然能力很强，但在多模态任务中仍容易产生幻觉；而对更大模型进行针对性训练成本过高，因此需要一种低成本、灵活且可解释的训练-free方案。
AI.method: Kestrel包含两部分：一是显式视觉对齐代理，先收集视觉证据并将工具输出转成结构化、可复用的文本证据；二是基于证据核验的自我精炼机制，先用LVLM裁判检查证据，再根据已验证证据迭代修正答案，以减少过度修正带来的副作用。
AI.result: 实验显示，Kestrel在多个幻觉基准上优于强基线，例如在Qwen3-VL上，POPE平均提升3.31%，MME-Hallucination提升28.34分；同时，其自我精炼模块和grounding代理都带来约2.0%的平均增益。
AI.conclusion: Kestrel证明了训练-free的证据驱动方法可以有效缓解LVLM幻觉，并且通过透明的验证轨迹提升诊断与分析能力，兼顾了性能、成本与可解释性。

title: Attention-guided Evidence Grounding for Spoken Question Answering
summary: Spoken Question Answering (Spoken QA) presents a challenging cross-modal problem: effectively aligning acoustic queries with textual knowledge while avoiding the latency and error propagation inherent in cascaded ASR-based systems. In this paper, we introduce Attention-guided Evidence Grounding (AEG), a novel end-to-end framework that leverages the internal cross-modal attention of Speech Large Language Models (SpeechLLMs) to explicitly locate and ground key evidence in the model's latent space. To address the diffuse attention distribution in pre-trained models, we propose Learning to Focus on Evidence (LFE), a supervised fine-tuning paradigm that calibrates the model's attention mechanism to distinguish query-relevant segments from irrelevant context. Experiments on SQuAD, HotpotQA, and MuSiQue demonstrate that AEG reduces hallucinations and achieves strong efficiency gains, outperforming large-scale cascaded baselines (Whisper-Large-v3 + Reranker) while reducing inference latency by approximately 62%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向语音问答的端到端方法AEG，利用SpeechLLM内部跨模态注意力来定位并锚定关键证据，并通过LFE微调提升模型对相关语音片段的聚焦能力，从而减少幻觉并显著降低推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有基于ASR级联的语音问答系统存在延迟高、错误会级联传播的问题，因此需要一种能够直接对语音查询与文本知识进行对齐、同时提升证据定位能力的端到端方案。
AI.method: 提出Attention-guided Evidence Grounding（AEG）框架，利用SpeechLLM的跨模态注意力在潜在空间中显式定位证据；同时提出Learning to Focus on Evidence（LFE）监督微调范式，用于校准注意力分布，使模型更好地区分与问题相关的语音片段和无关上下文。
AI.result: 在SQuAD、HotpotQA和MuSiQue上，AEG减少了幻觉，并在效率上取得明显提升；相比大规模级联基线（Whisper-Large-v3 + Reranker），推理延迟约降低62%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，直接利用SpeechLLM内部注意力进行证据对齐与监督聚焦训练，可以有效提升语音问答的准确性与效率，为替代传统ASR级联范式提供了可行路径。

title: Grounding the Score: Explicit Visual Premise Verification for Reliable Vision-Language Process Reward Models
comment: 27 pages, 4 figures, 10 tables. Evaluated on VisualProcessBench and six multimodal reasoning benchmarks (LogicVista, MMMU, MathVerse-VO, MathVision, MathVista, WeMath). Includes ablations and causal analysis via controlled constraint corruption. Code: https://github.com/Qwen-Applications/EVPV-PRM
summary: Vision-language process reward models (VL-PRMs) are increasingly used to score intermediate reasoning steps and rerank candidates under test-time scaling. However, they often function as black-box judges: a low step score may reflect a genuine reasoning mistake or simply the verifier's misperception of the image. This entanglement between perception and reasoning leads to systematic false positives (rewarding hallucinated visual premises) and false negatives (penalizing correct grounded statements), undermining both reranking and error localization. We introduce Explicit Visual Premise Verification (EVPV), a lightweight verification interface that conditions step scoring on the reliability of the visual premises a step depends on. The policy is prompted to produce a step-wise visual checklist that makes required visual facts explicit, while a constraint extractor independently derives structured visual constraints from the input image. EVPV matches checklist claims against these constraints to compute a scalar visual reliability signal, and calibrates PRM step rewards via reliability gating: rewards for visually dependent steps are attenuated when reliability is low and preserved when reliability is high. This decouples perceptual uncertainty from logical evaluation without per-step tool calls. Experiments on VisualProcessBench and six multimodal reasoning benchmarks show that EVPV improves step-level verification and consistently boosts Best-of-N reranking accuracy over strong baselines. Furthermore, injecting controlled corruption into the extracted constraints produces monotonic performance degradation, providing causal evidence that the gains arise from constraint fidelity and explicit premise verification rather than incidental prompt effects. Code is available at: https://github.com/Qwen-Applications/EVPV-PRM

AI.tldr: 本文提出显式视觉前提验证（EVPV），用视觉可靠性信号对视觉语言过程奖励模型的步骤打分进行门控，从而将感知不确定性与逻辑评估解耦，提升多模态推理中的步骤验证与重排序效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言过程奖励模型在给中间推理步骤打分时，常把“看错图”和“推理错误”混在一起，导致对幻觉前提的误奖和对正确但依赖视觉证据语句的误罚，影响重排序和错误定位。
AI.method: EVPV引入轻量级验证接口：一方面让策略生成逐步视觉检查清单，显式列出所需视觉事实；另一方面由约束抽取器从图像中独立提取结构化视觉约束。随后将清单与约束匹配得到视觉可靠性分数，并用可靠性门控校准PRM的步骤奖励：当可靠性低时削弱依赖视觉的步骤奖励，高时保留奖励，从而无需对每一步调用外部工具。
AI.result: 在VisualProcessBench和6个多模态推理基准上，EVPV提升了步骤级验证性能，并在Best-of-N重排序准确率上稳定优于强基线；此外，对抽取约束进行受控破坏会导致性能单调下降，说明收益来自约束保真度和显式前提验证。
AI.conclusion: EVPV通过把视觉前提可靠性显式纳入过程奖励建模，缓解了感知与推理耦合问题，是一种简单、有效且可解释的多模态步骤评估与重排序增强方法。

title: Grounding World Simulation Models in a Real-World Metropolis
summary: What if a world simulation model could render not an imagined environment but a city that actually exists? Prior generative world models synthesize visually plausible yet artificial environments by imagining all content. We present Seoul World Model (SWM), a city-scale world model grounded in the real city of Seoul. SWM anchors autoregressive video generation through retrieval-augmented conditioning on nearby street-view images. However, this design introduces several challenges, including temporal misalignment between retrieved references and the dynamic target scene, limited trajectory diversity and data sparsity from vehicle-mounted captures at sparse intervals. We address these challenges through cross-temporal pairing, a large-scale synthetic dataset enabling diverse camera trajectories, and a view interpolation pipeline that synthesizes coherent training videos from sparse street-view images. We further introduce a Virtual Lookahead Sink to stabilize long-horizon generation by continuously re-grounding each chunk to a retrieved image at a future location. We evaluate SWM against recent video world models across three cities: Seoul, Busan, and Ann Arbor. SWM outperforms existing methods in generating spatially faithful, temporally consistent, long-horizon videos grounded in actual urban environments over trajectories reaching hundreds of meters, while supporting diverse camera movements and text-prompted scenario variations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Seoul World Model（SWM），一种以真实城市街景为基础的城市级世界模型，能够生成与实际城市环境空间一致、时间连贯的长时程视频，并支持多样相机轨迹与文本提示变化。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式世界模型主要“想象”虚构环境，虽然视觉上合理，但缺乏对真实城市空间的锚定能力；在真实街景条件下还面临时序错位、轨迹多样性不足和稀疏采集带来的数据缺口等问题。
AI.method: SWM通过检索增强条件，将自回归视频生成锚定到附近街景图像上；针对时序错位，采用跨时间配对；针对轨迹多样性和数据稀疏，构建大规模合成数据集并引入视角插值管线，从稀疏街景图像合成连贯训练视频；同时提出Virtual Lookahead Sink，在长距离生成中持续将生成过程重新锚定到未来位置的检索图像，以提升稳定性。
AI.result: 在首尔、釜山和安娜堡三座城市的评测中，SWM相较近期视频世界模型表现更优，生成结果在空间真实性、时间一致性和长时程稳定性方面更强，且可覆盖数百米轨迹，并支持多种相机运动和文本驱动场景变化。
AI.conclusion: SWM证明了将世界模型直接锚定到真实城市街景是可行的，并为真实城市尺度的长时程视频生成提供了一套有效方案。

title: GUI-CEval: A Hierarchical and Comprehensive Chinese Benchmark for Mobile GUI Agents
summary: Recent progress in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has enabled mobile GUI agents capable of visual perception, cross-modal reasoning, and interactive control. However, existing benchmarks are largely English-centric and fail to capture the linguistic and interaction characteristics of the Chinese mobile ecosystem. They also focus on isolated skills such as GUI grounding or offline agent, lacking a unified and fine-grained framework to assess the full capability chain from perception to execution. To address this gap, we introduce GUI-CEval, the first comprehensive benchmark for Chinese mobile GUI agents, built entirely on physical device environments. GUI-CEval spans 201 mainstream apps across four device types and adopts a two-level structure that evaluates both atomic abilities and realistic application-level performance along five dimensions: perception, planning, reflection, execution, and evaluation. All data are collected and verified through multi-stage manual processes to ensure authenticity and reproducibility. Extensive experiments on 20 representative MLLMs and multi-agent systems show that while models such as Qwen2.5-VL and UI-TARS perform competitively, most MLLMs still exhibit clear weaknesses in reflective decision-making and post-action self-evaluation, limiting their reliability in real-world interactions. We hope GUI-CEval provides a comprehensive and interpretable benchmark to guide capability diagnosis and advance the development of Chinese mobile GUI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GUI-CEval，一个面向中文移动GUI智能体的综合基准，覆盖真实物理设备上的201个主流应用，并从感知、规划、反思、执行、评估五个维度，系统评测多模态大模型与多智能体系统的端到端能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基准多以英文为主，且主要聚焦单一技能，无法充分反映中文移动生态中的语言特征与交互复杂性，也缺少从感知到执行的统一细粒度评测框架，因此需要一个更贴近真实场景的中文移动GUI评测基准。
AI.method: 构建GUI-CEval，全部数据来自物理设备环境；覆盖201个主流应用、4类设备；采用双层结构，同时评估原子能力与应用级真实任务表现；通过多阶段人工采集与核验保证数据真实性和可复现性，并在20个代表性多模态大模型及多智能体系统上开展实验。
AI.result: 实验显示，Qwen2.5-VL和UI-TARS等模型表现相对较好，但大多数模型在反思性决策与动作后的自我评估方面仍明显薄弱，说明其在真实交互中的可靠性仍有限。
AI.conclusion: GUI-CEval为中文移动GUI智能体提供了一个全面、可解释的诊断型基准，可用于识别能力短板、比较模型性能，并推动中文移动端智能体的进一步发展。

title: RealVLG-R1: A Large-Scale Real-World Visual-Language Grounding Benchmark for Robotic Perception and Manipulation
summary: Visual-language grounding aims to establish semantic correspondences between natural language and visual entities, enabling models to accurately identify and localize target objects based on textual instructions. Existing VLG approaches focus on coarse-grained, object-level localization, while traditional robotic grasping methods rely predominantly on geometric cues and lack language guidance, which limits their applicability in language-driven manipulation scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose the RealVLG framework, which integrates the RealVLG-11B dataset and the RealVLG-R1 model to unify real-world visual-language grounding and grasping tasks. RealVLG-11B dataset provides multi-granularity annotations including bounding boxes, segmentation masks, grasp poses, contact points, and human-verified fine-grained language descriptions, covering approximately 165,000 images, over 800 object instances, 1.3 million segmentation, detection, and language annotations, and roughly 11 billion grasping examples. Building on this dataset, RealVLG-R1 employs Reinforcement Fine-tuning on pretrained large-scale vision-language models to predict bounding boxes, segmentation masks, grasp poses, and contact points in a unified manner given natural language instructions. Experimental results demonstrate that RealVLG supports zero-shot perception and manipulation in real-world unseen environments, establishing a unified semantic-visual multimodal benchmark that provides a comprehensive data and evaluation platform for language-driven robotic perception and grasping policy learning. All data and code are publicly available at https://github.com/lif314/RealVLG-R1.

AI.tldr: 提出了RealVLG统一框架，将真实世界的视觉语言定位与抓取任务整合到同一数据与模型体系中，支持基于自然语言指令的多粒度感知与操作。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言定位方法主要停留在粗粒度目标级定位，而传统机器人抓取方法依赖几何信息、缺乏语言引导，难以适用于语言驱动的操作场景，因此需要统一真实环境下的视觉-语言-抓取能力。
AI.method: 构建RealVLG-11B数据集，包含边界框、分割掩码、抓取姿态、接触点和人工校验的细粒度语言描述等多粒度标注；在此基础上提出RealVLG-R1模型，利用预训练大规模视觉语言模型进行强化微调，以自然语言指令统一预测边界框、分割掩码、抓取姿态和接触点。
AI.result: 数据集覆盖约16.5万张图像、800余个物体实例、130万条分割/检测/语言标注以及约110亿个抓取样本；实验表明该框架可在真实未见环境中实现零样本感知与操作，并提供统一的基准、数据和评测平台。
AI.conclusion: RealVLG将视觉语言定位与机器人抓取统一到一个真实世界多模态框架中，为语言驱动的机器人感知与抓取策略学习提供了更全面的数据和评测基础。

title: Medical Image Spatial Grounding with Semantic Sampling
summary: Vision language models (VLMs) have shown significant promise in visual grounding for images as well as videos. In medical imaging research, VLMs represent a bridge between object detection and segmentation, and report understanding and generation. However, spatial grounding of anatomical structures in the three-dimensional space of medical images poses many unique challenges. In this study, we examine image modalities, slice directions, and coordinate systems as differentiating factors for vision components of VLMs, and the use of anatomical, directional, and relational terminology as factors for the language components. We then demonstrate that visual and textual prompting systems such as labels, bounding boxes, and mask overlays have varying effects on the spatial grounding ability of VLMs. To enable measurement and reproducibility, we introduce MIS-Ground, a benchmark that comprehensively tests a VLM for vulnerabilities against specific modes of Medical Image Spatial Grounding. We release MIS-Ground to the public at github.com/asy51/mis-ground. In addition, we present MIS-SemSam, a low-cost, inference-time, and model-agnostic optimization of VLMs that improves their spatial grounding ability with the use of Semantic Sampling. We find that MIS-SemSam improves the accuracy of Qwen3-VL-32B on MIS-Ground by 13.06%.

AI.tldr: 该研究面向医学影像中的视觉语言模型空间定位能力，提出了用于评测的基准MIS-Ground，并给出一种低成本、推理时、与模型无关的优化方法MIS-SemSam，利用语义采样提升空间定位表现。
AI.motivation: 医学影像中的三维解剖结构空间定位比普通图像更复杂，现有视觉语言模型在不同模态、切片方向、坐标系统以及医学术语理解上容易出现脆弱性，因此需要系统评测其空间定位能力并探索改进方法。
AI.method: 作者从视觉与语言两部分分析影响因素：视觉侧包括图像模态、切片方向和坐标系；语言侧包括解剖、方向与关系术语，并比较标签、边界框、掩膜叠加等提示方式对定位能力的影响。基于此构建了MIS-Ground基准，用于测试模型在特定医学图像空间定位模式下的漏洞；同时提出MIS-SemSam，通过语义采样在推理阶段进行无模型依赖优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，不同视觉/文本提示对VLM空间定位能力影响显著。MIS-SemSam可在MIS-Ground上将Qwen3-VL-32B的准确率提升13.06%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作说明医学影像空间定位是VLM的重要薄弱环节，MIS-Ground为可复现评测提供了工具，MIS-SemSam则证明无需额外训练也能有效增强模型在医学图像中的空间 grounding 能力。

title: How Do Medical MLLMs Fail? A Study on Visual Grounding in Medical Images
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026
summary: Generalist multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved impressive performance across a wide range of vision-language tasks. However, their performance on medical tasks, particularly in zero-shot settings where generalization is critical, remains suboptimal. A key research gap is the limited understanding of why medical MLLMs underperform in medical image interpretation. In this work, we present a pioneering systematic investigation into the visual grounding capabilities of state-of-the-art medical MLLMs. To disentangle visual grounding from semantic grounding, we design VGMED, a novel evaluation dataset developed with expert clinical guidance, explicitly assessing the visual grounding capability of medical MLLMs. We introduce new quantitative metrics and conduct detailed qualitative analyses. Our study across eight state-of-the-art (SOTA) medical MLLMs validates that they often fail to ground their predictions in clinically relevant image regions. We note that this finding is specific to medical image analysis; in contrast, prior work has shown that MLLMs are capable of grounding their predictions in the correct image regions when applied to natural scene images. Motivated by these findings, we propose VGRefine, a simple yet effective inference-time method that refines attention distribution to improve visual grounding in medical settings. Our approach achieves SOTA performance across 6 diverse Med-VQA benchmarks (over 110K VQA samples from 8 imaging modalities) without requiring additional training or external expert models. Overall, our work, for the first time, systematically validates inadequate visual grounding as one of the key contributing factors for medical MLLMs' under-performance. Additional experiments are included in the Supp.

AI.tldr: 该工作系统性研究了医疗多模态大语言模型在医学图像任务中的视觉定位能力，发现其常常不能把预测建立在临床相关区域上，并据此提出推理阶段改进方法VGRefine，在多个Med-VQA基准上取得最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有通用多模态大模型在医学任务，尤其是零样本场景下表现不足，但原因并不清晰。作者关注的核心问题是：医疗MLLM性能欠佳是否与视觉 grounding 不充分有关。
AI.method: 作者构建了在临床专家指导下的评测数据集VGMED，用于区分视觉 grounding 与语义 grounding，并提出新的定量指标与定性分析。随后对8个SOTA医疗MLLM进行系统评估，验证其在医学图像中常难以定位到临床相关区域。基于此，提出推理阶段方法VGRefine，通过优化注意力分布来增强视觉定位能力，无需额外训练或外部专家模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，多数医疗MLLM在视觉 grounding 上表现不佳，这一问题在医学图像分析中尤为明显。VGRefine在6个不同的Med-VQA基准上取得了SOTA结果，覆盖超过11万条VQA样本和8种成像模态。
AI.conclusion: 论文首次系统证明：视觉定位不足是医疗MLLM性能欠佳的重要原因之一。通过专门评测与推理时改进，能够显著提升医学场景下的多模态问答效果。

title: Script-to-Slide Grounding: Grounding Script Sentences to Slide Objects for Automatic Instructional Video Generation
comment: The 21st International Conference on E-Service and Knowledge Management (ESKM 2025-Winter)
summary: While slide-based videos augmented with visual effects are widely utilized in education and research presentations, the video editing process -- particularly applying visual effects to ground spoken content to slide objects -- remains highly labor-intensive. This study aims to develop a system that automatically generates such instructional videos from slides and corresponding scripts. As a foundational step, this paper proposes and formulates Script-to-Slide Grounding (S2SG), defined as the task of grounding script sentences to their corresponding slide objects. Furthermore, as an initial step, we propose ``Text-S2SG,'' a method that utilizes a large language model (LLM) to perform this grounding task for text objects. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves high performance (F1-score: 0.924). The contribution of this work is the formalization of a previously implicit slide-based video editing process into a computable task, thereby paving the way for its automation.

AI.tldr: 本文将“脚本内容与幻灯片对象对齐”形式化为脚本到幻灯片关联（S2SG）任务，并提出基于大语言模型的Text-S2SG方法，实现对文本对象的自动对齐，实验取得较高性能（F1=0.924）。
AI.motivation: 面向教育和研究展示的幻灯片视频常需要添加视觉效果来对应口述内容，但这一编辑过程依赖人工逐句、逐对象匹配，成本高、效率低。作者希望为自动生成此类教学视频建立基础能力。
AI.method: 首先定义脚本到幻灯片关联（S2SG）任务，即将脚本中的句子映射到其对应的幻灯片对象。然后提出Text-S2SG，利用大语言模型对文本类幻灯片对象执行关联判断，作为该任务的初步实现。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法表现较好，F1分数达到0.924，说明LLM在文本对象对齐上具有较强能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究的核心贡献在于把原本隐式的幻灯片视频编辑环节显式化、可计算化，并验证了LLM用于脚本与幻灯片对象对齐的可行性，为后续自动化视频生成系统奠定了基础。

title: Think and Answer ME: Benchmarking and Exploring Multi-Entity Reasoning Grounding in Remote Sensing
summary: Recent advances in reasoning language models and reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards have significantly enhanced multi-step reasoning capabilities. This progress motivates the extension of reasoning paradigms to remote sensing visual grounding task. However, existing remote sensing grounding methods remain largely confined to perception-level matching and single-entity formulations, limiting the role of explicit reasoning and inter-entity modeling. To address this challenge, we introduce a new benchmark dataset for Multi-Entity Reasoning Grounding in Remote Sensing (ME-RSRG). Based on ME-RSRG, we reformulate remote sensing grounding as a multi-entity reasoning task and propose an Entity-Aware Reasoning (EAR) framework built upon visual-linguistic foundation models. EAR generates structured reasoning traces and subject-object grounding outputs. It adopts supervised fine-tuning for cold-start initialization and is further optimized via entity-aware reward-driven Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Extensive experiments on ME-RSRG demonstrate the challenges of multi-entity reasoning and verify the effectiveness of our proposed EAR framework. Our dataset, code, and models will be available at https://github.com/CV-ShuchangLyu/ME-RSRG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向遥感视觉定位的新基准ME-RSRG，并将任务从单实体感知匹配重新定义为多实体推理定位；同时提出Entity-Aware Reasoning（EAR）框架，结合结构化推理轨迹、监督微调与基于实体感知奖励的GRPO优化，以提升多实体关联与推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感目标定位方法多停留在感知层面的单实体匹配，缺少显式推理和实体间关系建模；而推理语言模型与可验证奖励强化学习的进展表明，将多步推理引入该任务具有潜力，因此需要新的数据集、任务定义和方法来支持多实体推理定位。
AI.method: 1）构建ME-RSRG数据集，专门用于多实体推理遥感定位；2）将遥感定位重述为多实体推理任务；3）提出EAR框架，基于视觉-语言基础模型生成结构化推理轨迹及主体-客体定位结果；4）先用监督微调进行冷启动，再用实体感知奖励驱动的Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）进行进一步优化。
AI.result: 在ME-RSRG上的实验表明，多实体推理定位确实具有挑战性；同时，EAR框架在该基准上验证了有效性，说明显式推理建模和实体感知强化优化能够提升遥感视觉定位表现。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过新基准和新框架推动了遥感视觉定位从单实体感知匹配迈向多实体推理建模，为后续研究提供了数据、代码和模型资源，并为引入可验证奖励式强化学习解决视觉定位推理问题提供了实践路径。

title: Mastering Negation: Boosting Grounding Models via Grouped Opposition-Based Learning
summary:
Current vision-language detection and grounding models predominantly focus on prompts with positive semantics and often struggle to accurately interpret and ground complex expressions containing negative semantics. A key reason for this limitation is the lack of high-quality training data that explicitly captures discriminative negative samples and negation-aware language descriptions.
  To address this challenge, we introduce D-Negation, a new dataset that provides objects annotated with both positive and negative semantic descriptions. Building upon the observation that negation reasoning frequently appears in natural language, we further propose a grouped opposition-based learning framework that learns negation-aware representations from limited samples. Specifically, our method organizes opposing semantic descriptions from D-Negation into structured groups and formulates two complementary loss functions that encourage the model to reason about negation and semantic qualifiers.
  We integrate the proposed dataset and learning strategy into a state-of-the-art language-based grounding model. By fine-tuning fewer than 10 percent of the model parameters, our approach achieves improvements of up to 4.4 mAP and 5.7 mAP on positive and negative semantic evaluations, respectively. These results demonstrate that explicitly modeling negation semantics can substantially enhance the robustness and localization accuracy of vision-language grounding models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向否定语义的视觉-语言检测与定位方法：构建D-Negation数据集，并设计分组对立学习框架，以增强模型对否定表达和语义限定词的理解，从而提升定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言检测与定位模型主要擅长处理正向语义提示，但对包含否定语义的复杂表达理解不足。根本原因在于缺少高质量训练数据，尤其是显式包含区分性负样本和否定感知语言描述的数据。
AI.method: 首先，构建D-Negation数据集，为目标对象同时提供正向与负向语义描述。其次，提出分组对立学习框架，将对立语义描述组织成结构化分组，并设计两个互补损失函数，分别促进模型学习否定推理与语义限定能力。最后，将该数据集与学习策略集成到现有语言驱动定位模型中，仅微调少于10%的参数。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在正向语义评估上最高提升4.4 mAP，在负向语义评估上最高提升5.7 mAP，说明引入否定语义建模可以明显增强模型的鲁棒性和定位精度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，显式建模否定语义并结合针对性的训练数据与学习机制，能够有效弥补现有视觉-语言定位模型在复杂表达理解上的短板，并显著提升性能。

title: HATS: Hardness-Aware Trajectory Synthesis for GUI Agents
summary: Graphical user interface (GUI) agents powered by large vision-language models (VLMs) have shown remarkable potential in automating digital tasks, highlighting the need for high-quality trajectory data to support effective agent training. Yet existing trajectory synthesis pipelines often yield agents that fail to generalize beyond simple interactions. We identify this limitation as stemming from the neglect of semantically ambiguous actions, whose meanings are context-dependent, sequentially dependent, or visually ambiguous. Such actions are crucial for real-world robustness but are under-represented and poorly processed in current datasets, leading to semantic misalignment between task instructions and execution. To address these issues, we propose HATS, a Hardness-Aware Trajectory Synthesis framework designed to mitigate the impact of semantic ambiguity. We define hardness as the degree of semantic ambiguity associated with an action and develop two complementary modules: (1) hardness-driven exploration, which guides data collection toward ambiguous yet informative interactions, and (2) alignment-guided refinement, which iteratively validates and repairs instruction-execution alignment. The two modules operate in a closed loop: exploration supplies refinement with challenging trajectories, while refinement feedback updates the hardness signal to guide future exploration. Extensive experiments show that agents trained with HATS consistently outperform state-of-the-art baselines across benchmark GUI environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HATS，一种面向GUI智能体轨迹合成的困难度感知框架，重点解决语义歧义动作被低估、导致训练数据与任务指令错配的问题，从而提升智能体泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI轨迹合成流程主要覆盖简单交互，忽视了语义含糊、依赖上下文或视觉上不明确的动作，导致训练数据质量不足，智能体在真实场景中泛化较差。作者认为，核心瓶颈是指令与执行之间存在语义对齐偏差。
AI.method: 提出HATS框架，将“困难度”定义为动作语义歧义程度，并设计两个互补模块：1）基于困难度的探索，用于优先采集更具歧义性但信息量更高的交互轨迹；2）对齐引导的细化，用于反复验证并修复指令与执行的对应关系。两模块形成闭环：探索提供挑战性轨迹，细化结果再反向更新困难度信号，指导后续探索。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用HATS训练的智能体在多个GUI基准环境中均稳定优于现有最优基线，说明该方法能有效提升轨迹数据质量和智能体性能。
AI.conclusion: HATS通过显式建模语义歧义并以闭环方式优化轨迹合成过程，能够减少语义错配，增强GUI智能体对复杂交互的鲁棒性与泛化能力。

title: LoV3D: Grounding Cognitive Prognosis Reasoning in Longitudinal 3D Brain MRI via Regional Volume Assessments
summary: Longitudinal brain MRI is essential for characterizing the progression of neurological diseases such as Alzheimer's disease assessment. However, current deep-learning tools fragment this process: classifiers reduce a scan to a label, volumetric pipelines produce uninterpreted measurements, and vision-language models (VLMs) may generate fluent but potentially hallucinated conclusions. We present LoV3D, a pipeline for training 3D vision-language models, which reads longitudinal T1-weighted brain MRI, produces a region-level anatomical assessment, conducts longitudinal comparison with the prior scan, and finally outputs a three-class diagnosis (Cognitively Normal, Mild Cognitive Impairment, or Dementia) along with a synthesized diagnostic summary. The stepped pipeline grounds the final diagnosis by enforcing label consistency, longitudinal coherence, and biological plausibility, thereby reducing the risks of hallucinations. The training process introduces a clinically-weighted Verifier that scores candidate outputs automatically against normative references derived from standardized volume metrics, driving Direct Preference Optimization without a single human annotation. On a subject-level held-out ADNI test set (479 scans, 258 subjects), LoV3D achieves 93.7% three-class diagnostic accuracy (+34.8% over the no-grounding baseline), 97.2% on two-class diagnosis accuracy (+4% over the SOTA) and 82.6% region-level anatomical classification accuracy (+33.1% over VLM baselines). Zero-shot transfer yields 95.4% on MIRIAD (100% Dementia recall) and 82.9% three-class accuracy on AIBL, confirming high generalizability across sites, scanners, and populations. Code is available at https://github.com/Anonymous-TEVC/LoV-3D.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LoV3D，一种用于纵向3D脑MRI的视觉-语言模型流程，可同时完成区域级解剖评估、与前次扫描的纵向比较，并输出三分类诊断和综合摘要。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在脑MRI分析中存在功能割裂：分类器只能给出标签，体积分析缺乏可解释性，视觉-语言模型又可能生成不可靠结论，因此需要一种兼顾诊断准确性、纵向一致性和生物学合理性的统一框架。
AI.method: 作者构建了LoV3D训练与推理流水线，输入纵向T1加权脑MRI，先生成区域级解剖评估，再与前次扫描进行纵向比较，最后输出认知正常、轻度认知障碍或痴呆三分类诊断及摘要；训练中引入临床加权Verifier，基于标准化体积指标形成规范参考，对候选输出自动打分，并通过Direct Preference Optimization进行优化，无需人工标注。
AI.result: 在ADNI独立测试集上，LoV3D达到93.7%的三分类准确率，较无约束基线提升34.8%；两分类准确率为97.2%，超过当前最优方法4%；区域级解剖分类准确率为82.6%，较VLM基线提升33.1%。零样本迁移到MIRIAD和AIBL时分别取得95.4%和82.9%的表现，显示出较强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LoV3D证明了通过标签一致性、纵向一致性和生物学可解释性约束，可以显著提升纵向脑MRI诊断的可靠性与泛化性，并有效降低视觉-语言模型的幻觉风险。

title: Towards High-Fidelity CAD Generation via LLM-Driven Program Generation and Text-Based B-Rep Primitive Grounding
summary: The field of Computer-Aided Design (CAD) generation has made significant progress in recent years. Existing methods typically fall into two separate categories: parametric CAD modeling and direct boundary representation (B-Rep) synthesis. In modern feature-based CAD systems, parametric modeling and B-Rep are inherently intertwined, as advanced parametric operations (e.g., fillet and chamfer) require explicit selection of B-Rep geometric primitives, and the B-Rep itself is derived from parametric operations. Consequently, this paradigm gap remains a critical factor limiting AI-driven CAD modeling for complex industrial product design. This paper presents FutureCAD, a novel text-to-CAD framework that leverages large language models (LLMs) and a B-Rep grounding transformer (BRepGround) for high-fidelity CAD generation. Our method generates executable CadQuery scripts, and introduces a text-based query mechanism that enables the LLM to specify geometric selections via natural language, which BRepGround then grounds to the target primitives. To train our framework, we construct a new dataset comprising real-world CAD models. For the LLM, we apply supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to establish fundamental CAD generation capabilities, followed by reinforcement learning (RL) to improve generalization. Experiments show that FutureCAD achieves state-of-the-art CAD generation performance. Code and dataset are available at: https://github.com/JohanStackk/FutureCAD

AI.tldr: 本文提出FutureCAD，一个结合大语言模型与B-Rep定位模块的文本到CAD生成框架，旨在弥合参数化建模与边界表示之间的鸿沟，生成可执行的CadQuery脚本以提升CAD生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有CAD生成方法通常分为参数化CAD建模和直接B-Rep合成两类，但在真实特征化CAD系统中，两者本质上是耦合的，尤其像圆角、倒角等高级操作需要显式选择B-Rep几何基元。由于这种范式差异，AI在复杂工业产品CAD建模中的效果受限。
AI.method: FutureCAD采用两阶段框架：一是让LLM生成可执行的CadQuery脚本；二是引入BRepGround变换器，通过文本查询机制将自然语言中的几何选择需求映射到目标B-Rep基元。训练上，作者构建了一个真实世界CAD模型数据集，并对LLM先进行监督微调以学习基础CAD生成能力，再通过强化学习提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，FutureCAD在CAD生成任务上取得了当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了将LLM的代码生成能力与B-Rep几何定位能力结合，可以更有效地支持高保真、复杂工业级CAD生成，并为文本到CAD研究提供了新的统一建模思路。

title: VisDoT : Enhancing Visual Reasoning through Human-Like Interpretation Grounding and Decomposition of Thought
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) struggle to reliably detect visual primitives in charts and align them with semantic representations, which severely limits their performance on complex visual reasoning. This lack of perceptual grounding constitutes a major bottleneck for chart-based reasoning. We propose VisDoT, a framework that enhances visual reasoning through human-like interpretation grounding. We formalize four perceptual tasks based on the theory of graphical perception, including position and length. Building on this foundation, we introduce Decomposition-of-Thought (DoT) prompting, which sequentially separates questions into visual perception sub-questions and logic sub-questions. Fine-tuning InternVL with VisDoT achieves a +11.2% improvement on ChartQA and surpasses GPT-4o on the more challenging ChartQAPro benchmark. On the newly introduced VisDoTQA benchmark, the model improves by +33.2%. Furthermore, consistent zero-shot gains on diverse open-domain VQA benchmarks confirm the generalizability of the perception-logic separation strategy for visual question answering. VisDoT leverages human-like perception to enhance visual grounding, achieving state-of-the-art chart understanding and interpretable visual reasoning.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出VisDoT框架，通过将图表问答中的感知与逻辑推理分离，增强大视觉语言模型的视觉落地能力，从而显著提升图表理解与视觉推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有大视觉语言模型在图表场景中难以稳定识别视觉基本元素并与语义对齐，导致复杂推理能力受限；其核心瓶颈是感知基础不牢固。
AI.method: 基于图形知觉理论，作者定义了四类感知任务，重点覆盖位置和长度等图表视觉原语；在此基础上提出Decomposition-of-Thought（DoT）提示策略，将问题按顺序拆解为视觉感知子问题和逻辑子问题；并对InternVL进行VisDoT微调以增强视觉 grounding。
AI.result: 在ChartQA上提升11.2%；在更难的ChartQAPro上超过GPT-4o；在新建的VisDoTQA基准上提升33.2%；同时在多个开放域VQA基准上也取得一致的零样本增益。
AI.conclusion: VisDoT通过引入类人感知建模与感知-逻辑分离的推理方式，显著增强了图表理解与可解释视觉推理能力，并展现出较强的泛化性，可作为提升LVLM图表推理性能的有效框架。

title: See, Symbolize, Act: Grounding VLMs with Spatial Representations for Better Gameplay
comment: 11 pages, 13 figures. Accepted to LMReasoning Workshop at AAAI 2026
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) excel at describing visual scenes, yet struggle to translate perception into precise, grounded actions. We investigate whether providing VLMs with both the visual frame and the symbolic representation of the scene can improve their performance in interactive environments. We evaluate three state-of-the-art VLMs across Atari games, VizDoom, and AI2-THOR, comparing frame-only, frame with self-extracted symbols, frame with ground-truth symbols, and symbol-only pipelines. Our results indicate that all models benefit when the symbolic information is accurate. However, when VLMs extract symbols themselves, performance becomes dependent on model capability and scene complexity. We further investigate how accurately VLMs can extract symbolic information from visual inputs and how noise in these symbols affects decision-making and gameplay performance. Our findings reveal that symbolic grounding is beneficial in VLMs only when symbol extraction is reliable, and highlight perception quality as a central bottleneck for future VLM-based agents.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在交互式环境中，给视觉-语言模型同时提供图像帧与场景符号表示是否能提升行动决策。结果表明，准确的符号信息能显著帮助模型，但若符号由模型自行提取且不够可靠，性能会受模型能力和场景复杂度限制。
AI.motivation: 作者关注视觉-语言模型在描述场景方面较强，但将感知转化为精确、可落地动作时仍然不足的问题，试图验证“图像+符号”的混合输入是否能增强其在交互环境中的决策与执行能力。
AI.method: 在 Atari、VizDoom 和 AI2-THOR 三类环境中，对三种先进视觉-语言模型进行对比评估，设置四种输入管线：仅帧、帧+模型自提取符号、帧+真实符号、仅符号；同时分析模型从视觉输入中提取符号的准确性，以及符号噪声对决策和游戏表现的影响。
AI.result: 实验发现：当符号信息准确时，所有模型都能从中受益；但当符号由模型自行提取时，效果高度依赖模型能力，并且在更复杂场景中性能下降更明显。进一步分析显示，符号提取误差会直接削弱决策质量与游戏表现。
AI.conclusion: 符号化 grounding 对视觉-语言模型确实有帮助，但前提是符号提取足够可靠。论文指出，感知质量是未来基于视觉-语言模型的智能体的关键瓶颈，提升符号提取准确性是增强其行动能力的重要方向。

title: GroundCount: Grounding Vision-Language Models with Object Detection for Mitigating Counting Hallucinations
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) exhibit persistent hallucinations in counting tasks, with accuracy substantially lower than other visual reasoning tasks (excluding sentiment). This phenomenon persists even in state-of-the-art reasoning-capable VLMs. Conversely, CNN-based object detection models (ODMs) such as YOLO excel at spatial localization and instance counting with minimal computational overhead. We propose GroundCount, a framework that augments VLMs with explicit spatial grounding from ODMs to mitigate counting hallucinations. In the best case, our prompt-based augmentation strategy achieves 81.3% counting accuracy on the best-performing model (Ovis2.5-2B) - a 6.6pp improvement - while reducing inference time by 22% through elimination of hallucination-driven reasoning loops for stronger models. We conduct comprehensive ablation studies demonstrating that positional encoding is a critical component, being beneficial for stronger models but detrimental for weaker ones. Confidence scores, by contrast, introduce noise for most architectures and their removal improves performance in four of five evaluated models. We further evaluate feature-level fusion architectures, finding that explicit symbolic grounding via structured prompts outperforms implicit feature fusion despite sophisticated cross-attention mechanisms. Our approach yields consistent improvements across four of five evaluated VLM architectures (6.2--7.5pp), with one architecture exhibiting degraded performance due to incompatibility between its iterative reflection mechanisms and structured prompts. These results suggest that counting failures stem from fundamental spatial-semantic integration limitations rather than architecture-specific deficiencies, while highlighting the importance of architectural compatibility in augmentation strategies.
