AI.tldr: 该论文提出GroundCount框架，通过将目标检测模型提供的显式空间定位信息注入视觉语言模型，以缓解计数任务中的幻觉问题，并在多个模型上取得稳定提升。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在计数任务上存在持续性幻觉，准确率显著低于其他视觉推理任务；而基于CNN的目标检测模型在空间定位和实例计数上更稳定、开销更低，因此作者希望结合两者优势提升计数可靠性。
AI.method: 提出GroundCount框架，使用目标检测模型生成的显式空间 grounding 作为辅助信息增强VLM；比较了基于提示词的增强与特征级融合两类方案，并通过消融实验分析位置编码、置信度分数以及不同融合结构对性能的影响。
AI.result: 最佳情况下，基于提示词的增强在Ovis2.5-2B上将计数准确率提升到81.3%，提高6.6个百分点，并因减少幻觉驱动的推理循环使推理时间降低22%；在五个模型中有四个获得6.2–7.5个百分点的稳定提升，但有一个模型因与结构化提示不兼容而性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 计数失败主要源于空间与语义整合的基础性限制，而非单一架构缺陷；显式符号化 grounding 通常优于隐式特征融合，且增强策略必须与目标模型的推理机制保持架构兼容。

title: Hybrid Self-evolving Structured Memory for GUI Agents
summary: The remarkable progress of vision-language models (VLMs) has enabled GUI agents to interact with computers in a human-like manner. Yet real-world computer-use tasks remain difficult due to long-horizon workflows, diverse interfaces, and frequent intermediate errors. Prior work equips agents with external memory built from large collections of trajectories, but relies on flat retrieval over discrete summaries or continuous embeddings, falling short of the structured organization and self-evolving characteristics of human memory. Inspired by the brain, we propose Hybrid Self-evolving Structured Memory (HyMEM), a graph-based memory that couples discrete high-level symbolic nodes with continuous trajectory embeddings. HyMEM maintains a graph structure to support multi-hop retrieval, self-evolution via node update operations, and on-the-fly working-memory refreshing during inference. Extensive experiments show that HyMEM consistently improves open-source GUI agents, enabling 7B/8B backbones to match or surpass strong closed-source models; notably, it boosts Qwen2.5-VL-7B by +22.5% and outperforms Gemini2.5-Pro-Vision and GPT-4o.

AI.tldr: 提出HyMEM，一种面向GUI智能体的混合自演化结构化记忆，将离散符号节点与连续轨迹嵌入结合，用图结构支持多跳检索、节点更新和推理时工作记忆刷新，从而显著提升长程电脑操作任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基于外部记忆的GUI智能体多依赖平面式检索，或者只用离散摘要、或者只用连续嵌入，难以同时表达结构关系、长期演化和推理过程中的动态补充，因此在长周期工作流、复杂界面和中间错误恢复上表现不足。
AI.method: 构建Hybrid Self-evolving Structured Memory（HyMEM）：1）用图结构组织记忆，节点表示高层符号信息，边表示任务关系；2）结合连续轨迹嵌入保留细粒度行为信息；3）通过节点更新操作实现记忆自演化；4）在推理阶段进行按需工作记忆刷新，并支持多跳检索以定位相关历史经验。
AI.result: 实验表明HyMEM能稳定提升开源GUI智能体性能，使7B/8B骨干模型达到或超过强闭源模型水平；其中Qwen2.5-VL-7B提升22.5%，并且整体表现优于Gemini2.5-Pro-Vision和GPT-4o。
AI.conclusion: HyMEM证明了将结构化图记忆、轨迹表示和动态更新机制结合起来，能够更有效地支持GUI智能体的长期任务执行与错误恢复，是一种具有较强泛化能力的记忆增强框架。

title: PanoAffordanceNet: Towards Holistic Affordance Grounding in 360掳 Indoor Environments
comment: The source code and benchmark dataset will be made publicly available at https://github.com/GL-ZHU925/PanoAffordanceNet
summary: Global perception is essential for embodied agents in 360掳 spaces, yet current affordance grounding remains largely object-centric and restricted to perspective views. To bridge this gap, we introduce a novel task: Holistic Affordance Grounding in 360掳 Indoor Environments. This task faces unique challenges, including severe geometric distortions from Equirectangular Projection (ERP), semantic dispersion, and cross-scale alignment difficulties. We propose PanoAffordanceNet, an end-to-end framework featuring a Distortion-Aware Spectral Modulator (DASM) for latitude-dependent calibration and an Omni-Spherical Densification Head (OSDH) to restore topological continuity from sparse activations. By integrating multi-level constraints comprising pixel-wise, distributional, and region-text contrastive objectives, our framework effectively suppresses semantic drift under low supervision. Furthermore, we construct 360-AGD, the first high-quality panoramic affordance grounding dataset. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PanoAffordanceNet significantly outperforms existing methods, establishing a solid baseline for scene-level perception in embodied intelligence. The source code and benchmark dataset will be made publicly available at https://github.com/GL-ZHU925/PanoAffordanceNet.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向360度室内环境的整体可供性定位新任务，并给出端到端框架PanoAffordanceNet，结合失真感知调制、全向稠密化与多层约束，在新构建的数据集360-AGD上取得更优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有可供性定位方法主要依赖对象中心和透视视角，难以处理360度全景中的几何失真、语义分散以及跨尺度对齐问题，因此需要一种更适合全景场景级感知的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出PanoAffordanceNet：1）Distortion-Aware Spectral Modulator（DASM）用于按纬度校正ERP带来的几何失真；2）Omni-Spherical Densification Head（OSDH）用于从稀疏激活中恢复拓扑连续性；3）结合像素级、分布级与区域-文本对比损失的多层约束，缓解低监督下的语义漂移；同时构建首个高质量全景可供性定位数据集360-AGD。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，PanoAffordanceNet显著优于现有方法，在360度室内可供性定位任务上表现出更强的全局感知与场景级理解能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将可供性定位从对象中心拓展到全景场景级别，提供了新的任务定义、模型设计与基准数据集，为具身智能中的360度环境感知建立了较坚实的基础。

title: Grounding Synthetic Data Generation With Vision and Language Models
comment: Accepted for presentation at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), Synthetic Data for Computer Vision Workshop (SynData4CV) 2026
summary:
Deep learning models benefit from increasing data diversity and volume, motivating synthetic data augmentation to improve existing datasets. However, existing evaluation metrics for synthetic data typically calculate latent feature similarity, which is difficult to interpret and does not always correlate with the contribution to downstream tasks.
  We propose a vision-language grounded framework for interpretable synthetic data augmentation and evaluation in remote sensing. Our approach combines generative models, semantic segmentation and image captioning with vision and language models. Based on this framework, we introduce ARAS400k: A large-scale Remote sensing dataset Augmented with Synthetic data for segmentation and captioning, containing 100k real images and 300k synthetic images, each paired with segmentation maps and descriptions.
  ARAS400k enables the automated evaluation of synthetic data by analyzing semantic composition, minimizing caption redundancy, and verifying cross-modal consistency between visual structures and language descriptions. Experimental results indicate that while models trained exclusively on synthetic data reach competitive performance levels, those trained with augmented data (a combination of real and synthetic images) consistently outperform real-data baselines. Consequently, this work establishes a scalable benchmark for remote sensing tasks, specifically in semantic segmentation and image captioning. The dataset is available at zenodo.org/records/18890661 and the code base at github.com/caglarmert/ARAS400k.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个面向遥感领域的视觉-语言约束合成数据增强与评估框架，并构建了ARAS400k数据集，用于提升语义分割与图像描述任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据评估多依赖潜在特征相似度，解释性较弱，且与下游任务收益不一定一致，因此需要一种更可解释、可自动化的评估方法来判断合成数据质量与价值。
AI.method: 作者结合生成模型、语义分割、图像描述以及视觉-语言模型，提出一个视觉-语言支撑的合成数据增强与评估框架；据此构建ARAS400k数据集，包含10万张真实图像和30万张合成图像，每张图像都配有分割图和文本描述，并通过语义组成分析、描述去冗余和跨模态一致性检查来自动评估合成数据。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅使用合成数据训练的模型可达到有竞争力的性能，而使用真实数据与合成数据联合训练的模型在语义分割和图像描述任务上持续优于仅使用真实数据的基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了合成数据在遥感任务中的实际增益，并提供了一个可扩展、可解释的基准数据集与评估框架，为语义分割和图像描述等任务的合成数据应用提供了新方案。

title: SecAgent: Efficient Mobile GUI Agent with Semantic Context
summary: Mobile Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents powered by multimodal large language models have demonstrated promising capabilities in automating complex smartphone tasks. However, existing approaches face two critical limitations: the scarcity of high-quality multilingual datasets, particularly for non-English ecosystems, and inefficient history representation methods. To address these challenges, we present SecAgent, an efficient mobile GUI agent at 3B scale. We first construct a human-verified Chinese mobile GUI dataset with 18k grounding samples and 121k navigation steps across 44 applications, along with a Chinese navigation benchmark featuring multi-choice action annotations. Building upon this dataset, we propose a semantic context mechanism that distills history screenshots and actions into concise, natural language summaries, significantly reducing computational costs while preserving task-relevant information. Through supervised and reinforcement fine-tuning, SecAgent outperforms similar-scale baselines and achieves performance comparable to 7B-8B models on our and public navigation benchmarks. Our dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/alibabagroup/CMGUI.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个3B规模的移动GUI智能体SecAgent，面向中文移动应用场景，通过构建高质量中文数据集和语义上下文机制，提升了多步导航与操作能力，并在多个基准上达到接近更大模型的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有移动GUI智能体主要受限于两点：一是高质量多语言数据稀缺，尤其缺少非英语生态的数据；二是历史信息表示效率低，截图与动作序列带来较高计算成本。论文旨在同时解决数据和效率问题。
AI.method: 作者首先构建了一个人工校验的中文移动GUI数据集，包含44个应用中的1.8万条定位样本和12.1万步导航轨迹，并建立了带多项选择动作标注的中文导航基准。随后提出语义上下文机制，将历史截图和动作压缩为简洁的自然语言摘要，以降低计算开销并保留任务相关信息。最后结合监督微调与强化微调训练SecAgent。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，SecAgent在同规模模型中表现更优，并且在自建及公开导航基准上，性能可达到7B-8B模型的水平，同时语义上下文机制显著降低了计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 论文证明了高质量中文数据集与高效历史表示对移动GUI智能体的重要性；SecAgent在参数规模较小的情况下实现了较强的导航与执行能力，为面向非英语移动生态的智能体训练提供了有效方案。

title: This Looks Distinctly Like That: Grounding Interpretable Recognition in Stiefel Geometry against Neural Collapse
summary: Prototype networks provide an intrinsic case based explanation mechanism, but their interpretability is often undermined by prototype collapse, where multiple prototypes degenerate to highly redundant evidence. We attribute this failure mode to the terminal dynamics of Neural Collapse, where cross entropy optimization suppresses intra class variance and drives class conditional features toward a low dimensional limit. To mitigate this, we propose Adaptive Manifold Prototypes (AMP), a framework that leverages Riemannian optimization on the Stiefel manifold to represent class prototypes as orthonormal bases and make rank one prototype collapse infeasible by construction. AMP further learns class specific effective rank via a proximal gradient update on a nonnegative capacity vector, and introduces spatial regularizers that reduce rotational ambiguity and encourage localized, non overlapping part evidence. Extensive experiments on fine-grained benchmarks demonstrate that AMP achieves state-of-the-art classification accuracy while significantly improving causal faithfulness over prior interpretable models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应流形原型（AMP）框架，旨在解决原型网络中的原型塌缩问题，从而提升可解释性与因果忠实度，同时保持较强分类性能。
AI.motivation: 原型网络虽然具备内在的基于案例解释能力，但常出现多个原型退化为高度冗余证据的现象，即原型塌缩，导致解释失去多样性与可信度。作者将其归因于神经塌缩在交叉熵优化下对类内方差的压缩效应。
AI.method: AMP采用黎曼优化在Stiefel流形上学习原型，将类别原型表示为正交基，从结构上避免秩一原型塌缩；同时通过对非负容量向量的近端梯度更新学习类别的有效秩，并加入空间正则项以减小旋转歧义、鼓励局部化且互不重叠的部件级证据。
AI.result: 在细粒度分类基准上，AMP在分类准确率上达到当前最优或接近最优水平，并且相较于以往可解释模型显著提升了因果忠实度。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，将原型表示约束到流形上的正交结构，并结合有效秩自适应与空间正则化，可以同时缓解原型塌缩、增强解释质量并保持高分类性能。

title: SlowBA: An efficiency backdoor attack towards VLM-based GUI agents
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026. Codes and supplementary materials are in https://github.com/tu-tuing/SlowBA
summary: Modern vision-language-model (VLM) based graphical user interface (GUI) agents are expected not only to execute actions accurately but also to respond to user instructions with low latency. While existing research on GUI-agent security mainly focuses on manipulating action correctness, the security risks related to response efficiency remain largely unexplored. In this paper, we introduce SlowBA, a novel backdoor attack that targets the responsiveness of VLM-based GUI agents. The key idea is to manipulate response latency by inducing excessively long reasoning chains under specific trigger patterns. To achieve this, we propose a two-stage reward-level backdoor injection (RBI) strategy that first aligns the long-response format and then learns trigger-aware activation through reinforcement learning. In addition, we design realistic pop-up windows as triggers that naturally appear in GUI environments, improving the stealthiness of the attack. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets and baselines demonstrate that SlowBA can significantly increase response length and latency while largely preserving task accuracy. The attack remains effective even with a small poisoning ratio and under several defense settings. These findings reveal a previously overlooked security vulnerability in GUI agents and highlight the need for defenses that consider both action correctness and response efficiency. Code can be found in https://github.com/tu-tuing/SlowBA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SlowBA，一种针对基于视觉-语言模型的GUI智能体的后门攻击，目标不是破坏动作正确性，而是通过诱导过长推理链来显著增加响应长度与延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体安全研究主要关注动作是否正确，但对响应效率与低时延需求关注不足。作者认为，在真实交互场景中，响应过慢同样会构成重要安全与可用性风险，因此需要研究针对“响应效率”的攻击与防御。
AI.method: 提出两阶段的奖励级后门注入（RBI）策略：第一阶段先对齐长响应输出格式，第二阶段通过强化学习学习触发器感知的激活机制；同时设计了更贴近GUI环境的弹窗式触发器，以增强隐蔽性和现实可用性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和基线模型上的实验表明，SlowBA能在保持任务准确率基本不变的情况下，显著增加输出长度和响应延迟；即使在较小投毒比例以及若干防御设置下，攻击仍然有效。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了GUI智能体中一个此前被忽视的安全漏洞：攻击者可以通过后门影响系统响应效率，而不仅仅是动作正确性。作者强调，未来防御机制应同时考虑动作准确性与响应时延。

title: UniGround: Universal 3D Visual Grounding via Training-Free Scene Parsing
summary: Understanding and localizing objects in complex 3D environments from natural language descriptions, known as 3D Visual Grounding (3DVG), is a foundational challenge in embodied AI, with broad implications for robotics, augmented reality, and human-machine interaction. Large-scale pre-trained foundation models have driven significant progress on this front, enabling open-vocabulary 3DVG that allows systems to locate arbitrary objects in a given scene. However, their reliance on pre-trained models constrains 3D perception and reasoning within the inherited knowledge boundaries, resulting in limited generalization to unseen spatial relationships and poor robustness to out-of-distribution scenes. In this paper, we replace this constrained perception with training-free visual and geometric reasoning, thereby unlocking open-world 3DVG that enables the localization of any object in any scene beyond the training data. Specifically, the proposed UniGround operates in two stages: a Global Candidate Filtering stage that constructs scene candidates through training-free 3D topology and multi-view semantic encoding, and a Local Precision Grounding stage that leverages multi-scale visual prompting and structured reasoning to precisely identify the target object. Experiments on ScanRefer and EmbodiedScan show that UniGround achieves 46.1\%/34.1\% Acc@0.25/0.5 on ScanRefer and 28.7\% Acc@0.25 on EmbodiedScan, establishing a new state-of-the-art among zero-shot methods on EmbodiedScan without any 3D supervision. We further evaluate UniGround in real-world environments under uncontrolled reconstruction conditions and substantial domain shift, showing training-free reasoning generalizes robustly beyond curated benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的开放世界3D视觉指代表达方法UniGround，通过“全局候选筛选+局部精定位”两阶段视觉与几何推理，实现对复杂3D场景中任意目标的零样本定位，并在基准与真实环境中表现出较强泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 3D视觉指向任务需要根据自然语言在复杂三维环境中定位目标对象。现有依赖预训练基础模型的方法虽然提升了开放词汇能力，但受限于既有知识边界，面对未见空间关系和分布外场景时泛化与鲁棒性不足，因此需要一种更少依赖预训练知识、能适应开放世界的定位框架。
AI.method: UniGround采用两阶段流程：第一阶段为全局候选筛选，利用训练无关的3D拓扑关系与多视角语义编码构建场景候选区域；第二阶段为局部精细指向，结合多尺度视觉提示与结构化推理，对目标对象进行精确定位。整体方法不依赖3D监督，强调训练-free的视觉与几何推理。
AI.result: 在ScanRefer上达到Acc@0.25/0.5为46.1%/34.1%，在EmbodiedScan上达到Acc@0.25为28.7%，在无3D监督的零样本方法中取得EmbodiedScan新的最优结果之一。作者还在真实环境和重建条件不理想、域偏移明显的场景中验证了其稳定性与泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，训练无关的视觉与几何推理可以有效突破预训练模型的知识边界，提升3D视觉指向任务在未见关系、分布外场景及真实环境中的泛化能力，为开放世界3DVG提供了新的技术路径。

title: PIRA-Bench: A Transition from Reactive GUI Agents to GUI-based Proactive Intent Recommendation Agents
summary: Current Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents operate primarily under a reactive paradigm: a user must provide an explicit instruction for the agent to execute a task. However, an intelligent AI assistant should be proactive, which is capable of anticipating user intentions directly from continuous visual inputs, such as mobile or desktop screenshots, and offering timely recommendations without explicit user prompting. Transitioning to this proactive paradigm presents significant challenges. Real-world screen activity is rarely linear; it consists of long-horizon trajectories fraught with noisy browsing, meaningless actions, and multithreaded task-switching. To address this gap, we introduce PIRA-Bench (Proactive Intent Recommendation Agent Benchmark), a novel benchmark for evaluating multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on continuous, weakly-supervised visual inputs. Unlike reactive datasets, PIRA-Bench features complex trajectories with multiple interleaved intents and noisy segments with various user profile contexts, challenging agents to detect actionable events while fitting to user preferences. Furthermore, we propose the PIRF baseline, a memory-aware, state-tracking framework that empowers general MLLMs to manage multiple task threads and handle misleading visual inputs. PIRA-Bench serves as an initial step toward robust and proactive GUI-based personal assistants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向主动式GUI助手的新基准PIRA-Bench，用于评估多模态大语言模型在连续、弱监督的视觉输入下，能否从复杂屏幕轨迹中预测用户意图并给出及时推荐；同时提出了具备记忆与状态跟踪能力的PIRF基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI代理主要依赖用户明确指令，属于被动响应范式，难以满足智能助手应具备的主动预判需求。真实屏幕交互通常包含长时间跨度、噪声浏览、无意义操作以及多线程任务切换，因此需要新的评测基准来检验模型对用户意图的持续理解与推荐能力。
AI.method: 作者构建了PIRA-Bench基准，包含复杂的连续视觉轨迹、多个交错意图、噪声片段以及不同用户画像上下文，用于评估模型在弱监督条件下识别可行动事件并匹配用户偏好。与此同时，提出PIRF基线框架，通过记忆机制和状态跟踪来管理多个任务线程，并降低误导性视觉输入的干扰。
AI.result: PIRA-Bench能够更真实地刻画主动式GUI助手所面临的挑战，区别于传统反应式数据集；PIRF作为基线展示了通过记忆与状态管理处理多任务与噪声输入的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为主动式GUI个人助手的研究提供了首个重要评测平台和基础方法，有助于推动多模态模型从“接收指令后执行”向“基于连续视觉上下文主动推荐”转变。

title: Listening with the Eyes: Benchmarking Egocentric Co-Speech Grounding across Space and Time
summary: In situated collaboration, speakers often use intentionally underspecified deictic commands (e.g., ``pass me \textit{that}''), whose referent becomes identifiable only by aligning speech with a brief co-speech pointing \emph{stroke}. However, many embodied benchmarks admit language-only shortcuts, allowing MLLMs to perform well without learning the \emph{audio--visual alignment} required by deictic interaction. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{Egocentric Co-Speech Grounding (EcoG)}, where grounding is executable only if an agent jointly predicts \textit{What}, \textit{Where}, and \textit{When}. To operationalize this, we present \textbf{EcoG-Bench}, an evaluation-only bilingual (EN/ZH) diagnostic benchmark of \textbf{811} egocentric clips with dense spatial annotations and millisecond-level stroke supervision. It is organized under a \textbf{Progressive Cognitive Evaluation} protocol. Benchmarking state-of-the-art MLLMs reveals a severe executability gap: while human subjects achieve near-ceiling performance on EcoG-Bench (\textbf{96.9\%} strict Eco-Accuracy), the best native video-audio setting remains low (Gemini-3-Pro: \textbf{17.0\%}). Moreover, in a diagnostic ablation, replacing the native video--audio interface with timestamped frame samples and externally verified ASR (with word-level timing) substantially improves the same model (\textbf{17.0\%}$\to$\textbf{42.9\%}). Overall, EcoG-Bench provides a strict, executable testbed for event-level speech--gesture binding, and suggests that multimodal interfaces may bottleneck the observability of temporal alignment cues, independently of model reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了“具身共语定位（EcoG）”任务与评测基准EcoG-Bench，用于检验模型能否在第一人称场景中同时理解“说什么、指哪里、何时指”的语音-手势对齐能力。实验表明，人类几乎满分，而当前多模态大模型在原生视频-音频输入下表现很差；若改用带时间戳帧与外部校验ASR，性能会显著提升，说明主要瓶颈在时间对齐线索的可见性。
AI.motivation: 现有具身多模态基准常存在仅靠语言就能完成的捷径，导致模型即使没有真正学习音频—视觉对齐也能取得较好成绩。为弥补这一缺陷，作者希望构建一个只有同时预测“是什么、在哪里、什么时候”才可完成的诊断性任务，以更严格地评估事件级语音与手势绑定能力。
AI.method: 作者提出EcoG任务，并构建EcoG-Bench：一个仅用于评测的双语（英/中）基准，包含811段第一人称视频，配有密集空间标注和毫秒级手势stroke监督；评测采用渐进式认知评估流程。随后对多种先进MLLM进行基准测试，并做消融实验，将原生视频-音频接口替换为带时间戳的帧采样和外部验证的ASR（含词级时间信息），观察性能变化。
AI.result: 人类在EcoG-Bench上的严格Eco-Accuracy达到96.9%，接近满分；而当前最佳原生视频-音频设置仅为17.0%（Gemini-3-Pro）。在消融中，同一模型在使用带时间戳帧采样与词级时间ASR后，性能从17.0%提升到42.9%。这表明模型并非完全缺乏推理能力，而是原生接口对时间对齐线索的暴露不足限制了表现。
AI.conclusion: EcoG-Bench提供了一个严格、可执行的事件级语音-手势绑定测试平台，能有效揭示现有MLLM在音频-视觉对齐上的真实能力差距。结果说明，多模态接口设计本身可能是限制 temporal alignment 可观测性的关键因素，而不仅仅是模型推理能力不足。

title: AR2-4FV: Anchored Referring and Re-identification for Long-Term Grounding in Fixed-View Videos
summary: Long-term language-guided referring in fixed-view videos is challenging: the referent may be occluded or leave the scene for long intervals and later re-enter, while framewise referring pipelines drift as re-identification (ReID) becomes unreliable. AR2-4FV leverages background stability for long-term referring. An offline Anchor Bank is distilled from static background structures; at inference, the text query is aligned with this bank to produce an Anchor Map that serves as persistent semantic memory when the referent is absent. An anchor-based re-entry prior accelerates re-capture upon return, and a lightweight ReID-Gating mechanism maintains identity continuity using displacement cues in the anchor frame. The system predicts per-frame bounding boxes without assuming the target is visible in the first frame or explicitly modeling appearance variations. AR2-4FV achieves +10.3% Re-Capture Rate (RCR) improvement and -24.2% Re-Capture Latency (RCL) reduction over the best baseline, and ablation studies further confirm the benefits of the Anchor Map, re-entry prior, and ReID-Gating.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AR2-4FV，用于固定视角视频中的长期语言指代定位。方法利用静态背景构建锚点记忆，在目标消失后仍能保持语义定位，并在目标重新出现时快速重捕获，显著提升重捕获率并降低重捕获延迟。
AI.motivation: 固定视角视频中的语言指代定位很难处理长时间遮挡、离场后再进入等情况。传统逐帧方法容易在目标消失后漂移，且重识别不稳定，导致跨长时段的身份连续性不足。
AI.method: AR2-4FV首先从静态背景结构中蒸馏离线Anchor Bank；推理时将文本查询与Anchor Bank对齐，生成作为持久语义记忆的Anchor Map，在目标缺席时维持定位依据。随后引入基于锚点的重进入先验，加快目标回归后的重新捕获，并通过轻量级ReID-Gating利用位移线索维持身份连续性。模型直接预测每帧边界框，不依赖目标必须出现在首帧，也不显式建模外观变化。
AI.result: 相较于最佳基线，AR2-4FV的重捕获率（RCR）提升10.3%，重捕获延迟（RCL）降低24.2%。消融实验进一步验证了Anchor Map、重进入先验和ReID-Gating各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过将背景稳定性转化为长期语义记忆，缓解了长时遮挡和再进入场景下的漂移问题，是一种适用于固定视角视频长期语言指代任务的有效框架。

title: Grounding Machine Creativity in Game Design Knowledge Representations: Empirical Probing of LLM-Based Executable Synthesis of Goal Playable Patterns under Structural Constraints
summary: Creatively translating complex gameplay ideas into executable artifacts (e.g., games as Unity projects and code) remains a central challenge in computational game creativity. Gameplay design patterns provide a structured representation for describing gameplay phenomena, enabling designers to decompose high-level ideas into entities, constraints, and rule-driven dynamics. Among them, goal patterns formalize common player-objective relationships. Goal Playable Concepts (GPCs) operationalize these abstractions as playable Unity engine implementations, supporting experiential exploration and compositional gameplay design. We frame scalable playable pattern realization as a problem of constrained executable creative synthesis: generated artifacts must satisfy Unity's syntactic and architectural requirements while preserving the semantic gameplay meanings encoded in goal patterns. This dual constraint limits scalability. Therefore, we investigate whether contemporary large language models (LLMs) can perform such synthesis under engine-level structural constraints and generate Unity code (as games) structured and conditioned by goal playable patterns. Using 26 goal pattern instantiations, we compare a direct generation baseline (natural language -> C# -> Unity) with pipelines conditioned on a human-authored Unity-specific intermediate representation (IR), across three IR configurations and two open-source models (DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite-Instruct and Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct). Compilation success is evaluated via automated Unity replay. We propose grounding and hygiene failure modes, identifying structural and project-level grounding as primary bottlenecks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何让大语言模型在Unity引擎约束下，把游戏玩法目标模式转化为可执行的游戏代码，并比较直接生成与引入Unity中间表示的多种流程。
AI.motivation: 可解释的游戏设计模式能够把抽象玩法拆解为规则、实体与目标，但将其稳定转化为可运行的Unity项目仍然困难，因为既要满足代码结构要求，又要保留玩法语义。作者希望验证大语言模型是否能在这些约束下实现可扩展的可执行创作。
AI.method: 使用26个目标模式实例，比较三类Unity专用中间表示条件下的生成流程与直接生成基线。模型采用DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite-Instruct和Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct两种开源模型。通过自动化Unity回放评估编译成功率，并分析失败模式，提出“grounding”和“hygiene”两类问题。
AI.result: 实验显示，引入中间表示有助于结构化生成，但整体仍受制于Unity项目级与结构级对齐不足。主要瓶颈来自结构对齐和项目级对齐失败，而不是单纯代码语法错误。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型具备一定的Unity可执行玩法合成能力，但要稳定实现由目标模式驱动的游戏生成，仍需更强的结构约束、项目级上下文建模与语义落地机制。

title: T2SGrid: Temporal-to-Spatial Gridification for Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Video Temporal Grounding (VTG) aims to localize the video segment that corresponds to a natural language query, which requires a comprehensive understanding of complex temporal dynamics. Existing Vision-LMMs typically perceive temporal dynamics via positional encoding, text-based timestamps, or visual frame numbering. However, these approaches exhibit notable limitations: assigning each frame a text-based timestamp token introduces additional computational overhead and leads to sparsity in visual attention, positional encoding struggles to capture absolute temporal information, and visual frame numbering often compromises spatial detail. To address these issues, we propose Temporal to Spatial Gridification (T2SGrid), a novel framework that reformulates video temporal understanding as a spatial understanding task. The core idea of T2SGrid is to process video content in clips rather than individual frames. we employ a overlapping sliding windows mechanism to segment the video into temporal clips. Within each window, frames are arranged chronologically in a row-major order into a composite grid image, effectively transforming temporal sequences into structured 2D layouts. The gridification not only encodes temporal information but also enhances local attention within each grid. Furthermore, T2SGrid enables the use of composite text timestamps to establish global temporal awareness. Experiments on standard VTG benchmarks demonstrate that T2SGrid achieves superior performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出T2SGrid，将视频时间理解从“时间建模”改为“空间建模”：先用重叠滑窗把视频切成片段，再将片段内帧按时间顺序拼成二维网格图，从而更高效地表达时序信息并提升视频时序定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉大模型处理视频时序主要依赖位置编码、文本时间戳或帧编号，但分别存在难以表示绝对时间、计算开销大且注意力稀疏、以及损失空间细节等问题，因此需要一种更统一、更高效的时序表示方式。
AI.method: T2SGrid采用两步核心设计：1）用重叠滑动窗口将视频划分为多个时间片段；2）将每个窗口内的帧按时间顺序以行优先方式排列成复合网格图，把时序序列转换为二维空间布局。同时结合复合文本时间戳增强全局时间感知，并通过网格化提升局部注意力。
AI.result: 在标准VTG基准上，T2SGrid取得了优于现有方法的实验结果，说明该空间化时序表示能够更有效地支持视频时序定位任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法的关键贡献在于把视频时序理解重构为空间理解问题，用网格化表示兼顾局部细节与全局时间信息，减少传统时间建模方案的局限，适合用于视频时序定位等需要精细时间对齐的任务。

title: Step-Level Visual Grounding Faithfulness Predicts Out-of-Distribution Generalization in Long-Horizon Vision-Language Models
summary: We uncover a behavioral law of long-horizon vision-language models: models that maintain temporally grounded beliefs generalize better. Standard benchmarks measure only final-answer accuracy, which obscures how models use visual information; a model can guess correctly while its step-by-step reasoning is entirely unanchored to the visual input. We formalize this as behavioral faithfulness over long horizons, an empirically measurable property that quantifies whether a model's intermediate reasoning remains consistent with the evolving visual state. Across eight models on three long-horizon benchmarks, we demonstrate that temporal grounding quality is a leading indicator of robustness: the Step Grounding Rate (SGR) predicts out-of-distribution retention with $r = 0.83$ (permutation test $p = 0.003$), a relationship that holds within capacity-matched models and cannot be explained by scale or in-distribution accuracy. Critically, grounding quality varies by up to 10.8 percentage points within parameter-matched 7B models despite similar accuracy, revealing it as an independent axis of model capability. Multiple robustness checks confirm the signal reflects genuine visual reliance: counterfactual traces drop SGR by 26--41 percentage points, cross-architecture verifiers agree at $蟻= 0.96$, random reasoning scores near chance ($\sim 18\%$), and the predictor remains strong even without explicit reasoning disclosure ($r = 0.78$).

AI.tldr: 该摘要提出：在长时程视觉-语言模型中，能够持续保持与视觉状态一致的“时间锚定”信念，会带来更好的泛化与鲁棒性；其中，步骤锚定率（SGR）比单纯最终答案准确率更能预测模型的分布外保持能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要评估最终答案是否正确，容易掩盖模型是否真正利用了视觉输入；模型可能“猜对”答案，但其逐步推理与视觉信息并不一致。因此需要一种可测量的行为一致性指标来衡量长时程推理的真实性与稳健性。
AI.method: 作者将“长时程行为忠实性”形式化为一种可经验测量的属性，即中间推理是否与不断变化的视觉状态保持一致，并提出步骤锚定率（SGR）作为指标。在三个长时程基准上比较八个模型，分析SGR与分布外保持能力的相关性，并通过容量匹配、反事实轨迹、跨架构验证器、随机推理对照以及无显式推理披露等多种稳健性检验验证结论。
AI.result: 实验显示，SGR能较强预测分布外保持能力，相关系数r=0.83，置换检验p=0.003；这一关系在容量匹配模型中依然成立，且不能由模型规模或分布内准确率解释。即使参数量相同的7B模型，其锚定质量也可相差最多10.8个百分点，但准确率相近，说明锚定质量是独立能力维度。多项检验支持该信号真实反映视觉依赖：反事实轨迹使SGR下降26—41个百分点，跨架构验证器一致性达到0.96，随机推理接近机会水平（约18%），且在没有显式推理披露时预测仍然很强（r=0.78）。
AI.conclusion: 长时程视觉-语言模型的泛化能力不仅取决于最终答案正确率，更关键的是推理过程是否持续锚定于视觉输入。步骤锚定率可作为衡量模型鲁棒性与行为忠实性的有效指标，并揭示了一个独立于规模和表面准确率的能力维度。

title: Restoring Linguistic Grounding in VLA Models via Train-Free Attention Recalibration
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models enable robots to perform manipulation tasks directly from natural language instructions and are increasingly viewed as a foundation for generalist robotic policies. However, their reliability under Out-of-Distribution (OOD) instructions remains underexplored. In this paper, we reveal a critical failure mode in which VLA policies continue executing visually plausible actions even when the language instruction contradicts the scene. We refer to this phenomenon as linguistic blindness, where VLA policies prioritize visual priors over instruction semantics during action generation. To systematically analyze this issue, we introduce ICBench, a diagnostic benchmark constructed from the LIBERO dataset that probes language-action coupling by injecting controlled OOD instruction contradictions while keeping the visual environment unchanged. Evaluations on three representative VLA architectures, including Pi0, Pi0.5 and OpenVLA OFT, show that these models frequently succeed at tasks despite logically impossible instructions, revealing a strong visual bias in action generation. To mitigate this issue, we propose Instruction-Guided Attention Recalibration (IGAR), a train-free inference-time mechanism that rebalances attention distributions to restore the influence of language instructions. IGAR operates without retraining or architectural modification and can be directly applied to existing VLA models. Experiments across 30 LIBERO tasks demonstrate that IGAR substantially reduces erroneous execution under OOD contradictory instructions while preserving baseline task performance. We additionally validate the approach on a real Franka robotic arm, where IGAR effectively prevents manipulation triggered by inconsistent instructions.

AI.tldr: 本文指出视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在面对分布外且与场景矛盾的指令时，常会忽视语言语义而按视觉先验继续执行，作者将此现象称为“语言失明”，并提出无需训练的IGAR方法来缓解这一问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型被视为通用机器人策略基础，但其在分布外指令下的可靠性不足，尤其缺少对“语言指令与视觉场景冲突”场景的系统研究，因此需要诊断这种语言-动作耦合失效。
AI.method: 作者基于LIBERO数据集构建了ICBench，通过在保持视觉环境不变的前提下注入受控的分布外矛盾指令来测试语言-动作关联；在Pi0、Pi0.5和OpenVLA OFT上评估后，进一步提出IGAR（Instruction-Guided Attention Recalibration），一种推理阶段的无训练机制，用于重新平衡注意力分布，增强语言指令对动作生成的影响。
AI.result: 实验显示，三种代表性VLA模型在矛盾指令下仍常执行看似合理但实际上错误的动作，表现出明显视觉偏置；IGAR在30个LIBERO任务上显著降低了分布外矛盾指令导致的错误执行，同时基本保持原有任务性能，并在真实Franka机械臂上验证了对不一致指令的有效抑制。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了VLA模型在语言语义依赖上的关键缺陷，并通过ICBench建立了可诊断基准、通过IGAR提供了可直接部署的缓解方案，为提升机器人策略在分布外指令下的可靠性提供了实用路径。

title: HERO: Hierarchical Embedding-Refinement for Open-Vocabulary Temporal Sentence Grounding in Videos
summary: Temporal Sentence Grounding in Videos (TSGV) aims to temporally localize segments of a video that correspond to a given natural language query. Despite recent progress, most existing TSGV approaches operate under closed-vocabulary settings, limiting their ability to generalize to real-world queries involving novel or diverse linguistic expressions. To bridge this critical gap, we introduce the Open-Vocabulary TSGV (OV-TSGV) task and construct the first dedicated benchmarks--Charades-OV and ActivityNet-OV--that simulate realistic vocabulary shifts and paraphrastic variations. These benchmarks facilitate systematic evaluation of model generalization beyond seen training concepts. To tackle OV-TSGV, we propose HERO(Hierarchical Embedding-Refinement for Open-Vocabulary grounding), a unified framework that leverages hierarchical linguistic embeddings and performs parallel cross-modal refinement. HERO jointly models multi-level semantics and enhances video-language alignment via semantic-guided visual filtering and contrastive masked text refinement. Extensive experiments on both standard and open vocabulary benchmarks demonstrate that HERO consistently surpasses state-of-the-art methods, particularly under open-vocabulary scenarios, validating its strong generalization capability and underscoring the significance of OV-TSGV as a new research direction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了开放词汇的时序句子定位任务OV-TSGV，并构建了两个新基准Charades-OV和ActivityNet-OV；同时提出HERO框架，通过分层语言嵌入与跨模态联合精炼提升视频-文本对齐与泛化能力，在标准与开放词汇场景下均取得更优表现。
AI.motivation: 现有时序句子定位方法大多基于封闭词汇设置，面对真实场景中未见过的词汇、改写表达和更丰富的语言变化时泛化能力不足，因此需要新的任务定义、评测基准和建模方法来弥补这一缺口。
AI.method: 1）定义开放词汇时序句子定位任务OV-TSGV；2）构建Charades-OV与ActivityNet-OV两个基准，用于模拟词汇偏移与释义变化；3）提出HERO框架，采用分层语言嵌入建模多层语义，并通过并行跨模态精炼实现语义引导的视觉过滤与对比式掩码文本精炼，从而增强视频与语言的对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明，HERO在传统基准和开放词汇基准上均优于现有最先进方法，且在开放词汇场景中优势更明显，说明其具有较强的跨词汇泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作不仅提出了OV-TSGV这一新的研究方向，还通过新基准和HERO框架证明了开放词汇条件下时序定位的可行性与必要性，为后续研究提供了任务定义、评测资源和有效建模思路。

title: From Phase Grounding to Intelligent Surgical Narratives
summary: Video surgery timelines are an important part of tool-assisted surgeries, as they allow surgeons to quickly focus on key parts of the procedure. Current methods involve the surgeon filling out a post-operation (OP) report, which is often vague, or manually annotating the surgical videos, which is highly time-consuming. Our proposed method sits between these two extremes: we aim to automatically create a surgical timeline and narrative directly from the surgical video. To achieve this, we employ a CLIP-based multi-modal framework that aligns surgical video frames with textual gesture descriptions. Specifically, we use the CLIP visual encoder to extract representations from surgical video frames and the text encoder to embed the corresponding gesture sentences into a shared embedding space. We then fine-tune the model to improve the alignment between video gestures and textual tokens. Once trained, the model predicts gestures and phases for video frames, enabling the construction of a structured surgical timeline. This approach leverages pretrained multi-modal representations to bridge visual gestures and textual narratives, reducing the need for manual video review and annotation by surgeons.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CLIP的多模态框架，用于从手术视频中自动生成手术时间线和叙述文本，以替代手术后人工撰写报告或逐帧标注的低效方式。
AI.motivation: 现有手术视频总结方法要么依赖术后报告，信息往往较为笼统，要么依赖人工视频标注，耗时且成本高。研究目标是自动提取关键手术过程，帮助医生快速定位重要片段并减少人工工作量。
AI.method: 方法采用CLIP式多模态对齐框架：使用视觉编码器提取手术视频帧特征，使用文本编码器将对应的手势描述句子映射到共享嵌入空间；随后对模型进行微调，以增强视频手势与文本标记之间的对齐能力。训练完成后，模型可对视频帧预测手势和阶段信息，并据此构建结构化手术时间线。
AI.result: 该方法能够将手术视频中的视觉手势与文本叙述进行关联，从而自动生成手术时间线和叙述内容，减少对外科医生手动回看和标注视频的依赖。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，利用预训练多模态表示并进行领域微调，可以有效连接手术视频与文本信息，为自动化手术视频总结与流程结构化提供可行方案。

title: Keeping the Evidence Chain: Semantic Evidence Allocation for Training-Free Token Pruning in Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Video Temporal Grounding (VTG) localizes the temporal boundaries of query-relevant moments in long, untrimmed videos, making video-language-model prohibitively expensive. While recent training-free token pruning has shown success in video question answering, naively applying these objectives to VTG causes drastic degradation, as VTG crucially depends on boundary-sensitive evidence and cross-frame reasoning chains. We therefore identify two VTG-specific pruning principles: evidence retention, which keeps query-critical patches especially around event boundaries, and connectivity strength, which preserves cross-frame connectivity for long-range evidence aggregation. Building on these insights, we propose SemVID, a training-free pruning framework that constructs a compact yet coherent token subset with complementary semantic roles. SemVID first allocates per-frame budgets by balancing query relevance and inter-frame variation to avoid over-pruned segments, and then selects three types of tokens: object tokens for diverse query-critical evidence, motion tokens to capture meaningful transitions and serve as cross-frame relays, and context tokens for scene continuity. Extensive experiments show that SemVID achieves a strong accuracy-efficiency trade-off, retaining up to 95.4% mIoU with only 12.5% visual tokens and delivering up to a 5.8x prefill speedup, consistently outperforming prior methods under the same budgets. Our code is available at https://github.com/JiaqiLi404/SemVID

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向视频时序定位（VTG）的免训练令牌剪枝框架SemVID，通过保留边界敏感证据和跨帧连通性，在大幅减少视觉令牌的同时保持较高定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有面向视频问答的免训练剪枝策略直接用于VTG时会明显退化，因为VTG不仅依赖查询相关证据，还强依赖事件边界附近的细粒度信息以及跨帧推理链条，因此需要专门的剪枝原则。
AI.method: 作者提出两个VTG特定原则：证据保留和连通性强度。SemVID先根据查询相关性与帧间变化分配每帧预算，避免某些片段被过度剪枝；随后选择三类令牌：对象令牌用于保留查询关键证据，运动令牌用于捕捉有效转移并连接跨帧信息，场景上下文令牌用于维持连续性。
AI.result: 实验表明，SemVID在仅保留12.5%视觉令牌时仍可达到最高95.4%的mIoU，并带来最高5.8倍的prefill加速，在相同预算下持续优于已有方法。
AI.conclusion: SemVID证明了VTG需要区别于通用视频问答的剪枝策略，其通过语义互补的令牌选择实现了精度与效率的良好平衡，适合长视频时序定位的高效推理。

title: Multi-label Instance-level Generalised Visual Grounding in Agriculture
summary: Understanding field imagery such as detecting plants and distinguishing individual crop and weed instances is a central challenge in precision agriculture. Despite progress in vision-language tasks like captioning and visual question answering, Visual Grounding (VG), localising language-referred objects, remains unexplored in agriculture. A key reason is the lack of suitable benchmark datasets for evaluating grounding models in field conditions, where many plants look highly similar, appear at multiple scales, and the referred target may be absent from the image. To address these limitations, we introduce gRef-CW, the first dataset designed for generalised visual grounding in agriculture, including negative expressions. Benchmarking current state-of-the-art grounding models on gRef-CW reveals a substantial domain gap, highlighting their inability to ground instances of crops and weeds. Motivated by these findings, we introduce Weed-VG, a modular framework that incorporates multi-label hierarchical relevance scoring and interpolation-driven regression. Weed-VG advances instance-level visual grounding and provides a clear baseline for developing VG methods in precision agriculture. Code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向农业场景的通用视觉指向数据集gRef-CW，并基于该数据集设计了Weed-VG框架，用于提升作物与杂草的实例级语言定位能力。
AI.motivation: 农业田间图像中植物外观高度相似、尺度变化大，且文本所指目标可能不在图像中，现有通用视觉指向方法和数据集难以适配这一场景，因此需要专门的基准与模型。
AI.method: 构建首个面向农业通用视觉指向的数据集gRef-CW，包含负向表达；在此基础上提出Weed-VG模块化框架，结合多标签层级相关性评分与基于插值的回归机制进行实例定位。
AI.result: 对当前主流指向模型的基准测试显示存在显著领域差距，现有方法难以有效定位作物和杂草实例；Weed-VG为农业场景的视觉指向提供了清晰基线。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了农业视觉指向数据与方法的空白，证明农业场景需要专门设计的评测基准和模型，以支持后续精细化感知与实例级定位研究。

title: Beyond Accuracy: Evaluating Visual Grounding In Multimodal Medical Reasoning
comment: 12 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, medical VQA / multimodal reasoning evaluation
summary: Recent work shows that text-only reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) can match or outperform image-text RLVR on multimodal medical VQA benchmarks, suggesting current evaluation protocols may fail to measure causal visual dependence. We introduce a counterfactual evaluation framework using real, blank, and shuffled images across four medical VQA benchmarks: PathVQA, PMC-VQA, SLAKE, and VQA-RAD. Beyond accuracy, we measure Visual Reliance Score (VRS), Image Sensitivity (IS), and introduce Hallucinated Visual Reasoning Rate (HVRR) to detect cases where models generate visual claims despite producing image-invariant answers. Our findings reveal that RLVR improves accuracy while degrading visual grounding: text-only RLVR achieves negative VRS on PathVQA (-0.09), performing better with mismatched images, while image-text RLVR reduces image sensitivity to 39.8% overall despite improving accuracy. On VQA-RAD, both variants achieve 63% accuracy through different mechanisms: text-only RLVR retains 81% performance with blank images, while image-text RLVR shows only 29% image sensitivity. Models generate visual claims in 68-74% of responses, yet 38-43% are ungrounded (HVRR). These findings demonstrate that accuracy-only rewards enable shortcut exploitation, and progress requires grounding-aware evaluation protocols and training objectives that explicitly enforce visual dependence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种反事实评估框架，用真实图像、空白图像和打乱图像来检验医学视觉问答模型是否真正依赖图像内容。结果表明，基于可验证奖励的强化学习虽然能提升准确率，但往往削弱视觉 grounding，甚至出现对错配图像更敏感的“捷径学习”现象。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态医学VQA评测主要看准确率，可能无法反映模型是否真的使用了图像信息，因此需要一种能检测因果视觉依赖的评估方法。
AI.method: 作者在 PathVQA、PMC-VQA、SLAKE 和 VQA-RAD 四个基准上，比较真实图像、空白图像和打乱图像三种输入条件，评估文本专用RLVR与图文RLVR。除准确率外，还引入 Visual Reliance Score（VRS）、Image Sensitivity（IS）和 Hallucinated Visual Reasoning Rate（HVRR）来衡量视觉依赖、图像敏感性及无依据视觉推断。
AI.result: 实验发现，RLVR虽能提高准确率，但会降低视觉依赖：文本专用RLVR在 PathVQA 上的 VRS 为 -0.09，说明其在错配图像下表现反而更好；图文RLVR的总体图像敏感性仅为 39.8%。在 VQA-RAD 上，两种方法都达到 63% 准确率，但机制不同：文本专用RLVR在空白图像下仍能保持 81% 性能，而图文RLVR仅有 29% 图像敏感性。与此同时，模型有 68%-74% 的回答包含视觉表述，但其中 38%-43% 属于无依据的视觉推断。
AI.conclusion: 仅优化准确率的奖励机制容易导致模型利用数据捷径，而不是真正学习图像推理。未来应采用更强调 grounding 的评估协议和训练目标，以显式约束模型对视觉信息的依赖。

title: REGAL: A Registry-Driven Architecture for Deterministic Grounding of Agentic AI in Enterprise Telemetry
summary:
Enterprise engineering organizations produce high-volume, heterogeneous telemetry from version control systems, CI/CD pipelines, issue trackers, and observability platforms. Large Language Models (LLMs) enable new forms of agentic automation, but grounding such agents on private telemetry raises three practical challenges: limited model context, locally defined semantic concepts, and evolving metric interfaces.
  We present REGAL, a registry-driven architecture for deterministic grounding of agentic AI systems in enterprise telemetry. REGAL adopts an explicitly architectural approach: deterministic telemetry computation is treated as a first-class primitive, and LLMs operate over a bounded, version-controlled action space rather than raw event streams.
  The architecture combines (1) a Medallion ELT pipeline that produces replayable, semantically compressed Gold artifacts, and (2) a registry-driven compilation layer that synthesizes Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools from declarative metric definitions. The registry functions as an "interface-as-code" layer, ensuring alignment between tool specification and execution, mitigating tool drift, and embedding governance policies directly at the semantic boundary.
  A prototype implementation and case study validate the feasibility of deterministic grounding and illustrate its implications for latency, token efficiency, and operational governance. This work systematizes an architectural pattern for enterprise LLM grounding; it does not propose new learning algorithms, but rather elevates deterministic computation and semantic compilation to first-class design primitives for agentic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出REGAL，一种面向企业遥测数据的注册表驱动架构，用于为LLM代理提供确定性、可治理的语义对齐。其核心思路不是改进模型算法，而是通过可重放的数据管道和“接口即代码”的编译层，将遥测计算与工具暴露规范化，从而在有限上下文、局部语义和接口演化条件下实现稳定地理分。
AI.motivation: 企业工程组织产生大量异构遥测数据，但直接让LLM基于原始事件流工作会面临上下文窗口受限、内部指标语义难以对齐、以及指标接口不断变化等问题。因此需要一种能够把私有遥测以确定性、可版本控制、可治理的方式接入代理系统的架构。
AI.method: REGAL采用两层设计：第一，使用Medallion ELT管道将原始遥测加工为可重放、语义压缩的Gold工件；第二，基于声明式指标定义的注册表编译出MCP工具，形成“接口即代码”的语义边界。LLM不直接处理原始流，而是在受限、版本控制的动作空间中调用这些确定性工具。
AI.result: 原型实现与案例研究表明，该架构在可行性上成立，并能支持确定性地基（grounding）。作者还指出这种设计对延迟、token效率和运维治理具有积极影响，同时可降低工具漂移并增强语义一致性。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作提出了一种面向企业LLM代理的系统化架构模式，强调将确定性计算和语义编译提升为一等设计原语。其贡献在于架构与治理方法，而非新的学习算法。

title: HAMMER: Harnessing MLLM via Cross-Modal Integration for Intention-Driven 3D Affordance Grounding
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026. Project Page: https://rayyoh.github.io/Hammer
summary: Humans commonly identify 3D object affordance through observed interactions in images or videos, and once formed, such knowledge can be generically generalized to novel objects. Inspired by this principle, we advocate for a novel framework that leverages emerging multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for interaction intention-driven 3D affordance grounding, namely HAMMER. Instead of generating explicit object attribute descriptions or relying on off-the-shelf 2D segmenters, we alternatively aggregate the interaction intention depicted in the image into a contact-aware embedding and guide the model to infer textual affordance labels, ensuring it thoroughly excavates object semantics and contextual cues. We further devise a hierarchical cross-modal integration mechanism to fully exploit the complementary information from the MLLM for 3D representation refinement and introduce a multi-granular geometry lifting module that infuses spatial characteristics into the extracted intention embedding, thus facilitating accurate 3D affordance localization. Extensive experiments on public datasets and our newly constructed corrupted benchmark demonstrate the superiority and robustness of HAMMER compared to existing approaches. All code and weights are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HAMMER，一种面向3D可供性定位的新框架，利用多模态大语言模型从图像中的交互意图出发，学习接触感知的语义表示，并结合层次化跨模态融合与多粒度几何提升，实现更准确、更鲁棒的3D可供性基础定位。
AI.motivation: 现有3D可供性方法往往依赖显式属性描述或现成的2D分割器，容易受限于局部视觉信息和外部分割质量，难以充分挖掘物体语义、场景上下文以及人类交互意图。作者受人类通过观察交互来泛化可供性知识的启发，希望构建一种更具泛化能力的交互意图驱动框架。
AI.method: HAMMER包含三项核心设计：1）将图像中体现的交互意图聚合为接触感知嵌入，引导模型预测文本可供性标签，而非生成显式属性描述或依赖2D分割器；2）设计层次化跨模态融合机制，充分利用MLLM信息细化3D表示；3）提出多粒度几何提升模块，将空间几何特征注入意图嵌入，从而提升3D可供性区域定位精度。
AI.result: 在公开数据集以及作者新构建的损坏基准上，HAMMER相较现有方法表现更优，且在噪声或破坏条件下展现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，基于多模态大语言模型的交互意图建模能够有效提升3D可供性 grounding 的语义理解与空间定位能力，HAMMER为通用、鲁棒的3D可供性学习提供了一条新路径，并且代码与权重已公开，便于复现与扩展。

title: InterCoG: Towards Spatially Precise Image Editing with Interleaved Chain-of-Grounding Reasoning
summary: Emerging unified editing models have demonstrated strong capabilities in general object editing tasks. However, it remains a significant challenge to perform fine-grained editing in complex multi-entity scenes, particularly those where targets are not visually salient and require spatial reasoning. To this end, we propose InterCoG, a novel text-vision Interleaved Chain-of-Grounding reasoning framework for fine-grained image editing in complex real-world scenes. The key insight of InterCoG is to first perform object position reasoning solely within text that includes spatial relation details to explicitly deduce the location and identity of the edited target. It then conducts visual grounding via highlighting the editing targets with generated bounding boxes and masks in pixel space, and finally rewrites the editing description to specify the intended outcomes. To further facilitate this paradigm, we propose two auxiliary training modules: multimodal grounding reconstruction supervision and multimodal grounding reasoning alignment to enforce spatial localization accuracy and reasoning interpretability, respectively. We also construct GroundEdit-45K, a dataset comprising 45K grounding-oriented editing samples with detailed reasoning annotations, and GroundEdit-Bench for grounding-aware editing evaluation. Extensive experiments substantiate the superiority of our approach in highly precise edits under spatially intricate and multi-entity scenes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InterCoG，一种用于复杂多实体场景中精细图像编辑的文本-视觉交错链式定位推理框架，通过先文本空间推理、再视觉定位、最后重写编辑指令的方式提升编辑精度，并配套训练模块与数据集/基准。
AI.motivation: 现有统一编辑模型在通用对象编辑上表现较强，但在目标不显著、需要空间推理的复杂真实场景中，难以实现高精度的细粒度编辑，因此需要一种更强的定位与推理机制。
AI.method: InterCoG采用三阶段流程：先在纯文本中结合空间关系推断目标的位置与身份；再在像素空间生成边界框和掩码进行视觉定位；最后重写编辑描述以明确预期结果。为增强训练，设计了多模态定位重建监督和多模态定位推理对齐两种辅助模块，并构建了45K样本的GroundEdit-45K数据集及GroundEdit-Bench评测基准。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在空间关系复杂、实体较多的场景下，能够实现更高精度的目标定位与编辑，整体性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: InterCoG通过将文本推理与视觉定位分步耦合，显著提升了复杂场景下的细粒度图像编辑能力，同时其数据集和评测基准也为后续研究提供了支撑。

title: Agentic Multi-Source Grounding for Enhanced Query Intent Understanding: A DoorDash Case Study
comment: Accepted at ACM SIGIR 2026. 5 pages, 4 figures
summary: Accurately mapping user queries to business categories is a fundamental Information Retrieval challenge for multi-category marketplaces, where context-sparse queries such as "Wildflower" exhibit intent ambiguity, simultaneously denoting a restaurant chain, a retail product, and a floral item. Traditional classifiers force a winner-takes-all assignment, while general-purpose LLMs hallucinate unavailable inventory. We introduce an Agentic Multi-Source Grounded system that addresses both failure modes by grounding LLM inference in (i) a staged catalog entity retrieval pipeline and (ii) an agentic web-search tool invoked autonomously for cold-start queries. Rather than predicting a single label, the model emits an ordered multi-intent set, resolved by a configurable disambiguation layer that applies deterministic business policies and is designed for extensibility to personalization signals. This decoupled design generalizes across domains, allowing any marketplace to supply its own grounding sources and resolution rules without modifying the core architecture. Evaluated on DoorDash's multi-vertical search platform, the system achieves +10.9pp over the ungrounded LLM baseline and +4.6pp over the legacy production system. On long-tail queries, incremental ablations attribute +8.3pp to catalog grounding, +3.2pp to agentic web search grounding, and +1.5pp to dual intent disambiguation, yielding 90.7% accuracy (+13.0pp over baseline). The system is deployed in production, serving over 95% of daily search impressions, and establishes a generalizable paradigm for applications requiring foundation models grounded in proprietary context and real-time web knowledge to resolve ambiguous, context-sparse decision problems at scale.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种面向多类市场搜索场景的多源约束式智能系统，用目录实体检索和自动网页搜索为大模型提供外部依据，并输出有序的多意图集合，再通过可配置的业务消歧层做最终判定，以提升对上下文稀疏、意图歧义查询的分类效果。
AI.motivation: 在多类目平台中，用户查询常常信息稀疏且语义歧义明显，传统分类器容易被迫做单标签选择，而通用大模型又可能生成不存在的结果。论文目标是同时解决“错误单选”和“无依据生成”两类失败模式。
AI.method: 系统采用两级外部依据：一是分阶段的目录实体检索流水线，为查询提供平台内已知实体证据；二是面向冷启动查询的代理式网页搜索工具，由模型自主触发补充实时外部知识。模型不直接输出单一类别，而是生成按优先级排序的多意图集合；随后由可配置的消歧层基于确定性业务规则进行最终决策，并支持后续接入个性化信号。
AI.result: 在 DoorDash 的多垂类搜索平台上，该系统相较于未加约束的大模型基线提升 10.9 个百分点，相较旧生产系统提升 4.6 个百分点。对于长尾查询，消融结果显示目录约束贡献 8.3 个百分点，网页搜索约束贡献 3.2 个百分点，双意图消歧贡献 1.5 个百分点，最终达到 90.7% 准确率，较基线提升 13.0 个百分点。系统已上线生产环境，覆盖超过 95% 的日搜索曝光。
AI.conclusion: 论文表明，将大模型与私有目录、实时网页知识进行分层约束式结合，并将生成与最终业务决策解耦，可以有效提升歧义查询的鲁棒性与可扩展性。该框架不仅适用于当前平台，也可迁移到其他需要结合专有上下文和外部实时知识进行决策的多类别检索场景。

title: BioProAgent: Neuro-Symbolic Grounding for Constrained Scientific Planning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant reasoning capabilities in scientific discovery but struggle to bridge the gap to physical execution in wet-labs. In these irreversible environments, probabilistic hallucinations are not merely incorrect; they can cause equipment damage or experimental failure. We propose BioProAgent, a neuro-symbolic framework that anchors probabilistic planning in a deterministic Finite State Machine (FSM). We introduce a State-Augmented Planning mechanism that enforces a rigorous Design-Verify-Rectify workflow, ensuring hardware compliance before execution. Furthermore, we address the context bottleneck inherent in complex device schemas by Semantic Symbol Grounding, reducing token consumption by ~6* through symbolic abstraction. In the extended BioProBench benchmark, BioProAgent achieves 95.6% physical compliance (compared to 21.0% for ReAct), demonstrating that neuro-symbolic constraints are essential for reliable autonomy in irreversible physical environments. Code: https://github.com/YuyangSunshine/bioproagent | Website: https://yuyangsunshine.github.io/BioPro-Project.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出BioProAgent，一种将大语言模型规划能力与确定性有限状态机结合的神经符号框架，用于提高湿实验室等不可逆物理环境中的执行可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型虽然具备较强推理能力，但在需要真实物理执行的场景中容易产生幻觉，导致设备损坏或实验失败。作者希望通过约束式框架弥补“推理到执行”的鸿沟，提升物理合规性。
AI.method: 提出两项核心机制：1）状态增强规划（State-Augmented Planning），用有限状态机强制执行Design-Verify-Rectify流程，在执行前检查硬件与操作合规性；2）语义符号落地（Semantic Symbol Grounding），将复杂设备模式抽象为符号表示，以缓解上下文长度瓶颈并降低约6倍token消耗。
AI.result: 在扩展的BioProBench基准上，BioProAgent的物理合规率达到95.6%，显著优于ReAct的21.0%，说明引入神经符号约束后，系统在不可逆物理环境中的可靠性大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，仅依赖概率式生成的LLM不足以支撑真实实验自动化；将确定性约束、状态机与符号抽象结合，是实现安全、可靠自主执行的重要方向。

title: Vision-Language Semantic Grounding for Multi-Domain Crop-Weed Segmentation
summary: Fine-grained crop-weed segmentation is essential for enabling targeted herbicide application in precision agriculture. However, existing deep learning models struggle to generalize across heterogeneous agricultural environments due to reliance on dataset-specific visual features. We propose Vision-Language Weed Segmentation (VL-WS), a novel framework that addresses this limitation by grounding pixel-level segmentation in semantically aligned, domain-invariant representations. Our architecture employs a dual-encoder design, where frozen Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP) embeddings and task-specific spatial features are fused and modulated via Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) layers conditioned on natural language captions. This design enables image level textual descriptions to guide channel-wise feature refinement while preserving fine-grained spatial localization. Unlike prior works restricted to training and evaluation on single-source datasets, VL-WS is trained on a unified corpus that includes close-range ground imagery (robotic platforms) and high-altitude UAV imagery, covering diverse crop types, weed species, growth stages, and sensing conditions. Experimental results across four benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework, with VL-WS achieving a mean Dice score of 91.64% and outperforming the CNN baseline by 4.98%. The largest gains occur on the most challenging weed class, where VL-WS attains 80.45% Dice score compared to 65.03% for the best baseline, representing a 15.42% improvement. VL-WS further maintains stable weed segmentation performance under limited target-domain supervision, indicating improved generalization and data efficiency. These findings highlight the potential of vision-language alignment to enable scalable, label-efficient segmentation models deployable across diverse real-world agricultural domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种视觉-语言杂草分割框架VL-WS，通过将CLIP语义表示与任务特定空间特征融合，并利用自然语言描述进行FiLM调制，以提升作物-杂草细粒度分割在跨场景农业环境中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习分割模型过度依赖数据集特定视觉特征，面对不同农田环境、作物类型、杂草种类、尺度和传感条件时泛化能力不足，难以支撑精准施药等实际应用。
AI.method: 采用双编码器结构：冻结的CLIP图像-文本嵌入提供语义对齐的域不变表示，任务特定编码器提取空间细节特征；再通过由自然语言字幕条件化的FiLM层对特征进行通道级调制与融合。训练时使用统一语料，覆盖近景地面机器人图像与高空无人机图像等多源数据。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上，VL-WS平均Dice达到91.64%，比CNN基线提升4.98%。在最难的杂草类别上，Dice达到80.45%，优于最佳基线65.03%，提升15.42%。在目标域监督较少时仍保持较稳定的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 视觉-语言对齐能够有效增强作物-杂草分割模型的跨域泛化、数据效率和可部署性，为多样化真实农业场景中的标注高效分割提供了可行方向。

title: Efficient Long-Horizon GUI Agents via Training-Free KV Cache Compression
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have emerged as powerful engines for autonomous GUI agents, yet their deployment is severely constrained by the substantial memory footprint and latency of the Key-Value (KV) cache during long-horizon interactions. While existing cache compression methods have proven effective for LLMs, we empirically demonstrate that they suffer from suboptimal performance in GUI scenarios due to a fundamental misalignment: unlike general visual tasks where attention sparsity varies across layers, GUI attention patterns exhibit uniform high-sparsity across all transformer layers. Motivated by this insight, we propose ST-Lite, a training-free KV cache compression framework tailored for efficient GUI agents that explicitly addresses the dynamic spatio-trajectory dependencies within GUI data streams. ST-Lite introduces a novel dual-branch scoring policy incorporating Component-centric Spatial Saliency (CSS) and Trajectory-aware Semantic Gating (TSG). Specifically, CSS preserves the structural integrity of interactive UI elements by evaluating local neighborhood saliency, while TSG mitigates historical redundancy by dynamically filtering visually repetitive KV pairs within the interaction trajectory. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that with only a 10-20% cache budget, ST-Lite achieves a 2.45x decoding acceleration while maintaining comparable or even superior performance compared to full-cache baselines, offering a scalable solution for resource-constrained GUI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向GUI代理的训练无关KV缓存压缩框架ST-Lite，利用双分支打分策略在大幅压缩缓存的同时保持甚至提升性能，并显著加速解码。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型用于GUI自动化时，长时交互会带来KV缓存占用大、延迟高的问题；现有面向LLM的缓存压缩方法在GUI场景中效果不佳，根本原因是GUI注意力模式在各层都呈现高稀疏且更一致的特征。
AI.method: ST-Lite采用训练无关的KV缓存压缩机制，包含两个分支：一是组件中心空间显著性（CSS），通过局部邻域显著性保留UI交互元素的结构信息；二是轨迹感知语义门控（TSG），沿交互轨迹动态过滤视觉上重复的历史KV对，从而减少冗余。
AI.result: 在仅保留10%到20%缓存预算的条件下，ST-Lite实现了2.45倍解码加速，同时在多项评估中达到与全缓存基线相当或更优的效果。
AI.conclusion: ST-Lite为资源受限的GUI智能体提供了一种可扩展、无需训练的KV缓存压缩方案，能够有效缓解长上下文交互中的内存与延迟瓶颈。

title: Zero-Shot and Supervised Bird Image Segmentation Using Foundation Models: A Dual-Pipeline Approach with Grounding DINO~1.5, YOLOv11, and SAM~2.1
summary: Bird image segmentation remains a challenging task in computer vision due to extreme pose diversity, complex plumage patterns, and variable lighting conditions. This paper presents a dual-pipeline framework for binary bird image segmentation leveraging 2025 foundation models. We introduce two operating modes built upon Segment Anything Model 2.1 (SAM 2.1) as a shared frozen backbone: (1) a zero-shot pipeline using Grounding DINO 1.5 to detect birds via the text prompt "bird" before prompting SAM 2.1 with bounding boxes requiring no labelled bird data; and (2) a supervised pipeline that fine-tunes YOLOv11 on the CUB-200-2011 dataset for high-precision detection, again prompting SAM 2.1 for pixel-level masks. The segmentation model is never retrained for new species or domains. On CUB-200-2011 (11,788 images, 200 species), the supervised pipeline achieves IoU 0.912, Dice 0.954, and F1 0.953 outperforming all prior baselines including SegFormer-B2 (IoU 0.842) by +7.0 percentage points. The zero-shot pipeline achieves IoU 0.831 using only a text prompt, the first such result reported on this benchmark. We demonstrate that prompt-based foundation model pipelines outperform task specific end-to-end trained segmentation networks, while requiring only lightweight detector fine-tuning (~1 hour) for domain adaptation. Complete PyTorch implementation, dataset preparation scripts, and trained weights are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个基于SAM 2.1的双管线鸟类图像分割框架：零样本管线依赖文本提示和Grounding DINO 1.5，监督管线在CUB-200-2011上微调YOLOv11进行检测后再由SAM 2.1输出像素级掩码；其中监督方案取得了IoU 0.912、Dice 0.954、F1 0.953，零样本方案取得了IoU 0.831。
AI.motivation: 鸟类图像分割面临姿态变化大、羽毛纹理复杂和光照不稳定等难题，传统端到端分割网络在跨物种、跨场景泛化上存在局限，因此作者希望利用基础模型与提示式流程提升分割效果并降低对像素级标注的依赖。
AI.method: 以冻结的SAM 2.1作为共享分割骨干，设计两种工作模式：其一为零样本管线，用文本提示“bird”驱动Grounding DINO 1.5检测鸟体框，再输入SAM 2.1生成掩码；其二为监督管线，在CUB-200-2011上微调YOLOv11进行高精度检测，再用SAM 2.1完成分割。分割模型本身不针对新物种或新域重新训练。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011数据集上，监督管线达到IoU 0.912、Dice 0.954、F1 0.953，优于此前最佳基线SegFormer-B2的IoU 0.842，提升7.0个百分点；零样本管线仅凭文本提示即可达到IoU 0.831，且作者称这是该基准上的首次此类结果。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，基于提示的基础模型流程可以在鸟类分割任务上超过专门训练的端到端分割网络，并且只需较轻量的检测器微调即可实现领域适配，具有较好的实用性与可迁移性。

title: Towards Long-Form Spatio-Temporal Video Grounding
summary: In real scenarios, videos can span several minutes or even hours. However, existing research on spatio-temporal video grounding (STVG), given a textual query, mainly focuses on localizing targets in short videos of tens of seconds, typically less than one minute, which limits real-world applications. In this paper, we explore Long-Form STVG (LF-STVG), which aims to locate targets in long-term videos. Compared with short videos, long-term videos contain much longer temporal spans and more irrelevant information, making it difficult for existing STVG methods that process all frames at once. To address this challenge, we propose an AutoRegressive Transformer architecture for LF-STVG, termed ART-STVG. Unlike conventional STVG methods that require the entire video sequence to make predictions at once, ART-STVG treats the video as streaming input and processes frames sequentially, enabling efficient handling of long videos. To model spatio-temporal context, we design spatial and temporal memory banks and apply them to the decoders. Since memories from different moments are not always relevant to the current frame, we introduce simple yet effective memory selection strategies to provide more relevant information to the decoders, significantly improving performance. Furthermore, instead of parallel spatial and temporal localization, we propose a cascaded spatio-temporal design that connects the spatial decoder to the temporal decoder, allowing fine-grained spatial cues to assist complex temporal localization in long videos. Experiments on newly extended LF-STVG datasets show that ART-STVG significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, while achieving competitive performance on conventional short-form STVG. Our code is at: https://github.com/HengLan/ART-STVG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出长视频时空视频定位任务 LF-STVG，并设计自回归 Transformer 架构 ART-STVG，以流式方式逐帧处理长视频，通过空间/时间记忆库、记忆选择机制和级联式时空定位提升长视频中的目标定位效果。
AI.motivation: 现有时空视频定位方法主要面向几十秒以内的短视频，通常需要一次性处理整段视频，难以应对真实场景中持续数分钟甚至数小时的长视频；长视频包含更长时间跨度和更多无关信息，导致计算与定位都更困难。
AI.method: 作者提出 ART-STVG：1）将视频视为流式输入，采用自回归 Transformer 逐帧处理，避免一次性输入整段视频；2）构建空间记忆库与时间记忆库，为解码器提供历史上下文；3）设计简单有效的记忆选择策略，从不同时间点的记忆中筛选与当前帧更相关的信息；4）采用级联式时空设计，将空间解码器输出连接到时间解码器，用细粒度空间线索辅助复杂的时间定位。
AI.result: 在新扩展的 LF-STVG 数据集上，ART-STVG 显著优于现有最先进方法；同时在传统短视频 STVG 任务上也保持了具有竞争力的性能，说明该方法具有较好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将 STVG 从短视频扩展到长视频场景，证明了流式自回归建模、记忆筛选和级联时空解码对长视频定位非常有效，为真实场景中的长时序视频理解提供了更实用的解决方案。

title: Spatio-Temporal Token Pruning for Efficient High-Resolution GUI Agents
summary: Pure-vision GUI agents provide universal interaction capabilities but suffer from severe efficiency bottlenecks due to the massive spatiotemporal redundancy inherent in high-resolution screenshots and historical trajectories. We identify two critical misalignments in existing compression paradigms: the temporal mismatch, where uniform history encoding diverges from the agent's "fading memory" attention pattern, and the spatial topology conflict, where unstructured pruning compromises the grid integrity required for precise coordinate grounding, inducing spatial hallucinations. To address these challenges, we introduce GUIPruner, a training-free framework tailored for high-resolution GUI navigation. It synergizes Temporal-Adaptive Resolution (TAR), which eliminates historical redundancy via decay-based resizing, and Stratified Structure-aware Pruning (SSP), which prioritizes interactive foregrounds and semantic anchors while safeguarding global layout. Extensive evaluations across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that GUIPruner consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance, effectively preventing the collapse observed in large-scale models under high compression. Notably, on Qwen2-VL-2B, our method delivers a 3.4x reduction in FLOPs and a 3.3x speedup in vision encoding latency while retaining over 94% of the original performance, enabling real-time, high-precision navigation with minimal resource consumption.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个面向高分辨率GUI导航的免训练压缩框架GUIPruner，通过时间自适应分辨率和分层结构感知剪枝，减少视觉与历史轨迹中的冗余，同时尽量保持坐标定位精度与全局布局完整性。
AI.motivation: 纯视觉GUI智能体虽然具备通用交互能力，但高分辨率截图和历史轨迹带来显著的时空冗余，导致编码效率低下。现有压缩方法存在两类关键不匹配：一是时间维度上统一编码历史信息，与智能体的衰减式记忆关注模式不一致；二是空间维度上无结构剪枝破坏网格完整性，影响精确坐标定位并引发空间幻觉。
AI.method: 作者提出GUIPruner，包括两部分：1）时间自适应分辨率（TAR），根据记忆衰减规律对历史信息进行分辨率递减处理，以消除时间冗余；2）分层结构感知剪枝（SSP），优先保留交互前景和语义锚点，同时维护整体布局与网格结构，降低空间失真。该方法为训练-free框架，适用于高分辨率GUI导航。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上，GUIPruner表现稳定且达到最优或接近最优性能，在高压缩条件下仍能避免大模型常见的性能崩溃。以Qwen2-VL-2B为例，方法带来3.4倍FLOPs下降和3.3倍视觉编码延迟加速，同时保留超过94%的原始性能。
AI.conclusion: GUIPruner通过同时处理时间冗余与空间结构约束，实现了低开销、高精度的GUI导航压缩方案，证明了在尽量不损害性能的前提下提升纯视觉GUI智能体实时性是可行的。

title: Avenir-UX: Automated UX Evaluation via Simulated Human Web Interaction with GUI Grounding
summary: Evaluating web usability typically requires time-consuming user studies and expert reviews, which often limits iteration speed during product development, especially for small teams and agile workflows. We present Avenir-UX, a user-experience evaluation agent that simulates user behavior on websites and produces standardized usability. Unlike traditional tools that rely on DOM parsing, Avenir-UX grounds actions and observations, enabling it to interact with real web pages end-to-end while maintaining a coherent trace of the user journey. Building on Avenir-Web, our system pairs this robust interaction with simulated user behavior profiles and a structured evaluation protocol that integrates the System Usability Scale (SUS), step-wise Single Ease Questions (SEQ), and concurrent Think Aloud. Subsequently, a comprehensive User Experience (UX) report will be generated. We discuss the architecture of Avenir-UX and illustrate how its multimodal grounding improves robustness for web-based interaction and UX evaluation scenarios, paving the way for a new era of continuous, scalable, and data-driven usability testing that empowers every developer to build web interfaces that are usable. Code is available at: https://github.com/Onflow-AI/Avenir-UX

AI.tldr: 本文提出Avenir-UX，一种用于网站用户体验评估的智能代理，可模拟用户行为、执行端到端网页交互，并自动生成标准化可用性与UX报告。
AI.motivation: 传统网页可用性评估依赖用户研究和专家评审，耗时较长，影响小团队和敏捷开发中的迭代速度，因此需要更快速、可扩展的自动化评估方案。
AI.method: 系统以Avenir-Web为基础，结合多模态定位与真实网页交互能力，模拟不同用户行为画像，并采用结构化评估协议，将SUS、分步SEQ和同步Think Aloud整合到评估流程中，最终生成完整UX报告。
AI.result: 该系统能够在真实网页上进行更鲁棒的端到端操作与观察，相比依赖DOM解析的工具，更适合连续、规模化的可用性测试。
AI.conclusion: Avenir-UX展示了将多模态交互、用户行为模拟和标准化量表结合用于自动化UX评估的可行性，有望支持持续、数据驱动的网页可用性测试。

title: GUI-Libra: Training Native GUI Agents to Reason and Act with Action-aware Supervision and Partially Verifiable RL
summary: Open-source native GUI agents still lag behind closed-source systems on long-horizon navigation tasks. This gap stems from two limitations: a shortage of high-quality, action-aligned reasoning data, and the direct adoption of generic post-training pipelines that overlook the unique challenges of GUI agents. We identify two fundamental issues in these pipelines: (i) standard SFT with CoT reasoning often hurts grounding, and (ii) step-wise RLVR-tyle training faces partial verifiability, where multiple actions can be correct but only a single demonstrated action is used for verification. This makes offline step-wise metrics weak predictors of online task success. In this work, we present GUI-Libra, a tailored training recipe that addresses these challenges. First, to mitigate the scarcity of action-aligned reasoning data, we introduce a data construction and filtering pipeline and release a curated 81K GUI reasoning dataset. Second, to reconcile reasoning with grounding, we propose action-aware SFT that mixes reasoning-then-action and direct-action data and reweights tokens to emphasize action and grounding. Third, to stabilize RL under partial verifiability, we identify the overlooked importance of KL regularization in RLVR and show that a KL trust region is critical for improving offline-to-online predictability; we further introduce success-adaptive scaling to downweight unreliable negative gradients. Across diverse web and mobile benchmarks, GUI-Libra consistently improves both step-wise accuracy and end-to-end task completion. Our results suggest that carefully designed post-training and data curation can unlock significantly stronger task-solving capabilities without costly online data collection. We release our dataset, code, and models to facilitate further research on data-efficient post-training for reasoning-capable GUI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GUI-Libra，一套面向图形界面智能体的定制化后训练方案，通过数据构建、动作感知监督微调和带KL约束的强化学习，提升长程导航任务中的推理与落地执行能力。
AI.motivation: 开源原生GUI智能体在长程导航任务上落后于闭源系统，主要原因是高质量、动作对齐的推理数据不足，以及通用后训练流程不适合GUI任务的特殊性，尤其是推理与界面定位之间的矛盾和部分可验证性问题。
AI.method: 1）构建并过滤GUI推理数据，发布81K规模的高质量数据集；2）提出动作感知SFT，混合“先推理后动作”和直接动作数据，并对与动作和定位相关的token加权；3）在RLVR训练中引入KL正则作为信任域约束，并提出成功自适应缩放，以减弱不可靠的负梯度影响。
AI.result: 在多个网页和移动端基准上，GUI-Libra同时提升了逐步准确率和端到端任务完成率；实验还表明，KL正则对缓解部分可验证性、提升离线指标对在线成功的预测性至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 针对GUI智能体设计的后训练策略与数据治理，比直接套用通用流程更有效；在无需昂贵在线采集的情况下，合理的数据构造、动作对齐监督和稳定强化学习可以显著增强GUI智能体的任务解决能力。

title: Semantic Partial Grounding via LLMs
summary: Grounding is a critical step in classical planning, yet it often becomes a computational bottleneck due to the exponential growth in grounded actions and atoms as task size increases. Recent advances in partial grounding have addressed this challenge by incrementally grounding only the most promising operators, guided by predictive models. However, these approaches primarily rely on relational features or learned embeddings and do not leverage the textual and structural cues present in PDDL descriptions. We propose SPG-LLM, which uses LLMs to analyze the domain and problem files to heuristically identify potentially irrelevant objects, actions, and predicates prior to grounding, significantly reducing the size of the grounded task. Across seven hard-to-ground benchmarks, SPG-LLM achieves faster grounding-often by orders of magnitude-while delivering comparable or better plan costs in some domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPG-LLM，用大语言模型在正式展开前先分析PDDL域文件和问题文件，启发式筛除可能无关的对象、动作和谓词，从而显著减少地面化规模并加速经典规划中的grounding过程。
AI.motivation: 经典规划中的grounding常因动作和原子数量随任务规模指数增长而成为瓶颈。现有部分grounding方法主要依赖关系特征或学习到的嵌入，未充分利用PDDL文本与结构信息，因此作者希望借助LLM更早识别可忽略元素以降低计算开销。
AI.method: 提出SPG-LLM框架，利用LLM直接分析PDDL的domain和problem文件，在grounding之前启发式判断哪些对象、动作、谓词可能无关，并据此裁剪任务空间，再进行后续grounding与规划。
AI.result: 在7个难以ground的基准上，SPG-LLM显著加快了grounding速度，部分情况下提升可达数量级；同时在若干领域中获得了与原方法相当或更优的计划代价。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，LLM能够有效利用PDDL中的文本与结构线索来辅助规划预处理，降低grounding开销并保持规划质量，为大规模经典规划提供了一种有前景的启发式压缩方案。

title: NeuroNarrator: A Generalist EEG-to-Text Foundation Model for Clinical Interpretation via Spectro-Spatial Grounding and Temporal State-Space Reasoning
summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) provides a non-invasive window into neural dynamics at high temporal resolution and plays a pivotal role in clinical neuroscience research. Despite this potential, prevailing computational approaches to EEG analysis remain largely confined to task-specific classification objectives or coarse-grained pattern recognition, offering limited support for clinically meaningful interpretation. To address these limitations, we introduce NeuroNarrator, the first generalist EEG-to-text foundation model designed to translate electrophysiological segments into precise clinical narratives. A cornerstone of this framework is the curation of NeuroCorpus-160K, the first harmonized large-scale resource pairing over 160,000 EEG segments with structured, clinically grounded natural-language descriptions. Our architecture first aligns temporal EEG waveforms with spatial topographic maps via a rigorous contrastive objective, establishing spectro-spatially grounded representations. Building on this grounding, we condition a Large Language Model through a state-space-inspired formulation that integrates historical temporal and spectral context to support coherent clinical narrative generation. This approach establishes a principled bridge between continuous signal dynamics and discrete clinical language, enabling interpretable narrative generation that facilitates expert interpretation and supports clinical reporting workflows. Extensive evaluations across diverse benchmarks and zero-shot transfer tasks highlight NeuroNarrator's capacity to integrate temporal, spectral, and spatial dynamics, positioning it as a foundational framework for time-frequency-aware, open-ended clinical interpretation of electrophysiological data.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个通用的EEG转文本基础模型NeuroNarrator，可将脑电信号片段自动生成临床叙述，旨在提升EEG分析的可解释性与临床报告能力。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG计算方法多集中于特定任务分类或粗粒度模式识别，难以支持临床上可直接使用的解释性输出，因此需要一种能够把连续电生理信号转换为自然语言临床描述的通用框架。
AI.method: 作者构建了NeuroCorpus-160K数据集，包含超过16万段EEG及其结构化临床自然语言描述；模型先通过对比学习对齐EEG时域波形与空间拓扑图，学习具有频谱-空间约束的表示，再以一种受状态空间思想启发的方式条件化大语言模型，融合历史时序与频谱上下文以生成连贯的临床叙述。
AI.result: 实验表明，NeuroNarrator在多个基准测试和零样本迁移任务中表现出较强能力，能够综合建模时间、频谱和空间动态，并生成更具解释性的文本输出。
AI.conclusion: 该工作把连续EEG动态与离散临床语言有效连接起来，提供了一个面向开放式临床解释的基础框架，有望支持专家解读和临床报告流程。

title: PaperTrail: A Claim-Evidence Interface for Grounding Provenance in LLM-based Scholarly Q&A
comment: 25 pages, 3 figures. Accepted at the ACM CHI conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems 2026
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in scholarly question-answering (QA) systems to help researchers synthesize vast amounts of literature. However, these systems often produce subtle errors (e.g., unsupported claims, errors of omission), and current provenance mechanisms like source citations are not granular enough for the rigorous verification that scholarly domain requires. To address this, we introduce PaperTrail, a novel interface that decomposes both LLM answers and source documents into discrete claims and evidence, mapping them to reveal supported assertions, unsupported claims, and information omitted from the source texts. We evaluated PaperTrail in a within-subjects study with 26 researchers who performed two scholarly editing tasks using PaperTrail and a baseline interface. Our results show that PaperTrail significantly lowered participants' trust compared to the baseline. However, this increased caution did not translate to behavioral changes, as people continued to rely on LLM-generated scholarly edits to avoid a cognitively burdensome task. We discuss the value of claim-evidence matching for understanding LLM trustworthiness in scholarly settings, and present design implications for cognition-friendly communication of provenance information.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PaperTrail，一种将大语言模型回答与来源文献拆分为独立“主张-证据”单元的界面，用于识别支持、未支持和遗漏信息，以提升学术问答中的可验证性。
AI.motivation: 学术问答系统中的大语言模型虽然有助于综述与整合文献，但容易出现细微错误，如无依据断言和信息遗漏；而传统引用方式粒度不够，难以满足学术场景对严格核验的需求。
AI.method: 作者设计了PaperTrail界面，将LLM答案和源文档都分解为离散主张与证据，并建立映射关系以暴露支持、未支持及遗漏内容；随后通过一项被试内实验，招募26名研究者完成两个学术编辑任务，对比PaperTrail与基线界面。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，PaperTrail显著降低了参与者对系统的信任；但这种更高的谨慎并未转化为行为改变，参与者仍倾向于依赖LLM生成的学术编辑内容，以避免认知负担较高的人工核查。
AI.conclusion: 主张-证据匹配有助于理解并呈现学术场景下LLM的可信度，但仅降低信任不足以改变使用行为；未来界面设计应更关注如何以更符合认知习惯的方式传达来源与 provenance 信息。

title: VGGDrive: Empowering Vision-Language Models with Cross-View Geometric Grounding for Autonomous Driving
summary: The significance of cross-view 3D geometric modeling capabilities for autonomous driving is self-evident, yet existing Vision-Language Models (VLMs) inherently lack this capability, resulting in their mediocre performance. While some promising approaches attempt to mitigate this by constructing Q&A data for auxiliary training, they still fail to fundamentally equip VLMs with the ability to comprehensively handle diverse evaluation protocols. We thus chart a new course, advocating for the infusion of VLMs with the cross-view geometric grounding of mature 3D foundation models, closing this critical capability gap in autonomous driving. In this spirit, we propose a novel architecture, VGGDrive, which empowers Vision-language models with cross-view Geometric Grounding for autonomous Driving. Concretely, to bridge the cross-view 3D geometric features from the frozen visual 3D model with the VLM's 2D visual features, we introduce a plug-and-play Cross-View 3D Geometric Enabler (CVGE). The CVGE decouples the base VLM architecture and effectively empowers the VLM with 3D features through a hierarchical adaptive injection mechanism. Extensive experiments show that VGGDrive enhances base VLM performance across five autonomous driving benchmarks, including tasks like cross-view risk perception, motion prediction, and trajectory planning. It's our belief that mature 3D foundation models can empower autonomous driving tasks through effective integration, and we hope our initial exploration demonstrates the potential of this paradigm to the autonomous driving community.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VGGDrive，通过跨视角三维几何对齐机制，将冻结的3D基础模型几何能力注入视觉语言模型，从而提升其在自动驾驶中的跨视角感知、运动预测与轨迹规划等任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型缺乏跨视角三维几何建模能力，因此在自动驾驶相关评测中表现一般；仅依赖问答数据辅助训练，难以从根本上补足这一能力缺口。
AI.method: 提出可插拔的跨视角三维几何增强器CVGE，将成熟3D基础模型提取的跨视角几何特征与VLM的二维视觉特征进行融合；通过分层自适应注入机制，在不破坏基础VLM架构的前提下实现几何能力增强。
AI.result: 在五个自动驾驶基准上进行了充分实验，结果表明VGGDrive可显著提升基座VLM性能，覆盖跨视角风险感知、运动预测和轨迹规划等任务。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明，将成熟3D基础模型的几何先验以高效融合方式注入VLM，是弥补自动驾驶场景中跨视角三维理解短板的有效路径，具有进一步推广潜力。

title: Grounding LLMs in Scientific Discovery via Embodied Actions
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown significant potential in scientific discovery but struggle to bridge the gap between theoretical reasoning and verifiable physical simulation. Existing solutions operate in a passive "execute-then-response" loop and thus lacks runtime perception, obscuring agents to transient anomalies (e.g., numerical instability or diverging oscillations). To address this limitation, we propose EmbodiedAct, a framework that transforms established scientific software into active embodied agents by grounding LLMs in embodied actions with a tight perception-execution loop. We instantiate EmbodiedAct within MATLAB and evaluate it on complex engineering design and scientific modeling tasks. Extensive experiments show that EmbodiedAct significantly outperforms existing baselines, achieving SOTA performance by ensuring satisfactory reliability and stability in long-horizon simulations and enhanced accuracy in scientific modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EmbodiedAct，将大型语言模型嵌入到科学软件中形成具备感知-执行闭环的主动代理，以提升长时程仿真中的稳定性、可靠性与建模精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多采用“执行后反馈”的被动模式，缺乏运行时感知能力，难以及时发现数值不稳定、振荡发散等瞬时异常，因此难以有效连接理论推理与可验证的物理仿真。
AI.method: 作者提出EmbodiedAct框架，将成熟的科学软件改造为具身代理，使LLM通过紧密的感知-执行循环进行决策与干预；并在MATLAB中实现该框架，用于复杂工程设计与科学建模任务评测。
AI.result: 实验表明，EmbodiedAct相比现有基线取得显著提升，在长时程仿真中表现出更高的可靠性与稳定性，并在科学建模任务上获得更高准确性，整体达到最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，将LLM与科学软件深度耦合并引入运行时感知机制，能够有效增强其面对复杂仿真任务时的鲁棒性与任务完成质量。

title: VAGNet: Grounding 3D Affordance from Human-Object Interactions in Videos
summary: 3D object affordance grounding aims to identify regions on 3D objects that support human-object interaction (HOI), a capability essential to embodied visual reasoning. However, most existing approaches rely on static visual or textual cues, neglecting that affordances are inherently defined by dynamic actions. As a result, they often struggle to localize the true contact regions involved in real interactions. We take a different perspective. Humans learn how to use objects by observing and imitating actions, not just by examining shapes. Motivated by this intuition, we introduce video-guided 3D affordance grounding, which leverages dynamic interaction sequences to provide functional supervision. To achieve this, we propose VAGNet, a framework that aligns video-derived interaction cues with 3D structure to resolve ambiguities that static cues cannot address. To support this new setting, we introduce PVAD, the first HOI video-3D pairing affordance dataset, providing functional supervision unavailable in prior works. Extensive experiments on PVAD show that VAGNet achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming static-based baselines. The code and dataset will be open publicly.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种“视频引导的三维可供性定位”新任务，用动态交互视频中的动作信息来监督3D物体上可用于人机交互的接触区域定位，并提出VAGNet与PVAD数据集，在该任务上取得了更好的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有三维可供性定位方法主要依赖静态图像或文本线索，忽视了可供性本质上由“动作”和“使用方式”定义，因此在真实交互接触区域的定位上容易出现歧义。作者认为，人类学习物体用途更依赖观察和模仿动作，而不是仅看形状，因此需要引入动态交互序列提供功能性监督。
AI.method: 作者提出视频引导的3D可供性定位框架VAGNet，将视频中提取的人体-物体交互线索与3D结构进行对齐，以缓解静态线索无法解决的歧义。同时构建了PVAD数据集，这是首个用于HOI视频-3D配对的可供性数据集，为该任务提供了以往工作缺乏的功能监督。
AI.result: 在PVAD数据集上的大量实验表明，VAGNet达到当前最优性能，并显著优于基于静态信息的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了动态交互视频对三维可供性理解的价值，推动了从静态感知走向基于行为监督的3D可供性定位研究，并提供了新的数据集与方法支持后续研究。

title: Turing Test on Screen: A Benchmark for Mobile GUI Agent Humanization
summary: The rise of autonomous GUI agents has triggered adversarial countermeasures from digital platforms, yet existing research prioritizes utility and robustness over the critical dimension of anti-detection. We argue that for agents to survive in human-centric ecosystems, they must evolve Humanization capabilities. We introduce the ``Turing Test on Screen,'' formally modeling the interaction as a MinMax optimization problem between a detector and an agent aiming to minimize behavioral divergence. We then collect a new high-fidelity dataset of mobile touch dynamics, and conduct our analysis that vanilla LMM-based agents are easily detectable due to unnatural kinematics. Consequently, we establish the Agent Humanization Benchmark (AHB) and detection metrics to quantify the trade-off between imitability and utility.
