Finally, we propose methods ranging from heuristic noise to data-driven behavioral matching, demonstrating that agents can achieve high imitability theoretically and empirically without sacrificing performance. This work shifts the paradigm from whether an agent can perform a task to how it performs it within a human-centric ecosystem, laying the groundwork for seamless coexistence in adversarial digital environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“屏幕上的图灵测试”框架，关注自治GUI智能体在平台反检测环境中的“人性化”能力，而不仅是任务完成率或鲁棒性。作者构建了一个最小化行为差异的对抗优化模型，收集移动端触控动力学数据，发现基于大模型的原始智能体因运动学特征不自然而易被检测，并据此建立了Agent Humanization Benchmark（AHB）及相关检测指标，最后证明通过启发式扰动和数据驱动匹配等方法，智能体可在不显著损失性能的前提下提升可模仿性。
AI.motivation: 现有自治GUI智能体研究更重视可用性与鲁棒性，但在真实的人类主导平台中，智能体还必须具备不易被识别的“人性化”特征，否则难以长期共存。作者的动机是将“反检测/可伪装性”作为核心研究目标纳入智能体评估。
AI.method: 1）提出“Turing Test on Screen”形式化框架，将检测器与智能体之间的交互建模为最小-最大优化问题，目标是最小化智能体行为与人类行为的偏差；2）采集高保真移动触控动态数据，用于分析人类操作模式；3）基于该数据构建Agent Humanization Benchmark（AHB）与检测指标，用于衡量可模仿性与任务效用之间的权衡；4）设计两类人性化方法，包括启发式噪声注入与数据驱动的行为匹配，并比较其效果。
AI.result: 实验分析表明，未经专门设计的LMM/大模型智能体由于触控轨迹和运动学特征过于不自然，容易被检测器识别；同时，所提出的多种人性化策略可以显著提升行为拟人程度，并且在理论与实证上都能在较低或可接受的性能损失下实现较高可模仿性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将自治GUI智能体的研究重点从“能否完成任务”推进到“如何以更像人类的方式完成任务”，提出了新的评测基准、形式化建模与优化思路，为在对抗性数字平台中的隐蔽协作与长期共存奠定了基础。

title: ActionEngine: From Reactive to Programmatic GUI Agents via State Machine Memory
summary:
Existing Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents operate through step-by-step calls to vision language models--taking a screenshot, reasoning about the next action, executing it, then repeating on the new page--resulting in high costs and latency that scale with the number of reasoning steps, and limited accuracy due to no persistent memory of previously visited pages.
  We propose ActionEngine, a training-free framework that transitions from reactive execution to programmatic planning through a novel two-agent architecture: a Crawling Agent that constructs an updatable state-machine memory of the GUIs through offline exploration, and an Execution Agent that leverages this memory to synthesize complete, executable Python programs for online task execution.
  To ensure robustness against evolving interfaces, execution failures trigger a vision-based re-grounding fallback that repairs the failed action and updates the memory.
  This design drastically improves both efficiency and accuracy: on Reddit tasks from the WebArena benchmark, our agent achieves 95% task success with on average a single LLM call, compared to 66% for the strongest vision-only baseline, while reducing cost by 11.8x and end-to-end latency by 2x.
  Together, these components yield scalable and reliable GUI interaction by combining global programmatic planning, crawler-validated action templates, and node-level execution with localized validation and repair.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个无需训练的GUI智能体框架ActionEngine，通过“离线爬取建模 + 在线程序化执行”替代逐步视觉推理，显著降低调用成本和延迟，同时提升任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体依赖“截图—推理—执行—再截图”的循环方式，导致推理次数越多，成本和延迟越高；同时缺乏对已访问页面的持久记忆，容易影响准确性。
AI.method: 设计了双智能体架构：爬取智能体在离线阶段构建可更新的GUI状态机记忆；执行智能体在在线阶段利用该记忆直接合成完整可执行的Python程序。若执行失败，则触发基于视觉的重定位修复机制，用于纠正动作并更新记忆，从而增强对界面变化的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在WebArena基准的Reddit任务上，平均仅需一次LLM调用即可达到95%的任务成功率，优于最强纯视觉基线的66%；同时成本降低11.8倍，端到端延迟降低2倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过全局程序化规划、经爬取验证的动作模板以及节点级执行与局部验证修复，实现了更可扩展、更可靠的GUI交互。

title: Contextual Safety Reasoning and Grounding for Open-World Robots
summary: Robots are increasingly operating in open-world environments where safe behavior depends on context: the same hallway may require different navigation strategies when crowded versus empty, or during an emergency versus normal operations. Traditional safety approaches enforce fixed constraints in user-specified contexts, limiting their ability to handle the open-ended contextual variability of real-world deployment. We address this gap via CORE, a safety framework that enables online contextual reasoning, grounding, and enforcement without prior knowledge of the environment (e.g., maps or safety specifications). CORE uses a vision-language model (VLM) to continuously reason about context-dependent safety rules directly from visual observations, grounds these rules in the physical environment, and enforces the resulting spatially-defined safe sets via control barrier functions. We provide probabilistic safety guarantees for CORE that account for perceptual uncertainty, and we demonstrate through simulation and real-world experiments that CORE enforces contextually appropriate behavior in unseen environments, significantly outperforming prior semantic safety methods that lack online contextual reasoning. Ablation studies validate our theoretical guarantees and underscore the importance of both VLM-based reasoning and spatial grounding for enforcing contextual safety in novel settings. We provide additional resources at https://zacravichandran.github.io/CORE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CORE，一种面向开放世界机器人安全的框架，能够在没有先验地图或安全规范的情况下，基于视觉语言模型在线推理上下文相关安全规则，并结合控制屏障函数进行安全约束与执行。
AI.motivation: 传统安全方法通常依赖预先指定的固定约束和已知环境，难以应对真实部署中不断变化的上下文场景，例如拥挤与空旷、正常与应急等条件下需要不同的导航策略，因此需要一种能够在线理解并适应上下文变化的安全机制。
AI.method: CORE利用视觉语言模型从视觉观测中持续推理与当前场景相关的安全规则，再将这些规则映射到物理空间中的具体安全区域，最后通过控制屏障函数对机器人控制进行约束；同时考虑感知不确定性，并给出概率安全保证。
AI.result: 仿真和真实世界实验表明，CORE能够在未见过的环境中执行符合上下文的安全行为，整体性能显著优于缺乏在线上下文推理能力的先前语义安全方法；消融实验进一步验证了理论保证，并说明VLM推理与空间落地对上下文安全都很关键。
AI.conclusion: CORE展示了将视觉语言模型的上下文理解能力与控制理论中的安全约束机制结合起来的可行性，为开放世界机器人提供了一种无需预设环境知识即可实现在线上下文安全推理、落地与执行的新路径。

title: TAG: Thinking with Action Unit Grounding for Facial Expression Recognition
summary: Facial Expression Recognition (FER) is a fine-grained visual understanding task where reliable predictions require reasoning over localized and meaningful facial cues. Recent vision--language models (VLMs) enable natural language explanations for FER, but their reasoning is often ungrounded, producing fluent yet unverifiable rationales that are weakly tied to visual evidence and prone to hallucination, leading to poor robustness across different datasets. We propose TAG (Thinking with Action Unit Grounding), a vision--language framework that explicitly constrains multimodal reasoning to be supported by facial Action Units (AUs). TAG requires intermediate reasoning steps to be grounded in AU-related facial regions, yielding predictions accompanied by verifiable visual evidence. The model is trained via supervised fine-tuning on AU-grounded reasoning traces followed by reinforcement learning with an AU-aware reward that aligns predicted regions with external AU detectors. Evaluated on RAF-DB, FERPlus, and AffectNet, TAG consistently outperforms strong open-source and closed-source VLM baselines while simultaneously improving visual faithfulness. Ablation and preference studies further show that AU-grounded rewards stabilize reasoning and mitigate hallucination, demonstrating the importance of structured grounded intermediate representations for trustworthy multimodal reasoning in FER. The code will be available at https://github.com/would1920/FER_TAG .

AI.tldr: 提出了一个名为TAG的视觉-语言框架，用面部动作单元（AU）作为中间约束，使表情识别的推理过程有可验证的视觉依据，从而提升鲁棒性与可信度。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型虽然能给出自然语言解释，但在表情识别中常出现推理缺乏视觉对齐、容易幻觉、跨数据集鲁棒性差的问题，因此需要一种更可解释且更贴近视觉证据的推理方式。
AI.method: TAG通过两阶段训练实现AU约束推理：先用带AU grounding的推理轨迹进行监督微调，再结合AU感知奖励进行强化学习，使中间推理步骤必须对应到AU相关的面部区域，并借助外部AU检测器对区域对齐进行约束。
AI.result: 在RAF-DB、FERPlus和AffectNet上，TAG相比强基线（包括开源和闭源VLM）取得了更好的识别效果，同时提升了视觉忠实度；消融实验和偏好研究表明，AU约束奖励有助于稳定推理并减少幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了在细粒度视觉任务中，引入结构化、可验证的中间表示能够显著提升多模态推理的可靠性，尤其适用于需要依据局部视觉证据进行判断的表情识别场景。

title: Think with Grounding: Curriculum Reinforced Reasoning with Video Grounding for Long Video Understanding
summary: Long video understanding is challenging due to rich and complicated multimodal clues in long temporal range.Current methods adopt reasoning to improve the model's ability to analyze complex video clues in long videos via text-form reasoning.However,the existing literature suffers from the fact that the text-only reasoning under fixed video context may exacerbate hallucinations since detailed crucial clues are often ignored under limited video context length due to the temporal redundancy of long videos.To address this gap,we propose Video-TwG,a curriculum reinforced framework that employs a novel Think-with-Grounding paradigm,enabling video LLMs to actively decide when to perform on-demand grounding during interleaved text-video reasoning, selectively zooming into question-relevant clips only when necessary.Video-TwG can be trained end-to-end in a straightforward manner, without relying on complex auxiliary modules or heavily annotated reasoning tracesIn detail,we design a Two-stage Reinforced Curriculum Strategy, where the model first learns think-with-grounding behavior on a small short-video GQA dataset with grounding labels,and then scales to diverse general QA data with videos of diverse domains to encourage generalization. Further, to handle complex think-with-grounding reasoning for various kinds of data,we propose TwG-GRPO algorithm which features the fine-grained grounding reward, self-confirmed pseudo reward and accuracy-gated mechanism.Finally,we propose to construct a new TwG-51K dataset that facilitates training. Experiments on Video-MME, LongVideoBench, and MLVU show that Video-TwG consistently outperforms strong LVU baselines.Further ablation validates the necessity of our Two-stage Reinforced Curriculum Strategy and shows our TwG-GRPO better leverages diverse unlabeled data to improve grounding quality and reduce redundant groundings without sacrificing QA performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Video-TwG，一种面向长视频理解的课程强化框架，通过“思考-定点 grounding”范式，在需要时再对相关片段进行视频定位，从而减少长视频冗余上下文带来的幻觉问题，并提升问答与定位质量。
AI.motivation: 长视频包含大量时序冗余与复杂多模态线索，传统仅基于固定视频上下文的文本推理容易忽略关键细节，进而放大幻觉；因此需要一种能在推理过程中按需选择相关片段的机制。
AI.method: 提出Video-TwG框架，核心是Think-with-Grounding范式，使模型在交错的文本-视频推理中主动决定何时进行grounding；设计两阶段强化课程策略，先在带定位标注的短视频GQA数据上学习，再扩展到多领域通用QA视频数据；提出TwG-GRPO算法，结合细粒度定位奖励、自确认伪奖励和准确率门控机制；同时构建TwG-51K数据集用于训练。
AI.result: 在Video-MME、LongVideoBench和MLVU上，Video-TwG稳定优于强基线；消融实验表明，两阶段课程策略是有效的，TwG-GRPO能够更好利用未标注数据，提升定位质量，减少冗余grounding，同时不损害问答性能。
AI.conclusion: Video-TwG证明了“按需定位+推理”在长视频理解中的有效性，可在保持问答能力的同时增强关键片段检索与证据对齐，是一种简单但可扩展的端到端训练方案。

title: JAEGER: Joint 3D Audio-Visual Grounding and Reasoning in Simulated Physical Environments
summary: Current audio-visual large language models (AV-LLMs) are predominantly restricted to 2D perception, relying on RGB video and monaural audio. This design choice introduces a fundamental dimensionality mismatch that precludes reliable source localization and spatial reasoning in complex 3D environments. We address this limitation by presenting JAEGER, a framework that extends AV-LLMs to 3D space, to enable joint spatial grounding and reasoning through the integration of RGB-D observations and multi-channel first-order ambisonics. A core contribution of our work is the neural intensity vector (Neural IV), a learned spatial audio representation that encodes robust directional cues to enhance direction-of-arrival estimation, even in adverse acoustic scenarios with overlapping sources. To facilitate large-scale training and systematic evaluation, we propose SpatialSceneQA, a benchmark of 61k instruction-tuning samples curated from simulated physical environments. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently surpasses 2D-centric baselines across diverse spatial perception and reasoning tasks, underscoring the necessity of explicit 3D modelling for advancing AI in physical environments. Our source code, pre-trained model checkpoints, and datasets are available at https://github.com/liuzhan22/JAEGER.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出JAEGER，将传统以2D为主的音视频大语言模型扩展到3D空间，通过RGB-D与多通道空间音频联合建模，实现空间定位与空间推理能力提升。
AI.motivation: 现有音视频大语言模型主要依赖RGB视频和单声道音频，存在维度不匹配问题，难以在复杂三维环境中可靠完成声源定位和空间推理，因此需要显式的3D建模。
AI.method: 提出JAEGER框架，融合RGB-D观测与多通道一阶球谐音频；设计神经强度向量（Neural IV）作为学习式空间音频表示，以增强方向到达估计和重叠声源场景下的方向线索提取；同时构建SpatialSceneQA基准，包含6.1万条来自模拟物理环境的指令微调样本，用于训练与评测。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多种空间感知与推理任务上均稳定优于以2D为中心的基线方法，尤其在复杂声学条件和重叠声源场景下表现更强。
AI.conclusion: 显式引入3D空间建模能够显著提升AV-LLM在物理环境中的空间感知与推理能力，说明仅依赖2D表示不足以支撑可靠的三维理解。

title: Ontology-Guided Neuro-Symbolic Inference: Grounding Language Models with Mathematical Domain Knowledge
comment: Submitted to NeuS 2026. Supplementary materials and code: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18665030
summary: Language models exhibit fundamental limitations -- hallucination, brittleness, and lack of formal grounding -- that are particularly problematic in high-stakes specialist fields requiring verifiable reasoning. I investigate whether formal domain ontologies can enhance language model reliability through retrieval-augmented generation. Using mathematics as proof of concept, I implement a neuro-symbolic pipeline leveraging the OpenMath ontology with hybrid retrieval and cross-encoder reranking to inject relevant definitions into model prompts. Evaluation on the MATH benchmark with three open-source models reveals that ontology-guided context improves performance when retrieval quality is high, but irrelevant context actively degrades it -- highlighting both the promise and challenges of neuro-symbolic approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文研究将形式化领域本体与检索增强生成结合，探索其是否能提升语言模型在高风险专业领域中的可靠性。以数学为验证场景，结果表明：当检索到的上下文足够相关时，基于本体的提示能提升性能；但若检索质量较差，错误上下文会显著拉低效果。
AI.motivation: 作者关注语言模型在幻觉、脆弱性和缺乏形式化依据方面的固有局限，这些问题在需要可验证推理的专业领域尤为严重。因此，研究动机是考察形式化领域本体是否能通过检索增强生成机制，为模型提供更可靠的知识支撑并改善推理稳定性。
AI.method: 以数学作为概念验证场景，构建了一个神经符号流水线：使用OpenMath本体，结合混合检索与交叉编码器重排序，从本体中检索相关定义并注入模型提示词。随后在MATH基准上，对三个开源模型进行评测，比较不同检索质量下的性能变化。
AI.result: 实验发现，当检索质量较高时，本体引导的上下文能够提升模型表现；但如果检索到的内容不相关，反而会主动损害性能。该结果说明上下文注入的收益高度依赖检索准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究支持神经符号方法在专业领域中的潜力，即形式化本体可以帮助语言模型获得更可信的推理支持；但同时也表明，检索模块是系统成败的关键瓶颈。未来要真正提升可靠性，需要进一步改进本体检索与重排序质量，避免无关上下文对模型推理造成干扰。

title: JEPA-DNA: Grounding Genomic Foundation Models through Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures
summary: Genomic Foundation Models (GFMs) typically rely on Masked Language Modeling (MLM) or Next-Token Prediction (NTP) to learn the "Laws of Nature". While effective at capturing local syntax, these generative paradigms prioritize token-level reconstruction over high-level functional context. We introduce JEPA-DNA, a model-agnostic continual training framework that integrates a Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) with traditional generative objectives. By supervising global sequence embeddings in a latent space, JEPA-DNA forces models to predict the functional representations of masked genomic segments, shifting the learning signal from token recovery to semantic alignment. We evaluate JEPA-DNA on 17 diverse genomic benchmark tasks, demonstrating consistent gains in linear probing and zero-shot performance regardless of the underlying GFM architecture or generative objective. Our framework establishes a new state-of-the-art for GFMs, surpassing the best existing models by bridging generative precision with latent semantic grounding. Through extensive ablation studies, we further characterize the synergistic interplay between generative and latent objectives. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/NVIDIA-Digital-Bio/JEPA-DNA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出JEPA-DNA，一种面向基因组基础模型的持续训练框架，将JEPA的潜在空间预测与传统生成式目标结合，以增强模型对功能语义的建模能力；在17个基因组基准任务上取得稳定提升，并刷新了相关任务的最佳结果。
AI.motivation: 现有基因组基础模型主要依赖掩码语言建模或下一词预测，虽然能学习局部序列规律，但更偏向逐token重建，难以充分捕捉高层次的功能上下文。因此，作者希望引入一种能强化语义对齐、提升通用功能表示能力的训练方式。
AI.method: 作者提出JEPA-DNA，一个与具体模型架构无关的持续训练框架：在保留传统生成式目标的同时，引入联合嵌入预测架构，在潜在空间中监督全局序列嵌入，要求模型预测被遮蔽基因组片段的功能表示，从而将学习信号从token恢复转向语义层面对齐。
AI.result: 在17个多样化基因组基准任务上，JEPA-DNA无论用于何种基础模型架构或生成式目标，都能带来一致提升，尤其在线性探测和零样本性能上表现更优；整体上超过现有最佳模型，形成新的状态最优结果。消融实验进一步表明，生成目标与潜在语义目标之间存在互补协同作用。
AI.conclusion: JEPA-DNA表明，将生成式精度与潜在语义表征结合，可以显著增强基因组基础模型的功能理解能力，是一种通用且有效的持续训练范式，适合用于提升不同GFM的下游表现。

title: Knowing Isn't Understanding: Re-grounding Generative Proactivity with Epistemic and Behavioral Insight
comment: 43 rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Generative AI agents equate understanding with resolving explicit queries, an assumption that confines interaction to what users can articulate. This assumption breaks down when users themselves lack awareness of what is missing, risky, or worth considering. In such conditions, proactivity is not merely an efficiency enhancement, but an epistemic necessity. We refer to this condition as epistemic incompleteness: where progress depends on engaging with unknown unknowns for effective partnership. Existing approaches to proactivity remain narrowly anticipatory, extrapolating from past behavior and presuming that goals are already well defined, thereby failing to support users meaningfully. However, surfacing possibilities beyond a user's current awareness is not inherently beneficial. Unconstrained proactive interventions can misdirect attention, overwhelm users, or introduce harm. Proactive agents, therefore, require behavioral grounding: principled constraints on when, how, and to what extent an agent should intervene. We advance the position that generative proactivity must be grounded both epistemically and behaviorally. Drawing on the philosophy of ignorance and research on proactive behavior, we argue that these theories offer critical guidance for designing agents that can engage responsibly and foster meaningful partnerships.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“认识不完整”这一情境：当用户自己都不知道缺少什么、存在什么风险或值得考虑什么时，生成式AI不能只被动回答显式问题，而需要具备有原则的主动性；但这种主动性必须同时接受认识层面与行为层面的约束。
AI.motivation: 作者指出，现有生成式AI代理通常默认用户目标已清晰、需求已可表达，因此只能对显式查询作出响应，难以支持用户面对未知未知数的任务场景。与此同时，过度主动又可能造成干扰、误导或伤害，因此需要重新定义“主动性”的适用条件与边界。
AI.method: 这是一篇观点型论文，主要通过概念论证展开：引入“认识不完整”作为核心问题框架，批判现有仅基于历史行为推断的主动式方法，并结合无知哲学与主动行为研究，提出生成式主动性应同时具备认识基础和行为约束。
AI.result: 论文形成了一个明确立场：真正有效的生成式主动性不应只是预测并推送可能需求，而应在用户未知、目标未明的情况下，适时揭示可能性；同时必须规定何时介入、如何介入以及介入到什么程度，以避免不当干预。
AI.conclusion: 作者认为，未来的生成式AI代理需要从“回答问题”转向“在不确定和不完整知识条件下提供负责任的伙伴式支持”。实现这一目标的关键，是把主动性建立在认识论与行为规范双重基础上。

title: ScreenParse: Moving Beyond Sparse Grounding with Complete Screen Parsing Supervision
summary: Modern computer-use agents (CUA) must perceive a screen as a structured state, what elements are visible, where they are, and what text they contain, before they can reliably ground instructions and act. Yet, most available grounding datasets provide sparse supervision, with insufficient and low-diversity labels that annotate only a small subset of task-relevant elements per screen, which limits both coverage and generalization; moreover, practical deployment requires efficiency to enable low-latency, on-device use. We introduce ScreenParse, a large-scale dataset for complete screen parsing, with dense annotations of all visible UI elements (boxes, 55-class types, and text) across 771K web screenshots (21M elements). ScreenParse is generated by Webshot, an automated, scalable pipeline that renders diverse urls, extracts annotations and applies VLM-based relabeling and quality filtering. Using ScreenParse, we train ScreenVLM, a compact, 316M-parameter vision language model (VLM) that decodes a compact ScreenTag markup representation with a structure-aware loss that upweights structure-critical tokens. ScreenVLM substantially outperforms much larger foundation VLMs on dense parsing (e.g., 0.592 vs. 0.294 PageIoU on ScreenParse) and shows strong transfer to public benchmarks. Moreover, finetuning foundation VLMs on ScreenParse consistently improves their grounding performance, suggesting that dense screen supervision provides transferable structural priors for UI understanding. Project page: https://saidgurbuz.github.io/screenparse/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于完整屏幕解析的大规模稠密标注数据集ScreenParse，并据此训练了轻量模型ScreenVLM；实验表明，稠密屏幕监督能显著提升UI结构理解与落地表现，且具备良好的迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机使用代理需要先将屏幕理解为结构化状态，但主流对齐数据集只覆盖少量任务相关元素，标注稀疏、类别单一，导致覆盖不足、泛化受限；同时实际应用还要求模型足够高效，适合低延迟和端侧部署。
AI.method: 作者构建了ScreenParse，包含77.1万张网页截图、2100万个元素的全量稠密标注，覆盖边界框、55类UI类型和文本信息。数据通过Webshot自动化流水线生成：渲染多样URL、提取初始标注、再用VLM重标注并进行质量过滤。在此基础上训练了316M参数的ScreenVLM，采用紧凑的ScreenTag标记表示，并使用结构感知损失对结构关键token加权。
AI.result: ScreenVLM在稠密解析任务上显著优于更大的基础VLM，例如在ScreenParse上的PageIoU达到0.592，而对比模型仅为0.294。它在公开基准上也表现出较强迁移能力。此外，用ScreenParse对基础VLM微调后， grounding 性能普遍提升，说明稠密屏幕监督能提供可迁移的结构先验。
AI.conclusion: ScreenParse证明了高质量、全覆盖的屏幕稠密标注对UI理解和计算机使用代理至关重要；ScreenVLM则表明，小型专用模型配合结构化监督可以在屏幕解析任务上超过大型通用模型，并兼顾效率与效果。

title: GUI-GENESIS: Automated Synthesis of Efficient Environments with Verifiable Rewards for GUI Agent Post-Training
summary: Post-training GUI agents in interactive environments is critical for developing generalization and long-horizon planning capabilities. However, training on real-world applications is hindered by high latency, poor reproducibility, and unverifiable rewards relying on noisy visual proxies. To address the limitations, we present GUI-GENESIS, the first framework to automatically synthesize efficient GUI training environments with verifiable rewards. GUI-GENESIS reconstructs real-world applications into lightweight web environments using multimodal code models and equips them with code-native rewards, executable assertions that provide deterministic reward signals and eliminate visual estimation noise. Extensive experiments show that GUI-GENESIS reduces environment latency by 10 times and costs by over $28,000 per epoch compared to training on real applications. Notably, agents trained with GUI-GENESIS outperform the base model by 14.54% and even real-world RL baselines by 3.27% on held-out real-world tasks. Finally, we observe that models can synthesize environments they cannot yet solve, highlighting a pathway for self-improving agents.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出GUI-GENESIS框架，用于自动合成高效、可验证奖励的GUI训练环境，以替代真实应用中的高延迟、难复现和噪声奖励问题，并在真实任务上取得更好表现。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体后训练通常依赖真实应用环境，但这会带来响应慢、实验难复现、奖励难验证等问题，尤其是基于视觉近似的奖励信号误差较大，限制了通用性与长程规划能力的提升。
AI.method: GUI-GENESIS通过多模态代码模型将真实应用重构为轻量级网页环境，并为其设计代码原生奖励，即可执行断言（executab assertions），从而提供确定性的奖励信号，减少视觉估计噪声并提升训练效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架可将环境延迟降低10倍，并且相比在真实应用上训练每个epoch节省超过28000美元；用该框架训练的智能体在保留的真实任务上比基础模型提升14.54%，也比真实环境中的强化学习基线高3.27%。
AI.conclusion: GUI-GENESIS证明了自动构建可验证GUI训练环境的可行性，不仅能显著降低训练成本并提升性能，还揭示了一个重要现象：模型即使尚不能解决某任务，也可能先学会合成对应环境，为自我改进型智能体提供了新路径。

title: Mobile-Agent-v3.5: Multi-platform Fundamental GUI Agents
summary: The paper introduces GUI-Owl-1.5, the latest native GUI agent model that features instruct/thinking variants in multiple sizes (2B/4B/8B/32B/235B) and supports a range of platforms (desktop, mobile, browser, and more) to enable cloud-edge collaboration and real-time interaction. GUI-Owl-1.5 achieves state-of-the-art results on more than 20+ GUI benchmarks on open-source models: (1) on GUI automation tasks, it obtains 56.5 on OSWorld, 71.6 on AndroidWorld, and 48.4 on WebArena; (2) on grounding tasks, it obtains 80.3 on ScreenSpotPro; (3) on tool-calling tasks, it obtains 47.6 on OSWorld-MCP, and 46.8 on MobileWorld; (4) on memory and knowledge tasks, it obtains 75.5 on GUI-Knowledge Bench. GUI-Owl-1.5 incorporates several key innovations: (1) Hybird Data Flywheel: we construct the data pipeline for UI understanding and trajectory generation based on a combination of simulated environments and cloud-based sandbox environments, in order to improve the efficiency and quality of data collection. (2) Unified Enhancement of Agent Capabilities: we use a unified thought-synthesis pipeline to enhance the model's reasoning capabilities, while placing particular emphasis on improving key agent abilities, including Tool/MCP use, memory and multi-agent adaptation; (3) Multi-platform Environment RL Scaling: We propose a new environment RL algorithm, MRPO, to address the challenges of multi-platform conflicts and the low training efficiency of long-horizon tasks. The GUI-Owl-1.5 models are open-sourced, and an online cloud-sandbox demo is available at https://github.com/X-PLUG/MobileAgent.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了GUI-Owl-1.5，一个面向多平台图形用户界面的原生智能体模型，提供多种规模与推理/指令变体，并在多个GUI基准上取得了开源模型中的领先表现。
AI.motivation: 针对桌面、手机、浏览器等多平台界面自动化需求，作者希望提升模型的界面理解、任务执行、工具调用、记忆与跨平台协同能力，同时解决长时序任务训练效率低和多平台冲突的问题。
AI.method: 提出了三项核心方法：1）混合数据飞轮，结合模拟环境与云端沙盒环境构建UI理解和轨迹生成数据管线；2）统一增强智能体能力，采用统一的思维合成流程强化推理，并重点提升Tool/MCP使用、记忆和多智能体适配；3）多平台环境强化学习扩展，设计MRPO算法以缓解多平台冲突并提升长任务训练效率。
AI.result: 模型在20多个GUI基准上取得优异结果：GUI自动化任务上OSWorld 56.5、AndroidWorld 71.6、WebArena 48.4；定位任务上ScreenSpotPro 80.3；工具调用任务上OSWorld-MCP 47.6、MobileWorld 46.8；记忆与知识任务上GUI-Knowledge Bench 75.5。
AI.conclusion: GUI-Owl-1.5通过数据、能力增强与强化学习三方面联合优化，显著提升了多平台GUI智能体性能，并已开源，适合进一步研究和实际部署。

title: Conversational Image Segmentation: Grounding Abstract Concepts with Scalable Supervision
summary: Conversational image segmentation grounds abstract, intent-driven concepts into pixel-accurate masks. Prior work on referring image grounding focuses on categorical and spatial queries (e.g., "left-most apple") and overlooks functional and physical reasoning (e.g., "where can I safely store the knife?"). We address this gap and introduce Conversational Image Segmentation (CIS) and ConverSeg, a benchmark spanning entities, spatial relations, intent, affordances, functions, safety, and physical reasoning. We also present ConverSeg-Net, which fuses strong segmentation priors with language understanding, and an AI-powered data engine that generates prompt-mask pairs without human supervision. We show that current language-guided segmentation models are inadequate for CIS, while ConverSeg-Net trained on our data engine achieves significant gains on ConverSeg and maintains strong performance on existing language-guided segmentation benchmarks. Project webpage: https://glab-caltech.github.io/converseg/

AI.tldr: 本文提出会话式图像分割（CIS）任务与ConverSeg基准，补足现有语言引导分割在功能、意图、安全与物理推理方面的不足，并提出ConverSeg-Net及自动数据引擎。
AI.motivation: 现有基于指代表达的图像分割主要处理类别和空间查询，难以理解“适合放在哪里”“是否安全使用”等需要功能性、意图性与物理常识推理的自然语言需求，因此需要更贴近真实对话场景的新任务与数据集。
AI.method: 构建ConverSeg基准，覆盖实体、空间关系、意图、可供性、功能、安全与物理推理等多类语义；提出ConverSeg-Net，将强分割先验与语言理解融合；同时设计AI驱动的数据引擎，自动生成提示词-掩码对，无需人工监督。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有语言引导分割模型在CIS任务上表现不足；ConverSeg-Net在由数据引擎训练后，在ConverSeg上取得显著提升，并且在已有语言引导分割基准上仍保持较强性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了会话式图像分割的必要性，并展示了结合自动数据生成与语言-视觉融合建模的方法可以有效提升对复杂自然语言分割需求的理解与定位能力。

title: AmbiBench: Benchmarking Mobile GUI Agents Beyond One-Shot Instructions in the Wild
summary: Benchmarks are paramount for gauging progress in the domain of Mobile GUI Agents. In practical scenarios, users frequently fail to articulate precise directives containing full task details at the onset, and their expressions are typically ambiguous. Consequently, agents are required to converge on the user's true intent via active clarification and interaction during execution. However, existing benchmarks predominantly operate under the idealized assumption that user-issued instructions are complete and unequivocal. This paradigm focuses exclusively on assessing single-turn execution while overlooking the alignment capability of the agent. To address this limitation, we introduce AmbiBench, the first benchmark incorporating a taxonomy of instruction clarity to shift evaluation from unidirectional instruction following to bidirectional intent alignment. Grounded in Cognitive Gap theory, we propose a taxonomy of four clarity levels: Detailed, Standard, Incomplete, and Ambiguous. We construct a rigorous dataset of 240 ecologically valid tasks across 25 applications, subject to strict review protocols. Furthermore, targeting evaluation in dynamic environments, we develop MUSE (Mobile User Satisfaction Evaluator), an automated framework utilizing an MLLM-as-a-judge multi-agent architecture. MUSE performs fine-grained auditing across three dimensions: Outcome Effectiveness, Execution Quality, and Interaction Quality. Empirical results on AmbiBench reveal the performance boundaries of SoTA agents across different clarity levels, quantify the gains derived from active interaction, and validate the strong correlation between MUSE and human judgment. This work redefines evaluation standards, laying the foundation for next-generation agents capable of truly understanding user intent.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个面向移动GUI智能体的歧义指令评测基准AmbiBench，并配套自动化评估框架MUSE，用于衡量智能体在不同指令清晰度下的意图对齐、交互澄清与执行能力。
AI.motivation: 现有移动GUI智能体基准大多默认用户指令完整且明确，只评估单轮执行能力，忽视了真实场景中用户表达常常模糊、信息不全，智能体需要通过主动交互逐步澄清真实意图的需求。因此需要一种能评估“理解用户意图并动态对齐”的新基准。
AI.method: 作者提出AmbiBench，将指令清晰度划分为四个层级：详细、标准、不完整、歧义，并基于认知差距理论构建了240个具有生态真实性的任务，覆盖25个应用，且经过严格审核。同时提出MUSE评估框架，采用多智能体的MLLM-as-a-judge架构，从结果有效性、执行质量和交互质量三个维度进行细粒度自动评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，AmbiBench能够揭示当前最先进智能体在不同清晰度下的性能边界，量化主动交互带来的性能提升，并验证MUSE与人工判断具有较强相关性，说明其具备较好的自动评测可信度。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将移动GUI智能体的评测重点从单向指令执行推进到双向意图对齐，为未来能够在真实、模糊交互环境中理解并澄清用户需求的智能体研究提供了新的评测标准和数据基础。

title: STVG-R1: Incentivizing Instance-Level Reasoning and Grounding in Videos via Reinforcement Learning
summary: In vision-language models (VLMs), misalignment between textual descriptions and visual coordinates often induces hallucinations. This issue becomes particularly severe in dense prediction tasks such as spatial-temporal video grounding (STVG). Prior approaches typically focus on enhancing visual-textual alignment or attaching auxiliary decoders. However, these strategies inevitably introduce additional trainable modules, leading to significant annotation costs and computational overhead. In this work, we propose a novel visual prompting paradigm that avoids the difficult problem of aligning coordinates across modalities. Specifically, we reformulate per-frame coordinate prediction as a compact instance-level identification problem by assigning each object a unique, temporally consistent ID. These IDs are embedded into the video as visual prompts, providing explicit and interpretable inputs to the VLMs. Furthermore, we introduce STVG-R1, the first reinforcement learning framework for STVG, which employs a task-driven reward to jointly optimize temporal accuracy, spatial consistency, and structural format regularization. Extensive experiments on six benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. STVG-R1 surpasses the baseline Qwen2.5-VL-7B by a remarkable margin of 20.9% on m_IoU on the HCSTVG-v2 benchmark, establishing a new state of the art (SOTA). Surprisingly, STVG-R1 also exhibits strong zero-shot generalization to multi-object referring video object segmentation tasks, achieving a SOTA 47.3% J&F on MeViS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向时空视频定位的视觉提示新范式，将逐帧坐标预测改写为带时序一致ID的实例级识别问题，并结合强化学习框架STVG-R1优化时空准确性与输出结构；在6个基准上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在文本描述与视觉坐标对齐上容易产生幻觉，且在时空视频定位这类稠密预测任务中问题更严重。传统方法依赖额外解码器或更强对齐模块，往往带来新的可训练参数、标注成本和计算开销，因此需要一种更轻量、可解释且避免跨模态坐标对齐难题的方法。
AI.method: 作者提出视觉提示范式：不直接预测每帧坐标，而是为每个目标分配唯一且时序一致的ID，并将这些ID作为视觉提示嵌入视频输入VLM，从而把定位任务转化为实例级识别任务。同时提出STVG-R1，这是首个用于STVG的强化学习框架，通过任务驱动奖励联合优化时间准确性、空间一致性和结构格式约束。
AI.result: 在6个基准测试中，该方法表现优于现有方法；在HCSTVG-v2上，相比Qwen2.5-VL-7B，m_IoU提升20.9%，达到新的SOTA。进一步地，模型在零样本多目标视频目标分割任务上也表现突出，在MeViS上取得47.3%的J&F，达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，将密集定位问题重构为ID驱动的实例识别，并结合任务导向强化学习，可以有效缓解视觉语言对齐带来的幻觉与额外开销，同时提升时空视频定位及跨任务泛化能力。

title: Adaptive Milestone Reward for GUI Agents
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a mainstream paradigm for training Mobile GUI Agents, yet it struggles with the temporal credit assignment problem inherent in long-horizon tasks. A primary challenge lies in the trade-off between reward fidelity and density: outcome reward offers high fidelity but suffers from signal sparsity, while process reward provides dense supervision but remains prone to bias and reward hacking. To resolve this conflict, we propose the Adaptive Milestone Reward (ADMIRE) mechanism. ADMIRE constructs a verifiable, adaptive reward system by anchoring trajectory to milestones, which are dynamically distilled from successful explorations. Crucially, ADMIRE integrates an asymmetric credit assignment strategy that denoises successful trajectories and scaffolds failed trajectories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ADMIRE consistently yields over 10% absolute improvement in success rate across different base models on AndroidWorld. Moreover, the method exhibits robust generalizability, achieving strong performance across diverse RL algorithms and heterogeneous environments such as web navigation and embodied tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于移动端GUI智能体强化学习的自适应里程碑奖励机制ADMIRE，用于缓解长程任务中的时序信用分配难题，并在多种基座模型与环境中提升成功率。
AI.motivation: 强化学习训练移动端GUI智能体时，长期任务的信用分配困难明显；终局奖励虽准确但稀疏，过程奖励虽密集但容易产生偏差和被利用，因此需要一种兼顾准确性与可用密度的奖励设计。
AI.method: 提出ADMIRE机制：以任务轨迹中的里程碑作为可验证奖励锚点，并从成功探索中动态提炼里程碑；同时采用非对称信用分配策略，对成功轨迹进行去噪，对失败轨迹提供支撑式引导，从而构建自适应奖励系统。
AI.result: 实验显示，ADMIRE在AndroidWorld上对不同基座模型的成功率均带来超过10%的绝对提升；同时在多种强化学习算法以及网页导航、具身任务等异构环境中表现出较强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: ADMIRE通过自适应里程碑奖励与非对称信用分配，在奖励稀疏性、偏差和奖励滥用之间取得更好的平衡，是提升长程GUI智能体强化学习效果的有效方法。

title: How Smart Is Your GUI Agent? A Framework for the Future of Software Interaction
summary: GUI agents are rapidly becoming a new interaction to software, allowing people to navigate web, desktop and mobile rather than execute them click by click. Yet ``agent'' is described with radically different degrees of autonomy, obscuring capability, responsibility and risk. We call for conceptual clarity through GUI Agent Autonomy Levels (GAL), a six-level framework that makes autonomy explicit and helps benchmark progress toward trustworthy software interaction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GUI Agent Autonomy Levels（GAL）六级框架，用于明确图形界面智能体的自主性层级，帮助统一概念、评估能力，并推进可信软件交互的基准化发展。
AI.motivation: GUI智能体正在快速发展，但“智能体”一词在不同场景下被赋予了差异很大的自主程度，导致其能力边界、责任归属与风险评估都不够清晰，因此需要一个更明确的概念框架。
AI.method: 作者提出了GUI Agent Autonomy Levels（GAL）这一六级自主性分层框架，通过显式刻画智能体在GUI任务中的自主程度来定义和区分不同类型的智能体。
AI.result: 该框架能够将GUI智能体的自主性可视化和标准化，便于对不同系统进行比较、建立基准，并支持对其可信性进行评估。
AI.conclusion: GAL为GUI智能体提供了统一的自主性描述语言，有助于澄清概念、衡量进展，并推动更可信的软件交互研究与实践。

title: Stress Tests REVEAL Fragile Temporal and Visual Grounding in Video-Language Models
summary: This work investigates a fundamental question: Do Video-Language Models (VidLMs) robustly account for video content, temporal sequence, and motion? Our investigation shows that, surprisingly, they often do not. We introduce REVEAL{}, a diagnostic benchmark that probes fundamental weaknesses of contemporary VidLMs through five controlled stress tests; assessing temporal expectation bias, reliance on language-only shortcuts, video sycophancy, camera motion sensitivity, and robustness to spatiotemporal occlusion. We test leading open- and closed-source VidLMs and find that these models confidently describe reversed scenes as forward, answer questions while neglecting video content, agree with false claims, struggle with basic camera motion, and fail to aggregate temporal information amidst simple spatiotemporal masking. Humans, on the other hand, succeed at these tasks with ease. Alongside our benchmark, we provide a data pipeline that automatically generates diagnostic examples for our stress tests, enabling broader and more scalable evaluation. We will release our benchmark and code to support future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出REVEAL诊断基准，用五类受控压力测试系统评估视频语言模型对视频内容、时间顺序和运动信息的真实理解能力，结果发现许多模型存在明显脆弱性，而人类对这些任务表现良好。
AI.motivation: 作者关注一个核心问题：当前视频语言模型是否真正稳健地理解视频中的内容、时间序列与运动，而不是仅依赖语言先验或表面线索。为此，需要一个能够揭示模型深层弱点的诊断式评测框架。
AI.method: 构建REVEAL基准，包含五项压力测试：时间期待偏差、仅依赖语言捷径、顺从错误断言、对相机运动的敏感性、以及对时空遮挡的鲁棒性。并设计自动化数据生成流水线，批量生成用于诊断的测试样本，对主流开源和闭源视频语言模型进行评测。
AI.result: 实验显示，多数视频语言模型会把反向播放的视频误判为正向，会在忽略视频内容的情况下作答，会附和错误说法，对基础相机运动理解不足，并在简单的时空遮挡下无法有效聚合时间信息。相比之下，人类在这些任务上表现轻松且准确。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，当前视频语言模型在真实视频理解上仍存在系统性缺陷，尤其是对时间、运动和多模态信息整合的稳健性不足。REVEAL及其自动化生成管线为后续更全面、更可扩展的诊断评测提供了工具。

title: UI-Oceanus: Scaling GUI Agents with Synthetic Environmental Dynamics
summary: Scaling generalist GUI agents is hindered by the data scalability bottleneck of expensive human demonstrations and the "distillation ceiling" of synthetic teacher supervision. To transcend these limitations, we propose UI-Oceanus, a framework that shifts the learning focus from mimicking high-level trajectories to mastering interaction physics via ground-truth environmental feedback. Through a systematic investigation of self-supervised objectives, we identify that forward dynamics, defined as the generative prediction of future interface states, acts as the primary driver for scalability and significantly outweighs inverse inference. UI-Oceanus leverages this insight by converting low-cost autonomous exploration, which is verified directly by system execution, into high-density generative supervision to construct a robust internal world model. Experimental evaluations across a series of models demonstrate the decisive superiority of our approach: models utilizing Continual Pre-Training (CPT) on synthetic dynamics outperform non-CPT baselines with an average success rate improvement of 7% on offline benchmarks, which amplifies to a 16.8% gain in real-world online navigation. Furthermore, we observe that navigation performance scales with synthetic data volume. These results confirm that grounding agents in forward predictive modeling offers a superior pathway to scalable GUI automation with robust cross-domain adaptability and compositional generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UI-Oceanus，用基于真实环境反馈的前向动态建模替代对高层轨迹的模仿，缓解GUI智能体数据规模受限与合成监督上限问题，并验证其可显著提升离线与在线导航性能。
AI.motivation: 通用GUI智能体的发展受两类瓶颈限制：一是高质量人工演示昂贵且难以扩展，二是基于教师模型的合成监督存在“蒸馏上限”。因此需要一种更可扩展、成本更低且更具泛化能力的训练方式。
AI.method: 提出UI-Oceanus框架，将学习重点从模仿轨迹转向掌握交互物理规律，利用系统执行得到的真实环境反馈进行自监督学习。通过系统性比较自监督目标，发现前向动态预测（预测未来界面状态）比逆向推断更能促进可扩展性。框架进一步将低成本自主探索转化为高密度生成式监督，并用持续预训练（CPT）构建内部世界模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用合成动态进行CPT的模型在离线基准上平均成功率提升7%，在真实在线导航中提升16.8%。同时，导航性能随着合成数据量增加而持续提升，说明该方法具有良好的数据扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 结果说明，以前向预测为核心的环境建模比单纯轨迹模仿更适合扩展GUI智能体训练。UI-Oceanus通过真实反馈驱动的合成动态学习，能够提升跨域适应性与组合泛化能力，为可扩展的GUI自动化提供了更优路径。

title: See, Plan, Snap: Evaluating Multimodal GUI Agents in Scratch
summary: Block-based programming environments such as Scratch play a central role in low-code education, yet evaluating the capabilities of AI agents to construct programs through Graphical User Interfaces (GUIs) remains underexplored. We introduce ScratchWorld, a benchmark for evaluating multimodal GUI agents on program-by-construction tasks in Scratch. Grounded in the Use-Modify-Create pedagogical framework, ScratchWorld comprises 83 curated tasks spanning four distinct problem categories: Create, Debug, Extend, and Compute. To rigorously diagnose the source of agent failures, the benchmark employs two complementary interaction modes: primitive mode requires fine-grained drag-and-drop manipulation to directly assess visuomotor control, while composite mode uses high-level semantic APIs to disentangle program reasoning from GUI execution. To ensure reliable assessment, we propose an execution-based evaluation protocol that validates the functional correctness of the constructed Scratch programs through runtime tests within the browser environment. Extensive experiments across state-of-the-art multimodal language models and GUI agents reveal a substantial reasoning--acting gap, highlighting persistent challenges in fine-grained GUI manipulation despite strong planning capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ScratchWorld，一个用于评测多模态GUI智能体在Scratch中“边构建边编程”能力的基准，并通过两种交互模式与执行式评估协议，系统揭示了当前模型存在明显的“推理—执行”差距。
AI.motivation: 低代码教育中，Scratch等积木式编程环境具有重要作用，但现有研究对AI智能体能否通过图形界面完成程序构建的评测不足，尤其缺少对推理能力与GUI操作能力的区分诊断。
AI.method: 作者构建了ScratchWorld基准，包含83个精心筛选的任务，覆盖创建、调试、扩展和计算四类问题；设计了primitive mode用于细粒度拖拽操作以评估视觉-运动控制，设计了composite mode通过高层语义API将程序推理与GUI执行分离；并提出基于运行时测试的执行式评估协议，在浏览器环境中验证Scratch程序的功能正确性。
AI.result: 在多种先进多模态语言模型和GUI智能体上的大量实验表明，模型虽然具备较强的规划与推理能力，但在细粒度GUI操作上仍表现出明显不足，存在显著的推理—执行鸿沟。
AI.conclusion: ScratchWorld为评测GUI编程智能体提供了更细致、可诊断的基准与评估方式，研究结果说明当前系统距离可靠完成积木式程序构建仍有较大差距，尤其需要提升精细界面操作能力。

title: OmniVL-Guard: Towards Unified Vision-Language Forgery Detection and Grounding via Balanced RL
summary: Existing forgery detection methods are often limited to uni-modal or bi-modal settings, failing to handle the interleaved text, images, and videos prevalent in real-world misinformation. To bridge this gap, this paper targets to develop a unified framework for omnibus vision-language forgery detection and grounding. In this unified setting, the {interplay} between diverse modalities and the dual requirements of simultaneous detection and localization pose a critical ``difficulty bias`` problem: the simpler veracity classification task tends to dominate the gradients, leading to suboptimal performance in fine-grained grounding during multi-task optimization. To address this challenge, we propose \textbf{OmniVL-Guard}, a balanced reinforcement learning framework for omnibus vision-language forgery detection and grounding. Particularly, OmniVL-Guard comprises two core designs: Self-Evolving CoT Generatio and Adaptive Reward Scaling Policy Optimization (ARSPO). {Self-Evolving CoT Generation} synthesizes high-quality reasoning paths, effectively overcoming the cold-start challenge. Building upon this, {Adaptive Reward Scaling Policy Optimization (ARSPO)} dynamically modulates reward scales and task weights, ensuring a balanced joint optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OmniVL-Guard significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods and exhibits zero-shot robust generalization across out-of-domain scenarios. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/shen8424/OmniVL-Guard.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的视觉-语言伪造检测与定位框架 OmniVL-Guard，旨在处理真实场景中交织出现的文本、图像和视频，并通过自演化链式推理生成与自适应奖励缩放策略优化，缓解多任务训练中分类任务主导梯度、影响精细定位的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有伪造检测方法多局限于单模态或双模态，难以应对真实世界中多模态交错的信息形态；同时，检测与定位的联合优化存在“难度偏置”问题，即更简单的真伪分类往往主导训练，导致细粒度定位性能不足。
AI.method: 提出 OmniVL-Guard，一个面向全模态视觉-语言伪造检测与定位的平衡强化学习框架，包含两部分：1）自演化链式推理生成，用于合成高质量推理路径，缓解冷启动；2）自适应奖励缩放策略优化（ARSPO），动态调整奖励尺度与任务权重，以平衡检测与定位的联合优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多项指标上显著优于现有最先进方法，并在域外场景中表现出较强的零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: OmniVL-Guard 为统一处理多模态伪造检测与定位提供了有效方案，核心贡献在于通过高质量推理生成和动态奖励/权重调节，提升了多任务训练的平衡性与泛化性。

title: Canvas-of-Thought: Grounding Reasoning via Mutable Structured States
summary: While Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting has significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), relying solely on linear text sequences remains a bottleneck for complex tasks. We observe that even when auxiliary visual elements are interleaved, they are often treated as static snapshots within a one-dimensional, unstructured reasoning chain. We argue that such approaches treat reasoning history as an immutable stream: correcting a local error necessitates either generating verbose downstream corrections or regenerating the entire context. This forces the model to implicitly maintain and track state updates, significantly increasing token consumption and cognitive load. This limitation is particularly acute in high-dimensional domains, such as geometry and SVG design, where the textual expression of CoT lacks explicit visual guidance, further constraining the model's reasoning precision. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{Canvas-of-Thought (Canvas-CoT)}. By leveraging a HTML Canvas as an external reasoning substrate, Canvas-CoT empowers the model to perform atomic, DOM-based CRUD operations. This architecture enables in-place state revisions without disrupting the surrounding context, allowing the model to explicitly maintain the "ground truth". Furthermore, we integrate a rendering-based critique loop that serves as a hard constraint validator, providing explicit visual feedback to resolve complex tasks that are difficult to articulate through text alone. Extensive experiments on VCode, RBench-V, and MathVista demonstrate that Canvas-CoT significantly outperforms existing baselines, establishing a new paradigm for context-efficient multimodal reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Canvas-of-Thought（Canvas-CoT），用HTML Canvas作为外部推理载体，让多模态大模型通过原子化、基于DOM的CRUD操作进行原地状态修改，并结合渲染式批判反馈循环，以减少线性文本链式推理的上下文负担，提高复杂多模态任务中的推理精度与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有Chain-of-Thought虽然提升了多模态大模型的推理能力，但本质上仍依赖一维文本序列，缺少结构化状态表示。面对复杂任务时，局部错误难以低成本修正，往往需要生成大量后续修正或重写全部上下文，导致token消耗高、隐式状态维护困难，尤其在几何和SVG等高维视觉任务中更明显。
AI.method: 作者提出Canvas-CoT，将HTML Canvas作为外部“思维画布”，让模型以原子化DOM操作执行创建、读取、更新、删除等动作，实现可直接修改的显式状态管理，而不是仅在文本中追加推理链。同时加入基于渲染结果的批判循环，把视觉输出作为硬约束验证器，为难以纯文本描述的问题提供明确的视觉反馈。
AI.result: 在VCode、RBench-V和MathVista等基准上，Canvas-CoT相较现有方法取得了显著更好的表现，说明这种基于画布的上下文高效多模态推理框架能够提升复杂任务中的准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Canvas-CoT将推理从线性文本流转向可编辑的结构化视觉状态空间，提供了一种更适合复杂多模态任务的新范式，能够在减少上下文开销的同时增强模型对显式状态和视觉约束的利用能力。

title: Grounding LTL Tasks in Sub-Symbolic RL Environments for Zero-Shot Generalization
summary: In this work we address the problem of training a Reinforcement Learning agent to follow multiple temporally-extended instructions expressed in Linear Temporal Logic in sub-symbolic environments. Previous multi-task work has mostly relied on knowledge of the mapping between raw observations and symbols appearing in the formulae. We drop this unrealistic assumption by jointly training a multi-task policy and a symbol grounder with the same experience. The symbol grounder is trained only from raw observations and sparse rewards via Neural Reward Machines in a semi-supervised fashion. Experiments on vision-based environments show that our method achieves performance comparable to using the true symbol grounding and significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods for sub-symbolic environments.

AI.tldr: 提出一种在非符号环境中同时学习多任务策略和符号落地器的方法，用于执行多个线性时序逻辑（LTL）指令；该方法仅依赖原始观测和稀疏奖励进行半监督训练，在视觉环境中表现接近真实符号落地，并显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有多任务强化学习方法通常假设已知原始观测到符号的映射，这在真实的非符号环境中不切实际，因此需要一种无需人工提供符号对应关系的学习框架。
AI.method: 将多任务策略与符号落地器联合训练，并使用相同的交互经验；符号落地器仅基于原始观测和稀疏奖励，通过神经奖励机器（Neural Reward Machines）进行半监督学习，从而逐步建立观测与逻辑符号之间的对应关系。
AI.result: 在基于视觉的实验环境中，该方法的性能接近使用真实符号落地信息的上限，并且明显优于针对非符号环境的现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，联合学习策略与符号落地器是解决非符号环境中多指令时序任务的有效途径，可在不依赖人工符号映射的前提下获得强竞争力的性能。

title: GenSeg-R1: RL-Driven Vision-Language Grounding for Fine-Grained Referring Segmentation
summary:
We study fine-grained referring image segmentation via a decoupled reason-then-segment pipeline. A vision-language model (VLM) receives an image and a natural-language query, reasons about the scene, and emits structured spatial prompts: a bounding box plus two interior keypoints for every referred instance. A frozen promptable segmenter (SAM 2) converts these prompts into high-quality masks.
  Within our GenSeg-R1 framework we finetune Qwen3-VL models (4B and 8B parameters) using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), requiring no supervised reasoning-chain annotations. On RefCOCOg validation our best model (GenSeg-R1-8B) achieves 0.7127 cIoU and 0.7382 mIoU, substantially outperforming the corresponding Qwen3-VL Instruct baselines (+15.3 and +21.9 points, respectively) and surpassing Seg-Zero-7B [3] by +3.3 cIoU under identical evaluation.
  We further introduce GenSeg-R1-G, a variant trained on GRefCOCO [9] with a SAM 2 in-the-loop reward that directly optimizes mask quality. On GRefCOCO validation GenSeg-R1-G achieves 76.69% target mIoU with 82.40% accuracy on negative (no-target) prompts, substantially outperforming Seg-R1-7B and Seg-Zero-7B, which lack no-target detection capability. On ReasonSeg test, GenSeg-R1-4B reaches 68.40% mIoU, surpassing Seg-Zero-7B by +7.0 and Seg-R1-7B by +10.7 points.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种“先推理、后分割”的细粒度指代图像分割框架GenSeg-R1：视觉语言模型先生成结构化空间提示（边界框与内部关键点），再由冻结的SAM 2完成掩码分割；方法通过GRPO进行微调，无需人工推理链标注，并在多个基准上显著优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有指代分割方法在细粒度定位、复杂语义理解以及无目标提示识别方面仍有不足。论文希望通过将推理与分割解耦，让视觉语言模型专注于理解与空间推断，再交给专用分割器生成高质量掩码，从而提升分割精度与泛化能力。
AI.method: 框架包含两阶段：第一阶段由Qwen3-VL接收图像和自然语言查询，推理后输出每个被指代实例的结构化空间提示，包括一个边界框和两个内部关键点；第二阶段将这些提示输入冻结的SAM 2生成掩码。训练上使用Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）对Qwen3-VL的4B和8B模型进行微调，不依赖监督式推理链标注；另提出GenSeg-R1-G，在GRefCOCO上结合SAM 2闭环奖励，直接优化掩码质量，并增强无目标提示检测能力。
AI.result: 在RefCOCOg验证集上，GenSeg-R1-8B达到0.7127 cIoU和0.7382 mIoU，较Qwen3-VL Instruct基线分别提升15.3和21.9个百分点，并较Seg-Zero-7B在相同评测下高3.3 cIoU。在GRefCOCO验证集上，GenSeg-R1-G取得76.69%的目标mIoU和82.40%的负样本（无目标）提示准确率，优于缺乏无目标检测能力的对比方法。在ReasonSeg测试集上，GenSeg-R1-4B达到68.40% mIoU，较Seg-Zero-7B提升7.0个百分点，较Seg-R1-7B提升10.7个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，将视觉语言模型的推理能力与SAM 2的分割能力解耦，并通过强化学习优化结构化空间提示，能够显著提升细粒度指代分割性能；同时，加入闭环奖励还能增强对无目标查询的识别与鲁棒性，体现出较强的实用价值与可扩展性。

title: VideoAfford: Grounding 3D Affordance from Human-Object-Interaction Videos via Multimodal Large Language Model
summary: 3D affordance grounding aims to highlight the actionable regions on 3D objects, which is crucial for robotic manipulation. Previous research primarily focused on learning affordance knowledge from static cues such as language and images, which struggle to provide sufficient dynamic interaction context that can reveal temporal and causal cues. To alleviate this predicament, we collect a comprehensive video-based 3D affordance dataset, \textit{VIDA}, which contains 38K human-object-interaction videos covering 16 affordance types, 38 object categories, and 22K point clouds. Based on \textit{VIDA}, we propose a strong baseline: VideoAfford, which activates multimodal large language models with additional affordance segmentation capabilities, enabling both world knowledge reasoning and fine-grained affordance grounding within a unified framework. To enhance action understanding capability, we leverage a latent action encoder to extract dynamic interaction priors from HOI videos. Moreover, we introduce a \textit{spatial-aware} loss function to enable VideoAfford to obtain comprehensive 3D spatial knowledge. Extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate that our model significantly outperforms well-established methods and exhibits strong open-world generalization with affordance reasoning abilities. All datasets and code will be publicly released to advance research in this area.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向3D可供性定位的视频数据集VIDA，以及一个结合多模态大语言模型和分割能力的基线方法VideoAfford，用于更准确地在3D物体上识别可执行区域。
AI.motivation: 现有3D可供性学习主要依赖语言和图像等静态信息，缺乏能体现时间变化与因果关系的动态交互上下文，因而难以提供充分的可供性理解。
AI.method: 作者构建了VIDA数据集，包含3.8万段人-物交互视频、16类可供性、38类物体和2.2万个点云；在此基础上提出VideoAfford，将多模态大语言模型与可供性分割能力结合，用于统一的世界知识推理与细粒度3D可供性定位；同时引入潜在动作编码器提取视频中的动态交互先验，并设计空间感知损失以增强模型对3D空间结构的建模。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，VideoAfford显著优于已有方法，并在开放世界场景下表现出较强的泛化能力和可供性推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过视频驱动的数据集与统一框架，提升了3D可供性定位对动态交互信息的利用，为机器人操作相关研究提供了新的数据资源和基线方法。

title: Agentic Spatio-Temporal Grounding via Collaborative Reasoning
summary: Spatio-Temporal Video Grounding (STVG) aims to retrieve the spatio-temporal tube of a target object or person in a video given a text query. Most existing approaches perform frame-wise spatial localization within a predicted temporal span, resulting in redundant computation, heavy supervision requirements, and limited generalization. Weakly-supervised variants mitigate annotation costs but remain constrained by the dataset-level train-and-fit paradigm with an inferior performance. To address these challenges, we propose the Agentic Spatio-Temporal Grounder (ASTG) framework for the task of STVG towards an open-world and training-free scenario. Specifically, two specialized agents SRA (Spatial Reasoning Agent) and TRA (Temporal Reasoning Agent) constructed leveraging on modern Multimoal Large Language Models (MLLMs) work collaboratively to retrieve the target tube in an autonomous and self-guided manner. Following a propose-and-evaluation paradigm, ASTG duly decouples spatio-temporal reasoning and automates the tube extraction, verification and temporal localization processes. With a dedicate visual memory and dialogue context, the retrieval efficiency is significantly enhanced. Experiments on popular benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of the proposed approach where it outperforms existing weakly-supervised and zero-shot approaches by a margin and is comparable to some of the fully-supervised methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于视频时空定位的训练自由框架ASTG，通过两个专门代理协同完成空间与时间推理，在开放世界场景下无需额外训练即可更高效地定位目标管轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有时空视频定位方法通常依赖逐帧空间定位，计算冗余、监督成本高且泛化有限；弱监督方法虽然降低标注需求，但仍受限于数据集训练范式，性能不足，因此需要一种更开放、低成本且更具泛化能力的方案。
AI.method: 提出Agentic Spatio-Temporal Grounder（ASTG）框架，包含空间推理代理SRA和时间推理代理TRA，基于多模态大语言模型协同工作；采用“提出-评估”范式，解耦时空推理，并自动完成管轨迹提取、验证与时间定位；同时引入视觉记忆与对话上下文以提升检索效率。
AI.result: 在主流基准上，ASTG优于现有弱监督和零样本方法，并且表现接近部分全监督方法。
AI.conclusion: ASTG证明了基于多模态大模型的代理式协作可以在无需训练的条件下有效解决时空视频定位问题，兼顾效率、泛化与性能，具有较强的开放世界应用潜力。

title: SpotAgent: Grounding Visual Geo-localization in Large Vision-Language Models through Agentic Reasoning
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated strong reasoning capabilities in geo-localization, yet they often struggle in real-world scenarios where visual cues are sparse, long-tailed, and highly ambiguous. Previous approaches, bound by internal knowledge, often fail to provide verifiable results, yielding confident but ungrounded predictions when faced with confounded evidence. To address these challenges, we propose SpotAgent, a framework that formalizes geo-localization into an agentic reasoning process that leverages expert-level reasoning to synergize visual interpretation with tool-assisted verification. SpotAgent actively explores and verifies visual cues by leveraging external tools (e.g., web search, maps) through a ReAct diagram. We introduce a 3-stage post-training pipeline starting with a Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) stage for basic alignment, followed by an Agentic Cold Start phase utilizing high-quality trajectories synthesized via a Multi-Agent framework, aiming to instill tool-calling expertise. Subsequently, the model's reasoning capabilities are refined through Reinforcement Learning. We propose a Spatially-Aware Dynamic Filtering strategy to enhance the efficiency of the RL stage by prioritizing learnable samples based on spatial difficulty. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that SpotAgent achieves state-of-the-art performance, effectively mitigating hallucinations while delivering precise and verifiable geo-localization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpotAgent，将地理定位从单纯依赖模型内部知识的推断，转化为结合外部工具验证的智能体式推理流程，以提升在稀疏、长尾和歧义视觉线索下的准确性与可验证性。
AI.motivation: 现有大视觉语言模型在地理定位中虽具备较强推理能力，但在真实场景里常因视觉线索稀少、分布长尾和信息模糊而产生“看似自信但缺乏依据”的预测，难以提供可验证结果。
AI.method: 提出SpotAgent框架，使用ReAct式流程主动探索并验证视觉线索，借助网页搜索、地图等外部工具进行辅助推理；同时设计三阶段后训练管线：先进行监督微调以完成基础对齐，再通过多智能体合成高质量轨迹进行智能体冷启动以培养工具调用能力，最后用强化学习进一步优化推理；并引入空间感知动态过滤策略，根据空间难度优先选择更易学习的样本，提高强化学习效率。
AI.result: 在标准基准上的大量实验表明，SpotAgent取得了最先进的性能，能够更有效地缓解幻觉问题，并输出更精确、可验证的地理定位结果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作说明，将地理定位建模为“工具辅助的智能体推理”并结合分阶段训练与样本筛选策略，能够显著提升复杂真实场景下的鲁棒性、可解释性和定位精度。

title: Grounding-Driven Attack: Improving Encoder-based Adversarial Transferability against Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have achieved impressive performance across multimodal tasks, but their reliance on visual inputs exposes them to adversarial threats. Encoder-based attacks provide an efficient alternative to end-to-end optimization by crafting perturbations through the vision encoder alone. However, existing encoder-based attacks often assume that the surrogate encoder is identical or similar to the victim LVLM's vision encoder. In this work, we present a systematic study of their transferability in more realistic black-box deployments with heterogeneous LVLM architectures. We find that model-specific visual evidence is inconsistent across models, whereas text-conditioned grounding regions are more closely tied to caption-relevant evidence and provide a more stable transfer target. However, existing attacks remain weakly aligned with and insufficiently disrupt these regions. Motivated by these findings, we propose Grounding-Driven Attack (GDA), which aligns perturbation optimization with text-grounded evidence. GDA combines Grounding-Aware Perturbation Allocation to concentrate perturbation budget on grounded evidence regions with Grounding-Centric Evidence Disruption to intensify their global and local disruption. Experiments across diverse victim models and tasks show that GDA consistently outperforms existing encoder-based attacks in black-box transfer. These results highlight the central role of text-grounded evidence in adversarial transferability and motivate grounding-aware robustness evaluation and defense design.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大型视觉语言模型中编码器式攻击在异构黑盒场景下的迁移性，发现文本条件下的定位证据比模型特定视觉证据更稳定，并据此提出面向文本定位证据的Grounding-Driven Attack（GDA），显著提升黑盒迁移攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 现有编码器式攻击通常假设替代模型的视觉编码器与受害模型相同或相近，但在真实黑盒部署中，视觉语言模型架构往往异构，这使得攻击迁移性不足。作者希望找出更稳定的攻击目标，并提升跨模型攻击有效性。
AI.method: 作者先系统分析不同模型间攻击迁移的差异，比较模型特定视觉证据与文本条件定位区域的稳定性，发现后者更适合作为迁移目标。在此基础上提出GDA：一是通过定位感知的扰动分配，将扰动预算集中到文本定位到的关键区域；二是通过以定位证据为中心的破坏机制，加强这些区域在全局与局部层面的扰动。
AI.result: 实验覆盖多种受害模型与任务，结果表明GDA在黑盒迁移攻击中始终优于已有编码器式攻击，且对异构架构更鲁棒。研究还表明，文本定位证据是提升攻击可迁移性的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 该工作说明，在视觉语言模型的黑盒攻击中，应优先关注文本条件下的定位证据而非模型特定视觉证据。其结论不仅改进了攻击方法，也为后续的鲁棒性评估与防御设计提供了新的依据，即防御应重点针对 grounding-aware 的攻击模式。

title: Grounding Generative Planners in Verifiable Logic: A Hybrid Architecture for Trustworthy Embodied AI
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise as planners for embodied AI, but their stochastic nature lacks formal reasoning, preventing strict safety guarantees for physical deployment. Current approaches often rely on unreliable LLMs for safety checks or simply reject unsafe plans without offering repairs. We introduce the Verifiable Iterative Refinement Framework (VIRF), a neuro-symbolic architecture that shifts the paradigm from passive safety gatekeeping to active collaboration. Our core contribution is a tutor-apprentice dialogue where a deterministic Logic Tutor, grounded in a formal safety ontology, provides causal and pedagogical feedback to an LLM planner. This enables intelligent plan repairs rather than mere avoidance. We also introduce a scalable knowledge acquisition pipeline that synthesizes safety knowledge bases from real-world documents, correcting blind spots in existing benchmarks. In challenging home safety tasks, VIRF achieves a perfect 0 percent Hazardous Action Rate (HAR) and a 77.3 percent Goal-Condition Rate (GCR), which is the highest among all baselines. It is highly efficient, requiring only 1.1 correction iterations on average. VIRF demonstrates a principled pathway toward building fundamentally trustworthy and verifiably safe embodied agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VIRF，一个面向具身AI规划的可验证迭代修正框架，通过确定性的逻辑导师与LLM规划器协作，实现对不安全计划的主动修复而非简单拒绝，从而提升可验证安全性与任务完成率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM用于具身AI规划时具有随机性，缺乏形式化推理能力，难以提供物理部署所需的严格安全保证；同时，传统方法要么依赖不可靠的LLM做安全检查，要么仅拒绝不安全计划，无法给出可行修正。
AI.method: 提出神经符号架构VIRF，核心是“导师-学徒”对话机制：基于形式化安全本体的确定性逻辑导师向LLM规划器提供因果性、教学式反馈，指导其进行计划修复；同时构建可扩展知识获取流水线，从真实世界文档中合成安全知识库，以补足现有基准的盲区。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的家庭安全任务中，VIRF实现了0%的危险动作率（HAR）和77.3%的目标达成率（GCR），在所有基线中最高；平均仅需1.1次修正迭代，效率较高。
AI.conclusion: VIRF表明，将确定性符号推理与LLM规划能力结合，可从“事后拦截”转向“主动修复”，为构建本质可信且可验证安全的具身智能体提供了更原则化的路径。

title: Anonymization-Enhanced Privacy Protection for Mobile GUI Agents: Available but Invisible
summary:
Mobile Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents have demonstrated strong capabilities in automating complex smartphone tasks by leveraging multimodal large language models (MLLMs) and system-level control interfaces. However, this paradigm introduces significant privacy risks, as agents typically capture and process entire screen contents, thereby exposing sensitive personal data such as phone numbers, addresses, messages, and financial information. Existing defenses either reduce UI exposure, obfuscate only task-irrelevant content, or rely on user authorization, but none can protect task-critical sensitive information while preserving seamless agent usability.
  We propose an anonymization-based privacy protection framework that enforces the principle of available-but-invisible access to sensitive data: sensitive information remains usable for task execution but is never directly visible to the cloud-based agent. Our system detects sensitive UI content using a PII-aware recognition model and replaces it with deterministic, type-preserving placeholders (e.g., PHONE_NUMBER#a1b2c) that retain semantic categories while removing identifying details. A layered architecture comprising a PII Detector, UI Transformer, Secure Interaction Proxy, and Privacy Gatekeeper ensures consistent anonymization across user instructions, XML hierarchies, and screenshots, mediates all agent actions over anonymized interfaces, and supports narrowly scoped local computations when reasoning over raw values is necessary.
  Extensive experiments on the AndroidLab and PrivScreen benchmarks show that our framework substantially reduces privacy leakage across multiple models while incurring only modest utility degradation, achieving the best observed privacy-utility trade-off among existing methods. Code available at: https://github.com/one-step-beh1nd/gui_privacy_protection

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向移动端图形界面智能体的隐私保护框架，通过“可用但不可见”的匿名化机制，在保留任务可执行性的同时隐藏敏感个人信息。
AI.motivation: 现有移动GUI智能体依赖截屏和界面内容进行推理，容易暴露手机号、地址、消息和金融信息等敏感数据；已有防护方法要么影响可用性，要么只能处理部分无关内容，无法兼顾任务关键敏感信息保护与流畅使用。
AI.method: 系统使用PII感知识别模型检测敏感UI内容，并将其替换为确定性、保持类型的占位符；整体采用分层架构，包括PII Detector、UI Transformer、Secure Interaction Proxy和Privacy Gatekeeper，对用户指令、XML层级和截图进行一致匿名化，并在必要时支持局部本地计算来处理原始值推理需求。
AI.result: 在AndroidLab和PrivScreen基准上，该框架相较多种现有方法显著降低了隐私泄露，同时仅带来较小的任务效用损失，在隐私与可用性之间取得了最佳权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，针对移动GUI智能体，可以通过统一匿名化与受控本地推理实现较强隐私保护，并在较大程度上维持智能体的任务执行能力。

title: Open-Text Aerial Detection: A Unified Framework For Aerial Visual Grounding And Detection
summary: Open-Vocabulary Aerial Detection (OVAD) and Remote Sensing Visual Grounding (RSVG) have emerged as two key paradigms for aerial scene understanding. However, each paradigm suffers from inherent limitations when operating in isolation: OVAD is restricted to coarse category-level semantics, while RSVG is structurally limited to single-target localization. These limitations prevent existing methods from simultaneously supporting rich semantic understanding and multi-target detection. To address this, we propose OTA-Det, the first unified framework that bridges both paradigms into a cohesive architecture. Specifically, we introduce a task reformulation strategy that unifies task objectives and supervision mechanisms, enabling joint training across datasets from both paradigms with dense supervision signals. Furthermore, we propose a dense semantic alignment strategy that establishes explicit correspondence at multiple granularities, from holistic expressions to individual attributes, enabling fine-grained semantic understanding. To ensure real-time efficiency, OTA-Det builds upon the RT-DETR architecture, extending it from closed-set detection to open-text detection by introducing several high efficient modules, achieving state-of-the-art performance on six benchmarks spanning both OVAD and RSVG tasks while maintaining real-time inference at 34 FPS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OTA-Det，一个统一开放词汇航拍检测与遥感视觉指代表达定位的框架，通过任务重构、密集语义对齐和高效检测架构，实现多目标检测与细粒度语义理解的联合建模，并在六个基准上取得较优性能且保持实时推理。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇航拍检测只能提供粗粒度类别语义，而遥感视觉指代表达定位通常只支持单目标定位；两者各自独立时都难以同时兼顾丰富语义理解与多目标检测，因此需要一个统一框架来融合两类任务能力。
AI.method: 提出OTA-Det：1）任务重构策略，将两类任务的目标与监督机制统一起来，以便在跨数据集上进行联合训练并获得稠密监督信号；2）稠密语义对齐策略，在整体表达和局部属性等多个粒度建立显式对应关系，增强细粒度语义理解；3）基于RT-DETR进行扩展，通过若干高效模块将封闭集检测升级为开放文本检测，以兼顾精度与实时性。
AI.result: 该方法在覆盖OVAD和RSVG的六个基准上达到最优或具有竞争力的性能，同时保持34 FPS的实时推理速度。
AI.conclusion: OTA-Det证明了将开放词汇检测与视觉指代定位统一到同一架构是可行的，并且能够在提升语义理解能力的同时保持高效率，为航拍场景理解提供了一个统一且实用的解决方案。

title: VideoTemp-o3: Harmonizing Temporal Grounding and Video Understanding in Agentic Thinking-with-Videos
summary: In long-video understanding, conventional uniform frame sampling often fails to capture key visual evidence, leading to degraded performance and increased hallucinations. To address this, recent agentic thinking-with-videos paradigms have emerged, adopting a localize-clip-answer pipeline in which the model actively identifies relevant video segments, performs dense sampling within those clips, and then produces answers. However, existing methods remain inefficient, suffer from weak localization, and adhere to rigid workflows. To solve these issues, we propose VideoTemp-o3, a unified agentic thinking-with-videos framework that jointly models video grounding and question answering. VideoTemp-o3 exhibits strong localization capability, supports on-demand clipping, and can refine inaccurate localizations. Specifically, in the supervised fine-tuning stage, we design a unified masking mechanism that encourages exploration while preventing noise. For reinforcement learning, we introduce dedicated rewards to mitigate reward hacking. Besides, from the data perspective, we develop an effective pipeline to construct high-quality long video grounded QA data, along with a corresponding benchmark for systematic evaluation across various video durations. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves remarkable performance on both long video understanding and grounding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VideoTemp-o3，一个统一的长视频推理框架，将视频定位与问答联合建模，以提升长视频理解、定位精度和推理效率。
AI.motivation: 传统均匀采样难以覆盖关键证据，容易导致长视频理解性能下降和幻觉增加；现有“定位-裁剪-回答”式方法又存在效率低、定位弱和流程僵化的问题。
AI.method: 提出统一的agentic thinking-with-videos框架VideoTemp-o3，支持按需裁剪与定位修正；在监督微调阶段设计统一掩码机制以兼顾探索与抑噪；在强化学习阶段引入专门奖励以缓解reward hacking；同时构建高质量长视频定位问答数据管线及对应基准用于系统评测。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在长视频理解和视频定位任务上都取得了显著提升，并具有较强的定位能力和更灵活的推理流程。
AI.conclusion: VideoTemp-o3通过联合建模、训练机制优化和数据/基准建设，解决了长视频理解中证据捕获不足与定位不稳的问题，为高效可靠的长视频问答提供了统一方案。

title: ANCHOR: Branch-Point Data Generation for GUI Agents
summary: End-to-end GUI agents for real desktop environments require large amounts of high-quality interaction data, yet collecting human demonstrations is expensive and existing synthetic pipelines often suffer from limited task diversity or noisy, goal-drifting trajectories. We present a trajectory expansion framework Anchor that bootstraps scalable desktop supervision from a small set of verified seed demonstrations. Starting from each seed, we identify branch points that correspond to meaningful state changes and propose new, state-grounded task variants conditioned on the current GUI context. An executing agent then follows the proposed instructions to generate new trajectories, while a verifier enforces task completion via state-aware checks and trajectory-level consistency. To improve supervision quality, we further apply task-conditioned step-level filtering to remove ungrounded actions and denoise post-branch segments to maintain coherent intent. Experiments on standard desktop benchmarks, OSWorld and WindowsAgentArena, show that models fine-tuned on our expanded corpus achieve consistent improvements over zero-shot agents and representative synthesis baselines, and generalize across applications and operating systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Anchor的轨迹扩展框架，用少量已验证的桌面演示作为种子，通过分支点扩展、状态约束生成、验证与过滤，自动构建高质量桌面交互监督数据，从而提升GUI智能体性能与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 真实桌面环境中的端到端GUI智能体需要大量高质量交互数据，但人工示范采集成本高；现有合成数据流程又容易出现任务多样性不足、轨迹偏离目标或噪声较多的问题，因此需要一种可扩展且更可靠的数据构建方法。
AI.method: 框架首先从少量种子演示出发，识别代表关键状态变化的分支点；随后基于当前GUI上下文生成新的、以状态为依据的任务变体，并由执行智能体按照指令产生新轨迹。接着，验证器通过状态感知检查和轨迹级一致性判断任务是否完成。为进一步提升质量，还引入任务条件下的逐步过滤，去除无依据动作，并对分支后的后续片段进行去噪，以保持任务意图连贯。
AI.result: 在标准桌面基准OSWorld和WindowsAgentArena上，使用该扩展语料微调的模型，相比零样本智能体和代表性的合成数据基线，取得了稳定提升，并且能在不同应用与操作系统之间更好地泛化。
AI.conclusion: Anchor通过“种子演示+状态驱动分支+验证过滤”的方式，较好地解决了桌面GUI数据稀缺与合成数据质量不稳的问题，是一种面向真实桌面环境的可扩展高质量监督数据生成方案。

title: MedMO: Grounding and Understanding Multimodal Large Language Model for Medical Images
summary: Multimodal large language models have advanced rapidly, but their adoption in medicine is constrained by limited domain coverage, imperfect modality alignment, and insufficient grounded reasoning. We introduce MedMO, a medical multimodal foundation model built on a general MLLM architecture and trained exclusively on large-scale domain-specific data. MedMO uses a multi-stage training recipe that includes cross-modal pretraining to align heterogeneous visual encoders with a medical language backbone, instruction tuning with multi-task supervision spanning captioning, VQA, report generation, retrieval, and bounding-box disease localization, and reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards that combine factuality checks with a box-level GIoU signal to improve spatial grounding and step-by-step reasoning in challenging clinical settings. Across modalities and tasks, MedMO surpasses strong open-source medical baselines. MedMO-8B-Next achieves consistent gains on VQA benchmarks, improving by 6.6% on average over Fleming-VL-8B, including gains of 6.0% on MMMU-Med, 9.8% on PMC-VQA, and 21.3% on MedXpertQA. On text-based QA, it improves by 14.4% over Fleming-VL-8B, driven by gains of 8.4% on MMLU-Med and 30.1% on MedQA. For medical report generation, it improves by 6.7% on MIMIC-CXR. MedMO-8B-Next also demonstrates strong grounding performance, reaching 56.1 IoU on Bacteria, which is a 47.8 IoU gain over Fleming-VL-8B. At smaller scale, MedMO-4B-Next remains competitive and exceeds Fleming-VL-8B across VQA, QA, and report generation. Evaluations spanning radiology, ophthalmology, and pathology microscopy further confirm broad cross-modality generalization. Project is available at https://genmilab.github.io/MedMO-Page

AI.tldr: 提出了一个面向医疗场景的多模态基础模型MedMO，通过分阶段训练提升了医学视觉-语言对齐、可验证推理与空间定位能力，并在多项医学多模态与文本任务上优于强基线。
AI.motivation: 通用多模态大语言模型在医学领域落地受限于领域覆盖不足、跨模态对齐不理想以及缺少可落地的推理与定位能力，因此需要专门的医学多模态基础模型。
AI.method: 采用基于通用MLLM架构的医学多模态基础模型MedMO，仅使用大规模医学领域数据训练；训练流程包括三阶段：跨模态预训练以对齐异构视觉编码器与医学语言骨干，指令微调覆盖图像描述、VQA、报告生成、检索和框级疾病定位等多任务监督，以及带可验证奖励的强化学习，将事实性检查与框级GIoU信号结合以增强空间定位和逐步推理。
AI.result: MedMO-8B-Next在VQA任务上相对Fleming-VL-8B平均提升6.6%，其中MMMU-Med提升6.0%、PMC-VQA提升9.8%、MedXpertQA提升21.3%；在文本问答上提升14.4%，其中MMLU-Med提升8.4%、MedQA提升30.1%；医学报告生成在MIMIC-CXR上提升6.7%；定位方面在Bacteria数据集上达到56.1 IoU，较基线提升47.8 IoU。MedMO-4B-Next在较小规模下也保持竞争力，并在VQA、QA和报告生成上超过基线。
AI.conclusion: MedMO表明，面向医学领域进行专门数据训练、跨模态对齐、任务化指令微调和基于可验证奖励的强化学习，能够同时提升医学多模态模型的通用理解、事实性推理与空间 grounding 能力，并具备跨放射、眼科和病理等模态的泛化性。

title: VenusBench-Mobile: A Challenging and User-Centric Benchmark for Mobile GUI Agents with Capability Diagnostics
summary: Existing online benchmarks for mobile GUI agents remain largely app-centric and task-homogeneous, failing to reflect the diversity and instability of real-world mobile usage. To this end, we introduce VenusBench-Mobile, a challenging online benchmark for evaluating general-purpose mobile GUI agents under realistic, user-centric conditions. VenusBench-Mobile builds two core evaluation pillars: defining what to evaluate via user-intent-driven task design that reflects real mobile usage, and how to evaluate through a capability-oriented annotation scheme for fine-grained agent behavior analysis. Extensive evaluation of state-of-the-art mobile GUI agents reveals large performance gaps relative to prior benchmarks, indicating that VenusBench-Mobile poses substantially more challenging and realistic tasks and that current agents remain far from reliable real-world deployment. Diagnostic analysis further shows that failures are dominated by deficiencies in perception and memory, which are largely obscured by coarse-grained evaluations. Moreover, even the strongest agents exhibit near-zero success under environment variations, highlighting their brittleness in realistic settings. Based on these insights, we believe VenusBench-Mobile provides an important stepping stone toward robust real-world deployment of mobile GUI agents. Code and data are available at https://github.com/inclusionAI/UI-Venus/tree/VenusBench-Mobile.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VenusBench-Mobile，一个面向通用移动端GUI代理的在线基准，用更贴近真实用户使用场景的任务设计和更细粒度的能力标注，评估当前移动GUI代理在真实环境中的表现，并发现其在感知、记忆及环境变化适应性方面仍显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有移动端GUI代理基准过于以应用为中心、任务类型单一，难以反映真实移动使用中的多样性和不稳定性，因此需要一个更现实、以用户意图为核心的评测体系来衡量代理的实际能力。
AI.method: VenusBench-Mobile从两个方面构建评测：一是基于用户意图设计任务，模拟真实移动使用；二是采用能力导向的标注方案，对代理行为进行细粒度分析。随后对多种先进移动GUI代理进行系统评测，并在环境变化条件下考察其鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验显示，现有最强代理在该基准上的表现明显低于先前基准，说明任务更具挑战性且更真实。诊断分析表明，主要失败原因来自感知和记忆不足，而粗粒度评测难以揭示这些问题；在环境变化下，强模型也几乎无法成功，表现出明显脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: VenusBench-Mobile更适合衡量移动GUI代理在真实场景中的可靠性，可作为推动其走向实际部署的重要一步，同时也表明当前方法在感知、记忆和环境鲁棒性方面仍需显著改进。

title: POINTS-GUI-G: GUI-Grounding Journey
summary: The rapid advancement of vision-language models has catalyzed the emergence of GUI agents, which hold immense potential for automating complex tasks, from online shopping to flight booking, thereby alleviating the burden of repetitive digital workflows. As a foundational capability, GUI grounding is typically established as a prerequisite for end-to-end task execution. It enables models to precisely locate interface elements, such as text and icons, to perform accurate operations like clicking and typing. Unlike prior works that fine-tune models already possessing strong spatial awareness (e.g., Qwen3-VL), we aim to master the full technical pipeline by starting from a base model with minimal grounding ability, such as POINTS-1.5. We introduce POINTS-GUI-G-8B, which achieves state-of-the-art performance with scores of 59.9 on ScreenSpot-Pro, 66.0 on OSWorld-G, 95.7 on ScreenSpot-v2, and 49.9 on UI-Vision. Our model's success is driven by three key factors: (1) Refined Data Engineering, involving the unification of diverse open-source datasets format alongside sophisticated strategies for augmentation, filtering, and difficulty grading; (2) Improved Training Strategies, including continuous fine-tuning of the vision encoder to enhance perceptual accuracy and maintaining resolution consistency between training and inference; and (3) Reinforcement Learning (RL) with Verifiable Rewards. While RL is traditionally used to bolster reasoning, we demonstrate that it significantly improves precision in the perception-intensive GUI grounding task. Furthermore, GUI grounding provides a natural advantage for RL, as rewards are easily verifiable and highly accurate.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了POINTS-GUI-G-8B：从基础视觉语言模型出发，经过数据工程、训练策略优化和可验证奖励强化学习，显著提升GUI grounding能力，并在多个基准上取得领先结果。
AI.motivation: 作者希望不依赖已具备较强空间感知能力的现成模型，而是从基础模型出发，完整掌握GUI grounding的技术流程，解决界面元素定位与操作所需的核心感知问题。
AI.method: 方法包括三部分：1）数据工程：统一多种开源数据格式，并进行数据增强、过滤和难度分级；2）训练策略优化：持续微调视觉编码器提升感知精度，并保持训练与推理时分辨率一致；3）引入基于可验证奖励的强化学习，以提升感知密集型GUI grounding任务中的定位精度。
AI.result: 模型POINTS-GUI-G-8B在多个基准上取得优异成绩：ScreenSpot-Pro 59.9，OSWorld-G 66.0，ScreenSpot-v2 95.7，UI-Vision 49.9，达到当前最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，GUI grounding不仅适合使用强化学习优化，而且可验证奖励在这类任务中非常有效；通过高质量数据、稳定训练和RL结合，可以从基础模型构建出强大的GUI grounding能力。

title: Trifuse: Enhancing Attention-Based GUI Grounding via Multimodal Fusion
summary: GUI grounding maps natural language instructions to the correct interface elements, serving as the perception foundation for GUI agents. Existing approaches predominantly rely on fine-tuning multimodal large language models (MLLMs) using large-scale GUI datasets to predict target element coordinates, which is data-intensive and generalizes poorly to unseen interfaces. Recent attention-based alternatives exploit localization signals in MLLMs attention mechanisms without task-specific fine-tuning, but suffer from low reliability due to the lack of explicit and complementary spatial anchors in GUI images. To address this limitation, we propose Trifuse, an attention-based grounding framework that explicitly integrates complementary spatial anchors. Trifuse integrates attention, OCR-derived textual cues, and icon-level caption semantics via a Consensus-SinglePeak (CS) fusion strategy that enforces cross-modal agreement while retaining sharp localization peaks. Extensive evaluations on four grounding benchmarks demonstrate that Trifuse achieves strong performance without task-specific fine-tuning, substantially reducing the reliance on expensive annotated data. Moreover, ablation studies reveal that incorporating OCR and caption cues consistently improves attention-based grounding performance across different backbones, highlighting its effectiveness as a general framework for GUI grounding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Trifuse，一种无需任务特定微调的GUI定位框架，通过融合注意力、OCR文本线索和图标级描述语义来提升界面元素定位的准确性与稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI grounding方法主要依赖大规模标注数据对多模态大模型进行微调，成本高且泛化到未见界面时效果较差；纯注意力式方法虽避免微调，但缺少显式空间锚点，定位可靠性不足。
AI.method: 提出Consensus-SinglePeak（CS）融合策略，将MLLM注意力、OCR提取的文本线索和图标级caption语义进行跨模态一致性约束，同时保持单峰式的清晰定位响应，从而形成一个显式引入互补空间锚点的注意力式grounding框架Trifuse。
AI.result: 在四个grounding基准上进行了评估，Trifuse在无需任务特定微调的情况下取得了较强性能，显著降低了对昂贵标注数据的依赖；消融实验表明，加入OCR和caption信息能在不同backbone上稳定提升注意力式定位表现。
AI.conclusion: Trifuse证明了在GUI grounding中融合注意力、OCR和caption等互补模态信息是有效的，可作为一种通用框架提升无微调定位的准确性与泛化能力。

title: UI-Mem: Self-Evolving Experience Memory for Online Reinforcement Learning in Mobile GUI Agents
summary: Online Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a promising paradigm for enhancing GUI agents through direct environment interaction. However, its effectiveness is severely hindered by inefficient credit assignment in long-horizon tasks and repetitive errors across tasks due to the lack of experience transfer. To address these challenges, we propose UI-Mem, a novel framework that enhances GUI online RL with a Hierarchical Experience Memory. Unlike traditional replay buffers, our memory accumulates structured knowledge, including high-level workflows, subtask skills, and failure patterns. These experiences are stored as parameterized templates that enable cross-task and cross-application transfer. To effectively integrate memory guidance into online RL, we introduce Stratified Group Sampling, which injects varying levels of guidance across trajectories within each rollout group to maintain outcome diversity, driving the unguided policy toward internalizing guided behaviors. Furthermore, a Self-Evolving Loop continuously abstracts novel strategies and errors to keep the memory aligned with the agent's evolving policy. Experiments on online GUI benchmarks demonstrate that UI-Mem significantly outperforms traditional RL baselines and static reuse strategies, with strong generalization to unseen applications. Project page: https://ui-mem.github.io

AI.tldr: UI-Mem提出了一种面向GUI在线强化学习的分层经验记忆框架，通过结构化存储工作流、子任务技能和失败模式，并结合分层采样与自进化更新，提升长任务中的信用分配和跨任务迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有在线强化学习在GUI长时序任务中容易出现信用分配困难，且不同任务之间重复犯错，主要原因是缺少有效的经验迁移机制，因此需要一种能够积累、复用并持续更新经验的方案。
AI.method: 作者提出三部分方法：一是分层经验记忆，将高层工作流、子任务技能和失败模式以参数化模板形式存储；二是分层组采样，在每次rollout中注入不同强度的记忆指导，以保持轨迹多样性并促使策略内化被指导行为；三是自进化循环，持续从新策略和新错误中抽象新经验并更新记忆，使其与智能体能力同步演化。
AI.result: 在在线GUI基准实验中，UI-Mem明显优于传统强化学习基线和静态复用策略，并且在未见过的应用上表现出较强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，结构化、可迁移且可持续更新的经验记忆能够有效增强GUI在线强化学习，尤其适合长任务场景和跨应用泛化。

title: M$^2$-Miner: Multi-Agent Enhanced MCTS for Mobile GUI Agent Data Mining
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2026. Supplementary material is included at the end of the main paper (16 pages, 15 figures, 2 tables)
summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) agent is pivotal to advancing intelligent human-computer interaction paradigms. Constructing powerful GUI agents necessitates the large-scale annotation of high-quality user-behavior trajectory data (i.e., intent-trajectory pairs) for training. However, manual annotation methods and current GUI agent data mining approaches typically face three critical challenges: high construction cost, poor data quality, and low data richness. To address these issues, we propose M$^2$-Miner, the first low-cost and automated mobile GUI agent data-mining framework based on Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS). For better data mining efficiency and quality, we present a collaborative multi-agent framework, comprising InferAgent, OrchestraAgent, and JudgeAgent for guidance, acceleration, and evaluation. To further enhance the efficiency of mining and enrich intent diversity, we design an intent recycling strategy to extract extra valuable interaction trajectories. Additionally, a progressive model-in-the-loop training strategy is introduced to improve the success rate of data mining. Extensive experiments have demonstrated that the GUI agent fine-tuned using our mined data achieves state-of-the-art performance on several commonly used mobile GUI benchmarks. Our work will be released to facilitate the community research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向移动端GUI智能体的数据挖掘框架M²-Miner，旨在以更低成本自动构建高质量、丰富的意图-轨迹配对数据，并通过多智能体协作、意图回收和渐进式训练提升挖掘效率与数据质量。
AI.motivation: GUI智能体的发展依赖大量高质量的用户行为轨迹数据，但人工标注和现有挖掘方法普遍存在成本高、数据质量不稳定、数据多样性不足等问题，因此需要一种更自动化、低成本且高效的数据构建方案。
AI.method: 作者提出基于蒙特卡洛树搜索的M²-Miner框架，核心包含三部分：1）协同多智能体机制，由InferAgent、OrchestraAgent和JudgeAgent分别负责引导、加速和评估；2）意图回收策略，用于从交互过程中提取更多有价值轨迹并提升意图多样性；3）渐进式的模型在环训练策略，用于提高数据挖掘成功率与稳定性。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用该框架挖掘的数据对GUI智能体进行微调后，在多个常用移动端GUI基准上取得了当前最优性能，说明所构建数据具有较强的有效性和泛化价值。
AI.conclusion: M²-Miner提供了一种低成本、自动化且可扩展的移动GUI智能体数据挖掘方案，能够同时缓解数据构建成本高、质量不足和多样性欠缺的问题，并有望推动GUI智能体研究与应用的发展。

title: E.M.Ground: A Temporal Grounding Vid-LLM with Holistic Event Perception and Matching
summary: Despite recent advances in Video Large Language Models (Vid-LLMs), Temporal Video Grounding (TVG), which aims to precisely localize time segments corresponding to query events, remains a significant challenge. Existing methods often match start and end frames by comparing frame features with two separate tokens, relying heavily on exact timestamps.
