However, this approach fails to capture the event's semantic continuity and integrity, leading to ambiguities. To address this, we propose E.M.Ground, a novel Vid-LLM for TVG that focuses on holistic and coherent event perception. E.M.Ground introduces three key innovations: (i) a special <event> token that aggregates information from all frames of a query event, preserving semantic continuity for accurate event matching; (ii) Savitzky-Golay smoothing to reduce noise in token-to-frame similarities across timestamps, improving prediction accuracy; (iii) multi-grained frame feature aggregation to enhance matching reliability and temporal understanding, compensating for compression-induced information loss. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets show that E.M.Ground consistently outperforms state-of-the-art Vid-LLMs by significant margins.

AI.tldr: 本文提出E.M.Ground，一种面向时间视频定位（TVG）的新型视频大语言模型，通过事件级整体感知替代仅依赖起止帧匹配的方法，以提升对查询事件时间区间的精确定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有TVG方法通常用两个独立token分别匹配起始帧和结束帧，并过度依赖精确时间戳，难以捕捉事件的语义连续性与整体性，因而在复杂场景下容易产生歧义和定位偏差。
AI.method: 提出三项核心设计：1）引入特殊的<event> token，聚合查询事件相关的全帧信息，保持语义连续性；2）采用Savitzky-Golay平滑，降低跨时间戳的token到帧相似度噪声；3）进行多粒度帧特征聚合，缓解压缩带来的信息损失，增强匹配可靠性与时间理解能力。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的大规模实验表明，E.M.Ground相较于当前最先进的Vid-LLMs取得了稳定且显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，面向TVG任务时，事件级的整体建模、时序相似度平滑以及多粒度特征融合能够有效提升定位精度与鲁棒性，为Vid-LLM在细粒度时间理解任务中的设计提供了新思路。

title: EgoActor: Grounding Task Planning into Spatial-aware Egocentric Actions for Humanoid Robots via Visual-Language Models
summary: Deploying humanoid robots in real-world settings is fundamentally challenging, as it demands tight integration of perception, locomotion, and manipulation under partial-information observations and dynamically changing environments. As well as transitioning robustly between sub-tasks of different types. Towards addressing these challenges, we propose a novel task - EgoActing, which requires directly grounding high-level instructions into various, precise, spatially aware humanoid actions. We further instantiate this task by introducing EgoActor, a unified and scalable vision-language model (VLM) that can predict locomotion primitives (e.g., walk, turn, move sideways, change height), head movements, manipulation commands, and human-robot interactions to coordinate perception and execution in real-time. We leverage broad supervision over egocentric RGB-only data from real-world demonstrations, spatial reasoning question-answering, and simulated environment demonstrations, enabling EgoActor to make robust, context-aware decisions and perform fluent action inference (under 1s) with both 8B and 4B parameter models. Extensive evaluations in both simulated and real-world environments demonstrate that EgoActor effectively bridges abstract task planning and concrete motor execution, while generalizing across diverse tasks and unseen environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个名为EgoActing的新任务，以及对应的统一视觉语言模型EgoActor，用于将高层指令直接映射为类人机器人在真实环境中的精细空间动作，并实现感知、运动和操作的一体化决策。
AI.motivation: 类人机器人在真实场景中部署困难，核心原因在于需要在部分可观测、动态变化的环境下，同时协调感知、行走、操作以及不同子任务之间的平滑切换，因此需要一种能把抽象指令快速转成具体动作的统一方法。
AI.method: 作者提出EgoActing任务，并构建EgoActor这一可扩展的视觉语言模型，输出包括行走、转向、侧移、升降、头部运动、操作命令以及人机交互在内的多种动作原语；训练时融合了第一视角RGB真实演示、空间推理问答和仿真环境演示等多源监督，以增强上下文感知与空间推理能力。
AI.result: 8B和4B参数版本都能在1秒内完成动作推断；在模拟和真实环境的评测中，EgoActor表现出较强的鲁棒性，能够有效连接高层任务规划与底层运动执行，并且对多样任务和未见环境具有较好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了通过统一的视觉语言模型将高层语言意图直接落地为类人机器人精细动作是可行的，为真实世界中的通用机器人执行提供了一条可扩展的路线。

title: FactNet: A Billion-Scale Knowledge Graph for Multilingual Factual Grounding
summary: Large language models hallucinate factual claims and struggle to ground their outputs in retrievable evidence, particularly in non-English languages. Existing resources impose a trade-off: structured knowledge bases lack textual grounding, whereas grounded datasets remain small and monolingual. We introduce FactNet, a billion-scale open resource that couples 1.7B Wikidata assertions with 3.01B evidence pointers drawn from 316 native Wikipedia editions. FactNet employs a deterministic construction pipeline, ensuring that every evidence unit is traceable to its source with byte-level precision. We further establish FactNet-Bench, an evaluation suite for Knowledge Graph Completion, Question Answering, and Fact Checking, equipped with systematic leakage controls. Experiments demonstrate that FactNet-Bench differentiates among structural, text-aware, and LLM-integrated methods, and that cross-lingual structure enables knowledge transfer across language tiers.

AI.tldr: 提出了FactNet：一个将17亿条Wikidata断言与30.1亿条证据指针结合的大规模开放资源，并配套FactNet-Bench评测套件，用于缓解大语言模型事实幻觉与非英语语境下的证据对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有资源存在明显权衡：结构化知识库缺少文本证据，带证据的数据集规模又小且多为单语；这导致模型在非英语语言中更难将生成内容与可检索证据对齐。
AI.method: 采用确定性构建流程，从316个本地语言版维基百科中抽取证据指针，并与Wikidata断言进行耦合，保证每个证据单元都能以字节级精度追溯来源；同时构建FactNet-Bench，并加入系统性的泄漏控制，用于知识图谱补全、问答和事实核查评测。
AI.result: 实验表明，FactNet-Bench能够有效区分结构化方法、文本感知方法和融合LLM的方法；此外，跨语言的结构信息还能支持不同语言层级之间的知识迁移。
AI.conclusion: FactNet在规模、可追溯性和多语言覆盖方面同时推进了事实知识资源建设，为评估和改进模型的事实性与跨语言知识利用提供了新的基础设施。

title: Z3D: Zero-Shot 3D Visual Grounding from Images
summary: 3D visual grounding (3DVG) aims to localize objects in a 3D scene based on natural language queries. In this work, we explore zero-shot 3DVG from multi-view images alone, without requiring any geometric supervision or object priors. We introduce Z3D, a universal grounding pipeline that flexibly operates on multi-view images while optionally incorporating camera poses and depth maps. We identify key bottlenecks in prior zero-shot methods causing significant performance degradation and address them with (i) a state-of-the-art zero-shot 3D instance segmentation method to generate high-quality 3D bounding box proposals and (ii) advanced reasoning via prompt-based segmentation, which utilizes full capabilities of modern VLMs. Extensive experiments on the ScanRefer and Nr3D benchmarks demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance among zero-shot methods. Code is available at https://github.com/col14m/z3d .

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Z3D的零样本3D视觉定位框架，仅依赖多视角图像即可在3D场景中根据自然语言查询定位目标，无需几何监督或对象先验，并在ScanRefer和Nr3D上取得零样本方法中的最优表现。
AI.motivation: 3D视觉定位需要将自然语言与三维场景中的目标对应起来，但现有零样本方法往往受限于几何信息依赖、候选框质量不足和推理能力不够，导致性能明显下降。作者希望在不使用几何监督和对象先验的条件下，提升零样本3DVG的可用性与精度。
AI.method: 提出通用定位管线Z3D，基于多视角图像工作，并可选融合相机位姿和深度图。方法重点解决两个瓶颈：一是使用先进的零样本3D实例分割方法生成高质量3D边界框候选；二是通过基于提示词的分割进行更强的推理，充分利用现代视觉语言模型的能力，从而更准确地完成目标定位。
AI.result: 在ScanRefer和Nr3D基准测试上，Z3D在零样本方法中达到当前最优性能，说明高质量候选生成与提示式推理能够显著提升零样本3DVG效果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，仅依靠多视角图像结合强候选生成和VLM推理，就可以实现高性能的零样本3D视觉定位，为无需几何监督的3D理解提供了有效方案。

title: Finding Optimal Video Moment without Training: Gaussian Boundary Optimization for Weakly Supervised Video Grounding
summary: Weakly supervised temporal video grounding aims to localize query-relevant segments in untrimmed videos using only video-sentence pairs, without requiring ground-truth segment annotations that specify exact temporal boundaries. Recent approaches tackle this task by utilizing Gaussian-based temporal proposals to represent query-relevant segments. However, their inference strategies rely on heuristic mappings from Gaussian parameters to segment boundaries, resulting in suboptimal localization performance. To address this issue, we propose Gaussian Boundary Optimization (GBO), a novel inference framework that predicts segment boundaries by solving a principled optimization problem that balances proposal coverage and segment compactness. We derive a closed-form solution for this problem and rigorously analyze the optimality conditions under varying penalty regimes. Beyond its theoretical foundations, GBO offers several practical advantages: it is training-free and compatible with both single-Gaussian and mixture-based proposal architectures. Our experiments show that GBO significantly improves localization, achieving state-of-the-art results across standard benchmarks. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficiency and generalizability of GBO across various proposal schemes. The code is available at https://github.com/sunoh-kim/gbo.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GBO的弱监督时序视频定位推理框架，通过求解带有覆盖与紧致性平衡的优化问题来直接预测片段边界，替代基于高斯参数的启发式映射，从而显著提升定位效果。
AI.motivation: 弱监督时序视频定位只依赖视频-句子对，缺少精确时间边界标注。现有基于高斯提案的方法在推理阶段通常采用启发式规则将高斯参数转换为片段边界，这种方式不够原则化，容易导致定位精度受限，因此需要更合理的边界推断方法。
AI.method: 作者提出Gaussian Boundary Optimization（GBO）。该方法将边界预测建模为一个优化问题，同时考虑提案覆盖度与片段紧致性，并推导出闭式解；此外，还分析了不同惩罚项设置下的最优性条件。GBO不需要额外训练，且可兼容单高斯和混合高斯等多种提案架构。
AI.result: 实验表明，GBO在多个标准基准上显著提升了定位性能，达到了当前最优结果，并且在不同提案方案下都表现出良好的效率与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: GBO通过原则化的优化推理替代启发式边界映射，为弱监督时序视频定位提供了更稳健、通用且无需训练的边界预测方案，具有较强的实用价值。

title: From Speech-to-Spatial: Grounding Utterances on A Live Shared View with Augmented Reality
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures. This is the author's version of the article that appeared at the IEEE Conference on Virtual Reality and 3D User Interfaces (IEEE VR) 2026
summary: We introduce Speech-to-Spatial, a referent disambiguation framework that converts verbal remote-assistance instructions into spatially grounded AR guidance. Unlike prior systems that rely on additional cues (e.g., gesture, gaze) or manual expert annotations, Speech-to-Spatial infers the intended target solely from spoken references (speech input). Motivated by our formative study of speech referencing patterns, we characterize recurring ways people specify targets (Direct Attribute, Relational, Remembrance, and Chained) and ground them to our object-centric relational graph. Given an utterance, referent cues are parsed and rendered as persistent in-situ AR visual guidance, reducing iterative micro-guidance ("a bit more to the right", "now, stop.") during remote guidance. We demonstrate the use cases of our system with remote guided assistance and intent disambiguation scenarios. Our evaluation shows that Speechto-Spatial improves task efficiency, reduces cognitive load, and enhances usability compared to a conventional voice-only baseline, transforming disembodied verbal instruction into visually explainable, actionable guidance on a live shared view.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出Speech-to-Spatial框架，仅通过语音指令推断远程协助中的目标对象，并将其转化为空间化的AR引导，以减少反复口头微调指令。
AI.motivation: 现有远程协助系统通常依赖手势、视线或人工标注等额外信息，增加了交互复杂度。作者希望仅凭口头引用就能消除目标歧义，并把抽象语音变成可视、可执行的空间指导。
AI.method: 作者先基于形成性研究总结人们在语音指代中的四类模式：直接属性、关系指代、回忆指代和链式指代；再将这些指代映射到以物体为中心的关系图中。系统对输入语句进行参照线索解析，并在共享视图上生成持久化的AR原位视觉提示，实现目标消歧与引导。
AI.result: 评估结果表明，该系统相比传统仅语音基线，能够提升任务效率、降低认知负荷并改善可用性，同时减少类似“再往右一点”“停下”等重复性微调指令。
AI.conclusion: Speech-to-Spatial展示了将离散的口头指令转化为直观空间引导的可行性，为远程协助中的目标消歧和动作指导提供了一种仅依赖语音输入的新路径。

title: Video-OPD: Efficient Post-Training of Multimodal Large Language Models for Temporal Video Grounding via On-Policy Distillation
summary: Reinforcement learning has emerged as a principled post-training paradigm for Temporal Video Grounding (TVG) due to its on-policy optimization, yet existing GRPO-based methods remain fundamentally constrained by sparse reward signals and substantial computational overhead. We propose Video-OPD, an efficient post-training framework for TVG inspired by recent advances in on-policy distillation. Video-OPD optimizes trajectories sampled directly from the current policy, thereby preserving alignment between training and inference distributions, while a frontier teacher supplies dense, token-level supervision via a reverse KL divergence objective. This formulation preserves the on-policy property critical for mitigating distributional shift, while converting sparse, episode-level feedback into fine-grained, step-wise learning signals. Building on Video-OPD, we introduce Teacher-Validated Disagreement Focusing (TVDF), a lightweight training curriculum that iteratively prioritizes trajectories that are both teacher-reliable and maximally informative for the student, thereby improving training efficiency. Empirical results demonstrate that Video-OPD consistently outperforms GRPO while achieving substantially faster convergence and lower computational cost, establishing on-policy distillation as an effective alternative to conventional reinforcement learning for TVG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Video-OPD，一种用于时间视频定位（TVG）的高效后训练框架，通过在当前策略上采样轨迹并结合教师模型的逐步蒸馏监督，替代传统基于强化学习的方法，以降低稀疏奖励和计算开销问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GRPO的TVG后训练方法主要受限于奖励信号稀疏、训练效率低以及计算成本高，且容易出现训练与推理分布不一致的问题，因此需要一种既保持on-policy特性又能提供更密集监督的训练范式。
AI.method: Video-OPD从当前策略直接采样轨迹，保持训练与推理分布一致；同时引入前沿教师模型，通过逆KL散度提供token级稠密监督，将原本稀疏的episode级反馈转化为逐步学习信号。进一步提出Teacher-Validated Disagreement Focusing（TVDF），优先选择教师可靠且对学生最有信息量的轨迹，以提升训练效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，Video-OPD在性能上持续优于GRPO，同时具有更快的收敛速度和更低的计算成本；TVDF进一步增强了训练过程的效率与有效性。
AI.conclusion: On-policy distillation可以作为TVG中传统强化学习的有效替代方案，在保持分布一致性的同时提供更密集的监督信号，从而实现更高效、更稳定的后训练优化。

title: Avenir-Web: Human-Experience-Imitating Multimodal Web Agents with Mixture of Grounding Experts
summary: Despite advances in multimodal large language models, autonomous web agents still struggle to reliably execute long-horizon tasks on complex and dynamic web interfaces. Existing agents often suffer from inaccurate element grounding, the absence of site-specific procedural knowledge, and unstable long-term task tracking and memory, particularly when operating over complex Document Object Model structures. To address these limitations, we introduce Avenir-Web, a web agent that achieves a new open-source state of the art on the Online-Mind2Web benchmark in real-world deployment. Avenir-Web leverages a Mixture of Grounding Experts, Experience-Imitation Planning for incorporating procedural priors, and a task-tracking checklist combined with adaptive memory to enable robust and seamless interaction across diverse user interface paradigms. We evaluate Avenir-Web on Online-Mind2Web, a rigorous benchmark of live and user-centered web tasks. Our results demonstrate that Avenir-Web significantly surpasses prior open-source agents and attains performance parity with top-tier proprietary models, thereby establishing a new open-source state of the art for reliable web agents on live websites.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Avenir-Web，用于提升自治网页智能体在复杂、动态网页上的长程任务执行能力，并在Online-Mind2Web基准上取得新的开源最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有网页智能体在复杂DOM结构和动态界面中，常遇到元素定位不准、缺少站点特定流程知识，以及长程任务跟踪和记忆不稳定等问题，因此需要更可靠的网页执行框架。
AI.method: Avenir-Web结合了三项关键设计：Mixture of Grounding Experts用于增强元素定位，Experience-Imitation Planning用于注入流程先验，以及任务跟踪清单配合自适应记忆机制，用于维持长程任务状态与上下文连贯性。
AI.result: 在Online-Mind2Web这一真实、用户导向的网页任务基准上，Avenir-Web显著优于此前的开源智能体，并达到顶级专有模型的相近性能，刷新了开源网页智能体的表现上限。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，将精确定位、经验先验规划与动态记忆管理结合起来，能够有效提升网页智能体在真实网站上的鲁棒性与可执行性。

title: SafeGround: Know When to Trust GUI Grounding Models via Uncertainty Calibration
summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) grounding aims to translate natural language instructions into executable screen coordinates, enabling automated GUI interaction. Nevertheless, incorrect grounding can result in costly, hard-to-reverse actions (e.g., erroneous payment approvals), raising concerns about model reliability. In this paper, we introduce SafeGround, an uncertainty-aware framework for GUI grounding models that enables risk-aware predictions through calibrations before testing. SafeGround leverages a distribution-aware uncertainty quantification method to capture the spatial dispersion of stochastic samples from outputs of any given model. Then, through the calibration process, SafeGround derives a test-time decision threshold with statistically guaranteed false discovery rate (FDR) control. We apply SafeGround on multiple GUI grounding models for the challenging ScreenSpot-Pro benchmark. Experimental results show that our uncertainty measure consistently outperforms existing baselines in distinguishing correct from incorrect predictions, while the calibrated threshold reliably enables rigorous risk control and potentials of substantial system-level accuracy improvements. Across multiple GUI grounding models, SafeGround improves system-level accuracy by up to 5.38% percentage points over Gemini-only inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SafeGround，一个面向GUI定位的、不确定性感知的校准框架，用于在测试时对模型输出进行风险控制，并在ScreenSpot-Pro基准上验证了其可提升可靠性与系统级准确率。
AI.motivation: GUI定位任务直接把自然语言指令映射到屏幕坐标，若发生错误，可能带来代价高且难以逆转的操作，因此需要在模型预测前加入可量化的不确定性评估与风险控制机制。
AI.method: SafeGround先利用分布感知的不确定性量化方法，捕捉模型随机采样输出的空间离散程度；随后通过校准过程确定测试时决策阈值，并以统计保证实现误发现率（FDR）控制，从而支持风险感知预测。
AI.result: 在多个GUI定位模型和ScreenSpot-Pro基准上，所提出的不确定性指标在区分正确与错误预测方面持续优于现有基线；校准后的阈值能够稳定实现严格风险控制，并带来系统级准确率提升，最高较Gemini-only推理提高5.38个百分点。
AI.conclusion: SafeGround证明了将不确定性量化与测试时校准结合起来，可以有效提升GUI grounding的可靠性与可控性，为高风险GUI自动交互提供了一种实用的安全框架。

title: Fly0: Decoupling Semantic Grounding from Geometric Planning for Zero-Shot Aerial Navigation
summary: Current Visual-Language Navigation (VLN) methodologies face a trade-off between semantic understanding and control precision. While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) offer superior reasoning, deploying them as low-level controllers leads to high latency, trajectory oscillations, and poor generalization due to weak geometric grounding. To address these limitations, we propose Fly0, a framework that decouples semantic reasoning from geometric planning. The proposed method operates through a three-stage pipeline: (1) an MLLM-driven module for grounding natural language instructions into 2D pixel coordinates; (2) a geometric projection module that utilizes depth data to localize targets in 3D space; and (3) a geometric planner that generates collision-free trajectories. This mechanism enables robust navigation even when visual contact is lost. By eliminating the need for continuous inference, Fly0 reduces computational overhead and improves system stability. Extensive experiments in simulation and real-world environments demonstrate that Fly0 outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, improving the Success Rate by over 20\% and reducing Navigation Error (NE) by approximately 50\% in unstructured environments. Our code is available at https://github.com/xuzhenxing1/Fly0.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fly0，将语义推理与几何规划解耦，用MLLM负责语言到2D像素定位，再结合深度投影与几何规划生成无碰撞轨迹，以降低延迟、提升稳定性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言导航方法在语义理解与控制精度之间存在权衡：直接把MLLM作为低层控制器会带来高延迟、轨迹震荡以及因几何建模不足导致的泛化差问题。
AI.method: 采用三阶段流程：首先由MLLM将自然语言指令解析并锚定到2D像素坐标；随后通过深度数据的几何投影将目标定位到3D空间；最后由几何规划器生成无碰撞轨迹，从而在失去视觉接触时仍可保持导航能力，并减少持续推理开销。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实环境的实验中，Fly0优于现有最先进基线；在非结构化环境下，成功率提升超过20%，导航误差约降低50%。
AI.conclusion: Fly0通过解耦语义推理与几何规划，在保持强语义理解能力的同时显著提升了控制精度、系统稳定性和计算效率，适合复杂、非结构化场景中的视觉-语言导航。

title: RGBX-R1: Visual Modality Chain-of-Thought Guided Reinforcement Learning for Multimodal Grounding
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLM) are primarily pre-trained on the RGB modality, thereby limiting their performance on other modalities, such as infrared, depth, and event data, which are crucial for complex scenarios. To address this, we propose RGBX-R1, a framework to enhance MLLM's perception and reasoning capacities across various X visual modalities. Specifically, we employ an Understand-Associate-Validate (UAV) prompting strategy to construct the Visual Modality Chain-of-Thought (VM-CoT), which aims to expand the MLLMs' RGB understanding capability into X modalities. To progressively enhance reasoning capabilities, we introduce a two-stage training paradigm: Cold-Start Supervised Fine-Tuning (CS-SFT) and Spatio-Temporal Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (ST-RFT). CS-SFT supervises the reasoning process with the guidance of VM-CoT, equipping the MLLM with fundamental modality cognition. Building upon GRPO, ST-RFT employs a Modality-understanding Spatio-Temporal (MuST) reward to reinforce modality reasoning. Notably, we construct the first RGBX-Grounding benchmark, and extensive experiments verify our superiority in multimodal understanding and spatial perception, outperforming baselines by 22.71% on three RGBX grounding tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RGBX-R1，用于增强多模态大语言模型在红外、深度、事件等X视觉模态上的感知与推理能力，并通过新基准RGBX-Grounding验证了显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型主要在RGB模态上预训练，对其他关键视觉模态的理解与推理能力不足，限制了其在复杂场景中的应用。
AI.method: 提出RGBX-R1框架，包含三部分：一是采用Understand-Associate-Validate（UAV）提示策略构建Visual Modality Chain-of-Thought（VM-CoT），将RGB理解能力迁移到X模态；二是设计两阶段训练范式，包括Cold-Start Supervised Fine-Tuning（CS-SFT）和Spatio-Temporal Reinforcement Fine-Tuning（ST-RFT）；三是在ST-RFT中基于GRPO引入Modality-understanding Spatio-Temporal（MuST）奖励，以强化模态推理能力。
AI.result: 作者构建了首个RGBX-Grounding基准，并在三个RGBX grounding任务上取得优于基线22.71%的结果，同时在多模态理解和空间感知方面表现更强。
AI.conclusion: RGBX-R1证明了通过模态链式思维与分阶段监督/强化训练，可以有效提升MLLM对非RGB视觉模态的理解、定位与推理能力，具有较强的推广价值。

title: Evaluating the Utility of Grounding Documents with Reference-Free LLM-based Metrics
summary: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG)'s success depends on the utility the LLM derives from the content used for grounding. Quantifying content utility does not have a definitive specification and existing metrics ignore model-specific capabilities and/or rely on costly annotations. In this paper, we propose Grounding Generation Utility (GroGU), a model-specific and reference-free metric that defines utility as a function of the downstream LLM's generation confidence based on entropy. Despite having no annotation requirements, GroGU is largely faithful in distinguishing ground-truth documents while capturing nuances ignored by LLM-agnostic metrics. We apply GroGU to train a query-rewriter for RAG by identifying high-utility preference data for Direct Preference Optimization. Experiments show improvements by up to 18.2 points in Mean Reciprocal Rank and up to 9.4 points in answer accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为GroGU的RAG内容效用评估指标，利用下游LLM的生成熵/置信度来衡量文档对生成的实际帮助，且无需标注。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG内容效用指标要么忽视模型特定能力，要么依赖昂贵标注，难以准确衡量文档对生成结果的真实贡献。
AI.method: 将效用定义为下游LLM基于给定内容生成时的置信度函数，使用熵刻画生成不确定性，构建一个模型特定、无参考、无标注需求的指标GroGU；进一步用其筛选高效用偏好数据，训练用于RAG的查询重写器，并结合Direct Preference Optimization进行优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在Mean Reciprocal Rank上最高提升18.2个百分点，在答案准确率上最高提升9.4个百分点。
AI.conclusion: GroGU能够更贴合具体LLM的实际生成能力，在无需人工标注的前提下有效区分高质量文档，并可用于改进RAG系统的查询重写与整体问答性能。

title: Learning with Challenges: Adaptive Difficulty-Aware Data Generation for Mobile GUI Agent Training
summary: Large-scale, high-quality interaction trajectories are essential for advancing mobile Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents. While existing methods typically rely on labor-intensive human demonstrations or automated model exploration to generate GUI trajectories, they lack fine-grained control over task difficulty. This fundamentally restricts learning effectiveness due to the mismatch between the training difficulty and the agent's capabilities. Inspired by how humans acquire skills through progressively challenging tasks, we propose MobileGen, a novel data generation framework that adaptively aligns training difficulty with the GUI agent's capability frontier. Specifically, MobileGen explicitly decouples task difficulty into structural (e.g., trajectory length) and semantic (e.g., task goal) dimensions. It then iteratively evaluates the agent on a curated prior dataset to construct a systematic profile of its capability frontier across these two dimensions. With this profile, the probability distribution of task difficulty is adaptively computed, from which the target difficulty for the next round of training can be sampled. Guided by the sampled difficulty, a multi-agent controllable generator is finally used to synthesize high-quality interaction trajectories along with corresponding task instructions. Extensive experiments show that MobileGen consistently outperforms existing data generation methods by improving the average performance of GUI agents by 1.57 times across multiple challenging benchmarks. This highlights the importance of capability-aligned data generation for effective mobile GUI agent training.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出MobileGen，用于为移动端GUI智能体生成与其当前能力相匹配的训练轨迹，通过自适应调节任务难度来提升数据质量与训练效果。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI轨迹生成方法主要依赖人工示范或模型自动探索，但缺乏对任务难度的精细控制，容易造成训练难度与智能体能力不匹配，从而降低学习效果。
AI.method: MobileGen将任务难度拆分为结构维度（如轨迹长度）和语义维度（如任务目标），先在优先数据集上评估智能体并刻画其能力边界，再根据能力边界自适应计算下一轮训练的难度分布，最后通过多智能体可控生成器按采样难度合成高质量交互轨迹及对应指令。
AI.result: 实验表明，MobileGen在多个具有挑战性的基准上优于现有数据生成方法，使GUI智能体的平均性能提升了1.57倍。
AI.conclusion: 能力对齐的自适应数据生成能够显著提升移动GUI智能体的训练效果，说明在轨迹生成中显式控制并匹配任务难度是关键。

title: ToolTok: Tool Tokenization for Efficient and Generalizable GUI Agents
comment: 8 pages main paper, 18 pages total, 8 figures, 5 tables, code at https://github.com/ZephinueCode/ToolTok
summary: Existing GUI agent models relying on coordinate-based one-step visual grounding struggle with generalizing to varying input resolutions and aspect ratios. Alternatives introduce coordinate-free strategies yet suffer from learning under severe data scarcity. To address the limitations, we propose ToolTok, a novel paradigm of multi-step pathfinding for GUI agents, where operations are modeled as a sequence of progressive tool usage. Specifically, we devise tools aligned with human interaction habits and represent each tool using learnable token embeddings. To enable efficient embedding learning under limited supervision, ToolTok introduces a semantic anchoring mechanism that grounds each tool with semantically related concepts as natural inductive bias. To further enable a pre-trained large language model to progressively acquire tool semantics, we construct an easy-to-hard curriculum consisting of three tasks: token definition question-answering, pure text-guided tool selection, and simplified visual pathfinding. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that ToolTok achieves superior performance among models of comparable scale (4B) and remains competitive with a substantially larger model (235B). Notably, these results are obtained using less than 1% of the training data required by other post-training approaches. In addition, ToolTok demonstrates strong generalization across unseen scenarios. Our training & inference code is open-source at https://github.com/ZephinueCode/ToolTok.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ToolTok，一种面向GUI智能体的多步路径规划新范式，用逐步工具调用替代单步坐标定位，并通过语义锚定与由易到难课程学习缓解小样本监督下的学习困难，在多项基准上以远少于常规方法的训练数据取得了更优或相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体多依赖基于坐标的单步视觉定位，面对不同输入分辨率和长宽比时泛化较差；而无坐标方法虽然规避了这一问题，但在数据极度稀缺的条件下训练效果受限。因此，需要一种既具备更强泛化能力、又能在少量监督下有效学习的GUI操作范式。
AI.method: 作者提出ToolTok，将GUI操作建模为多步、逐进式的工具使用序列。具体包括：1）设计符合人类交互习惯的工具，并用可学习的token embedding表示；2）引入语义锚定机制，将每个工具与语义相关概念关联，作为自然归纳偏置，以提升少监督下的embedding学习效率；3）构建由易到难的课程学习流程，依次进行token定义问答、纯文本引导的工具选择、以及简化视觉路径 खोज。该方法旨在让预训练大语言模型逐步掌握工具语义与操作策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，ToolTok在多个基准上优于同规模（4B）模型，并且在性能上可与一个显著更大的模型（235B）竞争；同时，其训练数据量不到其他后训练方法所需数据的1%。此外，ToolTok在未见场景中表现出较强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: ToolTok验证了“多步工具路径规划+语义锚定+课程学习”这一思路对GUI智能体的有效性，能够在数据稀缺条件下提升泛化与性能，为GUI自动化交互提供了一种更稳健的新范式。

title: ExpAlign: Expectation-Guided Vision-Language Alignment for Open-Vocabulary Grounding
summary: Open-vocabulary grounding requires accurate vision-language alignment under weak supervision, yet existing methods either rely on global sentence embeddings that lack fine-grained expressiveness or introduce token-level alignment with explicit supervision or heavy cross-attention designs. We propose ExpAlign, a theoretically grounded vision-language alignment framework built on a principled multiple instance learning formulation. ExpAlign introduces an Expectation Alignment Head that performs attention-based soft MIL pooling over token-region similarities, enabling implicit token and instance selection without additional annotations. To further stabilize alignment learning, we develop an energy-based multi-scale consistency regularization scheme, including a Top-K multi-positive contrastive objective and a Geometry-Aware Consistency Objective derived from a Lagrangian-constrained free-energy minimization. Extensive experiments show that ExpAlign consistently improves open-vocabulary detection and zero-shot instance segmentation, particularly on long-tail categories. Most notably, it achieves 36.2 AP$_r$ on the LVIS minival split, outperforming other state-of-the-art methods at comparable model scale, while remaining lightweight and inference-efficient.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向开放词汇定位的轻量级视觉-语言对齐框架ExpAlign，通过多实例学习实现细粒度对齐，并在弱监督条件下提升开放词汇检测与零样本实例分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么依赖全局句子嵌入，表达能力不足；要么依赖显式监督或复杂的跨注意力结构，训练与推理成本较高。作者希望在弱监督下实现更准确、更稳定且高效的细粒度视觉-语言对齐。
AI.method: ExpAlign基于多实例学习建模，引入Expectation Alignment Head，对token-区域相似度进行注意力式软MIL池化，实现隐式的token与实例选择。为增强训练稳定性，进一步设计了多尺度一致性正则：包括Top-K多正样本对比目标，以及由拉格朗日约束自由能最小化推导的几何感知一致性目标。
AI.result: 实验表明，ExpAlign在开放词汇检测和零样本实例分割上均取得持续提升，尤其对长尾类别更有效。在LVIS minival上达到36.2 AP_r，并在相近模型规模下优于其他最新方法，同时保持轻量和高推理效率。
AI.conclusion: ExpAlign证明了基于理论化多实例学习的隐式对齐机制可以在不增加额外标注和过重计算开销的前提下，显著提升开放词汇视觉任务的性能，具有较好的实用性与可扩展性。

title: Darwinian Memory: A Training-Free Self-Regulating Memory System for GUI Agent Evolution
summary: Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) agents facilitate Graphical User Interface (GUI) automation but struggle with long-horizon, cross-application tasks due to limited context windows. While memory systems provide a viable solution, existing paradigms struggle to adapt to dynamic GUI environments, suffering from a granularity mismatch between high-level intent and low-level execution, and context pollution where the static accumulation of outdated experiences drives agents into hallucination. To address these bottlenecks, we propose the Darwinian Memory System (DMS), a self-evolving architecture that constructs memory as a dynamic ecosystem governed by the law of survival of the fittest. DMS decomposes complex trajectories into independent, reusable units for compositional flexibility, and implements Utility-driven Natural Selection to track survival value, actively pruning suboptimal paths and inhibiting high-risk plans. This evolutionary pressure compels the agent to derive superior strategies. Extensive experiments on real-world multi-app benchmarks validate that DMS boosts general-purpose MLLMs without training costs or architectural overhead, achieving average gains of 18.0% in success rate and 33.9% in execution stability, while reducing task latency, establishing it as an effective self-evolving memory system for GUI tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出达尔文式记忆系统（DMS），用于提升多模态大语言模型在GUI自动化中的长程、多应用任务表现，通过动态记忆选择与淘汰机制缓解上下文污染和粒度不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体在跨应用、长时程任务中受限于上下文窗口，且传统记忆方法难以适应动态界面环境，容易因静态累积过时经验而产生幻觉与执行不稳定。
AI.method: DMS将复杂轨迹拆分为可独立复用的记忆单元，并引入基于效用的自然选择机制，持续评估记忆的生存价值，主动剪除低质量路径并抑制高风险计划，从而形成自我演化的记忆生态。
AI.result: 在真实多应用基准上，DMS无需额外训练或架构开销，即可提升通用MLLM性能，平均成功率提升18.0%，执行稳定性提升33.9%，同时降低任务延迟。
AI.conclusion: DMS通过动态、可组合、可筛选的记忆管理策略，有效增强了GUI任务中的长程推理与执行能力，是一种高效的自演化记忆系统。

title: MERMAID: Memory-Enhanced Retrieval and Reasoning with Multi-Agent Iterative Knowledge Grounding for Veracity Assessment
summary: Assessing the veracity of online content has become increasingly critical. Large language models (LLMs) have recently enabled substantial progress in automated veracity assessment, including automated fact-checking and claim verification systems. Typical veracity assessment pipelines break down complex claims into sub-claims, retrieve external evidence, and then apply LLM reasoning to assess veracity. However, existing methods often treat evidence retrieval as a static, isolated step and do not effectively manage or reuse retrieved evidence across claims. In this work, we propose MERMAID, a memory-enhanced multi-agent veracity assessment framework that tightly couples the retrieval and reasoning processes. MERMAID integrates agent-driven search, structured knowledge representations, and a persistent memory module within a Reason-Action style iterative process, enabling dynamic evidence acquisition and cross-claim evidence reuse. By retaining retrieved evidence in an evidence memory, the framework reduces redundant searches and improves verification efficiency and consistency. We evaluate MERMAID on three fact-checking benchmarks and two claim-verification datasets using multiple LLMs, including GPT, LLaMA, and Qwen families. Experimental results show that MERMAID achieves state-of-the-art performance while improving the search efficiency, demonstrating the effectiveness of synergizing retrieval, reasoning, and memory for reliable veracity assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MERMAID，一种记忆增强的多智能体真实性评估框架，将检索、推理和记忆模块紧密结合，以提升自动事实核查与主张验证的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有真实性评估流程通常将证据检索视为静态、孤立的步骤，难以在多个子主张之间有效管理和复用证据，导致重复搜索、效率偏低以及一致性不足。
AI.method: MERMAID采用智能体驱动的搜索、结构化知识表示和持久化记忆模块，并在Reason-Action式迭代过程中动态获取证据；同时将已检索证据存入证据记忆，用于跨主张复用并减少冗余检索。
AI.result: 作者在三个事实核查基准和两个主张验证数据集上，结合GPT、LLaMA和Qwen等多种大语言模型进行评测，结果表明MERMAID取得了当前最优性能，同时提升了搜索效率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，将检索、推理与记忆协同设计能够显著增强真实性评估系统的可靠性、效率和一致性，具有较强的实践价值。

title: RSGround-R1: Rethinking Remote Sensing Visual Grounding through Spatial Reasoning
summary: Remote Sensing Visual Grounding (RSVG) aims to localize target objects in large-scale aerial imagery based on natural language descriptions. Owing to the vast spatial scale and high semantic ambiguity of remote sensing scenes, these descriptions often rely heavily on positional cues, posing unique challenges for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in spatial reasoning. To leverage this unique feature, we propose a reasoning-guided, position-aware post-training framework, dubbed \textbf{RSGround-R1}, to progressively enhance spatial understanding. Specifically, we first introduce Chain-of-Thought Supervised Fine-Tuning (CoT-SFT) using synthetically generated RSVG reasoning data to establish explicit position awareness. Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) is then applied, augmented by our newly designed positional reward that provides continuous and distance-aware guidance toward accurate localization. Moreover, to mitigate incoherent localization behaviors across rollouts, we introduce a spatial consistency guided optimization scheme that dynamically adjusts policy updates based on their spatial coherence, ensuring stable and robust convergence. Extensive experiments on RSVG benchmarks demonstrate superior performance and generalization of our model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向遥感视觉定位的后训练框架RSGround-R1，通过分阶段的推理监督、位置感知奖励和空间一致性约束，提升多模态大模型在大尺度航拍图像中的空间理解与定位能力。
AI.motivation: 遥感场景空间尺度大、语义歧义强，目标描述往往更依赖位置线索而非外观语义，这使多模态大语言模型在空间推理和精确定位上面临明显挑战。
AI.method: 首先使用合成的遥感视觉定位推理数据进行链式思维监督微调，以建立显式的位置意识；随后进行强化微调，并设计连续、距离感知的位置奖励，引导模型更准确地定位目标；最后引入空间一致性引导优化，根据不同采样结果的空间一致性动态调整策略更新，以减少不稳定和不连贯的定位行为。
AI.result: 在多个遥感视觉定位基准上，该方法取得了更优性能，并表现出更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: RSGround-R1通过将推理、位置奖励和空间一致性约束结合起来，有效增强了多模态大模型的空间推理能力，为遥感视觉定位任务提供了一种稳定且高效的后训练范式。

title: BEAP-Agent: Backtrackable Execution and Adaptive Planning for GUI Agents
summary: GUI agents are designed to automate repetitive tasks and enhance productivity. However, existing GUI agents struggle to recover once they follow an incorrect exploration path, often leading to task failure. In this work, we model GUI task execution as a DFS process and propose BEAP-Agent, a DFS-based framework that supports long-range, multi-level state backtracking with dynamic task tracking and updating. The framework consists of three collaborative components: Planner, Executor, and Tracker. Together, they enable effective task exploration and execution. BEAP-Agent fills the gap in systematic backtracking mechanisms for GUI agents, offering a systematic solution for long-horizon task exploration. We conducted a systematic evaluation on the OSWorld benchmark, where BEAP-Agent achieved an accuracy of 28.2%, validating the effectiveness of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于深度优先搜索（DFS）的GUI智能体框架BEAP-Agent，通过多层级、长距离回溯机制来提升任务执行中的纠错与恢复能力，并在OSWorld基准上取得了28.2%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体在探索过程中一旦走错路径，往往缺乏有效的恢复机制，容易导致任务失败。论文希望解决长链路任务中“走偏后难以回退”的核心问题，提高自动化执行的稳定性与成功率。
AI.method: 作者将GUI任务执行建模为DFS过程，提出BEAP-Agent框架。该框架包含三个协同模块：Planner负责规划，Executor负责执行，Tracker负责动态跟踪与更新任务状态。三者配合实现多级状态回溯、长距离回退和持续任务重定位，从而支持更系统的探索与纠错。
AI.result: 在OSWorld基准测试中，BEAP-Agent达到28.2%的准确率，说明其回溯与动态跟踪机制对GUI任务执行具有实际提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于为GUI智能体引入了系统化的回溯机制，弥补了长时序任务探索中的恢复能力不足问题。BEAP-Agent为复杂GUI任务提供了一种更稳健的执行范式。

title: Grounding and Enhancing Informativeness and Utility in Dataset Distillation
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2026, 20 pages, 9 figures, 11 tables
summary: Dataset Distillation (DD) seeks to create a compact dataset from a large, real-world dataset. While recent methods often rely on heuristic approaches to balance efficiency and quality, the fundamental relationship between original and synthetic data remains underexplored. This paper revisits knowledge distillation-based dataset distillation within a solid theoretical framework. We introduce the concepts of Informativeness and Utility, capturing crucial information within a sample and essential samples in the training set, respectively. Building on these principles, we define optimal dataset distillation mathematically. We then present InfoUtil, a framework that balances informativeness and utility in synthesizing the distilled dataset. InfoUtil incorporates two key components: (1) game-theoretic informativeness maximization using Shapley Value attribution to extract key information from samples, and (2) principled utility maximization by selecting globally influential samples based on Gradient Norm. These components ensure that the distilled dataset is both informative and utility-optimized. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves a 6.1\% performance improvement over the previous state-of-the-art approach on ImageNet-1K dataset using ResNet-18.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InfoUtil框架，用理论化的“信息性”和“效用”概念来重构知识蒸馏式数据集蒸馏，并通过Shapley Value与梯度范数分别优化关键信息提取和样本效用，从而提升蒸馏数据集质量。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集蒸馏方法多依赖经验性启发式设计，如何刻画原始数据与合成数据之间的本质关系仍不清晰。作者希望建立更扎实的理论框架，以兼顾蒸馏效率与性能。
AI.method: 作者定义了两个核心概念：信息性（样本中包含的关键知识）和效用（训练集中对学习最有价值的样本）。在此基础上提出InfoUtil：一方面用博弈论中的Shapley Value衡量并最大化样本信息性，提取关键知识；另一方面用Gradient Norm识别全局影响力大的样本，以实现效用最大化。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K与ResNet-18实验中，InfoUtil相较于此前最优方法取得了6.1%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为数据集蒸馏提供了更清晰的理论定义与优化路径，说明同时优化信息性与效用能够显著提升蒸馏数据集的有效性与下游性能。

title: Continual GUI Agents
summary: As digital environments (data distribution) are in flux, with new GUI data arriving over time-introducing new domains or resolutions-agents trained on static environments deteriorate in performance. In this work, we introduce Continual GUI Agents, a new task that requires GUI agents to perform continual learning under shifted domains and resolutions. We find existing methods fail to maintain stable grounding as GUI distributions shift over time, due to the diversity of UI interaction points and regions in fluxing scenarios. To address this, we introduce GUI-Anchoring in Flux (GUI-AiF), a new reinforcement fine-tuning framework that stabilizes continual learning through two novel rewards: Anchoring Point Reward in Flux (APR-iF) and Anchoring Region Reward in Flux (ARR-iF). These rewards guide the agents to align with shifting interaction points and regions, mitigating the tendency of existing reward strategies to over-adapt to static grounding cues (e.g., fixed coordinates or element scales). Extensive experiments show GUI-AiF surpasses state-of-the-art baselines. Our work establishes the first continual learning framework for GUI agents, revealing the untapped potential of reinforcement fine-tuning for continual GUI Agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向持续变化GUI环境的持续学习任务，并设计了GUI-AiF强化微调框架，通过两种新奖励机制提升GUI代理在域和分辨率漂移下的稳定定位与交互能力。
AI.motivation: 静态环境训练的GUI代理在数据分布随时间变化、出现新域或新分辨率时性能会下降，主要原因是交互点和区域分布不断变化，导致基于固定坐标或尺度的策略难以保持稳定对齐。
AI.method: 提出“Continual GUI Agents”任务，并构建GUI-Anchoring in Flux（GUI-AiF）框架；核心是两种奖励：Anchoring Point Reward in Flux（APR-iF）和Anchoring Region Reward in Flux（ARR-iF），用于引导代理适应变化中的交互点和交互区域，减少对静态锚点特征的过拟合。
AI.result: 实验表明，GUI-AiF在多项测试中优于现有最先进基线，能够在持续学习场景下更稳定地保持GUI定位与交互性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次为GUI代理引入持续学习框架，证明强化微调在应对GUI分布漂移方面具有潜力，并为后续研究提供了新的任务定义与奖励设计思路。

title: OmegaUse: Building a General-Purpose GUI Agent for Autonomous Task Execution
summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents show great potential for enabling foundation models to complete real-world tasks, revolutionizing human-computer interaction and improving human productivity. In this report, we present OmegaUse, a general-purpose GUI agent model for autonomous task execution on both mobile and desktop platforms, supporting computer-use and phone-use scenarios. Building an effective GUI agent model relies on two factors: (1) high-quality data and (2) effective training methods. To address these, we introduce a carefully engineered data-construction pipeline and a decoupled training paradigm. For data construction, we leverage rigorously curated open-source datasets and introduce a novel automated synthesis framework that integrates bottom-up autonomous exploration with top-down taxonomy-guided generation to create high-fidelity synthetic data. For training, to better leverage these data, we adopt a two-stage strategy: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to establish fundamental interaction syntax, followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to improve spatial grounding and sequential planning. To balance computational efficiency with agentic reasoning capacity, OmegaUse is built on a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) backbone. To evaluate cross-terminal capabilities in an offline setting, we introduce OS-Nav, a benchmark suite spanning multiple operating systems: ChiM-Nav, targeting Chinese Android mobile environments, and Ubu-Nav, focusing on routine desktop interactions on Ubuntu. Extensive experiments show that OmegaUse is highly competitive across established GUI benchmarks, achieving a state-of-the-art (SOTA) score of 96.3% on ScreenSpot-V2 and a leading 79.1% step success rate on AndroidControl. OmegaUse also performs strongly on OS-Nav, reaching 74.24% step success on ChiM-Nav and 55.9% average success on Ubu-Nav.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了通用GUI智能体模型OmegaUse，面向手机与桌面端的自主任务执行；通过高质量数据构建、两阶段训练和MoE骨干提升了跨终端交互能力，并在多个基准上取得了领先或有竞争力的结果。
AI.motivation: 目标是让基础模型能够更可靠地完成真实世界中的图形界面任务，从而提升人机交互效率与用户生产力。为此，需要同时解决数据质量不足和训练方式不适配两个核心问题。
AI.method: 作者构建了一个精心设计的数据流水线：结合高质量开源数据、以及将自底向上的自主探索与自顶向下的分类体系引导生成相结合的自动化合成框架，生成高保真合成数据；训练上采用两阶段范式，先用监督微调（SFT）学习基础交互语法，再用群体相对策略优化（GRPO）增强空间定位与序列规划能力；模型底座使用Mixture-of-Experts（MoE）以兼顾计算效率与推理能力；同时提出跨操作系统离线评测基准OS-Nav，包含面向中文Android的ChiM-Nav和面向Ubuntu桌面常规交互的Ubu-Nav。
AI.result: 实验表明，OmegaUse在多个GUI基准上表现突出：ScreenSpot-V2达到96.3%的SOTA成绩，AndroidControl取得79.1%的step success rate；在OS-Nav上，ChiM-Nav的step success达到74.24%，Ubu-Nav的平均成功率为55.9%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了高质量数据构建、分阶段训练与MoE架构的结合，能够显著增强GUI智能体的跨平台泛化与任务执行能力，为面向手机和桌面的通用操作智能体提供了有效方案。

title: MobileBench-OL: A Comprehensive Chinese Benchmark for Evaluating Mobile GUI Agents in Real-World Environment
summary: Recent advances in mobile Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents highlight the growing need for comprehensive evaluation benchmarks. While new online benchmarks offer more realistic testing than offline ones, they tend to focus on the agents' task instruction-following ability while neglecting their reasoning and exploration ability. Moreover, these benchmarks do not consider the random noise in real-world mobile environments. This leads to a gap between benchmarks and real-world environments. To addressing these limitations, we propose MobileBench-OL, an online benchmark with 1080 tasks from 80 Chinese apps. It measures task execution, complex reasoning, and noise robustness of agents by including 5 subsets, which set multiple evaluation dimensions. We also provide an auto-eval framework with a reset mechanism, enabling stable and repeatable real-world benchmarking. Evaluating 12 leading GUI agents on MobileBench-OL shows significant room for improvement to meet real-world requirements. Human evaluation further confirms that MobileBench-OL can reliably measure the performance of leading GUI agents in real environments. Our data and code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个面向真实移动场景的在线评测基准MobileBench-OL，用于更全面地衡量GUI代理在任务执行、复杂推理和噪声鲁棒性方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有在线移动端基准虽然比离线基准更接近真实环境，但主要关注任务指令跟随能力，忽视了推理、探索以及真实环境中的随机噪声，导致评测结果与实际应用存在偏差。
AI.method: 构建了MobileBench-OL，包含来自80个中文应用的1080个任务，并设计5个子集来覆盖多个评测维度；同时提出带重置机制的自动评测框架，以支持稳定、可重复的真实环境测试。
AI.result: 对12个领先GUI代理的评测表明，它们距离真实场景需求仍有明显差距；人工评测进一步验证了MobileBench-OL能够可靠反映代理在真实环境中的表现。
AI.conclusion: MobileBench-OL弥补了现有移动端在线基准在推理、探索和噪声鲁棒性评测上的不足，为移动GUI代理的真实能力评估提供了更全面、可重复的标准。

title: MAGNET: Towards Adaptive GUI Agents with Memory-Driven Knowledge Evolution
summary: Mobile GUI agents powered by large foundation models enable autonomous task execution, but frequent updates altering UI appearance and reorganizing workflows cause agents trained on historical data to fail. Despite surface changes, functional semantics and task intents remain fundamentally stable. Building on this insight, we introduce MAGNET, a memory-driven adaptive agent framework with dual-level memory: stationary memory linking diverse visual features to stable functional semantics for robust action grounding and procedural memory capturing stable task intents across varying workflows. We propose a dynamic memory evolution mechanism that continuously refines both memories by prioritizing frequently accessed knowledge. Online benchmark AndroidWorld evaluations show substantial improvements over baselines, while offline benchmarks confirm consistent gains under distribution shifts. These results validate that leveraging stable structures across interface changes improves agent performance and generalization in evolving software environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAGNET，一种面向移动GUI智能体的记忆驱动自适应框架，通过双层记忆缓解界面频繁更新带来的性能退化，并在在线与离线基准上取得稳定提升。
AI.motivation: 移动应用界面会频繁改版，导致基于历史数据训练的智能体在视觉外观和工作流变化后失效；但功能语义与任务意图通常保持稳定，因此需要利用这种稳定结构实现跨版本泛化。
AI.method: 提出双层记忆机制：静态记忆用于将多样视觉特征映射到稳定功能语义，以增强动作定位；过程记忆用于在不同工作流中捕获稳定任务意图。进一步设计动态记忆演化机制，根据访问频率持续更新并强化高频知识。
AI.result: 在AndroidWorld在线基准测试中，相比基线方法表现显著提升；在离线基准的分布偏移场景下也获得一致增益，说明方法具备更强鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MAGNET证明了利用界面变化中保持不变的语义结构与任务意图，可以有效提升移动GUI智能体在持续演化的软件环境中的适应性与任务执行性能。

title: GUIGuard-Bench: Toward a General Evaluation for Privacy-Preserving GUI Agents
summary: As GUI agents increasingly rely on screenshots to perceive and operate digital environments, they may inadvertently expose sensitive information such as identities, accounts, locations, and behavioral traces. While existing benchmarks primarily focus on task completion, grounding, or defenses against third-party attacks, current visual privacy datasets remain largely restricted to static natural images, limiting their ability to capture the contextual dependence and task relevance of privacy risks in GUI task trajectories. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{GUIGuard-Bench}, a first-step benchmark for studying privacy-preserving GUI agents in trajectory-based GUI workflows. GUIGuard-Bench contains 241 real GUI-agent trajectories with 4,080 screenshots across Android and PC environments. Each screenshot is annotated at the region level with privacy bounding boxes, semantic privacy categories, risk levels, and whether the private information is necessary for completing the task. Built on these annotations, GUIGuard-Bench supports three complementary evaluations: privacy recognition, offline planning fidelity under protected screenshots, and the utility impact of different protection strategies. Our results show that current models can often detect whether a screenshot contains private information, but they struggle with fine-grained localization, category recognition, risk assessment, and task-necessity judgment. We also find that closed-source models, exemplified by Claude Sonnet 4.6, can maintain largely consistent planner semantics in Android environments after privacy protection is applied. Our results highlight privacy recognition as a critical bottleneck for practical GUI agents. Project: https://futuresis.github.io/GUIGuard-page/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GUIGuard-Bench，一个面向轨迹式GUI工作流中隐私保护智能体的基准数据集，旨在评估截图场景下的隐私识别、任务规划一致性以及不同保护策略对可用性的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私数据集多局限于静态自然图像，难以反映GUI任务轨迹中的上下文依赖、任务相关性和动态隐私风险，因此需要一个更贴近真实GUI交互过程的评测基准。
AI.method: 作者构建了GUIGuard-Bench，包含241条真实GUI智能体轨迹和4080张Android与PC环境截图，并对每张截图进行区域级标注，包括隐私框、语义隐私类别、风险等级以及隐私信息是否完成任务所必需。在此基础上设计了三类评测：隐私识别、受保护截图下的离线规划一致性，以及不同保护策略的效用影响分析。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有模型通常能判断截图是否包含隐私信息，但在精细定位、类别识别、风险评估和任务必要性判断方面表现较弱。与此同时，闭源模型以Claude Sonnet 4.6为例，在Android环境中应用隐私保护后仍能较好保持规划语义一致性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，隐私识别是实际GUI智能体落地的关键瓶颈。GUIGuard-Bench为评估和改进隐私保护型GUI智能体提供了有价值的基准与分析工具。

title: SwipeGen: Bridging the Execution Gap in GUI Agents via Human-like Swipe Synthesis
comment: 15 pages, 3 figures. Under review. Code and dataset will be released upon acceptance
summary: With the widespread adoption of Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents for automating GUI interaction tasks, substantial research focused on improving GUI perception to ground task instructions into concrete action steps. However, the step execution capability of these agents has gradually emerged as a new bottleneck for task completion. In particular, existing GUI agents often adopt overly simplified strategies for handling swipe interactions, preventing them from accurately replicating human-like behavior. To address this limitation, we decompose human swipe gestures into multiple quantifiable dimensions and propose an automated pipeline SwipeGen to synthesize human-like swipe interactions through GUI exploration. Based on this pipeline, we construct and release the first benchmark for evaluating the swipe execution capability of GUI agents. Furthermore, leveraging the synthesized data, we propose GUISwiper, a GUI agent with enhanced interaction execution capabilities. Experimental results demonstrate that GUISwiper achieves a swipe execution accuracy of 69.07%, representing a 214% improvement over existing VLM baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文关注GUI智能体在滑动操作上的执行瓶颈，提出SwipeGen自动合成类人滑动交互数据，并构建首个滑动执行能力评测基准；进一步基于合成数据训练GUISwiper，使其滑动执行准确率达到69.07%，较现有VLM基线提升214%。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体更擅长感知与理解界面，但在具体动作执行，尤其是滑动交互上表现不足；许多方法采用过于简化的滑动策略，难以模拟真实人类操作，因此需要更精细的建模与评测。
AI.method: 将人类滑动手势拆分为多个可量化维度，设计SwipeGen自动化流水线，通过GUI探索合成类人滑动交互数据；在此基础上构建滑动执行能力基准，并利用合成数据训练GUISwiper以增强交互执行能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，GUISwiper的滑动执行准确率达到69.07%，相较现有VLM基线提升214%。同时，论文发布了首个用于评估GUI智能体滑动执行能力的基准。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，GUI智能体的关键瓶颈已从感知转向执行，尤其是滑动这类细粒度交互；通过对人类手势进行结构化建模并合成训练数据，可以显著提升智能体的动作执行能力。

title: EntWorld: A Holistic Environment and Benchmark for Verifiable Enterprise GUI Agents
summary: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have enabled agents to operate in open-ended web and operating system environments. However, existing benchmarks predominantly target consumer-oriented scenarios (e.g., e-commerce and travel booking), failing to capture the complexity and rigor of professional enterprise workflows. Enterprise systems pose distinct challenges, including high-density user interfaces, strict business logic constraints, and a strong reliance on precise, state-consistent information retrieval-settings in which current generalist agents often struggle. To address this gap, we introduce EntWorld, a large-scale benchmark consisting of 1,756 tasks across six representative enterprise domains, including customer relationship management (CRM), information technology infrastructure library (ITIL), and enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems. Unlike previous datasets that depend on fragile execution traces or extensive manual annotation, EntWorld adopts a schema-grounded task generation framework that directly reverse-engineers business logic from underlying database schemas, enabling the synthesis of realistic, long-horizon workflows. Moreover, we propose a SQL-based deterministic verification mechanism in building datasets that replaces ambiguous visual matching with rigorous state-transition validation. Experimental results demonstrate that state-of-the-art models (e.g., GPT-4.1) achieve 47.61% success rate on EntWorld, substantially lower than the human performance, highlighting a pronounced enterprise gap in current agentic capabilities and the necessity of developing domain-specific agents. We release EntWorld as a rigorous testbed to facilitate the development and evaluation of the next generation of enterprise-ready digital agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向企业场景的多模态智能体基准EntWorld，包含1756个任务，覆盖6个企业领域，用于评估模型在复杂、长程、状态一致的企业工作流中的能力。实验显示，当前先进模型在该基准上的表现明显低于人类，揭示了企业场景中的显著能力缺口。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要集中在电商、旅行预订等消费级场景，难以反映企业系统中的真实复杂度。企业环境通常具有高密度界面、严格业务规则以及对精确、状态一致的信息检索的强依赖，因此需要一个更严格、可验证的评测基准。
AI.method: 作者构建了EntWorld基准，覆盖CRM、ITIL、ERP等六类代表性企业域，共1756个任务。数据集生成采用基于数据库模式的任务合成框架，通过反向推导业务逻辑来生成真实的长程工作流；同时引入基于SQL的确定性验证机制，用状态转移校验替代模糊的视觉匹配，以保证标注和评测的严谨性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，最先进的模型如GPT-4.1在EntWorld上的成功率仅为47.61%，显著低于人类表现，说明现有通用智能体在企业任务中仍存在明显不足。
AI.conclusion: EntWorld为企业级数字智能体提供了一个更严格、真实且可复现的测试平台。该工作表明，面向企业场景的智能体需要结合领域知识、业务逻辑约束和精确状态验证机制进行专门设计，而不仅仅依赖通用能力。

title: Intelligence Requires Grounding But Not Embodiment
summary: Recent advances in LLMs have reignited scientific debate over whether embodiment is necessary for intelligence. We present the argument that intelligence requires grounding, a phenomenon entailed by embodiment, but not embodiment itself. We define intelligence as the possession of four properties -- motivation, predictive ability, understanding of causality, and learning from experience -- and argue that each can be achieved by a non-embodied, grounded agent. We use this to conclude that grounding, not embodiment, is necessary for intelligence. We then present a thought experiment of an intelligent LLM agent in a digital environment and address potential counterarguments.

AI.tldr: 本文认为，智能并不必然要求具身性，但需要“接地/落地”（grounding）；也就是说，智能的必要条件是与环境建立语义和因果关联，而不一定需要物理身体。
AI.motivation: 针对大模型发展后关于“智能是否必须依赖具身性”的争论，作者希望澄清概念边界，区分“具身性”与“接地性”，并论证后者才是智能的必要条件。
AI.method: 作者采用概念分析与论证方式：先定义智能包含四个属性——动机、预测能力、因果理解、从经验中学习；再逐一说明这些属性可以由非具身但具接地的智能体实现；最后通过一个数字环境中的智能LLM代理思想实验，并回应可能的反对意见，来支持论点。
AI.result: 作者得出的核心结论是：智能所必需的不是身体本身，而是接地；非具身智能体在数字环境中也可能具备智能，只要其与环境之间存在有效的语义和因果接地。
AI.conclusion: 论文主张将争论焦点从“是否需要身体”转向“是否需要接地”。其结论是：具身性并非智能的必要条件，但接地是。

title: OnlineSI: Taming Large Language Model for Online 3D Understanding and Grounding
summary: In recent years, researchers have increasingly been interested in how to enable Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLM) to possess spatial understanding and reasoning capabilities. However, most existing methods overlook the importance of the ability to continuously work in an ever-changing world, and lack the possibility of deployment on embodied systems in real-world environments. In this work, we introduce OnlineSI, a framework that can continuously improve its spatial understanding of its surroundings given a video stream. Our core idea is to maintain a finite spatial memory to retain past observations, ensuring the size of the spatial memory does not increase as the input accumulates. We further integrate 3D point cloud information with semantic information, helping MLLM to better locate and identify objects in the scene. To evaluate our method, we introduce the Fuzzy $F_1$-Score to mitigate ambiguity, and test our method on two representative datasets. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, paving the way towards real-world embodied systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OnlineSI，一种面向视频流的在线空间理解框架，可在有限空间记忆下持续更新环境认知，并融合3D点云与语义信息提升目标定位与识别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型的空间理解与推理方法多聚焦静态场景，忽视了在持续变化环境中持续工作的能力，也难以直接用于真实世界的具身系统。
AI.method: 提出在线框架OnlineSI：通过维护一个固定容量的空间记忆来保存历史观测，避免记忆随输入无限增长；同时将3D点云信息与语义信息联合建模，以增强对场景中物体位置与身份的理解；并引入Fuzzy F1-Score缓解标注或边界歧义带来的评估偏差。
AI.result: 在两个代表性数据集上的实验表明，该方法在在线空间理解任务中具有有效性，能够持续提升对周围环境的空间认知。
AI.conclusion: OnlineSI为多模态大语言模型在动态环境中的持续空间理解提供了可行路径，并为面向真实世界的具身应用奠定了基础。

title: AnchoredDream: Zero-Shot 360掳 Indoor Scene Generation from a Single View via Geometric Grounding
summary: Single-view indoor scene generation plays a crucial role in a range of real-world applications. However, generating a complete 360掳 scene from a single image remains a highly ill-posed and challenging problem. Recent approaches have made progress by leveraging diffusion models and depth estimation networks, yet they still struggle to maintain appearance consistency and geometric plausibility under large viewpoint changes, limiting their effectiveness in full-scene generation. To address this, we propose AnchoredDream, a novel zero-shot pipeline that anchors 360掳 scene generation on high-fidelity geometry via an appearance-geometry mutual boosting mechanism. Given a single-view image, our method first performs appearance-guided geometry generation to construct a reliable 3D scene layout. Then, we progressively generate the complete scene through a series of modules: warp-and-inpaint, warp-and-refine, post-optimization, and a novel Grouting Block, which ensures seamless transitions between the input view and generated regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AnchoredDream outperforms existing methods by a large margin in both appearance consistency and geometric plausibility--all in a zero-shot manner. Our results highlight the potential of geometric grounding for high-quality, zero-shot single-view scene generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AnchoredDream，一种零样本单视图室内全景场景生成方法，通过外观与几何的相互增强，在保持外观一致性和几何合理性的同时，从单张图像生成完整的360度场景。
AI.motivation: 单视图生成完整360度室内场景具有重要应用价值，但由于视角信息缺失，本质上是高度不适定问题。现有扩散模型和深度估计方法在大视角变化下容易出现外观不一致和几何不合理，难以满足高质量全场景生成需求。
AI.method: 方法先利用外观引导的几何生成构建可信的三维场景布局，再通过一系列逐步生成模块完成全景合成，包括warp-and-inpaint、warp-and-refine、post-optimization，以及用于连接输入视图与生成区域的Grouting Block，从而实现平滑过渡与细节补全。
AI.result: 实验表明，AnchoredDream在外观一致性和几何合理性上都显著优于现有方法，并且整个流程可在零样本条件下完成，无需针对特定场景额外训练。
AI.conclusion: 结果说明，将几何先验作为锚点，并通过外观-几何互相促进的机制进行生成，是提升单视图室内360度场景生成质量的有效路径，具有较强的实际应用潜力。

title: Grounding Large Language Models in Reaction Knowledge Graphs for Synthesis Retrieval
comment: Accepted at ML4Molecules 2025 (ELLIS UnConference workshop), Copenhagen, Denmark, December 2, 2025. Workshop page: https://moleculediscovery.github.io/workshop2025/
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) can aid synthesis planning in chemistry, but standard prompting methods often yield hallucinated or outdated suggestions. We study LLM interactions with a reaction knowledge graph by casting reaction path retrieval as a Text2Cypher (natural language to graph query) generation problem, and define single- and multi-step retrieval tasks. We compare zero-shot prompting to one-shot variants using static, random, and embedding-based exemplar selection, and assess a checklist-driven validator/corrector loop. To evaluate our framework, we consider query validity and retrieval accuracy. We find that one-shot prompting with aligned exemplars consistently performs best. Our checklist-style self-correction loop mainly improves executability in zero-shot settings and offers limited additional retrieval gains once a good exemplar is present. We provide a reproducible Text2Cypher evaluation setup to facilitate further work on KG-grounded LLMs for synthesis planning. Code is available at https://github.com/Intelligent-molecular-systems/KG-LLM-Synthesis-Retrieval.

AI.tldr: 该研究将化学反应路径检索转化为Text2Cypher生成任务，评估大语言模型在反应知识图谱上的检索能力，发现带有对齐示例的一次性提示效果最好，而自我校正机制主要提升零样本场景下的可执行性。
AI.motivation: 标准提示方法在合成规划中容易产生幻觉或过时建议，因此作者希望借助知识图谱约束LLM输出，提高反应路径检索的准确性与可执行性。
AI.method: 作者构建了反应知识图谱上的Text2Cypher评测框架，将反应路径检索定义为单步与多步任务；比较了零样本提示与一次性提示，并测试了静态、随机和基于嵌入的示例选择方式；同时引入基于检查清单的验证-纠错循环，并以查询有效性和检索准确率作为评估指标。
AI.result: 实验表明，一次性提示且使用匹配度较高的示例时表现最稳定、效果最佳；检查清单式自我纠错主要提升零样本提示下的可执行性，但在已有优质示例时，对检索准确率的额外提升有限。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱约束下的Text2Cypher生成是一种可复现且有效的LLM评测与应用框架，其中示例选择质量比复杂的后处理纠错更关键，可为后续面向合成规划的KG-grounded LLM研究提供基准与方法参考。

title: From Generative Engines to Actionable Simulators: The Imperative of Physical Grounding in World Models
summary: A world model is an AI system that simulates how an environment evolves under actions, enabling planning through imagined futures rather than reactive perception. Current world models, however, suffer from visual conflation: the mistaken assumption that high-fidelity video generation implies an understanding of physical and causal dynamics. We show that while modern models excel at predicting pixels, they frequently violate invariant constraints, fail under intervention, and break down in safety-critical decision-making. This survey argues that visual realism is an unreliable proxy for world understanding. Instead, effective world models must encode causal structure, respect domain-specific constraints, and remain stable over long horizons. We propose a reframing of world models as actionable simulators rather than visual engines, emphasizing structured 4D interfaces, constraint-aware dynamics, and closed-loop evaluation. Using medical decision-making as an epistemic stress test, where trial-and-error is impossible and errors are irreversible, we demonstrate that a world model's value is determined not by how realistic its rollouts appear, but by its ability to support counterfactual reasoning, intervention planning, and robust long-horizon foresight.

AI.tldr: 该摘要指出，当前世界模型常把“生成逼真的视频”误当作“真正理解环境”，而在约束一致性、干预响应和长期稳定性上表现不足；作者主张把世界模型重新定义为可行动的模拟器，而非视觉生成器。
AI.motivation: 动机在于纠正对世界模型能力的误判：高保真画面并不等于具备物理、因果与约束层面的环境理解，尤其在高风险决策场景中，这种误判会带来严重问题。
AI.method: 作者采用综述与重构式论证的方法，提出新的世界模型框架，强调因果结构、领域约束、长时程稳定性、结构化4D接口、约束感知动力学与闭环评估，并以医疗决策作为检验其有效性的压力测试场景。
AI.result: 摘要给出的核心结果是：现代模型虽然擅长像素级预测，但经常违反不变约束、难以处理干预，并在安全关键决策中失效；因此，评估世界模型不能只看视觉逼真度，而应看其反事实推理、干预规划和长期前瞻能力。
AI.conclusion: 结论是，视觉真实感不应作为世界理解的代理指标；真正有效的世界模型应被视为面向行动的模拟器，必须显式编码因果与约束，并通过闭环、长周期、任务导向的方式进行评价。

title: SpatialMem: Metric-Aligned Long-Horizon Video Memory for Language Grounding and QA
summary: We present SpatialMem, a memory-centric system for long-horizon, language-grounded retrieval and QA from egocentric video, where metric 3D serves as an interpretable indexing scaffold rather than an explicit mapping objective. Starting from casually captured egocentric RGB video, SpatialMem builds a metric-aligned spatial scaffold for indoor scenes, detects structural 3D anchors (walls, doors, windows) as first-layer support, and populates a hierarchical memory with open-vocabulary object nodes that link evidence patches, visual embeddings, and two-layer textual descriptions to 3D coordinates for compact storage and fast retrieval. This design enables interpretable, spatially grounded queries over relations (e.g., distance, direction, visibility) and supports downstream tasks such as language-guided retrieval/QA and offline navigation-style guidance over a prebuilt memory, without specialized sensors. Experiments on one public Replica scene and two real-world egocentric indoor scenes show that SpatialMem maintains stable layout reasoning, offline guidance, and hierarchical retrieval across these evaluated scenes despite increasing clutter and occlusion. A compact ablation further shows that the two-layer description memory improves path-level grounding, while moderate scale perturbation causes only limited degradation. These results position SpatialMem as an efficient and extensible memory interface for spatially grounded long-horizon video understanding.

AI.tldr: SpatialMem提出了一种面向第一视角视频的空间记忆系统，利用度量三维坐标作为可解释索引框架，把场景结构、目标物体和文本描述组织成分层记忆，从而支持长时程的语言检索、问答和离线导航式指导。
AI.motivation: 该工作旨在解决第一视角视频中长时程、语言驱动的检索与问答问题。核心动机是让系统在无需专用传感器的情况下，仍能对室内场景中的空间关系、可见性、方向和距离进行可解释的推理，并在复杂遮挡和杂乱环境下保持稳定。
AI.method: 系统从随手采集的第一视角RGB视频出发，先构建与度量空间对齐的室内空间支架，再检测墙、门、窗等结构性三维锚点作为底层支撑；随后将开放词汇的物体节点写入层次化记忆，并把证据图像块、视觉嵌入和两层文本描述关联到三维坐标上，以实现紧凑存储与快速检索。该设计支持基于空间关系的可解释查询，以及面向预建记忆的语言引导检索、问答和离线导航式指导。
AI.result: 实验在一个公开的Replica场景和两个真实世界第一视角室内场景上进行。结果表明，SpatialMem在这些场景中能保持稳定的布局推理、离线指导和层次化检索能力，即使在遮挡和杂乱程度增加时也表现稳定。消融实验显示，两层描述式记忆有助于提升路径级空间对齐；而中等规模的扰动只带来有限性能下降。
AI.conclusion: SpatialMem被证明是一种高效、可扩展且具有可解释性的空间记忆接口，适用于面向第一视角视频的长时程语言理解与空间检索任务，并且在不依赖专用硬件的前提下具备良好的鲁棒性。

title: FoundationalASSIST: An Educational Dataset for Foundational Knowledge Tracing and Pedagogical Grounding of LLMs
summary: Can Large Language Models understand how students learn? As LLMs are deployed for adaptive testing and personalized tutoring, this question becomes urgent -- yet we cannot answer it with existing resources. Current educational datasets provide only question identifiers and binary correctness labels, rendering them opaque to LLMs that reason in natural language. We address this gap with FoundationalASSIST, the first English educational dataset providing the complete information needed for research on LLMs in education: full question text, actual student responses (not just right/wrong), records of which wrong answers students chose, and alignment to Common Core K-12 standards. These 1.7 million interactions from 5,000 students enable research directions that were previously impossible to pursue, from fine-tuning student models to analyzing misconception patterns. To demonstrate the dataset's utility, we evaluate four frontier models (GPT-OSS-120B, Llama-3.3-70B, Qwen3-Next-80B variants) on two complementary task families: Knowledge Tracing, testing whether LLMs can predict student performance on questions, and the exact answer a student will give; and \textbf{Pedagogical Grounding}, testing whether LLMs understand the properties that make assessment items effective. Our evaluation reveals significant gaps in current LLM capabilities. Every model barely achieves a trivial baseline on knowledge tracing. All models fall below random chance on item discrimination, indicating that LLMs do not understand what makes one problem more diagnostic than another. Models do show competence at judging relative difficulty (up to 68.6%), but this partial success only highlights the gaps elsewhere. These results establish that substantial advances are needed before LLMs can reliably support personalized learning at scale. We release FoundationalASSIST to support progress on these foundational challenges.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为FoundationalASSIST的英语教育数据集，补足了现有数据集中缺少完整题目文本、学生真实作答、错误选项和课程标准对齐信息的不足，并用其评估多种大模型在学习预测与教学理解任务上的能力，结果显示当前模型整体能力仍明显不足。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型被用于自适应测评和个性化辅导，研究者需要判断模型是否真正理解学生如何学习，以及它们能否基于自然语言形式的教育信息进行推理；但现有教育数据过于稀疏，只提供题目编号和对错标签，难以支持这类研究。
AI.method: 作者构建了FoundationalASSIST数据集，包含170万次交互、5000名学生的完整题目文本、真实学生回答、错误选项记录以及Common Core K-12标准对齐信息；随后评估了四个前沿模型在两类任务上的表现：知识追踪（预测学生表现及具体答案）和教学基础理解（判断题目属性，如区分度、难度等）。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所有模型在知识追踪任务上仅接近极低的基线水平；在题目区分度判断上全部低于随机猜测，说明模型并不理解什么样的题目更能诊断学生能力；在相对难度判断上模型表现稍好，最高达到68.6%，但总体仍暴露出明显短板。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，当前大语言模型距离可靠支持大规模个性化学习还有较大差距；FoundationalASSIST为后续在学生建模、误概念分析和教育推理方面的研究提供了重要基础数据资源。

title: EGM: Efficient Visual Grounding Language Models
summary: Visual grounding is an essential capability of Visual Language Models (VLMs) to understand the real physical world. Previous state-of-the-art grounding visual language models usually have large model sizes, making them heavy for deployment and slow for inference. However, we notice that the sizes of visual encoders are nearly the same for small and large VLMs and the major difference is the sizes of the language models. Small VLMs fall behind larger VLMs in grounding because of the difference in language understanding capability rather than visual information handling. To mitigate the gap, we introduce 'Efficient visual Grounding language Models' (EGM): generate many mid-quality tokens (from small models) to match the performance of large VLMs with few high-quality but expensive tokens. This method is deployment-friendly, and yields better end-to-end latency: On the RefCOCO benchmark, our EGM-Qwen3-VL-8B demonstrates 91.4 IoU with an average of 737ms (5.9x faster) latency while Qwen3-VL-235B demands 4,320ms to reach 90.5 IoU. To validate our approach's generality, we further set up a new amodal grounding setting that requires the model to predict both the visible and occluded parts of the objects. Experiments show our method consistently improves both vanilla and amodal grounding capabilities of small models to match or outperform larger models, thereby improving efficiency for visual grounding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出高效视觉定位语言模型EGM，核心思路是用“小模型生成大量中等质量token”替代“大模型少量高质量但昂贵token”，以提升视觉定位任务的部署效率和推理速度，同时尽量保持甚至超过大模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有最先进的视觉定位多模态模型通常参数规模大、部署重、推理慢；作者观察到小模型和大模型的视觉编码器规模相近，差距主要来自语言模型能力不足，因此希望在不显著增加推理开销的前提下弥补小模型在定位理解上的性能差距。
AI.method: 作者提出EGM（Efficient visual Grounding language Models），通过生成更多中等质量token来替代少量高质量但代价更高的token，以提高整体性价比与端到端延迟表现；同时新增amodal grounding设置，要求模型同时预测目标的可见与遮挡部分，用于验证方法的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在RefCOCO上，EGM-Qwen3-VL-8B达到91.4 IoU，平均延迟737ms，较Qwen3-VL-235B达到90.5 IoU所需的4320ms快5.9倍；实验还表明该方法能稳定提升小模型在普通定位和amodal定位上的能力，使其接近或超过更大的模型。
AI.conclusion: EGM证明了通过高效token生成策略可以显著提升小型VLM在视觉定位任务中的效率与性能，说明定位瓶颈主要可通过增强语言侧推理能力来缓解，并为可部署的高效视觉定位模型提供了可行路径。

title: MagicGUI-RMS: A Multi-Agent Reward Model System for Self-Evolving GUI Agents via Automated Feedback Reflux
summary: Graphical user interface (GUI) agents are rapidly progressing toward autonomous interaction and reliable task execution across diverse applications. However, two central challenges remain unresolved: automating the evaluation of agent trajectories and generating high-quality training data at scale to enable continual improvement. Existing approaches often depend on manual annotation or static rule-based verification, which restricts scalability and limits adaptability in dynamic environments. We present MagicGUI-RMS, a multi-agent reward model system that delivers adaptive trajectory evaluation, corrective feedback, and self-evolving learning capabilities. MagicGUI-RMS integrates a Domain-Specific Reward Model (DS-RM) with a General-Purpose Reward Model (GP-RM), enabling fine-grained action assessment and robust generalization across heterogeneous GUI tasks. To support reward learning at scale, we design a structured data construction pipeline that automatically produces balanced and diverse reward datasets, effectively reducing annotation costs while maintaining sample fidelity. During execution, the reward model system identifies erroneous actions, proposes refined alternatives, and continuously enhances agent behavior through an automated data-reflux mechanism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MagicGUI-RMS yields substantial gains in task accuracy, behavioral robustness. These results establish MagicGUI-RMS as a principled and effective foundation for building self-improving GUI agents driven by reward-based adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MagicGUI-RMS，一个用于GUI智能体的多智能体奖励模型系统，旨在自动评估轨迹、提供纠错反馈，并通过数据回流机制实现持续自我改进。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体评估与训练数据构建主要依赖人工标注或静态规则，难以在动态环境中规模化、适应性差，因此需要一种可自动化、可扩展且能持续优化的方案。
AI.method: 系统由领域特定奖励模型（DS-RM）和通用奖励模型（GP-RM）组成，结合细粒度动作评估与跨任务泛化能力；同时设计结构化数据构建流程，自动生成平衡且多样的奖励数据集，并在执行中通过自动化数据回流机制识别错误动作、提出修正方案并迭代提升模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，MagicGUI-RMS显著提升了任务准确率和行为鲁棒性，同时降低了标注成本，并保持了样本质量与多样性。
AI.conclusion: MagicGUI-RMS为构建可自我提升的GUI智能体提供了一种系统化、可扩展且有效的奖励驱动方法，具有较强的实际应用潜力。

title: Zero-Permission Manipulation: Can We Trust Large Multimodal Model Powered GUI Agents?
summary:
Large multimodal model powered GUI agents are emerging as high-privilege operators on mobile platforms, entrusted with perceiving screen content and injecting inputs. However, their design operates under the implicit assumption of Visual Atomicity: that the UI state remains invariant between observation and action. We demonstrate that this assumption is fundamentally invalid in Android, creating a critical attack surface.
  We present Action Rebinding, a novel attack that allows a seemingly-benign app with zero dangerous permissions to rebind an agent's execution. By exploiting the inevitable observation-to-action gap inherent in the agent's reasoning pipeline, the attacker triggers foreground transitions to rebind the agent's planned action toward the target app. We weaponize the agent's task-recovery logic and Android's UI state preservation to orchestrate programmable, multi-step attack chains. Furthermore, we introduce an Intent Alignment Strategy (IAS) that manipulates the agent's reasoning process to rationalize UI states, enabling it to bypass verification gates (e.g., confirmation dialogs) that would otherwise be rejected.
  We evaluate Action Rebinding Attacks on six widely-used Android GUI agents across 15 tasks. Our results demonstrate a 100% success rate for atomic action rebinding and the ability to reliably orchestrate multi-step attack chains. With IAS, the success rate in bypassing verification gates increases (from 0% to up to 100%). Notably, the attacker application requires no sensitive permissions and contains no privileged API calls, achieving a 0% detection rate across malware scanners (e.g., VirusTotal). Our findings reveal a fundamental architectural flaw in current agent-OS integration and provide critical insights for the secure design of future agent systems. To access experimental logs and demonstration videos, please contact yi_qian@smail.nju.edu.cn.

AI.tldr: 该摘要提出了一种针对Android GUI智能体的新型攻击“Action Rebinding”，利用观测到执行之间的时间差与系统界面状态切换，劫持智能体的预期操作并诱导其在目标应用中执行动作；同时还提出“IAS”来操纵推理过程，从而绕过确认类验证门。
AI.motivation: 研究动机在于指出现有移动端多模态GUI智能体默认假设“视觉原子性”，即观察到界面后到执行动作前界面保持不变，但这一假设在Android中并不成立，因此形成了新的攻击面。
AI.method: 作者设计了无敏感权限、无特权API调用的恶意应用，通过触发前台切换重绑定智能体的动作执行，并结合智能体的任务恢复逻辑与Android的UI状态保留机制构造多步攻击链；另外提出Intent Alignment Strategy（IAS），通过操纵智能体的推理，使其对当前UI状态形成有利于攻击的解释，从而通过验证门。
AI.result: 实验在6个常用Android GUI智能体和15个任务上进行，原子级动作重绑定成功率达到100%；多步攻击链可稳定编排；使用IAS后，绕过验证门的成功率从0%提升到最高100%。攻击应用在恶意扫描器中的检测率为0%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明当前智能体与操作系统的集成存在根本性架构缺陷，安全边界建立在不可靠的视觉原子性假设之上；未来智能体系统需要重新设计观测、推理与执行之间的同步与验证机制，以降低被重绑定和越权执行的风险。

title: EmboTeam: Grounding LLM Reasoning into Reactive Behavior Trees via PDDL for Embodied Multi-Robot Collaboration
summary: In embodied artificial intelligence, enabling heterogeneous robot teams to execute long-horizon tasks from high-level instructions remains a critical challenge. While large language models (LLMs) show promise in instruction parsing and preliminary planning, they exhibit limitations in long-term reasoning and dynamic multi-robot coordination. We propose EmboTeam, a novel embodied multi-robot task planning framework that addresses these issues through a three-stage cascaded architecture: 1) It leverages an LLM to parse instructions and generate Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL) problem descriptions, thereby transforming commands into formal planning problems; 2) It combines the semantic reasoning of LLMs with the search capabilities of a classical planner to produce optimized action sequences; 3) It compiles the resulting plan into behavior trees for reactive control. The framework supports dynamically sized heterogeneous robot teams via a shared blackboard mechanism for communication and state synchronization. To validate our approach, we introduce the MACE-THOR benchmark dataset, comprising 42 complex tasks across 8 distinct household layouts. Experiments show EmboTeam improves the task success rate from 12% to 55% and goal condition recall from 32% to 72% over the LaMMA-P baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向异构机器人团队的长时程任务规划框架EmboTeam，将大模型、经典规划器与行为树结合起来，实现从高层指令到可执行控制的分层转换，并在新基准上显著优于基线。
AI.motivation: 面向具身人工智能中的异构多机器人协作，高层指令的解析、长程推理以及动态协同控制仍然存在明显困难，尤其是大模型在长期规划和多机器人协调方面能力不足。
AI.method: 采用三阶段级联架构：先用大语言模型将自然语言指令解析为PDDL问题描述；再结合大模型的语义推理与经典规划器的搜索能力生成优化动作序列；最后将规划结果编译为行为树以支持反应式控制。同时通过共享黑板机制实现动态规模异构机器人团队的通信与状态同步。
AI.result: 作者构建了MACE-THOR基准数据集，包含8种家庭布局中的42个复杂任务。实验结果表明，相比LaMMA-P基线，任务成功率从12%提升到55%，目标条件召回率从32%提升到72%。
AI.conclusion: EmboTeam通过“语义理解+符号规划+行为树执行”的组合方案，提升了异构机器人团队对长时程任务的规划与执行能力，说明分层混合式框架在具身多机器人协作中具有较强有效性。

title: Grounding Agent Memory in Contextual Intent
summary:
Deploying large language models in long-horizon, goal-oriented interactions remains challenging because similar entities and facts recur under different latent goals and constraints, causing memory systems to retrieve context-mismatched evidence. We propose STITCH (Structured Intent Tracking in Contextual History), an agentic memory system that indexes each trajectory step with a structured retrieval cue, contextual intent, and retrieves history by matching the current step's intent. Contextual intent provides compact signals that disambiguate repeated mentions and reduce interference: (1) the current latent goal defining a thematic segment, (2) the action type, and (3) the salient entity types anchoring which attributes matter. During inference, STITCH filters and prioritizes memory snippets by intent compatibility, suppressing semantically similar but context-incompatible history.
  For evaluation, we introduce CAME-Bench, a benchmark for context-aware retrieval in realistic, dynamic, goal-oriented trajectories. Across CAME-Bench and LongMemEval, STITCH achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming the strongest baseline by 35.6%, with the largest gains as trajectory length increases. Our analysis shows that intent indexing substantially reduces retrieval noise, supporting intent-aware memory for robust long-horizon reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 STITCH 的结构化意图跟踪记忆系统，通过为长程交互中的每一步建立“上下文意图”索引来提升检索准确性；在新基准 CAME-Bench 及 LongMemEval 上取得了最优结果，较最强基线提升 35.6%。
AI.motivation: 长时程、目标导向的交互中，相似实体和事实会在不同潜在目标与约束下反复出现，传统记忆检索容易召回上下文不匹配的证据，导致检索噪声和推理错误。
AI.method: STITCH（Structured Intent Tracking in Contextual History）为轨迹中的每一步记录结构化检索线索与上下文意图，并基于当前步骤的意图进行历史检索匹配。上下文意图由三部分组成：当前潜在目标、动作类型、以及关键实体类型。推理时，系统根据意图兼容性对记忆片段进行过滤和排序，抑制语义相似但上下文不一致的历史信息。
AI.result: 作者提出了面向真实动态目标轨迹的检索基准 CAME-Bench。实验表明，STITCH 在 CAME-Bench 和 LongMemEval 上均达到最优，相比最强基线提升 35.6%，且轨迹越长优势越明显。分析还显示，意图索引能显著降低检索噪声。
AI.conclusion: 将“意图”显式纳入记忆索引与检索过程，可以有效缓解长程任务中的上下文混淆问题，提升面向目标导向交互的长期记忆与推理鲁棒性。

title: Molmo2: Open Weights and Data for Vision-Language Models with Video Understanding and Grounding
summary: Today's strongest video-language models (VLMs) remain proprietary. The strongest open-weight models either rely on synthetic data from proprietary VLMs, effectively distilling from them, or do not disclose their training data or recipe. As a result, the open-source community lacks the foundations needed to improve on the state-of-the-art video (and image) language models. Crucially, many downstream applications require more than just high-level video understanding; they require grounding -- either by pointing or by tracking in pixels. Even proprietary models lack this capability. We present Molmo2, a new family of VLMs that are state-of-the-art among open-source models and demonstrate exceptional new capabilities in point-driven grounding in single image, multi-image, and video tasks. Our key contribution is a collection of 7 new video datasets and 2 multi-image datasets, including a dataset of highly detailed video captions for pre-training, a free-form video Q&A dataset for fine-tuning, a new object tracking dataset with complex queries, and an innovative new video pointing dataset, all collected without the use of closed VLMs. We also present a training recipe for this data utilizing an efficient packing and message-tree encoding scheme, and show bi-directional attention on vision tokens and a novel token-weight strategy improves performance. Our best-in-class 8B model outperforms others in the class of open weight and data models on short videos, counting, and captioning, and is competitive on long-videos. On video-grounding Molmo2 significantly outperforms existing open-weight models like Qwen3-VL (35.5 vs 29.6 accuracy on video counting) and surpasses proprietary models like Gemini 3 Pro on some tasks (38.4 vs 20.0 F1 on video pointing and 56.2 vs 41.1 J&F on video tracking).

AI.tldr: Molmo2提出了一套不依赖闭源VLM蒸馏的新型公开视频-语言模型家族，核心亮点是新增7个视频数据集和2个多图像数据集，并在点选式定位、跟踪、计数和描述等任务上取得开源模型最优表现。
AI.motivation: 现有最强的视频语言模型多为闭源；开源模型要么依赖闭源模型生成的合成数据，要么不公开训练数据与训练配方，导致社区缺乏可复现、可继续改进的基础。同时，许多实际应用不仅需要高层语义理解，还需要像素级定位与跟踪能力，但现有模型在这类grounding任务上普遍不足。
AI.method: 作者构建了7个新的视频数据集和2个多图像数据集，覆盖高细节视频字幕、自由形式视频问答、复杂查询对象跟踪以及新的视频点选数据集，且不使用闭源VLM。训练方面采用高效packing和message-tree编码方案，并引入双向视觉token注意力与新的token权重策略来提升性能。
AI.result: 8B最佳模型在短视频、计数和字幕任务上优于同规模开源权重/数据模型，并在长视频任务上具有竞争力；在video grounding方面显著领先现有开源模型，例如视频计数准确率35.5对29.6（Qwen3-VL），视频点选F1达到38.4对20.0，视频跟踪J&F达到56.2对41.1，部分任务上甚至超过Gemini 3 Pro等闭源模型。
AI.conclusion: Molmo2通过自建高质量视频与多图像数据、无需闭源模型参与的训练配方，以及针对视觉token的建模改进，推动了开源VLM在视频理解与像素级grounding上的能力边界，为后续开源研究提供了更可复现的基础。

title: PersonalAlign: Hierarchical Implicit Intent Alignment for Personalized GUI Agent with Long-Term User-Centric Records
summary: While GUI agents have shown strong performance under explicit and completion instructions, real-world deployment requires aligning with users' more complex implicit intents. In this work, we highlight Hierarchical Implicit Intent Alignment for Personalized GUI Agent (PersonalAlign), a new agent task that requires agents to leverage long-term user records as persistent context to resolve omitted preferences in vague instructions and anticipate latent routines by user state for proactive assistance. To facilitate this study, we introduce AndroidIntent, a benchmark designed to evaluate agents' ability in resolving vague instructions and providing proactive suggestions through reasoning over long-term user records.
