We annotated 775 user-specific preferences and 215 routines from 20k long-term records across different users for evaluation. Furthermore, we introduce Hierarchical Intent Memory Agent (HIM-Agent), which maintains a continuously updating personal memory and hierarchically organizes user preferences and routines for personalization. Finally, we evaluate a range of GUI agents on AndroidIntent, including GPT-5, Qwen3-VL, and UI-TARS, further results show that HIM-Agent significantly improves both execution and proactive performance by 15.7% and 7.3%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出面向个性化GUI智能体的层级隐式意图对齐任务PersonalAlign，并构建AndroidIntent基准与HIM-Agent方法，用长期用户记录来补全含糊指令中的隐含偏好、预测潜在习惯，从而提升执行与主动辅助能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体在显式、完整指令下表现较好，但真实场景中用户常使用省略、含糊或带有隐式偏好的表达，且不同用户长期习惯差异明显，因此需要让智能体利用长期历史记录进行个性化理解与主动协助。
AI.method: 作者提出两项核心内容：1）AndroidIntent基准，基于2万条长期用户记录标注了775条用户偏好和215条日常习惯，用于评测智能体对含糊指令解析和主动建议能力；2）HIM-Agent，通过持续更新的个人记忆机制，分层组织用户偏好与习惯，结合长期上下文进行推理与个性化决策。
AI.result: 在AndroidIntent上评测GPT-5、Qwen3-VL、UI-TARS等多种GUI智能体后，HIM-Agent在执行表现上提升15.7%，在主动性能上提升7.3%，说明分层个人记忆对隐式意图对齐有效。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，面向真实使用场景的GUI智能体不仅需要理解显式任务，还应利用长期用户记录进行个性化推理与主动辅助；PersonalAlign、AndroidIntent和HIM-Agent为该方向提供了任务定义、评测基准与方法框架。

title: GUI-Eyes: Tool-Augmented Perception for Visual Grounding in GUI Agents
summary: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) and reinforcement learning (RL) have driven progress in GUI automation. However, most existing methods rely on static, one-shot visual inputs and passive perception, lacking the ability to adaptively determine when, whether, and how to observe the interface. We present GUI-Eyes, a reinforcement learning framework for active visual perception in GUI tasks. To acquire more informative observations, the agent learns to make strategic decisions on both whether and how to invoke visual tools, such as cropping or zooming, within a two-stage reasoning process. To support this behavior, we introduce a progressive perception strategy that decomposes decision-making into coarse exploration and fine-grained grounding, coordinated by a two-level policy. In addition, we design a spatially continuous reward function tailored to tool usage, which integrates both location proximity and region overlap to provide dense supervision and alleviate the reward sparsity common in GUI environments. On the ScreenSpot-Pro benchmark, GUI-Eyes-3B achieves 44.8% grounding accuracy using only 3k labeled samples, significantly outperforming both supervised and RL-based baselines. These results highlight that tool-aware active perception, enabled by staged policy reasoning and fine-grained reward feedback, is critical for building robust and data-efficient GUI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GUI-Eyes，一种面向GUI任务的强化学习主动视觉感知框架，通过两阶段推理决定何时、是否以及如何调用裁剪、放大等视觉工具，以更高效地获取信息并提升界面定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型与强化学习方法在GUI自动化中多依赖静态、一次性的图像输入，属于被动感知，缺乏根据任务自适应决定观察时机与观察方式的能力，因此在复杂界面下容易受限于信息不足。
AI.method: 作者提出渐进式感知策略，将决策分解为粗粒度探索与细粒度定位，并由两级策略协同控制；同时设计了针对工具使用的空间连续奖励函数，将位置接近度与区域重叠度结合，提供更密集的监督信号，缓解GUI环境中的奖励稀疏问题。
AI.result: 在ScreenSpot-Pro基准上，GUI-Eyes-3B仅使用3k标注样本就达到44.8%的定位准确率，显著优于监督学习和基于强化学习的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明，具备工具感知能力的主动视觉感知、分阶段策略推理以及细粒度奖励反馈，对构建更鲁棒、数据更高效的GUI智能体至关重要。

title: KG-ViP: Bridging Knowledge Grounding and Visual Perception in Multi-modal LLMs for Visual Question Answering
summary: Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for Visual Question Answering (VQA) often suffer from dual limitations: knowledge hallucination and insufficient fine-grained visual perception. Crucially, we identify that commonsense graphs and scene graphs provide precisely complementary solutions to these respective deficiencies by providing rich external knowledge and capturing fine-grained visual details. However, prior works typically treat them in isolation, overlooking their synergistic potential. To bridge this gap, we propose KG-ViP, a unified framework that empowers MLLMs by fusing scene graphs and commonsense graphs. The core of the KG-ViP framework is a novel retrieval-and-fusion pipeline that utilizes the query as a semantic bridge to progressively integrate both graphs, synthesizing a unified structured context that facilitates reliable multi-modal reasoning. Extensive experiments on FVQA 2.0+ and MVQA benchmarks demonstrate that KG-ViP significantly outperforms existing VQA methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了KG-ViP，一个面向视觉问答的统一框架，将场景图与常识图融合起来，以同时缓解多模态大语言模型中的知识幻觉和细粒度视觉感知不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在视觉问答中常见两个短板：一是缺乏外部知识时容易产生知识幻觉，二是对图像细节的理解不够精细。场景图擅长描述图像中的细粒度视觉关系，常识图擅长提供补充知识，两者具有互补性，但以往方法通常分开使用，未充分发挥协同效应。
AI.method: 作者提出KG-ViP统一框架，核心是一个检索与融合流程：先利用问题语义作为桥梁，分别检索场景图和常识图中的相关信息，再逐步融合两类图结构，构建统一的结构化上下文，供多模态推理使用。
AI.result: 在FVQA 2.0+和MVQA基准上，KG-ViP相较现有视觉问答方法取得了显著提升，说明该融合策略能够有效增强回答的可靠性与推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，将场景图与常识图进行统一检索和融合，可以更好地弥补MLLM在VQA中的知识与感知缺陷，为构建更可靠的多模态推理系统提供了有效方案。

title: Affostruction: 3D Affordance Grounding with Generative Reconstruction
summary: This paper addresses the problem of affordance grounding from RGBD images of an object, which aims to localize surface regions corresponding to a text query that describes an action on the object. While existing methods predict affordance regions only on visible surfaces, we propose Affostruction, a generative framework that reconstructs complete object geometry from partial RGBD observations and grounds affordances on the full shape including unobserved regions. Our approach introduces sparse voxel fusion of multi-view features for constant-complexity generative reconstruction, a flow-based formulation that captures the inherent ambiguity of affordance distributions, and an active view selection strategy guided by predicted affordances. Affostruction outperforms existing methods by large margins on challenging benchmarks, achieving 19.1 aIoU on affordance grounding and 32.67 IoU for 3D reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种名为Affostruction的生成式框架，用于从部分RGBD观测中重建完整物体几何，并在完整形状上进行可供性定位，覆盖不可见区域。
AI.motivation: 现有可供性定位方法通常只在可见表面上预测区域，无法处理遮挡导致的几何不完整问题；作者希望通过完整重建来提升动作相关区域的定位能力。
AI.method: 方法包括三部分：1）利用多视图特征的稀疏体素融合，实现恒定复杂度的生成式重建；2）采用基于流的建模方式，刻画可供性分布本身存在的多解性和不确定性；3）设计由预测可供性引导的主动视角选择策略，以获取更有信息量的观测。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的基准上，该方法优于现有方法，达到19.1的aIoU用于可供性定位，3D重建IoU达到32.67。
AI.conclusion: 论文表明，将部分观测下的完整几何重建与可供性推断联合建模，能够显著提升可供性 grounding 的性能，并且主动视角选择可进一步增强结果。

title: Compress to Focus: Efficient Coordinate Compression for Policy Optimization in Multi-Turn GUI Agents
summary: Multi-turn GUI agents enable complex task completion through sequential decision-making, but suffer from severe context inflation as interaction history accumulates. Existing strategies either sacrifice long-term context via truncation or compromise spatial structure through token pruning. In this paper, we propose Coordinate Compression Policy Optimization (CCPO), an efficient policy optimization framework that couples visual compression with policy optimization for multi-turn GUI agents. CCPO introduces Coordinate-Aware Spatial Compression (CASC), which aggregates coordinates from multiple rollouts to capture target-relevant regions and progressively narrow historical attention around key visual areas. From interactions across rollouts, CASC adaptively constructs attention boundaries that concentrate computation on the most informative regions of the scene. We further design a Distance-Based Advantage that provides fine-grained learning signals based on distance rather than binary correctness, improving both grounding accuracy and compression quality. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CCPO achieves SOTA performance across four benchmarks with up to 55% token compression and 3.8$\times$ training speedup.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CCPO，一种面向多轮GUI智能体的高效策略优化框架，将视觉压缩与策略学习联合起来，以缓解交互历史不断增长导致的上下文膨胀问题。
AI.motivation: 多轮GUI任务需要持续保留历史信息，但直接保留全部上下文会造成计算开销迅速上升；现有方法要么通过截断丢失长期信息，要么通过不保结构的裁剪损害空间定位能力，因此需要一种既能压缩又能保持关键视觉区域的方案。
AI.method: 提出Coordinate Compression Policy Optimization（CCPO），核心包含两部分：1）Coordinate-Aware Spatial Compression（CASC），通过汇总多次rollout中的坐标信息，识别目标相关区域，并逐步收缩历史注意力范围，使计算集中在最有信息量的视觉区域；2）Distance-Based Advantage，以距离而非二分类正确性构造更细粒度的学习信号，从而同时提升定位精度和压缩质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，CCPO在四个基准上取得了最优性能，并可实现最高55%的token压缩率和3.8倍的训练速度提升。
AI.conclusion: CCPO通过“坐标感知压缩 + 距离式优势学习”实现了效率与效果的兼顾，为多轮GUI智能体提供了一种兼具结构保真和高效训练的优化框架。

title: Reasoning Matters for 3D Visual Grounding
comment: 2025 CVPR Workshop on 3D-LLM/VLA: Bridging Language, Vision and Action in 3D Environments
summary: The recent development of Large Language Models (LLMs) with strong reasoning ability has driven research in various domains such as mathematics, coding, and scientific discovery. Meanwhile, 3D visual grounding, as a fundamental task in 3D understanding, still remains challenging due to the limited reasoning ability of recent 3D visual grounding models. Most of the current methods incorporate a text encoder and visual feature encoder to generate cross-modal fuse features and predict the referring object. These models often require supervised training on extensive 3D annotation data. On the other hand, recent research also focus on scaling synthetic data to train stronger 3D visual grounding LLM, however, the performance gain remains limited and non-proportional to the data collection cost. In this work, we propose a 3D visual grounding data pipeline, which is capable of automatically synthesizing 3D visual grounding data along with corresponding reasoning process. Additionally, we leverage the generated data for LLM fine-tuning and introduce Reason3DVG-8B, a strong 3D visual grounding LLM that outperforms previous LLM-based method 3D-GRAND using only 1.6% of their training data, demonstrating the effectiveness of our data and the importance of reasoning in 3D visual grounding.

AI.tldr: 该工作提出了一套可自动生成三维视觉定位数据及其推理过程的数据流水线，并据此微调得到Reason3DVG-8B，在仅使用远少于以往方法的训练数据情况下，取得了更好的三维视觉定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有三维视觉定位方法普遍依赖大量标注数据，且模型推理能力不足；而单纯扩大量合成数据带来的性能提升有限，数据采集成本与收益不成比例，因此需要更高效的数据构造方式与更强的推理建模。
AI.method: 作者设计了一个自动化的3D视觉定位数据流水线，可合成三维视觉定位样本及对应的推理过程；随后利用这些数据对大语言模型进行微调，构建出Reason3DVG-8B，用于提升三维视觉定位中的推理与指代解析能力。
AI.result: Reason3DVG-8B在三维视觉定位任务上优于此前基于LLM的方法3D-GRAND，并且只使用了其1.6%的训练数据，说明所生成数据和推理监督具有更高效率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，面向三维视觉定位任务，自动化合成带推理过程的数据比单纯增加数据规模更有效；强化推理建模能够显著提升LLM在3D视觉定位中的表现。

title: Video Evidence to Reasoning Efficient Video Understanding via Explicit Evidence Grounding
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) face a fundamental dilemma in video reasoning: they are caught between the prohibitive computational costs of verbose reasoning and the hallucination risks of efficient, ungrounded approaches. To resolve this, we introduce the Chain of Evidence (CoE), a novel framework that architecturally decouples and co-optimizes perceptual grounding and reasoning efficiency. CoE incorporates two core innovations: (1) A lightweight Evidence Grounding Module (EGM) that acts as a query-guided filter, dynamically identifying and extracting a compact set of high-fidelity visual evidence; and (2) An Evidence-Anchoring Protocol optimized via Reinforcement Learning. Crucially, we design a composite reward mechanism that enforces process alignment, compelling the model to strictly reference identified temporal anchors during deduction, thereby mitigating hallucinations. To enable this, we construct CoE-Instruct, a large-scale dataset (164k samples) featuring a novel dual-annotation schema for separate perception and reasoning supervision. Extensive experiments on five benchmarks, including Video-MME, MVBench, and VSI-Bench, demonstrate that CoE-enhanced models establish a new state-of-the-art. They significantly outperform existing methods in accuracy, proving CoE to be a powerful and practical paradigm for reliable video understanding.

AI.tldr: 提出了Chain of Evidence（CoE）框架，用轻量级证据定位模块和强化学习中的证据锚定协议，将视频理解中的感知对齐与推理效率分离并联合优化，从而提升准确率并降低幻觉风险。
AI.motivation: 现有大视觉语言模型在视频推理中面临两难：一方面，冗长推理计算成本高；另一方面，高效但缺乏充分依据的方法容易产生幻觉。作者希望在保持效率的同时，增强推理过程对视觉证据的依赖。
AI.method: CoE包含两个核心部分：一是Evidence Grounding Module（EGM），作为查询引导的轻量筛选器，动态提取少量高置信度视觉证据；二是通过强化学习优化的Evidence-Anchoring Protocol，配合复合奖励机制约束模型在推理时严格引用已识别的时间锚点。为训练该框架，作者构建了CoE-Instruct数据集，包含16.4万样本，并采用感知与推理分离标注。
AI.result: 在Video-MME、MVBench、VSI-Bench等五个基准上，CoE增强模型取得了新的最优结果，整体准确率显著优于已有方法，同时表现出更强的可靠视频理解能力。
AI.conclusion: CoE为视频推理提供了一种实用的新范式：先高效定位证据，再基于证据进行受约束推理。该设计兼顾效率、准确性和抗幻觉能力，具有较强的应用价值。

title: PlaM: Training-Free Plateau-Guided Model Merging for Better Visual Grounding in MLLMs
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) rely on strong linguistic reasoning inherited from their base language models. However, multimodal instruction fine-tuning paradoxically degrades this text's reasoning capability, undermining multimodal performance. To address this issue, we propose a training-free framework to mitigate this degradation. Through layer-wise vision token masking, we reveal a common three-stage pattern in multimodal large language models: early-modal separation, mid-modal alignment, and late-modal degradation. By analyzing the behavior of MLLMs at different stages, we propose a plateau-guided model merging method that selectively injects base language model parameters into MLLMs. Experimental results based on five MLLMs on nine benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Attention-based analysis further reveals that merging shifts attention from diffuse, scattered patterns to focused localization on task-relevant visual regions. Our repository is on https://github.com/wzj1718/PlaM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的框架，用于缓解多模态大语言模型在多模态指令微调后出现的文本推理能力退化问题，并通过分阶段分析与模型合并提升多项基准表现。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型虽然继承了基础语言模型较强的语言推理能力，但在进行多模态指令微调后，常会出现文本推理能力下降，进而影响整体多模态性能。作者希望在不额外训练的前提下，减轻这种能力退化。
AI.method: 作者采用逐层视觉token遮蔽分析，发现模型普遍经历早期模态分离、中期模态对齐、后期模态退化三个阶段。在此基础上，提出一种基于平台期引导的模型合并方法，选择性地将基础语言模型参数注入多模态模型，以恢复推理能力并改善视觉关注模式。
AI.result: 在5个多模态大语言模型和9个基准测试上的实验表明，该方法有效提升了模型表现。注意力分析进一步显示，合并后模型的注意力由分散、松散的模式转向更聚焦于任务相关视觉区域。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，多模态指令微调导致的推理退化可以通过分阶段行为分析与参数选择性合并来缓解；所提出的训练-free框架具有较好的通用性和实用性。

title: ShowUI-Aloha: Human-Taught GUI Agent
summary: Graphical User Interfaces (GUIs) are central to human-computer interaction, yet automating complex GUI tasks remains a major challenge for autonomous agents, largely due to a lack of scalable, high-quality training data. While recordings of human demonstrations offer a rich data source, they are typically long, unstructured, and lack annotations, making them difficult for agents to learn from.To address this, we introduce ShowUI-Aloha, a comprehensive pipeline that transforms unstructured, in-the-wild human screen recordings from desktop environments into structured, actionable tasks. Our framework includes four key components: A recorder that captures screen video along with precise user interactions like mouse clicks, keystrokes, and scrolls. A learner that semantically interprets these raw interactions and the surrounding visual context, translating them into descriptive natural language captions. A planner that reads the parsed demonstrations, maintains task states, and dynamically formulates the next high-level action plan based on contextual reasoning. An executor that faithfully carries out these action plans at the OS level, performing precise clicks, drags, text inputs, and window operations with safety checks and real-time feedback. Together, these components provide a scalable solution for collecting and parsing real-world human data, demonstrating a viable path toward building general-purpose GUI agents that can learn effectively from simply observing humans.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出ShowUI-Aloha，一个将真实桌面屏幕录制转化为结构化可执行任务的完整流水线，用于缓解GUI智能体训练数据稀缺且难以利用的问题。
AI.motivation: 图形用户界面自动化仍然困难，核心瓶颈在于缺乏可扩展、高质量的训练数据。人类演示虽然信息丰富，但通常冗长、无结构且缺少标注，难以直接用于智能体学习，因此需要把原始演示转成结构化任务与动作序列。
AI.method: 提出四个模块：1）录制器，采集屏幕视频及鼠标点击、键盘输入、滚动等精确交互；2）学习器，结合视觉上下文对原始交互进行语义理解并生成自然语言描述；3）规划器，读取解析后的演示，维护任务状态，并基于上下文推理动态生成下一步高层动作计划；4）执行器，在操作系统层面执行点击、拖拽、文本输入和窗口操作，并加入安全检查与实时反馈。
AI.result: 该流水线能够将野外真实桌面录屏转化为结构化、可执行的数据，为大规模收集与解析人类演示提供了可行方案，也展示了从“观察人类”中学习通用GUI任务的路径。
AI.conclusion: ShowUI-Aloha通过“录制-理解-规划-执行”的闭环设计，提升了真实GUI数据的可用性和可扩展性，为构建更通用的GUI智能体提供了基础方法。

title: V2P: Visual Attention Calibration for GUI Grounding via Background Suppression and Center Peaking
comment: This work was intended as a replacement of arXiv:2508.13634 and any subsequent updates will appear there
summary: Precise localization of GUI elements is crucial for the development of GUI agents. Traditional methods rely on bounding box or center-point regression, neglecting spatial interaction uncertainty and visual-semantic hierarchies. Recent methods incorporate attention mechanisms but still face two key issues: (1) ignoring processing background regions causes attention drift from the desired area, and (2) uniform modeling the target UI element fails to distinguish between its center and edges, leading to click imprecision. Inspired by how humans visually process and interact with GUI elements, we propose the Valley-to-Peak (V2P) method to address these issues. To mitigate background distractions, V2P introduces a suppression attention mechanism that minimizes the model's focus on irrelevant regions to highlight the intended region. For the issue of center-edge distinction, V2P applies a Fitts' Law-inspired approach by modeling GUI interactions as 2D Gaussian heatmaps where the weight gradually decreases from the center towards the edges. The weight distribution follows a Gaussian function, with the variance determined by the target's size. Consequently, V2P effectively isolates the target area and teaches the model to concentrate on the most essential point of the UI element. The model trained by V2P achieves the performance with 92.4\% and 52.5\% on two benchmarks ScreenSpot-v2 and ScreenSpot-Pro (see Fig.~\ref{fig:main_results_charts}). Ablations further confirm each component's contribution, underscoring V2P's generalizability in precise GUI grounding tasks and its potential for real-world deployment in future GUI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出V2P（Valley-to-Peak）方法，用于提升GUI元素的精确定位能力，核心是通过抑制背景干扰和用高斯热图刻画中心到边缘的权重衰减来减少点击偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI定位方法主要依赖边界框或中心点回归，容易忽略空间交互中的不确定性与视觉语义层次；同时，注意力机制方法仍存在背景区域干扰导致注意力漂移，以及对目标元素内部中心与边缘缺乏区分、从而造成点击不精确的问题。
AI.method: V2P包含两部分设计：一是引入抑制注意力机制，降低模型对无关背景区域的关注，突出目标区域；二是借鉴Fitts定律，将GUI交互建模为二维高斯热图，使权重从中心向边缘逐渐衰减，并根据目标大小设定方差，以强化对关键点击点的学习。
AI.result: 在ScreenSpot-v2和ScreenSpot-Pro两个基准上，模型分别取得92.4%和52.5%的性能；消融实验验证了各组件均有贡献，说明该方法具有较好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: V2P通过“抑制背景干扰+中心优先建模”的策略，显著提升了GUI元素的精确grounding能力，为未来GUI agents的真实部署提供了有价值的技术路径。

title: TagSpeech: End-to-End Multi-Speaker ASR and Diarization with Fine-Grained Temporal Grounding
summary: We present TagSpeech, a unified LLM-based framework that utilizes Temporal Anchor Grounding for joint multi-speaker ASR and diarization. The framework is built on two key designs: (1) decoupled semantic and speaker streams fine-tuned via Serialized Output Training (SOT) to learn turn-taking dynamics; and (2) an interleaved time anchor mechanism that not only supports fine-grained timestamp prediction but also acts as a synchronization signal between semantic understanding and speaker tracking. Compared to previous works that primarily focus on speaker-attributed ASR or implicit diarization, TagSpeech addresses the challenge of fine-grained speaker-content alignment and explicitly models "who spoke what and when" in an end-to-end manner. Experiments on AMI and AliMeeting benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves consistent improvements in Diarization Error Rate (DER) over strong end-to-end baselines, including Qwen-Omni and Gemini, particularly in handling complex speech overlaps. Moreover, TagSpeech employs a parameter-efficient training paradigm in which the LLM backbone is frozen and only lightweight projectors are trained, resulting in strong performance with low computational cost.

AI.tldr: TagSpeech提出了一个基于大语言模型的统一框架，用时间锚点显式对齐语义与说话人信息，实现联合多说话人识别与分离，重点解决“谁在什么时候说了什么”的细粒度建模问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么侧重带说话人属性的语音识别，要么依赖隐式分离，难以准确处理复杂重叠语音下的内容与说话人对齐，因此需要一种端到端、显式、统一的建模方案。
AI.method: 方法包含两项核心设计：一是将语义流与说话人流解耦，并通过序列化输出训练学习轮次切换动态；二是引入交错时间锚点机制，用于细粒度时间戳预测并作为语义理解与说话人跟踪之间的同步信号。训练上冻结LLM主干，仅训练轻量投影层，实现参数高效微调。
AI.result: 在AMI和AliMeeting数据集上，相比包括Qwen-Omni和Gemini在内的强基线，TagSpeech在说话人分离错误率上取得稳定提升，尤其在复杂语音重叠场景下表现更好，同时保持较低计算开销。
AI.conclusion: TagSpeech证明了通过时间锚点与语义-说话人双流协同建模，可以有效提升多说话人ASR与分离的一体化性能，并以较低训练成本实现强竞争力。

title: MedGround: Bridging the Evidence Gap in Medical Vision-Language Models with Verified Grounding Data
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) can generate convincing clinical narratives, yet frequently struggle to visually ground their statements. We posit this limitation arises from the scarcity of high-quality, large-scale clinical referring-localization pairs. To address this, we introduce MedGround, an automated pipeline that transforms segmentation resources into high-quality medical referring grounding data. Leveraging expert masks as spatial anchors, MedGround precisely derives localization targets, extracts shape and spatial cues, and guides VLMs to synthesize natural, clinically grounded queries that reflect morphology and location. To ensure data rigor, a multi-stage verification system integrates strict formatting checks, geometry- and medical-prior rules, and image-based visual judging to filter out ambiguous or visually unsupported samples. Finally, we present MedGround-35K, a novel multimodal medical dataset. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VLMs trained with MedGround-35K consistently achieve improved referring grounding performance, enhance multi-object semantic disambiguation, and exhibit strong generalization to unseen grounding settings. This work highlights MedGround as a scalable, data-driven approach to anchor medical language to verifiable visual evidence. Dataset and code will be released publicly upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MedGround自动化数据构建流水线，将分割标注资源转化为高质量医学指代定位数据，并发布MedGround-35K数据集，用于提升视觉-语言模型的医学视觉指代与定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型虽然能生成看似合理的临床叙述，但常常缺乏对图像证据的可靠视觉锚定；作者认为核心原因是高质量、大规模医学指代定位配对数据不足。
AI.method: MedGround以专家分割掩膜作为空间锚点，自动推导定位目标，提取形状与空间线索，并引导模型生成符合临床表达、同时与形态和位置一致的自然查询；随后通过多阶段验证系统进行严格格式检查、基于几何与医学先验的规则过滤，以及基于图像的视觉判别，去除含糊或缺乏视觉支持的样本。
AI.result: 构建了新的多模态医学数据集MedGround-35K；实验表明，使用该数据集训练的视觉-语言模型在指代定位任务上表现更好，能够更有效地区分多个目标的语义，并对未见过的定位场景展现出较强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MedGround提供了一种可扩展、数据驱动的方法，将医学语言与可验证的视觉证据对齐，为医学视觉-语言模型的指代定位能力提升提供了高质量数据基础。

title: ArrowGEV: Grounding Events in Video via Learning the Arrow of Time
summary: Grounding events in videos serves as a fundamental capability in video analysis. While Vision Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly employed for this task, existing approaches predominantly train models to associate events with timestamps in the forward video only. This paradigm hinders VLMs from capturing the inherent temporal structure and directionality of events, thereby limiting robustness and generalization. To address this limitation, inspired by the arrow of time in physics, which characterizes the intrinsic directionality of temporal processes, we propose ArrowGEV, a reinforcement learning framework that explicitly models temporal directionality in events to improve both event grounding and temporal directionality understanding in VLMs. Specifically, we categorize events into time-sensitive (e.g., putting down a bag) and time-insensitive (e.g., holding a towel in the left hand). The former denote events whose reversal substantially alters their meaning, while the latter remain semantically unchanged under reversal. For time-sensitive events, ArrowGEV introduces a reward that encourages VLMs to discriminate between forward and backward videos, whereas for time-insensitive events, it enforces consistent grounding across both directions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ArrowGEV not only improves grounding precision and temporal directionality recognition, but also enhances general video understanding and reasoning ability.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出ArrowGEV，一种用于视频事件定位的强化学习框架，通过显式建模事件的时间方向性，提升VLM在事件定位、方向性识别以及整体视频理解上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有视频语言模型主要只学习前向视频中的事件与时间戳对应关系，难以捕捉事件的时间结构和方向性，导致鲁棒性与泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 方法将事件分为时间敏感和时间不敏感两类：前者在正向与反向视频中语义差异明显，后者在反向后语义基本不变。ArrowGEV基于这一划分设计强化学习奖励：对时间敏感事件，鼓励模型区分正反向视频；对时间不敏感事件，约束模型在两种方向下保持一致的定位结果。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，ArrowGEV在事件定位精度和时间方向性识别方面均有提升，同时还增强了通用视频理解和推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明，显式建模视频事件的时间方向性可以有效补足传统前向训练范式的不足，从而提升VLM在视频事件定位及相关理解任务上的综合性能。

title: From Off-Policy to On-Policy: Enhancing GUI Agents via Bi-level Expert-to-Policy Assimilation
summary: Vision-language models are increasingly deployed as computer-use agents (CUAs) that operate desktops and browsers. Top-performing CUAs are framework-based systems that decompose planning and execution, while end-to-end screenshot-to-action policies are easier to deploy but lag behind on benchmarks such as OSWorld-Verified. GUI datasets like OSWorld pose two bottlenecks: they expose only a few hundred interactive, verifiable tasks and environments, and expert trajectories must be gathered by interacting with these environments, making such data hard to scale. We therefore ask how reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) can best exploit a small pool of exist expert trajectories to train end-to-end policies. Naively mixing these off-policy traces into on-policy RLVR is brittle: even after format conversion, expert trajectories exhibit structural mismatch and distribution shift from the learner. We propose BEPA (Bi-Level Expert-to-Policy Assimilation), which turns static expert traces into policy-aligned guidance via self-rolled reachable trajectories under the base policy (LEVEL-1) and a per-task, dynamically updated cache used in RLVR (LEVEL-2). On OSWorld-Verified, BEPA improves UITARS1.5-7B success from 22.87% to 32.13% and raises a held-out split from 5.74% to 10.30%, with consistent gains on MMBench-GUI and Online-Mind2Web. Our code and data are available at: https://github.com/LEON-gittech/Verl_GUI.git

AI.tldr: 本文提出BEPA，一种用于具备可验证奖励的强化学习方法，旨在更有效利用少量专家轨迹来训练端到端电脑使用代理。该方法通过两级机制将静态专家轨迹转化为与当前策略对齐的训练信号，并在多个GUI基准上取得了明显提升。
AI.motivation: GUI任务数据稀缺且获取成本高：可验证任务数量有限，专家轨迹又必须在真实环境中交互采集，难以规模化。直接将离线专家轨迹混入在线强化学习容易产生结构不匹配和分布偏移，因此需要一种更稳健的利用专家数据的方法。
AI.method: 提出BEPA（Bi-Level Expert-to-Policy Assimilation）：一级通过基于基础策略的自回滚可达轨迹，将专家轨迹转换为更贴近当前策略分布的指导；二级为每个任务维护动态更新的缓存，并在RLVR过程中持续使用和调整这些对齐后的轨迹，从而缓解离策略数据带来的不稳定问题。
AI.result: 在OSWorld-Verified上，BEPA将UITARS1.5-7B的成功率从22.87%提升到32.13%；在保留划分上从5.74%提升到10.30%。此外，在MMBench-GUI和Online-Mind2Web上也观察到一致增益。
AI.conclusion: BEPA证明了：在少量专家轨迹条件下，通过将离线示范先对齐到当前策略，再结合动态缓存进行强化学习，可以显著提升端到端GUI智能体性能，并优于直接混合离线轨迹的朴素做法。

title: GeM-VG: Towards Generalized Multi-image Visual Grounding with Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated impressive progress in single-image grounding and general multi-image understanding. Recently, some methods begin to address multi-image grounding. However, they are constrained by single-target localization and limited types of practical tasks, due to the lack of unified modeling for generalized grounding tasks. Therefore, we propose GeM-VG, an MLLM capable of Generalized Multi-image Visual Grounding. To support this, we systematically categorize and organize existing multi-image grounding tasks according to their reliance of cross-image cues and reasoning, and introduce the MG-Data-240K dataset, addressing the limitations of existing datasets regarding target quantity and image relation. To tackle the challenges of robustly handling diverse multi-image grounding tasks, we further propose a hybrid reinforcement finetuning strategy that integrates chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning and direct answering, considering their complementary strengths. This strategy adopts an R1-like algorithm guided by a carefully designed rule-based reward, effectively enhancing the model's overall perception and reasoning capabilities. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior generalized grounding capabilities of our model. For multi-image grounding, it outperforms the previous leading MLLMs by 2.0% and 9.7% on MIG-Bench and MC-Bench, respectively. In single-image grounding, it achieves a 9.1% improvement over the base model on ODINW. Furthermore, our model retains strong capabilities in general multi-image understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GeM-VG，一种面向通用多图像视觉定位的多模态大语言模型，并构建MG-Data-240K数据集与混合强化微调策略，以提升多图像定位、单图像定位和多图像理解的综合能力。
AI.motivation: 现有多图像定位方法多受限于单目标定位和任务类型单一，缺乏统一建模框架，难以覆盖更广泛的实际定位场景；同时，现有数据集在目标数量与图像关系建模方面也存在不足。
AI.method: 作者首先按跨图像线索依赖和推理需求系统划分多图像定位任务，并据此构建MG-Data-240K数据集。随后提出混合强化微调策略，将链式思维推理与直接回答结合起来，使用规则驱动的奖励设计并采用类似R1的训练算法，以增强模型的感知与推理能力。
AI.result: 实验显示，GeM-VG在多图像定位任务上分别较以往最优多模态大语言模型在MIG-Bench和MC-Bench上提升2.0%和9.7%；在单图像定位ODINW上较基础模型提升9.1%；同时还能保持较强的通用多图像理解能力。
AI.conclusion: GeM-VG通过统一任务建模、补充高质量数据和结合推理/直答的强化微调，实现了更强的通用多图像视觉定位能力，并兼顾单图像定位与多图像理解性能。

title: GUITester: Enabling GUI Agents for Exploratory Defect Discovery
summary: Exploratory GUI testing is essential for software quality but suffers from high manual costs. While Multi-modal Large Language Model (MLLM) agents excel in navigation, they fail to autonomously discover defects due to two core challenges: \textit{Goal-Oriented Masking}, where agents prioritize task completion over reporting anomalies, and \textit{Execution-Bias Attribution}, where system defects are misidentified as agent errors. To address these, we first introduce \textbf{GUITestBench}, the first interactive benchmark for this task, featuring 143 tasks across 26 defects. We then propose \textbf{GUITester}, a multi-agent framework that decouples navigation from verification via two modules: (i) a \textit{Planning-Execution Module (PEM)} that proactively probes for defects via embedded testing intents, and (ii) a \textit{Hierarchical Reflection Module (HRM)} that resolves attribution ambiguity through interaction history analysis. GUITester achieves an F1-score of 48.90\% (Pass@3) on GUITestBench, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines (33.35\%). Our work demonstrates the feasibility of autonomous exploratory testing and provides a robust foundation for future GUI quality assurance~\footnote{Our code is now available in~\href{https://github.com/ADaM-BJTU/GUITestBench}{https://github.com/ADaM-BJTU/GUITestBench}}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个面向探索式GUI测试的交互式基准GUITestBench，并设计了多智能体框架GUITester，用于将导航与缺陷验证解耦，从而提升自主发现界面缺陷的能力。
AI.motivation: 探索式GUI测试对软件质量很重要，但人工成本高；现有多模态大语言模型智能体虽然擅长界面导航，却难以自主发现缺陷，主要受两个问题影响：一是更偏向完成任务而忽略异常报告，二是难以区分缺陷与自身执行错误。
AI.method: 作者构建了GUITestBench，包含143个任务和26个缺陷；同时提出GUITester多智能体框架，包含规划-执行模块（通过嵌入测试意图主动探测缺陷）和层次化反思模块（结合交互历史分析，解决归因歧义），以实现导航与验证分离。
AI.result: GUITester在GUITestBench上取得48.90%的F1分数（Pass@3），优于当前最优基线33.35%。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，自动化探索式GUI测试是可行的；GUITestBench可作为后续GUI质量保障研究的基础，而GUITester展示了通过“主动探测+归因反思”提升缺陷发现能力的有效路径。
